Joshua19:5 Ziklag, Beth Markaboth, Hazarsusah," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beth Markaboth, Hazarsusim, Bethbiri le Shaaraim ah teeng uh hi. Hihte pen Davidʼ uk hun mateng amauteʼ khuapite ahi hi." 
Matthew1:1 Abrahamʼ suan David, Davidʼ suan Jesu Khrisʼ khang ciaptehna hih bang ahi hi." 
Matthew1:2 Abraham ta Isaac, Isaac ta Jakob, Jakob ta Judah le a sanggamte ahi uh hi." 
Matthew1:3 Judah ta Perez le Zerah hi a, Tamar tawh a neih a ta ahi uh hi. Perez ta Hezron, Hezron ta Ram," 
Matthew1:4 Ram ta Amminadab, Amminadab ta Nahshon, Nahshon ta Salmon," 
Matthew1:5 Salmon ta Boaz, Rahab tawh a neih a ta ahi hi. Boaz ta Obed, Ruth tawh a neih a ta ahi hi. Obed ta Jessi," 
Matthew1:6 Jessi ta kumpi David ahi hi. David ta Solomon, Uriahʼ zi Bathsheba tawh a neih pen ahi hi." 
Matthew1:7 Solomon ta Rehoboam, Rehoboam ta Abijah, Abijah ta Asa," 
Matthew1:8 Asa ta Jehoshafat, Jehoshafat ta Joram, Joram ta Uzziah," 
Matthew1:9 Uzziah ta Jotham, Jotham ta Ahaz, Ahaz ta Hezekiah," 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiah ta Manasseh, Manasseh ta Amon, Amon ta Josiah," 
Matthew1:11 Josiah ta Jekhoniah le a sanggamte hi a, Babylon gamah Israel mite salin a kipaipih hun pawlin a suak ahi uh hi." 
Matthew1:12 Jekhoniah ta Shealtiel, Shealtiel ta Zerubbabel," 
Matthew1:13 Zerubbabel ta Abiud, Abiud ta Eliakim, Eliakim ta Azor," 
Matthew1:14 Azor ta Zadok, Zadok ta Akhim, Akhim ta Eliud," 
Matthew1:15 Eliud ta Eleazer, Eleazer ta Matthan, Matthan ta Jakob," 
Matthew1:16 Jakob ta Josef hi a, Josef pen Khris a kici Jesuʼ nu Mary’ pasal ahi hi." 
Matthew1:17 Hih bang ahih manin Abraham panin David ciang dong khang sawm le li pha a, David panin Babylon gamah salin a kipaikhiat pih dong khang sawm le li mah pha a, Babylon gamah salin a kipaikhiat pih a kipanin Khris a suah hun ciang dong khang sawm le li mah a pha hi." 
Matthew1:18 Jesu Khris a hong suahna zia hih bang ahi hi. Mary pen Josef adingin zuthawl piak sa hi a, ahi zongin a kiteen taktak ma-un Kha Siangtho in amah a gaisakna thu Mary in a thei hi." 
Matthew1:19 A lawmpa Josef pen a manin a gamta nuam mi khat ahih manin a lawmnu maizumsak nuam lo a, kuama theih lohin mak sim dingin a ngaihsun hi." 
Matthew1:20 Ahi zongin hih bangin thu a ngaihsut laitakin a mang sungah Topaʼ vantungmi khat hong kilang a, “David suan Josef aw, Mary sunga nau pen Kha Siangtho in a gaisak ahih manin amah teenpih ngam lah kei in." 
Matthew1:21 Amah in tapa khat hong nei dinga, tua tapa in ama mite a mawhna uh panin hon khia ding ahih manin ama min dingin Jesu na phuak ding hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi." 
Matthew1:22 Topa in kamsang pa tungtawnin a gen sa thu a tun theih nadingin hih thute a piang ahi hi. Tua a genna ah," 
Matthew1:23 “Nungak khat gai-in tapa khat nei dinga, ama min dingin Emmanuel kiphuak ding hi,” ci hi. Emmanuel a khiatna in, eite tawh Pasian hong om khawm hi, a cihna ahi hi." 
Matthew1:24 Josef zong a khanlawh ciangin Topaʼ vantungmiʼ sawl bangin a zi a la hi. 
Matthew1:25 Ahi zongin tua tapa a suah hun dongin a zi luppih lo a, a suah ciangin a min dingin Jesu a phuak hi." 
Matthew2:1 Herod in Judea gamah kumpi a sep hun laitakin tua gam sung Bethlehem khua ah Jesu a suak hi. A suah khit phetin aksi thu lamsang a siam mi pawl khat, nisuahna lam panin Jerusalem ah hong tung uh a," 
Matthew2:1 Herod in Judea gamah kumpi a sep hun laitakin tua gam sung Bethlehem khua ah Jesu a suak hi. A suah khit phetin aksi thu lamsang a siam mi pawl khat, nisuahna lam panin Jerusalem ah hong tung uh a," 
Matthew2:2 “Jew miteʼ kumpi ding ahi naungek a hong suak pen koi lai ah om ahi hiam? Nisuahna lam pan ama aksi hong suah ciangin ka mu uh a, amah a bia dingin a hong pai ka hi uh hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Matthew2:3 Kumpi Herod in hih thu a zak ciangin lamdang sa mahmah a, Jerusalem khuami khempeuh in zong lamdang a sa ciat uh hi." 
Matthew2:4 Tua ahih manin Herod in siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate khempeuh kaikhawm a, “Koi lai ah Khris suak ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Matthew2:5 Amaute in, “Kamsang pa in a lai gelhna sungah, ‘Judah gamah a om Bethlehem khua aw, ka mi Israel-te a uk dingin nangma sung panin ukpa khat hong piang ding ahih manin Judah gam a uk khuate lakah a neu na hi het kei hi,’ ci ahih manin Judea gam sung Bethlehem khua ah suak ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew2:5 Amaute in, “Kamsang pa in a lai gelhna sungah, ‘Judah gamah a om Bethlehem khua aw, ka mi Israel-te a uk dingin nangma sung panin ukpa khat hong piang ding ahih manin Judah gam a uk khuate lakah a neu na hi het kei hi,’ ci ahih manin Judea gam sung Bethlehem khua ah suak ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew2:6  
Matthew2:7 Tua ciangin Herod in tua mipilte sam sim a, aksi a kilat hun teltakin a dot khit ciangin," 
Matthew2:8 Bethlehem khua ah a pai nadingun sawl a, “Tua naungek limtakin va zong unla, kei zong hong pai-in amah ka biak theih nadingin na muh khit uh ciangin kei kiangah thu hong zasak un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Matthew2:9 Amaute in kumpipaʼ vaikhak thu teng a zak khit uh ciangin paikhia uh a, nisuahna lamah a muh uh aksi mah, lam a pai laitakun mu uh a, naungek omna tung san tak a tun matengin amaute mai ah tua aksi na pai hi." 
Matthew2:10 Tua aksi a muh uh ciangin a lungdamna uh kigen thei lo hi. 
Matthew2:11 Inn sungah amaute lut uh a, naungek le a nu Mary a mu uh hi. Amaute khukdinin tua naungek a biak khit uh ciangin a van puakte uh suah khia uh a, kham, saledi paknamtui le myrrh paknamtuite, letsongin a pia uh hi." 
Matthew2:12 Herod kiangah a kihilkik loh nadingun a mang sung uh ah Pasian in hilh ahih manin, lampi dang tawnin a gam uh ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
Matthew2:13 Tua mipilte a ciah khit uh ciangin Josefʼ mang sungah Topaʼ vantungmi khat hong kilang a, “Kithawi-in naungek le a nu, Egypt gamah taipih in. Pai khia un, ci-in kong genkik matengin tua gamah va om un. Herod in naungek thah dingin hong zong ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew2:14 Josef zong kithawi pah a, Egypt gam a zuan dingin naungek le a nu tawh zanpi mahin ding khia uh a," 
Matthew2:15 Herod a sih hun ciang dong tua gamah a va om uh hi. Kamsang pa tungtawnin Topa in, “Egypt gam panin ka Tapa ka sam khia hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tun nadingin hih bangin a piang ahi hi." 
Matthew2:16 Nisuahna lam panin a hong pai mipilte in amah a khem lamtak Herod in a theih ciangin a heh suak mahmah hi. Tua mipilte tung panin aksi a kilat hun a dotna tawh kizui-in, Bethlehem khua le a kiim a om naungek kum nih ciang le a nuaisiah khempeuh a that dingin a galkapte a sawl hi." 
Matthew2:17 Hih bangin thu hong pian ciangin kamsang pa Jeremiah in," 
Matthew2:18 “Nakpi tak a kahna awging Ramah gam sungah kiza hi. Rachel in a tate kah a, a tate khempeuh si khin ahih manin a kah a tawp nadingin kikhem zo lo hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
Matthew2:19 Herod a sih khit ciangin Egypt gam a om Josef kiangah Topaʼ vantungmi khat hong kilang a," 
Matthew2:20 “Naupang a that nuam mite si khinta ahih ciangin kithawi inla, naupang le a nu tawh Israel gamah ciah un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew2:21 Josef zong kithawi-in, naupang le a nu tawh Israel gamah a ciah uh hi." 
Matthew2:22 Ahi zongin Arkhelaus in a pa Herodʼ za laihin Judea gam uk mahin a omna thu a zak ciangin tua gamah Josef ciah ngam lo hi. Tua ahih manin a mang sung mahah a kihilna bangin Galilee gam sungah lutin," 
Matthew2:22 Ahi zongin Arkhelaus in a pa Herodʼ za laihin Judea gam uk mahin a omna thu a zak ciangin tua gamah Josef ciah ngam lo hi. Tua ahih manin a mang sung mahah a kihilna bangin Galilee gam sungah lutin," 
Matthew2:23 Nazareth khua ah a teeng uh hi. Kamsangte in, “Amah pen Nazareth khuami kici ding hi,” ci-in a gen kholhna a tun nadingin hih bangin a piang ahi hi." 
Matthew3:1 Tua hun laitakin tuiphumpa Johan hong pai-in, Judea gam sungah thuhilh hong kipan a," 
Matthew3:1 Tua hun laitakin tuiphumpa Johan hong pai-in, Judea gam sungah thuhilh hong kipan a," 
Matthew3:2 “Vantung ki-ukna hun hong nai ta ahih manin na mawhnate uh kisikkik un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew3:3 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topaʼ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin hih Johanʼ thu a gen ahi hi." 
Matthew3:4 Johan in kalaoh mul kigan puan silhin, savun kawnggak tawh a kawng gak a, kauphe le gamlak khuaizu tawh a kivak hi." 
Matthew3:5 Jerusalem khua, Judea gam sung le Jordan Gun kiim gam panin mite hong pai uh hi." 
Matthew3:5 Jerusalem khua, Judea gam sung le Jordan Gun kiim gam panin mite hong pai uh hi." 
Matthew3:6 Amaute in a mawhnate uh hong pulak uh a, Johan in Jordan Gun sungah amaute a tuiphum hi." 
Matthew3:7 Ahi zongin Farisi mite le Saddusi mite tampi tak tui a kiphum dingin a hong pai a muh ciangin Johan in amaute kiangah, “Gul bangin ngian a zang note aw, a hong tung ding Pasianʼ hehna panin na suahtak theih nading uh kua in hong hilh khol ahi hiam?" 
Matthew3:8 Na kisikkikna uh a kilangsak ding gamtatna gamta unla," 
Matthew3:9 ‘Abrahamʼ suante ihi ngawn hi,’ cihna lungsim nei mawk kei un. Keʼn kong cih in ah, Pasian in hih suangte nangawn Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte-in a bawl thei hi lel hi." 
Matthew3:10 Tu mahmah in sing a bulphuk dingin hei tawh kingim zo hi. Tua ahih manin gah hoih a gah lo sing khempeuh kiphukin meikhuk sungah kikhul ding hi. 
Matthew3:11 Na kisikkik khitna uh a kilat nadingin tui sungah note ka hong phum a, ahi zongin kei nungah a hong pai pa in Kha Siangtho le mei sungah note hong phum ding hi. Tua a hong pai ding pa pen kei sangin nakpi takin lian zaw a, ama khedap a tawisak ding nangawnin ka kilawm zo nai kei hi." 
Matthew3:12 Amah in a khut ah anzapna tawi-in a ante zap a, a taksate khawmin a ansal sungah koih dinga, a ansite ahihleh a mit ngei lo mei sungah a khul ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Matthew3:13 Tua laitakin Galilee gam panin Jesu hong pai a, Johanʼ khut sungah a kituiphum dingin ama omna Jordan Gun ah a hong tung hi." 
Matthew3:14 Ahi zongin Johan in na tuiphum nuam lo a, “Nang in kei nong tuiphum dingin a kilawm zaw kimlai, keiʼ phum dingin nang hong pai zawsop na hi hiam?” a na ci hi." 
Matthew3:15 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Pasian in hih dingin kisam a sak khempeuh i hih ding a kilawm thu ahih manin tu-in hong phum hoh in,” a cih ciangin Johan in zong a mang hi." 
Matthew3:16 Jesu a kituiphum khit phetin tui sung panin a paikhia pah hi. Tua laitakin vantung hong kihong a, vakhu bangin Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho hong kum sukin ama tungah a khawl a mu hi." 
Matthew3:17 Tua sung mahin vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Hih pen ka it mahmah ka Tapa hi a, ama tungah ka lungkim mahmah hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Matthew4:1 Tua ciangin Dawimangpaʼ ze-etna a thuak dingin Kha Siangtho in gamlak ah Jesu a paipih hi. 
Matthew4:2 Jesu in sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung an ne loin om khin ahih manin a gil a kial hi. 
Matthew4:3 Tua ciangin ama kiangah Dawimangpa hong pai a, “Pasianʼ Tapa na hih takpi leh hih suangte anlum a suah nadingin thu pia in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew4:4 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Anlum bek tawh mite nungta lo a, Pasian genkhiat thute tawh nungta zaw hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew4:5 Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in gamlak panin Jerusalem khua ah Jesu paipih a, biakinn khumzang a sang pen munah a kah toh pih khit ciangin," 
Matthew4:6 “Pasianʼ Tapa taktak na hih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Pasian in nang a hong kem dingin a vantung mite hong sawl ding hi. Na khete le suang a kitah khak loh nadingin vantung mite in a khut uh tawh nang hong dom ding hi,’ ci-in kigelh ahih manin, hih lai panin tuak suk in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew4:7 Jesu in, “Lai Siangtho mahah, ‘Na Topa Pasian na ze-et kei in,’ ci-in gen hi lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew4:8 Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in mual sang mahmah khat ah Jesu paipih to a, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh le a hoihna teng a lah khit ciangin," 
Matthew4:9 “Ka mai ah kunin kei hong bia lecin hihte khempeuh nangma tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew4:10 Jesu in, “Satan aw, tai khia in. Lai Siangtho in, ‘Na Topa Pasian bek bia inla, ama na bek sem in,’ ci hi lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew4:11 Tua ciangin Dawimangpa paikhia a, vantung mite hong pai-in Jesu huhin an a vak uh hi." 
Matthew4:12 Jesu in Johan a kimatna thu a zak ciangin Galilee gam sungah va kihem hi. 
Matthew4:13 Galilee gam Nazareth khua ah omsuak loin paikhia leuleu a, Zebulun le Naftali gam sung Galilee Tuili gei-a om Kapernaum khua ah a va teeng hi." 
Matthew4:14 Tua bangin a va teenna pen kamsang pa Isaiah thugen a tun nading ahi hi. Tua a genna ah," 
Matthew4:15 “Gentail miteʼ teenna Galilee gam sung, Jordan Gun gal khat, Tuipi lam pangah a om Zebulun le Naftali gam!" 
Matthew4:16 Khuamial sunga a teeng mite in khuavak lianpi mu ding uh hi. Sihna gam khuamial sungah a teeng mite tungah khuavak hong taang ding hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew4:17 Tua hun a kipan Jesu in thuhilh ding kipan a, “Vantung ki-ukna hong nai ta ahih manin kisikin na om zia uh kheel un,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Matthew4:18 Galilee Tuili gei ah Jesu a pai laitakin ngabeng Peter a kici Simon le a nau Andru, ngen tawh nga khuhin a om a mu hi." 
Matthew4:19 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Kei hong zui un; nga mat bangin pawl tampi a ngah thei mi kong suaksak ding hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew4:20 Amau tegel in zong a ngente uh nusia-in Jesu a zui pah uh hi. 
Matthew4:21 Tua lai panin a paikhiat khit uh ciangin Zebedi tapa James le Johan-te unau, a pa uh tawh gunkuang sungah ngen puah in a om mu leuleu a, amau tegel zong a sam hi." 
Matthew4:21 Tua lai panin a paikhiat khit uh ciangin Zebedi tapa James le Johan-te unau, a pa uh tawh gunkuang sungah ngen puah in a om mu leuleu a, amau tegel zong a sam hi." 
Matthew4:22 Amau tegel in zong gunkuang le a pa uh nusia-in Jesu a zui pah uh hi. 
Matthew4:23 Galilee gam sung khempeuh ah Jesu pai kawikawi a, amauʼ kikhopna innte ah thu hilhin, vantung ki-ukna hangin lungdamna thute hilh a, natna tuamtuam a nei cina khempeuh a damsak hi." 
Matthew4:24 Syria gam sung khempeuh ah ama thu kizel ahih manin dawivei mi, sibup mi, khut zaw khe zaw mi a kipanin natna satna a tuamtuam a nei mi khempeuh ama kiangah hong kipuak a, amah in a vekpi-in a damsak hi." 
Matthew4:25 Galilee gam, Khuapi Sawmte gam, Jerusalem khua, Judea gam le Jordan Gun gal khat gam panin mi tampi tak in Jesu a zui uh hi." 
Matthew4:25 Galilee gam, Khuapi Sawmte gam, Jerusalem khua, Judea gam le Jordan Gun gal khat gam panin mi tampi tak in Jesu a zui uh hi." 
Matthew5:1 Jesu in tua bangin mihon tampi tak a muh ciangin mual tung lamah kah to-in tu suk a, a nungzuite zong ama nai ah hong tu uh hi." 
Matthew5:2 Tua ciangin a kam ka-in amaute tungah thu hilh ding kipan a," 
Matthew5:3 “Kha thu lamah zawngkhal a kisate sungah vantung ki-ukna thu om ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:4 Dahin a thum a tau mite Pasian in amaute hehnem ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:5 A lungnem mite in Pasianʼ ciam sa leitang ngah ding uh ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:6 Pasianʼ deih teng sep ding a hanciamte Pasian in lungkimna ngahsak ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:7 Midang a hehpih mite tungah Pasian in hehpihna pia ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:8 Lungsim takpi tawh Pasian a zong mite in Pasian mu ding ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:9 Kilem nading deihin a hanciam mite in Pasianʼ tate cihna ngah ding uh ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:10 Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamtat manin bawlsiatna a thuak mite vantung ki-ukna sungah a omte ahih manin thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Matthew5:11 “Midangte in keima hangin a man lopi-in hong simmawhin hong bawlsia a, a nam tuamtuamin hong gensiat uh ciangin thupha ngah mi na hi uh hi." 
Matthew5:12 Note adingin vantungah thaman lianpi hong kikoih kholhsak ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin na lungdam un. Noteʼ hun ma-a kamsangte zong tua bangmahin a na kibawlsia ngei ahi hi. 
Matthew5:13 “Note pen leitung mite adingin ci tawh na kibang uh hi. Ahi zongin ci a alna bei leh i alsakkik theih nading lampi om nawn lo hi. A kizat nading bangmah om nawn lo a, miteʼ tuatcil gawp dingin kipaai lel hi." 
Matthew5:14 “Note pen leitung mite adingin khuavak tawh na kibang uh hi. Mual dawnah a om khua kiseelcip thei lo hi. 
Matthew5:15 Mei a vak khit ciangin kuamah in lawh khuh lo hi. Meivakna mun sangah koih zaw a, inn sung khempeuh a taangsak hi." 
Matthew5:16 Midangte in na gamtatna hoihte uh a muh ciangin vantungah a om na Pa uh min a phat theih nadingun mite mai ah na gamtat hoihna uh khuavak bangin na kilangsak un. 
Matthew5:17 “Moses Thukham le kamsangteʼ thuhilhnate a phiat dingin hong pai hi, ci-in hong ngaihsun kei un. Tuate a phiat dingin a hong pai hi loin, amauteʼ hilhna a kicingsak dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi." 
Matthew5:18 Hoihtakin na phawk ding uh thu panin: Vanlelei a bei mateng, hih thukhamte a neu pen khat nangawnʼ deihna tangtung lopi-in mawk mai lo ding hi." 
Matthew5:19 Tua ahih manin hih thukhamte lak pan a neu pente khat bek nangawn zui kha loin, midangte in zong a zuih loh nadingin a gen mite pen vantung ki-ukna sungah mi neu pen hi ding uh hi. Ahi zongin hih thukhamte zui-in, midangte in zong a zuih nadingin a hilh mite pen vantung ki-ukna sungah mi lian hi ding uh hi." 
Matthew5:20 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ deihna bangin gamtat nading thu ah Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite sangin na cihtak zawk uh leh vantung ki-ukna sungah a om thei bek ding na hi uh hi. 
Matthew5:21 “Tanglai mite tungah, ‘Mi that kei un. Mi that peuhmah in sihna thuak ding hi,’ ci-in a kigenna thu na zak sa uh ahi hi." 
Matthew5:22 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: A sanggampa tungah a heh mi in thukhenna thuak kha thei ding hi. A sanggampa kiangah, ‘Bangmah a kimang lo,’ ci-in a ko bawl mi in uliante mai ah thusitna thuak thei dinga, a sanggampa kiangah, ‘Mihai,’ ci-in a simmawh mi in hell meikuang sungah khulna thuak thei ding hi." 
Matthew5:23 Tua ahih manin Pasian tungah biakna a pia dingin biakna tau mai ah na om laitakin na sanggamte khat peuhpeuh na tungah a lungkim lohna thu na phawk leh," 
Matthew5:24 Pasian na biak nading nate, a biakna tau mai ah nusia photin, pai-in na sanggampa tawh va kilem phot inla, tua khit ciangin hong paikikin Pasian biakna pia in." 
Matthew5:25 Nangma tungah mi khatpeuh lungkim loin zumah hong khiat leh, zum na tun ma-un hun om lai-in na kilem pak nadingin hanciam in. Tua hikeileh zum na tun uh ciangin thukhente khut sung na tung dinga, thukhente in palikte khut sungah hong apin, palikte in thong sungah hong khum ding hi." 
Matthew5:26 A mantakin kong genin ah: Na liau sum na piak khit dong matengin thong sung panin na suakta ngei kei ding hi. 
Matthew5:27 “‘Mi zi tungah na mawh kei ding hi,’ ci-in a kigenna thu na zak sa uh ahi hi." 
Matthew5:28 Ahi zongin keʼn kong genin ah: Mawhpih nopna lungsim tawh numei khat a en mi peuhmah in a lungsimah tua numei tawh a mawh ahi hi. 
Matthew5:29 Tua ahih manin na mit taklam in na mawh nading hong piansak leh khel khia inla paai in. Na pumpi bupin hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin na pumpi na khat pelhem leh nang adingin hoih zaw lai hi. 
Matthew5:30 Na taklam khut in na mawh nading hong piansak leh sattan inla paai in. Na pumpi bupin hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin na pumpi na khat pelhem leh nang adingin hoih zaw lai hi. 
Matthew5:31 “‘A zi a ma mi peuhmah in a zi tungah makna lai pia tahen,’ ci-in a kigenna zong na zak khit sa uh ahi hi." 
Matthew5:32 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: Mi khat peuhmah in pasal dang tawh a mawhna hang lobuang, a zi a mak peuhmah a, a zi in pasal a neihkik leh mi tawh a mawh dingin a bawl a suak hi. Tua a kima numei a tenpihte, numei tawh a mawh mah ahi hi." 
Matthew5:33 “Tanglai-in mite tungah, ‘Pasian tungah na kiciamnate uh pelh kei unla, ama tungah na kiciam bangun tungsak un,’ ci-in a kigenna na zak sa uh ahi hi." 
Matthew5:34 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: Hih ding khat peuhpeuh na neih uh ciangin kiciamna na zang vet kei un. Kiciamna-in vantung na zang kei un - Pasianʼ tokhom hi veve hi. 
Matthew5:35 Leitung zong kiciamna-in na zang kei un - Pasianʼ khengakna mah hi veve hi. Jerusalem khuapi zong kiciamna-in na zang kei un - Kumpi lian ahi Pasianʼ khuapi mah hi veve hi. 
Matthew5:36 Kiciamna-in na lutang zong na zang kei in. Na lu tunga om samzang khat bek nangawn a kang sa vomsak thei loin, a vom pen na kangsak thei kei hi." 
Matthew5:37 Na gen peuhmah ahi ahihleh, ‘Hi,’ ci inla, ahi lo ahihleh, ‘Hi lo,’ cihna tawh kicingsak in. Tua bang hi loin kiciamna kam na zat ciangin Dawimangpa tawh kizomin thuman lo na hih lamtak hong kilang hi." 
Matthew5:38 “Note in, ‘Mittang khat tang ding mittang khat, ha khat tang ding ha khat,’ ci-in a kigenna na zak sa uh ahi hi." 
Matthew5:39 Ahi zongin note kiangah keʼn kong genin ah: A gilote na thukkik kei un. Mi khatpeuh in na paang taklam hong bet leh a lang khat zong na dawh lai zaw in. 
Matthew5:40 Mi khatpeuh in na puan sungsilh a ngah nop manin zumah hong khia-in hong laksak leh na puan tungsilh zong na pia thuah lai in. 
Matthew5:41 Galkapte khatpeuh in tai khat sung a van pua dingin hong sawl leh a valin tai khat sung mah na puaksak lai in. 
Matthew5:42 Mi khat peuhpeuh in na khat peuhpeuh hong nget leh na pia inla, nang kiang panin na a hong leitawi mite na pia in." 
Matthew5:43 “Note in, ‘Na veengte uh na it unla, na galte uh na mudah un,’ ci-in a kigenna thu na zak sa uh ahi hi." 
Matthew5:44 Ahi zongin keʼn note kiangah kong genin ah: Na galte uh na it unla, no hong bawlsiate adingin thu na ngetsak un." 
Matthew5:45 Tua hileh vantungah a om na Pa uh tate na hi thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in mihoihte le misiate tungah a kibangin ni taangsak khawm a, a gamtat phate le a gamtat siate tungah zong a kibang mahin guah zusak khawm hi." 
Matthew5:46 Tua ahih manin no hong itte bek na it uh leh Pasian in bang thaman hong pia zenzen ding ahi hiam? Siahdongte nangawn in amau a itte it thei uh hi. 
Matthew5:47 Na lawmte bek uh hopihin thupha na piak uh leh mi mawkmawkte sangin na hoihzawkna uh bang om ahi hiam? Gentail mite nangawn in tua bang ciang lel hih thei uh hi. 
Matthew5:48 Tua ahih manin vantungah a om na Pa uh a cingtaak mah bangin note zong lungsim citakin na cingtaak nading uh na hanciam un. 
Matthew6:1 “Biakna tawh kizomin na hoih khat peuhpeuh na sep uh ciangin miteʼ phat ding deihna tawh a kilang theithei dingin na sep khak loh nadingun na kingaihsun un. Tua bangin gamta le-uhcin, vantungah a om na Pa uh kiang panin thaman na ngah kei ding uh hi." 
Matthew6:2 “Tua ahih manin mi cimawhte tungah huhna na piak uh ciangin, mite in a phat ding uh a deihna tawh a kineihkhem mite in kikhopna inn sung le kongzing lakah a kilang theithei-in a hih uh bangin na hih kei un. Tua bangin a hih mite in thaman a ngah khinta ahihna thu limtakin na phawk un." 
Matthew6:3 Ahi zongin note in mi cimawhte citna tawh na huh uh ciangin na lawm naihuai pente uh nangawn in hong theih loh nadingun pia unla," 
Matthew6:4 kuamah theisak kei un. Tua hileh kuama muh lohin na gamtatna uh a mu na Pa un note tungah thaman hong pia ding hi. 
Matthew6:5 “Note in thu na nget uh ciangin miteʼ muh theih dingin a kineihkhem mite in kikhopna inn sung le kongzing lamka lai ah a nget nop se uh bangin na gamta kei un. Tua bangin a gamtate in thaman a ngah khinta ahihna uh limtakin phawk un. 
Matthew6:6 Ahi zongin thu na nget uh ciangin na inn sung uh ah tumin kong khak unla, na muh theih loh uh na Pa uh kiangah na ngen un. Tua hileh kuama muh lohin na gamtatna uh a hong mu na Pa un noteʼ tungah thaman hong pia ding hi." 
Matthew6:7 “Thu na nget uh ciangin i thunget sau leh Pasian in hong pia deuh ding hi, ci-in a ngaihsun Gentail mite bangin khiatna a nei tum lo kam tampi na luilui kei un." 
Matthew6:8 Tua na thunget ma nangawnun na Pa un noteʼ kisapna teng hong thei khin ahih manin Gentail mite na bang kei un. 
Matthew6:9 Tua ahih manin thu na nget uh ciangin hih bangin na ngen un: ‘Vantung a om koteʼ Pa aw, na min siangtho kizahtak hen." 
Matthew6:10 Na ukna hun hong tung henla, vantung bangin leitungah zong na deih bangin kigamta hen." 
Matthew6:11 Nisim khamkhop an hong pia in. 
Matthew6:12 Kote tungah a hong mawhte mawhmaisakna ka neih bangun koʼ mawhna zong hong maisak in. 
Matthew6:13 Ze-etna lian hong thuaksak keʼn. Giloʼ kiang pan hong hon khia in,’ (Uk zawhna, vangliatna, minthanna, na nei tawntung hi. Amen.) ci-in na ngen ding uh hi." 
Matthew6:14 Note in midangteʼ hong mawhna na maisak uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un zong noteʼ mawhna hong maisak ding hi. 
Matthew6:15 Ahi zongin note in midangteʼ hong mawhna na maisak kei uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un zong noteʼ mawhna hong maisak lo ding hi. 
Matthew6:16 “An na tan uh ciangin a kineihkhem mite bangin mai khingin om kei un. Amaute in an a tanlam uh mite in a theih ding uh a ut manun gilkial mai pua-in a om uh hi. Amaute in a antan thaman uh a ngah khinta ahih lamtak limtakin thei un. 
Matthew6:17 Ahi zongin an na tan uh ciangin na mai uh phiatin na sam uh hiat un. 
Matthew6:18 Tua hileh midangte in na an tanlam uh a theih loh hangin na muh theih loh na Pa un hong thei veve dinga, kuama theih lohin na tanlam uh a hong thei na Pa un noteʼ tungah thaman hong pia ding hi." 
Matthew6:19 “Nget in ne-in a kekseu theihna, gutate in luhin a guk theihna hih leitungah na sum uh khol kei un." 
Matthew6:20 Nget in a nek theih lohna, a kekseu theih lohna, gutate in luhin a guk theih lohna mun vantungah note adingin khol zaw un." 
Matthew6:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sum omna uh ah na lungsim uh om tawntung ding hi. 
Matthew6:22 “Mittang pen pumpi adingin meivak tawh kibang hi. Na mit uh ciim leh na pumpi un hoihtakin khua mu thei hi. 
Matthew6:23 Ahi zongin na mit uh maang leh na pumpi uh adingin khua a mial hi. Tua ahih manin noteʼ sunga a om khuavak pen a mial hileh tua mialna pen nasia mahmah ding hi. 
Matthew6:24 “Kuamah, to nihʼ sila hi khawm thei lo hi. Khat mudahin khat it dinga, khat tungah thumanin khat simmawh bawl ding hi. Note in Pasianʼ na le leitung sum na nasem khawm zo kei ding uh hi." 
Matthew6:25 “Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin ah: Na nuntak nadingun bang ne-in bang dawn ding cih ahi a, na pumpi uh adingin bang silh ding cih ahi zongin lunghimawh lua kei un. Nuntakna pen an sangin thupi zaw a, pumpi pen puan sangin thupi zaw hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Matthew6:26 “Vanah a leeng vasate ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in khai tuh lo, an zong la lo, sal sungah zong khol lo napi-in vantungah a om na Pa un tuate a nek ding uh tasamsak lo hi. Tua vasate sangin note manpha zaw thampek hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew6:27 Na lunghihmawh manun kua in na khan uh kum bangzah sot to thei na hi uh hiam? 
Matthew6:28 Bang hangin puansilh ding lunghimawh na hi uh hiam? Gamlak a om paakte a nuntak zia ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in amau adingin na lah sem lo, khau zong kheek lo napi-in," 
Matthew6:29 a hau mahmah Solomon nangawn a hoih penin a kizep ciangin zong hih paakte ban zo nai lo lai hi. 
Matthew6:30 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni-in hingin, a zing ciang mahin meikhuk ah a kikhultum lel hih gamlak lopate Pasian in puansilh guan ahihleh note hong lim guat zaw ding ahih manin na upna uh a neu mahmah ahi hi." 
Matthew6:31 Tua ahih manin bang ne dinga, bang dawn dinga, bang silh ding ihi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh lua kei un." 
Matthew6:32 (Gentail mite in lunghihmawh penin a neihte uh hih bangte ahi hi.) Hih nate khempeuh na kisap lamtak uh vantungah a om na Pa un a thei hi. 
Matthew6:33 Thudang khempeuh sangin Pasianʼ ukna le ama deihna na zuih theih nading uh thupi ngaihsut masa zaw un. Tua hileh hih na kisapna dangte khempeuh uh zong hong pia thuah veve ding hi. 
Matthew6:34 “Tua ahih manin zing ciang hun ading ma lungkham masa kei un. Zing ciang thu ding ama thu-in omsak lel un. Tu ni thu pen tu ni thu mah tawh beisak unla, lungkham ding behlap se kei un." 
Matthew7:1 “Pasian in note hong mawhsak loh nadingin midangte va mawh saksak nawn kei un. 
Matthew7:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh midangteʼ thu na khen zia uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong khen dinga, midangte tungah na zat uh ngeina mah note tungah hong zang ding hi." 
Matthew7:3 Bang hangin na lawmteʼ mit sunga ninthem tang muhsak thei napi-in nangma mit sunga singluang tang phawk thei lo na hi hiam? 
Matthew7:4 Nangma mit sungah singluang a tang kimlai, bangci-in na lawmte kiangah, ‘Na mit sunga ninthem tang hong lakkhiatsak ning,’ ci thei ding na hi hiam?" 
Matthew7:5 No a kineihkhem mite aw, noteʼ mit sunga singluang tang la khia masa le-uhcin, na lawmte uh mit sunga ninthem tang na lakkhiat theih nadingun hoihtakin khua na mu thei pan ding uh hi." 
Matthew7:6 “Uite tungah a siangtho nate pia kei un. Pia le-uhcin hong pet zawsop ding hi. Vokte mai ah na suang manphate uh lot kei un. Lot le-uhcin sikcip lel ding uh hi. 
Matthew7:7 “Ngen un; na nget uh leh hong kipia ding hi. Zong un; na zon uh leh na mu ding uh hi. Kongkhak na kiu un; na kiuh uh leh hong kihon ding hi. 
Matthew7:8 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh a ngente khempeuh in ngah ding uh a, a zongte khempeuh in mu ding uh a, a kiute khempeuh ading kong kihon ding hi." 
Matthew7:9 Pa ahi note khatpeuh in na tate un anlum hong ngen leh suangtum pia ding na hi uh hiam? 
Matthew7:10 Ngasa hong ngen leh gul pia ding na hi uh hiam? 
Matthew7:11 Note mihoih lo hi napi-in na tate uh tungah na hoih piak ding ngaihsun thei na hih uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un a ngen mite tungah na hoihte hong pia zaw mahmah ding hi lo ahi hiam? 
Matthew7:12 Tua ahih manin note tungah hong kibawl ding na deih bangun midangte tungah na bawl un. Moses Thukhamte le kamsangteʼ thuhilhnate pen hih mah a deihna ahi hi. 
Matthew7:13 “Kong kawcik bek tawnin lut un. Hell khuk tun nading kongvang pen lianin a lampi baih a, mi tampi in a zui uh hi." 
Matthew7:14 Ahi zongin nuntak tawntungna tun nading kong kawcikin a lampi haksa a, mi tawmno bek in a zui zo uh hi." 
Matthew7:15 “Kamsang taktak ahi lote na muh uh ciangin limtakin kikem un. Amaute in a tungtham ah tuu lim hong pua-in, ahi zongin a sung tawng taktak uh ngia hangsan bang ahi uh hi." 
Matthew7:16 Amauteʼ gamtatna tawh amauʼ pianzia na thei ding uh hi. Lingvom kung panin leenggah kilo ngei a, sialtalling kung panin theigah kilo ngei ahi hiam?" 
Matthew7:17 Tua ahih manin singkung cidamte in gah limci gah a, singkung gina lote in gah gina lo gah uh hi." 
Matthew7:18 Singkung cidamte in gah gina lo gah ngei lo a, singkung gina lote in gah limci gah ngei lo hi." 
Matthew7:19 Gah limci a gah lo singkungte kiphukin meikhuk sungah kikhul hi. 
Matthew7:20 Tua ahih manin amauʼ gamtatna tawh amauʼ pianzia na thei ding uh hi. 
Matthew7:21 “Kei kiangah, ‘Topa, Topa aw,’ hong ci mi khempeuh, vantung ki-ukna sungah lut thei kim lo ding uh a, vantungah a om ka Paʼ deihna bangin a gamta teng bek lut thei ding uh hi." 
Matthew7:22 Tua ni ciangin mi tampi in kei kiangah, ‘Topa, Topa aw, nangma min tawh thu hilhin, nangma min tawh dawite hawl khia-in, nangma min tawh nalamdang lian tampi bawl hi lo ka hi uh hiam?’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Matthew7:23 Tua ciangin keimah in amaute kiangah, ‘Note ka hong thei ngei kei hi. Siatna a gamta mite aw, kei kiang panin kihem khia un,’ ka ci ding hi." 
Matthew7:24 “Ka thuhilhna za-in a zui mi khempeuhte pen suang tungah a inn a lam mipil pa tawh kibang ding hi. 
Matthew7:25 Guah hong zu-in, tui hong khangin, huihpi hong nung a, tua inn a nawk gawp uh hangin suang tungah kilam ahih manin kisia zo lo hi." 
Matthew7:26 Hih ka thugente za napi-in a zui nuam lote pen sehnel tungah a inn a lam mihai pa tawh kibang ding hi. 
Matthew7:27 Guah hong zu-in, tui hong khangin, huihpi hong nung a, tua inn a nawk gawp uh ciangin a kisia hi. Tua inn naksiat mahmah hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi." 
Matthew7:28 Jesu in hih a thugente a man khit ciangin, ama thugenna hangin mihonpite in lamdang sa mahmah uh hi." 
Matthew7:29 Amah in Thukham hilh siate bangin thu gen loin, aana neite bangin thu a gen zaw hi." 
Matthew8:1 Tua mual panin Jesu hong pai suk ciangin mihon tampi in amah a zui uh hi. 
Matthew8:2 Tua laitakin miphak khat hong pai-in ama mai ah hong khukdin a, “Topa aw, nong damsaknop nakleh nong damsak thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew8:3 Jesu in zong a khut zanin tua mipa lawng a, “Ka hong damsak nuam hi; dam ta in,” a cih khit phetin a phakna a dam pah hi." 
Matthew8:4 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Hih thupiang kuama kiangah gen masa loin siampipa kiangah va paisuak pahin va kivelsak inla, na dam khitna thu mi khempeuh in a theih nadingin Moses thupiakna tawh kizui-in biakna va pia in,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Matthew8:5 Kapernaum khua a tun ciangin Rom mi galkap bu khat ama kiangah hong pai-in," 
Matthew8:6 “Topa aw, ka nasem pa cina-in inn ah lupna ngakin om a, gim mahmah in taang zo het lo ahih manin hong damsak in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Matthew8:7 Jesu in, “Hong pai-in ka damsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew8:8 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in, “Topa aw, keima inn ah nang pipi nong pai dingin kilawm lo ka hih manin a dam nadingin thu pia lel lecin zong ka nasem pa dam ding hi." 
Matthew8:9 Kei zong uliante khutnuai ah nasem mi ka hi a, keima khutnuai ah zong galkapte a om hi. Tua galkapte khat kiangah, ‘Pai in,’ ci-in sawl leng, pai a, a dang khat kiangah, ‘Hong pai in,’ ci-in sam leng, hong pai a, ka nasem pa kiangah, ‘Hih sem in,’ ci-in sawl leng, a sem hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew8:10 Jesu in hih bupa thugen a zak ciangin lamdang sa a, amah a zui mihonte kiangah, “A mantak a kong genin ah Israel mite lak nangawn ah hih bang upna a nei ka mu nai kei hi." 
Matthew8:11 Nisuahna le nitumna panin mi tampi tak hong pai-in vantung ki-ukna sungah Abraham, Isaac le Jakob-te tawh an ne-in sabuai ah tukhawm ding uh hi." 
Matthew8:12 Ahi zongin vantung ki-ukna sungah a om dingin a kingaihsun Israel mite ahihleh pualam khuamialna ah kilawn khia dinga, tua lai ah kapin a hagawi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew8:13 Tua ciangin Jesu in galkap bupa kiangah, “Na inn ah ciah in. Na up bangin hong piang ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua hun laitak teek mahin a nasem pa a dam hi." 
Matthew8:14 Peterʼ inn ah Jesu va pai a, Peterʼ sungnu nattunin lupna tungah a lum a mu hi." 
Matthew8:15 Jesu in ama khut va lawnsak hi. A natna dam pah a, amah zong tho-in a zinte a do zo pah hi." 
Matthew8:16 A nitak ciangin mite in Jesu kiangah dawivei mi tampi tak hong paipih uh hi. Jesu in kam khat pauna bek tawh dawite hawl khia-in cina khempeuh a damsak hi. 
Matthew8:17 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Amah in eiteʼ natna teng thuakin, eiteʼ gimna teng pua khia hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tun nadingin hih bang a piang ahi hi." 
Matthew8:18 Jesu in ama kiangah mi tampi tak a hong om lam a theih ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Tuili gal khat ah pai ni,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Matthew8:19 Tua laitakin Thukham hilh siate khat in ama kiangah, “Sia aw, na paina peuhpeuh ah ka hong zui ding hi,” a cih leh" 
Matthew8:20 Jesu in, “Ngiate in lup nading kua nei uh a, vasate in zong giah nading bu nei uh hi. Ahi zongin Mihingʼ Tapa in a luptheih nading mun koi mahah nei lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew8:21 Tua ciangin amah a zui midang khat in, “Topa aw, kei hong ciahsak inla, ka pa hong vuisak masa in,” a cih leh" 
Matthew8:22 Jesu in, “Nangmah in kei hong zui inla, misi bang ahi mite in misite a vui dingun nusiat in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew8:23 Gunkuang tungah Jesu a tuan ciangin a nungzuite in zong a zui uh hi. 
Matthew8:24 Thakhat thu-in huihpi hong nung ahih manin tuihualte in gunkuang tum dekdek a, ahi zongin Jesu a ihmu hi." 
Matthew8:25 Nungzuite in Jesu va phong uh a, “Topa aw, ka si dektak uh hi; hong hon in,” a va ci uh hi." 
Matthew8:26 Jesu in, “Bang hangin tua ci lau na hi uh hiam? Na upna uh neu mahmah hi,” a cih khit ciangin tho-in huihpi le tuihualte thu pia a, a dai dide pah hi." 
Matthew8:27 A nungzuite in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Huihpi le tuihualte nangawn in ama thu mang ahih manin hih mipa a bangci mi hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew8:28 Tuili gal khat, Gadara gam a tun ciangin han panin dawivei mi nih hong pai khia-in Jesu a na dawn uh hi. Tua mi nihte kihtakhuai mahmah ahih manin amaute omna lam tawnin kuamah pai ngam lo uh hi." 
Matthew8:29 Amaute nakpi takin hong kiko uh a, “Pasianʼ Tapa aw, kote bang hong nuammawh na hi hiam? A hun tung nai lopi-in kote gim a pia dingin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew8:30 Tua laitakin tua san panin a gamla lo mun khat ah vok honpi gamta-in a om hi. 
Matthew8:31 Tua ciangin dawite in Jesu kiangah, “Kote hong hawl khia ding na hih leh hua vokte sungah hong lutsak in,” ci-in a thum uh ciangin" 
Matthew8:32 Jesu in, “Pai un,” ci ahih manin amaute zong pai khia-in vokte sungah a lut uh hi. Tua vok honte, keen luvum panin tuak suk gawpin tuili sung tu uh ahih manin a vekpi-in tui kia-in a si khin hi." 
Matthew8:33 Tua vokcingte zong tai-in khua sung tuh uh a, tua dawivei miteʼ thu le a thupiang khempeuh a gen uh hi." 
Matthew8:34 Tua ciangin khua sung mi khempeuh, Jesu kiangah hong pai-in amah a muh uh ciangin, amau gam panin a paikhiat nadingin a thum uh hi." 
Matthew9:1 Tua lai panin gunkuang ah tuang leuleu-in tuili gal khat lam a om ama khua ah a va tungkik hi. 
Matthew9:2 Mi pawl khat in khutlekhe zaw mi khat, a lupna pheek tawh hong pua-in Jesu kiang a hong tunpih uh hi. Jesu in amauteʼ upna a muh ciangin a cina mipa kiangah, “Ka ta aw, na lungsim kinuamsak in; na mawhna hong kimaisak khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew9:3 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate pawl khat in a lungsim uh ah, “Pasian tawh a kikim bangin kampau ahih manin hih mipa in Pasian a dem ahi hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Matthew9:4 Ahi zongin Jesu in amauteʼ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin, “Bang hangin a sia lamin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew9:5 ‘Na mawhna hong kimaisak hi,’ cih ding le, ‘Tho inla pai in,’ cih ding koi baih zaw ahi hiam? Kampau lel pen baih mahmah hi." 
Matthew9:6 Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhmaisak theih nading thu nei hi, ci-in na theih nadingun kong lak ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin khutlekhe zaw mipa kiangah, “Tho in; na lupna pheek pua inla na inn ah ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew9:7 Amah zong tho-in a inn ah a ciah pah hi. 
Matthew9:8 Mihonte in hih thu a theih uh ciangin lau mahmah uh a, Pasian in mihingte tungah hih bang vangliatna a piakna hangin ama min a phat uh hi." 
Matthew9:9 Tua lai mun panin Jesu a paikhiat ciangin siahdongpa Matthai a zumah tu-in a om mu a, “Hong zui in,” a cih leh amah zong dingin a zui pah hi." 
Matthew9:10 Jesu in Matthaiʼ inn ah nitak an a nek laitakin siahdong dangte le thukham a khial midang tampite in zong Jesu le a nungzuite tawh an a nekhawm uh hi. 
Matthew9:11 Farisi mite in hih thu a muh uh ciangin Jesu nungzuite kiangah, “Bang hangin na siapa un siahdongte le thukham khialte tawh an nekhawm ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew9:12 Jesu in hih thu a zak ciangin, “Cidamte in siavuan kisam lo uh a, cina mite bek in kisam uh hi." 
Matthew9:13 Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Ganhing tawh biak ding ka deih kei a, migitna ka deih zaw hi,’ ci-in a genna pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, va kan un. Mite in a zahtak mihoihte a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, mite in a pampaih mite a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew9:14 Tua ciangin Jesu kiangah Tuiphumpa Johanʼ nungzuite hong pai uh a, “Bang hangin kote le Farisi mite in an tang zelzel napi-in, na nungzuite in tang lo se ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew9:15 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Mopina pawi khat ah, a zineipa a om sungin a mopawi simte dah dingin um na hi uh hiam? Dah het lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute kiang panin zineipa a kilakkhiat ding hun hong tung dinga, tua hun ciangin amaute in an a tang ding uh hi." 
Matthew9:16 Kuamah in a ton nai lo puan bek thak tawh puan lui a phop kei hi. Tua bangin phop leh puan bek thak a ton ciangin a lui kaigawmin a vang a gol semsem ding hi. 
Matthew9:17 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu thak thun lo hi. Kithun leh a savun um phukham dinga, a leenggahzu bua-in a savun um zong a sia a suak ding hi. Leenggahzu thak pen savun um thak sungah kithun bek hi. Tua ahih manin a nihin a sia om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew9:18 Tua bangin Jesu in thu genin a om laitakin Jesu kiangah Jew mi ulian khat hong pai-in ama mai ah hong khukdin a, “Tu mahmah in ka tanu a si hi. Ahi zongin nang hong pai-in ama tungah na khut hong nga lecin amah hingkik ding hi,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Matthew9:19 Jesu zong ding pah a, a nungzuite tawh tua mipa a zui uh hi." 
Matthew9:20 Tua laitakin kum sawm le kum nih tawntung a si a luang numei khat Jesuʼ nungah hong pai-in a puan mongteep a lawngsim hi. 
Matthew9:21 Tua numei in, “A puan va lawng bek leng zong ka dam ding hi,” ci-in a lungsimah ngaihsun hi." 
Matthew9:22 Jesu zong hong kihei a, tua numei a muh ciangin, “Ka tanu aw, na lung kinuamsak in. Na upna in nang hong damsak khinta hi,” a cih khit phetin tua numei a dam pah hi." 
Matthew9:23 Jew mi ulian paʼ inn ah Jesu a tun ciangin tamngai tum mite le mihonpi a gamlum henhan a muh ciangin," 
Matthew9:24 “Na vekpi-un paikhia un. Hih numeino a si hi lo a, a ihmu bek ahi hi,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amaute in Jesu zahpihin a nuihsan uh hi." 
Matthew9:25 Ahi zongin mihonpite a pua lamah a kipai khiatsak khit ciangin tua numeino omna ah Jesu tumin a khut a va let ciangin tua numeino hong tho hi. 
Matthew9:26 Hih thupiang tua gam khempeuh ah a kizel hi. 
Matthew9:27 Tua lai panin Jesu a paikhiat ciangin mittaw mi nih in a nungah hong zui-in nakpi takin kiko uh a, “Davidʼ suan Jesu aw, kote hong hehpih in,” ci-in a thum uh hi." 
Matthew9:28 Inn ah Jesu a lut ciangin mittaw mi nihte in zong hong zui uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Na mit uh khua hong musak thei dingin hong um na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Topa aw, ka hong um uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew9:29 Tua ciangin Jesu in amauteʼ mit lawnsak a, “Na upna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong piang tahen,” a ci hi." 
Matthew9:30 Tua ciangin amaute in khua mukik uh a, Jesu in amau tegel kiangah, “Hih thupiang kuamah theisak kei un,” ci-in khauh takin a gen hi." 
Matthew9:31 Ahi zongin amaute paikhia uh a, tua gam sung khempeuh ah hih thu a zasak uh hi." 
Matthew9:32 Tua mi nihte a paikhiat laitakun mi pawl khat in dawi a veina hangin a pau thei lo mi khat, Jesu kiangah a hong paipih uh hi." 
Matthew9:33 Ama sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit phetin tua mipa hong pau theikik pah hi. Mihonpite in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Israel gam sungah hih bang thu piang ngei nai lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew9:34 Ahi zongin Farisi mite in, “Dawimang lian pen pa min tawh hih bangin dawi a hawl khia ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew9:35 Tua bangin khuapite le khuaneute ah Jesu pai kawikawi a, a kikhopna uh innte ah thu hilhin, Pasianʼ ukna hangin a lungdamhuai thute gen a, natna nam khempeuh a damsak hi." 
Matthew9:36 Mihonte a muh ciangin, a cing nei lo tuu hon bangin gimna ngahin lungkhamin om uh ahih manin hehpihhuai a sa hi." 
Matthew9:37 Tua ahih manin a nungzuite kiangah, “Anlak ding tampi om napi-in anlak na a sem ding mi tawm bek a om hi." 
Matthew9:38 Tua ahih manin ama an a la dingin an nei Topa in nasem tampi hong sawl nadingin thu ngen un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew10:1 Jesu in a nungzui sawm le nihte sam a, dawite a hawlkhiat theih nading uh le natna nam khempeuh a damsak theih nadingun amaute tungah vangliatna a pia hi." 
Matthew10:2 Tua sawltak sawm le nihteʼ min in: A masa-in Simon (Peter zong a kici pa) le a naupa Andru, Zebediʼ tapa James le a naupa Johan," 
Matthew10:2 Tua sawltak sawm le nihteʼ min in: A masa-in Simon (Peter zong a kici pa) le a naupa Andru, Zebediʼ tapa James le a naupa Johan," 
Matthew10:3 Filip le Bartholomew, Thomas le siahdongpa Matthai, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Thaddeas," 
Matthew10:3 Filip le Bartholomew, Thomas le siahdongpa Matthai, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Thaddeas," 
Matthew10:4 Simon (gam khual pa) le Jesu a lehhek Iskariotʼ tapa Judas ahi uh hi. 
Matthew10:5 Jesu in hih mi sawm le nihte sawl a, “Gentail mite gam sung ahi a, Samaria mite khua sungah ahi zongin lut kei un." 
Matthew10:6 Tuu bangin a mangthang Israel mite lakah va pai zaw un. 
Matthew10:7 Na paina peuh uh ah, ‘Vantung ki-ukna hong nai ta hi,’ ci-in thu va hilh un." 
Matthew10:8 Cinate damsakin, misite hingsakin, miphakte damsakin, dawite va hawl khia un. Man piak kul loin hih vangliatna na ngah uh bangin hih vangliatna na zatna uh ah zong man va ngen kei un." 
Matthew10:9 Kham ahi a, ngun ahi a, sumngo ahi zongin sum peuhmah na ip sung uh ah keng kei un." 
Matthew10:10 Khualzinna ah an ngenin puak nading ip ahi a, khedap ahi a, ciangkhut ahi zongin keng kei unla, puanak zong a val keng thuah kei un. Nasem mite pen amau sapna teeng mite in a piak ding a ngeina ahi hi." 
Matthew10:11 “Khuapi ahi a, khua neu ahi zongin khua khat peuhpeuh na tun uh ciangin tua khua sungah note zin hong tungsak nuam kua om ahi hiam, ci-in zong unla, na muh uh ciangin tuateʼ inn ah tungin, tua khua na nusiat mateng uh tua lai mahah omsuak pah un." 
Matthew10:12 Inn khat peuhpeuh ah na lut uh ciangin a mite hopihin thupha na pia un. 
Matthew10:13 Tua na hopihna uh inn sunga mite in note hong tunsak nop leh na hopihna thupha uh amaute tungah kip dinga, ahi zongin hong tunsak nop kei uh leh na hopihna thupha uh na dokkik ding uh hi." 
Matthew10:14 Inn khat peuhpeuh in ahi a, khua khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin note hong tunsak nop kei a, na thugen uh hong ngaih nop kei leh tua lai panin paikhia unla, na khe uh a leivui baangte sinkhiat un." 
Matthew10:15 Thukhen ni ciangin tua khua miteʼ thuakna sangin Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua miteʼ thuakna ol zaw lai ding ahihna thu hoihtakin phawk un. 
Matthew10:16 “Ngia hon lakah tuu a kikhah bangin note hong sawl khia ka hih manin gul bangin pilvang unla, vakhu bangin migi un." 
Matthew10:17 Mi pawl khatte in note hong manin zumah hong paipih ding uh a, amauteʼ kikhopna inn sungah hong sat gawp ding uh ahih manin hoihtakin kidawm un." 
Matthew10:18 Keima hangin gam ukte le kumpite mai ah thu hong kisit ding hi. Hih bang na tuah uh ciangin thu hong sit mite le Gentail mite tungah Lungdamna Thu gen theih nading hunhoih a nei na hi uh hi. 
Matthew10:19 Tua bangin thusitna a thuak dingin hong kipaipih ciangin, bang gen ding ihi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un. A hun a tun ciangin na gen ding teng uh hong kihilh ding hi." 
Matthew10:20 Thu na gen uh ciangin noteʼ gen hi loin, na Pa uhʼ Kha Siangtho in note tungtawnin thu a gen ding ahi hi." 
Matthew10:21 Unau le unau, pa in a ta, tate in a nu a pate langpangin sihna a thuak dingin khatlekhat kiheek ding uh hi." 
Matthew10:22 Keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawp dongin a thuak zo mite in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi. 
Matthew10:23 Khua khat ah note hong kibawlsiat leh khua dang khat ah tai un. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Israel khua khempeuh na khit ma-un Mihing Tapa hong pai ding hi. 
Matthew10:24 “A siapa sangin a sang naupangte lian zaw ngei lo a, a topa sangin a silate lian zaw ngei lo hi." 
Matthew10:25 Tua ahih manin sang naupangte pen a siapa uh tawh a kibat uh leh a lungkim ding uh hi a, silate pen a tote uh tawh a kibat uh leh a lungkim ding uh ahi hi. Innteek lutang pa pen Beelzebul hong ci uh ahihleh a innkuan pih mite tua sangin minsia zaw tawh hong ko zaw lai ding uh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Matthew10:26 “Tua ahih manin kuamah kihta kei un. A kiseelte khatvei teitei kimu dinga, thusimte khatvei teitei thulang suak ding hi." 
Matthew10:27 Zan khuamial sunga kong gente, sun khuavak sungah taangko unla, a simthamin kong huau thute, inn khumdawn zang ah na taangko un." 
Matthew10:28 Pumpi a thah khit ciangin kha a that thei lote na kihta kei un. Hell khuk sungah pumpi le kha a nihin a susia thei pa na kihta zaw un. 
Matthew10:29 Gitta nih ciangin mat khatin kizuak lel hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hi napi-in na Pa uhʼ thukim lohin tua gittate khat nangawn lei ah mawk kiat lo hi. 
Matthew10:30 Note ahihleh na lu tung uh a na sam mal phazah nangawn uh hong kiciamtehsak hi. 
Matthew10:31 Tua ahih manin lau kei un. Gitta tampi sangin note na manpha zaw uh hi. 
Matthew10:32 “Keima mi ahihna thu miteʼ theihin a gen khia mite, kei zong vantungah ka Paʼ mai ah keima mi ahihna thu ka gen ding hi." 
Matthew10:33 Ahi zongin keima mi ahihna thu miteʼ theihin a gen khia nuam lote, kei zong vantungah ka Paʼ mai ah keima mi ahihna thu ka gen khia nuam kei ding hi." 
Matthew10:34 “Leitungah kilemna a omsak dingin hong pai hi, ci-in hong ngaihsun kei un. Kilemna a omsak dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, kido nading namsau a khah dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi." 
Matthew10:35 Tate le pate a kidosak ding, tanute le nute a kidosak ding, monute le teeknute a kidosak dingin a hong pai ka hi hi." 
Matthew10:36 Mi khat adingin a gal lian penpen ama innkuan pih mite mah hong hi ding hi. 
Matthew10:37 “Kei sangin a nu a pa a it zawte kei tawh kilawm lo a, kei sangin a tapa a tanu a it zawte kei tawh kilawm lo hi." 
Matthew10:38 Ama singlamteh mah pua tawm lopi-in ka nung hong zuite kei tawh kilawm lo hi. 
Matthew10:39 Hih leitung nuntakna a hon nuamte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh dinga, keima hangin a nuntakna a taanlawhte in a nuntakna taktak a ngah ding uh hi." 
Matthew10:40 “Na thugen uh a hong sangte in keiʼ thu a hong sang hi a, kei a hong sangte in kei a hong sawl pa zong a sang ahi uh hi." 
Matthew10:41 Pasianʼ thugen ahihna hangin Pasianʼ thugen mi a sangte in Pasianʼ thugenteʼ thaman ngah dinga, mihoih hihna hangin mihoih a sang mite in mihoihteʼ thaman ngah ding uh hi." 
Matthew10:42 Keima nungzui mi a neu pen khat nangawn, keima nungzui ahihna hangin tuivot hai khat bek a suahte nangawn in pel loin thaman a ngah ding lamtak phawk un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Matthew11:1 Jesu in a nungzui sawm le nihte a vaikhakna a man khit ciangin tua kiimnai-a om khuate ah thuhilh ding le thugen dingin tua mun panin a paikhia hi. 
Matthew11:2 Tuiphumpa Johan in thong sung panin Jesuʼ nasepnate a zak ciangin Jesu kiangah a nungzuite sawl a," 
Matthew11:3 “Nang pen a hong pai ding pa na hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh a dang na lamen lai ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dongsak hi." 
Matthew11:4 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Va ciahkik unla, tu-a na zakte uh le na muh uh thute va gen un:" 
Matthew11:5 Mittawte in khua mukik a, khebaite pai theikikin, miphakte damkik a, bilngongte in khua za kikin, misite hingkik a, mizawngte tungah Lungdamna Thu a kihilhnate va gen un." 
Matthew11:6 Kei hong umte pen a lungdamhuai mahmah ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew11:7 Tua thu dong mite a ciahkhiat khit ciangin Jesu in mihonte kiangah Johanʼ thu gen a, “Gamlak ah Johan kiangah na pai uh ciangin bang a mu dingin kilamen na hi uh hiam? Huih in a mut awn diamdiam lopa kungte a en ding maw?" 
Matthew11:8 Tua hi lo ahihleh bang a mu dingin kilamen na hi uh hiam? Puan hoih nono a silhpa a mu dingin kilamen maw? A taktakin ci lehang, puan hoih nono a silhte pen kumpi inn sungah om uh hi." 
Matthew11:9 Tua ahih kei leh bang a en dingin pai na hi uh hiam? Kamsang pa a en ding maw? Hi hi; kamsang pa a en dingin na pai uh a, tua na muhpa uh kamsang mawkmawk ciang bek hi loin a lian zaw khat ahi hi." 
Matthew11:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in Johanʼ thu a genna ah, ‘Na pai nading lampi a hong khol dingin nangma mai ah ka kamtai pa ka sawl hi,’ ci-in Pasian in gen hi, ci-in kigelh hi." 
Matthew11:11 Leitung mi khempeuh sung pan Tuiphumpa Johan a lian pen ahi hi. Ahi zongin vantung ki-ukna sungah a neu pen i cihte nangawn Johan sangin lian zaw lai hi. 
Matthew11:12 Tuiphumpa Johanʼ thuhilh hun a kipan tu ciang dong, mite in vantung ki-ukna thu hong kituhteh gawp uh a, thahat thu hong ciam uh hi." 
Matthew11:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tuiphumpa Johan thuhilh a kipat hun ciang dong, kamsangte khempeuh le Moses Thukham khempeuh in hih vantung ki-ukna thu gen belin a nei uh hi." 
Matthew11:14 Tua thu kigen sa na up nop uh leh, a kigenkhol bangin a hong pai ding Elijah a kici pen Tuiphumpa Johan ahi hi." 
Matthew11:15 Tua ahih manin bil neite in na za ta un. 
Matthew11:16 “Ahi zongin tu hun mite bang tawh genteh ding ka hi hiam cih leh: Mihon omna lamkabom ah a tu naupang a kimawlte tawh kibang uh hi. Naupang hon khat in a lawmte kiangah," 
Matthew11:17 ‘Lam nading khuang kong tumsak uh hangin na lam nuam kei uh a, kah la ka sak uh hangin lah na kap nuam tuan kei uh hi,’ a kicite tawh a kibang uh hi." 
Matthew11:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tuiphumpa Johan hong pai a, amah in zu le an tangin a om ciangin, ‘Dawivei hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Matthew11:19 Mihing Tapa hong pai leuleu a, zune anne-in a om ciangin, ‘Zuhai anhai pa; siahdongte le midangte in a kikholh pih nop loh mite tawh a kikhawl pa,’ ci leuleu uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ pilna a man taktakna thu a gah panin hong kilang hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew11:20 Tua ciangin Jesu in nalamdang tampi a bawlna mun khuapi mite kisik nuam lo uh ahih manin taii bawl ding kipan a," 
Matthew11:21 “Khorazin khuapi mite le Bethsaida khuapi mite aw, gimna lianpi na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note khua sungah a hong kilak nalamdangte, Taia le Sidon khua sungah kilak hileh amaute in kisikna limin sawtpekin puanhampi silhin vut kinuh ding uh hi." 
Matthew11:22 Tua ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin noteʼ thuakna sangin, Taia le Sidon khua miteʼ thuakna baih zaw lai ding ahihna thu phawk ta un." 
Matthew11:23 Kapernaum khuapi mite aw, van a sangna munah hong kipahtawi ding sa na hi uh hiam? Hell khuk sungah hong kilawnsuk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ khua sunga hong kibawl nalamdangte, Sodom khua sungah kibawl hileh tu ni dongin tua khua kip lai ding hi." 
Matthew11:24 Tua ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin noteʼ thuakna sangin Sodom khua miteʼ thuakna baih zaw lai ding ahihna thu phawk ta un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew11:25 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Vantung le leitung Topa ahi ka Pa aw, mipilte le misiamte tungah na ip hih thute, bangmah a thei lo hih mite tungah lak na hih manin ka nuam hi." 
Matthew11:26 Pa aw, hih pen nangma deihna le na lungkimna bangin na hih ahi hi." 
Matthew11:27 “Ka Pa in kei tungah na khempeuh hong pia khin hi. Pa sim loh Tapa a thei kuamah om lo a, Tapa le Tapa in a theihsak nop mite sim loh, pa a thei kuamah om lo hi." 
Matthew11:28 “Na semin van gik pua-in a gim mite khempeuh aw, ka kiangah hong pai ta un. Note tungah lungsim tawldamna kong pia ding hi." 
Matthew11:29 Keima hakkol zamin kisuan unla, kei kiangah hong kisin dih un. Kei pen kiniamkhiatin nem hithiat ka hih manin ka kiangah na tawl uh a dam ding hi." 
Matthew11:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kong suat ding ka hakkol nuam a, na puak ding uh van zong a zang mah ahi hi,” ci-in a gen khia hi." 
Matthew12:1 Tua zawh a sawt loin Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesu a pai hi. A nungzuite a gil uh kial ahih manin mangbuh vuite zutin a ne uh hi. 
Matthew12:2 Farisi mite in a muh uh ciangin Jesu kiangah, “En in, Sabbath ni-in i hih dingin a kilawm lo gamtatna na nungzuite gamta uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew12:3 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “David le a kikholhpihte a gilkial laitakun Davidʼ gamtatna thu sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew12:4 Pasianʼ inn sungah amah lut a, siampite lobuang, amah le a kikholhpihte in a nek theih ding ahi lo Ompihna Anlum la-in amah le a kikholhpihte in a ne uh hi." 
Matthew12:5 Tua ahih kei leh zong siampite in Sabbath sim mahin biakinn sungah Sabbath thukham khial napi-in mawhsakna a ngah tuan lohna thu uh, Moses Thukham sungah sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew12:6 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tua biakinn sangin a lian zaw khat hih lai ah hong om hi. 
Matthew12:7 Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Ganhing tawh biak ding ka deih kei a, migitna ka deih zaw hi,’ a cihnopna thu teltakin thei le-uhcin a mawh lopi kimlai na mawhsak kei ding uh hi." 
Matthew12:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew12:9 Tua lai panin Jesu pai suakin amau kikhopna inn sungah a lut hi. 
Matthew12:10 Tua lai ah a khut lang khat a zaw mi khat a na om hi. Jesu gamta khial hi, ci-in a mawhna a zong nuam mi pawl khat tua lai ah om uh ahih manin tua mite in Jesu kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in cina damsak ding a kilawm mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew12:11 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note khatpeuh in tuu khat nei unla, Sabbath ni-in dum sungah tua tuu kia leh, tua tuu va lenin kai khiato ding hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew12:12 Mi pen tuu sangin nakpi takin manpha zaw ahih manin Sabbath ni-in a hoih sep ding a kilawm ahi hi,” ci-in a dawn khit ciangin" 
Matthew12:13 a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. A mipa in zong a khut zan pah a, midangte mah bangin hoihtakin a damkik hi." 
Matthew12:14 Ahi zongin Farisi mite paikhia uh a, Jesu a thah theih nading uh vai a hawm uh hi." 
Matthew12:15 Jesu in amah a kisawmna thu a theih ciangin tua mun panin a paikhia hi. Mi tampi in amah hong zui uh hi. Amah in cina mi khempeuh damsak a," 
Matthew12:16 Pasian in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin a gen thu a tun theih nadingin, kuama kiangah ama thu a gen loh nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua a genna ah," 
Matthew12:17  
Matthew12:18 “Keimah in ka teel sa ka nasem pa, ka it mahmah, ka lungkimna pa en un. Keima Kha ama tungah ka pia dinga, Gentail mite tungah upna man a pulak ding hi." 
Matthew12:19 Amah in thu seel loin, a aw sangsak lo dinga, kong lak ah zong a awging kiza lo ding hi." 
Matthew12:20 Amah in a zawngkhal mite dop bawl dinga, a cimawh mite tungah migi ding hi. Thuman thutang a gualzawhsak mateng khawl ngei lo ding hi." 
Matthew12:21 Gentail mite in amah bek mah lametin nei ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew12:22 Tua ciangin mi pawl khat in Jesu kiangah mit tawt le pau theih loh a thuah dawivei mi khat hong paipih uh hi. Jesu in amah damsak ahih manin amah hong pau thei-in khua zong hong mu thei hi. 
Matthew12:23 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Hih pa, i lam etet Davidʼ suan hi lo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew12:24 Ahi zongin Farisi mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Dawimangpa Beelzebul min tawh dawi a hawl khia hi lel hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew12:25 Jesu in amauteʼ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Gam khat peuhpeuh, a gam mite kiphelkhamin pawl khat le pawl khat kido le-uh tua gam a sia suak ding hi; khua khat ahi a, innkuan khat ahi zongin kiphelkhamin kido le-uh kip lo ding hi." 
Matthew12:26 Tua mah bangin Satan le Satan kihawl khia le-uh a ukna bangci kip theih ding ahi hiam? 
Matthew12:27 Keimah in Beelzebul vangliatna tawh dawite hawl khia ka hih leh na mipihte un a kuaʼ vangliatna tawh hawl khia ahi uh hiam? Na mipihte un na ngaihsut khialhna uh hong kilangsak hi. 
Matthew12:28 Noteʼ ngaihsut bang hi loin, Pasianʼ Kha in dawi hawlkhiat nading vangliatna kei tungah hong pia ahih manin note lakah Pasianʼ ukna hun hong kipan khin ahihna hong kilang hi." 
Matthew12:29 Mi khatpeuh in mi thahat khat paʼ inn sungah lutin a neihsate a laksak theih nadingin tua inn nei a thahatpa a hencip masak phot ding kisam hi. A hencip zawh khit ciang bekin a inn ah lutin a neihsate la thei pan hi. 
Matthew12:30 Kei hong pawlpih lo peuhmah keima lang hi uh a, kei hong kaihkhop pih lo peuhmah a thehthang ahi uh hi." 
Matthew12:31 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong genin ah: Mihingteʼ kampau khialhna le gamtat khialhnate kimaisak thei dinga, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho langpangin a gensiate kimaisak lo ding hi." 
Matthew12:32 Mihing Tapa langpangin a gensiate a mawhna uh kimaisak thei dinga, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho langpangin a gensiate pen tu hun a kipan a tawntungin a mawhna uh kimaisak lo ding hi." 
Matthew12:33 “Singgah limci a gah theih nadingin a kung a cidam phot ding kisam a, a kung gina kei leh a gah limci lo hi. Tua ahih manin singkung khat a pianzia pen a gahin hong kithei hi." 
Matthew12:34 Gul bangin ngian a zang note aw, migilo na hih uh ciangin bangci-in thuhoih gen thei mah ding na hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh lungsim sunga thu om pen kam in a gen khia hi bek hi." 
Matthew12:35 Mihoihte in a hoih a khol teng suah khia a, migilote in gitlohna a khol teng a suah khia ahi hi." 
Matthew12:36 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Thukhen ni ciangin mi khempeuh in phattuamna a om lo a kampaunate uh khempeuh bangin thusitna a thuak ding uh hi. 
Matthew12:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh nomau kampauna tawh kizui-in thu hong kikhen dinga, dik hi, cihna ahi a, mawh hi, cihna ahi zongin na ngah nadingun nomau kampau mah hong kibulphuh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew12:38 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mi pawl khat in Jesu kiangah, “Sia aw, nalamdang khat nong lah ding ka deih uh hi,” ci-in a ngen uh hi." 
Matthew12:39 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Tu hun a mite bangzahin giloin, Pasianʼ thu thei lo ahi uh hiam? Nalamdang ka bawl ding na hong ngen tazen uh hi. Jonah thu tawh kisai nalamdang longal a dang hong kilak lo ding hi." 
Matthew12:40 Ngasa gilpi sungah sun thum le zan thum sung Jonah a om mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong sun thum le zan thum sung mah lei sungah om ding hi. 
Matthew12:41 Jonah in amaute kiangah thu a hilh ciangin a mawhna panun kisikkik uh ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tu mahmah in note kiangah Jonah sangin a lian zaw khat a om hi. 
Matthew12:42 Leitaw lam gam kumpinu in Solomonʼ pilna thu a ngai dingin leitung phel khat kantanin hong pai ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin amah in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding hi. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tu mahmah in hih lai ah Solomon sangin a lian zaw khat a om hi. 
Matthew12:43 “Mi khatpeuh sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit ciangin a ten nading mun keuna zongin a vak kawikawi hi. Ahi zongin a ten nading mun a muh zawh loh ciangin," 
Matthew12:44 ‘Ka pai khiatna sa inn mahah ciahkik ning,’ ci hi. A hong paikik ciangin tua inn na awng lai a, kipuah siangin hoihtakin a om a mu hi." 
Matthew12:45 Tua ciangin va paikik a, amah sangin a siahuai zaw dawi sagih hong tunpihin tua mipa sungah a teeng uh hi. Tua ahih manin tua mipa pianzia pen a masa huna sangin a sia zaw hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu hun a migilote zong hih mipaʼ pianzia mah tawh kibang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew12:46 Tua bangin mite kiangah thu genin a om laitakin a pua lamah a nu le a naute in Jesu hopih nuamin a om uh hi. 
Matthew12:47 Tua ahih manin tua lai ah a om mite khat in Jesu kiangah, “Na nu le na naute in nang hong hopih nuamin a pua lamah om uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew12:48 Ahi zongin Jesu in tua mipa kiangah, “Ka nu kua bangte hi a, ka naute kua bangte ahi uh hiam?” a cih khit ciangin" 
Matthew12:49 a nungzuite lam kawk a, “Hihte pen ka nu le ka sanggamte ahi uh hi." 
Matthew12:50 Vantungah a om ka Paʼ deihna bangin a gamta mi peuhmah ka sanggam pasal, ka sanggam numei, ka nu ahi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew13:1 Tua ni mahin tua inn panin Jesu paikhia a, tuili gei ah pai-in thuhilh dingin a tu hi." 
Matthew13:2 Ama kiimah a hong kikhawm mi tam lua ahih manin amah gunkuang tungah pai-in tu a, mihonte ahihleh tuili gei ah a omsak hi." 
Matthew13:3 Amah in thu gentehna a tuamtuam zangin thu tampi hilhin a genin ah: “Khaici vawhpa khaici vawh dingin a kuan khia hi. 
Matthew13:4 Khaici a vawh ciangin pawl khatte lo lai lam dungah tu a, vasate hong leengin a ne uh hi." 
Matthew13:5 Pawl khatte, suang a kitawphahna leidaina mun a tu hi. Lei thuk loin lum ahih manin a khaici po pah hi." 
Matthew13:6 Ahi zongin ni hong sat ciangin ankungte in zung thuk kha zo lo uh ahih manin tua ankungnote vulin a keu hi. 
Matthew13:7 Pawl khatte, lingbulsum a omna mun leilak tu a, lingbulsumte hong selin hong khang ahih manin ankungte a dep gawp hi." 
Matthew13:8 Ahi zongin pawl khatte, lei hoihna mun tu-in hong khang hi. Pawl khatte in a zah za khat, pawl khatte in a zah sawm guk, a dangte in a zah sawm thum a gah hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin," 
Matthew13:9 “Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu na za ta un,” ci-in Jesu in a thugen a khum hi." 
Matthew13:10 Tua ciangin nungzuite in Jesu va naihin ama kiangah, “Bang hangin thu gentehna zangin amaute tungah thu gen na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew13:11 Jesu in, “Vantung ki-ukna tawh kisai thusim note tungah hong kihilh a, ahi zongin amaute tungah kihilh lo hi." 
Matthew13:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nei sate tungah kipia thuahin hau semsem dinga, a nei lote tung panin a neihsa sunsun nangawn kilaksak ding hi." 
Matthew13:13 Amaute in enen napi-in mu thei lo uh a, ngaingai napi-in za thei lo, tel thei lo uh ahih manin thu gentehna zangin thu a gen ka hi hi." 
Matthew13:14 Kamsang Isaiahʼ thugen kholhna, hih thu tawh kisai ah amau adingin tung taktak hi. Tua a genna ah, ‘Na zakzak uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Matthew13:15 Hih miteʼ lungsim mawl mahmah hi; a bil uh bingsak uh a, a mit uh a si uh hi. Tua bang hi kei le-uh, a mit uh tawh mu-in, a bil uh tawh za-in, a lungsim un tel dinga, kei lamah amaute hong kihei-in, amaute ka damsak ding hi, ci-in Pasian in gen hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Matthew13:16 Ahi zongin noteʼ mit in mu-in na bil un za ahih manin a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi. 
Matthew13:17 Ahi taktakin note kiangah kong genin ah: Kamsangte le Pasianʼ mi tampite in noteʼ muhte mu nuam mahmah napi-in mu lo uh a, noteʼ zakte za nuam mahmah napi-in za lo uh hi." 
Matthew13:18 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in khaici vawhpa thu gentehna thu na ngai un. 
Matthew13:19 Mi pawl khat in Pasianʼ hong ukna tawh kisai a lungdamhuai thu za napi-in a thu thei tel lo uh ahih manin Dawimangpa hong pai-in amau lungsim sunga a kivawh thu a lakkhiatsak hi. Hih bangte pen lo lai lampi dung a tu khaicite tawh kibang hi. 
Matthew13:20 Suang kitawphah leilak a tu khaicite pen Pasianʼ thu a zak ciangun lungdam takin a sangpahte a cihnopna ahi hi. 
Matthew13:21 Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum zo lo ahih manin tawl khat sung bek um uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ thu hangin haksatna ahi a, bawlsiatna ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh a tun ciangin tawpkik pah uh hi." 
Matthew13:22 Lingbulsum omna leilak ah a tu khaicite pen Pasianʼ thu za napi-in amau nuntakna sung uh ah leitung lunghihmawhna le hauh nopnate in Pasianʼ thu vuknelh ahih manin bangmah a suak khia zo lote a cihnopna ahi hi. 
Matthew13:23 Lei hoihna munah a tu khaicite pen Pasianʼ thu a zak ciangin a tel mite a cihnopna ahi hi. Tua bang mite adingin Pasianʼ thu in man nei a, pawl khatte adingin a zah za khat, pawl khatte adingin a zah sawm guk, pawl khatte adingin a zah sawm thumin Pasianʼ thu in man a nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew13:24 Tua ciangin Jesu in thu gentehna dang khat gen a, “Vantung ki-ukna pen bang tawh kibang hiam cih leh: A lo ah taang ci hoih a vawhpa tawh kibang hi." 
Matthew13:25 Ahi zongin zan khat, mite a ihmut kalun galte khat hong pai-in taang lakah tahum tang vawhin a paikhia hi." 
Matthew13:26 Taangte hong po-in a vuih hun ding ciangin tahum kungte zong hong lianin hong kilang hi. 
Matthew13:27 Tua ciangin lo nei paʼ nasemte ama kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Na lo lai ah na vawh khaici pen taang ci hoihte ahi hi. Hih tahumte koi pan a hong piang ahi hiam?’ a cih ciangin" 
Matthew13:28 amah in, ‘Galteʼ vawh ahi hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi. A nasemte in ama kiangah, ‘Tua ahihleh kote va kuanin ka va bot ding uh hiam?’ ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew13:29 Ahi zongin amah in, ‘Va bot kei un. Tahumte bot le-uhcin taang tawh na bot khawm kha ding uh hi." 
Matthew13:30 Anlak hun mateng a nam nihin tua ci om phot hen. Anlak hun ciangin anlate kiangah, “Tahumte bot masa unla, meikhuk ah khul dingin lomhen un. Ahi zongin taangte la-in ka ansal ah hong sung un,” ka ci ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew13:31 Tua ciangin Jesu in thu gentehna dang khat gen leuleu a, “Vantung ki-ukna pen bang tawh kibang hiam cih leh, mi khat in a lo sungah a vawh ankam tang tawh kibang hi." 
Matthew13:32 Khaici khempeuh lak panin ankam tang a neu pen ahi hi. Ahi zongin a khan khit ciangin ankung lakah a gol pen suak ahih manin vasate in a hiang tungah bu a tom theihna zah ding ciang hong suak thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew13:33 Tua ciangin thu gentehna khat mah gen leuleu a, “Vantung ki-ukna pen bang tawh kibang hiam cih leh, nupi khat in annel seu thum dim meek manin silngo sawh a, a vekpi-in silngo in zelin a pawmsak tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew13:34 Jesu in hih thute khempeuh, thu gentehna vive zangin thu hilh a, thu gentehna zang loin thu khat beek a gen kei hi." 
Matthew13:35 Hih bangin thu gentehna a zatna pen kamsang Isaiah in, “Thu gentehna zangin thu ka gen dinga, leitung piancil a kipan a kithei lo thute ka gen ding hi,” ci-in a gen kholhsakna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
Matthew13:36 Tua ciangin mihonte lak panin Jesu pai khia-in inn sungah a lut hi. A nungzuite ama kiangah hong pai uh a, “Lo lai-a om Tahum Thu gentehna a khiatna hong gen in,” a cih uh ciangin" 
Matthew13:37 Jesu in, “Taang ci hoih a vawhpa pen Mihing Tapa ahi hi." 
Matthew13:38 Lo lai pen leitung hi a, taang ci hoih i cih pen Pasianʼ ukna sungah a om mite ahi uh hi. Tahumte pen Gilopa tawh a kipawl mite hi a," 
Matthew13:39 tahum tang a vawh galpa pen Dawimangpa ahi hi. Anlak hun pen leitung bei nading hun hi a, an la nasemte pen vantung mite ahi hi." 
Matthew13:40 Tahumte kikaikhawmin meikhuk sungah a kikhultum mah bangin leitung bei hun ciangin tua bangmahin kihih ding hi. 
Matthew13:41 Mihing Tapa in a vantung mite hong sawl dinga, ama ukna sungah a om migilote le mi a mawh nadingin a bawl mi khempeuh kaikhawmin" 
Matthew13:42 meikhuk pi sungah tua bang mite lawn ding uh a, tua lai ah amaute kapin a hagawi ding uh hi." 
Matthew13:43 Tua hun ciangin Pasianʼ mite ahihleh a Pa uh Ukna sungah ni bangin a taang ding uh hi. Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu na za ta un. 
Matthew13:44 “Vantung ki-ukna pen lo lai ah a kiseel sum tawh kibang hi. Mi khat in a muh ciangin limtakin a seel pha hi. Amah lungdam mahmah in a inn ah ciah pah a, a neih khempeuh a zuak khit ciangin tua lo a lei hi." 
Matthew13:45 “Vantung ki-ukna pen sumbawl pa in a zon kep hoih pente tawh zong kibang hi. 
Matthew13:46 Sumbawl pa in a manpha diak pawl kep khat a muh ciangin ciahpah in a neih khempeuh a zuak khit ciangin tua kep a lei hi. 
Matthew13:47 “Vantung ki-ukna pen tui sungah kipaai-in ngasa namkim a awkna ngen tawh zong kibang hi. 
Matthew13:48 Ngasa tampi tak a awk ciangin ngabengte in tui gei ah a ngen uh kai khia-in tu suk uh a, nek theih ding ngasate, paipel sungah guangin, nek theih loh ding ngasate, a lawn khia uh hi." 
Matthew13:49 Leitung hun bei ciangin zong tua bangmah hi ding hi. Vantung mite hong pai-in mihoihte lak panin migilote la khia-in," 
Matthew13:50 meikhuk pi sungah tua migilote a khul ding uh hi. Tua lai ah kapin a hagawi ding uh hi. 
Matthew13:51 “Hih ka thugente khempeuh a khiatna na thei uh hiam?” ci-in Jesu in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Ka thei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew13:52 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Vantung ki-ukna sungah a hong lut Thukham hilh siate khempeuh pen, a sumkholna panin a thak le a lui, a ututin a la khia thei ziauziau sum nei pa tawh kibang uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew13:53 Jesu in hih thugentehnate a gen khit ciangin tua lai panin pai khia-in 
Matthew13:54 ama khua ah pai a, kikhopna inn sungah thu a hilh hi. Ama thugen a za mite in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Hih mipa in hih bang pilna koi lai panin ngah a, bang hangin hih bang nalamdangte bawl thei ahi hiam?" 
Matthew13:55 Khutsiam paʼ tapa hi lel a, a nu zong Mary a kici nu hi lel hi lo ahi hiam? Ama naute zong James, Josef, Simon le Judas hi lo ahi uh hiam?" 
Matthew13:55 Khutsiam paʼ tapa hi lel a, a nu zong Mary a kici nu hi lel hi lo ahi hiam? Ama naute zong James, Josef, Simon le Judas hi lo ahi uh hiam?" 
Matthew13:56 A nau numeite zong hih lai mah a om hi lo ahi uh hiam? Tua bang hi napi-in hih mipa in koi lai panin hih bang thu teng ngah thei ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. 
Matthew13:57 Tua ahih manin amah a sang zo kei uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Kamsang khat pen, ama khua, ama behte le ama inn sung longal ah kizahtakin pahtawina a ngah hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew13:58 Nazareth khua mite in amah a up lohna hangin tua khua ah nalamdang tampi a bawl kei hi. 
Matthew14:1 Tua hun laitakin Galilee gam sungteng a uk sawn kumpi Herod in Jesuʼ thu a za hi. 
Matthew14:2 Amah in a nuai-a uliante kiangah, “Hih pa pen Johan hi a, sihna panin a hingkik hi ding hi. Tua ahih manin hih bang nalamdang bawlna ding vangliatna nei hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew14:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Herod in a nau Filip’ zi Herodias a tenpihna hangin Johan in Herod kiangah, “Na naupaʼ zi na teenpih ding ngeina hi lo hi,” ci-in gen zelzel ahih manin Herod a heh suak a, Johan mansakin, khau khihsakin, thong sungah a khumsak hi." 
Matthew14:4  
Matthew14:5 Herod in Johan that nuam hi. Ahi zongin mite in kamsangin ngaihsun uh ahih manin mite a kihtakna hangin thatsak ngam lo hi. 
Matthew14:6 Ahi zongin Herodʼ suah ni pawi bawl hun hong tun ciangin mihonte mai ah Herodiasʼ tanu hong laam ciangin Herod lungdam mahmah ahih manin," 
Matthew14:7 “Na hong nget peuhpeuh kong pia ding hi,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
Matthew14:8 Tua numei in zong a nuʼ ngaihsut piakna zui-in, “Kuangdai khat sungah Tuiphumpa Johanʼ lutang, hih lai mahmah ah hong pia in,” ci-in a ngen hi." 
Matthew14:9 Kumpipa dah mahmah hi. Ahi zongin a kiciamnasa ahihna hang le a leenglateʼ maitang a zahtakna hangin a ngetna a kipiak nadingin thu a pia hi. 
Matthew14:10 Tua ahih manin mi sawlin thong ah Johanʼ lutang a tansak hi. 
Matthew14:11 Kuangdai khat tawh tua a lutang hong kipaipihin numei kiangah kipia a, tua numei in a nu kiangah a paipih hi." 
Matthew14:12 Tua ciangin Johanʼ nungzuite hong pai uh a, a luang la-in a vui khit uh ciangin Jesu kiangah hih thu a ko uh hi." 
Matthew14:13 Jesu in tua thu a zak ciangin tua mun panin kihem khia-in gamdaihna mun a zuan dingin gunkuang tawh a pai hi. Mite in ama pai khiatna thu a theih uh ciangin a khua ciat panun lei lam tawnin Jesu nung hong zui uh hi. 
Matthew14:14 Tui gei ah Jesu a tun ciangin mihon tampi a na om a mu hi. Amaute hehpihhuai sa a, a cinate a damsak hi." 
Matthew14:15 Ni a tum kuan ciangin nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Hih lai mun gamlak hi a, ni zong tum dektak ta hi. Hih kiimnai-a om khuate ah mite va pai-in a an ding uh a lei nadingun sawl khia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew14:16 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Amaute a paikhiat ding kisam lo hi. Amauteʼ nek ding bang khat peuhpeuh pia un,” ci-in a dawn ciangin" 
Matthew14:17 amaute in, “Anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih lobuang bangmah dang om lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew14:18 Jesu in, “Tuate hong paipih un,” ci-in a sawl khit ciangin," 
Matthew14:19 lopa tungah mihonte a tut nadingun a sawl hi. Tua ciangin anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih la-in vantung lam en to a, Pasian tungah a lungdamna a ko hi. Tua ciangin anlum balnenin a nungzuite pia a, a nungzuite in mihonte mai ah a lui uh hi." 
Matthew14:20 Mi khempeuh in ne-in a kham khit uh ciangin a khamvalte uh khawmkik uh a, paipel sawm le nih a dim hi." 
Matthew14:21 Tua an a ne mite, numei le naupang sim loh, pasal cingteng mi tul nga bang a pha hi." 
Matthew14:22 Tua ciangin Jesu in mihonpite a ciahsak laitakin a nungzuite gunkuang ah tuangsak a, tuili gal khat ah a pai dingin ama mai ah a ma paisak hi." 
Matthew14:23 Mihonte a ciah khit ciangin thungen dingin mual tung lamah a pai to hi. Khuamial ciangin Jesu guak bek gamlak ah om a," 
Matthew14:24 ahi zongin nungzuite pen lei tawh gamlapi kihal khinta uh a, huih in amaute lehmut ahih manin gunkuang a kilok gawp hi." 
Matthew14:25 Zingsang lam nai thum le nai guk kikal khawng ciangin a nungzuite kiang lam manawhin tui tungah Jesu hong pai hi. 
Matthew14:26 Ahi zongin nungzuite in tui tungah hong pai a muh uh ciangin lau mahmah uh a, “Sikha hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a lau manun a awng uh hi." 
Matthew14:27 Jesu in amaute hopih pah a, “Na lungsim uh hangsak un. Keimah ka hi hi. Lau kei un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew14:28 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, nang na hih takpi leh, tui tung tawnin nang kiangah kei zong hong paisak in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew14:29 Jesu in, “Hong pai in,” a cih ciangin Peter zong gunkuang tung panin kum khia a, Jesuʼ omna lam manawhin tui tungah a pai hi." 
Matthew14:30 Ahi zongin huihpi nung a muh ciangin lau a, tui sungah tum dektak ahih manin, “Topa aw, hong hon in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew14:31 Jesu in zong a khut tawh Peter zamin len a, “Upna cingtaak lopa aw, bangci-a hong tua ci muanlah na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Matthew14:32 Gunkuang tungah a kah toh khit uh ciangin huihpi nung a dai hi. 
Matthew14:33 Tua ciangin gunkuang sungah a om nungzuite in Jesu bia uh a, “Pasianʼ Tapa taktak na hi hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Matthew14:34 Tui a kantan khit uh ciangin Gennesaret gamah a tung uh hi. 
Matthew14:35 Tua gam mite in Jesu ahih lam a theih uh ciangin tua gam kiim khempeuh ah thu zasak uh a, cina khempeuh Jesu kiangah a hong paipih uh hi." 
Matthew14:36 Ama puan mongteep beek a lawnkhak theih nadingun Jesu kiangah ngen uh a, a puan mongteep a lawng mi khempeuh in damna a ngah uh hi." 
Matthew15:1 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua panin Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate, Jesu kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Matthew15:2 “Bang hangin na nungzuite in tangtawng pek panin a hong kihilh suksuk i pupa ngeinate zui lo uh ahi hiam? Amaute in an a nek ma-un a ngeina ding bangin a khut uh sil masa lo uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew15:3 Jesu in, “Bang hangin note in na pupa ngeina uh zui-in, Pasianʼ thupiakna palsat zawsop na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew15:4 Pasian in, ‘Na nu le na pa na zahtak in,’ ci a, tua banah, ‘A nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a gensiate in thahna thuak ding hi,’ ci lai hi." 
Matthew15:5 Ahi zongin note in, ‘Mi khatpeuh in a nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a huh theih nading na khat peuhpeuh a neih leh, tua na pen Pasian ading hi, ci peuh leh, a nu le a pa piak kul nawn lo hi,’ ci-in thu na hilh uh hi." 
Matthew15:6 Tua ahih manin na pupa ngeina uh na zuihna uh hangin Pasianʼ thu na palsat uh hi. 
Matthew15:7 Na tungtham-un mihoih a kineihkhem mite aw, Isaiah in noteʼ thu a genna man mahmah hi. Tua a genna ah," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Hih mite in a kampi bek uh tawh kei hong zahtak bawl uh a, ahi zongin a lungsim taktak uh kei tawh kigamla hi." 
Matthew15:9 Mihingteʼ bawl tawm thukhamte, Pasianʼ thukham zahin mite tungah hilh uh ahih manin kei hong biak hangun a kimanna om lo hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew15:10 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah mihonte sam a, “Ka thugen na ngai unla, hoihtakin na thei tel un." 
Matthew15:11 Kam sungah a tum suk nate in mi ninsak lo a, kam sung panin a pusuak nate in mi a ninsak hizaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew15:12 Tua ciangin nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Farisi mite in hih na thugen a zak uh ciangin na a sak mahmahna thu uh na thei hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew15:13 Jesu in, “Vantungah a om ka Paʼ suan ahi lokung khempeuh kibot khia ding hi." 
Matthew15:14 Hih mite lunghihmawh ngaihsut kei un. Amaute pen mittaw makai ahi uh hi. Mittaw khat in mittaw dang khat makaih leh a nihun hawkguam sungah kia khawm ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew15:15 Ahi zongin Peter in Jesu kiangah, “Hih thu gentehna a khiatna kote hong hilh in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew15:16 Jesu in, “Note nangawn in thei lo a, tel lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew15:17 Kam sungah a tum sukte pen gil sung tawnin tua panin paikhia suak hi lo ahi hiam? 
Matthew15:18 Ahi zongin kam sung panin a pusuakte pen lungsim panin hong kipan khia hi a, hihte in mi ninsak thei hi." 
Matthew15:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh lungsim panin mi thahnopna, mi zi tawh mawhnopna, nungak tawh mawhnopna, guktaakna, zuaugenna, mi gensiatna le ngaihsut hoih lo a tuamtuam hong piang khia hi." 
Matthew15:20 Hih bang nate in mi ninsak a, khut sil loin annekna in mi ninsak lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew15:21 Tua lai panin Jesu paikhia a, Taia khuapi le Sidon khuapi gam sung tengah a zin hi." 
Matthew15:22 Tua gamah a teeng Kanaan nupi khat hong pai-in hong kiko a, “Davidʼ suan, Topa aw, kei hong hehpih in. Ka tanu in dawi vei a, nasia mahmah hi,” ci-in a hong thum hi." 
Matthew15:23 Ahi zongin Jesu in kam khat beek paupih lo hi. Tua ciangin a nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Hih nupi i nung zui-in kikoko ahih manin a ciah nadingin sawl in,” ci-in a thum uh hi." 
Matthew15:24 Jesu in, “Tuu bangin a mangthang Israel mite lak bekah kei hong kisawl hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew15:25 Ahi zongin tua nupi hong pai-in Jesuʼ mai ah khukdin a, “Topa aw, kei hong huh in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew15:26 Jesu in, “Tateʼ annek ding laksakin ui khawite piak ding kilawm lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi."
