Matthew15:27 Nupi in, “Hi mah hi, Topa aw; a topa sabuai tung panin a kia annengte, ui khawite in zong ne buang hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Matthew15:28 Tua ciangin Jesu in tua nupi kiangah, “Nupi aw, na upna lian taktak hi. Na deihna bangin hong piang ding hi,” ci-in a dawn khit ciangin a tanu thakhatin a dam pah hi." 
Matthew15:29 Tua lai panin Jesu pai khia-in Galilee Tuili kiimah a pai hi. Mual tung lamah kah to-in a tu hi. 
Matthew15:30 Ama kiangah mihon tampi tak hong pai uh a, khebaite, khezawte, mittawte, a pau thei lote le cina dang tampi, Jesu kiangah hong koih uh hi. Jesu in tuate khempeuh a damsak hi." 
Matthew15:31 A pau thei lote pau thei-in, khezawte damin, khebaite hoihtakin lam pai thei-in, mittawte in khua a muh theihkikna thu mihonpite in a muh uh ciangin lamdang sa mahmah uh a, Israel miteʼ Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Matthew15:32 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite sam a, “Kei kiangah hih mite ni thum bang hong om khin uh a, amaute in annek ding nei nawn lo uh ahih manin hehpihhuai ka sa hi. Lamkal ah cimawh kha ding uh ahih manin gil kialin ka ciahsak nuam kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew15:33 Nungzuite in, “Mihon hih zah i piak ding, hih gamlak ah koi panin an ngah ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew15:34 Jesu in, “Anlum bangzah nei na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Lum sagih le ngasa neu tawm khat om hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew15:35 Tua ciangin Jesu in leilak ah mihonte a tut nadingin a sawl hi. 
Matthew15:36 Anlum sagih le a ngasate la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin balnenin a nungzuite tungah pia a, a nungzuite in mihonpite mai ah a lui uh hi." 
Matthew15:37 Mihonte in ne-in a kham khit uh ciangin a khamval a neng a themte tawmkik uh a, paipel lian sagih a dim hi." 
Matthew15:38 Tua an a ne mite, numei le naupang sim loh, pasal cingteng mihing tul li ahi hi." 
Matthew15:39 Jesu in mihonte a ciahsak khit ciangin gunkuang tungah tuangin Magadan gamah a pai hi. 
Matthew16:1 Jesu kiangah Farisi mite le Saddusi mite pawl khat a hong pai uh hi. Amaute in Jesu a mawhsak theih nading uh a deihna-in Pasian tawh a kipawl ahihna a lah nadingin lim khat a lah ding a ngen uh hi. 
Matthew16:2 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Ni a tum khit nitak ciangin, ‘Van san ahih manin khua pha ding hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Matthew16:3 Zingsang hun ciangin, ‘Van sanin khua niim ahih manin guah zu ding hi,’ na ci thei uh hi. Note in van maitang na et uh ciangin khua pha ding le khua sia ding khen thei napi-in tu hun thute na theithei kei uh hi." 
Matthew16:4 Tu lai hun mite giloin, Pasian tawh kipawl lo uh hi. Lim a nget uh hangin Jonah lim sim loh a dang kilak lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ahih manin amaute nusia-in a paisan hi." 
Matthew16:5 Tui gal khat a tun uh ciangin nungzuite in anlum a puak mangngilh lam uh a phawk uh hi. 
Matthew16:6 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Farisi-te le Saddusi-teʼ silngo hoihtakin kidawm un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew16:7 Tua ciangin nungzuite in, “Anlum i puak mangngilh manin hih thu hong gen hi ding hi,” ci-in amaute khatlekhat a kikum uh hi." 
Matthew16:8 Jesu in hih amauteʼ kihona thu thei ahih manin, “Upna neu mite aw, anlum na puak loh manun bang hangin kikum na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew16:9 Tu ciang dong phawk thei nai lo lai na hi uh hiam? Anlum nga tawh mi tul nga a kivak khit ciangin paipel bangzah dim val lai cih thu phawk nawn lo na hi uh hiam? 
Matthew16:10 Tua ahih kei leh zong, anlum sagih tawh mi tul li a kivak khit ciangin a kikhamval na kaihkhop uh paipel lian bangzah dim cih phawk nawn lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew16:11 Hih thu ka gen ciangin anlum thu a gen ka hih loh lam bangci-in phawk thei lo lawmlawm na hi uh hiam? Farisi-te le Saddusi-teʼ silngo hoihtakin kidawm un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew16:12 Tua bangin thu a gen ciangin anlum a kisawh silngo thu a gen hi loin, Farisi-te le Saddusi-teʼ thuhilhna a gen ahih lam a phawk pan uh hi." 
Matthew16:13 Sisaria Filippi gam a tun uh ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite in Mihingʼ Tapa kei kua hi hong ci uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Matthew16:14 Amaute in, “Pawl khat in Tuiphumpa Johan hi, hong ci uh hi; pawl khat in Elijah hi, hong ci uh hi; pawl khat in Jeremiah ahih kei leh kamsang khat peuhpeuh hi ding hi, hong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew16:15 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Tua ahihleh note in kei kua hi hong ci na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Matthew16:16 Simon Peter in, “Nang pen a nungta Pasianʼ Tapa, Khris na hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew16:17 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Jonahʼ tapa Simon aw, hoih mahmah hi. Hih thu, leitung pilna tawh na theih tawm hi lo a, vantungah a om ka Pa in nangma tungah hong hilh ahi hi." 
Matthew16:18 Keʼn kong genin ah: Nang pen suangneu a cihnopna Peter na hi hi. Hih suangpi tungah ka pawlpi ka lam dinga, sihna nangawn in zo zo ngei lo ding hi." 
Matthew16:19 Vantung ki-ukna sung lut nading tawhtangte, nangma tungah kong pia dinga, hih leitungah hoih lo na cihte, vantungah zong a hoih lo hi dinga, hih leitungah hoih hi na cihte, vantungah zong a hoih hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew16:20 Tua ciangin amah Khris ahih lamtak, kuama kiangah a gen loh nadingun a nungzuite kiangah khauh takin thu a pia hi." 
Matthew16:21 Tua hun a kipanin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Jerusalem khua ah ka pai ding hi. Upate, siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate tung panin gimna tampi ka thuak ding hi. Kei hong kithat dinga, ni thum ni-in hong kihingkiksak ding hi,” ci-in teltakin gen a kipan hi." 
Matthew16:22 Tua ciangin Peter in Jesu paikhiatpih a, “Topa aw, hih bangin Pasian in piangsak kei hen. Nang tungah hih bang piang thei ngei peuhmah lo ding hi,” ci-in a taii bawl hi." 
Matthew16:23 Ahi zongin Jesu kihei-in Peter kiangah, “Satan aw, ka nungah om in. Hih na ngaihsutnate Pasianʼ ngaihsutna hi loin mihingteʼ ngaihsutna ahih manin ka lam a hong khaktan ding a suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew16:24 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mi khatpeuh ka nungzui a suahnop leh, ama deihna bangin gamta nawn loin, a singlamteh kisuanin hong zui ding hi." 
Matthew16:25 Hih a leitung nuntakna a hu nuamte in a nuntakna bulpi nangawn tawh suplawh dinga, keima hangin hih a leitung nuntakna a suplawhte in a nuntakna bulpi hu zo ding hi." 
Matthew16:26 Mi khatpeuh in hih leitung khempeuh a ngah hangin a nuntakna bulpi suplawh leh bang phattuamna om ahi hiam? A nuntakna bang tawh leikik thei nawn ding ahi hiam? 
Matthew16:27 A Paʼ minthanna vang le a vantung mite tawh Mihing Tapa hong paikik dinga, mi khempeuh amauʼ gamtatna ciat tawh a kizui-in a thuk ding hi." 
Matthew16:28 Hih lai-a a om mi pawl khatte a sih ma-in Mihing Tapa, Kumpi-in hong pai ding ahih lamtak phawk khial kei un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew17:1 Tua zawh ni guk ciangin Jesu in Peter, James le a nau Johan-te samin mual sang khat dawnah a tuamin a paipih hi." 
Matthew17:1 Tua zawh ni guk ciangin Jesu in Peter, James le a nau Johan-te samin mual sang khat dawnah a tuamin a paipih hi." 
Matthew17:2 Tua lai mun panin amauteʼ muh tangpi mahin Jesu a mel kikheel a, a maitang ni bangin taangin, a puante khuavak bangin a ngo hi." 
Matthew17:3 Tua lai ah Moses le Elijah hong om vat uh a, Jesu tawh a kiho a mu uh hi." 
Matthew17:4 Tua ciangin Peter in Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, hih lai ah i om, nuam mahmah hi. Hoih na sak leh, nang ading buk khat, Moses ading buk khat, Elijah ading buk khat, buk thum ka hong lamsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew17:5 Tua bangin a pau laitakun meii ngo hong kaai vatin amaute hong khuh a, tua meii lak panin aw khat hong ging vatin, “Hih pa pen ka it, ka lung a kim mahmahna ka Tapa ahi hi. Ama thu na ngai un,” a hong ci hi." 
Matthew17:6 Nungzuite in hih awging a zak uh ciangin leilak ah bok suk uh a, lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Matthew17:7 Ahi zongin Jesu hong pai-in amaute va lawng a, “Tho un, lau kei un,” a va ci hi." 
Matthew17:8 Amaute a khuadak uh ciangin Jesu sim loh kuamah dang a mu nawn kei uh hi. 
Matthew17:9 Mual tung panin amaute a ciah suk laitakun Jesu in nungzuite kiangah, “Sihna panin Mihing Tapa a kithawhkiksak matengin hih na muhte uh kuama kiangah gen kei un,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Matthew17:10 Tua ciangin nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in, Elijah hong pai masa ding hi, ci uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew17:11 Jesu in, “Na khempeuh a bawl khol dingin Elijah hong pai masa takpi hi." 
Matthew17:12 Ahi zongin note kiangah kong genin ah: Elijah hong pai khin napi-in mite in amah thei lo uh ahih manin a ututun a bawl uh hi. Tua mah bangin Mihing Tapa in zong bawlsiatna thuak ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew17:13 Tua ciangin Tuiphumpa Johanʼ thu a gen ahih lamtak nungzuite in a thei uh hi. 
Matthew17:14 Mihonte omna a tunkik uh ciangin Jesu kiangah mi khat hong pai-in ama mai ah hong khukdin a," 
Matthew17:15 “Topa aw, nong hehpihna-in ka tapa hong damsak in. Amah in sihbup natna nei-in gim mahmah hi. Meikhuk sungah ahi a, tui sungah ahi zongin a puk zel hi." 
Matthew17:16 Na nungzuite kiangah ka paipih hangin amaute in damsak thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew17:17 Jesu in, “Upna nei lo, a ngaihsun khial mite aw, note bang tanvei hong ompih dinga, bang tanvei hong kikholh pih ding ka hi hiam? A naupang hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew17:18 Jesu in tua naupangʼ sung panin dawi a paikhiat nadingin thu pia a, a naupang thakhatin a dam pah hi." 
Matthew17:19 Tua ciangin amau guak a om laitakun nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Bang hangin kote in tua dawi hawl khia thei lo ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Matthew17:20 Jesu in, “Na upna uh a cingtaak lohna hang ahi hi. Ahi taktakin note kiangah kong genin ah: Ankam tang cia bang upna na neih nak uh leh, hih mual kiangah, ‘Hih lai panin hua lai ah kin in,’ ci le-uhcin kin khia ding hi. Na hih theih loh uh khat zong om lo ding hi." 
Matthew17:21 Thungetna le antanna tawh lobuang, thudang tawh hih bangte kihawl khia thei lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew17:22 Galilee gam sungah a om laitakin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mihingte khut sungah Mihing Tapa kipia dinga," 
Matthew17:23 mite in a that ding uh hi. Ahi zongin a ni thum ni-in kihingkiksak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua thu a zak uh ciangin nungzuite a dah mahmah uh hi." 
Matthew17:24 Kapernaum khua ah a tun uh ciangin biakinn siahdongte in Peter kiangah, “Na siapa in biakinn siah hamu a piak ngei mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
Matthew17:25 “A piak ngei mah ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Inn sungah Peter a lut ciangin Jesu in na paupih masa zaw a, “Simon aw, nang na bangci ngaihsut hiam? Leitung kumpite in kuate tung panin siah kai ahi uh hiam? Amau tate tung panin siah kai ahi uh hiam, tua ahih kei leh midangte tung panin kai ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Matthew17:26 Peter in, “Midangte tung panin siah a kai uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tua ahihleh siah piak ding panin a tate a peng ahi hi." 
Matthew17:27 Ahi zongin amauʼ nasepna a nawngkaisak i suahkhak loh nadingin tuili ah nga siahna sikkawi va khia inla, a awk masa penpen hong kai khia in. Tua a ngasa kam sung en lecin dangka tang peek khat na om ding hi. Tua sum la inla, ei tegel adingin biakinn siah va pia in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew18:1 Tua laitakin Jesu kiangah nungzuite hong pai uh a, “Vantung ki-ukna sungah kua lian pen ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
Matthew18:2 Jesu in naupang khat samin amaute mai ah dingsak a," 
Matthew18:3 “A man mahmah in note kiangah kong genin ah: Note kikheelin naupang na bat kei uh leh vantung ki-ukna sungah na lut ngei kei ding uh hi. 
Matthew18:4 Hih naupang bangin a kiniamkhiat mite, vantung ki-ukna sungah a lianpen hi ding hi." 
Matthew18:5 Keima min hangin hih bang naupang khat a limbawl mi in kei zong hong limbawl ahi hi. 
Matthew18:6 “Ahi zongin kei a hong um hih naupangnote khatpeuh a khialsak mi pen a ngawng ah an gawina suang lianpi khat kikhihin tuipi thuk sungah kikhia suk le ama adingin hoih zaw thampek ding hi. 
Matthew18:7 “Tua bangin mi a khialsak thei ding om ahih manin leitung mite adingin a dahhuai mahmah thu ahi hi. Tua bang pen a piang tawntung ding hi a, ahi zongin tua bangin khialhna a piangsak mite adingin dahhuai pha mahmah diak hi." 
Matthew18:8 “Na khut ahi a, na khe in ahi zongin hong khialhsak leh sattan inla paikhia in. Meikuang tawntung sungah khut kim khe kimin hong kikhiat sangin nuntakna sungah khut sam khe samin lut lecin nang adingin hoih zaw ding hi." 
Matthew18:9 Na mit in hong khialhsak leh khel khia inla paikhia in. Mit kim nei-in hell khuk sungah hong kikhul sangin mit lang khat bek tawh nuntakna sungah lut lecin nang adingin hoih zaw ding hi. 
Matthew18:10 “Hih naupangnote khatpeuh na simmawh khak loh nadingun kidawm un. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Amaute a kem vantung mite pen vantungah ka Pa kiangah om tawntung uh hi. 
Matthew18:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa pen a mangthang mite a hon dingin a hong pai ahi hi. 
Matthew18:12 Note in bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam? Mi khat in tuu za khat nei henla, a tuute khat mang leh, mual tungah a gamta a dang sawm kua le kuate nusia-in tua a mang pen a zong dingin kuan khia ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Matthew18:13 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tua a mang tuu a muh ciangin a mang lo tuu sawm kua le kuate tungah a lungdamna sangin a mang pen tungah a lungdamna lian zaw hi lo ahi hiam? 
Matthew18:14 Tua mah bangin vantungah a om na Pa un hih naupangnote khat zong a sih ding a deih kei hi. 
Matthew18:15 “Na sanggamte uh na tung uh ah hong khialh leh pai-in no tegel bek theihin a khialhna va gen un. Na thu uh a hong man leh na sanggampa uh a ngahkik na hi uh hi. 
Matthew18:16 Ahi zongin na thu uh a hong man nop kei leh, Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Mi nih ahih kei leh mi thumʼ theihna bek tawh mawhsakna khat peuhpeuh man pan hi,’ a cih mah bangin midang khat ahi a, nih ahi zongin tonpih un." 
Matthew18:17 Amah in tua miteʼ thu a man nop kei leh pawlpite tungah a thu ko un. Pawlpiteʼ thu nangawn a man nop kei leh Gentail mite le siahdongte bangin na ngaihsun un. 
Matthew18:18 “Note kiangah a taktakin kong genin ah: Leitungah na kham peuhmah uh vantungah zong kikham dinga, leitungah na phal peuhmah uh vantungah zong kiphal ding hi." 
Matthew18:19 Leitungah note nih thukimin na nget uh na khat peuhpeuh, vantungah a om ka Pa in hong pia ding hi." 
Matthew18:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima minin mi nih le thum bek nangawn a kikhopna peuhpeuh ah kei ka om hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew18:21 Tua ciangin Peter in Jesu va naih a, “Topa aw, ka sanggamte khatpeuh ka tungah hong khialh ciangin bangzah vei maisak ding ka hi hiam? Sagih vei dongtak maisak ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu in, “Sagih vei ciang bek maisak in kong ci kei hi. Sawm sagih mun sagih vei maisak in kong ci hi." 
Matthew18:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung ki-ukna zia pen a nasemte in sum bangzah a ba hiam, ci-in a sazian a en kumpipaʼ hihna zia tawh kibang hi." 
Matthew18:24 Kumpipa in a sum ba sazian a et a kipat ciangin ama sum mak tampi a ba nasem khat hong kipaipih hi. 
Matthew18:25 Tua nasem pa in a sum loh zo lo ahih manin amah a kipan a zi a tate le a neih khempeuh zuakin a leiba a loh nadingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi. 
Matthew18:26 Tua ahih manin a nasem pa zong a mai ah hong bokin thum a, ‘Topa aw, hong ngak lai in; a vekpi-in ka hong loh ding hi,’ ci-in a thum hi." 
Matthew18:27 Kumpipa in khasiathuai sa ahih manin a leiba teng maisakin a khah hi. 
Matthew18:28 “Ahi zongin tua nasem pa a paikhiat ciangin ama sum ngun peek za khat khawng a ba a nasep pih dang khat tawh a kituak hi. Tua pa a gawlin manin, ‘Na leiba hong loh in,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew18:29 A nasep pih pa zong a mai ah bokin hong thum a, ‘Hong ngak lai in; ka hong loh ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew18:30 Ahi zongin ama thumna sang nuam lo hi. A leiba a loh khit matengin thong ah a kia dingin a khumsak hi. 
Matthew18:31 A nasep pih dangte in hih thupiang a theih uh ciangin dahhuai sa mahmah uh ahih manin, a thupiang khempeuh kumpipa kiangah a ko uh hi." 
Matthew18:32 Tua ciangin kumpipa in tua nasem pa sam a, ‘A gilo nasem pa aw, kei kiangah hong thum na hih manin na leiba khempeuh ka hong maisak hi." 
Matthew18:33 Nang ka hong hehpih mah bangin na nasep pih pa zong na hehpih ding kilawm hi lo ahi hiam?’ a ci hi. 
Matthew18:34 Kumpipa zong a heh suak ahih manin a leiba khempeuh a loh khit matengin thong sungah a kikhum nadingin thu a pia hi. 
Matthew18:35 “Tua mah bangin note in zong na lungsim uh ah na sanggamte uh mawhna na maisak nop kei uh leh vantungah a om ka Pa in note tungah zong tua bangmahin a hong bawl ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew19:1 Jesu in a thugen a man khit ciangin Galilee gam panin pai khia-in Judea gam Jordan gun gal khat ah a pai hi. 
Matthew19:1 Jesu in a thugen a man khit ciangin Galilee gam panin pai khia-in Judea gam Jordan gun gal khat ah a pai hi. 
Matthew19:2 Mihon tampi in amah zui uh a, tua munah cinate a damsak hi." 
Matthew19:3 Farisi mite pawl khat Jesu kiangah hong pai uh a, amah a mawhsak theih nading uh a deihna-un, “Thu khat peuhpeuh hangin zi mak theih ding mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew19:4 Jesu in, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘A kipat cil-in a Piangsak pa in numei le pasal a bawl hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew19:5 Tua ciangin, ‘Hih thu hangin pasal in a nu le a pa nusia-in a zi tawh kigawm dinga, amau tegel pum khat a bang ding uh hi,’ ci-in na kigelh hi." 
Matthew19:6 Tua ahih manin amaute nih hi nawn loin khat ahi ta uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in a gawm sa mite, kuamah in khen kei tahen,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew19:7 Tua ciangin Farisi mite in, “Tua ahihleh bang hangin Moses in mi khatpeuh makna lai gelhsakin a zi masak thei ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Matthew19:8 Jesu in, “Note, hilhzawhin na om loh manun Moses in hih bangin ngeina a omsak thei ahi hi. Ahi zongin a kipat cil-in tua bang na hi lo hi." 
Matthew19:9 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Mi khatpeuh in midang tawh a zi a mawhna lobuang, a zi a mak a, numei dang tawh a ten leh numei tunga mawh ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew19:10 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Nupa thu tua bang ding ahihleh kiteeng vet kei lehang hoih zaw ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew19:11 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Hih ngeina pen mi khempeuh in a zuih zawh ding hi lo a, Pasian in a tua ci dingin a sehte bek in a zui zo ding uh ahi hi." 
Matthew19:12 Mi pawl khat a pianpihin geh sa bang om a, pawl khatte a kiget tawm om a, pawl khatte pen vantung ki-ukna hangin geh bangin a om hi. Geh bangin a om zote om tahen,” a ci hi." 
Matthew19:13 Tua ciangin mi pawl khat in a naupangte uh tungah Jesu in a khut nga-in thu a ngetsak nading deihin a naupangte uh a hong paipih uh hi. Ahi zongin a nungzuite in tua mite na taii uh hi. 
Matthew19:14 Jesu in, “Vantung ki-ukna pen naupangte tawh a kibang mite ading ahih manin, tua naupangte ka kiangah hong paipihsak unla, khaktan kei un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew19:15 Tua ciangin Jesu in naupangnote tungah a khut nga-in thupha a piak khit ciangin a paikhia hi. 
Matthew19:16 Khat vei, Jesu kiangah mi khat hong pai a, “Sia aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngah nadingin bang gamtat hoih gamta ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a hong dong hi." 
Matthew19:17 Jesu in, “Bang hangin bang hoih hiam cih thu hong dong na hi hiam? A hoih khat bek om hi. Nuntak tawntungna sungah na lut nop leh thukhamte na zui in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew19:18 Amah in, “Bang thukhamte ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesu in, “Mi that kei in; numei tungah mawh kei in; mi neihsa gu kei in; zuau thu gen kei in;" 
Matthew19:19 na nu na pa zahtak in; nang na ki-it bangin na veengte na it in, cihnate ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew19:20 Tua ciangin tangvalpa in, “Hihte khempeuh ka zuih sa ahi hi; bang kisam lai ding ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
Matthew19:21 Jesu in, “Mi cingtaak na hih nop leh pai-in na neihsate va zuak inla, na sum khotte, mizawngte tungah va pia lecin, vantungah sum na hau ding hi. Tua ciangin hong pai inla kei hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew19:22 Tangvalpa in hih thu a zak ciangin, amah hau mahmah ahih manin, mai khingin a paikhia hi." 
Matthew19:23 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “A mantak a kong genin ah: Mihau khat pen vantung ki-ukna sungah a lut ding haksa mahmah ding hi." 
Matthew19:24 A dang khat hong gen leuleu ning: Pasian ukna sungah mihau khat a lut ding sangin phim bilvang sungah kalaoh khat a lut ding baih zaw lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew19:25 Nungzuite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Kua in hotkhiatna ngah zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew19:26 Ahi zongin Jesu in amaute enin, “Mihingteʼ hih zawh ding hi lo mah hi; ahi zongin Pasian in na khempeuh hih thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew19:27 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Kote in na khempeuh nusia-in nang ka hong zui uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang ngah ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Matthew19:28 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Keʼn limtak a kong genin ah: A hong tung ding hun thak sungah a minthanna tokhom tungah Mihing Tapa a tut hun ciangin kei a hong zui note zong, tokhom sawm le nihte tung mahah tu-in Israel minam sawm le nihte tungah thukhenin na om ding uh hi." 
Matthew19:29 Keima hangin a inn, a sanggam numei, a sanggam pasal, a nu, a pa, a tate, a leitang, khat peuhpeuh a nusiate in a zah za khat ngahkikin, nuntak tawntungna zong a ngah ding uh hi." 
Matthew19:30 Ahi zongin tu hun laitakin a lian mi tampite tua hun ciangin a neu suak dinga, tu hun laitakin a neu tampite tua hun ciangin a lian hi ding uh hi." 
Matthew20:1 “Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung ki-ukna sung om zia pen a leenggah lo ah na a sem ding a cial dingin zing tungin a kuan khia leenggah lo nei pa tawh kibang hi. 
Matthew20:2 Ni tha ngeina ngun peek khat piak dingin a kithukim khit uh ciangin a leenggah lo ah na a sem dingin pawl khat a kuansak hi. 
Matthew20:3 Zingsang nai kua hun ciangin mihon omna sumbuk ah pai leuleu a, mi pawl khat bangmah sem loin a mawk om a muh ciangin," 
Matthew20:4 ‘No zong leenggah lo ah va kuan un; a kilawm zah khat kong pia ding hi,’ a cih ciangin pawl khat a kuan uh hi." 
Matthew20:5 Tua ciangin sun sawm le nih ciangin pawl khat cial leuleu a, nitak nai thum ciangin pawl khat a cial lai hi." 
Matthew20:6 Nitak nai nga ciangin mihon omna sumbuk ah a pai leh mi pawl khat a mawk om mu ahih manin, ‘Bang hangin bangmah sem loin sunthapai mawk om na hi uh hiam?’ ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Matthew20:7 amaute in, ‘Kuamah in nasem dingin hong cial lo hi,’ ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘No zong leenggah lo ah va kuan un,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew20:8 “Nitak ciangin lo nei pa in a nuai-a nasem ukpa kiangah, ‘Lokhote sam inla, a kicial nunung pen a kipanin a kicial masa pente dongin a ni tha uh pia in,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew20:9 Nitak nai nga hunin a kipan nasemte ngun peek khat ciat kipia hi. 
Matthew20:10 A kuan masa pente, ni tha sang dingin hong pai uh ciangin a dangte sangin tam ngah zaw ding ci-in amau kilamen napi-in amaute zong ngun peek khat ciat mah kipia veve hi." 
Matthew20:11 A sum a san uh ciangin lo nei pa tungah phun uh a," 
Matthew20:12 ‘A nunungte in nai khat sung bek sem napi-in, sun thapai-in nisa thuakin na a sem kote tawh na kikimsak hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Matthew20:13 Tua ciangin lo nei pa in amaute khat kiangah, ‘Lawm aw, nang ka hong khem het kei hi. Ni khat sung nasep thaman dingin ngun peek khat piak dingin na thukim sa hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Matthew20:14 Hih na thalawh sa sum la inla ciah in. Nang ka hong piakzah mah, hih a kicial nunungte tungah zong ka pia nuam hi." 
Matthew20:15 Keima sum pen keima ut bangin ka zat theih ding hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh kei ka cit manin na heh suak ahi hiam?’ a ci hi. 
Matthew20:16 Tua ahih manin a neute lian dinga, a liante neu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew20:17 Jerusalem khua manawhin Jesu a pai toh laitakin, a paikawmun sawm le nihte tawh tuamtonin thu genpih a," 
Matthew20:18 “Tu-in Jerusalem khua ah a pai to ding ihi hi. Siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate tungah Mihing Tapa kiheek dinga, amaute in a si dingin thu a khen khit uh ciangin" 
Matthew20:19 Gentail mite in simmawh bawlin, satin, singlamteh tungah a khai dingin amaute khut sungah a pia ding uh hi. Ahi zongin a ni thum ni-in kihingkiksak ding hi,” ci-in a tuamin thu a hilh hi." 
Matthew20:20 Tua ciangin Zebedi tate James le Johanʼ nu, a ta tegel tawh Jesu kiangah hong pai-in a mai ah khukdinin hong thum hi." 
Matthew20:20 Tua ciangin Zebedi tate James le Johanʼ nu, a ta tegel tawh Jesu kiangah hong pai-in a mai ah khukdinin hong thum hi." 
Matthew20:21 Jesu in tua nupi kiangah, “Bang deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amah in, “Kumpi-in na om ciangin hih ka tate khat na tak lamah, khat na veilamah a tut nadingin thu pia lecin ka ut hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew20:22 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Na nget uh na thei kei uh hi. Ka thuak ding gimna note in thuak zo ding na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Ka thuak zo ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew20:23 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Keima thuak mah bangin note in na thuak takpi ding uh a, ahi zongin ka taklam le ka veilam a tut ding pen keiʼ hong piak theih hi lo hi. Ka Pa in a seh sa mite ading bek ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew20:24 Nungzui dang sawmte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hih unau nihte tungah a heh uh hi. 
Matthew20:25 Ahi zongin Jesu in amaute sam a, “Mi a uk Gentail-te in mite tungah aana nei uh a, mi a makai Gentail-te in thuneihna tawh a ukna thu na thei uh hi." 
Matthew20:26 Ahi zongin note lakah tua bang hi lo ding hi. Note lakah a lian ahi dingte noteʼ nasem hi dinga," 
Matthew20:27 noteʼ lakah a lian pen ahi dingte noteʼ sila hi ding hi. 
Matthew20:28 Mihing Tapa zong nasem nei dingin hong pai hi loin midangte ading na semin, mi tampi tat nading a si dingin a hong pai ahih mah bangin note zong a tua ci ding na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew20:29 Jerikho khua panin a paikhiat uh ciangin mi tampi in Jesu a zui uh hi. 
Matthew20:30 Lampi gei ah a tu mittaw mi nih in tua lampi tawnin Jesu hong pai hi, ci-in a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin kiko uh a, “Davidʼ suan Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew20:31 Mihonpite in tua mi tegel a kikoko loh nadingun a taii uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute kiko pha semsem uh a, “Davidʼ suan Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in,” a ci teitei uh hi." 
Matthew20:32 Tua ciangin Jesu khawlin amaute sam a, “Bang ka hong hihsak ding deih na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
Matthew20:33 amaute in, “Topa aw, ka mit uh khua hong musakkik in,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew20:34 Jesu in amaute hehpihhuai sa ahih manin a mit uh lawnsak a, thakhat thu-in a mit un khua a mukik pah hi. Tua ciangin amau tegel in zong Jesu nung a zui pah uh hi." 
Matthew21:1 Jerusalem khuanai, Bethfage khua a omna Oliv Mual a tun uh ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite nih ma sawl a," 
Matthew21:2 “Mai-a a om khua ah va pai un. Na tun uh ciangin la nuta khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. Hong sut unla hong kai un. 
Matthew21:3 Mi khatpeuh in hong paupih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi,’ ci le-uhcin hong paisak pah ding hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Matthew21:4 Hih thu pen kamsang paʼ thugenna a tun nadingin a piang ahi hi. 
Matthew21:5 Tua a genna ah, “En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai hi. Kiniamkhiatna tawh lapi tung le la no tungah tuangin hong pai hi, ci-in Zion khua mite kiangah gen un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew21:6 Nungzui tegel zong Jesu sawl bangin va pai uh hi. 
Matthew21:7 Amaute in a la nuta hong paipih uh a, a tungah a puante uh a phah khit uh ciangin Jesu a tuang hi." 
Matthew21:8 Mihon tampite in ama pai nading lampi ah a puante uh na phah uh a, a dangte in nisuh hiangte satin lampi ah a na phah uh hi." 
Matthew21:9 A mai-a pai mihonte le a nung a zui mihonte awng uh a, “Davidʼ suan Jesu in phatna ngah tahen! Topaʼ min tawh hong pai pa in thupha ngah tahen! A sangpen a om Pasian in phatna ngah tahen!” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew21:10 Jerusalem khua sung a tun uh ciangin khua sung mi khempeuh gamlum henhan uh a, “Hih pa kua ahi hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat a kidong uh hi." 
Matthew21:11 Mihonpite in, “Galilee gam Nazareth khua pan a kamsang Jesu hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew21:12 Tua ciangin Pasian biakna innpi huang sungah Jesu lut a, tua sungah van zuak van lei-a a om mi khempeuh a hawl khia hi. Sumkhek nasemin a om miteʼ sabuai le vakhu zuakteʼ tutnate a lumletsak gawp hi." 
Matthew21:13 Amaute kiangah, “Pasian in Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Ka inn pen thungetna inn kici ding hi,’ ci napi-in, note in guktaakna phualpi na suaksak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew21:14 Biakinn sung Jesu kiangah mittawte le khebaite hong pai uh a, amah in amaute a damsak hi." 
Matthew21:15 Ahi zongin siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in a nalamdang bawlte mu-in, biakinn sungah naupangte in, “Davidʼ suan Jesu in phatna ngah tahen!” ci-in a kikona a zak uh ciangin heh uh ahih manin" 
Matthew21:16 Jesu kiangah, “Hih naupangteʼ otna na za hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Jesu in, “Ka za hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Naungekte le naupangteʼ kam tawh a cingtaak phatna na gensak hi,’ a cihna thu sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew21:17 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute nusia a, khuapi sung pan pai khia-in Bethany khua ah a giak hi." 
Matthew21:18 A zingsang ciangin khuapi zuanin hong paikik laitakin Jesu a gil a kial hi. 
Matthew21:19 Lam gei ah theikung khat mu ahih manin a gei ah va pai a, ahi zongin a teh sim loh bangmah a mu kei hi. Jesu in tua theikung kiangah, “Gah ngei nawn kei in!” a cih khit phetin a theikung a si pah hi." 
Matthew21:20 Nungzuite in a muh uh ciangin lamdang sa uh ahih manin, “Bang hangin theikung tua ci sih pah ahi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
Matthew21:21 Jesu in, “Note kiangah a mantak a kong genin ah: Note in uplahna nei het loin, upna taktak na neih nak uh leh hih theikung tungah a piang bang na hih theih uh banah, hih mual kiang nangawn ah, ‘Na omna pan pai khia-in tuipi sung kidenna in,’ ci le-uhcin na cih bangun piang ding hi." 
Matthew21:22 Upna na neih nak uh leh na nget peuhpeuh uh na ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew21:23 Biakinn tual sungah Jesu lutkik a, thuhilhin a om laitakin siampi liante le upate ama kiangah hong pai uh a, “Hih nate kua thu tawh bawl a, na bawl nading kua in aana hong pia ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Matthew21:24 Jesu in, “Kei zong thu khat kong dong masa ding hi. Na hong dawn nak uh leh kei zong kua thu tawh bawl cih kong gen ding hi." 
Matthew21:25 Johan in tuiphum theih nading thu koi lai panin ngah ahi hiam? Pasian kiang panin thu ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihingte kiang panin thu ngah ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute khatlekhat kiseel uh a, “Pasian kiang pan hi,” ci lehang, “Bang hangin um lo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci ding hi." 
Matthew21:26 Ahi zongin, “Mihingte kiang pan hi,” ci leuleu lehang, mi khempeuh in Johan pen kamsang hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin mihonte i kihta zel hi, kici uh hi." 
Matthew21:27 Tua ahih ciangin Jesu kiangah, “Ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Jesu in zong amaute kiangah, “Kei zong hih nate, kua thu tawh ka bawl cih kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew21:28 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note in bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam? Mi khat in tapa nih nei hi. A ta u zaw kiangah, ‘Ka ta aw, tu ni-in leenggah lo ah va kuan in,’ ci-in a sawl ciangin" 
Matthew21:29 amah in, ‘Kuan nuam kei ing,’ ci napi-in a lungsim kikheelin a kuankik hi." 
Matthew21:30 Tua ciangin a ta nau zaw kiangah tua mah bangin va ci a, ‘Pa aw, va kuan mah ning,’ ci napi-in a kuan kei hi." 
Matthew21:31 Hih tapa nihte sung panin a koi bel pen a paʼ deih bangin gamta ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “A ta u zaw a ta hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note kiangah a mantak a kong genin ah: Pasianʼ ukna sungah note sangin siahdongte le numei paktatte lut masa zaw ding hi." 
Matthew21:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah Tuiphumpa Johan hong pai-in thuman lampi hong lak napi-in na um kei uh a, ahi zongin siahdongte le numei paktatte in a um uh hi. Hih thu na theih khit uh ciang nangawnin na lungsim uh na kheel nuam tuan kei uh a, na um kei veve uh hi." 
Matthew21:33 “Thu gentehna dang khat na ngai lai un. Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, a kimkot umin, leenggah cil nading bawl a, a hon nading tausang khat a lam khit ciangin lo khawhlawhte khawhlawhsakin gam dangah a pai hi." 
Matthew21:34 Leenggah min hun a tun ciangin ama ngah ding teng a va la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte a paisak hi. 
Matthew21:35 Lo khawhlawhte in a nasemte na manin khat na sat gawp uh a, khat na thatin, khat suang tawh na deng gawp uh hi." 
Matthew21:36 Tua ciangin lo nei pa in a masa-a sangin nasem a tam zaw va paisak leuleu a, ahi zongin a masa-a mah bangin a nasemte a na bawlsia veve uh hi." 
Matthew21:37 Tua khit ciangin ka tapa paisak leng na zahtak ding uh hi, ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin a tapa a paisak hi." 
Matthew21:38 Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in a tapa a muh uh ciangin, ‘Hih pa pen a gamhluah ding pa ahi hi. Hong pai un; amah thatin a luah ding teng eite in la ni,’ a kici uh hi." 
Matthew21:39 Tua ahih manin amah manin that uh a, lo nawl ah a paai uh hi." 
Matthew21:40 Tua ahih ciangin leenggah lo nei pa hong pai ciangin a lo khawhlawhte bangci bawl ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. 
Matthew21:41 Amaute in, “Tua migilote that gawp dinga, a hunhunin leenggah a pia ding lo khawhlawh dangte khosak ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew21:42 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi. Hih pen Topaʼ bawl hi a, i muh ciangin lamdang i sa hi,’ ci-in a kigelhna sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew21:43 Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin ah: Note pen Pasian hong ki-uksak nawn lo dinga, a kilawmin a gamta ding mite bek Pasian in uk ding hi." 
Matthew21:44 Hih suang tungah a kia mi khempeuh kizan gawp dinga, mi khatpeuh tungah tua suang a kiat leh zong deng zan gawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew21:45 Siampi liante le Farisi mite in hih thu gentehna a zak uh ciangin amaute a cih nopna-in a gen ahih lam a phawk uh hi. 
Matthew21:46 Jesu a man dingin kithawi uh a, ahi zongin mihonte in kamsang khatin ngaihsun uh ahih manin mihonte a kihtak manun a man ngam kei uh hi." 
Matthew22:1 Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna dang khat zangin thu hilh a," 
Matthew22:2 “Vantung ki-ukna zia pen a tapa adingin mopawi a bawl kumpipaʼ gamtatzia tawh kibang hi. 
Matthew22:3 Mopawi siim dingin a khoh sa mite a sam dingin a nasemte sawl a, ahi zongin kuamah pai lo hi." 
Matthew22:4 Tua ciangin nasem dangte sawl leuleu a, ‘Ka khohsak sa mite kiangah hih bangin va gen un: Ka bawngtalte le ka bawng no thaute kigo khin a, nitak an a min sa-in a om banah, na khempeuh a man sa-in om khinta hi. Mopawi an ne dingin hong pai ta un, ci hi, ci-in va gen un,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew22:5 Ahi zongin a khoh sa mite in na thusim lo uh a, pawl khat in lo na kuan sanin, pawl khat in a sumbuk ah na paisanin," 
Matthew22:6 a dangte in a nasemte manin a na sat gawp khit uh ciangin a na that uh hi. 
Matthew22:7 Kumpipa zong heh mahmah a, a galkapte kuansakin tua mi thatte a thahsak khit ciangin a khua a hal tum sak hi." 
Matthew22:8 Tua ciangin a nasemte kiangah, ‘Mopawi an a baih sa-in om a, ahi zongin ka sap mite a ne dingin a kilawm lo mi a suak uh hi." 
Matthew22:9 Tua ahih manin lam lianpi ah va pai unla, mi na muh zahzah uh hong sam un,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew22:10 Nasemte zong lam lianpi ah va pai uh a, mihoih mihoih lo ci loin a muh khempeuh uh va kaikhawm uh ahih manin mopawi bawlna inn sung dimin leengla hong om hi." 
Matthew22:11 “Kumpipa, a leenglate a en dingin a hong lut ciangin mopawi siimna puan a silh lo mi khat a mu hi." 
Matthew22:12 Ama kiangah, ‘Lawm aw, mopawi siimna puan silh lopi-in hih lai ah hong bangci lut theih na hi hiam?’ a cih ciangin tua mipa in a cih nading a thei kei hi." 
Matthew22:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, ‘A khut a khe hen unla, pualam khua mialna lakah lawn khia un; tua lai ah kapin a hagawi ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew22:14 “Bang hang hiam cih leh mi tampi a kisap hangin tawm bek a kiteel hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew22:15 Tua ciangin Farisi mite paikhia uh a, a kampauna tawh Jesu a mat theih nadingun thu a kikum uh hi." 
Matthew22:16 Amauʼ nungzuite le Herod mi pawl khat, Jesu kiangah a paisak uh hi. Amaute in, “Sia aw, thu ahi bang a gen tawntung na hihna thu ka thei uh hi. Mite kuamah zahtak tuam nei lo na hih manin midangteʼ pau ding bangmah phamawh sa loin Pasian in miteʼ gamtat ding a deihna bangin tangtakin thu na hilh tawntung hi." 
Matthew22:17 Tua ahih ciangin Rom kumpipa Sisar tungah siah i piak ding kilawm hiam, na ngaihsutna nong gen nadingin ka deih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew22:18 Ahi zongin Jesu in amauʼ gitloh geelna thei ahih manin, “Mihoih a kineihkhem mite aw, bang hangin kei hong thangsiah se na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew22:19 Siahin na piak ding uh sum hong lak dih un,” a cih ciangin sumtang peek khat hong paipih uh hi." 
Matthew22:20 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Hih sum tungah kua lim le kua min om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Matthew22:21 amaute in, “Sisarʼ lim le a min kigelh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Sisarʼ nate Sisarʼ tungah na pia unla, Pasianʼ nate Pasianʼ tungah na pia un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew22:22 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lamdang sa mahmah uh a, ama kiang panin a paikhia uh hi." 
Matthew22:23 Tua ni mahin, misite thawhkikna om lo hi, ci-in a um Saddusi mite pawl khat Jesu kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Matthew22:24 “Sia aw, Moses in, ‘Mi khat ta nei loin a sih leh tua a si mipaʼ khang a kizop theih nadingin a naupa in a uʼ zi luah tahen,’ ci hi." 
Matthew22:25 Tu-in kote lakah unau pasal sagih omngei hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta nei loin si ahih manin ama zi a naupa in a luah hi." 
Matthew22:26 Tua mah bangin a nihna, a thumna a kipan a sagihna dongin ta nei loin a si uh hi." 
Matthew22:27 Tua unau pasal sagihte a sih khit ciangin a numei zong a si hi. 
Matthew22:28 Tua ahih manin tua unau pasal sagihte in tua nu teenpih kim uh ahih manin, thawhkik hun ciangin a koi penʼ zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew22:29 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Note in Lai Siangtho thu ahi a, Pasianʼ vangliatna ahi zongin thei lo na hih manun na ngaihsun khial uh hi." 
Matthew22:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh misite a thawhkik uh ciangin vantungah a om vantung mite tawh kibang ding uh a, zi nei pasal nei cih om lo ding hi." 
Matthew22:31 Misite thawhkikna thu tawh kisai-in note tungah a gen thute sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Matthew22:32 Pasian in, ‘Kei pen Abrahamʼ Pasian, Isaacʼ Pasian, Jakobʼ Pasian ka hi hi,’ ci hi. Pasian pen a si miteʼ Pasian hi loin a nungta miteʼ Pasian ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew22:33 Mihonte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin ama thuhilhna hangin lamdang a sa uh hi. 
Matthew22:34 Ahi zongin Farisi mite in, Saddusi miteʼ thudotna Jesu in dongkhakin, Saddusi mite in a cih nading mel uh a theih nawn lohna thu a zak uh ciangin Jesu kiangah a hong pai uh hi." 
Matthew22:35 Amaute sung panin Thukham hilh siate khat in Jesu a thangsiahna-in thu hong dong a," 
Matthew22:36 “Sia aw, thukham khempeuh sung panin bang thukham lian pen ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Matthew22:37 Jesu in, “Na Topa Pasian na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh le na pilna khempeuh tawh na it ding hi, cihna ahi hi." 
Matthew22:38 Hih pen a masa pen, a lian pen thukham ahi hi." 
Matthew22:39 A nihna pen a masa mah tawh kibang a, nangma pumpi na it bangin na veengte na it in, cihna ahi hi." 
Matthew22:40 Hih thukham nihte tung panin thukham dang khempeuh le kamsangteʼ thuhilhna khempeuh a hong meeng khia ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew22:41 Tua bangin Farisi mite hong kikaihkhop laitakin Jesu in amaute kiangah," 
Matthew22:42 “Note in Khris kua hi ci a, kuaʼ suan hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Davidʼ suan hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew22:43 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Tua ahihleh bang hangin David mahmah in Pasianʼ Khaʼ sawlna tawh," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen a: Na galte, na khe nuai ah ka koih matengin ka tak lamah na tu in,’ ci hi, ci-in thu na gen a, Khris pen ka Topa ci ahi hiam?" 
Matthew22:45 David in Khris pen Topa ci ahihleh bang hangin Khris pen Davidʼ suan hi thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in thu a dong hi. 
Matthew22:46 Kuamah in ama thudotna kam khat beek dawng thei lo uh hi. Tua hun a kipanin kuamah in Jesu kiangah thu a dong ngam nawn kei uh hi. 
Matthew23:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in mihonte le a nungzuite kiangah thu gen a," 
Matthew23:2 “Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite, Mosesʼ aana a nei-in thugente ahih manun," 
Matthew23:3 amauteʼ gen khempeuh zui-in sem unla, ahi zongin amaute pen a gen bangun gamta lo uh ahih manin amauteʼ gamtat bangin gamta kei un." 
Matthew23:4 Amaute in midangte tungah van gik mahmah suanin khihcip uh a, ahi zongin tua van a puak pih dingin a khut meno khat nangawn uh a taangsak nuam kei uh hi." 
Matthew23:5 Amaute in a sepna khempeuh uh miteʼ muh theih dingin a hih se uh hi. Amaute in a talsuan le a banbulhte uh a gol pipi-in bawlin, a puan mongteep uh a sau theithei-in a bawl uh hi." 
Matthew23:6 Pawi sungah a om uh ciangin ulianteʼ tutna dinga a kibawl munah tu nuam se uh a, kikhopna inn sungah zong uliante tutna tutphah nuam pente tungah a tu nuam diak uh hi." 
Matthew23:7 Mihon lakah mite in hopihin, ‘Sia aw,’ a cih ding uh a ut uh hi." 
Matthew23:8 Ahi zongin note pen, ‘Sia,’ na kicih ding uh hi lo hi. Sia khat bek na nei uh a, no a dangte khempeuh unau khat na hi uh hi." 
Matthew23:9 Vantungah Pa khat bek nei na hih manun leitungah kuamah dang, ‘Paʼ na ci kei un." 
Matthew23:10 Topa dingin Khris bek nei na hih manun note khatlekhat, ‘Topa,’ na kici kei un." 
Matthew23:11 Note lakah a lian pen pa, na nasem uh hi ding hi." 
Matthew23:12 A kiliansakte khempeuh in niamkhiatna thuak ding uh a, a kiniamkhiatte khempeuh a lianin kibawl ding hi." 
Matthew23:13 “Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in vantung ki-ukna sungah mite a lut theih loh nadingin kong na khakcip uh hi. Note lah na lut nuam kei uh a, a lut nuamte lah na lutsak kei uh hi." 
Matthew23:14 “Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Meigong numeite tungah nuamtak sa-in a neihsa teng uh laksakin na zang mang uh a, mite in mihoih hong sak theih nading na deihna-un thu sau pipi na ngen uh hi. Hih bangin na gamtatna uh hangin na gim thuak ding uh nasia zaw kan lai ding hi." 
Matthew23:15 “Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in mi khat bek nangawn na ngah zawh nading uh na hanciamna un leitung tuitung lumletin khual na zin uh a, na ngahsunte uh zong note zah nihin a siahuai, hell khuk tung ding mi na suah uh hi." 
Matthew23:16 “Mittaw a bang lamhilhte aw, note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in, ‘Mi khat biakinn tawh a kiciam leh phamawh lo a, ahi zongin biakinn sunga a om kham tawh a kiciam leh a kiciamna in len hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Matthew23:17 Note pen mihai mittaw lamlak taktak na hi uh hi. Kham thupi zaw ahi hiam, ahih kei leh tua kham a siangtho a suaksak biakinn thupi zaw ahi hiam?" 
Matthew23:18 Note in, ‘Mi khat, biakna tau tawh kiciam leh phamawh lo a, ahi zongin biakna tau tungah a kipia letsongte tawh a kiciam leh a kiciamna in len hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Matthew23:19 Mittaw mite aw, a kipia nate thupi zaw ahi hiam, ahih kei leh tua nate a siangtho a suaksak biakna tau thupi zaw ahi hiam?" 
Matthew23:20 Tua ahih manin biakna tau tawh a kiciam mite pen a tunga a om nate khempeuh tawh zong a kiciam ahi hi. 
Matthew23:21 Biakinn tawh a kiciam mite pen a sungah a teeng pa tawh zong a kiciam ahi hi. 
Matthew23:22 Vantung tawh a kiciam mite zong Pasianʼ kumpi tokhom tawh a kiciam hi a, tua tokhom tungah a tupa tawh zong a kiciam ahi hi." 
Matthew23:23 “Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in Pasian tungah lengmasel, masala le kummin sing namtui a kipanin meh namtui nam khempeuh, sawm-ah-khat pia napi-in, thukham sungah a thupi zaw ahi thutang, hehpihna le thumante na don kei uh hi. A dangte nusia tuan loin hih thute na zuih ding uh ahi hi." 
Matthew23:24 A makai ding hi napi-in, mittaw bangin bangmah tum loteng thupi ngaihsutin, a thupi teng na nusia kha uh a, tui tawh na dawn khop khak loh nadingun thovai khaih napi-in kalaoh a nawmvalh kha tawh na kibang uh hi." 
Matthew23:25 “Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in hai le kuangte a pualam na siangsak uh a, ahi zongin tuate sungah, thatang hat thu le huaihamna tawh mi-aʼ na suh uh nate a om hi." 
Matthew23:26 A mittaw Farisi mite aw, a pualam zong a siangtho a suah theih nadingin hai le kuang sunga a om nate a siangtho hisak phot un." 
Matthew23:27 “Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note pen leikang tawh a kizut manin a pualam a hoih mahmah tawh kibang napi-in a sungah misi guh le a kihhuai nin nam khempeuh a omna hankhuk tawh na kibang uh hi." 
Matthew23:28 Tua mah bangin note zong miteʼ muhin mihoih mahmah bang napi-in na sung tawng taktak uh ah mawhna le kineihkhemna bek a om hi. 
Matthew23:29 “Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in a si sa kamsangteʼ han, a hoih mahmah in bawlin, a nuntakna uh a hoih, a si sateʼ mual suangte hoihtakin na zem uh a," 
Matthew23:30 ‘I pu i pateʼ khan lai-in eite a om hi lehang, kamsangte a thah bangun eite in i that kei ding hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Matthew23:31 Note pen kamsangte a that miteʼ suanlekhakte mah na hih manun na zuaupi uh a gen na hi uh hi. 
Matthew23:32 Tua ahih manin i pu i pateʼ maban zom to vet un. 
Matthew23:33 Gul a bang miteʼ suanlekhak mite aw, hell khuk tun nading thukhenna panin a suakta dingin bangci-in kilamen thei na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew23:34 Note kiangah kamsangte, mipilte le siate ka hong paisak ding hi. Note in pawl khatte thatin, pawl khatte singlamteh tungah khai-in, pawl khatte na kikhopna uh inn sungah na sat ding uh a, khua khat pan khua khat ah a banbanin na bawlsia ding uh hi." 
Matthew23:35 Tua thu hangin, mawhnei lo Abel a kithah hun a kipanin biakinn le biakna tau kikal a na thah uh, Barakhiahʼ tapa Zekhariah hun ciang dongin, mawhna nei lo a kithat mite khempeuh hangin gimna note in na thuak ding uh hi." 
Matthew23:36 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tu hun a mite tungah hih gimna hong tung takpi ding hi. 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusalem, Jerusalem aw, kamsangte na that a, Pasianʼ sawl kamtaite na deng lum hi. Akpi in a kha tawh a note a huai mah bangin na mite ka huai nuam tawntung a, ahi zongin na ut kei hi." 
Matthew23:38 Tu-in na innte kisusiacip ding hi. 
Matthew23:39 Nang kiangah kong genin ah: ‘Topaʼ min tawh a hong pai mipa in thupha ngah tahen,’ na cih hun hong tun matengin kei nong mu nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew24:1 Biakinn panin Jesu a paikhiat laitakin ama kiangah a nungzuite hong pai-in, tua biakinn a thupina zia a lak uh hi." 
Matthew24:2 Ahi zongin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Hihte khempeuh na mu khinta uh hi. Keʼn a mantak a kong genin ah: Hih inn lamna-a a kiciang suangte a kithuapin a om nangawn a om nawn lo zah dongin kilawn keek mang ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew24:3 Oliv Mual tungah Jesu tu-in a om laitakin a nungzuite guak a tuamin hong pai uh a, “Hih thute cik ciangin hong piang dinga, nang na hong pai ding hun le hun bei nading bang lim hong om ding ahi hiam, hong gen in,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew24:4 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Kidawm unla, miteʼ khem sa-in ta kei un." 
Matthew24:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah a kineih mi tampi hong pai dinga, ‘Kei, Khris ka hi hi,’ ci-in mi tampi tak um khialsak ding uh hi." 
Matthew24:6 A nai, a gamla ah gal kidona thu na za ding uh hi. Hihte a piang mah ding hi a, ahi zongin a bei nading hi nai lo ahih manin patau kei un." 
Matthew24:7 Gam khat le gam khat, kumpi khat le kumpi khat hong kido dinga, mun tuamtuam ah kialpi hong tungin, zin hong liing ding hi." 
Matthew24:8 Hihte khempeuh pen gimna kipat nading hi pan hi. 
Matthew24:9 “Tua ciangin note hong kibawlsia in hong kithat dinga, keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh hi." 
Matthew24:10 Tua hun ciangin mi tampi in a upna uh khahsuah dinga, khatlekhat kimudahin khatlekhat kilehhek ding uh hi." 
Matthew24:11 Kamsang kineihkhem mi tampi hong piang dinga, mi tampi tak um khialsak ding uh hi." 
Matthew24:12 Gitlohna khang mahmah ding ahih manin ki-itna hong kiam ding hi. 
Matthew24:13 Ahi zongin a bei dongin a thuak zote in hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi. 
Matthew24:14 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh tungah teci ahi dingin Pasianʼ hong ukna hangin a lungdamhuai thu, leitung khempeuh ah kihilh ding hi. Tua khit ciangin beina hong tung ding hi." 
Matthew24:15 “Tua ciangin kamsang Daniel in, ‘A lipkhaphuai zehphitna,’ ci-in a gen pen a siangtho munah hong om ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuʼ cihnopna thei ta un)," 
Matthew24:16 Judea gam a om mite, mual tungah tai henla," 
Matthew24:16 Judea gam a om mite, mual tungah tai henla," 
Matthew24:17 inn tungah a om mite zong, inn sungah van a la dingin lut nawn kei uh hen." 
Matthew24:18 Lo ah a omte zong puan la dingin inn ah ciah nawn kei hen. 
Matthew24:19 Tua hun laitakin naupaiite le naungek neite adingin haksa mahmah ding hi. 
Matthew24:20 Tua galtai hun pen phalbi laitak le Sabbath ni ahih khak loh nadingin thu na ngen un. 
Matthew24:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung piancil a kipan tu hun dong, cikmahin tua bang haksatna a omngei lo, nidang ciangin zong a omngei nawn lo ding, tua hun laitakin hong tung ding hi." 
Matthew24:22 Pasian in tua gimna hun a ni khiam lo hileh a suakta zo kuamah om lo ding hi. Ahi zongin ama teel mite a khualna-in a ni a khiam ding hi. 
Matthew24:23 “Tua laitakin mi khatpeuh in, ‘Hih lai ah Khris om hi, hua lai ah Khris om hi,’ ci-in hong gen leh, um kei un." 
Matthew24:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris a kineihkhemte le kamsang a kineihkhemte hong piang dinga, ahih zawh leh a teel sa mite nangawn a khem nadingun lim le nalamdang lian pipi hong bawl ding uh hi." 
Matthew24:25 A hun ma-in hong gen khol khin ka hih manin limtakin kidawm un. 
Matthew24:26 “Tua ahih kei leh zong mite in, ‘Gamlak ah Khris om hi,’ hong cih leh zong va pai kha kei un. ‘Inn sungah Khris bu hi,’ hong cih leh zong um kha kei un." 
Matthew24:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa hong pai ciangin khuaphialep in van mong khat panin mong khat dong a taanzaihsak mah bangin kithei kim ding hi. 
Matthew24:28 “Sapul omna peuh ah musane kikaikhawm ding hi.” 
Matthew24:29 “Tua gimna hun a tun khit phetin ni hong mialin kha hong taang nawn lo dinga, vantung panin aksite hong kia dinga, vantung a om nate a pai ngei-in pai thei loin lampial gawp ding hi." 
Matthew24:30 Tua ciangin Mihing Tapaʼ lim vantungah hong kilang ding hi. Tua ciangin leitung minam khempeuh dahin kap ding uh a, vangliatna le minthanna tawh meii lakah Mihing Tapa a hong pai a mu ding uh hi." 
Matthew24:31 Nakpi takin peengkul hong ging dinga, leitung mun khempeuh ah a vantung mite hong paisakin, leimong khat pan mong khat dongin, a teel sa mite a kaikhawmsak ding hi." 
Matthew24:32 Theikung tung panin thu phawk un. Thei a hiang hong meengin a teh hong no ciangin khuakhal hun hong nai ta hi, ci-in na thei uh hi." 
Matthew24:33 Tua mah bangin hih ka thugente khempeuh na muh uh ciangin Mihing Tapa hong tun ding hun hong nai mahmah ta hi, ci-in na thei un." 
Matthew24:34 A mantak a kong genin ah: Hih lai-a a om mite a sih khit ma-in hih ka thugen khempeuh hong tung ding hi. 
Matthew24:35 Vanlelei a maimang zongin ka thugente maimang ngei lo ding hi. 
Matthew24:36 Ahi zongin a ni le a nai hun ding pen kuamah in thei lo hi. Vantungah a om vantung mite ahi a, Tapa nangawn in ahi zongin thei lo a, Pa Pasian bek in thei hi." 
Matthew24:37 Noah hun lai-in up hun lohpi khatin tuiciin a tun bangin Mihing Tapa zong up hun lohpi khatin hong pai ding hi. 
Matthew24:38 Tuiciin a tun ma hunin, teembaw sungah Noah a tum ni hun ciang dong, mite in anne zune-in om uh a, mo kipi, mo kikha-in nuntak ngeina bangin om uh hi." 
Matthew24:39 Tuiciin hong tungin tui in mi khempeuh a tupcip hun ciang dong, kuamah in bangmah a theih loh mah bangin Mihing Tapa hong pai ciangin zong kuamah in thei khol lo ding uh hi." 
Matthew24:40 Tua hun laitakin lo a kuan khawm mi nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi." 
Matthew24:41 An a sukhawm numei nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi." 
Matthew24:42 Tua ahih ciangin bang hunin na Topa uh hong pai ding cih thei lo na hih manun na pilvang un. 
Matthew24:43 Ahi zongin na phawk ding uh thu in: Inn nei pa in zan laitakin guta pa a pai ding hun thei khol leh amah in na pangin a inn luhsak lo ding hi. 
Matthew24:44 Tua ahih manin Mihing Tapa zong, noteʼ upmawh loh hun laitakin hong pai ding ahih manin note zong na kiging tawntung ta un." 
Matthew24:45 “A pil a citak nasem i cih a bangcite ahi hiam? A nasep pih dangte ukin a hun manmanin amauteʼ nekzah ding ciat an a pia dingin a topa in a seh a nasem pa ahi hi. 
Matthew24:46 A topa hong ciah ciangin ama sawl bangin na semin a om a muhpa pen mi hampha mahmah khat ahi hi. 
Matthew24:47 Keʼn kong genin ah, ama neihsa khempeuh a uk dingin a topa in tua nasem pa a koih ding hi." 
Matthew24:48 Ahi zongin tua nasem pa nasem hoih lo hi henla, a lungsim sungah, ‘Ka topa hong ciah hak ding hi,’ ci-in," 
Matthew24:49 a nasep pih a lawmte sat gawp henla, zukham thei mite tawh anne zune-in na om leh," 
Matthew24:50 a topa tung dingin a up loh ni hun khatpeuhin a topa hong tung dinga," 
Matthew24:51 a topa in nakpi takin gim pia-in, mihoih a kineihkhemteʼ gimthuak ding teng thuaksak dinga, amah kapin a hagawi ding hi." 
Matthew25:1 “Tua hun ciangin vantung ki-ukna zia pen zi nei thak pa a uap dingin a meivak uh tawh a pai nungak sawmte tawh kibang ding hi. 
Matthew25:2 Nungak sawmte sung panin nga pil uh a, nga hai uh hi." 
Matthew25:3 Tua a haite in a meivak sung uh ah a tui thun thuah lopi-in pai uh a," 
Matthew25:4 ahi zongin a pil nungak ngate in a dimtakin thunin a pai uh hi. 
Matthew25:5 Zineipa hong tung hak ahih manin a vekpi-un lusu-in a ihmu uh hi. 
Matthew25:6 Ahi zongin zankim tak ciangin, ‘Zineipa hong tung ta ding hi. Va dawn un,’ ci-in hong kiko hi." 
Matthew25:7 Tua nungakte zong tho-in a meivak uh hong puah ciat uh hi. 
Matthew25:8 Tua ciangin a haite in a pilte kiangah, ‘Ka mei uh mit ta ahih manin na meitui uh hong hawm un,’ a cih ciangin" 
Matthew25:9 a pilte in, ‘Hong hawm le ung ko ading tawh kicing nawn lo ding ahih manin no ading va lei tawm zaw un,’ ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew25:10 Meitui lei dingin amaute a paikhiat kal sungin zineipa hong tung hi. A kiging sa-in a om nungakte in zineipa dawnin mopawi bawlna sungah a lut khawm pah uh hi. Tua khit ciangin kong kikhak hi. 
Matthew25:11 Tua khit ciangin nungak haite zong hong tung uh a, ‘Topa, Topa aw, kong hong hon in,’ a cih uh ciangin" 
Matthew25:12 amah in, ‘Note ka hong thei het kei hi,’ na cih san hi.”" 
Matthew25:13 “Tua ahih manin a ni le a hun thei lo na hih manun na pilvang un.” 
Matthew25:14 “Inn panin khualzin dingin a paikhia mipa tawh zong kibang hi. Amah in a nasemte samin, a neihsa teng a nasemteʼ kep dingin a ap hi." 
Matthew25:15 Amauʼ siamna tawh kizui-in khat tungah tul nga, khat tungah tul nih, khat tungah tul khat a ap khit ciangin a zin khia hi." 
Matthew25:16 Tul nga a ngah pa in sum bawlna-in zang pah a, a meet tul nga mah a ngah thuah hi." 
Matthew25:17 Tul nih a ngah pa in zong a meet tul nih mah a ngah thuah hi. 
Matthew25:18 Ahi zongin tul khat a ngah pa in lei sung to-in a topaʼ sum a seelcip hi. 
Matthew25:19 “Hun sawtpi khit ciangin tua nasemteʼ topa hong ciahkik a, a nasemte tawh a sum thu a siangsak uh hi." 
Matthew25:20 Tul nga a ngah pa in a dang tul nga mah hong tawithuah in, ‘Topa aw, kei tungah tul nga nong ap hi. Hih lai ah tul nga mah ka meetsak hi,’ hong cih ciangin" 
Matthew25:21 a topa in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi; a hoih a citak nasem pa aw, a tawmno na zekna ah siam na hih manin a tampi tak ka hong zeksak ding hi. Hong pai in; kei tawh nuamsa khawm ni,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew25:22 Tua ciangin tul nih a ngah pa zong hong pai-in, ‘Topa aw, kei tungah tul nih nong ap hi. Hih lai ah tul nih mah ka na meetsak hi,’ hong cih ciangin" 
Matthew25:23 a topa in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi; a hoih a citak nasem pa aw, a tawmno na zekna ah siam na hih manin a tampi tak ka hong zeksak ding hi. Hong pai in; kei tawh nuamsa khawm ni,’ a ci hi." 
Matthew25:24 Tul khat a ngah pa zong hong pai-in, ‘Topa aw, nang pen na sep loh na bawl lohnapi ah na a deih, mi genhak mahmah na hihna ka hong thei hi." 
Matthew25:25 Tua ahih manin ka hong kihta a, lei sungah na sum tul khat ka seel hi. Tu-in hih lai ah na sumzah mah om hi,’ a hong cih ciangin" 
Matthew25:26 a topa in, ‘A hoih lo, a thadah nasem pa aw, ka sep loh ka bawl lohnapi ah ka deihlam hong thei na hih leh," 
Matthew25:27 sumkholna ah ka sum na koihsak lecin hoih ding hi. Tua hileh tu-a ka hong tunkik ciangin a bulpi le a meet ka ngahkhawm ding hi. 
Matthew25:28 Tua ahih manin ama tung panin a tul khat laksak unla, tul sawm a nei pa tungah pia thuah un." 
Matthew25:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nei sate kipia thuah dinga, hau semsem ding hi. Ahi zongin a nei lote tung panin a neihsa sunsun nangawn kilaksak ding hi." 
Matthew25:30 Bangmahin a kimang lo hih nasem pa ahihleh pualam khua mialna lakah lawn khia un. Tua lai ah kapin a hagawi ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:31 “Mihing Tapa a vantung mite tawh Kumpi-in hong pai khawm uh ciangin a kumpi tokhom tungah hong tu ding hi. 
Matthew25:32 Ama mai ah leitung minam khempeuh hong kikhawm ding hi. Gancing pa in tuu le keelte a khen mah bangin mi khempeuh khen nihin hong koih ding hi. 
Matthew25:33 Tuu a bang mite a tak lamah koihin, keel a bang mite a veilamah koih ding hi." 
Matthew25:34 Tua ciangin Kumpipa in a tak lamah a om mite kiangah, ‘Ka Pa in thupha a piak mite aw, hong pai ta un. Leitung piancil a kipanin note adingin a kibawl khol sa gam nuam hong luah un." 
Matthew25:35 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka gilkial laitakin an nong pia uh a, ka dangtak laitakin tui nong pia uh a, khualmi ka hih laitakin zin nong do uh a," 
Matthew25:36 puan nei loin ka om laitakin puan nong guan uh a, ka cinat laitakin nong veh uh a, ka thongkiat laitakin nong hawh uh hi,’ a ci ding hi." 
Matthew25:37 Tua ciangin mihoihte in, ‘Topa aw, cikin na gilkial hong mu-in an hong pia a, cikin na dangtak hong mu-in tui hong pia ka hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew25:38 Cikin khualmi na hih laitakin hong mu-in zin hong do a, cikin puan nei lo na hih laitakin hong mu-in puan hong guan ka hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew25:39 Cikin cina na hih laitakin hong mu-in hong veh a, cikin thong kia na hih laitakin hong mu-in hong hawh ka hi uh hiam?’ a ci ding uh hi." 
Matthew25:40 Tua ciangin Kumpipa in amaute kiangah, ‘Note kiangah kong genin ah: Hih ka sanggamte a neu pen khat nangawn na limbawl uh ciangin kei tungah a hong bawl na hi uh hi,’ ci-in a dawng ding hi." 
Matthew25:41 “Tua ciangin a veilamah a om mite kiangah, ‘Pasian in a samsiat mite aw, keima kiang panin paikhia unla, Dawimangpa le a nungzuite adingin a kibawl meikuang tawntung sungah pai un." 
Matthew25:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka gilkial laitakin an nong pia kei uh a, ka dangtak laitakin tui nong pia kei uh a," 
Matthew25:43 khualmi ka hih laitakin zin nong do kei uh a, puan ka neih loh laitakin puan nong guan kei uh a, ka cinat laitakin nong veh kei uh a, ka thongkiat laitakin nong hawh kei uh hi,’ a ci ding hi." 
Matthew25:44 Tua ciangin amaute in zong, ‘Topa aw, cikin na gilkial hong mu a, cikin na dangtak hong mu a, cikin khualmi na hih hong mu a, cikin na puan neih loh hong mu a, cikin na cinat hong mu a, cikin na thongkiat hong mu a, cikin kote in nang hong huh nuam lo ka hi uh hiam?’ a ci ding uh hi." 
Matthew25:45 Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Note kiangah kong genin ah: Hih mite a neu pen khat nangawn na huh loh uh ciangin kei a hong huh lo na hi uh hi,’ ci-in a dawng ding hi." 
Matthew25:46 Tua ahih ciangin tawntung gim thuakna sungah amaute pai ding uh a, mihoihte ahihleh nuntak tawntungna sungah lut ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:1 Jesu in hih thute a hilh khit ciangin a nungzuite kiangah," 
Matthew26:2 “Na theih sa uh mah bangin tu zawh ni nih khit ciangin Paisan Pawi hun hong tung ta ding hi. Tua ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin Mihing Tapa kipia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:3 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen Kaiafas inn ah siampi liante le upate kikhawm uh a," 
Matthew26:4 kuama theih lohin Jesu simmatin a thah theih nading uh a vaihawm uh hi. 
Matthew26:5 Amaute in, “Buaina lianpi hong om kha thei ding ahih manin hih pawi hun sungin hih kei ni,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:6 Bethany khua-a miphak ahi ngei Simon inn ah Jesu a om laitakin," 
Matthew26:7 numei khat in a manpha mahmah sathau namtui suangngo thawl a dim khat hong tawi-in Jesu kiangah hong pai a, Jesu an ne-in a tut laitakin a lu tungah a buak suk hi." 
Matthew26:8 Ahi zongin nungzuite in a muh uh ciangin heh uh a, “Bang hangin hih sathau namtui mawk beisak ahi hiam?" 
Matthew26:9 Hih sathau kizuak leh sum tampi tak kikhawng dinga, mizawngte huhna-in kipia thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:10 Ahi zongin Jesu in hih thu phawk ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Hih numei bang nuammawh na hi uh hiam? Kei tungah a kilawm mahmah in amah hong gamta hi." 
Matthew26:11 Mizawngte pen note tawh hong om khawm tawntung dinga, ahi zongin note tawh kei ka hong om khawm tawntung kei ding hi." 
Matthew26:12 Keima tungah hih bangin sathau hong buak ciangin ka luanghawm kivui nadingin a hong bawlbawl ahi hi. 
Matthew26:13 Note kiangah a mantak a kong genin ah: Keima hangin a piang ding lungdamna thu a kigenna leitung khempeuh ah hih numei kiphawkin a gamtatnate kigengen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:14 Tua ciangin sawm le nihte sung panin Iskariotʼ tapa Judas a kici mipa siampi liante kiangah va pai a," 
Matthew26:15 “Noteʼ khut sungah amah hong pia leng, note in kei bang tawh hong guai ding na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin ngun peek sawm thum a pia uh hi." 
Matthew26:16 Tua hun a kipanin amah a lehhek theih nading hunhoih a zong pah hi. 
Matthew26:17 Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi a kipat ni-in nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Paisan Pawi annek ding koi laitak ah hong bawlsak le ung deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew26:18 Jesu in, “Jerusalem khua sungah va pai unla, tua mipa kiangah, ‘Siapa in, “Ka hun hong nai ta hi. Na inn ah ka nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi an ka hong ne ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ va ci un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:19 Nungzuite zong Jesu gen bangin gamta uh a, Paisan Pawi an ding a bawl uh hi." 
Matthew26:20 A nitak ciangin Jesu le sawm le nihte an ne dingin a tukhawm uh hi. 
Matthew26:21 Amaute an ne-in a om laitakun Jesu in, “Note khat in kei na hong lehhek ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Matthew26:22 amaute dah mahmah uh a, amaute in a banbanin, “Topa aw, kei ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Matthew26:23 Jesu in, “Ankuang ka sawk khawm pih pa in kei hong lehhek ding hi." 
Matthew26:24 Mihing Tapa ahihleh Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh sa mah bangin a si ding ahi hi; ahi zongin Mihing Tapa a lehhek pa in gimna thuak ding hi. Tua mipa pen a piang vet lo hileh ama adingin hoih zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:25 Jesu a lehhek pa Judas in, “Topa aw, kei ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Na ci khin hi,” ci-in Jesu in a dawng hi." 
Matthew26:26 Tua bangin an a nek laitakun, Jesu in anlum la-in lungdamna a koh khit ciangin balnen a, a nungzuite kiangah pia-in, “La unla ne un; hih pen ka pumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:27 Tua ciangin hai la a, lungdamna a koh khit ciangin amaute tungah pia-in, “Na vekpi-un dawn un." 
Matthew26:28 Mi tampiteʼ mawhna a mai nadingin a luang khia, Pasianʼ thuciamna a kipsak, ka sisan ahi hi." 
Matthew26:29 Note kiangah kong genin ah: Ka Paʼ Ukna sungah note tawh leenggahzu thak ka dawnkik ni matengin leenggahzu ka dawnkik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:30 Tua ciangin la khat sa uh a, Oliv Mual tungah a pai uh hi." 
Matthew26:31 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Tuucingpa ka sat lum dinga, a tuute kithehthang ding hi,’ ci-in a kigelh mah bangin note khempeuh in tu nitakin kei na hong taisan mang khin ding uh hi." 
Matthew26:32 Ahi zongin hong kithawhkiksak khit ciangin Galilee gam sung note mai ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:33 Peter in, “A dang khempeuh in hong taisan zongin keʼn kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:34 Jesu in, “Tu zan mahmah in ak a khuan ma-in kei, thum vei tak na hong nial ding lamtak phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:35 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Nang tawh sih khawm nading ciang dong ahi zongin kong nial ngei het kei ding hi,” a ci veve hi. Tua mah bangin nungzui dang khempeuh in zong a ci ciat uh hi." 
Matthew26:36 Tua ciangin Jesu a nungzuite tawh Gethsemane a kici munah pai-in amaute kiangah, “Hua lamah pai-in thu ka va nget kal sungteng hih lai ah na om un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:37 Tua ciangin Peter le Zebedi tapa tegel tonpih a, dahin a lunggim hun ding a kipan hi." 
Matthew26:38 Amaute kiangah, “Ka lungsim dahna hangin ka si dektak hi. Hih lai ah na om unla hong ngak un,” a cih khit ciangin" 
Matthew26:39 tawm khat pai lai-in leilak ah bokin thu ngen a, “Pa aw, ahi thei ding ahihleh hih thuak nading tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahi zongin keiʼ deihna bang hi loin nangma deihna bang hizaw tahen,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:40 A nungzui thumte kiangah hong paikik ciangin amaute na ihmu uh hi. Amah in Peter kiangah, “Nai khat sung nangawn hong ngak zo lo liang na hi uh hiam?" 
Matthew26:41 Ze-etna ah na puk khak loh nadingun thu ngen un. Lungsim in ze-etna nang nuam napi-in pumpi in nang zo lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:42 Tua ciangin a nih veina va paikikin thu ngen a, “Pa aw, keima thuak lohin ahi thei lo ding ahihleh nangma deihna bang hi tahen,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:43 A nungzuite kiangah hong paikik ciangin, a ihmut uh suak lua mahmah ahih manin na ihmu leuleu uh hi." 
Matthew26:44 Tua ahih manin amaute kiang panin pai khiakikin, a kibang mahin a thum veina thu a ngen hi." 
Matthew26:45 Tua ciangin a nungzuite kiangah hong paikik a, “Ihmu-in tawlnga hithiat lailai na hi uh hiam? Mawhnei miteʼ khut sungah Mihing Tapa a kipiak ding hun hong tung ta hi." 
Matthew26:46 Tho un, pai ta ni. Kei hong lehhek ding pa hong nai ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:47 Tua bangin Jesu in thu a gen laitakin sawm le nihte sung panin Judas hong tung a, siampi liante le upate in a hong sawl, namsau le molhtum a tawi mihonpi tawh hong tonkhawm hi." 
Matthew26:48 A lehhek pa in mihonte kiangah thu na ma gen a, “Ka nap pen pa amah hi ding hi; man un,” ci-in a lim ding a hilh khol hi." 
Matthew26:49 Judas zong Jesu kiangah hong pai pahin, “Topa aw, thupha ngah ta in,” ci-in hopihin limnap mahmah hi." 
Matthew26:50 Jesu in, “Lawm aw, hih dingin na ngim pen hih pak in,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ciangin mihonte in Jesu manin a lencip uh hi." 
Matthew26:51 Jesu tawh a om khawm mite khat in a namsau dokin siampi lianpen paʼ nasem pa a sat leh, a bil a sat khia hi." 
Matthew26:52 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Na namsau a paai ah siatkik in. Namsau a zangte namsau mah tawh si ding hi." 
Matthew26:53 Ka Pa kiangah ngen hi leng, vantung galkapte hon sawm le hon nih val, thakhat thu-in hong puak pah theih ding lamtak thei lo na hi hiam?" 
Matthew26:54 Tua bangin kivaikhak hi zenzen leh Lai Siangtho in tu-a bangin a pian nading a gen pen bangci tun theih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Matthew26:55 Tua ciangin Jesu in mihonte kiangah, “Gal le sa bangin hong ngaihsun a, keimah a man dingin namsau le molhtum tawh hong kuan na hi uh hiam? Nisimin biakinn sungah thu ka hilh niloh a, ahi zongin kei nong man kei uh hi." 
Matthew26:56 Ahi zongin Lai Siangtho sungah kamsangteʼ thugente a tun theih nadingin hih bangin a hong gamta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nungzuite khempeuh in Jesu nusia-in a taisan uh hi." 
Matthew26:57 Tua ciangin Jesu a man mite in siampi lianpen pa Kaiafas kiangah hong paipih uh a, tua lai ah Thukham hilh siate le upate a kikhawm uh hi." 
Matthew26:58 Peter in siampi lianpen paʼ inntual ciang dong Jesuʼ nung gal zuih a, bang thu a piang hiam cih a theih nadingin inntual ah palikte kiangah a om hi." 
Matthew26:59 Siampi liante le uliante in Jesu a thah theih nadingun zuau teci a pang ding mi a zong uh hi. 
Matthew26:60 Teci tampi in hong gen hangin thah theih nading zuau teci pang ding kimu lo hi. A tawpna ciangin mi nih in thu hong gen a," 
Matthew26:61 “Hih mipa in, ‘Pasianʼ Biakinn susia-in ni thum sungin ka lamkik thei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:62 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa hong dingin, “Hih hong mawhsakna thu tawh kisai-in na gen ding om lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot hangin" 
Matthew26:63 Jesu pau loin a om hi. Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in, “Pasianʼ Tapa, Khris na hih leh na hih loh nong gen nadingin a nungta Pasianʼ min tawh khauh takin ka hong sawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:64 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Nangmah in tua mah na ci khin hi. Ahi zongin note khempeuh kiangah ka hong genin ah: Vanglian paʼ tak lamah Mihing Tapa omin meii tungah a hong pai na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:65 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in a puan bal kek a, “Pasianʼ tungah a pau khial zo hi. Bang thudang kisam nawn ahi hiam? A paukhialhna na za uh hi." 
Matthew26:66 Note in tu-in bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Thah dingin a kilawm hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew26:67 Tua ciangin amaute in a maitang cilphih uh a," 
Matthew26:68 “Nang Khris aw, kua in hong beeng ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:69 Tua bangin inntual ah Peter a tut laitakin siampi lianpen paʼ nasem numei khat in ama kiangah, “Nang zong Galilee mi Jesu tawh a kikhawl na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:70 Ahi zongin Peter in nial a, “Na thugen ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew26:71 Tua ciangin Peter zong inntual pua lamah a paikhiat leh numei dang khat mah in mu ahih manin a gei-a omte kiangah, “Nazareth khuami Jesu tawh hih mipa kikhawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew26:72 Peter in zong nialkik a, “Hua mipa ka theih taak leh,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
Matthew26:73 Tua zawh a sawt loin a gei-a omte khat in Peter kiangah, “Na kampau zia uh kibang ahih manin nang zong hua mite tawh a kipawl mah na hi takpi hi,” a ci leuleu hi." 
Matthew26:74 Tua ciangin Peter kiciam a, “Hua mipa ka thei kei hi. Zuau thu ka gen taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei tahen!” a ci hi. Tua khit phetin ak hong khuang ta hi." 
Matthew26:75 Tua ciangin, “Ak a khuan ma-in kei thum vei na hong nial ding hi,” ci-in Jesu in a gen thu, Peter in phawkkik ahih manin pai khia-in nakpi takin a kap hi." 
Matthew27:1 A zingsang ciangin siampi liante le upate in Jesu a thah nading uh a vaihawm uh hi. 
Matthew27:2 Sikkhau tawh khihin paipih uh a, tua gam sungteng a uk Pilat mangpa khut sungah a ap uh hi." 
Matthew27:3 A lehhek pa Judas in Jesu a si dingin thu a kikhenna a muh ciangin kisikkik ahih manin siampi liante le upate kiangah a ngun peek sawm thumte va paipihkik a," 
Matthew27:4 “Mawhna a nei lo mipa a si dingin lehhek kha ka hih manin ka mawh hi,” a va ci hi. Ahi zongin amaute in, “Kote tawh bang kisai nawn ding ahi hiam? Nangma tavuan ahi hi,” a na cih san uh hi." 
Matthew27:5 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn sungah a ngun peekte lawnin paikhia a, a mahmah a gui-awk hi." 
Matthew27:6 Ahi zongin siampite in tua ngun peekte tawm uh a, “Hih sumte pen mi thah nadingin a kipia sum ahih manin biakinn sumkholna ah koih dingin kilawm lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:7 Tua ahih manin amaute a kikup khit uh ciangin khualmi a site a kivui nadingin beelseek paʼ lo a lei uh hi. 
Matthew27:8 Tua ahih manin tu dongin tua lo pen, “Mi Thahna Lo,” a kici hi." 
Matthew27:9 Tua ahih manin kamsang Jeremiah in, “Israel mite pawl khat in ama man dingin a seh tua ngun peek sawm thum la uh a," 
Matthew27:10 Topa in kei tungah a hong gen mah bangin, beelseek paʼ lo lei nadingin a pia uh hi,” ci-in a gen kholhna a tung ahi hi." 
Matthew27:11 Tu-in gam ukpa Pilat mai ah Jesu kidingsak ahih manin amah in, “Nang, Jew miteʼ Kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesu in, “Nang zong tua mah nong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Matthew27:12 Ahi zongin siampi liante le upate in mawhsakna thu a gen hangun Jesu in a dawng kei hi. 
Matthew27:13 Tua ciangin Pilat in Jesu kiangah, “Amaute in nang a hong mawhsaknate za lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Matthew27:14 Ahi zongin Jesu in amah a kimawhsaknate kam khat beek dawng het lo ahih manin Pilat in lamdang a sa mahmah hi. 
Matthew27:15 Paisan Pawi hun simin Rom gam ukpa in mihonteʼ deih thong kia mi khat a khah a ngeina ahi hi. 
Matthew27:16 Tua hun laitakin a gilo mahmah Barabbas a kici mi khat thongkia-in a om hi. 
Matthew27:17 Tua ahih manin mihonte hong kikhop ciangin Pilat in amaute kiangah, “Barabbas le Khris a kici Jesu, koi zaw ka khah ding deih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Matthew27:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jesu a hazat man bekun ama kiangah a paipih ahihna thu teltakin a thei hi. 
Matthew27:19 Tua banah, thukhen zumah thusitin a om hunsung mahun, a zi in thu zasak a, “Tu zan ka mang sungin ama hangin nakpi takin gimna thuak ka hih manin, mawhna nei lo tua mipa bangmah cih kha kei in,” a ci hi." 
Matthew27:20 Barabbas khahin Jesu a thah nadingin Pilat kiangah a nget nadingun siampi liante le upate in mihonte a hanthawn uh hi. 
Matthew27:21 Tua ciangin Rom gam ukpa in mihonte kiangah, “Hih mi nihte, koi pen ka khah ding deih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leuleu ciangin amaute in, “Barabbas,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:22 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Tua ahihleh Khris a kici Jesu pen bang cih ding ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin amaute khempeuh in, “Singlamteh tungah thatsak in,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:23 Tua ciangin amah in, “Amah in bang gamtat khialhna nei ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Singlamteh tungah thatsak in,” ci-in a awng ngeingai uh hi." 
Matthew27:24 A gengen hangin bangmah phattuamna om loin buaina piang zaw kha ding, ci-in Pilat in a theih ciangin, tui la-in mihonpiʼ muhin a khut sil a, “Hih mipa a sihna thu ah kei ka kihel kei hi. Note in thei ta un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew27:25 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, “Hih mipaʼ sihna hangin gim thuakna, kote a kipanin ka suan ka khakte dongun ka thuak ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew27:26 Tua ciangin amauteʼ deihna bangin Barabbas khah a, Jesu ahihleh a sat khit ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin a pia khia hi." 
Matthew27:27 Tua ciangin Pilatʼ galkapte in ama omna kumpi inn ah Jesu paipih uh a, tua lai ah galkap khempeuh a hong kikaikhawm uh hi." 
Matthew27:28 Tua lai panin Jesuʼ puan suahkhiatsak uh a, puansan khat a silhsak uh hi." 
Matthew27:29 Kumpi lukhu lim dingin ling vialin a lu ah khusak uh a, a khut tak lamah pumpeeng khat a tawisak uh hi. Tua ciangin ama mai ah khukdin uh a, “Jew miteʼ Kumpipa aw,” ci-in zahpihna tawh a hopih uh hi." 
Matthew27:30 Tua ciangin cilphih uh a, a pumpeeng tawisak uh la-in a lutang a sat uh hi." 
Matthew27:31 Tua bangin a simmawh bawl khit uh ciangin a puansan silhsak uh suah khia leuleu-in ama puan mah silhsakkik uh a, singlamteh tungah thah dingin a paikhiatpih uh hi." 
Matthew27:32 Tua bangin a pai laitakun Sairin khuami Simon kici mi khat tawh kituak uh a, amah lammatin Jesuʼ singlamteh a puasak uh hi." 
Matthew27:33 Lutang guh a cihnopna Golgotha a kici mun a tun uh ciangin," 
Matthew27:34 zatui kha tawh a kihel leenggahzu a dawn dingin a pia uh hi. Ahi zongin Jesu in a ciap khit ciangin a dawn nuam kei hi. 
Matthew27:35 Singlamteh tungah Jesu a khai khit uh ciangin a puante kua in a koi ngah ding cih a theih nadingun suang lawnin ai san uh a, a puan teng a hawm uh hi." 
Matthew27:36 Tua ciangin amaute tu-in Jesu a en uh hi. 
Matthew27:37 Tua ciangin amah a mawhsakna uh, “Hih pa, Jew miteʼ Kumpi Jesu ahi hi,” cihna lai gelhin ama lutang sanah a suang uh hi." 
Matthew27:38 Tua ciangin mi that nih, Jesuʼ tak lamah khat, a veilamah khat tawh zong a khai khawm uh hi." 
Matthew27:39 Tua ciangin amah a va mu kha mi peuhmah in a lu uh peisanin," 
Matthew27:40 “Biakinn susia-in ni thum sungin a lamkik ding pa aw, nang le nang kihon khia in. Pasianʼ Tapa na hih takpi leh singlamteh tung panin hong kum suk in,” ci-in a zahko uh hi." 
Matthew27:41 Tua bangmahin siampi liante in Thukham hilh siate le upate tawh zahko-in," 
Matthew27:42 “Amah in midangte hon khia thei napi-in a mahmah kihon khia thei lo hi. Amah, Israel miteʼ Kumpi ahi hi. Tu-in singlamteh tung panin hong kum suk leh i um ding hi." 
Matthew27:43 Amah in, ‘Kei, Pasianʼ Tapa ka hi hi,’ ci ahih manin, amah in Pasian muanin a nei hi. Pasian in a hot nop leh tu-in hon khia tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:44 Tua mah bangin amah tawh a kikhai khawm mi thatte in zong a zahko uh hi. 
Matthew27:45 Sun nai sawm le nih hun a kipanin nitak nai thum dong, nai thum sung, tua gam sung khempeuh ah khim a zing hi." 
Matthew27:46 Nitak nai thum hun pawl laitakin Jesu nakpi takin kiko a, “Ka Pasian, ka Pasian, bang hangin kei hong nusia na hi hiam?” a cihna ahi, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakthani,” a ci hi." 
Matthew27:47 A gei ah a om a pauna a za mite pawl khat in, “Hih mipa in Elijah a sam ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:48 Tua ciangin amaute khat va tai-in tuihupna la-in leenggah-zuhau sungah a diah khit ciangin pumpeeng dawnah henin Jesuʼ hup dingin a tah to hi. 
Matthew27:49 Ahi zongin a dangte in, “Khawl dih un; amah a hon khia dingin Elijah hong pai hiam ngak dih ni,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:50 Tua ciangin Jesu nakpi takin kiko kikin a si ta hi. 
Matthew27:51 Tua laitakin biakinn sung deina puan, a lu panin a taw dongin kikekin phel nih a suak hi. Zin zong liingin suangtumpite kitam hi." 
Matthew27:52 Hankhukte zong kihong a, Pasianʼ mi a si sa tampite zong kithokiksak hi." 
Matthew27:53 Han khuk panin amaute paikhia uh a, sihna panin Jesu a thawhkik khit ciangin, amaute zong khuapi siangtho sungah hong lut uh a, mi tampi in a mu uh hi." 
Matthew27:54 Jesu enin a om galkap bupa le galkapte in zinlinna le a thupiangte a muh uh ciangin lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Hih pa, Pasianʼ Tapa taktak mah ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:55 Galilee gam panin Jesu hong zui-in amah a huh, a gal et numei tampi zong a om hi." 
Matthew27:56 Tua numeite lakah Magdala khuami Mary, James le Josefʼ nu Mary le James le Johanʼ nu ahi, Zebediʼ zi, a kihel uh ahi hi." 
Matthew27:56 Tua numeite lakah Magdala khuami Mary, James le Josefʼ nu Mary le James le Johanʼ nu ahi, Zebediʼ zi, a kihel uh ahi hi." 
Matthew27:57 A nitak ciangin Arimathea khuami, Jesu thu a um, mihau ahi Josef a kici mi khat," 
Matthew27:58 Pilat kiangah va pai-in Jesuʼ luang a va ngen hi. Pilat in Josefʼ ngetna bangin Jesuʼ luang a kipiak nadingin thu a pia hi. 
Matthew27:59 Josef in zong Jesuʼ luang la-in, dial puan thak tawh a tun khit ciangin," 
Matthew27:60 suang a kikhuak thak ahi ama hankhuk sungah a vui hi. Tua ciangin suangtum lianpi khat hualin a han kongvang hucipin a ciah hi. 
Matthew27:61 Magdala khuami Mary le a dang Mary zong a hankhuk mai ngatin a tu uh hi. 
Matthew27:62 A zing ciang, Sabbath ni-in Pilat kiangah siampi liante le Farisi mite hong pai uh a," 
Matthew27:63 “Topa aw, hih mi khem pa in a nuntak lai-in, ‘Ni thum khit ciangin ka hingkik ding hi,’ ci-in a thugenna ka thei uh hi." 
Matthew27:64 Tua ahih ciangin ni thum sung a han hoihtakin a kicin nadingin thu pia in. Tua hikeileh a nungzuite in a luanghawm gu khia-in mite kiangah, ‘Sihna panin hingkik khin hi,’ ci kha ding uh ahih manin a mi khem masakna uh sangin a khem nunungna uh hong husia zaw lai kha ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:65 Pilat in amaute kiangah, “Galkapte cingsak unla, a muanhuai theithei dingin na siam bangun hih un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew27:66 Tua ahih ciangin amaute pai uh a, a han hukna suang limtakin a ciamteh khit uh ciangin galkapte a cingsak uh hi." 
Matthew28:1 Sabbath ni khit, Nipi ni zingsang khua hong vak kuan ciangin Magdala khuami Mary le a dang Mary, daihawh dingin a va pai uh hi." 
Matthew28:2 Thakhatin zin nakpi takin hong liing hi. Topaʼ vantungmi khat, vantung panin hong pai suk a, han hukna suang a likkhiat khit ciangin a tungah a tu hi." 
Matthew28:3 Ama mel, khuaphialep tawh kibang a, a puan zong vuk bangin a pak hi." 
Matthew28:4 Han cingte in kihta lua uh ahih manin liingin a sibup uh hi. 
Matthew28:5 Ahi zongin tua vantungmi in numeite kiangah, “Lau kei un. Singlamteh tungah a kithat Jesu a zong na hih lam uh ka thei hi."
