Matthew28:6 Hih lai ah amah om nawn lo hi. A gen sa bangin thokik khinta hi. Hong pai unla, amah a kisialna mun hong en un." 
Matthew28:7 Tu-in manlang takin va ciah unla, a nungzuite kiangah, ‘Sihna panin Jesu kithosak khin a, Galilee gam note mai ah a pai ding hi. Tua lai ah amah na mu ding uh hi,’ ci-in va gen un. Hih kong gen thute hoihtakin ciamteh un,” a ci hi." 
Matthew28:8 Tua ahih manin numeite zong laukawm, nuamkawmin nungzuite kiangah hih thu a ko dingin a tai pah uh hi." 
Matthew28:9 Jesu in lampi ah tua numeite na dawntuahin, “Lungnuam un!” ci-in a na hopih hi. Numeite in zong Jesu a khe ah lenin a bia uh hi." 
Matthew28:10 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei un. Pai unla, Galilee gamah ka sanggamte a pai nadingin va gen un. Tua lai ah kei hong mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Matthew28:11 Tua bangin numeite a pai laitakin han a cing galkapte pawl khat khua sungah hong ciah uh a, siampi liante kiangah a thupiang khempeuh a ko uh hi." 
Matthew28:12 Siampi liante in upate tawh thu kikupna khat nei-in vai a hawm khit uh ciangin sum tampi tawh galkapte golhguk uh a," 
Matthew28:13 “Mite kiangah, ‘A nungzuite, zanin ka ihmut kalun hong pai-in a luang a gu khia uh hi,’ ci-in gen un." 
Matthew28:14 Gam ukpa Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin ama lungkim zawh nading dongin ka na genpih ding uh a, note adingin bangmah lunghihmawhna om lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Matthew28:15 Tua ahih manin galkapte in a sum sang uh a, a kisawl bangin a gamta uh hi. Tua ahih manin tu ni dongin Jew mite lakah tu-a bangin hih thu a kigengen lai ahi hi." 
Matthew28:16 Nungzui sawm le khatte zong, Jesu in a gen sa bangin Galilee gam a mual tungah a pai uh hi." 
Matthew28:17 Amaute in Jesu a muh uh ciangin bia uh a, ahi zongin pawl khat in um zo taktak lo uh hi." 
Matthew28:18 Tua ciangin amaute mai ah Jesu hong pai a, “Leitungah ahi a, vantungah ahi zongin vangliatna khempeuh kei tungah hong kipia khinta hi." 
Matthew28:19 Tua ahih ciangin note pai unla, midang khempeuh, keima nungzui mi suaksakin, Pa min, Tapa min le Kha Siangtho min tawh tui sungah na phum un." 
Matthew28:20 Tua ciangin note tungah kong gen thute khempeuh a zuih nadingun na hilh un. Hun bei dongin note a hong ompih tawntung ding ka hihna thu phawk ta un,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:1 Pasianʼ Tapa Jesu Khris tawh kisai Lungdamna Thu hih bang ahi hi. 
Mark1:2 Kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho sungah, “Nangma mai ah ka kamtai pa ka sawl a, amah in na pai nading lampi a bawl khol ding hi." 
Mark1:3 Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topaʼ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a kigelhna tawh hong kipan khia hi." 
Mark1:4 Tua mah bangin gam sungah Johan hong vak a, mawhna kisikin tui kiphum un; tua hileh na mawhna uh Pasian in hong maisak ding hi, ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Mark1:5 Johanʼ thuhilhna a ngai dingin Jerusalem khua a kipan Judea gam sunga om mi khempeuhte a hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a mawhnate uh va pulak uh a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amaute a tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:5 Johanʼ thuhilhna a ngai dingin Jerusalem khua a kipan Judea gam sunga om mi khempeuhte a hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a mawhnate uh va pulak uh a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amaute a tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:6 Johan in kalaoh mul kigan puan silhin, savun kawnggak tawh a kawng gak a, kauphe le gamlak khuaizu tawh a kivak hi." 
Mark1:7 Amah in mite tungah thu hilh a, “Ka nungah hong pai ding pa pen kei sangin nakpi takin lian zaw a, kunin a khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawm zo kei hi." 
Mark1:8 Keimah in tui sungah note kong phum a, amah in Kha Siangtho sungah note hong phum ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:9 Tua laitakin Galilee gam sunga om Nazareth khua panin Jesu hong pai a, Jordan Gun sungah Johan in amah a tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:10 Tui sung panin Jesu a thawhkhiat khit phetin vantung kihongin, ama tungah vakhu bangin Kha Siangtho a hong kum suk a mu hi." 
Mark1:11 Vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Nang pen ka it mahmah ka Tapa na hi a, nang tungah ka lungkim mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:12 Thakhat thu-in Kha Siangtho in gamlak ah Jesu a paisak hi. 
Mark1:13 Gamlak ah ni sawm li sung om a, Satan in tua hun sungteng a ze-et hi. Tua lai ah gamsa gilote zong om a, ahi zongin vantung mite hong pai-in amah huhin an a vak uh hi." 
Mark1:14 Thong sungah Johan a kikhiat khit ciangin Galilee gam sungah Jesu hong pai a, Pasian kiang panin hong pai Lungdamna Thuthak gen a," 
Mark1:15 “A hunhoih hong tung ta a, Pasianʼ Uk ding hun hong kipan ta hi. Na mawhna uh kisikkik unla, hih Lungdamna Thuthak um un,” ci-in a hilh hi." 
Mark1:16 Galilee Tuili gei tawnin Jesu a pai laitakin, Simon le a nau Andru, ngabengte ahih manun, ngen tawh nga khuhin a om a mu hi." 
Mark1:17 Jesu in amau tegel kiangah, “Kei hong zui un; nga mat bangin mi tampi a huaite kong suaksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:18 Amau tegel in zong a ngen uh nusia-in Jesu a zui pah uh hi. 
Mark1:19 Tawm khat a pai khit ciangin Zebediʼ tapa James le a nau Johan zong, a gunkuang tung uh ah a ngen uh khui-in a om a mu leuleu hi." 
Mark1:19 Tawm khat a pai khit ciangin Zebediʼ tapa James le a nau Johan zong, a gunkuang tung uh ah a ngen uh khui-in a om a mu leuleu hi." 
Mark1:20 Jesu in amaute a muh phetin sam pah a, amau tegel in zong a pa uh Zebedi le a thacialte uh nusia-in Jesuʼ nung a zui uh hi." 
Mark1:21 Tua ciangin Kapernaum khua tung uh a, a Sabbath ni-in kikhopna inn sungah Jesu pai-in thu hilh ding a kipan hi." 
Mark1:22 A thuhilhna a za mi khempeuh in ama thugenna zia hangin lamdang a sa uh hi. Amah in Thukham hilh siate bangin thu gen loin aana nei mite bangin thu a gen zaw hi. 
Mark1:23 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn sungah dawivei mi khat hong lut a," 
Mark1:24 “Nazareth khuami Jesu aw, kote tawh nang bang kisai ihi hiam? Kote a susia dingin hih lai ah hong om na hi hiam? Pasianʼ mi siangtho na hih lam kong thei hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Mark1:25 Jesu in, “Pau kei in; hih mipa sung panin paikhia in,” ci-in tua dawi tungah thu a pia hi." 
Mark1:26 Dawi gilo in tua mipa kongkaw sakin a linsak gawp khit ciangin nakpi takin awngin ama sung panin a paikhia hi. 
Mark1:27 Mi khempeuh in lamdang sa uh a, khatlekhat in, “A bangci thu ahi hiam? Bang thu thak hilh tuan ahi hiam? Hih mipa in dawi gilote thupiak nading aana nei a, dawi gilote in ama thu a mang uh hi,” ci-in a kikum uh hi." 
Mark1:28 Tua ahih ciangin hih Jesuʼ thu in Galilee gam sung khempeuh thakhatin a zel pak hi. 
Mark1:29 Tua ciangin kikhopna inn panin amaute pai khia-in Simon le a nau Andruʼ inn ah paisuak pah uh a, James le a nau Johan in zong a zui uh hi." 
Mark1:29 Tua ciangin kikhopna inn panin amaute pai khia-in Simon le a nau Andruʼ inn ah paisuak pah uh a, James le a nau Johan in zong a zui uh hi." 
Mark1:30 Simonʼ sungnu nattunin lupna ngak a, Jesu a tun phetin tua nuʼ natna thu ama kiangah kigen hi." 
Mark1:31 Amah zong tua nu kiangah pai a, a khutin lenin a phong to hi. A natna dam a, a zinte zong a do zo pah hi." 
Mark1:32 Tua nitak lam, ni a tum khit ciangin mite in Jesu kiangah cina khempeuh le dawivei khempeuh a hong paipih uh hi." 
Mark1:33 Tua khuami khempeuh a inntual ah hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Mark1:34 Jesu in natna namkim a vei mi tampi damsak a, dawi tampi tak zong a hawl khia hi. Dawite in Jesu thei uh ahih manin, Jesu in dawite thu gensak lo hi." 
Mark1:35 A zing ciang phalvak ma-in Jesu tho-in gamdaihna mun khat ah na pai-in thu a ngen hi. 
Mark1:36 Ahi zongin Simon le a lawmte in Jesu a zong dingin nungzuih uh a," 
Mark1:37 amah a muh uh ciangin, “Mi khempeuh in nang hong kan uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark1:38 Ahih hangin Jesu in, “Hih kiimnai-a om khua dangte ah pai ni. Keima hong paina pen thuhilh ding ahih manin tua khuate ah thu ka hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:39 Tua ahih ciangin Galilee gam sung khempeuh ah amah zin a, a kikhopna uh innte ah thu hilhin dawite a hawl khia hi." 
Mark1:40 Miphak khat Jesu kiangah hong pai-in khukdin a, “Topa aw, hong damsak nuam peuh lecin nong damsak thei ding hi,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Mark1:41 Jesu in hehpihhuai sa ahih manin a khut zanin lawng a, “Nang kong damsak nuam hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:42 Thakhat thu-in a phak natna bei-in a dam siang hi. 
Mark1:43 Tua ciangin Jesu in khauh takin ama tungah thu genin pai khiasak pah a," 
Mark1:44 “Hih thu kuama kiangah gen kei in. Siampipa kiangah paisuak pahin amah kivelsak in. Tua ciangin na damsiangna thu mi khempeuh in a theih nadingin Moses thupiak sa bangin biakpiakna bawl in,” a ci hi." 
Mark1:45 Ahih hangin a mipa pai khia-in a paina khempeuh ah hih thupiang khempeuh gen belin a nei hi. Hih thu nakgen lua-in kitheithang gawp ahih manin, tua hun a kipanin miteʼ theihin khua sungah Jesu lut thei nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin gamdaihna munah amah om a, mun khempeuh panin ama kiangah mite a hong pai uh hi." 
Mark2:1 Tua zawh ni tawm khat khit ciangin Kapernaum khua ah Jesu hong paikik a, inn ah a omna thu hong kitheithang hi." 
Mark2:2 Mi tampi tak hong kikhawm uh ahih manin inn sung khempeuh, kongkhak pualam nangawn ah mi a dim hi. Jesu in amaute kiangah Pasianʼ thu hilhin a om laitakin," 
Mark2:3 mihing li in Jesu kiangah khutlekhe zaw mi khat a paipih dingin hong pua uh hi. 
Mark2:4 Ahi zongin mihonpi kineh lua ahih manin Jesu kiangah paipih thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuʼ omna san inn tungkhum hong letin, a lupna pheek tawh a mipa a khai suk uh hi." 
Mark2:5 Jesu in hih miteʼ up mahmahna thu a muh ciangin khutlekhe zaw mipa kiangah, “Ka ta aw, na mawhnate hong kimaisak hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark2:6 Tua lai ah a om, Thukham hilh siate pawl khat in a lungsim sung uh ah," 
Mark2:7 “Bang hangin hih mipa, Pasian tawh a kikim bangin kingaihsunin hih bangin pau ngam ahi hiam? Pasian sim loh kuamah in mawhna maisak thei lo hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Mark2:8 Jesu in a lungsim sung uh a amau ngaihsutna thei pah ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark2:9 Hih khutlekhe zaw mipa kiangah, ‘Na mawhna hong kimaisak khin hi,’ cih ding le, ‘Tho-in na lupna pheek la inla pai dih in,’ cih ding koi baih zaw ahi hiam?" 
Mark2:10 Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhmaisak theih nading thu nei hi, ci-in na theih nadingun kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin khutlekhe zaw mipa kiangah," 
Mark2:11 “Tho-in na lupna pheek la inla, na inn ah ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Mark2:12 Tua mipa zong amaute khempeuhʼ muhin tho a, a lupna pheek la-in a paikhia pah hi. Amaute khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, Pasian phatin, “Hih bang mahmah i mu ngei nai het kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark2:13 Tua ciangin Galilee Tuili gei ah Jesu a paikik hi. Ama kiangah mihonpi hong pai uh a, Jesu in tua mihonte thu a hilh hi." 
Mark2:14 Tua bangin a paina ah Alfeas tapa Levi, a siahdonna zumah tu-in a om a mu hi. Jesu in ama kiangah, “Kei hong zui in,” a ci hi. Levi zong dingin Jesuʼ nung a zui pah hi." 
Mark2:15 Tua nung ciangin Jesu in Leviʼ inn ah an a va ne hi. Siahdong mi tampi le thukham a khial mi tampite in Jesu zui uh a, amaute tampi in Jesu le a nungzuite tawh an a nekhawm uh hi." 
Mark2:16 Hih thukham khialte le siahdongte tawh Jesu in an a nekkhopna Farisi mite sung panin Thukham hilh siate pawl khat in a muh uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bang mite tawh an nekhawm ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark2:17 Jesu in hih thu a zak ciangin amaute kiangah, “Cidamte in siavuan kisam lo uh a, cina mite bek in kisam uh hi. Mite in a zahtak mihoihte a kisik nadingun a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, mite in a pampaih mite a kisik nadingun a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark2:18 Tua hun laitakin Tuiphumpa Johanʼ nungzuite le Farisi mite in an a tang uh hi. Jesu kiangah mi pawl khat hong pai-in, “Bang hangin Tuiphumpa Johanʼ nungzuite le Farisi miteʼ nungzuite in an tang uh a, nangma nungzuite in tang lo se ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark2:19 Jesu in, “Mopawi a siim mite in an ne lo dingin um na hi uh hiam? Zineipa tawh a om khawm sung uh an ne loin om lo ding uh hi." 
Mark2:20 Ahi zongin amaute kiang panin zineipa a kipaikhiat pih hun hong tung dinga, tua hun a tun ciangin an ne loin a om ding uh hi." 
Mark2:21 “Kuamah in puan tungsilh lui phop nadingin a ton nai lo puan bek a thak zang ngei lo hi. Zang zenzen leh a puan bek thak in a puan lui bal kek dinga, a vang gol zawsop ding hi." 
Mark2:22 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu a thak thun ngei lo hi. Thun zenzen leh leenggahzu in savun um phukham dinga, a leenggahzu le a savun um, a nih tuakin a kisia suak ding hi. Tua ahih manin leenggahzu thak koih nadingin savun um thak kizang hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark2:23 Khat vei, Sabbath ni khatin Jesu le a nungzuite, mangbuh lo nawkin a pai uh hi. A paikawmun a nungzuite in mangbuhvui a zut uh hi." 
Mark2:24 Tua ahih ciangin Farisi mite in Jesu kiangah, “Bang hangin Sabbath ni-in gamtat loh dingpi, na nungzuite gamta uh ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark2:25 Jesu in, “David in annek ding a kisap laitakin a gamtatna thu sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam? Amah le a mite a gilkial uh hi." 
Mark2:26 Tua ahih ciangin Pasianʼ biakinn sungah lutin Pasian biakna-a a kipia anlumte a ne uh hi. Abiathar in siampi lianpen a sep laitakin hih thu piang hi. I Thukham tawh kizui-in ci lehang, hih anlumte pen siampite bek in a nek theih ding hi napi-in David in ne-in, a mite nangawn a pia lai hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark2:27 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Sabbath ni, mihingteʼ phattuam nadingin a kibawl hi a, mihing pen Sabbath ni a phattuam nadingin a kibawl hi lo hi." 
Mark2:28 Tua ahih ciangin Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni nangawn a ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Mark3:1 Tua ciangin kikhopna inn sungah Jesu paikik a, tua lai ah a khut a lang khat a zaw mi khat na om hi." 
Mark3:2 Jesu gamta khial hi, ci-in a mawhsak nuam mi pawl khat tua lai ah om uh a, Sabbath ni-in hih mipa a damsak kha hiam, ci-in vil gige uh hi." 
Mark3:3 Jesu in khut zaw mipa kiangah, “Hih a mai lamah hong ding in,” a ci hi." 
Mark3:4 Tua ciangin mite kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in bang i hih ding i Thukham in hong deih ahi hiam? Huh ding maw, gimsak ding; mi khat a nuntakna hot ding maw, thah ding; koi hong deih zaw ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Ahih hangin kuamah in dawng lo hi." 
Mark3:5 Jesu in hehmai tawh a kiim a pam en kawikawi a, ahi zongin a khialhna uh le a thuphawk theih lohna uh hangin mite khasiathuai a sa zel hi. Tua ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. Amah in zong a khut zan a, damin a ngeina bangkik hi." 
Mark3:6 Tua ahih ciangin kikhopna inn panin Farisi mite pai khia-in Herod pawlte kim khat tawh kikhopna nei pah uh a, Jesu a thah theih nading uh a vaihawm uh hi." 
Mark3:7 Tua lai panin Galilee Tuili ah Jesu le a nungzuite pai uh a, Galilee gam, Judea gam," 
Mark3:7 Tua lai panin Galilee Tuili ah Jesu le a nungzuite pai uh a, Galilee gam, Judea gam," 
Mark3:8 Jerusalem khua, Idumia gam, Jordan gal khat, Taia khuapi kiim le Sidon khuapi kiim a om gamte in ama hih sa thute za khin uh ahih manin, hih gamte panin mihon tampi tak, ama kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
Mark3:9 Mihonte tam lua mahmah ahih manin amaute in Jesu a nehcip gawp khak loh nadingin ama om nading gunkuang khat a koih nadingun a nungzuite a sawl hi. 
Mark3:10 Amah in cina mi tampi damsak khin ahih manin, Jesu a lawn theih nadingun cina khempeuh in amah hong naih ciat uh hi." 
Mark3:11 Tua laitakin miteʼ sunga lut dawite in Jesu a muh uh ciangin a mai ah pukin kiko uh a, “Nang pen Pasianʼ Tapa na hi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark3:12 Dawite in amah kua mi ahi cihna thu a genkhiat loh nadingun Jesu in nakpi takin dawite a kham hi. 
Mark3:13 Tua lai panin a mual tung lamah Jesu pai to a, mi a deih teng ama kiangah a sam hi. Tua a sap mite ama kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Mark3:14 amah in mi sawm le nih teelin, sawltakte, ci-in min a phuah hi. Jesu in, “Kei tawh a kikhawl dingin no teng ka hong teel hi. Thu a hilh dingin zong ka hong sawl dinga," 
Mark3:15 dawi hawlkhiat nading vangliatna na nei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark3:16 Tua a teel mi sawm le nihte: Simon (Jesu in a min thak dingin Peter a phuah pa)," 
Mark3:17 Zebediʼ tapa James le a naupa Johan (Jesu in hih unaute pen “Van ging bang,” a cihnopna Boanerges min a phuahte)," 
Mark3:17 Zebediʼ tapa James le a naupa Johan (Jesu in hih unaute pen “Van ging bang,” a cihnopna Boanerges min a phuahte)," 
Mark3:18 Andru, Filip, Bartholomew, Matthai, Thomas, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Thaddeas, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Mark3:18 Andru, Filip, Bartholomew, Matthai, Thomas, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Thaddeas, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Mark3:19 le Jesu a lehhek Iskariotʼ tapa Judas ahi uh hi. Tua lai panin inn ah Jesu ciah a," 
Mark3:20 ama kiangah mihonpi hong kikhawmkik zel ahih manin Jesu le a nungzuite in an nangawn ne thei lo uh hi. 
Mark3:21 A innkuanpihte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Jesu a la dingin hong kuan khia uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Jesu mihai suakta hi,” a kicihna thu a za uh hi." 
Mark3:22 Jerusalem khua pan a hong pai Thukham hilh siate pawl khat in, “Hih pa sungah Beelzebul lut hi. Dawimangpa in ama tungah dawi hawlkhiat theih nading vangliatna pia hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark3:23 Tua ahih ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah mite samin thu gentehna tawh thu hilh a, “Satan in Satan bangci hawlkhiat theih ding ahi hiam?" 
Mark3:24 Gam khat peuhpeuh phel nih kisuahin kido le-uh tua gam kip lo ding hi. 
Mark3:25 Innkuan khat peuhpeuh phel nih kisuahin kido le-uh tua innkuan kip zo lo ding hi. 
Mark3:26 Satan le Satan kikhenin kido le-uh kip zo lo ding uh a, a bei ding uh hi ta uh hi." 
Mark3:27 Mi thahatpa hencip masa lopi-in kuamah in mi thahatpaʼ inn sung pan a neihsate laksak zo lo ding hi. A hencip khit ciang bekin laksak zo pan bek ding hi. 
Mark3:28 “Tua ahih ciangin hih thu phawk un! Mihingteʼ mawhna le a kampau siatnate uh kimaisak thei ding hi. 
Mark3:29 Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho langpangin thu a gente in mawhna kip su kha uh ahih manin a mawhna uh kimaisak ngei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark3:30 (Mi pawl khatte in, “Jesu in dawi vei hi,” ci uh ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi.)" 
Mark3:31 Tua laitakin a nu le a naute hong tung uh a, inn pua lamah ngakin, Jesu a sam dingin mi a sawl uh hi." 
Mark3:32 Ama kiimah a tu mihonpite in, “Na nu le na naute, inn pua ah om uh a, nang hong sam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark3:33 Jesu in, “Ka nu le ka naute i cih kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark3:34 Ama kimkot ah a tu mite en a, “Hih lai ah ka nu le ka sanggamte om uh hi." 
Mark3:35 Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamta mi khempeuh ka nu le ka sanggamte ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:1 Jesu in Galilee Tuili gei ah thuhilh ding kipankik leuleu hi. Ama kiimah a kikhawm mite tam lua ahih manin gunkuang sungah pai-in a tu hi. A gunkuang pen tui tungah om a, mihonpite ahihleh tui gei leilak ah om uh hi." 
Mark4:2 Amah in thu gentehna tawh thu tampi hilh a, a thuhilhna ah:" 
Mark4:3 “Ngai un! Khaici vawhpa, khaici vawh dingin a kuan khia hi." 
Mark4:4 Khaici a vawh ciangin pawl khatte lamdung tu a, vasate hong leengin tawmin a ne uh hi." 
Mark4:5 Pawl khatte leihoih a sah lohna mun, suang a kitawphah tung tu a, lei sah lo ahih manin thakhatin po pah hi." 
Mark4:6 Tua ankungnote in zung thuk kha zo lo ahih manin nisa in a kat ciangin a keutum pah uh hi. 
Mark4:7 Pawl khatte lingbulsum omna lak tu a, lingte hong selin dep gawp ahih manin bangmah gah zo lo hi." 
Mark4:8 A dangte ahihleh lei hoihna mun tu ahih manin hong po-in khang a, a zah sawm thum, a zah sawm guk, a zah za khat dongin an hong piang hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:9 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Mark4:10 Mihonpite a ven, amah guak a om ciangin nungzui sawm le nihte le ama thugen a za mite in, na thu gentehna a khiatna hong gen in, ci-in a ngen uh hi." 
Mark4:11 Jesu in, “Pasianʼ Ukna tawh kisai thusim, Pasian in note tungah hong gen khinzo hi. Ahi zongin a pualam a om mite tungah na khempeuh, thu gentehna bek tawh kigen hi." 
Mark4:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Enen napi-un a muh nai loh nading, zaza napi-un a tel nai loh nading; amaute in mu-in tel le-uh Pasianʼ lamah kihei ding uh a, Pasian in amauteʼ mawhna maisak ding hi,’” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark4:13 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Note in hih thu gentehna thei lo na hi uh hiam? Thei lo na hih uh leh, thu gentehna khat peuhpeuh bangci theih ngei ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark4:14 Khaici vawhpa in khaici vawh bangin Pasianʼ thu a vawh hi. 
Mark4:15 Khat veivei lamdung a tu khaici bang a, mite in a thu za napi-in, a zak khit phetun Satan hong pai-in amaute sunga a kivawh thute lakkhiatsak hi." 
Mark4:16 Mi pawl khatte, khaici pawl khat a tukna suang kitawphah leilak tawh kibang uh hi. Thu a zak phetun lungdam takin sang uh hi." 
Mark4:17 Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum lo ahih manin sau veipi kip lo hi. Tua thu hangin lungkhamna ahi a, bawlsiatna ahi zongin a tun ciangin a puk pah uh hi." 
Mark4:18 Mi pawl khatte, khaici pawl khat a tukna mun lingbulsum a omna leilak tawh kibang uh hi. Hih bang mite in Pasianʼ thu a zak hangun," 
Mark4:19 hih leitung lunghihmawhna, hauh nopna le deihna dang a tuamtuamte in a thu khuhcip ahih manin bangmah suak khia zo lo hi." 
Mark4:20 Ahi zongin midangte ahihleh khaici pawl khat a tukna mun leihoih tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in Pasianʼ thu za-in sang uh a, pawl khatte adingin a zah sawm thum, pawl khatte adingin a zah sawm guk, pawl khatte adingin a zah za khatin man a nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mi khatpeuh in mei a kivak hong la-in lawh peuh khuh a, ahih kei leh lupna nuai peuh ah koih ngei ahi hiam? A kimuh theih nading meivakna kho sang tungah koih hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark4:22 Thusimin a kikoih peuhmah khatvei teitei thulang a suak ding, a kiseel peuhmah khatvei teitei a kipholak ding, cih deihna sim loh bang dang om ahi hiam?" 
Mark4:23 Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:24 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Na zak uh thu limtakin ngaihsun un. Midangte tungah na piakna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah Pasian in hong pia dinga, a tam zaw-in hong pia thuah ding hi." 
Mark4:25 A nei sa mipa tungah Pasian in pia thuah dinga, a nei lo mipa tung panin them khat a neihsun nangawn laksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:26 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Pasianʼ Ukna pen mi khat in a lo lai ah a vawh khaici tawh kibang hi." 
Mark4:27 Khaici vawhpa zanin ihmu a, zingsangin tho-in sunin a nasep ngei teng a sem hi. Tua kikal sungin a khaici na po-in na khang a, ahi zongin tua a khan theihna zia amah in a thu thei lo hi." 
Mark4:28 Leitang in ama thu-in na khangsak tawm a, a masa-in a tehno, tua ciangin a kung, tua ciangin a tak a om dongin na khangsak hi." 
Mark4:29 An a min ciangin an lak ding hun ahih manin amah in a phiaukawi tawh an at ding a kipan hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:30 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Pasianʼ Ukna bang tawh kibang ci dinga, i gen tel nadingin bang thu gentehna zang ding ihi hiam?" 
Mark4:31 Leitung a om khaici khempeuh lakah a neu penpen ankam tang tawh kibang hi. Mi khat in tua ankam tang lei ah vawh a," 
Mark4:32 tawl khat khit ciangin hong po-in hong khangto a, khai kung khempeuh lakah a gol pen pawl hong suak hi. A kung golin a hiangte zaai ahih manin ama liim sung a hiang kawmah vasate in bu a tom uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:33 Jesu in hih bang thugentehnate zangin mite tungah thu hilh a, amauteʼ tel zawh zah ciangciang thu a gen hi." 
Mark4:34 Thu gentehna lo tawh thu hilh ngei lo hi. A nungzuite guak tawh a om khawm ciangin a thu khempeuh a gen tel zel hi. 
Mark4:35 Tua ni mah a nitak ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Tui kantanin gal khat lamah pai ni,” a ci hi." 
Mark4:36 Tua ahih ciangin a nungzuite in mihonpite nusia-in Jesu a na tuanna sa gunkuang tungah kahin a gunkuang tawh a paikhiatpih uh hi. Gunkuang dangte in zong amau a zui uh hi. 
Mark4:37 Tua laitakin nakpi takin huihpi hong nung a, tuihual hong omin gunkuang sungah tui hong dim dektak hi." 
Mark4:38 Jesu pen gunkuang nung lamah lukham khamin ihmu-in a om hi. A nungzuite in amah phongin, “Sia aw, kote si tale ung phamawh hong sa lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark4:39 Jesu zong tho-in, “Nung nawn kei in,” ci-in huihpi thu pia a, tuihualte kiangah, “Kilok nawn kei un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin huihnung khawlin dai khipkhep pah hi." 
Mark4:40 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Bang hangin lau na hi uh hiam? Tu ciang dong upna nei nai lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark4:41 A nungzuite in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Huihpi le tuihualte nangawn, ama sawl bangin a gamta uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark5:1 Tua ciangin Jesu le a nungzuite Galilee Tuili gal khat, Gadara miteʼ gam sung a tung uh hi." 
Mark5:2 Gunkuang tung panin Jesu a kum suk khit phetin, han lak panin a hong pai mi khat in na dawntuah hi." 
Mark5:3 Hih mipa dawivei hi a, han lakah a teeng hi. Kuamah in hih mipa, sikkhau tawh hen zo nawn lo uh hi." 
Mark5:4 Tam veipi tak, a khut le a khe, sikkhau tawh kihen khin ngei a, ahi zongin a kihen simin a sikkhaute botsatin, a khe-a kibulh kolte a sukham gawp hi. Amah hat lua ahih manin kuamah in hih zo lo hi." 
Mark5:5 Sun le zanin han lak le mual tung tengah vak kawikawi a, awng gawpin, suang hiamte tawh amah a kikui liam hi." 
Mark5:6 Hih mipa in Jesu a gal muh ciangin hong delhin ama mai ah khukdin a," 
Mark5:7 nakpi takin kiko-in, “A Lianpen Pasianʼ Tapa Jesu aw, kei bang hong nuammawh na hi hiam? Kei, gim hong pia kei in, ci-in Pasianʼ min tawh kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:8 (Hih bangin a cihna pen, Jesu in, “Dawi aw, hih mipa sung panin paikhia in,” a cihna hang ahi hi.)" 
Mark5:9 Jesu in, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Mipa in, “Kote tampi pha ka hih manun ka min pen A Honpi ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark5:10 Tua gam panin mun dangah dawite a hawlkhiat loh nadingin tua mipa in a thum lailai hi. 
Mark5:11 Tua laitakin tua nai-a om mualpang ah vok hon tampi gamta-in a om hi. 
Mark5:12 Dawite in, “Hua vokte kiang beek ah hong paisak inla, a sungah hong tumsak in,” ci-in a thum uh hi." 
Mark5:13 Tua ahih manin Jesu in dawite a pai nading uh thu pia a, dawite zong mipa sung panin pai khia-in vokte sungah a lut uh hi. Tua vok honpite a vekpi-in tul nih bang pha hi. Mual tung panin tai suk henhan uh a, tuili sung kidenna-in tui kia mang khin uh hi." 
Mark5:14 Tua ciangin tua vokcingte tai-in khua sung le gam sung tengah hih thupiang a gen uh hi. Tua thupiangte a en dingin mite zong hong pai uh hi. 
Mark5:15 Jesu kiang a tun uh ciangin dawi tampi a vei ngei mipa zong a mu uh hi. Tua mipa hoihtakin om a, a lungsim pilin, puan silhin a om a muh uh ciangin lamdang sa-in lau mahmah uh hi." 
Mark5:16 Hih thupiang a mu mi khempeuh in dawivei pa tunga thupiang le vokte thu, mi khempeuh kiangah a gen kawikawi uh hi." 
Mark5:17 Tua ahih ciangin amau gam panin a paikhiat nadingin mipite in Jesu a sawl khia uh hi. 
Mark5:18 Tua lai panin gunkuang tungah Jesu a kah tohkik ciangin dawi a vei ngei mipa in, “Kei zong hong zuisak in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Mark5:19 Ahi zongin Jesu in amah zuisak lo a, “Na innkuanpihte kiangah ciahkik inla, Topa in nang a hong hehpihna le nangma tunga a hong bawlnate va gen in,” ci-in a sawl zaw hi." 
Mark5:20 Tua ahih ciangin a mipa ciah a, tua kiim a om Khuapi Sawmte sungah, Jesu in ama adingin a sepnate gen a, tua thu a za mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Mark5:21 Jesu, gunkuang tuangin a gal kah khit ciangin, tuili gei ama kiangah mi tampi tak hong kikhawm leuleu uh hi." 
Mark5:22 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn a uk, Jairas a kici mi khat hong pai a, Jesu a muh ciangin a khe phung ah bokin," 
Mark5:23 “Ka tanu si dektak ta hi. Amah a cidam kikin a nuntak theih nadingin hong pai inla, ama tungah na khut hong ngaksak in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Mark5:24 Jesu zong, tua mipa tawh a paikhia khawm hi. Mi tampi tak in zong zui uh ahih manin Jesu a nehcip uh hi." 
Mark5:25 Tuate lakah, kum sawm le kum nih sung tawntung siluang natna a nei numei khat a om hi." 
Mark5:26 Siavuan tampi in amah bawl a, a sum neih khempeuh zang khin napi-in noptuam zaw loin gim semsem zaw hi." 
Mark5:27 Tua numei in Jesuʼ thu za ahih manin mihonte kawmah Jesuʼ nung a zui hi. 
Mark5:28 Tua nu in, “A puan mong nangawn va lawng kha leng, dam ning,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Mark5:29 A va lawn khit phetin a siluang khawl pah a, ama sunga a natna a damlam a kiphawk hi." 
Mark5:30 Jesu in ama sung panin a vangliatna a paikhiat lam phawk pah ahih manin mihonpite lakah khuadakin, “Kua in ka puan hong lawng na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark5:31 A nungzuite in, “Mihonpite in nang hong nehcih lam na thei hi. Bang hangin kua in hong lawng na hi uh hiam, ci mawk na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark5:32 Ahi zongin amah a lawngte a theih nadingin Jesu khuadak kawikawi lai hi. 
Mark5:33 Tua numei in ama tunga thupiang thei ahih manin laukawm liingkawmin hong pai-in a khe phung ah hong bok a, a thupiang khempeuh ahi bangbangin a hong gen hi." 
Mark5:34 Jesu in zong tua nu kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, na upna in nang hong damsak zo hi. Cidam suak inla, lungnuam takin va ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:35 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn ukpaʼ inn panin kamtaite hong tung uh a, “Na tanu si khinta hi. Bang hangin Siapa mawk gimsak nawn ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark5:36 Ahi zongin Jesu in amau thu kigen don loin kikhopna inn ukpa kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in; upna nei peuh in,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:37 Tua lai panin Jesu in Peter le James le a nau Johan longal kuamah dang kizuisak nawn lo hi. 
Mark5:37 Tua lai panin Jesu in Peter le James le a nau Johan longal kuamah dang kizuisak nawn lo hi. 
Mark5:38 Kikhopna inn ukpaʼ inn a tun uh ciangin miteʼ kahna le thumna, a gamlumna uh a mu hi." 
Mark5:39 Amah sung tumin, “Bang hangin hici gamlum na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin kap na hi uh hiam? Numeino a si hi lo hi; a ihmu hi bek hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:40 Amaute in Jesu zahpih bawlin nuihsan uh ahih manin Jesu in amaute khempeuh pusuaksak a, numeinoʼ pa le a nu le a nungzui thumte tawh, numeinoʼ lupna inn dei ah a pai uh hi." 
Mark5:41 Tua ciangin numeinoʼ khut lenin, “Numeino aw, tho in,” a cihna, “ Talitha kumi,” a ci hi." 
Mark5:42 Numeino zong thakhatin tho-in lam a pai pah hi. (Amah kum sawm le kum nih pha ta hi.) Tua ciangin amaute in lamdang sa mahmah uh hi. 
Mark5:43 Hih thu, kuama kiangah a gen loh nadingun Jesu in nakpi takin amaute kham a, tua ciangin, “Numeino an pia un,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Mark6:1 Tua lai panin ama khua Nazareth ah Jesu pai a, a nungzuite in a zui uh hi." 
Mark6:2 A Sabbath ni ciangin kikhopna inn ah thu a hilh hi. Ama thuhilh a za mi tampite in lamdang sa-in, “Hih pa in hih thute koi panin a ngah ahi hiam? Hih pa tungah a kipia pilna a bang pilna ahi hiam? Bangci-in nalamdang hici bawl theih ahi hiam?" 
Mark6:3 Amah khutsiam pa hi lel a, Mary’ tapa hi lo ahi hiam? James, Josef, Judas le Simon-teʼ u hi lo ahi hiam? A nau numeite zong hih lai mah a om hi lo ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua hi a, amah sang zo lo uh hi." 
Mark6:3 Amah khutsiam pa hi lel a, Mary’ tapa hi lo ahi hiam? James, Josef, Judas le Simon-teʼ u hi lo ahi hiam? A nau numeite zong hih lai mah a om hi lo ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua hi a, amah sang zo lo uh hi." 
Mark6:4 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Kamsang khat pen, ama khua, ama behte le ama inn sung longal ah kizahtakin pahtawina a ngah hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:5 Tua hi a, cina tawmkhatte tungah khut nga-in a damsak cih sim loh, tua lai ah nalamdang lian bawl thei lo hi." 
Mark6:6 Amaute in amah a up loh manin lamdang a sa mahmah hi. Tua ciangin tua kiim a om khuaneute ah thuhilhin a pai kawikawi hi. 
Mark6:7 Jesu in sawm le nihte sam a, amaute tungah dawi hawlkhiat nading vangliatna pia-in, amaute nih nihin a sawl khia hi." 
Mark6:8 Amaute kiangah, “Ciangkhut sim loh, na khualzinna uh ah bangmah keng kei un. An ahi a, ip ahi a, sum ahi zongin keng kei un." 
Mark6:9 Khedap bulh unla, ahi zongin puanak nih silh thuah kei un." 
Mark6:10 A zin dingin a hong deih inn khat peuhpeuh ah tung unla, tua khua panin na paikhiat mateng uh tua inn mahah om paisuak un." 
Mark6:11 Na paina uh khua khatpeuh in note hong sang loin, na thuhilhna uh hong ngaih nop kei uh leh, tua khua nusia-in, na khe uh a leivui baangte sinsan un. Tua pen amaute adingin hilhkholhna ahi hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Mark6:12 Tua ahih ciangin amaute kuan khia uh a, mite a mawhna panun a kisik nadingun thu a hilh uh hi." 
Mark6:13 Dawi tampi hawl khia uh a, cina mi tampi sathau zutin a damsak uh hi." 
Mark6:14 Kumpi Herod in Jesu thu a kigengenna thu a za hi. Mi pawl khat in, “Tuiphumpa Johan, sihna panin hingkik hi. Tua ahih manin hih vangliatnate nei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark6:15 Ahi zongin a dangte in, “Elijah hi,” ci uh a, pawl khat leuleu in, “Tanglai-a kamsangte mah bangin kamsang khat hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark6:16 Herod in Jesuʼ nasepnate a zak ciangin, “A lutang ka tan khiatsak Johan hong hingkik hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Herod in a nau Filip’ zi Herodias a tenpihna hangin Johan in Herod kiangah, “Na naupaʼ zi na teenpih ding ngeina hi lo hi,” ci-in gen zelzel ahih manin Herodias a heh suak a, galkapte in Johan manin thong sungah a khiat nadingin Herod a vaihawmsak hi." 
Mark6:18  
Mark6:19 Tua ahih manin Herodias in Johan mudahin that nuam a, ahi zongin that zo lo hi." 
Mark6:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Johan pen a thuman mihoih khat hi, ci-in Herod in ngaihsun ahih manin amah zahtakin siatna a thuak nading panin hu hi. Ama thugente in a lungsim nuam losak hi; ahi zongin a thugen za nuam veve hi." 
Mark6:21 Ahi zongin a tawpna ah Herodias in hunhoih ngah hi. Herod a suah ni hun a tun ciangin kumpi uliante, galkap maangte le Galilee gam sunga om ulian khempeuh adingin pawi a kham hi." 
Mark6:22 Tua pawi bawlna sungah Herodiasʼ tanu hong pai-in hong laam a, Herod le a leenglate khempeuh lungdam mahmah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in, “Bang deih na hiam; na deih peuhpeuh kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:23 Amah in kamciam pia a, “Ka kumpi gam phel khat ciang dong nangawnin, nong nget peuhpeuh kong piak nading kong kiciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:24 Tua ahih ciangin tua numeino va pai khia-in a nu kiangah, “Bang ngen ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a va dong hi. A nu in, “Tuiphumpa Johanʼ lutang ngen in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark6:25 Numeino zong kumpipa kiangah hong paikik pahin, “Kuangdai khat sungah Tuiphumpa Johanʼ lutang nong piak pah ding ka deih hi,” a va ci hi." 
Mark6:26 Hih thu a zak ciangin kumpipa dah mahmah hi. Ahi zongin a kiciamnasa hang le a leenglateʼ maitang a zahtakna hangin nial ngam lo hi. 
Mark6:27 Tua ahih ciangin Johanʼ lutang a hong paipih nadingin galkapte khat a sawl pah hi. Amah zong pai-in thong sungah Johanʼ lutang tan khia a," 
Mark6:28 kuangdai khat sungah a lutang hong paipihin numeino tungah a pia hi. 
Mark6:29 Johanʼ nungzuite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hong pai-in a luanghawm la uh a, hanah a vui uh hi." 
Mark6:30 Tua khit ciangin Jesu kiangah sawltakte hong ciahkik uh a, a sepna khempeuh uh le a thuhilhna khempeuh uh a zasak uh hi." 
Mark6:31 Mi a ciah leh a kuan kiphamat uh ahih manin Jesu le a nungzuite in annek nading hun nangawn nei man lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesu in, “Ei guak i om theih nading mun khat ah paikhia ni; tua lai ah na tawlnga thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:32 Tua ahih ciangin gunkuang tuangin gamdaihna mun a zuan dingin a pai uh hi. 
Mark6:33 Ahi zongin a paikhiat lam uh le amaute ahih lam uh, mi tampi in thei uh ahih manin khuapi khempeuh panin a hong pai mite, lei lam tawnin na pai uh a, Jesu le a nungzuite a tun ma-in a na ma tun uh hi." 
Mark6:34 Jesu, tui gei a tun ciangin mi tampi a na om khin mu a, amaute, a cing om lo tuute tawh kibang sa ahih manin a khasiat mahmah hi. Tua hi a, amaute thu tampi tak a hilh hi." 
Mark6:35 Nitak lam ciangin a nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Tu-in nitak hi ta a, hih lai mun lah gamlak ahi hi." 
Mark6:36 Hih kiim a om khuate ah amaute pai-in a annek ding uh a lei nadingun hih mihonte sawl khia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark6:37 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Amauteʼ nek ding bang khat peuhpeuh pia un,” a ci hi. A nungzuite in, “Ngun peek za nih tawh anlum va lei-in amauteʼ nek dingin pia ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark6:38 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Anlum bangzah nei na hi uh hiam, va en dih un,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih om hi,” ci-in a hong genkik uh hi." 
Mark6:39 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mihonte a pawl a pawlin khen unla, lopa hing tungah tusak un,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:40 Tua ahih manin mihonte zong pawl khat ah za, pawl khat ah sawm nga, cih bangin a honhonin a gual tut uh hi." 
Mark6:41 Tua ciangin Jesu in a anlum nga le a ngasa tawn nihte la a, vantung lam en to-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a ko hi. A anlumte balnen a, mite tungah a piak dingin nungzuite a pia hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa tawn nihte zong amaute khempeuh a hawmsak hi." 
Mark6:42 Amaute khempeuh in ne-in a kham uh hi. 
Mark6:43 Tua ciangin nungzuite in a kikhamval anlum le ngasa khawm uh a, paipel sawm le nih a dim hi." 
Mark6:44 Tua an a ne mi sung panin pasal cingteng tul nga a pha hi. 
Mark6:45 Tua khit phetin Jesu in a nungzuite gunkuang ah tuangsakin, a gal khat a om Bethsaida khua ah ma paisak a, amah in mihonte a khua ciatah a ciah dingin a sawl hi." 
Mark6:46 Amaute tawh a kikhen khit ciangin thungen dingin mual tungah a kah to hi. 
Mark6:47 Khuamial ciangin tui laizang dong gunkuang tung ta a, Jesu ahihleh leitungah amah guakin om lai hi." 
Mark6:48 Huih in a nungzuite lehmut ahih manin gunkuang hot zo loin haksa a sakna thu uh Jesu in a thei hi. Tua hi a, zingsang lam nai thum pan nai guk kikal khawngin a nungzuite kiang lamah tui tung tawnin Jesu a pai hi. Amaute a kheng suak ding bangin pai a," 
Mark6:49 ahi zongin a nungzuite in tui tung a mi pai a muh ciangun, “Sikha hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a awngkek gawp uh hi." 
Mark6:50 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a muh uh ciangin lau mahmah uh hi. Ahih hangin Jesu in thakhatin amaute hopih pah a, “Lungnuamin om un. Keimah ka hi hi; lau kei un,” a ci hi." 
Mark6:51 Tua ciangin amaute omna gunkuang tungah Jesu kah to a, huihpi zong a dai pah hi. Nungzuite in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Mark6:52 Bang hang hiam cih leh lungsim navak lo uh ahih manin anlum tawh kisai thupiang tel thei lo uh hi. 
Mark6:53 Tui a kantan khit uh ciangin Gennesaret gam tung uh a, tui gei ah a gunkuang uh a khih uh hi." 
Mark6:54 Gunkuang panin a paikhiat khit phetun mite in Jesu ahih lam a thei pah uh hi. 
Mark6:55 Tua gam sung tengah mite tai kawikawi uh a, Jesu om hi, ci-in a kigenna mun peuhpeuh ah cinate a lupna pheek uh tawh hong pua uh hi." 
Mark6:56 Khuapi, khua neu le khua kete a a paina khempeuh ah, mite in mihon kikhopna munah cinate hong pua uh a, a puan mongteep beek a lawnsak nading deihin Jesu kiangah a thum uh hi. A puan mongteep a lawng kha mi khempeuh cidam pahpah uh hi." 
Mark7:1 Tua laitakin Jerusalem panin a hong pai Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate, Jesu kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi." 
Mark7:2 A nungzuite pawl khat in khanglui ngeina zui loin, khut sil loin an a neklam uh a mu kha uh hi." 
Mark7:3 (Farisi mite le Jew mite khempeuh in khanglui ngeina zui-in khut sil loin an ne lo uh hi. 
Mark7:4 Nek theih zuakna panin a kilei nate zong amau teek mah in a sawp kei uh leh ne lo uh hi. Khanglui ngeina a zuih uh, hai khawng, beel khawng, sumngo kibawl beellekuang khawngte sawp ding cih ngeina a zuih uh tampi om hi.)" 
Mark7:5 Tua ahih manin Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate in Jesu kiangah, “Bang hangin na nungzuite in, khanglui lai pek panin tu ni dongin a kizui pulepa ngeinate zui loin, khut sil loin an ne ahi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark7:6 Jesu in amaute dawng a, “A tungtham a hoihin a kilang khem noteʼ thu, Isaiah in a gen kholhna man mahmah hi. Ama genna ah, ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Hih mite in a kampi bek uh tawh kei hong zahtak bawl uh a, a lungsim taktak uh kei tawh kigamla hi." 
Mark7:7 Mihingteʼ bawl tawm thukhamte, Pasianʼ thukham zahin mite tungah hilh uh ahih manin, kei hong biak hangun a kimanna om lo hi,’ ci hi." 
Mark7:8 Note in Pasianʼ thukham nawl khinin, mihingteʼ thuhilhna na zui zawsop uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark7:9 Tua ciangin Jesu in a thugen zom lai a, “Na khanglui ngeina uh na zuih theih nadingun Pasianʼ thukhamte a nawl khin zia na siam mahmah uh hi." 
Mark7:10 Moses in, ‘Na nu le na pa zahtak un. A nu a pa a samsiate kithat hen,’ ci hi." 
Mark7:11 Ahi zongin note in, ‘Mi khatpeuh in a nu a pa a piak theih ding na khat peuhpeuh a neih hangin, hih pen Korban (Pasian ading) hi, ci peuh leh," 
Mark7:12 a nu le a pa a huh nading panin suakta thei hi,’ ci-in thu na hilh uh hi." 
Mark7:13 Hih bang danin mite thu na hilhna uh tawh Pasianʼ thu na pampaih uh hi. Hih bangzia-in na gamtatna uh a dang tampi zong om lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark7:14 Tua ciangin Jesu in mihonpite samin amaute kiangah, “Mi khempeuh aw, ka thugen hong ngai unla, ka thugente thei tel un." 
Mark7:15 A pualam panin mite sungah tumin mi a ninsak thei bangmah om lo hi. Ahi zongin mite sung panin a pusuak khiate in mi ninsak thei hi. 
Mark7:16 (Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” a ci hi.)" 
Mark7:17 Mihonpite nusia-in inn sungah a lut khit ciangin a nungzuite in hih thu gentehna thu a dong uh hi. 
Mark7:18 Jesu in, “Note in zong bangmah a thei lo hi mawk hi lo na hi uh hiam? A pualam panin mite sungah a tum nate in mi ninsak thei lo hi." 
Mark7:19 A lungsimah tum loin a gil sung bekah tum ahih manin tua panin kitha khia lel hi. (Hih bang a gen ciangin an khempeuh nek dingin a siangtho ahi hi, ci-in Jesu in a gen ahi hi.)" 
Mark7:20 Mihingte sung panin a pusuak khiate in mihing ninsak hi. 
Mark7:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingteʼ lungsim sung panin nungak tangval mawhnopna, guktaakna, mi thahna, zilepasal nei sate tawh mawhnopna," 
Mark7:22 huaihamna, gitlohna, khemna, gamtat hoih lohna, enna, mi gensiatna, kisialhna le hai tatna a piangsak thei ngaihsutna hoih lote khempeuh," 
Mark7:23 mihingte sung panin pusuakin mite ninsak ahih lam thei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
Mark7:24 Tua lai panin Jesu ding khia-in Taia khua kiim gamah a pai hi. Inn khat sungah lut a, kuamah in a theih loh ding a ut hangin a busim thei kei hi." 
Mark7:25 A tanu dawi a vei nupi khat in Jesuʼ thu a zak ciangin hong pai-in ama khe phung ah hong bok hi. 
Mark7:26 Tua nupi pen Grik mi hi a, Syria gam Foenisia khua-a a suak ahi hi. A tanu sung panin dawi a hawl khiatsak nadingin a hong thum hi." 
Mark7:27 Ahih hangin Jesu in, “Naupangte an nesak masa ni. Naupangteʼ nek ding kimlai ui khawite piak masak ding kilawm lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark7:28 Ahi zongin nupi in, “Hi mah hi, Topa aw; sabuai nuai-a uite in naupangteʼ khamval teng ngah buang hi lo ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
Mark7:29 Jesu in nupi kiangah, “Hih banga na kampauna hangin na inn ah ciah ta in; na tanu sung panin dawi a paikhia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark7:30 Amah zong a inn ah ciah pah a, a tanu nuam takin lum hithiatin a om mu ahih manin dawi a paikhiat khitna thu a thei hi." 
Mark7:31 Tua ciangin Taia khua kiim gam panin Jesu paikhia a, Sidon khuapi nawkin pai a, Khuapi Sawmte gam lam tawnin Galilee Tuili ah a tung hi." 
Mark7:32 Mi pawl khat in a bilngongin a pau thei lo mi khat, Jesu kiangah hong paipih uh a, ama tungah a khut a ngaksak nadingin a thum uh hi." 
Mark7:33 Jesu in zong mihonte omna panin tua mipa paikhiatpih a, a mipaʼ bil tegel sungah a khutmete guang a, tua ciangin a khutmete cil nuhin a leii lawnsakin" 
Mark7:34 vantung lam en to a, khuisa-in, “Kihong in,” a cihnopna ahi “ Effatha” a ci hi." 
Mark7:35 Thakhatin a mipaʼ bil kihongin, a leii zong hong kol a, nuam takin a pau thei hi." 
Mark7:36 Kuama kiangah hih thute a gen loh nadingun Jesu in kham a, ahi zongin nak kham le nak gen semsem zawsop uh hi." 
Mark7:37 Amaute in gen zawh loh dongin lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Hih mipa in sep theih loh bangmah nei lo hi. Bilngongte nangawn khua zasak thei a, a pau thei lote nangawn pau theisak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark8:1 Tua khit a sawt loin Jesu kiangah mihon tampi tak hong kikhawm leuleu uh a, amaute in annek ding nei nawn lo uh ahih manin Jesu in a nungzuite samin amaute kiangah," 
Mark8:2 “Hih mite, kei kiangah ni thum bang hong om khin uh a, tu-in nek ding nei nawn lo uh ahih manin hehpihhuai ka sa hi." 
Mark8:3 Amaute pawl khat gamlapi panin a hong pai uh ahih manin gil kialin ciahsak leng, lamkal ah cimawh kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark8:4 A nungzuite in, “Hih mite piak ding, hih gamlak ah an bangci ngah ding ihi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
Mark8:5 Jesu in, “Anlum bangzah nei na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, “Sagih nei ung,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark8:6 Tua ciangin Jesu in leilak ah mihonte tusak a, a anlum sagih la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin balnenin, mihonpite a lui dingin a nungzuite tungah a pia hi. A nungzuite in zong mihonte a lui uh hi." 
Mark8:7 Ngasa neu tawm khat zong nei uh ahih manin Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin hihte zong mipite mai ah a lui nadingun a nungzuite a sawl hi. 
Mark8:8 Amaute in ne-in a kham khit uh ciangin a khamvalte uh khawm uh a, paipel lian sagih a dim hi." 
Mark8:9 Hih lai ah mi tul li bang om hi. 
Mark8:10 Tua ciangin mihonpite ciah khiasak a, a nungzuite tawh gunkuang tungah tuang pahin Dalmanutha gamah a pai uh hi." 
Mark8:11 Farisi mite hong pai-in Jesu tawh thu kinial uh a, amah a mawhsak theih nading uh a deihna-in Pasian tawh kipawl ahihna a lah nadingin lim khat a lah ding a ngen uh hi." 
Mark8:12 Tua ciangin Jesu nakpi takin a sung tawng ah khuisa-in, “Bang hangin hih mite in lim hong ngen ahi uh hiam? Hih mite tungah lim kilak peuhmah lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark8:13 Tua ciangin amaute nusia-in gunkuang sungah tuangin a gal khat lamah a pai hi. 
Mark8:14 A nungzuite in anlum a puak thuah ding uh mangngilh uh ahih manin gunkuang sungah anlum khat bek a nei uh hi. 
Mark8:15 Jesu in, “Farisi-teʼ silngo le Herod pawlteʼ silngo kidawm un,” ci-in a hilh khol hi." 
Mark8:16 Anlum i neih loh manin hih thu hong gen hi ding hi, ci-in a nungzuite a kikum uh hi." 
Mark8:17 Jesu in amaute thugen thei ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Anlum na neih loh manun bang hangin thu kikum na hi uh hiam? Theithei nai lo, tel thei nai lo na hi uh hiam? Na lungsim uh tua zahin navak lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark8:18 Mit nei napi-in mu lo na hi uh hiam? Bil nei napi-in za lo na hi uh hiam? 
Mark8:19 Mihing tul ngateʼ nek dingin anlum nga ka balnen thu mangngilh ta na hi uh hiam? Tua hun lai-in a kikhamval na khop uh paipel bangzah dim ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Sawm le nih,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark8:20 “Mihing tul lite adingin lum sagih ka balnen lai-in a khamval uh paipel lian bangzah dim khawm na hi uh hiam?” a cih leuleu ciangin, “Sagih,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark8:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Thei tel nai lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark8:22 Tua ciangin Bethsaida khua tung uh hi. Mi pawl khat in Jesu kiangah mittaw khat hong paipih uh a, amah a lawn nadingun a thum uh hi." 
Mark8:23 Jesu in tua mittaw paʼ khut lenin khua nawl ah a paipih hi. A mipaʼ mitah a cil a phih khit ciangin a khut tawh lawng a, “Na khat peuhpeuh na mu thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark8:24 A mipa zong khuadak a, “Mite ka mu thei hi; ahi zongin singkung a lam pai tawh kibang uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark8:25 Tua ciangin a khut tawh a mit lawnsak leuleu hi. Hih hun ciangin a mipa nakpi takin hak ahih manin khua mu theikik a, na khempeuh a kitel takin a mu thei hi." 
Mark8:26 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Na khua ah ciah suak pah inla, hih khua sungah lutkik kei in,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Mark8:27 Tua ciangin Jesu le a nungzuite, Sisaria Filippi gam sung khuaneute ah a zin dingin a ding khia uh hi. Lam a pai laitakun a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite in kei kua hi, hong ci uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark8:28 Amaute in, “Pawl khat in, Tuiphumpa Johan hi, hong ci uh hi. Pawl khat in, Elijah hi, hong ci uh a, pawl khat in, kamsang khat peuhpeuh hi ding hi, hong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark8:29 “Tua ahihleh note in kei kua hi, nong ci uh hiam?” ci-in amaute a dot ciangin Peter in, “Nang pen Khris na hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark8:30 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kua mi ka hi cih thu kuama kiangah gen kei un,” ci-in a nungzuite thu a pia hi." 
Mark8:31 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mihing Tapa in tampi tak thuak ding hi; upate, siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in amah nial ding uh hi. Amah kithat dinga, ni thum khit ciangin hingkik ding hi,” ci-in a nungzuite hilh ding a kipan hi." 
Mark8:32 Hih thu a kitel takin amaute kiangah a gen hi. Peter in Jesu paikhiat pihin, “Hih bangin thu gen kei in,” ci-in a taii hi." 
Mark8:33 Ahi zongin Jesu kihei-in a nungzuite a et kawmin Peter lehtaii a, “Satan aw, ka nungah om in. Nang in Pasianʼ ngaihsut bangin thu ngaihsun loin, mihingʼ ngaihsut bangin na ngaihsun hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark8:34 Tua ciangin Jesu in mihonpite le a nungzuite ama kiangah sam a, “Mi khatpeuh ka nungzui a suahnop leh ama deihna bangin gamta nawn loin a singlamteh kisuanin hong zui ding hi." 
Mark8:35 Hih a leitung nuntakna a hu nuamte in a nuntakna bulpi nangawn tawh suplawh dinga, keima hang le lungdamna thu hangin a nuntakna a suplawhte in a nuntakna bulpi hu zo ding hi." 
Mark8:36 Mi khatpeuh in hih leitung khempeuh a ngah hangin a nuntakna bulpi suplawh leh bang phattuamna om ahi hiam? 
Mark8:37 Ama nuntakna bang tawh leikik thei nawn ding ahi hiam? 
Mark8:38 Pasian thei loin a gilo hih mite lakah keima hang le ka thuhilhte hangin maizumin kei hong pulak ngam lo mi peuhmah, a Paʼ minthanna vang le a siangtho vantung mite tawh a minthangin hong paikik ciangin Mihing Tapa zong ama hangin maizumin pulak ngam lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in a thugen zom lai a, “Hih lai-a a om mi pawl khatte a sih ma-in vanglian pi tawh Pasianʼ Ukna hong tung taktak ding ahihna thu phawk un,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:2 Tua zawh ni guk khit ciangin Jesu in Peter, James le Johan-te samin amauteng guak mual tung khat ah a paipih to hi. Amauteʼ muh tangpi mahin Jesu a mel hong kikheel a," 
Mark9:2 Tua zawh ni guk khit ciangin Jesu in Peter, James le Johan-te samin amauteng guak mual tung khat ah a paipih to hi. Amauteʼ muh tangpi mahin Jesu a mel hong kikheel a," 
Mark9:3 leitung a puan sawpte kuamah in a paaksak zawh loh zah dong dingin a puante paakin a tee hi. 
Mark9:4 Tua lai ah Elijah le Moses hong omin, Jesu tawh a kiho a mu uh hi." 
Mark9:5 Peter zong hong pau-in Jesu kiangah, “Sia aw, hih lai-a i om, nuam mahmah hi. Nang ading buk khat, Moses ading buk khat, Elijah ading buk khat kong lamsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:6 Amah le a lawmte nak lau mahmah uh ahih manin a cih ding mel a theih loh man ahi hi. 
Mark9:7 Meii hong kai-in a liim in amaute hong liah a, tua meii sung panin aw khat hong gingin, “Hih pa, ka it ka Tapa ahi hi; ama thu na ngai un,” a hong ci hi." 
Mark9:8 A kiim a pam a khuadak uh leh Jesu sim loh kuamah dang na om nawn lo hi. 
Mark9:9 Mual tung panin a pai suk kawmun Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Sihna panin Mihing Tapa a thawhkik matengin hih na muhte uh kuama kiangah gen kei un,” ci-in a kham hi." 
Mark9:10 Ama cih mah bangin im uh a, ahi zongin, “Sihna panin thokik,” a cih bang a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in a lungsim sung uh ah a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Mark9:11 Tua ciangin Jesu kiangah, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in, Elijah hong pai masa ding, ci uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark9:12 Jesu in, “Na khempeuh a bawl khol dingin Elijah hong pai masa takpi hi. Mihing Tapa in gimna tampi thuakin simmawhna ngah ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in gen hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark9:13 Ahi zongin keʼn kong cih in ah, Elijah hong pai khin takpi a, Lai Siangtho in ama thu a gen sa mah bangin mi pawl khatte in a ututun amah a bawl uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark9:14 Nungzui dangteʼ omna ah a tunkik uh ciangin tua lai ah mi tampi tak na om uh hi. Thukham hilh sia pawl khatte le nungzuite thu na kiseel uh hi. 
Mark9:15 Mihonte in Jesu a muh phetun lamdang sa-in ama kiangah va tai-in a hopih uh hi. 
Mark9:16 Jesu in a nungzui dangte kiangah, “Amaute tawh bang thu kiseel na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark9:17 Mihon lak panin mi khat in hong dawng a, “Sia aw, ka tapa in dawi vei-in pau thei lo ahih manin nangma kiangah kong paipih hi." 
Mark9:18 Dawi in amah a mat simin leilak denna a, a cilphuan bua-in a ha gawi-in kongkawcip hi. Na nungzuite in dawi hong hawl khiatsak nading ka ngen a, ahi zongin hawl khia thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:19 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Upna nei lo mite aw, note bang tanvei hong ompih dinga, bang tanvei hong kikholh pih ding ka hi hiam? A naupang hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:20 Amaute in zong Jesu kiangah a naupang hong paipih uh hi. Dawi in Jesu a muh phetin naupang kongkawsak ahih manin leilak ah pukin kikhuk a, a cilphuan a bua hi." 
Mark9:21 Jesu in, “A nat zawh bang tanvei sawt ta ahi hiam?” ci-in a pa kiangah a dong hi. “A neu tung a kipan ahi hi." 
Mark9:22 A sih nadingin meikhuk sung le tui sungah tam veipi puksak zo hi. Na hih theih leh kote hong hehpih inla hong huh in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark9:23 Jesu in, “Bang hangin na hih theih leh, ci na hi hiam? A umte adingin na khempeuh hi thei hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark9:24 Thakhatin naupangʼ pa kiko a, “Ka um hi; ka upna a kicin nadingin hong huh in,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:25 Mihonte amau kiangah a hong kikhawm dingin a hong taina uh Jesu in a muh ciangin, “A pau thei lo, a bilngong dawi aw, hih naupang sung pan paikhia inla, tumkik ngei nawn kei in,” ci-in a taii hi." 
Mark9:26 A dawi nakpi takin kiko-in naupang a kongkawtsak khit ciangin a tai khia hi. Naupang pen misi tawh kibangin omcip ahih manin mi khempeuh in, “Si ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark9:27 Ahi zongin Jesu in naupang a khutin lenin a phot toh leh a ding hi. 
Mark9:28 Inn sungah Jesu a tum khit ciangin a nungzuite in, “Bang hangin kote in dawi hawl khia thei lo ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dongsim uh hi." 
Mark9:29 “Thungetna sim loh a dang in hih bangte hawl khia thei lo hi,” ci-in Jesu in a dawng hi." 
Mark9:30 Tua lai panin ding khia-in Galilee gam sung nawkin pai uh a, ahi zongin miteʼ theih ding Jesu a ut kei hi." 
Mark9:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nungzuite kiangah thu hilh a, “Mihing Tapa, mihingteʼ khut sungah kipia-in amaute in that ding uh a, ahi zongin ni thum khit ciangin hingkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:32 A nungzuite in hih ama thuhilhna thei lo uh a, ahi zongin amah dong ngam lo uh hi." 
Mark9:33 Tua ciangin Kapernaum khua tung uh a, inn sungah a lut khit uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Lampi ah bang thu kiseel na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark9:34 Kua lian pen ihi hiam, ci-in lampi ah amau khatlekhat kiseel uh ahih manin kuamah in dawng ngam lo uh hi." 
Mark9:35 Tua ciangin Jesu tu a, a kiangah nungzui sawm le nihte samin, “Mi khat peuhpeuh a lian pen a suahnop leh a neu pen suak photin mi khempeuhʼ nasem hi masa ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:36 Tua ciangin Jesu in naupang khat la a, amaute laizang ah paipihin a ang ah tawi a," 
Mark9:37 “Keima hangin hih bang naupang no khat a limbawl mi in kei hong limbawl hi a, kei hong limbawl mi in kei hong limbawl hi loin kei hong sawl pa a limbawl ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:38 Johan in, “Sia aw, nangma min zangin dawi a hawl khia mi khat ka mu uh hi. Amah, eiʼ pawl hi lo ahih manin ka kham uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark9:39 “Amah kham kei un. Keima min zangin nalamdang a bawl mipa in keimah gensiat tawh thuah pah cih om thei lo ding hi. 
Mark9:40 Eite hong langpang lo peuhmah i pawl ahi hi. 
Mark9:41 Khris pawl na hihna hangun tui hai khat hong suah mi peuhmah in thaman ngah hamtang ding ahihna phawk un,” ci-in Jesu in a gen hi." 
Mark9:42 Jesu in, “Mi khatpeuh in kei hong um hih naupang no khat a khialsak ding ahihleh a ngawng ah an gawina suang lianpi khat kikhihin tuipi sungah kikhia leh ama adingin hoih zaw thampek hi." 
Mark9:43 Tua ahih manin na khut in hong khialhsak leh sattan in. Mei a mih ngei lohna hell khuk sungah khut kim tawh na lut sangin khut lang khat bui-in nuntakna sungah lut lecin nang adingin hoih zaw hi. 
Mark9:44 (Tua lai ah thante si ngei lo a, a mei zong mit ngei lo hi.)" 
Mark9:45 Na khe in hong khialhsak leh sattan in. Khe kim nei-in hell sungah hong kikhiat sangin khe lang khat bui-in nuntakna sungah lut lecin nang adingin hoih zaw hi. 
Mark9:46 (Tua lai ah thante si ngei lo a, a mei zong mit ngei lo hi.)" 
Mark9:47 Na mit in hong khialhsak leh khel khia in. Mit kim tawh hell khuk sungah hong kikhiat sangin mit lang khat taw-in Pasianʼ Ukna sungah om lecin nang adingin hoih zaw hi. 
Mark9:48 Tua hell khuk sungah thante si ngei lo a, a mei zong mit ngei lo hi." 
Mark9:49 Bang hang hiam cih leh biakpiakna sa pen ci a kisawh ciangin Pasianʼ san theih a suah bangin ze-etna haksa thuak zawhna in Pasianʼ san theih hong suaksak ding hi. 
Mark9:50 Ci hoih hi; ahi zongin a alna mang leh bangci alsakkik thei ding na hi uh hiam? Note in ci al bangin hoihna nei unla, khatlekhat kilem un,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:1 Tua lai panin Jesu ding khia-in Judea gam le Jordan Gun gal gam tengah a pai hi. Ama kiangah mihon tampi hong kikhawmkik uh a, a hilh ngeisa bangin amaute tungah thu a hilh hi." 
Mark10:1 Tua lai panin Jesu ding khia-in Judea gam le Jordan Gun gal gam tengah a pai hi. Ama kiangah mihon tampi hong kikhawmkik uh a, a hilh ngeisa bangin amaute tungah thu a hilh hi." 
Mark10:2 Farisi mi pawl khat hong pai uh a, amah a mawhsak theih nading uh a deihna-in, “Mi khat in a zi a ma thei ding mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark10:3 Jesu in, “Moses in bang thu hong pia ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in," 
Mark10:4 “Moses in kimakna lai gelhsakin masak thei hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark10:5 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note, hilhzawhin om lo na hih manun Moses in hih ngeina a bawl ahi hi." 
Mark10:6 Ahi zongin piancil lai-in, ‘Pasian in numei le pasal a bawl hi." 
Mark10:7 Tua ahih manin pasal in a nu le a pa nusia-in a zi tawh kigawm dinga," 
Mark10:8 amau nihte pen pum khat bang ahi ding uh hi,’ na kici hi. Tua ahih manin amaute nih hi nawn loin khat hi ta uh hi." 
Mark10:9 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ gawm sa mite, kuamah in khen kei tahen,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:10 Inn sungah a tum khit uh ciangin nungzuite in hih thu tawh kisai Jesu kiangah a dongkik uh hi. 
Mark10:11 Amah in, “A zi ma-a numei dang tawh a teeng mi peuhmah a zi a palhngulh ahi hi." 
Mark10:12 A pasal ma-a pasal dang tawh a teeng mi peuhmah in zong a pasal a palhngulh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:13 Mi pawl khat in a naupangte uh Jesu in a lawnsak ding deih uh ahih manin hong paipih uh a, ahi zongin a nungzuite in na kham uh hi." 
Mark10:14 Jesu in tua thu a phawk ciangin a heh suak a, a nungzuite kiangah, “Naupangte kham kei unla, ka kiangah hong paisak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Ukna sungah hih bang mite a om ahi hi." 
Mark10:15 Hih naupang no khatʼ man bangin Pasianʼ Ukna a mang lo mi peuhmah Pasianʼ Ukna sungah om lo ding ahihna thei un,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:16 Tua ciangin naupangnote la-in a ang ah tawi a, a tung uh ah a khut nga-in thupha a pia hi." 
Mark10:17 Jesu in a khualzinna a zom dingin a paikhiat ding laitakin mi khat hong tai-in a mai ah hong khukdin a, “A dik siapa aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngah nadingin bang hih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark10:18 Jesu in, “Bang hangin kei midik hong ci na hi hiam? Pasian sim loh kuamah a dik tat zo om lo hi." 
Mark10:19 Mi that kei in; numei tungah mawh kei in; miʼ neihsa gu kei in; mi khem kei in; na nu na pa zahtak in, cihna thukhamte thei lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark10:20 Amah in, “Sia aw, ka neu tung a kipanin hih thukhamte khempeuh ka zui khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in itna tawh tua mipa enin, “Na khat bek na kisam lai hi. Pai inla, na neih khempeuh na zuak khit ciangin mizawngte tungah na sum khotte va pia in. Tua hileh vantungah sum na hau ding hi. Tua khit ciangin ka nung hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:22 Tua mipa mihau khat ahih manin hih thu a zak ciangin, mai khingin a dah sa-in a paikhia hi." 
Mark10:23 Jesu in a kiim a om a nungzuite enin amaute kiangah, “Pasianʼ Ukna sungah mihaute a lut ding uh bangzah takin haksa ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark10:24 Nungzuite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lamdang sa uh a, ahi zongin Jesu in a thugen zomlai-in, “Tate aw, Pasianʼ Ukna sungah lut ding bangzah takin haksa ahi hiam?" 
Mark10:25 Pasianʼ ukna sungah mihau khat a lut ding sangin phim bilvang sungah kalaoh khat a lut ding baih zaw lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:26 Tua ciangin amaute in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Tua bang hileh kua in hotkhiatna ngah zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:27 Jesu in amaute enin, “Mihingte adingin hi zo lo mah hi; ahi zongin Pasian adingin ahi mawh thu hi lo hi; Pasian adingin na khempeuh hi thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:28 Tua ciangin Peter in ama kiangah, “Ko zong na khempeuh nusia-in nang kong zui uh hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin" 
Mark10:29 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Hi mah hi; keʼn kong cih in ah, keima hang le lungdamna thu hangin a inn, a sanggam pasalte, a sanggam numeite, a nu, a pa, a tate le a leitang, khat peuhmah a nusiate in" 
Mark10:30 tu khang hunin a zah za khat innte, sanggam pasalte, sanggam numeite, nute, tate, leitangte ngah ding uh a, bawlsiatna zong ngah ding uh hi. Hong tung ding hunah zong nuntak tawntungna ngah lai ding uh hi." 
Mark10:31 Ahi zongin tu hun laitakin a lian ahi mi tampite tua hun ciangin a neu hi ding uh a, tu hun laitakin a neu ahi mi tampite a lian hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:32 Jerusalem khua manawhin a pai toh laitakun a nungzuite mai ah Jesu na ma pai hi. A nungzuite patau uh a, amaute a zui mihonpite zong a lau uh hi. Jesu in nungzui sawm le nihte tuam sapkik leuleu a, ama tunga piang ding thute genin," 
Mark10:33 “Na ngai un. Tu-in Jerusalem khua ah a pai to ding ihi hi; tua lai mun panin siampi liante le Thukham hilh siateʼ khut sungah Mihing Tapa kipia ding hi. Amaute in a sih nadingin thu a khen khit uh ciangin Gentail miteʼ khut sungah a ap ding uh hi. 
Mark10:34 Tua mite in amah simmawh bawlin, cilphihin, satin a that ding uh hi. Ni thum khit ciangin amah thokik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:35 Tua laitakin Zebediʼ tapa James le Johan in Jesu hong naih uh a, “Kong nget peuhpeuh uh nong vaihawmsak ding ka deih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:35 Tua laitakin Zebediʼ tapa James le Johan in Jesu hong naih uh a, “Kong nget peuhpeuh uh nong vaihawmsak ding ka deih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:36 Jesu in, “Bang kong vaihawmsak ding deih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Mark10:37 amaute in, “Minthangin kumpi tokhom tungah na tut ciangin na tak lamah khat, na veilamah khat hong tusak lecin ka ut uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:38 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Note in na hong nget uh na thei kei uh hi. Keimah in ka thuak ding gimna note in thuak zo dinga, ka kiphum nading gimna ah kiphum zo ding na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Mark10:39 amaute in, “Ka hi zo ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in gimna ka thuak ding mah bangin na thuak takpi ding uh a, ka thuak ding kiphumna zong na thuak takpi ding uh hi." 
Mark10:40 Ahi zongin ka taklam a tut ding le ka veilam a tut ding pen keiʼ hong piak theih hi lo a, a tu dingin Pasian in a vaihawmsak sate ading ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:41 Hih a kihona uh thu, nungzui dang sawmte in a zak uh ciangin James le Johan tungah a heh suak uh hi." 
Mark10:41 Hih a kihona uh thu, nungzui dang sawmte in a zak uh ciangin James le Johan tungah a heh suak uh hi." 
Mark10:42 Ahi zongin Jesu in amaute samin, “Leitung mi a ukte in mite tungah aana nei-in, mi a makaite in thuneihna tawh a ukna thu na thei uh hi." 
Mark10:43 Ahi zongin note lakah tua bangin hi lo ding hi. Note lakah a lian nuam khat peuhpeuh, a dangte khempeuhʼ nasem hi dinga," 
Mark10:44 a makai ahi nuam khat peuhpeuh, a dangte khempeuhʼ sila hi ding hi." 
Mark10:45 Bang hang hiam cih leh Mihing Tapa zong, midangte ama na a semsak dingin a hong pai hi lo hi. Midangteʼ na a sem ding le mi tampi a tatkhiat nading ama nuntakna a pia dingin a hong pai ahi zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:46 Tua ciangin Jerikho khua a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin a nungzuite le mihonpite tawh a paikhiat laitakun, Timiasʼ tapa a mittaw khut dawhin a ngen Bartimias, lampi gei ah na tu hi." 
Mark10:47 Nazareth khuami Jesu ahihna thu a theih ciangin nakpi takin awng a, “Davidʼ suan Jesu aw, kei hong hehpih in,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:48 A kiim a om mihonte in amah taii-in, a pau loh nadingin a kham uh hi. Ahi zongin amah nakpi takin awng zaw semsem a, “Davidʼ suan aw, kei hong hehpih in,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:49 Tua ciangin Jesu khawlin a nungzuite kiangah, “Va sam un,” a ci hi. Amaute in mittaw pa samin ama kiangah, “Na lung nuamsak in; ding in; amah in nang a hong sam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark10:50 Amah in zong a puan lawn khia a, ding to pahin Jesu kiangah a pai hi." 
Mark10:51 Jesu in, “Bang kong hihsak ding deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin mittaw pa in, “Sia aw, khua ka mukik thei nuam hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark10:52 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Na ciah thei ta ding hi; na upna in nang hong damsak zo hi,” a cih khit phetin amah in khua mukik thei pah a, tua a paina lampi ah Jesuʼ nung a zui hi." 
Mark11:1 Jerusalem khuanai, Bethfage le Bethany khuaneute a omna Oliv Mual a tun uh ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite nih ma sawl a," 
Mark11:2 “Mai-a om khua ah va pai un. Khua na tun phetun, kuamah a tuan ngei nai lohna la no khat khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. Hong sut unla hong kai un." 
Mark11:3 Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Bang hangin tua la khau sut na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi; hih lai mahah kong kaikik pah ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
Mark11:4 Amau tegel zong pai pah uh a, kongzing a kong gei khat ah la no a kikhih khat mu uh ahih manin a khau a sut pah uh hi." 
Mark11:5 Tua kiim a om mite in, “Bang hangin tua la no khau sut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
Mark11:6 Jesuʼ vaikhak thu teng gen uh a, bangmah cih nawn lo uh hi." 
Mark11:7 Jesu kiangah a la no tunpih uh a, a la no tungah a puan uh phahin a tungah Jesu a tuang hi." 
Mark11:8 Mi tampite in ama pai nading lampi ah a puan uh na phah uh a, mi pawl khat in lo lai panin a sat uh sawlpangte na phah uh hi." 
Mark11:9 Jesuʼ mai-a a pai mite le a nung a a zui mite in, “Pasian phat un! Topaʼ tangin a hong pai mipa, Pasian in thupha pia tahen!" 
Mark11:10 A hong tung ding i pu Davidʼ ukna, Pasian in thupha pia tahen! Pasian phat un!” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Mark11:11 Tua bangin Jerusalem khua sungah Jesu lut a, biakinn sungah pai-in na khempeuh a en kawikawi hi. Tua ciangin ni niam khinta ahih manin sawm le nihte tawh Bethany khua ah a pai hi." 
Mark11:12 A zing ciangin Bethany khua pan paikhia uh a, Jesu a gil a kial hi." 
Mark11:13 A teh a no theikung khat gal muh ahih manin a gah khak leh ci-in a lo dingin a va pai hi. Thei min hun hi lo ahih manin, a phung a tun ciangin a teh sim loh bangmah na om lo hi." 
Mark11:14 Tua ciangin theikung kiangah, “Nang tung panin kuamah in theigah loin ne nawn kei tahen,” a ci hi. Hih thu, a nungzuite in a za uh hi." 
Mark11:15 Jerusalem khua a tun uh ciangin, biakinn huang sungah Jesu lutin tua sungah sumzuak sumlei a a omte hawlkhiat ding kipan a, sumkhekteʼ sabuaite lumlet sakin, vakhu zuakteʼ tutphahte sawn paihsak hi." 
Mark11:16 Biakinn huang sungah kuamah bangmah paipihsak lo hi. 
Mark11:17 Tua ciangin mite kiangah thu hilh a, “Ka inn pen mi khempeuh adingin thungetna inn kici ding hi,” ci-in Pasian in a genna thu Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi lo ahi hiam? Ahi zongin note in guta buluhteʼ bukna mun na suaksak uh hi, ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Mark11:18 Siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Jesu a thah theih nading uh lampi a zong uh hi. Ahi zongin mihonpi in ama thuhilhna lamdang sa uh ahih manin amaute in Jesu a kihta uh hi. 
Mark11:19 A nitak ciangin khuapi panin Jesu le a nungzuite a paikhia uh hi. 
Mark11:20 A zingsang ciangin tua lampi mah zui-in a paikik ciangun tua theikung a zung dongin a sihna a mu uh hi. 
Mark11:21 Peter in a thu phawk ahih manin, “Sia aw, na theikung samsiat a sita hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark11:22 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Upna nei un." 
Mark11:23 Upna na neih nak uh leh hih mual kiangah, ‘Na omna panin pai khia-in tuipi sung kidenna in,’ ci le-uhcin, na lungsim sung uh ah uplahna om loin na gen bangun piang taktak ding hi, ci-in na up nak uh leh, na cih bangun hong piang ding hi." 
Mark11:24 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong genin ah: Na khat peuhpeuh na nget uh ciangin ngah ding ci-in um un; tua hileh na nget peuhpeuh uh na ngah ding uh hi. 
Mark11:25 Thungen dingin na din uh ciangin midang tungah na hehna uh a om khat peuhpeuh maisak un; tua hileh vantungah a om na Pa un noteʼ mawhna hong maisak ding hi. 
Mark11:26 (Midangteʼ mawhna na maisak kei uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un noteʼ mawhna zong hong maisak lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.)" 
Mark11:27 Tua ciangin Jerusalem tungkik leuleu uh hi. Biakinn kiimah Jesu a vak kawikawi laitakin siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate le upate hong pai uh a," 
Mark11:28 “Hih nate, kuaʼ thu tawh bawl a, na bawl nadingin kua in aana hong pia ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Mark11:29 Jesu in, “Keimah in note tungah thu khat kong dong masa ding hi; nong dawn uh leh kei zong kua thu tawh ka bawl, cih kong gen ding hi." 
Mark11:30 Johan in tui a phum theih nading thu Pasian kiang panin a ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihingte tung panin a ngah ahi hiam, hong gen un,” a ci hi." 
Mark11:31 Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Pasian kiang pan hi,” ci lehang, “Tua ahihleh bang hangin Johanʼ thu um lo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci dinga," 
Mark11:32 “Mihingteʼ tung pan hi,” cih ding lah, mi khempeuh in Johan pen kamsang taktakin ngaihsun uh ahih manin mite i kihta zel hi, a ci uh hi." 
Mark11:33 Tua ahih ciangin, “Ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Jesu in zong, “Hih nate kua thu tawh ka bawl cih thu kei zong kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna zangin thu hilh a, “Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, a kimkot umin leenggah cil nading bawl a, a hon nading tausang khat a lam khit ciangin, lo khawhlawhte khawhlawhsak a, amah gam dangah a pai hi." 
Mark12:2 Leenggah lawh hun a tun ciangin ama ngah ding taang teng a la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte khat a paisak hi. 
Mark12:3 Lo khawhlawhte in tua a nasem pa manin sat gawp uh a, a guak ciahsakkik uh hi." 
Mark12:4 Tua ciangin lo nei pa in a nasem dang khat a sawl hi. Amaute in tua pa a lutang na liamsak gawp uh a, a na simmawh bawl uh hi." 
Mark12:5 Tua ciangin a dang khat sawl leuleu a, a na that uh hi. Tua bangin a dang tampi sawl a, pawl khat na sat gawp uh a, pawl khat na that uh hi." 
Mark12:6 Tua ciangin a sawl theih ding a it mahmah a tapa khat bek om lai ahih manin, ‘Amaute in ka tapa na zahtak bawl ding uh hi,’ ci-in a nunung penin a sawl hi." 
Mark12:7 Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in, ‘Hih pa pen a gamhluah ding pa ahi hi. Pai un; amah va that huan ni; tua hileh hih ama luah ding gamh eima aʼ suak ding hi,’ a kici uh hi." 
Mark12:8 Tua ahih manin amah manin that uh a, lo nawl ah a pai uh hi." 
Mark12:9 “Tua ahihleh lo nei pa in bangci bawl ding ahi hiam? Amah hong pai-in lo khawhlawhte that dinga, a lo, midangte a khawhlawhsak ding hi." 
Mark12:10 ‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi. 
Mark12:11 Hih thu Topaʼ bawl hi a, i muh ciangin lamdang i sa hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark12:12 Hih thu gentehna pen amaute a cihnopna a a gen ahih lam Jew makaite in thei uh ahih manin Jesu a kimat theih nading a hanciam uh hi. Ahi zongin mihonpite kihta uh ahih manin Jesu bangmah cih loin a paisan uh hi. 
Mark12:13 Tua ciangin Jesu ama kampauna tawh a kimat theih nadingin Farisi mi pawl khat le Herod mi pawl khat Jesu kiangah thu dong dingin hong kisawl hi. 
Mark12:14 Amaute in, “Sia aw, nangmah in thutang genin, midangteʼ pau ding phamawh na sak lohna, ulianteʼ maitang zahtak tuan loin, Pasian in mite a gamtat dingin a deihna thute tangtakin na hilhna ka thei uh hi. Tua ahih manin Rom Kumpipa Sisar tungah siah i piak ding kilawm ahi hiam, kilawm lo ahi hiam?" 
Mark12:15 Pia ding ihi hiam, pia lo ding ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Ahi zongin Jesu in amau lungsim tawng thei ahih manin, “Bang hangin kei hong thangsiah se na hi uh hiam? Ka et dingin dangka peek khat hong la dih un,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:16 Amaute in zong dangka peek khat hong paipih uh a, tua ciangin Jesu in, “Hih dangka tunga om kuaʼ lim hi a, kuaʼ min ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Rom Kumpipa Sisarʼ lim le a min ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Mark12:17 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tua ahihleh, Sisarʼ neihsate Sisarʼ tungah pia unla, Pasianʼ neihsate Pasianʼ tungah pia un,” a ci hi. Tua ama thudawnna hangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Mark12:18 Tua ciangin, thawhkikna om lo hi, a ci Saddusi mi pawl khat hong pai leuleu uh a," 
Mark12:19 “Sia aw, ‘Mi khat in ta nei loin a zi a sihsan leh tua a si mipaʼ khang a kizop theih nadingin a naupa in tua meigongnu teenpih ding hi,’ ci-in Moses in eite adingin ngeina a koih hi." 
Mark12:20 Khat vei, unau pasal sagih om uh hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta nei loin a si hi." 
Mark12:21 A nau in a upaʼ zi luah hi; amah zong ta nei loin si leuleu hi. A thumna pa," 
Mark12:22 le a dangte khempeuh, a sagihna dong in tua nu teenpih uh a, ta nei lo vive mahin a si uh hi. A tawpna ciangin tua numei zong a si hi." 
Mark12:23 Tua ahihleh, hih unau pasal sagihte in hih nu teenpih kim ciat uh ahih manin, mi khempeuh a thawhkik ni ciangin a kua penʼ zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark12:24 Jesu in, “Na khial mahmah uh hi. Lai Siangtho ahi a, Pasianʼ vangliatna ahi zongin na theih lohna hang uh ahi hi." 
Mark12:25 Sihna panin mite a thawhkik ciangin vantungah a om vantung mite mah bangin zi nei pasal nei cih om lo ding uh hi. 
Mark12:26 Thawhkikna thu tawh kisai-in ci lehang, Mosesʼ laigelhna sung sawlpang kuang thu a genna munah Pasian in Moses kiangah, ‘Kei pen Abrahamʼ Pasian, Isaacʼ Pasian, Jakobʼ Pasian ka hi hi,’ a cihna mun sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark12:27 Tua bang a cih ciangin Pasian pen misiteʼ Pasian hi loin mihingteʼ Pasian hi, a ci nuam ahi hi. Tua ahih manin na ngaihsun khial mahmah uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark12:28 Tua thu kidotna a za Thukham hilh siate khat in, Saddusi miteʼ dotnate limtakin Jesu in a dawn theihna a muh ciangin Jesu hong neh a, “Thukham khempeuh lakah bang thukham a lian pen ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark12:29 Jesu in, “Thukham a lian pen in: Israel mite aw, ngai un: I Topa Pasian bek mah Topa ahi hi." 
Mark12:30 Na Topa Pasian uh, na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh, na pilna khempeuh le na thahatna khempeuh uh tawh na it un, a cihna ahi hi." 
Mark12:31 A nihna in: Nangma pumpi na it bangin na veengte na it in, cihna ahi hi. Hih tegel sangin thukham a lian zaw a dang om nawn lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark12:32 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siapa in, “Sia aw, na gen mah bangin hi ka sa mahmah hi. Topa bek mah Pasian hi a, amah sim loh pasian dang kuamah om lo hi." 
Mark12:33 Mite in a lungsim khempeuh, a pilna khempeuh le a hatna khempeuh uh tawh Pasian itin, amau pumpi a it bangin a veengte a it ding uh ahi hi. Pasian biak nadingin biakna tau tunga gan gawhnate le biakna dang khempeuh sangin hih thukham nihte zuih ding thupi zaw takpi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:34 Jesu in hih mipaʼ thugenzia hoih sa ahih manin, “Pasianʼ Ukna sungah a om dektak mahmah na hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua khit a kipanin Jesu kiangah kuamah in thu dong ngam nawn lo uh hi." 
Mark12:35 Jesu in biakinn sungah thu a hilh laitakin, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in Khris pen Davidʼ suan hi lel hi, ci thei uh ahi hiam?" 
Mark12:36 Kha Siangthoʼ sawlna tawh David mahmah in thu gen a, ‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen hi: Na galte, na khe nuai ah ka koih matengin, ka tak lamah na tu in,’ ci hi." 
Mark12:37 David mahmah in Khris pen ‘Topa,’ ci hi. Tua ahihleh Khris pen Davidʼ suan hi lel, cih mawkmawk ding hi thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Mihonte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Mark12:38 Jesu in a thuhilhna ah, “Thukham hilh sia pawl khatte na bat khak loh nadingun na kidawm un. Amaute in puan tualpi silh nuam uh a, mite lakah mite in a zahtak hopih ding a deih uh hi." 
Mark12:39 Kikhopna inn sungah, uliante adingin a kikoihcing tutphah nuamte tungah tu nuam uh a, pawi sungah zong ulianteʼ tutna mun hoihte bekah a tu nuam uh hi." 
Mark12:40 Meigong numeite tungah nuamtak sa-in a neihsate laksakin zang mang uh a, mite in mihoih a sak theih nading uh a deihna hangun thu sau pipi a ngen uh hi. Amauʼ kineihkhemna tawh kizui-in a gimthuak ding uh lian zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark12:41 Biakinn sumpi khiatna kuang gei ah Jesu tu a, mihonte in sumpi a khiat laitakun a en hi. A haute in tam pipi hong khia uh hi." 
Mark12:42 A zawng meigong numei khat zong hong pai a, sumnen tang nih hong khia hi." 
Mark12:43 Tua ciangin a nungzuite sam a, “A dangte khempeuh sangin hih mizawng meigongnu in tam khia zaw hi." 
Mark12:44 Bang hang hiam cih leh a dangte in a neih val a lam val sung panun a khia uh ahi hi; ahi zongin amah zawng mahmah napi-in ama kivak nading nangawn siit loin a neih khempeuh a khia khin ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark13:1 Biakinn panin Jesu a pusuah laitakin a nungzuite khat in, “Sia aw, hih biakinnte bangzah takin lian a, a suangte bangzah takin gol ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark13:2 Jesu in, “Hih innte lian sa-in thupi na sa mahmah hi. Ahi zongin hih innte lamna-a a kiciang suangte nih bek nangawn a kithuapna a om lo zah dongin a kiphel kek gawp hun hong tung ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark13:3 Biakinn gal khat ah a om Oliv Mual tungah Jesu tu-in a om laitakin Peter, James, Johan le Andru hong pai-in amauteng guak a om laitakin," 
Mark13:3 Biakinn gal khat ah a om Oliv Mual tungah Jesu tu-in a om laitakin Peter, James, Johan le Andru hong pai-in amauteng guak a om laitakin," 
Mark13:4 “Hih na thugen cik ciangin hong tung dinga, hih na thugente khempeuh hong tun ding ciangin bang lim hong om ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark13:5 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Kuamah in hong khem zawh loh nadingin na kidawm un." 
Mark13:6 Keima min pua-in mi tampi hong pai ding uh a, ‘Keimah, Khris ka hi hi,’ ci-in mi tampi a khem zo ding uh hi." 
Mark13:7 A gamla a gal kidona thute le a nai-a gal kidona huging na zak uh ciangin patau kei un. Tuate a piang ding mah hi a, hun beina ding hi nai lo hi." 
Mark13:8 Minam khat le minam khat, kumpi khat le kumpi khat kido ding uh hi. Mun tuamtuam ah zin hong liing dinga, kial zong hong tung ding hi. Hihte khempeuh pen gimna kipatna hi pan hi." 
Mark13:9 “Limtakin kidawm un. Note hong kimanin thukhen zumah hong kipaipih dinga, kikhopna inn sungah zong hong kisat ding hi. Ukpite le kumpite mai ah keima thu gen nading hun na ngah ding uh hi." 
Mark13:10 Ahi zongin hun beina a tun ma-in mi khempeuh tungah Lungdamna Thu kihilh masa phot ding hi. 
Mark13:11 Note hong kimanin, thusitna a thuak dingin thukhen zumah hong kipaipih ciangin bang gen ding ihi hiam, ci-in ma lunghihmawh kei un. A thugen ding pen note hi loin Kha Siangtho ahih manin a hun tak ciangin na gen dingun a hong kisawl peuhpeuh na gen un." 
Mark13:12 Unau khatlekhat a sih nadingun kikhia ding uh a, pa in a ta khia-in, ta in a nu le a pate khia-in a thatsak ding uh hi." 
Mark13:13 Keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh a, ahi zongin a sih dongun a thuak zote in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Mark13:14 “Ama om loh nading pi ah a lipkhaphuai zehphitna a hong om na muh uh ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuʼ cihnopna thei ta un!) Judea gam a om mite mual tungah tai un. 
Mark13:14 “Ama om loh nading pi ah a lipkhaphuai zehphitna a hong om na muh uh ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuʼ cihnopna thei ta un!) Judea gam a om mite mual tungah tai un. 
Mark13:15 A innkhum zang ah a om laitak ahi khate zong, a kum suk ciangin a neihsate a taipih dingin a la dingin a inn sungah lut nawn kei hen." 
Mark13:16 Lo lai ah a om laitak ahi khate zong, a puan la dingin a inn uh zuan nawn kei hen." 
Mark13:17 Tua laitakin nupi naupaiite le naungek neite adingin haksa mahmah ding hi. 
Mark13:18 Phalbi laitakin hih thu hong pian khak loh nadingin thu na ngen un. 
Mark13:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in leitung a piansak cil a kipanin tu hun dong, cikmahin tua bang haksatna a omngei lo, nidang ciangin zong a omngei nawn lo ding, tua hun laitakin hong tung ding hi." 
Mark13:20 Topa in tua gimna hun a ni khiam lo hileh a suakta zo kuamah om lo ding hi. Ahi zongin ama teel mite a khualna-in a ni a khiam hi. 
Mark13:21 “Tua laitakin mi khatpeuh in, ‘Hih lai ah Khris om hi; hua lai ah Khris om hi,’ ci-in hong gen leh, um kei un."
