Mark13:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris kineihkhemte le kamsang kineihkhemte hong piang dinga, ahih zawh leh a teel sa mite nangawn a khem nadingun lim le nalamdangte hong bawl ding uh hi." 
Mark13:23 Tua ahih manin kidawm un! A hun ma-in kong gen khin hi. 
Mark13:24 “Tua haksatna hun khit ciangin ni hong mial dinga, kha hong taang nawn lo ding hi." 
Mark13:25 Van panin aksite hong kia dinga, vantung a om nate a omngei bangin om thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Mark13:26 Tua ciangin Mihing Tapa, vangliatna le minthanna tawh meii lakah a hong pai suk kimu ding hi." 
Mark13:27 Tua ciangin leitung mun khempeuh ah vantung mite sawl dinga, leimong khat pan mong khat kikalah a om a teel mite khempeuh a kaikhawmsak ding hi." 
Mark13:28 Theikung tung pan a thupiang panin thu thei un. A hiangte hong meeng a, a teh hong no ciangin khuakhal hun hong nai ta ding hi, ci-in na thei un." 
Mark13:29 Tua mah bangin hih thute hong tun ciangin amah hong nai ta a, hong tung dektak hi, ci-in na thei un." 
Mark13:30 Hih thu limtakin phawk un. Tu laitakin a nungta mi khempeuh a sih khit ma-in hih thute hong tung ding hi. 
Mark13:31 Vanlelei mangthang dinga, ahi zongin ka thugente mangthang ngei lo ding hi." 
Mark13:32 “Ahi zongin tua ni le tua nai hun ding kuamah in thei lo hi. Vantung a om vantung mite ahi a, Tapa ahi keimah in ahi zongin ka thei kei a, ka Pa bek in a thei hi." 
Mark13:33 Tua hun ding thei lo na hih manun kikemin pilvang un. 
Mark13:34 Mi khat khualzin dingin paikhia a, a dinkhiat ding ciangin amauʼ sep ding ciat a nasemte tungah tavuan pia a, kongcing pa in limtakin a cin ding a sawl mipa tawh kibang hi." 
Mark13:35 Inn nei pa, nitak ahi a, zankim ahi a, zingsang ak khuan kuan ahi a, zingsang khuavak khit ahi zongin a bang hunin hong tung ding cih thei lo na hih manun ngakin na pilvang un." 
Mark13:36 Tua hikeileh amah thakhatin hong tungin na ihmut laitakun hong tuak kha ding hi. 
Mark13:37 Note tungah kong gen mah bangin mi khempeuh tungah zong, ‘Ngakin na pilvang un,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:1 Paisan Pawi le Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi a tun ma ni nih ni-in siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in Jesu simmatin a thah theih nading uh lampi a zong uh hi. 
Mark14:2 Ahi zongin, “Mihonpite hong buai kha ding ahih manin hih pawi hun sungin hih kei ni,” a ci uh hi." 
Mark14:3 Bethany khua ah, miphak ahi ngei Simonʼ inn ah Jesu in an a nek laitakin, numei khat in a manpha mahmah nard paknamtui citak suangngo thawl dimin a om khat hong tawi a, a suangngo thawl sukhamin Jesuʼ lu tungah a paknamtui a sung suk hi." 
Mark14:4 Tua lai-a om mi pawl khat a heh suak a, “Bang hangin hih paknamtui mawk beisak ahi hiam?" 
Mark14:5 Kizuak le ngun peek za thum val kikhawng dinga, a sum mizawngte tungah kipia thei ding hi,” ci-in nakpi takin tua numei a mawhsak uh hi." 
Mark14:6 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Bangmah cih se kei un! Bang hangin nawngkaisak na hi uh hiam? Amah pen a kilawm a hoihin kei tungah hong gamta hi." 
Mark14:7 Mizawngte ahihleh note tawh om khawm tawntung dinga, na huhnop hun peuhpeuhun na huh thei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kei pen note tawh kong om khawm tawntung kei ding hi." 
Mark14:8 Amah in ka luang a kivui nadingin paknamtui a hong ma nuh khol hi a, a hih theih zahzah ciang a hih khinta ahi hi." 
Mark14:9 Hih thu limtakin phawk un! Lungdamna thu a kihilhna leitung mun khempeuh ah hih nuʼ thu kiphawkin kei tungah hong sepnate kigengen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:10 Tua laitakin sawm le nihte sung pan Iskariotʼ tapa Judas in amaute tungah Jesu a piak theih nadingin siampi liante kiangah a va pai hi. 
Mark14:11 Siampi liante in a thu a zak uh ciangin lungdam mahmah uh a, sum tawh kong guai ding uh hi, ci-in thu a ciam uh hi. Tua ahih manin Judas in Jesu a lehhek theih nading a hunhoih a zong hi." 
Mark14:12 Paisan Pawi an dingin tuuno a kigawh ni, Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi ni masa ni-in a nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Koi lai ah pai-in Paisan Pawi an ding hong bawlsak ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Mark14:13 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite nih sawlin amaute kiangah, “Jerusalem khua sungah va pai le-uhcin, tuibeel a pua mi khat na mu ding uh hi. Amah zui unla," 
Mark14:14 ama tumna innteek pa kiangah, ‘Siapa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi an ka nek nading uh zintun nading inn dei koi lai ahi hiam, ci hi,’ va ci un." 
Mark14:15 Amah in a baih sa-in a na kikoih sa inn dei tungnung a zai khat hong lak ding hi. Tua lai ah na bawl un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:16 Nungzui tegel zong khua sungah va pai uh a, Jesuʼ gen bangin a va mu uh hi. Tua lai ah Paisan Pawi an ding a bawl uh hi." 
Mark14:17 A nitak ciangin a nungzui sawm le nihte tawh tua munah Jesu a om hi. 
Mark14:18 An a nek laitakun Jesu in, “Tu laitakin kei tawh an a nekhawm mi khat in kei hong lehhek ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:19 A nungzuite in lamdang sa uh a, a banbanin, “Kei nong cihna hi kei buangin teh,” a ci ciat uh hi." 
Mark14:20 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “No sawm le nihte sung, kei tawh ankuang a sawk khawmte mah sung pan ahi hi." 
Mark14:21 A kigelh sa mah bangin Mihing Tapa ahihleh si dinga, ahi zongin a lehhek paʼ thuakna nasia mahmah ding hi. Tua mipa a piang ngei het lo hileh ama adingin hoih zaw tham ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:22 Tua bangin an a nek laitakun Jesu in anlum la-in lungdamna a koh khit ciangin balnenin a nungzuite tungah pia a, “Ne un; hih pen keima pumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:23 Tua ciangin hai la a, lungdamna a koh khit ciangin a nungzuite tungah pia a, tua hai panin a dawn kim uh hi." 
Mark14:24 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Hih pen mi tampite adingin a luang, thuciamna thak a kipsak keima sisan ahi hi." 
Mark14:25 Pasianʼ Ukna sungah leenggahzu thak ka dawnkik ni matengin leenggahzu a dawn nawn lo ding ka hihna thu limtakin thei un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:26 Amaute in la khat a sak khit uh ciangin Oliv Mual ah a pai uh hi. 
Mark14:27 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “‘Tuucingpa ka sat lum dinga, tuute a kithehthang ding hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin note in kei nong taisan ding uh hi." 
Mark14:28 Ahi zongin hong kithawhkiksak khit ciangin Galilee gam note mai ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:29 Tua ciangin Peter in, “A dang khempeuh in nang hong taisan ahi zongin keʼn kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:30 Jesu in, “Tu zan mahmah in ak nih vei a khuan ma-in thum vei tak kei na hong nial ding lamtak phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:31 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Nang tawh sih khawm nading ciang dong ahi zongin kong nial ngei het kei ding hi,” ci-in khauh takin a gen hi. Tua mah bangin a vekpi-un a ci kim uh hi." 
Mark14:32 Tua lai panin Gethsemane a kici munah pai-in a tun uh ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Thu ka va nget hun sungteng hih lai ah na om un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:33 Tua ciangin Peter, James le Johan-te paipih lai a, nakpi takin lungkhamin a dahna hong kipan hi." 
Mark14:33 Tua ciangin Peter, James le Johan-te paipih lai a, nakpi takin lungkhamin a dahna hong kipan hi." 
Mark14:34 Amah in, “Ka lungsim dahna lian lua mahmah ahih manin ka si dektak hi. Hih lai ah om unla na ngak un,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:35 Amah tawm khat pai lai-in leilak ah bok suk a, ahi thei ding ahihleh hih thuakna hun tawh a kipelh nadingin thu a ngen hi." 
Mark14:36 “Pa aw, na khempeuh na hih thei hi. Hih ka thuak ding gimna tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahi zongin keiʼ deihna bang hi loin nangma deihna bang hizaw hen,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:37 Tua ciangin hong pai a, a nungzui thumte ihmu-in om a muh ciangin Peter kiangah, “Simon aw, ihmu na hi uh hiam? Nai khat sung nangawn hong ngak zo lo liang na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Mark14:38 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ze-etna ah na puk khak loh nadingun pilvangin thu ngen un. Lungsim in ze-etna nang nuam napi, pumpi in nang zo lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:39 Tua ciangin paikhia leuleu-in thu a nget ngei teng mah va ngen leuleu hi. 
Mark14:40 Hong paikik ciangin a nungzuite na ihmu leuleu uh hi. A ihmut uh suak mahmah hi. Jesu kiangah a gen ding uh bangmah thei lo uh hi. 
Mark14:41 A thum veina a hong ciahkik ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ihmu-in na tawlnga hithiat lailai na hi uh hiam? Pha zo hi. A hun hong tung ta hi. Mihing Tapa mawhnei miteʼ khut sungah hong kipia khinta hi." 
Mark14:42 Tho un; pai ta ni. Kei hong lehhek pa hih lai ah hong tung ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:43 Tua bangin Jesu in thu a gen laitakin sawm le nihte sung panin Judas hong tung a, siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate le upate in a sawl mihonte in namsau le molhtum tawi-in hong zui uh hi." 
Mark14:44 A lehhek pa in mihonte tungah, “Ka nap pa pen Jesu hi ding hi. Tua pa man unla limtakin cingin paikhiatpih un,” ci-in a gen khol hi." 
Mark14:45 Tua ahih manin hong tun phetin Jesu kiangah pai pah a, “Sia aw,” ci-in limnap mahmah hi." 
Mark14:46 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jesu manin limtakin a lencip uh hi. 
Mark14:47 Tua laitakin a gei-a dingte khat in a namsau dokin siampi lianpen paʼ nasem pa a sat leh a bil a sat khiatsak hi. 
Mark14:48 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Guta buluhte a man ding bang keekin, kei a man dingin namsau le molhtum tawh hong kuan na hi uh hiam?" 
Mark14:49 Nisim nisimin biakinn sungah thuhilhin note tawh ka om khawm a, ahi zongin nong man kei uh hi. Ahi zongin hih thu pen Lai Siangtho sunga a kigelh thu a tun nading ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:50 Tua ciangin a nungzuite khempeuh in Jesu a taisan uh hi. 
Mark14:51 Puanza kang khat bek a silh tangval khat in zong Jesu a zui hi. Amaute pawl khat in amah a mat ciangin," 
Mark14:52 a puanza kang nusia-in a guaktangin a tai hi. 
Mark14:53 Mihonte in siampi lianpen paʼ inn ah Jesu paipih uh a, siampi liante, upate le Thukham hilh siate hong kikhawm uh hi." 
Mark14:54 Peter in zong Jesuʼ nung gal zuih a, siampi lianpen paʼ inntual ciangah a om hi. Tua lai ah palikte tawh mei awi-in a tukhawm hi." 
Mark14:55 Siampi liante a kipan uliante khempeuh in Jesu a thah theih nadingin thu zong uh a, ahi zongin bangmah mu lo uh hi." 
Mark14:56 Mi tampi in amah a mawhsak nadingun zuau thu gen uh a, ahi zongin a genna uh khatlekhat kituak lo hi." 
Mark14:57 Tua ciangin mi pawl khat hong dingin amah a mawhsak nadingun zuau thu hong gen uh a," 
Mark14:58 “Mihingteʼ lam hih biakinn ka susia dinga, ni thum khit ciangin mihingteʼ lam ahi lo a dang khat ka lam ding hi,” a cihna ka za uh hi, ci-in hong gen uh hi." 
Mark14:59 Amaute nangawn zong a thugenzia uh kituak lo hi. 
Mark14:60 Tua ciangin amaute khempeuh mai ah siampi lianpen pa hong dingin Jesu thu dong a, “Nangmah mawhsakna-in a gen uh thute na dawn nading om lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark14:61 Ahi zongin Jesu pau loin a omcip hi. Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in, “Phatna a ngah Pasianʼ Tapa, Khris na hi hiam?” ci-in a dongkik leuleu hi." 
Mark14:62 Jesu in, “Ka hi hi; Vanglian Pasianʼ tak lamah Mihing Tapa omin meii lakah a hong pai na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:63 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in a puan bal kek a, “Thudang kisam nawn lo hi." 
Mark14:64 Pasianʼ tungah a paukhialhna na za zo uh hi. Bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hih mipa thah dingin kilawm hi, ci-in amaute khempeuh in thu a khen uh hi." 
Mark14:65 Tua ciangin mi pawl khat in cilphih uh a, a mai tunsakin beeng uh a, “Kua in hong beng ahi hiam, gen in,” a ci uh hi. Palikte in zong amah paipihin a beeng uh hi." 
Mark14:66 A nuai-a inntual ah Peter a om laitakin siampi lianpen paʼ nasem numeite khat hong pai a," 
Mark14:67 Peter mei awi-in om a muh ciangin limtakin en a, “Nang zong, Nazareth khuami Jesu tawh na kikhawl ngei hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark14:68 Ahi zongin Peter in nial a, “Ka thei kei hi; bang na cihna ahi hiam, cih zong ka tel kei hi,” ci-in dawngin tual pualam paina lampi lamah a pai hi. Tua laitakin ak a khuang hi." 
Mark14:69 Tua numei mah in a omna ah Peter mu a, a gei-a omte kiangah, “Hih pa, hua mite khat hi takpi hi,” a cikik leuleu hi." 
Mark14:70 Ahi zongin Peter in nial leuleu hi. Tawl khat khit ciangin a gei-a omte in Peter kiangah, “Nang zong Galilee gam mi na hih manin huate khat na hi takpi hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi." 
Mark14:71 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Na gen mipa uh ka theih taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei tahen,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
Mark14:72 Tua khit phetin ak nih veina a khuang hi. Tua ciangin, “Ak nih vei a khuan ma-in kei thum veina hong nial ding hi,” ci-in Jesu in ama tungah a gen sa thu Peter in phawkkik a, dah lua-in a kap hi." 
Mark15:1 A zingsang ciangin siampi liante in upate, Thukham hilh siate le ulian dang khempeuh tawh thu kikupna khat nei uh a, Jesu a hen khit uh ciangin paikhiat pihin Pilat tungah a ap uh hi." 
Mark15:2 Pilat in, “Nang, Jew miteʼ Kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesu in, “Nang zong tua mah nong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Mark15:3 Siampi liante in Jesu a mawhsakna tampi gen uh ahih manin 
Mark15:4 Pilat in Jesu kiangah, “Na dawn nading om lo ahi hiam? Nang hong mawhsakna thute na za zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Mark15:5 Ahi zongin Jesu in amah a kimawhsaknate kam khat beek dawng het lo ahih manin Pilat in lamdang a sa mahmah hi. 
Mark15:6 Paisan Pawi hun simin mite in Pilat tungah a nget peuhpeuh mi khat, thong panin a khah a ngeina ahi hi." 
Mark15:7 Kumpi a lehdo laitakun mi a that, thong sunga kikhumte lakah Barabbas a kici mi khat zong kihel hi." 
Mark15:8 Pilat kiangah mihonte hong pai to uh a, hih bang hun pawlin a hih ngei bangin mi khat a khah nading a hong ngen uh hi." 
Mark15:9 Pilat in amaute kiangah, “Jew miteʼ Kumpipa ka khah ding hong deih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Mark15:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampite in Jesu a hazatna hangin hih bangin ama kiangah a paipihna thu teltakin a thei hi. 
Mark15:11 Ahi zongin Barabbas hong khahsak zaw in, ci-in mihonte in a nget nadingun siampite in mihonte a hanthawn uh hi."

Mark15:13 amaute in, “Singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Mark15:14 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Bang hangin tua ci na hi uh hiam? Bang siatna bawl ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kinakko zaw semsem uh hi." 
Mark15:15 Pilat in mihonte lungkimsak nuam ahih manin Barabbas khah a, Jesu a satsak khit ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin galkapteʼ khut sungah a ap hi." 
Mark15:16 Tua ciangin galkapte in gam ukpaʼ inntual ah Jesu paipih uh a, galkap dang khempeuh zong kikhawmsak uh hi." 
Mark15:17 Jesu, puansan silhsak uh a, ling lukhu bawlin a lu tungah a khusak uh hi." 
Mark15:18 A zahtak bawl bang keekin hopih uh a, “Jew miteʼ Kumpipa aw, na khansau tahen!” a ci uh hi." 
Mark15:19 Tua ciangin pumpeeng tawh a lu satin cilphih uh a, a zahtak bawl kineihin a mai ah a kun uh hi." 
Mark15:20 Tua bangin a simmawh bawl khit uh ciangin a puansan suahkhiatsak uh a, ama puan ngeite a silhsakkik uh hi. Tua ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin a paikhiatpih uh hi." 
Mark15:21 Tua bangin a pai laitakun, Alexander le Rufasʼ pa, Sairin khuami Simon a kici mi khat, gam sung panin khuapi sunga hong pai tawh kituak uh a, Jesuʼ singlamteh a pua dingin lammat uh hi." 
Mark15:22 Lutang guh a cihnopna Golgotha munah paipih uh a," 
Mark15:23 tua lai ah myrrh a kici zatui a sawh sa uh leenggahzu pia uh a, ahi zongin Jesu in ne nuam lo hi."

Mark15:33 Tua ciangin sunkim nai sawm le nih laitak a kipanin nai thum sung leitung khempeuh ah khim a zing hi.

Luke1:1 A lian mahmah Theofilas aw: Eite lakah a piang ngeisa thu a kigente, mi tampi in amau siamna zah ciat tawh lai-in a gelh uh hi."

Luke2:4 Josef zong Davidʼ suante khat ahih manin Galilee gam sung Nazareth khua panin Davidʼ suahna khua ahi Judea gam Bethlehem khua ah a pai hi. 
Luke2:5 Tua bangin min sazian kikhumsak dingin a pai ciangin teenpih dingin zuthawl a piak sa a lawmnu Mary tawh a pai khawm uh hi. A lawmnu naupaii hi a," 
Luke2:6 Bethlehem khua ah a tam sungun a nausuah ding hun hong tung hi. 
Luke2:7 Zintun nading mun dang khempeuh mi dim khinta ahih manin ganbuk ah tung uh a, a tacil ahi ta pasal khat nei-in, puan tawh tunin gan annekna kuang sungah a sial hi." 
Luke2:8 Tua hun laitakin gamlak ah a tuuhonte a giah pih tuucing pawl khat a om uh hi. 
Luke2:9 Amaute kiangah Topaʼ vantungmi khat hong kilang a, Topaʼ minthanna vang in amaute hong taan ahih manin a lau mahmah uh hi." 
Luke2:10 Ahi zongin vantungmi in, “Lau kei un. Mi khempeuh a lungdamsak ding thu thak hoih khat note ading ka hong puak hi." 
Luke2:11 Tu ni-in David khuapi sungah, note a hong hon khia ding Khris Topa a suak hi." 
Luke2:12 Amah na theih nading uh a lim hih bang hi ding hi: Puan tawh kitun naungek khat, gan annekna kuang sungah a kisial na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:13 Tua khit phetin tua vantungmi tawh vantung mihonpite thakhatin hong omin Pasian phatna la sa uh a," 
Luke2:14 “Van a sang belna ah a om Pasianʼ min thang henla, ama pahtak leitung mite tungah nopna om tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke2:15 Vantung mite vantungah a ciahkik khit uh ciangin tuucingte in, “Bethlehem khua ah pai-in, Topaʼ hong gen hih thupiang va en ni,” a kici uh hi." 
Luke2:16 Amaute nawhpai mahmah uh a, Mary le Josef le gan annekna kuang sungah a kisial naungek a mu pah uh hi." 
Luke2:17 Tua bangin naungek a muh uh ciangin, vantungmi in amaute kiangah hih naungek tawh kisai thu a gente a gen sawn uh hi." 
Luke2:18 Hih tuucingteʼ thugen a za mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi. 
Luke2:19 Mary in ahihleh a lungsimah hih thute ciamtehin a ngaih sunsun hi. 
Luke2:20 Tuucingte zong ciahkik uh a, amaute tungah a kigen sa bangin a zak sa le a muh sa uh thute hangin Pasianʼ min a phat uh hi." 
Luke2:21 Naungek a vun a ki-at ni hun nipikal khat a cin khit ciangin, amah a kipaii ma-in a min dingin vantungmi in a piak sa ahi Jesu, a min dingin a phuak uh hi." 
Luke2:22 Moses Thukham sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in Josef le Mary a kisiansuah ding uh hun hong tung hi. Tua ahih manin Topa tungah naungek a ap dingin Jerusalem ah a paipih uh hi. 
Luke2:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ Thukham sungah, “Ta pasal masa peuhmah Topa tungah ki-ap ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke2:24 Topa Thukham sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhu no nih ahi zongin a pia dingin zong a pai uh ahi hi." 
Luke2:25 Jerusalem khua sungah Simeon a kici mi khat na om hi. Amah a thuman, a biakna mi mahmah khat hi a, Israel mite a kihotkhiat hun ding a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Kha Siangtho in a ompih mi khat hi a," 
Luke2:26 Topaʼ hong ciam sa Khris a muh matengin a sih loh nading thu zong ama tungah Kha Siangtho in na gen khin hi. 
Luke2:27 Kha Siangthoʼ makaihna tawh biakinn sungah Simeon a pai hi. A nu le a pate in thukham sunga om ngeina bangin Topa tungah naungek a ap dingin biakinn ah a hong paipih uh ciangin," 
Luke2:28 Simeon in naungek la-in a ang ah tawi-in Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna ko a," 
Luke2:29 “Topa aw, na thuciamna tu-in nong tungsak a, na nasem pa keima lungsim nong nuamsak hi." 
Luke2:30 Ka mit mahmah tawh nong hotkhiatna ka mu khin a," 
Luke2:31 minam khempeuhʼ muhin nong tungsak a," 
Luke2:32 Gentail mite in khuavak a muh nading le nangma mi Israel-te a minthan nadingin na vaihawm hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:33 Naungekʼ nu le pate in, hih bangin Simeon in naungekʼ thu a genna a zak uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Luke2:34 Tua ciangin Simeon in amaute thupha a piak khit ciangin naungekʼ nu Mary kiangah, “Hih naungek pen, Israel mite sungah mi tampi in siatna a ngah nading le mi tampi in hotkhiatna a ngah nading ahi hi. Mi tampi in hih naungek nial ding uh a," 
Luke2:35 miteʼ lungsim tawng a kilatna hong hi ding hi. Dahna lungkhamna in namsau hiam bangin nangma lungsim mahmah zong hong sun kham ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:36 Tua laitakin Asher minamte sung panin Fanuelʼ tanu Anna minnei kamsang numei khat a om hi. Amah a khangham mahmah khat hi a, a nungak laitakin a neih a pasal tawh kum sagih sung a ten khop khit ciangin," 
Luke2:37 kum sawm giat le kum li sung meigongin a om ahi hi. Amah pen biakna a nusia ngei lo mi khat hi a, a sun a zanin Pasian bia-in an tangin thu a ngenngen mi khat ahi hi." 
Luke2:38 Tua bangin Jesu a ki-ap hun laitakin hih kamsangnu hong pai-in Pasian tungah lungdamna ko a, Jerusalem a suahtak nading lamenin a ngak mi khempeuh tungah hih naungekʼ thu a gen hi." 
Luke2:39 Amaute in Topaʼ Thukham tawh kizui-in hih ding a kisam khempeuh a bawl khit uh ciangin Galilee gam, amau khua Nazareth ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
Luke2:40 Tua naupang hong khangin hong thahat hi. Lungpilna tawh kidim a, Pasian in thupha a pia hi." 
Luke2:41 Kum simin Jerusalem khua-a Paisan Pawi a kibawlna ah Jesuʼ nu le pa a pai zel uh ahi hi. 
Luke2:42 Jesu, kum sawm le kum nih a phak ciangin a ngeina bangin tua pawi ah a thumun a pai uh hi." 
Luke2:43 Tua pawi vengin a ciahkik uh ciangin Jerusalem khua ah naupang Jesu kinusia kha hi. A nu le a pa in a nusiat lam uh thei lo uh hi. 
Luke2:44 Amauteʼ hon lak mahah a omomin ngaihsun uh ahih manin ni khat lam pai khin uh a, tua ciangin a lawmte le a tanaute lak khawng a zong pan uh hi." 
Luke2:45 Amah a muh zawh loh uh ciangin Jerusalem ah kilehkikin a zong uh hi. 
Luke2:46 A ciah zawh uh a ni thum ni ciangin biakinn sungah amah mu uh a, siate lakah tu-in a thugen uh ngai-in, thu zong dong zelin a om a mu uh hi." 
Luke2:47 Amah in pilna tawh thu genin a dawnna a za mite khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh hi. 
Luke2:48 A nu le a pa in a muh uh ciangin lamdang sa uh a, a nu in, “Ka ta aw, bang hangin hong hici bawl na hi hiam? Na pa tawh lungkham mahmah in nang ka hong zong uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke2:49 Jesu in a nu le a pa kiangah, “Bang hangin kei hong zong na hi uh hiam? Ka Paʼ inn sungah ka om ding lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke2:50 Ahi zongin bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a nu le a pa in thei lo uh hi." 
Luke2:51 Tua ahih ciangin a nu le a pa zui-in Nazareth khua ah ciahkik a, amauteʼ thu mangin tua lai ah hoihtakin a om hi. A nu in hih thu khempeuh a lungsim sungah ngaih sunsun hi." 
Luke2:52 Jesu a pumpi le a pilna khang a, ama gamtatna in Pasian le mite a lungkimsak semsem hi." 
Luke3:1 Gam tampi a uk Sisar Tiberius in a uk zawh a kum sawm le kum ngana, Pontias Pilat in Judea gam ukin, Herod in Galilee gam ukin, a nau Filip in Iturea gam le Trakhonitis gam ukin, Lysanias in Abilene gam uk a," 
Luke3:1 Gam tampi a uk Sisar Tiberius in a uk zawh a kum sawm le kum ngana, Pontias Pilat in Judea gam ukin, Herod in Galilee gam ukin, a nau Filip in Iturea gam le Trakhonitis gam ukin, Lysanias in Abilene gam uk a," 
Luke3:2 Annas le Kaiafas in siampi lianpen a sep laitakin sehnel gamah a om, Zekhariahʼ tapa Johanʼ tungah, Pasianʼ thu hong tung hi." 
Luke3:3 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan Gun kiim gam khempeuh ah Johan pai kawikawi a, kamsang Isaiah in Lai Siangtho sungah a gelh mah bangin, “Na mawhna panun kisik unla tui kiphum un. Tua hileh Pasian in na mawhnate uh hong maisak ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke3:4 Isaiah in hih bangin na gelh hi: “Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topaʼ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un." 
Luke3:5 Kuam thuk khempeuh kivuk dim dinga, mual lian mual neu khempeuh kitotam ding hi. Lam kawite kitangsak dinga, a leihumte kinelsak ding hi." 
Luke3:6 Mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi,’” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Luke3:7 Ama tuiphum ding utin a hong pai mi tampite kiangah Johan in, “No, gul bangin ngian a zangte aw, hong tung ding Pasianʼ hehna panin na suahtak theih nading uh kua in hong gen ahi hiam?" 
Luke3:8 Na kisikna uh a kilat nadingin gamta un. Note khatlekhat in, ‘Abrahamʼ suante ihi ngawn hi,’ mawk cih kei un. Keʼn kong cih in ah, Pasian in hih suangte nangawn Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte-in bawl thei lel hi." 
Luke3:9 Tu mahmah in sing a bulphuk dingin hei tawh kingim zo hi. Gah hoih a gah lo singkung khempeuh kiphukin meikhuk sungah kikhul ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke3:10 Tua ciangin mihonpite in, “Tua bang ahihleh bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Luke3:11 Johan in, “Puanak nih a nei mipa in a nei lote hawm unla, annek ding a neite in a nei lote hawm un,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke3:12 Siahdongte pawl khat zong tui a kiphum dingin hong pai-in Johan kiangah, “Sia aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke3:13 Amah in, “Na don dingun a kilawm zahval na dong kei un,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke3:14 Galkap pawl khatte in zong ama kiangah, “Kote, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin, “Zawhthawh thu tawh ahi a, a man lopi-in mawhsakna tawh ahi zongin kuama sum suh kei unla, na khasum ngah zah uh tawh lungkim un,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke3:15 Thu lian khat peuhpeuh hong piang ding hi, ci-in miteʼ lawpna hong khang semsem a, hih pa pen Khris hi kha ding hi, ci-in mite in a lungsim uh ah a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Luke3:16 Tua ahih ciangin Johan in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in tui sungah note ka hong phum hi; ahi zongin kei sangin nakpi takin a lian zaw khat hong pai lai ding hi. Ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin kei ka kilawm zo nai kei hi. Amah in Kha Siangtho le mei sungah note hong phum ding hi." 
Luke3:17 A buh cil sate a zapsiang nadingin amah in a khut sungah lawhpi tawi a, a tak teng ansal sungah koihin, a si teng a mit ngei lo mei sungah a khul ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke3:18 Tua bangin a lam tuamtuamin Johan in mite hanthawnin Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi. 
Luke3:19 Ahi zongin gam ukpa Herod in a naupaʼ zi Herodias a tenpihna hang le a gamtat hoih lohna a tuamtuamteʼ hangin Johan in Herod a taii hi. 
Luke3:20 Tua ciangin Herod in thong sungah Johan khia a, a gamtat siatna a behlap lailai hi." 
Luke3:21 Mi khempeuh a kituiphum khit uh ciangin Jesu zong a kituiphum hi. Jesu in thu a nget laitakin vantung kihong a," 
Luke3:22 vakhu pumpi lim nei-in Kha Siangtho ama tungah hong kum suk hi. Tua laitakin vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Nang pen ka it ka Tapa na hi a, nangma tungah ka lungkim mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke3:23 Nasep a kipat ciangin Jesu ama khan kum sawm thum bang a pha hi. Mite in ama pa Josef hi, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi. Josefʼ pa Heli," 
Luke3:24 Heliʼ pa Matthat, Matthatʼ pa Levi, Leviʼ pa Melkhi, Melkhiʼ pa Jannai, Jannaiʼ pa Josef," 
Luke3:25 Josefʼ pa Mattathias, Mattathiasʼ pa Amos, Amosʼ pa Nahum, Nahumʼ pa Esli, Esliʼ pa Naggai," 
Luke3:26 Naggaiʼ pa Maath, Maathʼ pa Mattathias, Mattathiasʼ pa Semein, Semeinʼ pa Josek, Josekʼ pa Joda," 
Luke3:27 Jodaʼ pa Joanan, Joananʼ pa Resa, Resaʼ pa Zerubbabel, Zerubbabelʼ pa Shealtiel, Shealtielʼ pa Neri," 
Luke3:28 Neriʼ pa Melkhi, Melkhiʼ pa Addi, Addiʼ pa Kosam, Kosamʼ pa Elmadam, Elmadamʼ pa Er," 
Luke3:29 Erʼ pa Joshua, Joshuaʼ pa Eliezer, Eliezerʼ pa Jorim, Jorimʼ pa Matthat, Matthatʼ pa Levi," 
Luke3:30 Leviʼ pa Simeon, Simeonʼ pa Judah, Judahʼ pa Josef, Josefʼ pa Jonam, Jonamʼ pa Eliakim," 
Luke3:31 Eliakimʼ pa Melea, Meleaʼ pa Menna, Mennaʼ pa Mattatha, Mattathaʼ pa Nathan, Nathanʼ pa David," 
Luke3:32 Davidʼ pa Jessi, Jessiʼ pa Obed, Obedʼ pa Boaz, Boazʼ pa Salmon, Salmonʼ pa Nahshon," 
Luke3:33 Nahshonʼ pa Amminadab, Amminadabʼ pa Admin, Adminʼ pa Hezron, Hezronʼ pa Perez, Perezʼ pa Judah," 
Luke3:34 Judahʼ pa Jakob, Jakobʼ pa Isaac, Isaacʼ pa Abraham, Abrahamʼ pa Terah, Terahʼ pa Nahor," 
Luke3:35 Nahorʼ pa Serug, Serugʼ pa Reu, Reuʼ pa Peleg, Pelegʼ pa Eber, Eberʼ pa Shelah," 
Luke3:36 Shelahʼ pa Kainan, Kainanʼ pa Arpakshad, Arpakshadʼ pa Shem, Shemʼ pa Noah, Noahʼ pa Lamek," 
Luke3:37 Lamekʼ pa Methuselah, Methuselahʼ pa Enok, Enokʼ pa Jared, Jaredʼ pa Mahalaleel, Mahalaleelʼ pa Kainan," 
Luke3:38 Kainanʼ pa Enos, Enosʼ pa Seth, Sethʼ pa Adam, Adamʼ pa Pasian ahi hi." 
Luke4:1 Kha Siangtho tawh a kidimin Jordan gun panin Jesu hong kilehkik a, Kha Siangtho in gamlak ah paipihin," 
Luke4:2 Dawimangpa in ni sawm li sung a ze-et hi. Tua hunsung Jesu in bangmah ne lo a, tua ze-etna hun a bei ciangin a gil kial mahmah hi." 
Luke4:3 Dawimangpa in Jesu kiangah, “Pasianʼ Tapa na hih takpi leh hih suang anlum suaksak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:4 Jesu in, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Anlum bek tawh mite nungta zo lo hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke4:5 Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in Jesu paipih to a, thakhat thu-in leitung kumpi gam khempeuh a lah khit ciangin," 
Luke4:6 “Hihte khempeuh keima tungah hong kipia khin ahih manin, ka piak nop peuhpeuh tungah ka pia thei hi. Hih vangliatna le hauhnate khempeuh nangma tungah kong pia ding hi." 
Luke4:7 Keima mai ah kunin hong bia lecin hihte khempeuh nangma aʼ hi ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke4:8 Jesu in, “Lai Siangtho in, ‘Topa Pasian na bia inla, ama na bek sem in,’ ci hi lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke4:9 Tua ciangin Dawimangpa in gamlak panin Jerusalem khua ah Jesu paipih a, biakinn khumzang a sang penna munah a kah tohpih khit ciangin, “Pasianʼ Tapa taktak na hih leh hih lai panin tuak suk in." 
Luke4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, ‘Pasian in nang a hong kem dingin a vantung mite hong sawl ding hi,’ ci-in a gen banah," 
Luke4:11 ‘Na khete nangawn suang tawh kitatin a liam khak loh nadingin vantung mite in a khut uh tawh nang hong dom ding uh hi,’ zong ci lai hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke4:12 Jesu in, “Lai Siangtho in, ‘Topa na Pasian na ze-et kei in,’ ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke4:13 Dawimangpa in a hih theih zahin Jesu a ze-et khit ciangin, tawl khat sung a nusia phot hi." 
Luke4:14 Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh a kidimin Galilee gamah Jesu a ciahkik hi. Tua kiim a om gam khempeuh ah ama thu kizakim hi. 
Luke4:15 Jesu in amauteʼ kikhopna innte ah thu hilh a, mi khempeuh in amah a phatkim uh hi." 
Luke4:16 Tua ciangin ama khanna Nazareth khua ah Jesu pai a, Sabbath ni ciangin a pai ngei bangin kikhopna inn ah a pai hi. Lai Siangtho a sim dingin amah dinga," 
Luke4:17 a nget bangin a sim dingin kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho bu a kipia hi. A laibu lemin a sim nopna mun a zon ciangin a nuai-a bangin a kigelhna mun mu-in a sim hi. Tua munah," 
Luke4:18 “Gimna a thuak mite tungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Topa in kei hong seh khin ahih manin keima sungah Topaʼ kha hong om hi. Salin a kimante tungah suahtakna thu a gen ding, mittawte in khua a muhkik theih nading, a kinengniamte a suaktasak ding le" 
Luke4:19 Topa in a mite a hotkhiat ding kum a pulak dingin kei hong sawl hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Luke4:20 Hih thu a kigelhna mun teng a sim khit ciangin a laibu khupin biakinn nasem pa tungah piakikin a tu hi. Kikhopna inn sungah a om mi khempeuh in limtakin amah a en uh hi. 
Luke4:21 Tua ciangin amaute tungah thugen ding kipan a, “Noteʼ zakin a hong kisim Lai Siangtho thu, tu ni-in a hong tung hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:22 Amaute khempeuh in Jesu thupi sa mahmah uh a, thugen siam sa mahmah uh ahih manin, “Hih pa, Josefʼ tapa hi lel hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke4:23 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Paunak khat ah, ‘Zato pa aw, nangmah kidamsak tawm in,’ a cihna thu kei tungah nong cih nop ding uh ka thei hi. ‘Kapernaum khua ah na bawl thu ka zakte uh zong hih lai na khua ah hong bawl in,’ zong nong ci nuam ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:24 Tua ciangin Jesu in a thugen zom lai a, “Keʼn kong cih in ah, kamsang a kuamah peuh ama khua ah kipakta ngei lo hi." 
Luke4:25 A taktakin ci lehang, Elijahʼ hun lai-in kum thum le alang sung guah zu lo a, gam sung khempeuh ah kialpi a tun hun laitakin Israel gam sungah meigong numei tampi tak om hi." 
Luke4:26 Ahi zongin tua numei tampite khat beek kiangah Elijah kisawl lo a, Sidon gam Zarefath khua-a om meigongnu kiang bekah kisawl hi." 
Luke4:27 Kamsang Elishaʼ hun laitakin Israel gam sungah miphak tampi om a, ahi zongin kuamah in damna ngah loin, Syria mi Naaman bek in damna ngah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:28 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin kikhopna inn sunga om mi khempeuh a heh mahmah uh hi. 
Luke4:29 Amaute dingin khua nawl ah Jesu paipih uh a, khua nawl keenah a bungbu sawnkhiat dingin a paipih uh hi." 
Luke4:30 Ahi zongin amauteʼ lak nawkin Jesu a paikhia hiau hi. 
Luke4:31 Tua ciangin Galilee gam Kapernaum khua ah pai suk a, Sabbath ni-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke4:32 Amah in aana neite bangin thu gen ahih manin amaute in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. 
Luke4:33 Kikhopna inn sungah dawivei mi khat om a, nakpi takin kiko-in," 
Luke4:34 “Nazareth khuami Jesu aw, kote tawh bang kisai ihi hiam? Kote a susia dingin hong pai na hi hiam? Pasianʼ mi siangtho na hih lamtak ka hong thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:35 Jesu in tua dawi taii a, “Pau kei inla, ama sung panin paikhia in,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Dawi in a mipa mihon lakah a puksak khit ciangin ama sung panin paikhia a, ahi zongin liamsak lo hi." 
Luke4:36 Kikhopna inn sunga a om mi khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Hih a kampaute a bangci kampau ahi hiam? Aana le vang neihna tawh dawi thu pia a, dawite a tai khia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke4:37 Hih Jesuʼ thu tua gam mun khempeuh ah a kiza hi. 
Luke4:38 Kikhopna inn panin Jesu pai khia-in Simonʼ inn ah a lut hi. Simonʼ sungnu nattunin na gim mahmah a, hih ama natna thu Jesu kiangah a gensak uh hi." 
Luke4:39 Jesu zong pai-in a lupna gei ah dinga, a cinatna a taii ciangin a nattutna dam pah a, amah zong tho zo pahin a zinte a do zo pah hi." 
Luke4:40 Ni a tum khit ciangin natna tuamtuam a nei mi khempeuh Jesu kiangah hong paipih uh a, Jesu in amaute khempeuh tungah a khut nga-in a damsak hi." 
Luke4:41 Mi tampi sung panin dawite zong tai khia uh a, “Nang pen Pasianʼ Tapa na hi hi,” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Amah pen Khris ahih lam thei uh ahih manin amaute taii-in pausak lo hi." 
Luke4:42 Khua a vak ciangin khua sung panin gamdaihna munah Jesu a paikhia hi. Mite in amah zong uh a, a muh uh ciangin amah a taam lai nadingin a kho uh hi." 
Luke4:43 Ahi zongin amah in, “Pasianʼ Ukna hangin Lungdamna Thu a hilh ding a hong kisawl ahih manin khua dangte ah zong ka va hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke4:44 Tua bangin Judah gam sunga om kikhopna innte ah thu a hilh kawikawi hi. 
Luke5:1 Khat vei, Gennesaret Tuili gei ah Jesu dingin a om laitakin, mite in Pasianʼ thu za nuamin Jesu hong nehcip uh hi." 
Luke5:2 Jesu in tui gei ah gunkuang nih a om a mu hi. Tua gunkuang nei ngasa bengte a gunkuang panun tuak khia-in tui sungah a ngente a sawp uh hi. 
Luke5:3 Tua gunkuangte lak pan Simonʼ gunkuang sungah Jesu tuang a, lei tawh tawm a kigamla zek dingin a gunkuang a hawh nadingin Simon kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin gunkuang sungah tu a, tua lai panin thu a hilh hi." 
Luke5:4 Thuhilh a tawp ciangin Simon kiangah, “Tui thukna lamah na gunkuang hot inla, na ngen tawh ngasa khuh in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:5 Tua ciangin Simon in, “Sia aw, tu zan thapai ngasa ka khuh uh hangin khat zong ka man kei uh hi. Ahi zongin khuh in, nong cih leh ka khuh ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke5:6 A ngen a khuh uh leh ngasa tampi tak awk a, a ngen kikeek dektak hi." 
Luke5:7 A gunkuang dang khat ah a om a lawmte hong pai-in a huh nadingun a khut uh a van uh hi. Amaute zong hong pai uh a, gunkuang tegel sungah ngasa a dimtakin guang uh ahih manin a gunkuang tum dektak hi." 
Luke5:8 Simon Peter in hih thu a muh ciangin Jesuʼ mai ah khukdin a, “Topa aw, mawhnei mi ka hih manin ka kiang panin paikhia in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:9 Tua zahin ngasa tampi a matna hangun amah le a lawmte in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. 
Luke5:10 Tua mah bangin Simonʼ lawmte ahi, Zebediʼ tapa James le Johan-te in zong lamdang a sa uh hi. Jesu in Simon kiangah “Lau kei in. Tu a kipanin ngasa mat bangin mi tampi a man pa na suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:10 Tua mah bangin Simonʼ lawmte ahi, Zebediʼ tapa James le Johan-te in zong lamdang a sa uh hi. Jesu in Simon kiangah “Lau kei in. Tu a kipanin ngasa mat bangin mi tampi a man pa na suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:11 Tui gei ah a gunkuangte uh a tunpih khit uh ciangin a na khempeuh uh nusia-in Jesu a zui uh hi. 
Luke5:12 Khat vei, khua sung khat ah Jesu a om laitakin tua khua sungah a pumtangin phak natna a vei mi khat a om hi. A phakpa in Jesu a muh ciangin a mai ah bokin, “Topa aw, hong damsak nuam peuh lecin kei nong damsak thei hi,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Luke5:13 Jesu in zong a khut zanin amah lawng a, “Kong damsak nuam hi; dam ta in,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua khit phetin a phak natna a dam pah hi." 
Luke5:14 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Hih thu kuamah dang kiangah gen kei in. Siampipa kiangah paisuak pah inla, kivelsak in. Tua ciangin na damna thu a kilat nadingin Moses thupiak mah bangin biakna pia in,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Luke5:15 Ahi zongin Jesuʼ thu kitheithang semsem a, ama thu a ngai ding le a natna uh panin damna a ngah dingin mihonpite hong pai uh hi." 
Luke5:16 Ahi zongin gamdaihna munah Jesu pai khia-in thu a ngen hi. 
Luke5:17 Khat vei, Jesu in thu hilhin a om laitakin, Galilee gam, Judea gam le Jerusalem khua pan hong pai Farisi-te le Thukham hilh siate pawl khat tua lai munah a tu uh hi. Jesu tungah cina damsak theih nading Pasianʼ vangliatna kipia hi." 
Luke5:17 Khat vei, Jesu in thu hilhin a om laitakin, Galilee gam, Judea gam le Jerusalem khua pan hong pai Farisi-te le Thukham hilh siate pawl khat tua lai munah a tu uh hi. Jesu tungah cina damsak theih nading Pasianʼ vangliatna kipia hi." 
Luke5:18 Mi pawl khat in khutlekhe zaw mi khat a lupna pheek tawh hong pua uh a, inn sungah paipihin Jesu mai ah koih ding a hanciam uh hi." 
Luke5:19 Mihon tam lua ahih manin a lutpih nading uh lampi om lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin innkhum zang ah kah pih to-in innkhum hong let uh a, mihonteʼ lak, Jesuʼ omna mai sanah a lupna pheek tawh a khai suk uh hi." 
Luke5:20 Jesu in amauteʼ upna a muh ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Lawm aw, na mawhnate hong kimaisak khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:21 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in a lungsim sung uh ah, “Hih bangin Pasian tawh a kikimin a pau ngam mipa kua ahi hiam? Mihing kuamah in mawhna maisak thei lo a, Pasian bek in maisak thei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke5:22 Jesu in amauteʼ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke5:23 ‘Na mawhnate hong kimaisak hi,’ cih ding baih zaw ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh, ‘Tho inla, lam pai in,’ cih ding baih zaw ahi hiam?" 
Luke5:24 Mihing Tapa in leitungah mawhna maisak theih nading vangliatna nei hi, ci-in na theih nadingun kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin khutlekhe zaw mipa kiangah, “Tho inla, na lupna pheek pua-in na inn ah ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:25 Thakhat thu-in amaute khempeuhʼ muhin a mipa zong tho-in a lupna pheek la a, Pasian phat kawmin a inn ah a ciah hi." 
Luke5:26 Tua ciangin amaute khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, lau mahmah kawmin Pasian phatin, “Tu ni-in a lamdang mahmah na khat i mu hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke5:27 Tua khit ciangin Jesu paikhia a, siahdongpa Levi, a zumah a tu a mu hi. Jesu in, “Kei hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Luke5:28 Levi zong ding pah a, a na khempeuh nusia-in Jesu a zui hi." 
Luke5:29 Tua ciangin Levi in ama inn ah Jesu vakna annek pawipi bawl a, annekna sabuai ah siahdong dang tampite le midangte tawh zong a tukhawm uh hi." 
Luke5:30 Amaute sung panin Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate pawl khat nungzuite tungah phun uh a, “Bang hangin siahdongte le mawhneite tawh an nekhawm tui dawn khawm na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke5:31 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Cidamte in siavuan kisam lo uh a, cinate bek in kisam uh hi." 
Luke5:32 Mihoihte a kisik nadingun a sam dingin hong pai ka hi kei a, mite in a pampaih mite a kisik nadingun a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke5:33 Tua ciangin amaute pawl khat in Jesu kiangah, “Johanʼ nungzuite in an tangin thu ngen zelzel uh a, Farisi miteʼ nungzuite zong tua bangmahin gamta napi-in, bang hangin nangma nungzuite in tang loin om se uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke5:34 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Mopawi ah zineipa le pawisimte a om khawm laitakin a pawisimte an tangsak thei ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke5:35 Amaute kiang panin zineipa a kipaikhiat pih hun hong tung dinga, tua hun ciangin tang ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke5:36 Tua ciangin Jesu in thu gentehna dang khat zong gen a, “Mi khat in puan thak khat eu khia-in puan lui thuapna-in nei lo hi. Tua bangin hih leh a puan thak pen a keeksak suak dinga, a puan thak eukhiat zong a puan lui tawh etlawm lo ding hi." 
Luke5:37 Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu thak thun ngei lo hi. Thun zenzen leh leenggahzu thak in a savun um phu kham dinga, a leenggahzu bua-in, a savun um zong kisia ding hi." 
Luke5:38 Tua ahih manin savun um thak sungah leenggahzu thak a kikoih ding ahi hi. 
Luke5:39 Kuamah in leenggahzu lui a nek khit ciangin a thak ne nuam nawn lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘A lui khum zaw hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke6:1 Sabbath ni khatin mangbuh lo nawkin Jesu le a nungzuite a pai uh hi. A nungzuite in mangbuh vuite zut uh a, a khut sung uh ah nuai-in a ne uh hi." 
Luke6:2 Amaute lakah a om Farisi mite pawl khat in, “Sabbath ni-in i hih dingin a kilawm lo gamtatna bang hangin gamta na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke6:3 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “David le a kikholhpihte a gilkial laitakun Davidʼ gamtatna thu sim ngei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke6:4 Pasianʼ inn sungah amah lut a, siampite lobuang midangteʼ nek ding ahi lo Ompihna Anlum la-in ne a, ama kikholhpihte zong a nesak hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke6:5 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mihing Tapa pen Sabbath ni a Ukpa ahi hi,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Luke6:6 Sabbath a nidang khatin kikhopna inn khat ah Jesu pai-in thu a hilh hi. A khut taklam a zaw mi khat tua lai ah na om hi. 
Luke6:7 Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite pawl khat in Jesu a mawhsak theih nading uh thu zong nuam uh ahih manin, Sabbath ni-in hih mipa a damsak hiam, ci-in na encik gige uh hi." 
Luke6:8 Ahi zongin Jesu in amauʼ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin a khut zaw mipa kiangah, “Ding inla, mihonte mai hih lai munah hong pai in,” a ci hi. A mipa zong hong pai-in mihon mai ah a hong ding hi." 
Luke6:9 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note tungah thu khat kong dong nuam hi. Sabbath ni-in a pha bawl ding le a sia bawl ding koi kilawm zaw a, mi khatʼ nuntakna suahtaksak ding le siatsak ding koi hoih zaw ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke6:10 Amaute khempeuh a et kawikawi khit ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na khut zan in,” a ci hi. Amah in zong a khut zan a, a ngeina bangin a khut hong damkik hi." 
Luke6:11 Ahi zongin amaute heh mahmah uh a, Jesu a suktheih nading uh khatlekhat a kikum pah uh hi." 
Luke6:12 Ni khat, thungen dingin mual tungah Jesu pai a, zan tawntung Pasian kiangah thu ngenin a om hi." 
Luke6:13 Khua a vak ciangin a nungzuite sam a, amaute sung panin sawm le nih teel khia-in sawltakte ci-in min a phuak hi." 
Luke6:14 Tuate in: Simon (Peter ci-in min a phuah pa) le a naupa Andru, James le a nau Johan, Filip, Bartholomew," 
Luke6:14 Tuate in: Simon (Peter ci-in min a phuah pa) le a naupa Andru, James le a nau Johan, Filip, Bartholomew," 
Luke6:15 Matthai, Thomas, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Luke6:15 Matthai, Thomas, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa)," 
Luke6:16 Jamesʼ tapa Judas le Jesu a lehhek pa Iskariotʼ tapa Judas ahi uh hi. 
Luke6:16 Jamesʼ tapa Judas le Jesu a lehhek pa Iskariotʼ tapa Judas ahi uh hi. 
Luke6:17 Tua mual tung panin Jesu le a nungzui teelte pai suk uh a, a nung a zui midang tampite tawh mun zang khat ah a ding hi. Jerusalem khua le Judea gam khempeuh le tuipi gei-a om Taia khua le Sidon khuapite panin a hong pai mihon tampi zong hong om uh hi." 
Luke6:17 Tua mual tung panin Jesu le a nungzui teelte pai suk uh a, a nung a zui midang tampite tawh mun zang khat ah a ding hi. Jerusalem khua le Judea gam khempeuh le tuipi gei-a om Taia khua le Sidon khuapite panin a hong pai mihon tampi zong hong om uh hi." 
Luke6:18 Tua mite pen ama thuhilhna a ngai ding le a natna uh panin damna a ngah nop manun a hong pai uh ahi hi. Dawi a vei mite zong hong pai uh a, damna a ngah uh hi." 
Luke6:19 Jesuʼ tung panin vangliatna pai khia-in mi khempeuh damsak ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah lawn ding a hanciam uh hi. 
Luke6:20 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite en a, “No mizawngte Pasianʼ Ukna sungah om na hih manun thupha ngah mi na hi uh hi." 
Luke6:21 Tuhunin a gilkial note nidang ciangin na gil uh a vah ding hi. Tuhunin a dah note nidang ciangin na nuam ding uh hi. 
Luke6:22 “Mihing Tapaʼ hangin mite in hong mudahin hong tuam koih a, hong simmawhin migiloin hong seh ciangin thupha ngah na hi uh hi." 
Luke6:23 Vantungah na thaman ding uh lian mahmah ahih manin tua bang na tuah uh ciangin nuamin lungdamin na diang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsangte tungah a bawl uh hi. 
Luke6:24 “Ahi zongin tuhunin a hau note in nopsakna ngah khin na hih manun gimna na thuak ding uh hi. 
Luke6:25 Tuhunin a gilvah note in gilkial gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Tuhunin a lungdam note dahin na kap ding uh hi. 
Luke6:26 “Mi khempeuh in note hong pahtakbawl ciangin gimna a thuak ding na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate un zong tua bangmahin kamsang zuaute a pahtakbawl uh hi. 
Luke6:27 “Ahi zongin ka thugen a za note kiangah kong cih in ah: Na galte uh na it unla, no hong mudah mite tungah a pha na bawl un." 
Luke6:28 No hong phuisamte thupha na pia unla, no hong bawlsiate ading thu na ngetsak un." 
Luke6:29 Na paang lang khat a hong bengte, a lang khat zong na dawh lai un. Na puan tungsilh uh a hong sutte tungah, na puan sungsilh uh zong na pia thuah lai un." 
Luke6:30 A hong ngente peuhmah na pia unla, na na uh a hong laksakte tung panin lakik kei un." 
Luke6:31 Note tungah a hong kibawl ding na deih uh bangin midangte tungah na bawl un. 
Luke6:32 “No hong itte bek it le-uhcin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhnei mite nangawn in amau a itte a it uh hi. 
Luke6:33 No tungah a hoihin a hong gamtate tung bekah a hoihin gamta le-uhcin bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn tua bangmahin gamta uh hi. 
Luke6:34 Ngahkik ding na lametna uh mite tung bekah leitawi na piak uh leh bang hangin thupha ngah ding na hi uh hiam? Mawhneite nangawn in zong a piakzah mah uh a ngahkik dingin khatlekhat kileitawi uh hi. 
Luke6:35 Tua bang lelin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Na galte uh itin amaute tungah thupha bawl unla, lohkik ding lamen loin leitawi pia un. Tua hileh na thaman uh lian dinga, a Lianpen Pasianʼ tate na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lungdamna mel a theithei lo mite le a huaiham mite tungah amah migi hi." 
Luke6:36 Tua ahih manin na Pa un hehpihna a neih bangin note in zong hehpihna lungsim nei ta un. 
Luke6:37 “Midangteʼ thu khen kei un. Tua hileh no tungah zong Pasian in thu hong khen lo ding hi. Midangte mawhsak kei un. Tua hileh Pasian in note zong hong mawhsak lo ding hi. Midangteʼ mawhna maisak un. Tua hileh Pasian in noteʼ mawhna zong hong maisak ding hi. 
Luke6:38 Midangte tungah pia un. Tua hileh Pasian in note tungah zong hong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte na piakna uh tawh kizui-in a henhen, a tahtah, a dimletin Pasian in note tungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke6:39 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna khat zong gen a, “Mittaw khat in mittaw dang khat lam paipih thei lo hi. Paipih zenzen leh a nih tuakun hawkguam ah kia khawm ding uh hi." 
Luke6:40 Sangnaupang khat a siapa sangin lian zaw ngei lo hi; a sin ding khempeuh a theih khit ciangin a siapa tawh kikim pan bek ding hi.” 
Luke6:41 “Bang hangin na mit sungah singluang a tang phawk kha loin na lawmteʼ mit sunga ninthem tang etsak na hi hiam? 
Luke6:42 Na mit sunga singluang hong tang nangawn mu lo napi-in, ‘Lawm aw, na mit sunga ninthem tang hong lakkhiatsak ning,’ ci-in na lawmte kiangah bangci gen theih ding na hi hiam? No a kineihkhemte aw, na mit sung uh a singluang tang la khia masa le-uhcin, na lawmte uh mit sunga ninthem tang mu-in na la khia thei pan ding uh hi.”" 
Luke6:43 “A cidam singkung in gah gina lo gah ngei lo a, a gina lo singkung in gah limci gah ngei lo hi." 
Luke6:44 Singkung khempeuh a gah tawh kithei thei hi. Sialtalling kung panin theigah kilo ngei lo a, lingvom kung panin leenggah kilo ngei lo hi." 
Luke6:45 Mihoih pa in a lungsim sunga thuhoih om teng hong suah khia a, migilo pa in a lungsim sunga a gitlohna teng hong suah khia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen amauʼ lungsim sunga a om bangbang a hong pau khia uh ahi hi." 
Luke6:46 “Bang hangin, ‘Topa aw, Topa aw,’ hong ci napi-in ka hong gente zui lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke6:47 Ka kiangah hong pai a, ka thuhilhna za-in a zuite khempeuh pen kua tawh kibang hiam cih leh," 
Luke6:48 suang tungah inn lamin, a khuam kua ding suang sung thukpi tak to-in a phut pa tawh kibang hi. Tui a khan ciangin tui in tua inn a nawk hangin limtakin kilam ahih manin susia zo lo hi." 
Luke6:49 Ahi zongin ka thuhilhna za napi-in a zui lote pen bulkip a nei lo, leilak mawkmawk ah inn a lam pa tawh kibang hi. Tuikhang in tua inn a nawk ciangin thakhat thu-in sia gawp pah a, tua inn pen naksiat mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:1 Jesu in mite kiangah a thugen ding teng a man khit ciangin Kapernaum khua ah a pai hi. 
Luke7:2 Tua khua sungah Rom mi galkap bu khat om a, tua bupa in a it mahmah nasem khat a nei hi. Tua a nasem pa a ci na-in a si dektak hi." 
Luke7:3 Tua bupa in Jesuʼ thu a zak ciangin, ama kiangah Jew mi upate pawl khat sawl a, Jesu hong pai-in a nasem pa a damsak nading a thumsak hi." 
Luke7:4 Jesu kiangah Jew mi upate a tun uh ciangin nakpi takin thum uh a, “Amah na huh dingin a kilawm mahmah mi khat ahi hi." 
Luke7:5 Amah in ei minam hong it mahmah a, kikhop nading inn khat zong hong lamsak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:6 Tua ahih manin Jesu in zong amaute sapna bangin a va zui hi. Jesu a tun madiakin galkap bupa in Jesu kiangah a lawmte pawl khat sawl a, “Topa aw, ka inn ah nong pai nadingin kei kilawm zo lo ka hih manin hong pai dah hoh in." 
Luke7:7 Nangmah tawh a kimu dingin zong kilawm zo kisa lo ka hih manin keima pumpi kong pai kei hi. Thu pia peuh lecin ka nasem pa dam lel ding hi. 
Luke7:8 Kei zong ulianteʼ khutnuai ah hong kikoih mi khat ka hi a, keima khutnuai ah zong galkapte a om hi. Khat kiangah, ‘Pai in,’ ci leng a pai hi. Khat kiangah, ‘Hong pai in,’ ci leng a hong pai hi. Ka nasem pa kiangah, ‘Hih na sem in,’ ci leng zong sem hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:9 Jesu in hih thu a zak ciangin lamdang sa mahmah a, amah a zui mihonte lamah kihei-in, “Israel mite lak nangawn ah hih bang upna ka mu nai kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:10 A kamtaite, galkap bupa inn ah hong tunkik ciangin a nasem pa a na dam siang khinta hi." 
Luke7:11 Tua khit a sawt loin Nain khua ah Jesu pai a, a nungzuite le mihonpite in zong a zui uh hi." 
Luke7:12 Tua khuakulh kongpi a tun laitakun misi vui a hong pai mihon tawh a kituak uh hi. A misi pen meigong khatʼ tapa khat neihsun hi a, tua khua sung mihon tampite in tua si vuina ah meigongnu hong zui uh hi." 
Luke7:13 Topa in tua meigongnu a muh ciangin a khasiat suak a, “Kap kei in,” ci-in a khem hi." 
Luke7:14 Tua ciangin pai-in a hankuang va len a, si puate zong a khawl pah uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tangval aw, tho in, kong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:15 Misi pa zong hong tu to-in hong pau pah hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in a nu kiangah a ap hi. 
Luke7:16 Amaute khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, Pasian min phatin, “Eite lakah kamsang lian khat hong om khinta a, a mite a hon khia dingin Pasian hong pai khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:17 Hih Jesu thu pen Judea gam sung le a kiim gam khempeuh ah kizel hi. 
Luke7:17 Hih Jesu thu pen Judea gam sung le a kiim gam khempeuh ah kizel hi. 
Luke7:18 Johanʼ nungzuite in hih Jesuʼ thu khempeuh Johan kiangah a gen uh hi. 
Luke7:19 Johan in zong ama nungzuite nih sam a, Topa kiangah amaute paisakin, “Johan in hong pai ding a cih pa mah na hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh a dang na lamen lai ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong dingin a sawl hi." 
Luke7:20 Jesu kiangah amaute a tun uh ciangin, “‘Hong pai ding ka cih pa mah na hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh a dang na lamen lai ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci-in a dong dingin Tuiphumpa Johan in hong sawl hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:21 Tua hun laitak mahmah in natna a tuamtuamte tampi damsakin, dawivei mite sung panin dawite hawl khia a, mittaw mi tampi khua a musak hi." 
Luke7:22 Tua ahih manin Johanʼ kamtaite kiangah, “Va ciahkik unla, na muh sa uh le na zak sa uh thute khempeuh Johan kiangah va gen un. Mittawte in khua mu thei a, khebaite lam pai thei a, miphakte damkik a, bilngongte in khua za theikik a, misite kihingsakkik a, mizawngte tungah Lungdamna Thu kihilh hi." 
Luke7:23 Kei hong umte pen a lungdamhuai mahmah ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke7:24 Johanʼ kamtaite a ciahkik khit ciangin Jesu in mihonte tungah Johanʼ thu gen a, “Johan kiang gamlak ah na pai uh ciangin bang a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Huih in a mut awn diamdiam lopa kungte a en ding maw?" 
Luke7:25 Tua ahih kei leh bang a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Puan hoih nono a silh mi khat a en ding maw? A taktakin ci lehang tua bangin puan hoih silh a, nuam takin a omte pen inn lian pipi sungah teeng uh hi." 
Luke7:26 Tua ahihleh bang a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Kamsang pa khat a en dingin a pai na hi uh hiam? Hi hi, kamsang pa a en dingin na pai uh a, kamsang ciang bek hi loin a lian zaw khat na mu uh hi." 
Luke7:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in Johan thu a genna ah, ‘Hih lai ah ka kamtai pa om hi. Nangma lampi a hong dingin na mai ah ka ma paisak ding hi, ci-in Pasian in gen hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke7:28 Johan pen leitung mihing sung khempeuh panin a lian pen ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ Ukna sunga a om mi a neu pen i cihte nangawn Johan sangin lian zaw lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:29 Siahdongte le midangte khempeuh in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Pasianʼ deihna zui-in Johanʼ khut sungah tui a kiphum uh hi. 
Luke7:30 Ahi zongin Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate in Pasianʼ deihna nialin Johan khut sungah tui kiphum ding ut lo uh hi. 
Luke7:31 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tu hun a mite bang tawh genteh dinga, bang tawh kibang ci ding ka hi hiam?" 
Luke7:32 Mihon omna lamkabom ah a tu naupang a kimawlte tawh kibang uh hi. Naupang hon khat in a lawmte kiangah, ‘Lam nading khuang kong tumsak hangun na lam nuam kei uh a, kahna la ka sak hangun lah na kap nuam tuan kei uh hi,’ a cihte tawh a kibang uh hi." 
Luke7:33 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tuiphumpa Johan hong pai a, amah in zu le an tangin a om ciangin, ‘Dawivei hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:34 Mihing Tapa hong pai leuleu a, zune anne-in a om ciangin, ‘Zuhai, anhai pa, siahdongte le midangte in a kikholh pih nop loh mite tawh a kikhawl pa,’ ci leuleu uh hi." 
Luke7:35 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ pilna a man ahih lamtak, ama thu a zui mite in kilangsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:36 Farisi mite khat in a inn ah an ne dingin Jesu sam a, Jesu zong pai-in an ne dingin a tu hi." 
Luke7:37 Tua khua sungah a paktat numei khat om hi. Farisi mipaʼ inn ah Jesu in an ne-in a omna thu a zak ciangin paknamtui suangngo thawl a dim khat hong paipihin," 
Luke7:38 Jesuʼ nungah tu-in kap a, a khitui tawh Jesuʼ khete kawtsakin a sam tawh nulsak a, a khete namin a sathau puak a nuh hi." 
Luke7:39 Jesu a sam Farisi mipa in a muh ciangin a lungsim sungah, “Hih pa pen kamsang taktak hileh amah a lawng hih numei nu a bangci mi ahi hiam cih thei dinga, ama gamtat hoih lohna teng zong thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:40 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Simon aw, kong gen nop khat om hi,” a ci hi. Simon in, “Sia aw, bang hong gen nuam na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
Luke7:41 Jesu in, “Lei a ba mi nih om hi. Khat in ngun peek za nga ba a, a khat in sawm nga ba hi." 
Luke7:42 Amau tegel in a loh zawh loh ciangin a batna pa un a nih tuakun a maisak hi. Hih mi nihte sung panin kua in amah it zaw ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke7:43 Simon in, “Leiba tam a maisakna pa in it zaw dingin ka um hi,” ci-in a dawn ciangin Jesu in, “Na genna man mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:44 Tua ciangin numei lamah Jesu kihei a, Simon kiangah, “Hih numeiʼ gamtatna na mu hiam? Na inn ah kong pai a, ka khe sil nading tui nong pia kei hi. Ahi zongin amah in a khitui tawh ka khe hong silsak a, a sam tawh hong nul keusak hi." 
Luke7:45 Nang in napna tawh leengla na hong do kei a, ahi zongin amah in hih lai ah kong tun a kipanin tu dongin ka khe a nap khawl nai lo hi." 
Luke7:46 Nang in ka lu sathau nong nilhsak kei a, ahi zongin amah in ka khe nangawn sathau namtui hong nuhsak hi." 
Luke7:47 Tua ahih ciangin nang kiangah kong genin ah, ama mawhna tampi tak a omte kimaisak khin ahih manin amah in a itna nakpi takin a lak hi. Ahi zongin tawmno bek a kimaisakte in a itna uh tawmno bek mahin a lak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:48 Tua ciangin Jesu in numei kiangah, “Na mawhnate hong kimaisak khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke7:49 Tua ciangin Jesu tawh sabuai ah an a nekhawm midangte in a lungsim sung uh ah, “Mawhna nangawn a maisak hih mipa kua ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke7:50 Tua ciangin Jesu in numei kiangah, “Na upna in nang hong damsak khinta hi; lungnuam takin va ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:1 Tua zawh tawl khat khit ciangin khuapite le khuaneute ah a banbanin Jesu pai a, Pasianʼ Ukna hangin Lungdamna Thu hilhin a vak kawikawi hi. Tua a vak kawikawina ah nungzui sawm le nihte," 
Luke8:2 le a sung pan dawi a hawl khiatsakte le natna tuamtuam pan a damsak numei pawl khat in zong a zui uh hi. Tua numeite: A sung panin dawi sagih a kihawlkhiatna Mary (Magdala khuami Mary a kici nu)," 
Luke8:3 Herodʼ khutnuai-a ulian Khuzaʼ zi Joanna, Susanna le numei dang tampite hi uh a, amauʼ neihsa tawh Jesu le a nungzuite a huh uh hi." 
Luke8:4 Khua khat khit khua khat panin Jesu kiangah a hong pai mi hong kibeh laplap a, mi tampi tak hong om ciangin Jesu in thu gentehna khat gen a," 
Luke8:5 “Khaici vawhpa khaici vawh dingin a kuan khia hi. Khaici a vawh ciangin pawl khatte lampi dung tu a, khe tawh kisik gawpin vasate in a ne hi." 
Luke8:6 Pawl khatte, suang kitawphahna leilak tu a, a po tei hangin lei sung a nom tam lo ahih manin a vulkik pah hi." 
Luke8:7 Pawl khatte, lingbulsum omna leilak tu a, lingte a khan ciangin a dep lum hi." 
Luke8:8 Pawl khatte, lei hoihna lak tu-in khang a, a zah za khat ciang dong a piang hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesu nakpi takin kiko a, “Zak nading bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi." 
Luke8:9 Hih thu gentehna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a nungzuite in a dot ciangin" 
Luke8:10 Jesu in, “Pasianʼ Ukna thu tawh kisai thusim, note tungah hong kigen hi. Ahi zongin midangte in, enen napi-un a muh loh nading zaza napi-un a tel loh nadingun amaute tungah thu gentehna tawh thu kigen hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:11 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Thu gentehna a khiatna pen hih bang ahi hi: Khaici pen Pasianʼ thu hi." 
Luke8:12 Lam dungah khaici a tukna munte pen Pasianʼ thu a zate a cihnopna ahi hi. Tuate in Pasianʼ thu a zak hangun a thu um loin, hotkhiatna a ngah loh nadingun Dawimangpa hong pai-in a lakkhiatsak hi." 
Luke8:13 Suang kitawphah leilak a tukna munte pen Pasianʼ thu a zak ciangin lungdam takin a sangte a cihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktum lo ahih manin tawl khat sung bek um uh a, ze-etna hun a tun ciangin a puk uh hi." 
Luke8:14 Lingbulsum omna a tukna munte pen Pasianʼ thu za napi-in a nuntakna sung uh ah leitung lunghihmawhna, hauhna le nopsaknate in dep gawp ahih manin bangmah a suak khia zo lote a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Luke8:15 Leihoih a tukna munte pen Pasianʼ thu a zak ciangin lungsim tak tawh a thu mangin kip tawntung uh ahih manin amau adingin man a neite a cihnopna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:16 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mei a vak khit ciangin lawh a khuh ahi a, lupna nuai ah a koih ahi zongin kuamah om lo hi. Inn sungah a lut uh ciangin mite in khua a muh theih nadingin meivak koihna kho sangah koih bek uh hi." 
Luke8:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh, thusimin a kikoih peuhmah, khatvei teitei thulang a suak lo ding, a kiselcip peuhmah, khatvei teitei a kipholak lo ding, bangmah om lo hi." 
Luke8:18 Tua ahih ciangin thu na ngaih uh ciangin limtakin kingaihsun un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a nei sa mipa tungah Pasian in pia thuah dinga, a nei lo mipa tung panin them khat nei-a a kingaihsut nangawn lakkhiatsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:19 Tua laitakin Jesuʼ nu le a naute hong pai uh a, ahi zongin mihon kineh lua uh ahih manin ama kiangah pai thei lo uh hi." 
Luke8:20 Tua ahih manin mi khat in Jesu kiangah, “Na nu le na naute in nang hong mu nuam uh a, inn pua ah om uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in a dawnna-in mihon khempeuh tungah, “Pasianʼ thu za a, a zuite khempeuh pen ka nu le ka sanggamte ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:22 Ni khat, Jesu a nungzuite tawh gunkuang tungah tuang a, amaute kiangah, “Tuili gal khat ah pai ni,” ci-in a pai uh hi." 
Luke8:23 Tua bangin a pai laitakun Jesu a ihmu hi. Tui tungah nakpi takin huihpi hong nungin gunkuang sungah tui dim dingin hong kipan a, lauhuai mahmah hi." 
Luke8:24 Nungzuite in Jesu hong naihin phong uh a, “Topa aw, Topa aw, kote ka si dektak uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Jesu zong tho-in huihpi le tui kilok a daih nadingin thu pia a, a thupiak bangin hong dai dide pah hi." 
Luke8:25 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Na upna uh koi ah om khinta ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amaute lau-in lamdang sa uh a, khatlekhat in, “Hih pa kua ahi hiam? Thu a piak ciangin huihpi le tuihualte nangawn in a thu mang uh hi,” a kici uh hi." 
Luke8:26 Tua ciangin Galilee Tuili gal khat, Gadara gam a tung uh hi." 
Luke8:27 Gunkuang tung panin leilak ah Jesu hong pai suk laitakin tua khua sunga om dawivei mi khat in a na dawn hi. Tua dawivei pa pen sau veipi sung puan silh loin om khin a, inn ah zong om loin han lak khawngah om tawntung hi." 
Luke8:28 Jesu a muh ciangin nakpi takin awngin a mai ah khukdin a, “A Lian Pasianʼ Tapa Jesu aw, kei bang hong nuammawh na hi hiam? Kei, gim nong piak loh nadingin kong thum hi,” ci-in nakpi takin a kiko hi." 
Luke8:29 Hih bangin a cihna pen, ama sung panin dawi a paikhiat nadingin Jesu in thu a piakna hang ahi hi. Dawi in tua mipa tam veipi tak man a, a khut le a khete sikkhau tawh khihin a kikepcip hangin a sikkhaute peksat a, dawi in gamlak ah a paikhiatpih hi." 
Luke8:30 Jesu in ama kiangah, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, ama sungah dawi tampi lut ahih manin, “A Honpi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke8:31 Leihawm thukpi sungah amaute a khiat loh nadingin Jesu kiangah a thum uh hi. 
Luke8:32 Tua laitakin tua kiim mual pang to ah vok honpi khat gamta-in a om hi. Tua vokte sungah a lut theih nadingun dawite in Jesu kiangah thum uh a, Jesu in zong amauʼ ngetna bangin a pia hi." 
Luke8:33 Tua ahih manin dawite zong mipa sung panin pai khia-in vokte sungah lut uh a, vokte zong tui gei keen tung khawngah tuak suk gawpin a vekpi-in tui a kia hi." 
Luke8:34 Vokcingte in hih thupiang a muh uh ciangin amaute tai-in khua sung le gam sung tengah a zasak uh hi. 
Luke8:35 Hih thupiang a en dingin mite hong pai uh a, Jesu kiang a tun uh ciangin dawi a pai khiatna mipa Jesu kiangah omin, puan silhin, a pilkikna thu a muh uh ciangin a vekpi-un lamdang sa-in a lau uh hi." 
Luke8:36 Tua thupiang a mu masa mite in dawivei pa a damna zia thute, amaute tungah a na gen uh hi." 
Luke8:37 Tua ciangin Gadara gam kiim a om khempeuh lau mahmah uh ahih manin Jesu a paikhiat nadingin a sawl uh hi. Jesu zong gunkuang tungah tuangin a ciah hi. 
Luke8:38 Dawi a pai khiatna mipa in Jesu kiangah, “Kei zong hong zuisak in,” ci-in a thum hi; ahi zongin Jesu in," 
Luke8:39 “Na inn ah ciah inla, Pasian in nang adingin bangzah takin na hong sepsak hiam, cihna thu va gen in,” ci-in a sawl khia hi. A mipa zong ciah a, ama adingin Jesuʼ sepsakna thu khempeuh, khua sung tengah a gengen hi." 
Luke8:40 Tuili gal khat ah Jesu hong ciahkik ciangin, ama hong ciahkik ding ngakin om niloh uh ahih manin mite na nuam mahmah uh hi." 
Luke8:41 Tua laitakin kikhopna inn ukpi Jairas a kici mi khat hong pai-in Jesuʼ khe phung ah hong khukdin a, ama inn ah a pai nadingin a thum hi." 
Luke8:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh kum sawm le kum nih a pha tanu khat a neihsun pen a ci na-in a si dektak hi. Jesu zong tua inn zuan dingin a pai laitakin mihonpite in zui-in a nehcip uh hi. 
Luke8:43 Tua laitakin kum sawm le kum nih tawntung siluang natna vei-in, a neih khempeuh siavuante cialna-in a zat hangin kuamah in a damsak zawh loh numei khat," 
Luke8:44 mihonte lak Jesu nungah hong pai-in Jesuʼ puan mongteep lawngsim a, thakhatin a siluang a kang pah hi." 
Luke8:45 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kua in hong lawng na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Kuamah in, “Hong lawng ing,” a cih loh ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, mi khempeuh in nang hong umcihin hong nehcip uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:46 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Ka sung panin vangliatna a paikhiat lamtak phawk ka hih manin mi khat in hong lawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:47 Numei in amah a kiphawkna thu a theih ciangin a liing sa-in hong pai-in Jesu mai ah hong bok a, Jesu a lawnna thu le amah a dampahna thu teng, tua lai-a om mi khempeuhʼ zakin Jesu kiangah a pulak hi." 
Luke8:48 Tua ciangin Jesu in numei kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, na upna in nang hong damsak zo hi; lungnuam takin na ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:49 Tua bangin thu a gen laitakin kikhopna inn ukpaʼ inn panin kamtai khat hong tung a, “Na tanu si khinzo ta hi. Siapa gimsak nawn kei in,” a hong ci hi." 
Luke8:50 Ahi zongin Jesu in hih thu a zak ciangin, kikhopna inn ukpa kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in; upna nei peuh lecin na tanu a hingkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:51 Tua inn ah Jesu a tun ciangin Peter, Johan le James le numeinoʼ nu le pa sim loh kuamah dang, inn sungah zuisak lo hi." 
Luke8:51 Tua inn ah Jesu a tun ciangin Peter, Johan le James le numeinoʼ nu le pa sim loh kuamah dang, inn sungah zuisak lo hi." 
Luke8:52 Tua lai-a om mi khempeuh, tua numeinoʼ sihna hangin kapin, thumin na om uh hi. Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Kap nawn kei un, amah a si hi lo hi; a ihmu bek ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:53 Amah a sih khitna thei uh ahih manin Jesu a nuihsan lel uh hi. 
Luke8:54 Ahi zongin Jesu in numeino a khutin lenin, “Numeino aw, tho in,” a ci hi." 
Luke8:55 Numeino zong hingkik a, thakhatin a tho pah hi. Tua ciangin numeinoʼ nek ding an pia un, ci-in Jesu in a sawl hi." 
Luke8:56 Numeinoʼ nu le pa in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, ahi zongin hih thupiangte kuama kiangah a gen loh nadingun Jesu in a kham hi." 
Luke9:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in nungzui sawm le nihte sam a, dawite a hawlkhiat theih nading uh le cinate a damsak theih nadingun vangliatna le aana a pia hi." 
Luke9:2 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ Ukna thu a hilh ding le cinatnate a damsak dingin kuan khiasakin 
Luke9:3 amaute kiangah, “Tu-a na khualzinna uh ah bangmah keng kei un. Ciangkhut ahi a, ip ahi a, an ahi a, sum ahi zongin keng kei unla, puanak zong a valin keng thuah kei un." 
Luke9:4 Khua khatpeuh ah na lut uh ciangin tua khua panin na paikhiat matengun a inn ah hong tungsakteʼ inn mahah om paisuak un. 
Luke9:5 A inn uh ah a hong tunsak nop lohna khua peuhpeuh panin na paikhiat uh ciangin amaute hilhkholhna in na khe uh a leivui baangte sinsan un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Luke9:6 Nungzuite zong kuan khia uh a, khua khempeuh ah pai-in Lungdamna Thu hilh uh a, a paina khempeuh uh ah cinate a damsak uh hi." 
Luke9:7 Galilee gam sungteng a uk Herod in hih thupiangte a zak ciangin lungmang mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi pawl khat in, “Johan hong hingkik hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke9:8 Pawl khat in, “Elijah hong kilangkik hi,” ci uh a, pawl khat in, “Tanglai kamsangte khat hong hingkik hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:9 Herod in, “Johan a ngawng ka tansak khit sa ahi hi; hih a thu ka zak mipa kua hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin Jesu tawh kimuh ding a hanciam hi." 
Luke9:10 Sawltakte a khualzinna panun a hong tunkik uh ciangin a sepna teng uh Jesu kiangah a gen uh hi. Jesu in zong amauteng bek a om theih nadingun amaute sam khia a, Bethsaida khua lamah a paipih hi." 
Luke9:11 Mihonte in hih thu a theih uh ciangin Jesu nung delh uh a, Jesu in zong amaute na nolh loin, amaute tungah Pasianʼ Ukna thu na hilh a, natna a neite zong a damsak hi." 
Luke9:12 Ni a tum kuan ciangin nungzui sawm le nihte in Jesu kiangah, “Hih lai mun gamlak ahih manin, hih kiim a om khuate ah mite va pai-in annek ding le giah nading a zon nadingun mihonte sawl khia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:13 Ahi zongin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “A nek dingun nek theih khat peuhpeuh pia un,” a cih ciangin amaute in, “Kote va pai-in hih mi khempeuhte adingin an va lei ding ka hih kei buang uh leh, anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih cih sim loh bangmah dang om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke9:14 Tua lai ah mi tul nga bang a om hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite sawm nga, sawm nga-in a pawlpawlin tusak un,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Luke9:15 A nungzuite in zong tua a sawl mah bangin mite a tusak uh hi. 
Luke9:16 Tua ciangin Jesu in anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih la-in vantung lam nga a, Pasian tungah lungdamna ko-in balnen a, mite tungah a lui dingin a nungzuite tungah a pia hi." 
Luke9:17 Mi khempeuh in ne-in a kham khit uh ciangin, a nungzuite in a kikhamval teng khawm uh a, paipel sawm le nih a dim hi." 
Luke9:18 Khat vei, Jesu guak thungenin a om laitakin a nungzuite zong ama kiangah om uh hi. Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite in kei kua hi, hong ci uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke9:19 Amaute in, “Pawl khat in, Tuiphumpa Johan hi, hong ci uh hi. Pawl khat in Elijah hi, hong ci uh a, pawl khat in, tanglai kamsangte khat peuhpeuh hong hingkik hi ding hi, hong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke9:20 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tua ahihleh note in kei kua hi, hong ci na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Tua ciangin Peter in, “Nang pen Pasianʼ Khris na hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke9:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Hih thu kuama kiangah gen kei un,” ci-in a nungzuite thu a pia hi." 
Luke9:22 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mihing Tapa in tampi tak thuak dinga, upate, siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in amah nial ding uh hi. Amah kithat dinga, a ni thum ni-in kihingkiksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:23 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite le mi khempeuh kiangah, “Mi khatpeuh in kei hong zuih nop leh ama deihna bangin gamta nawn loin nisimin a singlamteh pua-in hong zui ding hi." 
Luke9:24 Hih leitung nuntakna a hu nuamte in a nuntakna bulpi nangawn tawh suplawh dinga, keiʼ hangin a nuntakna a suplawhte in a nuntakna bulpi hu zo ding hi." 
Luke9:25 Mi khat in leitung khempeuh a ngah hangin a nuntakna bulpi suplawh leh bang phattuamna om ding ahi hiam? 
Luke9:26 Keima hang le ka thuhilhnate hangin a maizum peuhmah, a Paʼ minthanna vang le a siangtho vantung miteʼ minthanna tawh a minthangin hong paikik ciangin Mihing Tapa zong ama hangin a maizum ding hi." 
Luke9:27 Keʼn kong cih in ah, hih lai ah a om mi pawl khatte in Pasianʼ Ukna a muh khit uh matengin si lo ding uh ahihna phawk un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:28 Hih thu a gen khit nipikal khat bang khit ciangin Jesu in Peter, Johan le James te sam a, mual tungah thungen dingin a paipih to hi." 
Luke9:28 Hih thu a gen khit nipikal khat bang khit ciangin Jesu in Peter, Johan le James te sam a, mual tungah thungen dingin a paipih to hi." 
Luke9:29 Jesu in thu a nget laitakin a mel hong kikheel a, a puante zong pakin tee mahmah hi." 
Luke9:30 Thakhat thu-in mihing nih tawh a kiho-in hong om vat hi. Tua mi nihte pen Moses le Elijah hi a," 
Luke9:31 vantung minthanna vang lim nei uh a, Jerusalem khua ah pai-in sihna tawh Pasianʼ deihna a tunsak nading thu a kikumkum uh ahi hi." 
Luke9:32 Peter le a lawm tegel lusu-in ihmu uh a, ahi zongin amaute hong khanglo-in, Jesuʼ minthanna vang le amah tawh a ding khawm mi nihte a mu uh hi." 
Luke9:33 A mite, Jesu kiang panin a paikhiat laitakin Peter in bang gen ka hi hiam, cih mel zong a thei lopi-in Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, hih lai-a i om, nuam mahmah hi. Nang ading buk khat, Moses ading buk khat, Elijah ading buk khat, buk thum kong lamsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:34 Hih bangin thu a gen laitakin meii hong kai a, a liim in amaute hong liah hi. Meii in a tuamcip ciangin nungzuite a lau uh hi." 
Luke9:35 Tua ciangin meii lakah aw khat hong ging a, “Hih pa, ka Teel sa ka Tapa ahi hi; ama thu na ngai un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:36 Tua awging a bei khit ciangin Jesu guak bek hong om hi. Nungzuite in hih a muh sa uh thu tua hun sawng teng kuama kiangah gen loin a imcip uh hi. 
Luke9:37 A zing ciangin mual tung panin hong pai suk uh a, mi tampi in Jesu na dawn uh hi." 
Luke9:38 Mihon lak panin mi khat hong kiko a, “Sia aw, ka tapa nong etsak nadingin kong thum hi. Amah bek ta a ka neih ahi hi." 
Luke9:39 Dawi in amah man a, thakhat thu-in kiko gawp hi. A cilphuan a buak dongin kongkawcipsak a, gimsak gawp a, nusia nuam lo hi." 
Luke9:40 Na nungzuite in a dawi hong hawl khiatsak nading uh ka thum a, ahi zongin hong hawl khiatsak thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:41 Jesu in, “Note in bangzahin upna nei lo a, bangzahin khial na hi uh hiam? Note bang tanvei hong ompih dinga, bang tanvei hong kikholh pih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Na tapa hong paipih in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke9:42 A naupang hong pai laitakin dawi in leilak ah tuksakin a kongkawcipsak hi. Ahi zongin Jesu in a dawi taii a, naupang damsakin, a pa kiangah a piakik hi." 
Luke9:43 Hih bangin Pasian a vang a liatna hangin mi khempeuh in lamdang a sa uh hi. Mite in Jesuʼ hihnate khempeuh lamdang sa-in a om laitakin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah," 
Luke9:44 “Mihingteʼ khut sungah Mihing Tapa kipia ding ahihna thu mangngilh het kei un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:45 Ahi zongin amaute in a cihnopna thei lo uh hi. Amaute in a theih tel loh nading mahun a kibawl hi a, bang a cihnopna hiam, ci-in Jesu kiangah lah a dong ngam kei uh hi." 
Luke9:46 Kua lian pen ding ihi hiam, ci-in nungzuite lakah kiseelna khat hong om hi." 
Luke9:47 Jesu in amauteʼ lungsim ngaihsutna a phawk ciangin naupang khat la-in a gei ah omsak a," 
Luke9:48 a nungzuite kiangah, “Keima hangin hih naupang a limbawl mi peuhmah in kei hong limbawl hi a, kei hong limbawl mi peuhmah in kei hong sawl pa zong a limbawl ahi hi. Note khempeuh lakah a neu pen pa a lian pen pa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:49 Tua ciangin Johan in, “Topa aw, nangma min tawh dawi a hawl khia mi khat ka mu uh a, amah pen eima pawl sungah a om hi lo ahih manin ka kham uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Luke9:50 Ahi zongin Jesu in ama kiangah, “No hong langpang lote noteʼ pawl ahih manin kham kei un,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:51 Jesu vantungah a kilaktoh ding hun a nai kuan ciangin Jerusalem khua manawh dingin a ngaihsun hi. Ama mai ah nungzui pawl khat ma paisak a," 
Luke9:52 Jesu adingin a kisam khempeuh a vaihawmsak dingin Samaria khua khat ah a lut uh hi. 
Luke9:53 Ahi zongin Jesu in Jerusalem khua manawh sawm ahih manin tua khua mite in Jesu na tungsak nuam lo uh hi. 
Luke9:54 A nungzuite sung pan James le Johan in hih thu a theih uh ciangin Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, vantung panin meikuang ngenin amaute kaang tumsak le ung nong awi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:54 A nungzuite sung pan James le Johan in hih thu a theih uh ciangin Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, vantung panin meikuang ngenin amaute kaang tumsak le ung nong awi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke9:55 Ahi zongin Jesu kihei-in amaute a taii hi. 
Luke9:56 Tua ciangin khua dang khat ah a paisuak uh hi. 
Luke9:57 Lampi ah a pai laitakun mi khat in Jesu kiangah, “Na paina khempeuh ah kong zui ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:58 Jesu in, “Ngiate in lup nading kua nei uh a, vasate in zong giah nading bu nei uh hi. Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa in a luptheih nading mun koi mahah nei lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:59 Tua ciangin Jesu in midang khat kiangah, “Kei hong zui in,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Topa aw, kei hong ciahsak inla, ka pa hong vuisak masa in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:60 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Misi bang ahi mite in misite na vui tahen. Nang na hih leh va pai inla Pasianʼ Ukna thu va hilh in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:61 Tua ciangin midang khat in, “Topa aw, nang ka hong zui ding hi. Ahi zongin ka inn-ate, mangpha hong khasak masa in,” a ci hi." 
Luke9:62 Jesu in ama kiangah, “Bawng lokhawhna len kawmin a nung lam a en mi pen Pasianʼ Ukna tawh kituak lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke10:1 Tua khit ciangin Jesu in ama pai nading khua le mun khempeuh ah nih nihin a na pai dingin mi sawm sagih seh a, ama mai ah a ma paisak hi." 
Luke10:2 Amaute kiangah, “Anlak ding tam mahmah a, ahi zongin mi tawm bek in anlak na sem uh hi. Tua ahih manin an nei pa in a ante a la dingin mi hong sawl nadingin thu ngen un." 
Luke10:3 Note va kuan un. Ngia hon lakah tuuno khah bangin note ka hong sawl hi. 
Luke10:4 Sum ahi a, ip ahi a, khedap a val ahi zongin keng kei un. Lamkal ah mi tawh kimawk hoho kei un." 
Luke10:5 Inn khat peuhpeuh ah na lut uh ciangin, ‘Hih inn ah nopsakna hong tung tahen,’ ci-in hopih masa un." 
Luke10:6 Tua inn sungah nopsakna a ngah thei ding mi a om leh kip paisuak dinga, a om kei leh na hopihna thupha uh na dokkik ding uh hi." 
Luke10:7 Nasemte in a thaman a ngah ding a kilawm ahih mah bangin na zintunna inn mah uh ah omsuak unla, a hong piak peuhpeuh uh na ne un. Na zintunna inn uh kheel themthum kei un." 
Luke10:8 Khua khat peuhpeuh ah na lut uh ciangin note hong tunsak leh, amauteʼ hong lui peuhpeuh ne unla," 
Luke10:9 tua khua sunga cinate damsak un. A khua mite kiangah, ‘Pasianʼ Uk nading hun note adingin hong nai ta hi,’ ci-in gen un." 
Luke10:10 Ahi zongin khua khat peuhpeuh ah na lut uh ciangin note hong tunsak nop kei leh a khua sung kongzing ah pai unla," 
Luke10:11 ‘Na khua sung uh a leivui, ka khe tung uh ah a hong baangte nangawn, note hilhkholhna in ka nul khia uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ Uk nading hun a hong naina thu thei ta un,’ ci-in gen un." 
Luke10:12 Keʼn kong cih in ah, Thukhen Ni ciangin Sodom khua miteʼ thuak ding sangin tua khua miteʼ thuak ding haksa zaw lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:13 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Khorazin khuapi mite le Bethsaida khuapi mite aw, gimna lianpi na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note khua sungah a hong kilak nalamdangte, Taia le Sidon khua sungah kilak hileh amaute in kisikna limin sawtpekin puanhampi silhin vut kinuh ding uh hi." 
Luke10:14 Tua ahih manin Thukhen Ni ciangin Taia le Sidon khuapi miteʼ thuak ding sangin noteʼ thuak ding haksa zaw lai ding hi. 
Luke10:15 No Kapernaum khuapi mite aw, van a sangna munah hong kipahtawi ding sa na hi uh hiam? Hell khuk sungah hong kilawnsuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:16 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Noteʼ thu a hong zuite khempeuh, keiʼ thu a hong zui hi a, noteʼ thu a hong zui lote khempeuh, keiʼ thu a hong zui lo ahi uh hi. Keiʼ thu a hong zui lote khempeuh pen kei a hong sawl paʼ thu a zui lo ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:17 Sawm Sagihte lungdam mahmah in hong ciahkik uh a, “Topa aw, nangma min tawh dawite nangawn ka hawl khia zo uh hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Luke10:18 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Vantung panin keek kia bangin Satan a kiatna ka mu hi." 
Luke10:19 Tu-in thei un. Gulpi le momaite na sik gawp nading uh le na galte uh na zawh nadingun note tungah vangliatna ka hong pia zo a, amaute in note bangmah hong cih zo lo ding uh hi." 
Luke10:20 Ahi zongin dawite in na thu uh hong manna hangin lungdam kei unla, vantungah na min uh a kigelh manin lungdam zaw un,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:21 Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho in lungdamna tawh Jesu kidimsak hi. Jesu in, “Vantung le leitung Topa ahi ka Pa aw, mipilte le misiamte tungah na ip thute, bangmah a thei lo hih mite tungah lak na hih manin ka nuam hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen nangma deihna bang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:22 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Hih nate khempeuh ka Pa in kei tungah hong ap khinzo hi. Pasian sim loh, Tapa a thei kuamah om lo hi. Tapa le Tapa in a theihsak nop mite sim loh, Pa a thei kuamah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:23 Tua ciangin nungzuite lamah kihei a, “Tu-a na muh uh nate na muh manun a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi." 
Luke10:24 Keʼn kong cih in ah, kamsang tampite le kumpi tampite in tu-a noteʼ muhte a muhnop uh hangin mu ngei lo uh a, a zaknop uh hangin za ngei lo uh hi,” ci-in a tuamin a gen hi." 
Luke10:25 Jesu a ze-et dingin Thukham hilh siate khat hong dinga, “Sia aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngah theih nadingin bang sem ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke10:26 Jesu in, “Thukham sungah bang kigelh a, bang sim na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke10:27 Amah in, “Na Topa Pasian na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh, na hatna khempeuh le na pilna khempeuh tawh na it inla, nangmah na ki-it bangin na veengte na it in,” ci-in kigelh hi, ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke10:28 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Na dawnna man mahmah hi. Tua bangin gamta lecin nuntak tawntungna na ngah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:29 Ahi zongin Thukham hilh siapa amah kitangsak nuam ahih manin Jesu kiangah, “Ka veengte i cih kuate ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi."
