Luke10:30 Jesu in dawng a, “Jerusalem panin Jerikho khua ah mi khat pai suk a, lamkal ah migilote in na suam a, a neih khempeuh laksakin a sat gawp khit uh ciangin nusia uh a, a si dektak sa-in a paisan uh hi." 
Luke10:31 Tua laitakin siampi khat tua lampi tawnin hong pai suk a, amah a muh ciangin lam nawl lam tawnin a paisan hi." 
Luke10:32 Tua ciangin Levi mi khat zong tua mah bangin hong pai a, amah a muh ciangin lam nawl lam tawnin a paisan leuleu hi." 
Luke10:33 Ahi zongin Samaria mi khualzin khat, tua lai mun hong tungin a liam pa a muh ciangin hehpihhuai sa a," 
Luke10:34 a kiangah va pai-in a liammate sathau le leenggahzu a nuhsak khit ciangin a tunsak hi. Tua ciangin a la tungah tuangsak a, zintun inn khat ah paipihin tua lai ah a khoi hi." 
Luke10:35 A zingsang ciangin zintun inn nei pa kiangah sum peek nih pia a, ‘Hih mipa limtakin na khoi in. Na beina dang khempeuh, kong paikik ciangin kong loh ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke10:36 Hih mihing thumte sung panin, a kisuam pa adingin a koi pen a veengpa hi dingin na um hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke10:37 Amah in, “A hehpih pa hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Nang zong pai inla, tua bangmahin gamta in,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:38 Amaute a pai laitakun khua khat ah Jesu bang a, Martha kici numei khat in a inn ah na tungsak hi." 
Luke10:39 Martha in Mary kici nau numei khat nei a, Topaʼ thugente ngai-in Mary a om hi." 
Luke10:40 Martha bek in na semin manlah mahmah ahih manin a heh suak a, “Topa aw, ka naunu in kei bek na hong sepsak niloh phamawh sa lo na hi hiam? Kei hong huh nadingin hong sawl in,” a ci hi." 
Luke10:41 Ahi zongin Topa in, “Martha, Martha aw, nang na lunghihmawhna tam hi." 
Luke10:42 Ahi zongin a kisam taktak khat bek om a, Mary in tua a kisam na pen a semsem ahih manin, a nasep kikhawlsak lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke11:1 Khat vei, Jesu in mun khat ah thu a ngen hi. A thunget a man khit ciangin a nungzuite khat in, “Topa aw, Johan in a nungzuite a hilh bangin kote zong thunget zia hong hilh in,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:2 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Hih bangin na ngen ding uh hi: ‘Pa aw, na min siangtho kizahtak henla, na Ukna hun hong tung tahen." 
Luke11:3 Nisim khamkhop an hong pia in. 
Luke11:4 Kote tungah a hong mawhte mawhmaisakna ka neih bangun koʼ mawhna zong hong maisak in. Ze-etna lian hong thuaksak keʼn,’ ci-in na ngen ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:5 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Note khatpeuh, na lawmte uh khat inn ah zankim laitakin pai-in, ‘Lawm aw, anlum lum thum khawng hong leitawisak in." 
Luke11:6 Ka lawmte khat zin hong tung a, ka piak ding ka nei het kei hi,’ ci le-uhcin," 
Luke11:7 amah in a inn sung panin, ‘Hong nawngkaisak dah in. Kong ka kalh khin uh a, ka naupangte tawh ka lum khinzo uh hi. Kong tho khia thei kei a, bangmah kong pia thei kei ding hi,’ ci-in hong dawng ding hi." 
Luke11:8 Tua ahihleh keʼn kong cih in ah, a lawm ahihna hangin amah tho tuan loin bangmah a piak loh hangin, a nget teiteina hangin amah tho-in a kisapna teng a pia ding hi." 
Luke11:9 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong cih in ah: Ngen un; na ngah ding uh hi. Zong un; na mu ding uh hi. Kiu un; kongkhak hong kihon ding hi. 
Luke11:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a ngente khempeuh in ngah dinga, a zongte khempeuh in mu dinga, a kiute khempeuh adingin kong kihon ding hi." 
Luke11:11 Note lakah pa ahi mi khatpeuh in, a tapa in ngasa ngen leh ngasa tangin gul a pia ding," 
Luke11:12 aktui ngen leh aktui tangin momai a pia ding kua om na hi uh hiam? 
Luke11:13 Note mihoih lo hi napi-in na tate uh tungah a hoih piak ding theithei na hih uh leh, vantung a om na Pa un a ngente tungah Kha Siangtho pia zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke11:14 Jesu in a pau thei lo mi khat sung panin dawi hawl khia a, dawi a paikhiat khit ciangin a mipa pau thei a, mite in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Luke11:15 Ahi zongin mi pawl khat in, “Dawimangpa Beelzebul in dawi hawlkhiat theih nading vangliatna ama tungah a pia ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke11:16 Mi pawl khat leuleu in amah a ze-etna-in, Pasianʼ thukimpihna a kilat nadingin nalamdang a bawl ding a ngen uh hi." 
Luke11:17 Ahi zongin Jesu in amauteʼ ngaihsutna thei ahih manin, “Gam khat peuhpeuh, a gam mite kiphelkhamin pawl khat le pawl khat kido le-uh tua gam sauvei kip lo dinga, innkuan khat peuhpeuh a mite kiphelkhamin kido le-uh kikhenthang ding uh hi." 
Luke11:18 Tua mah bangin Satan ukna sunga om mite zong khatlekhat kido le-uh a ukna bangci kip ding ahi hiam? Kei pen, Beelzebulʼ vangliatna tawh dawi hawl khia hi, nong ci uh hi." 
Luke11:19 Keʼn Beelzebulʼ vangliatna tawh dawi hawl khia ka hih leh, na mipihte un kuaʼ vangliatna tawh hawl khia ahi uh hiam? Na ngaihsut khialhna uh amaute in hong langsak ding hi." 
Luke11:20 Noteʼ ngaihsut bang hi loin, keʼn Pasianʼ vangliatna tawh dawite hawl khia ka hih manin, note kiangah Pasianʼ Ukna hun hong tung ta ahihna phawk un." 
Luke11:21 “Mi thahat khat in a hiam neih khempeuh tawh ama inn a cin ciangin a neihsa khempeuh suakta hi. 
Luke11:22 Ahi zongin amah sangin a hat zaw mi khat in amah simin a zawh gawp khit ciangin, ama muan a hiam khempeuh laksakin a pawlte tawh a hawm hi." 
Luke11:23 Kei hong pawlpih lo peuhmah keima lang hi uh a, tuute hong kaihkhop pih lo peuhmah tuute a thehthang gawpte ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:24 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mi khatpeuh sung panin dawi a kihawlkhiat khit ciangin a ten nading mun keuna zongin a vak kawikawi hi. A om nading mun a muh loh ciangin, ‘Hong kihawlkhiatna inn mahah lutkik ning,’ ci hi." 
Luke11:25 A hong tunkik ciangin hoihtakin kiphiat siangin a hoih linlianin a mu hi. 
Luke11:26 Tua ciangin amah pai khiakikin, amah sangin a sia zaw dawi sagih hong paipih a, a sungah lutin a teeng uh hi. Tua mipaʼ pianzia pen a masa sangin hong sia zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:27 Jesu in hih thu a gen khit ciangin mihon lak panin numei khat hong pau khia a, “Nang hong paii numei, a nawi na teep numei, mi hampha mahmah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:28 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Pasianʼ thu za-in a zuite hampha zaw lai hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke11:29 Mihonte in Jesu hong neh semsem uh a, Jesu in zong a thugen zomlai-in, “Tu hun mite gilo mahmah uh hi. Amaute in lim lamdang ngen uh a, ahi zongin Jonah lim sim loh a dang kipia lo ding hi." 
Luke11:30 Nineveh khua mite adingin kamsang Jonah pen lim khat ahih mah bangin tu hun mite adingin Mihing Tapa zong, lim ahi ding hi." 
Luke11:31 Thukhen Ni ciangin leitaw lam gam pan a hong pai Kumpinu hong dingin tu hun mite mawhsakna thu hong gen ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Solomonʼ pilna thu a za dingin leimong khat panin amah hong pai a, ahi zongin Solomon sangin a lian zaw khat hih lai ah om hi." 
Luke11:32 Thukhen Ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite hong dingin note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Jonahʼ thuhilhna a zak uh ciangin a mawhnate uh kisik uh a, ahi zongin Jonah sangin a lian zaw khat hih lai ah a om hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:33 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kuamah in meivak a vak khit ciangin a munbu ah koih lo a, lawh zong khuh lo hi. Inn sungah a lut mi khempeuh in khua a muh theih nadingin meivak koihna tungah a koih zaw hi." 
Luke11:34 Na mittang uh noteʼ pumpi adingin meivak tawh kibang hi. Na mit uh ciim leh na pumpi khempeuh un hoihtakin mu thei a, na mit uh maang leh na pumpi uh adingin khuamial ahi hi." 
Luke11:35 Tua ahih ciangin na pumpi sung uh a om khuavak pen khuamial ahih khak loh nading limtakin kingaihsun un. 
Luke11:36 Tua bang hi peuh leh, meivak a taan ciangin khua na muh uh mah bangin na pumpi uh adingin khua mialna mun om loin a vekpi-in a taangkim ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:37 Jesu in a thugen a man khit ciangin Farisi mi khat in an nek pih dingin Jesu a sam hi. Amah zong pai-in an ne dingin a tu hi. 
Luke11:38 Jesu in khut sil masa loin an a neklam a muh ciangin Farisi mipa in lamdang sa mahmah hi. 
Luke11:39 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “No Farisi mite in hai leh kuangte a pualam na siangsak uh a, ahi zongin note na lungsim sung uh ah huaihamin na gi kei uh hi." 
Luke11:40 No mihaite aw, a pualam a bawlpa in a sung lam zong bawl hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Luke11:41 Ahi zongin na hai leh na kuang sung uh ah a omte pen itna tawh mizawngte tungah pia le-uhcin, note adingin na khempeuh hong siang ding hi." 
Luke11:42 “No Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in Pasian tungah lengmasel, thuambuak a kipan anteh theipuam dongin sawm-ah-khat pia napi-in, mite tungah thuman ding le Pasian it ding na don kha kei uh hi. Hihte khempeuh na hih kim ding uh hi a, paih khiatna neih ding uh hi lo hi." 
Luke11:43 “No Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Kikhopna inn sungah tutphah nuam pen ah na tu nuam uh a, mihon lakah hong kizahtak hopih ding na ut uh hi." 
Luke11:44 A kiciamteh lo hankhuk, mite in a theih loh manun a va sik khakna munte tawh na kibang uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:45 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate khat in Jesu kiangah, “Sia aw, hih bang thu na gen ciangin kote zong a hong ko bawl na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:46 Jesu in, “No Thukham hilh siate in zong gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in a puak hak mahmah ding van, mite tungah na suan uh a, ahi zongin tua van a puak pih dingin na khut meno khat nangawn uh na tangsak nuam kei uh hi." 
Luke11:47 Note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Na pu na pate un a thah sa kamsangteʼ han a hoihin na bawl uh hi. 
Luke11:48 Tua ahih manin na pu na pate uh gamtatnate a thukimpih, a tecite na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kamsangte thatin, note in a han na bawl uh hi." 
Luke11:49 Tua thu hangin Pasianʼ Pilna a kici laibu sungah, ‘Amaute kiangah kamsangte le sawltakte ka sawl dinga, amaute in tua mite pawl khat bawlsia-in na that ding uh hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke11:50 Tua ahih manin leitung piancil a kipan kamsang a kithatte khempeuh hangin tu hun a mite gim kipia dinga," 
Luke11:51 Abel a kithah a kipan biakna tau le siangtho mun kikalah a kithat Zekhariah a sihna ciang dong, tua mi thahna hangin gimna a thuak ding uh hi. Keʼn kong cih in ah, hih thute khempeuh hangin tu hun a mite gim hong kipia taktak ding hi." 
Luke11:52 No Thukham hilh siate in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in pilna ngah theih nading konghonna tawhtang nei napi-in a sungah note na lut tuan kei uh a, a tum dingin a paite zong lah na khaktan uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke11:53 Tua mun panin Jesu a paikhiat khit a kipanin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in nakpi takin Jesu mawh zon ding kipanin thu tampi tak dong uh a," 
Luke11:54 a kampau khialhnate a mat theih nadingun thangsiahin a hanciam uh hi. 
Luke12:1 Mi a tul tampite hong kikhawmin khatlekhat a kisik kha gawp dongin kinehcipin a om laitakin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah thu gen masa a, “Farisi miteʼ kineihkhemna ahi, a silngo uh limtakin kidawm un." 
Luke12:2 A kiseelte khatvei teitei kimu dinga, thusimte khatvei teitei thulang suak ding hi." 
Luke12:3 Zan khuamial sunga na gente uh sun khuavak sungah kigenkik dinga, inn sung tawng ah na kihuau simnate uh mi khempeuh in thei thang ding uh hi." 
Luke12:4 “Lawmte aw, note kiangah kong genin ah, pumpi a thah khit ciangin a sia zaw a hih thei nawn lote na kihta kei un." 
Luke12:5 Kuate kihta ding na hi uh hiam cih leh, mite in a thah khit sa mipa pen hell khuk sungah a khia thuah thei lai Pasian na kihta un." 
Luke12:6 Gitta nga ciangin hamu-in kizuak lel hi lo ahi hiam? Tua bang hi lel napi-in Pasian in gitta khat beek mangngilh lo hi. 
Luke12:7 Na lutung uh a om na sam mal zah ciat nangawn uh Pasian in thei khin hi. Note lunghimawh kei un. Gitta tampi sangin na manpha zaw ciat uh hi. 
Luke12:8 “Note kiangah kong cih in ah, keima mi ahihna miʼ theihin a gen khiate, Mihing Tapa in zong Pasianʼ vantung miteʼ mai ah, keima mi hi, ci-in gen khia dinga," 
Luke12:9 ahi zongin keima mi ahihna miʼ theihin a gen khia nuam lote, Pasianʼ vantung mite mai ah zong keima mi hi, ci-in Mihing Tapa in gen khia nuam lo ding hi." 
Luke12:10 Mihing Tapa a langpangte a mawhna uh kimaisak thei dinga, Kha Siangtho a langpangte a mawhna uh kimaisak lo ding hi." 
Luke12:11 Thusitna a thuak dingin kikhopna inn ah ahi a, hausa zumah ahi zongin hong paipih uh ciangin bang gen dinga, bangci kihut ding ka hi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un." 
Luke12:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh a hun a tun ciangin Kha Siangtho in na gen ding teng uh hong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:13 Tua laitakin mihon lak panin mi khat in Jesu kiangah, “Sia aw, ka pa un a hong sihsan gamh pawl khat tawh ka u in kei hong inntuan nadingin hong gensak in,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:14 Ahi zongin Jesu in a mipa kiangah, “No unauʼ gamh a hawm dingin kua in kei hong seh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke12:15 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute khempeuh kiangah, “Hoihtakin kidawm unla, na huaiham loh nadingun kikem un. Bang hang hiam cih leh bangzah ta-in mi khat a hauh hangin a neihsa tawh a nuntakna taktak kicing zo lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:16 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna khat gen a, “Mihau pa khatʼ lo ah an tampi a piang hi." 
Luke12:17 Tua ciangin amah in a lungsim sungah, ‘Ka an khempeuh ka koih nading mun kicing lo ahih manin bang cih ding ka hi hiam?" 
Luke12:18 Tua ahih manin hih bangin ka gamta ding hi: Ka ansalte phelin a lian zaw ansalte ka lam dinga, tuate sungah ka ante le ka neih khempeuh ka seng ding hi." 
Luke12:19 Tua ciangin keimah in: Mi hampha mahmah ka hi hi. Kum tampi sung ka khom ding an nek tui dawn le na hoih tampi ka nei hi. An ne, zu ne-in, a nuam theithei-in ka om hithiat ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke12:20 Ahi zongin Pasian in ama kiangah, ‘Mihai pa aw, tu zan mahmah in na si ding hi. Hih na neihsa teng kuaʼn zang nawn ding ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in a thugen a khupna-in, “Tua mah bangin amau ading bekin a kholcipte pen Pasianʼ muhna panin mihau hi lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:22 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin ah: I nuntak nadingin bang ne dinga, i pumpi tungah bang silh ding ihi hiam, ci-in lunghimawh kei un." 
Luke12:23 Nuntakna pen an sangin thupi zaw a, pumpi pen puan sangin thupi zaw hi." 
Luke12:24 Vasate ngaihsun dih un: Amaute in khai tuh lo uh a, an lak cih zong nei lo uh hi. Amaute in beemlepang zong nei lo napi-in Pasian in annek tasamsak lo hi. Vasate sangin note nakpi takin na manpha zaw uh hi." 
Luke12:25 Note na lunghihmawh manun na nuntak hun uh nai khat sung bek a sot to thei kua om na hi uh hiam? 
Luke12:26 Tua bang a themno khat nangawn hih thei lo na hih uh leh bang hangin a dangte lunghimawh se na hi uh hiam? 
Luke12:27 Gamlak a paakte ngaihsun dih un. Tuate in a nek ding uh na sem lo uh a, a silh ding uh puan zong gan lo uh hi. Ahi zongin note kiangah kong genin ah: Bangzahin a hauh hangin Solomon nangawn, hih paakte khat zahin a hoihin kizem zo lo lai hi." 
Luke12:28 Upna neu mite aw, tu ni-in om a, zing ciangin keutumin meikhuk sungah a kikhultum lopa kungte, Pasian in puansilh guan ahihleh note hong guan zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Luke12:29 Tua ahih manin bang ne ding, bang dawn ding, ci-in lunghimawhin om tawntung kei un." 
Luke12:30 Gentail mi khempeuh in hih nate lunghihmawh penin nei uh hi. Hih nate na kisap lamtak uh zong na Pa un hong thei hi. 
Luke12:31 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ Ukna ngaihsutin nei masa zaw un. Tua hileh hih na kisapna dangte uh zong Pasian in hong pia thuah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:32 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tuu hon tawmnote aw, lau-in lunghimawh kei un. Na Pa un ama Ukna sungah ukna thu a nei dingin a hong seh sa ahi hi." 
Luke12:33 Na neihsa uh zuak unla, mizawngte tungah tua sumte na pia un. Note adingin a sia thei lo sumkholna na bawl unla, gutate in a luh zawh lohna, leikha in zong a nek zawh lohna, cikmahin a kiam ngei het loh nading mun vantungah na sumte uh na khol un." 
Luke12:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sum uh a omna munah na lungsim uh om tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:35 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Na kawng uh gakin, na mei uh vakin a kiging sa-in om unla," 
Luke12:36 a topa uh mopawi simna panin hong tungin kongkhak a kiuh ciangin thakhatin kong a hon pah theih nadingun a topaʼ ciah ding a ngak nasemte bangin om un. 
Luke12:37 A topa hong ciah ciangin a kiging sa-in amah ngakin a om uh a muh nasemte pen mi hampha mahmah ahi uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin ah, a topa zong hong kithawi-in a nasemte an vak dingin tusak dinga, a mahmah in a nasemte an thukin na a sem ding hi." 
Luke12:38 Zankim laitak ahi a, zingsang khuavak kuan lam ahi zongin a hong ciah hun peuhpeuh ciangin amah ngakin a om a muh nasemte pen mi hampha mahmah ahi uh hi." 
Luke12:39 Ahi zongin na phawk ding uh thu khat om hi. Mi khat in guta paʼ hong pai ding hun thei khol leh a inn luhsak lo ding hi. 
Luke12:40 Tua mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong na upmawh loh uh hun laitakin hong pai ding ahih manin note zong a kiging sa-in om tawntung un,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:41 Peter in, “Topa aw, hih thu gentehna ko bek nong cihna ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mi khempeuh ading na cihna ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke12:42 Topa in, “A pil a citak nasem pa i cih a bangcite ahi hiam? A nasep pih dangte ukin a hun manmanin amauteʼ nekzah ding ciat a pia dingin a topa in a seh nasem pa ahi hi." 
Luke12:43 A topa hong ciah ciangin hih ama sawl bangin a sem a muh nasem pa pen mi hampha mahmah ahi hi. 
Luke12:44 Keʼn kong cih in ah, a neihsa khempeuh a uk dingin a topa in tua nasem pa koih takpi ding hi." 
Luke12:45 Ahi zongin tua nasem pa in a lungsim sungah, ‘Ka topa hong ciahkik hak ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsunin a nasep pih numei le pasalte sat gawp henla, zukham ankhamin om mawk leh," 
Luke12:46 tua nasem paʼ topa pen ama upmawh loh ni, a theih kholh loh hunin hong tung ding hi. A topa in nakpi takin amah gim pia dinga, a thumang lo mite tawh a kibangin a thuaksak khawm ding hi." 
Luke12:47 A topaʼ deihna thei napi-in a topaʼ deih bangin a gamta nuam lo nasem pa pen nakpi takin kisat ding hi. 
Luke12:48 Ahi zongin a topaʼ deihna a theih lohna hangin sat thuak nading a gamta kha nasem pa pen kidam sat zaw deuh ding hi. Tampi a kipiakna pa tung pan tampi kikal dinga, a tam zaw a ki-apna pa tung pan a tam zaw kikal ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke12:49 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Leitungah meikuang a khah dingin a hong pai ka hi a, tu mahmah in a meikuang kipan khinta hileh ka ut hi." 
Luke12:50 Gimna sungah ka kiphum nading khat om a, tua thu a kikhit matengin ka lungsim a nuam thei kei hi." 
Luke12:51 Leitungah kilemna a omsak dingin a hong pai hong sa na hi uh hiam? Hi lo hi. Keʼn kong cih in ah, kikhenna a omsak dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi." 
Luke12:52 Tu a kipanin innkuan sungah mihing nga a phate, a langah thum, a langah nihin kikhenin kido ding uh hi." 
Luke12:53 A pa in a tapa do-in, a tapa in a pa do dinga, a nu in a tanu do-in, a tanu in a nu do dinga, a teeknu in a monu do-in, a monu in a teeknu do ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke12:54 Jesu in mihonte kiangah zong, “Nitumna lamah meiipi hong kai na muh uh ciangin, ‘Guah hong zu ding hi,’ ci-in thakhatin na gen thei pah uh a, tua mah bangin guah hong zu takpi hi." 
Luke12:55 Leitaw lam panin huih hong nun ciangin, ‘Ni hong sa ding hi,’ na ci uh a, tua mah bangin ni hong sa takpi hi." 
Luke12:56 No a kineihkhem mite aw, vanlelei na et uh ciangin a piang ding thu thei na hih uh leh, tu hun thute bang hangin theithei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke12:57 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Bang hangin na gamtat nading uh a manin khen thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke12:58 Mi khatpeuh in na tungah thu hong bawlin zum ah hong paipih leh, zum a, thukhente mai ah hong kai gawpin, thukhente in palikte kiangah hong apin, palikte in thong sungah a hong koih loh nadingin, na lang pa uh tawh na thu uh a sian theih nadingin na siam tawpun lamkal ah hanciam un." 
Luke12:59 Keʼn kong cih in ah, tua bangin gamta kei le-uhcin, na liau sum uh na piak khit matengun thong panin na suakta kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:1 Tua laitakin tua lai-a om mi pawl khat in Jesu kiangah, Galilee mite in Pasian kiangah biakna pia-in a om laitakin Pilat in a thah miteʼ thu a gen uh hi." 
Luke13:2 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Tua bangin hih Galilee mite kithat ahih manin, Galilee midangte khempeuh sangin hih a kithat mite a mawhna uh lian zaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:3 Hi lo hi. Keʼn kong cih in ah, na mawhna panun na kisik kei uh leh amaute mah bangin note zong na si ding uh hi." 
Luke13:4 Tua ahih kei leh, Siloam Tuibeem gei-a tausang a puk lai-in a den lup mi sawm le giatte bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam? Hih bangin a sih manun Jerusalem khua sunga a teeng midangte sangin a mawhna uh lian zaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:5 Hi lo hi. Keʼn kong cih in ah, na mawhna panun na kisikkik kei uh leh note zong amaute mah bangin na si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:6 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna khat gen a, “Mi khat in a lo lai ah theikung khat a suansak hi. Theigah a lo dingin a pai ciangin bangmah na gah lo hi." 
Luke13:7 Tua ahih manin amah in a lokho pa kiangah, ‘A beisa kum thum sung theigah lo dingin ka pai zelzel a, ahi zongin gah lo hi. Tua ahih manin phuk in. Bang hangin lo sung mawk nawngkaisak ding ahi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Luke13:8 Tua ciangin lokho pa in, ‘Topa aw, tu kum sung zong hih bangmahin omsak lai phot in. A phung kimkot to-in eklei ka sung ding hi." 
Luke13:9 Kum kik ciangin hong gah leh a hoih hi pah ding hi. Ahi zongin hong gah kei veve leh i phuk ding hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:10 Sabbath ni khatin Jesu in kikhopna inn khat sungah thu hilhin a om hi. 
Luke13:11 Dawivei numei khat tua lai ah om a, tua dawi in kum sawm le kum giat sung tua numei cinasakin a nung kulsak a, ding tang thei het loin a om hi." 
Luke13:12 Jesu in tua numei a muh ciangin a kiangah sam a, “Lawm aw, na natna panin na dam ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:13 Tua ciangin numei tungah a khut nga a, thakhat thu-in amah ding tang thei-in Pasian a phat pah hi." 
Luke13:14 Ahi zongin Jesu in Sabbath ni-in cina a damsakna hangin kikhopna inn ukpa a heh suak a, mite kiangah, “Na a kisep theih nading hun ni guk sung om hi. Tua hun sungin hong pai-in kidamsak unla, ahi zongin Sabbath ni-in hong pai kei un,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:15 Tua ciangin Topa in amah dawng a, “No a kineihkhem mite aw, note in Sabbath ni mahin zong na bawngte uh ahi a, na late uh ahi zongin a buk panin na khihna khaute uh sutin, tui pia dingin paipih hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke13:16 Tua mah bangin Satan in Abrahamʼ suante khat ahi hih numei pen kum sawm le kum giat sung hencip hi. Hih a kihencipna panin Sabbath ni-in hih numei khahkhiat ding kilawm hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke13:17 Hih Jesuʼ dawnna in a langte khempeuh maizumsak a, Jesuʼ sep hih nalamdangte khempeuh hangin midang khempeuh a lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Luke13:18 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Pasianʼ Ukna bang tawh kibang a, bang tawh genteh ding ka hi hiam cih leh:" 
Luke13:19 Mi khat in a lo ah a vawh ankam tang khat tawh kibang hi. Tua ankam tang hong khangin kung golpi hong suak a, vasate in a hiang tungah bu a tom thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:20 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Pasianʼ Ukna bang tawh genteh leuleu ding ka hi hiam cih leh:" 
Luke13:21 Nupi khat in annel lom sungah a sawh silngo tawh kibang hi. Tua silngo in a annel lom khempeuh a pawmsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:22 Tua ciangin khuapite le khuaneute nawkin Jesu paisuak a, Jerusalem khua manawhin a pai kawmin thu a hilh hi." 
Luke13:23 Tua laitakin mi khat in, “Siapa aw, hotkhiatna a ngah mi tawmno khat bek hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke13:24 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Kong kawcik tawnin na lut nadingun hanciam un. Note kiangah kong genin ah, mi tampi tak in lut ding a hanciam uh hangin lut zo lo ding uh hi." 
Luke13:25 Inn nei pa hong tho-in kong hong khak ciangin, note kong pua lamah dingin kongkhak na kiu ding uh a, ‘Topa aw, kote zong kong hong hon in,’ na ci ding uh hi. Amah in, ‘Note koi lai panin a hong pai na hi uh hiam kong thei kei hi,’ ci-in hong dawng ding hi." 
Luke13:26 Note in, ‘Nangmah tawh an ne tui dawnkhawmin i om a, ka khua sung uh ah thu nong hilh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Luke13:27 Ahi zongin amah in, ‘Note koi panin a hong pai cih kong thei kei hi. A giloin a gamta note khempeuh aw, kei kiang panin paikhia un,’ hong ci ding hi." 
Luke13:28 Pasianʼ Ukna sungah Abraham, Isaac, Jakob le kamsangte khempeuh a omna mu napi-in, note a pua lamah hong kihawlkhiat ciangin tua huna na kahna uh le na ha gawina uh bangzah takin nasia ding ahi hiam?" 
Luke13:29 Nisuahna le nitumna, leilu le leitaw lam panin mite hong pai-in Pasianʼ Ukna sung sabuai kiimah tukhawm ding uh hi." 
Luke13:30 Tua hi a, tu hun a mi neute tua hun ciangin mi lian hi dinga, tu hun a mi liante tua hun ciangin mi neu hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke13:31 Tua hun laitakin Farisi mi pawl khat hong pai-in Jesu kiangah, “Herod in nang thah hong sawm ahih manin hih lai panin mun dang khat ah paikhia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke13:32 Jesu in, “Pai unla, ngia bangin ngian a zang tua Herod kiangah hih bangin va gen un: ‘Tu ni le zing ciang sung dawi hawl khia-in cina ka damsak dinga, thai ciangin ka nasep ka man ding hi, ci hi,’ va ci un." 
Luke13:33 Ahi zongin tu ni, zing le thai sungteng ka ma nawt suakin ka pai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khua sung lobuang mun dangah kamsang pa a kithah ding kilawm lo hi." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalem, Jerusalem aw, kamsangte na that a, Pasianʼ hong sawl kamtaite na deng lum hi. Akpi in a kha tawh a note a huai mah bangin na mite ka huai nuam tawntung a, ahi zongin na ut kei hi." 
Luke13:35 Tu-in na innte kinusiacip ding hi. ‘Topa min tawh a hong pai mipa, Pasian in thupha pia tahen,’ na cih hun hong tun matengin kei nong mu nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:1 Sabbath ni khatin Farisi mi upa khatʼ inn ah an ne dingin Jesu pai a, mite in amah encik uh hi." 
Luke14:2 Tua laitakin a khut le a khe a bawk mi khat Jesu kiangah hong pai a," 
Luke14:3 Jesu in zong Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite kiangah, “Sabbath ni-in cina damsak ding i Thukham in hong hiam, khak hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke14:4 Ahi zongin kuamah in dawng loin omcip uh hi. Jesu in zong tua mipa samin a damsak khit ciangin a ciahsak hi. 
Luke14:5 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note khatpeuhʼ tapa ahi a, na bawngtal uh ahi zongin tuikhuk thukpi sungah Sabbath ni-in kia leh, Sabbath ni hi napi-in kai khia veve ding hi lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke14:6 Ahi zongin kuamah in hih thu dawng thei lo uh hi. 
Luke14:7 Tua annekna ah a kisam mite pawl khat, ulianteʼ tut nading munah a tut nopna uh a muh ciangin amaute kiangah thu khat gen a," 
Luke14:8 “Mopawi khatpeuh ah hong kisap ciangin ulianteʼ tut nading munah tu kei un. Tua pawi siim dingin a kisamte lakah note sangin a ulian zaw khat hong om kha thei dinga," 
Luke14:9 innteek pa in note kiangah, ‘Hih lai ah amah tusak zaw ni,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua ciangin mi nautangteʼ tutna munah maizumpi in na tu suk ding uh hi." 
Luke14:10 Note pen tua bangin a hong kisap ciangin mi nautangteʼ tutna munah na tu zaw un. Innteek pa hong pai-in, ‘Lawm aw, hih tutphah nuamah hong tu zaw in,’ hong ci ding hi. Tua bangin leengla dangte khempeuh lakah hong cih ciangin nang adingin angtan huai mahmah hi." 
Luke14:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kiliansakte khempeuh in niamkhiatna thuak ding uh a, a kiniamkhiatte khempeuh a lianin kibawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:12 Tua ciangin Jesu in a innteek pa kiangah, “Sun-an nekna ah ahi a, nitak an nekna ah ahi zongin mi na sap ciangin, na lawmte ahi a, na sanggamte ahi a, na behte ahi a, mihau na veengte ahi zongin sam kei in. Amaute in zong an ne ding mahin nang hong samkik ding uh a, hih bangin hong sapna hangin na anvakna thaman a ngahkik na hi ding hi." 
Luke14:13 Tua bangin anvakna pawi na bawl ciangin mizawngte, khezawte, khebaite le mittawte sam in." 
Luke14:14 Amaute in nang hong thukkik zo lo ding uh ahih manin nang adingin a lungdamhuai hong hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin mihoihte a thawhkik hun ciangin Pasian in nang tungah hong thukkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:15 An ne-a a tut pih mite khat in hih thu a zak ciangin Jesu kiangah, “Pasianʼ Ukna sungah an ne-a a tu mite bangzahin mi hampha ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke14:16 Jesu in ama kiangah, “Khat vei mi khat in pawi lianpi khat bawlin mi tampi a sam hi." 
Luke14:17 Annek ding hun ciangin a nasem pa sawl a, ‘Tu-in na khempeuh a baih sa-in om khin ahih manin hong pai ta un,’ ci-in a khoh sa mite a samsak hi." 
Luke14:18 Ahih hangin a khoh sa mite in a pai theih loh nading uh paulap zong ciat uh hi. A masa pen pa in, ‘Lo khat ka lei a, ka va et ding kisam ahih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Luke14:19 A dang khat in, ‘Bawngtal kap nga ka lei a, a va sin ding ka hih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Luke14:20 A dang khat leuleu in, ‘Ka zi ding a kila khin phet ahih manin kong pai thei kei ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Luke14:21 Tua ahih ciangin a nasem pa hong ciahin a topa kiangah hih thute hong zasak hi. Tua ciangin innteek pa a heh suak a, a nasem pa kiangah, ‘Khua sung kongzing khempeuh ah va pai inla, mizawng, khe zaw, mittaw le khebai mite hong paipih in,’ ci-in a sawl leuleu hi." 
Luke14:22 Tua khit a sawt loin a nasem pa in, ‘Topa aw, na cih bangin ka sam khin a, ahi zongin om nading mun om lai hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke14:23 Tua ciangin a topa in a nasem pa kiangah, ‘Gam sung lam liante le lam neute ah va pai inla, ka inn ah mi a dim theih nadingin mi khempeuh hong paipih mang khin in." 
Luke14:24 Keʼn kong cih in ah, ka sap masak mite khat beek in ka an ciam kha lo ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke14:25 Mi tampi tak in Jesu hong zui uh a, Jesu zong kihei-in amaute kiangah," 
Luke14:26 “Kei kiangah a hong pai mite peuhmah in a nu le a pa, a zi le a ta, a sanggam numeite le a sanggam pasalte le ama pumpi mahmah a nial ngam kei leh keima nungzui suak thei lo ding hi." 
Luke14:27 Ama singlamteh mah puatawmin ka nung hong zui lote, keima nungzui hi thei lo hi." 
Luke14:28 Mi khatpeuh in inn lianpi khat lam ding a sawm le, ka zo zo ding hiam cih a theih nadingin a bei ding zah tuat masa hi." 
Luke14:29 Tua bangin tuat masa kei leh tua inn a khuampite a phuh khit ciangin zawh lohpi-in khawl dinga, tua inn a kizo lo a mu mite khempeuh in amah nuihsan ding uh hi." 
Luke14:30 ‘Hih mipa in inn lam ding kipan napi-in zo zo lo hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Luke14:31 Galkap tul sawm a nei kumpi khat in galkap tul sawm nih tawh a hong kuan kumpi khat do dingin a kithawi leh, tua kumpipa a do zo ding mahin i hat takpi hiam ci-in ngaihsun masa ding hi." 
Luke14:32 A zo zo ding ahih vet kei leh, tua kumpipa a hong tun ma, a gamla ah a om lai-in, ama kiangah kamtaite sawl dinga, kilem nading thu gensak ding hi." 
Luke14:33 Tua mah bangin mi khat in a neih khempeuh a piakkhiat ngam kei leh keima nungzui suak thei lo ding hi. 
Luke14:34 “Ci hoih hi; ahi zongin a alna bei leh i al kiksak theih nading lampi om lo hi. 
Luke14:35 Lei hoihsak nadingin kizang thei lo a, eklei dingin zong kibawl thei lo ahih manin paih mawk a kul hi. Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in za ta un,” a ci hi." 
Luke15:1 Khat vei, Jesuʼ thugen a ngai dingin siahdongte le mawhneite tampi tak a hong pai uh hi." 
Luke15:2 Farisi mite le Thukham hilh siate phun uh a, “Hih mipa, mawhneite tawh kikhawlin an nangawn nekhawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke15:3 Tua ahih manin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna khat gen a," 
Luke15:4 “Note sung panin khatpeuh in tuu za khat nei-in, tua sung panin khat mansuah leh bang cih ding ahi hiam? Lopa ne-in a gamta tuu sawm kua le kuate nusia-in, a muh matengin tua a mang tuu khat a zong dingin kuan khia ding hi." 
Luke15:5 A muh ciangin lungdam mahmah in a liangko ah pua-in ciahpih ding hi. 
Luke15:6 Inn a tun ciangin a lawmte le a veengte samin, ‘A mang sa ka tuu mukik ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. Lungdamna pawi bawl ni,’ a ci ding hi." 
Luke15:7 Tua mah bangin kisikkik ding a kisam lo mihoih sawm kua le kuate tungah lungdamna sangin mawhnei mi khat a kisikna hangin vantungah lungdamna lian zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke15:8 Tua ciangin Jesu in tua ahih kei leh zong, “Numei khat in sum peek sawm a neih sung panin khat mansuah leh bang cih ding ahi hiam? Meivak vakin, a inn sungteng phiatin, a muh matengin mun khempeuh limtakin zong ding hi." 
Luke15:9 A muh ciangin a lawmte le a veengte samin amaute kiangah, ‘Ka sum mansuah sa mukik ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. Lungdamna pawi bawl ni,’ ci ding hi." 
Luke15:10 Tua mah bangin mawhnei mi khat a kisikkikna hangin Pasianʼ vantung mite lungdam mahmah uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke15:11 Tua ciangin Jesu in thu gentehna khat gen leuleu a, “Mi khat in tapa nih a nei hi." 
Luke15:12 A nau zaw pa in, ‘Pa aw, neihsa keiʼ ngah ding taang teng tu-in hong pia in,’ a ci hi. Tua ahih manin a pa in zong, a ta tegel a hawmsak hi." 
Luke15:13 Ni tawm khat khit ciangin a nau zaw pa in ama neihsa teng zuakin a sum tawh inn panin a gamlapi ah paikhia a, a sumte a phengzat gawp hi." 
Luke15:14 A sum neih khempeuh a zat mang khit ciangin tua ama omna gamah kialpi tung a, ahi zongin amah in bangmah nei nawn lo hi." 
Luke15:15 Tua ahih manin tua gam mite khat kiangah nasem dingin va pai a, a innteek pa in vok cing dingin ama lo ah a sawl hi." 
Luke15:16 Vokteʼ be gap nekte nangawn a duhgawh ciang dongin om a, ahi zongin kuamah in an pia lo hi." 
Luke15:17 A tawpna ah thu ngaihsun thei a, ‘Ka paʼ nasemte khempeuh in gaih zawh lohin an khamval nei uh a, tu-in hih lai ah gil kialin a puksi ding ka hi ta hi." 
Luke15:18 Kei kithawi-in ka pa kiangah ka ciah dinga, “Pa aw, Pasian tung le nangma tungah ka khial khin hi." 
Luke15:19 Na tapa cih dingin zong kilawm nawn lo ka hih manin na nasemte khat bangin hong bawl lel in,” ka ci ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:20 Tua ahih manin amah kithawi-in a pa kiangah a ciahkik dingin a pai hi. Ahi zongin inn a tun ma-in a pa in na gal muh a, hehpihhuai sa mahmah ahih manin va delhin, a tapa ngawng kawi-in a nam hi." 
Luke15:21 A tapa in, ‘Pa aw, Pasian tung le nangma tungah ka khial khin hi. Na tapa cih dingin zong ka kilawm nawn kei hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:22 Ahi zongin a pa in a nasemte sam a, ‘Hong manlang un. Puan hoih pen hong la unla silhsak un. A khutme ah zungbuh butsak unla, a khe ah khedap zong bulhsak un." 
Luke15:23 Tua ciangin i bawng no limci pen hong go unla, lungdam pawi bawl ni." 
Luke15:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka tapa a si sa hong nungta a, ka tapa a mang sa hong tungkik hi,’ a ci hi. Tua ahih manin lungdamna pawi bawl a kipan uh hi." 
Luke15:25 “Tua laitakin a tapa u zaw pen lo kuan hi a, vai ciah inn hong tun kuan ciangin lamna le lasakna gingte a za hi." 
Luke15:26 Amah in zong nasemte khat sam a, ‘Bang thu om ahi hiam?’ ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke15:27 ‘Na naupa hong tungkik hi. Cidamin hong tungkik ahih manin na pa in i bawngtalno limci pen go hi,’ ci-in a nasem pa in a dawng hi." 
Luke15:28 A ta u zaw pen a heh suak mahmah ahih manin inn sungah zong hong tum nuam lo hi. Tua ahih manin a pa va pusuakin, a ta hong sung tum nadingin a zol hi." 
Luke15:29 A tapa u zaw in, ‘Tu a beisa hunsung khempeuh, nasemte khat bangin nangma adingin na ka sem a, na thu zong kong nial ngei het kei hi. Tua hi napi, kei bang hong pia ngei na hi hiam? Ka lawmte tawh pawi ka bawl nadingin keel khat nangawn nong pia kei hi." 
Luke15:30 Ahi zongin hih na tapa in na neihsa khempeuh numei paktatte tungah zang mang khin a, hong ciahkik ciangin bawngtalno limci pen na gawh lai hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke15:31 A pa in, ‘Ka ta aw, nang pen hih lai ah kei tawh a om khawm tawntung na hi a, keima neih khempeuh nangma aʼ ahi hi." 
Luke15:32 Tu-in na naupa a si sa hong hingkik a, a mang sa hong tungkik ahih manin lungdamin pawi i bawl ding ahi hi,’ ci-in a pa in a dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke16:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Sum hau pa khat om a, a neihsa teng a uk dingin ama khutnuai ah mi khat a koih hi. Tua a neihsa teng a uk dingin a koih mipa in a topaʼ sum teng phengzat gawp hi, ci-in kikhia hi." 
Luke16:2 A topa in zong amah sam a, ‘Na gamtatna ka zak a bangci thu ahi hiam? Keima neihsa a uk dingin hong koih thei nawn lo ding ka hih manin a beisa hun sungah ka neihsate na zeekna sazian a kimtakin hong pia in,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:3 Tua ciangin a nasem pa in lungngai a, ‘Ka topa in ka nasepna panin hong tawpsak ding ahih manin bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam? Thatang nasep lah ka ngap kei a, nektawm ding mi kiangah nget ding lah ka maizum hi." 
Luke16:4 Tuʼn ka gamtat nading ka thei ta hi. Tua ka ngaihsut bangin gamta leng, ka nasepna panin ka tawp ciangin lawm nei-in, amaute in a inn ah kei hong tungsak ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:5 Tua ahih manin a topaʼ sum a bate khatkhatin sam a, a masa pen pa kiangah, ‘Ka topa tungah bangzah ba na hi hiam?’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:6 Amah in, ‘Sathau tambong za nih dim ba ing,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Na leibatna lai va la in,’ ci hi; tua ciangin, ‘Na leiba om lai sathau tambong za khat hi. Tu mahmah in tu suk inla, tambong za khatin ciamteh in,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:7 Tua ciangin a dang khat pa kiangah, ‘Nang bangzah ba na hi hiam?’ ci-in a dot ciangin, ‘Mangbuh seu za khat ba ing,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Na leibatna lai va la in,’ ci hi; tua ciangin, ‘Na leiba om lai seu sawm giat hi. Seu sawm giat, ci-in ciamteh in,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:8 A dik tat lo nasem pa pen ama ngiansiamna hangin a topa in a pakta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian thu a zui mite sangin leitung mihingte pen a nasepna uh ah ngiansiam zaw uh hi. 
Luke16:9 “Note kiangah kong genin ah, hih na leitung sum uh a bei ciangin tawntung nuntakna inn ah hong kilutsak theih nadingin lawm zonna-in hih leitung sumte na zang un." 
Luke16:10 “A tawmno ah a diktatte pen a tam ah zong dik tat uh a, a tawmno ah a citak lote pen a tam ah zong citak lo uh hi." 
Luke16:11 Hih leitung sumte ah na cihtak kei uh leh kua in no tungah vantung sum hong ap ngam ding ahi hiam? 
Luke16:12 Midangteʼ neihsa tungah na cihtak kei uh leh, kua in no tungah nomau gamhluah ding hong ap ngam ding ahi hiam?" 
Luke16:13 “To nihʼ na a sem khawm zo nasem kuamah om lo hi. A to khat mudahin khat it dinga, khat beelin khat a simmawh ding hi. Pasianʼ na le leitung sum na nasem khawm zo kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke16:14 Sum a deih phadiak Farisi mite in hih thute a zak uh ciangin Jesu a nuihsan uh hi. 
Luke16:15 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Mite in note a man penin hong ngaihsut theih nadingin na om uh a, ahi zongin Pasian in na lungsim tawng uh a hong thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte in a manpha mahmah in a ngaihsutte pen Pasian in bangmahin sim lo hi." 
Luke16:16 “Tuiphumpa Johanʼ hun ciang dong Moses Thukham le kamsangteʼ thugente pen zuih belin kinei a, ahi zongin Pasianʼ Ukna hangin Lungdamna Thu a kihilh hun a kipanin hih thu ah mi khempeuh hong kituhteh uh hi." 
Luke16:17 Ahi zongin Thukham a neu pen themno khat nangawn a maiman ding sangin vanlelei a manthan ding ol zaw lai hi. 
Luke16:18 “Pasal khat in a zi ma-in numei dang a teenpih leh tua numei tawh a mawh hi a, a kima numei a teenpih pasal zong numei tawh a mawh mah ahi hi." 
Luke16:19 “Khat vei, mihau mahmah khat om a, nisimin puan manpha nono silhin, an lim nono ne-in a om hi." 
Luke16:20 Tua ciangin a pumtangin meima a vei, Lazaras a kici mizawng khat zong, mihau paʼ kongbiang ah hong kikoih a," 
Luke16:21 mihau paʼ sabuai tung panin a kia annengte ne nuamin a ngak hi. Tua bangin a om laitakin uite hong pai-in a meima hong liahliahsak uh hi. 
Luke16:22 Tua ciangin mizawng pa hong si a, vantung a Abraham kiangah a om dingin vantung mite in a paipih uh hi. Mihau pa zong hong si leuleu-in a kivui hi." 
Luke16:23 Ahi zongin hell khuk sungah gimna thuakin a om hi. A khuadak leh, gamlapi mun khat ah Abraham le Lazaras a om khawm a gal muh hi." 
Luke16:24 Tua ahih manin nakpi takin kiko a, ‘Pa Abraham aw, kei hong hehpih in. Meiphual sungah omin nakpi takin gimna thuak ka hih manin Lazaras in a khutme dawn tui diahin ka leii hong votsak nadingin hong sawl in,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:25 Ahi zongin Abraham in, ‘Ka ta aw, leitungah na nuntak laitakun nang nopsakna namkim na ngah laitakin Lazaras in haksatna namkim a thuak hi. Ahi zongin tu-in amah in hih lai ah nopsakna a ngah laitakin nangmah in haksatna a thuak na hi hi." 
Luke16:26 Tua tham loin, i kikalah kuam thukpi khat om a, hih lai panin nang kiangah hong pai nuamte kuamah pai zo lo a, nangma omna panin hih lai ah zong kuamah hong pai zo lo hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke16:27 Tua ciangin mihau pa in, ‘Pa aw, tua bang ahihleh zong, ka inn uh ah Lazaras nong sawlsak nadingin kong thum hi." 
Luke16:28 Inn ah nau pasal nga ka nei lai a, keʼn gim ka thuakna hih lai munah hong tun khak loh teitei nadingun keiʼ gamtat bangin a gamtat loh nadingun hong hilhsak hen,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:29 Ahi zongin Abraham in, ‘Na sanggamte a hilh dingin Moses le kamsangte om uh ahih manin tuateʼ thugen na ngai ta uh hen,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:30 Tua ciangin mihau pa in, ‘Pa Abraham aw, tua nong gen zong a kicing khin hi mah hi. Ahi zongin a si sa mi khat hingkikin amaute kiangah va paikik leh a mawhna panun ka naute kisik hamtang ding uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke16:31 Ahi zongin Abraham in, ‘Amaute in Moses le kamsangteʼ thu a man nop kei uh leh, mi khat hong hingkikin amaute kiangah a va gen hangin umsak zo tuan lo ding hi,’ ci-in a dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite a puk theih nading ze-etna hong piang hamtang ding hi. Ahi zongin tua puk nading a piangsak mipa in gimna ngah ding hi." 
Luke17:2 Hih naupang no khat a khialh nading a piansak sangin a ngawng ah an gawina suang lianpi khat khihin tuipi sungah kikhia leh ama adingin hoih zaw thampek ding hi. 
Luke17:3 Note hoihtakin kingaihsun un. Na sanggampa uh no tungah hong khialh leh amah taii unla, a kisik leh a mawhna maisak un." 
Luke17:4 Ni khat sungin sagih vei ciang dong hong khialh hangin zong, a sagih vei mahin no kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Ka kisik hi,’ hong cih nakleh na maisak khin ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:5 Ni khat, sawltakte in Topa kiangah, “Ka upna uh hong liansak in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke17:6 Topa in, “Ankam tang cia a pha upna nei le-uhcin, hih nailung kung kiangah, ‘Kizunglot inla tuipi sungah va po in,’ ci le-uhcin na cih bangun piang zo ding hi." 
Luke17:7 “Note khatpeuh in na lo uh hong khawhsak ahi a, na tuu uh a hong cinsak ahi zongin nasem khat nei le-uhcin, inn ah a hong tun ciangin, ‘Hong pai inla na an ne pah in,’ na ci uh hiam?" 
Luke17:8 Na ci kei uh hi. Ama kiangah, ‘Ka nitak an ding hong bawl inla, na puan silhin ka annek sungteng hong vil in. Ka man khit ciangin na ne thei ding hi,’ na ci zaw uh hi." 
Luke17:9 Tua bangin a sawl teng a sepna hangin a nasem pa tungah, ‘Ka nuam mahmah hi,’ ci tuan lo hi." 
Luke17:10 Tua mah bangin note in zong hong kisawl teng na sep khit uh ciangin, ‘Nasem mawkmawkte mah ihi a, i tavuan teng bek mah a sem khin ihi hi,’ na ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke17:11 Jerusalem khua manawhin Jesu a pai laitakin Samaria le Galilee gam kikal tawnin a pai hi. 
Luke17:12 Khua neu khat ah a lut dektak laitakin miphak sawm in a dawntuah uh hi. Jesu tawh a kigamla munah ding uh a," 
Luke17:13 nakpi takin kiko-in, “Topa Jesu aw, kote hong hehpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke17:14 Jesu in amaute a muh ciangin, “Pai unla siampite va kivelsak un,” a ci hi. Amaute a va pai uh ciangin lamkal ah a dam uh hi." 
Luke17:15 Amaute sung panin a damlam a kitheih ciangin khat hong leh taikik a, nakpi takin Pasian a phat hi." 
Luke17:16 Tua ciangin Jesuʼ khe mai ah bokin a lungdamna a ko hi. Hih mipa pen Samaria mi ahi hi. 
Luke17:17 Tua ciangin Jesu hong pau khia a, “Mihing sawm kidamsak hi lo ahi hiam? A dang kuate koi lai ah om ahi uh hiam?" 
Luke17:18 Bang hangin hih gamdang mipa bek Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna a ko dingin hong kileh ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke17:19 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Tho inla ciah in. Na upna in nang hong damsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:20 Khat vei Farisi mite pawl khat in, cik ciangin Pasianʼ Ukna hun hong tung ding ahi hiam, ci-in Jesu dong uh a, Jesu in, “Pasianʼ Ukna pen mit tawh muh theihin hong tung lo ding hi." 
Luke17:21 Hih lai ah om hi, hua lai ah om hi, cih bangin kuama gen theih hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note lakah Pasianʼ Ukna hong om khinzo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke17:22 Tua ciangin Jesu in nungzuite kiangah, “Ni khat ni ciangin Mihing Tapa ni khat sung bek nangawn na muhnop hun uh hong tung dinga, ahi zongin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Luke17:23 Mite in, ‘Hih lai ah om hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amauʼ cihna mun a en dingin paikhia kei un." 
Luke17:24 Amah hong pai taktak ciangin khuaphialep in van mong khat pan mong khat dong hong taanzaih mah bangin kithei kim ding hi. 
Luke17:25 Ahi zongin amah in gimna tampi tak thuak masa dinga, ama huna mite in amah nial ding uh hi." 
Luke17:26 Noah hunin up lohpi-in tuiciin a tun bangin Mihing Tapa zong up loh hun khatin hong tung ding hi. 
Luke17:27 Teembaw sungah Noah lutin Tuiciin in mi khempeuh a sihsak ni ciang dongin tua huna mite in anne zune-in om uh a, mo kipi mo kikha-in a om uh hi." 
Luke17:28 Lot huna mah tawh zong hong kibang ding hi. Tua hun lai-in zong anne zune-in om uh a, sumzuak sumlei, lokho, inn lamin a omom laitakun," 
Luke17:29 Sodom panin Lot a paikhiat ni-in van panin kaat leh meikuang hong kia suk a, amaute khempeuh a kaang tum hi." 
Luke17:30 Mihing Tapa hong kilat ni ciangin zong tua mah tawh hong kibang ding hi. 
Luke17:31 “Tua ni a hong tun ciangin a innkhum zang ah a om mipa in a inn sunga a om a neihsate a la dingin kum suk kei hen. Tua mah bangin lo ah a om mipa zong a inn ah ciahkik kei hen. 
Luke17:32 Lotʼ zi na phawk un. 
Luke17:33 A nuntakna a hu nuamte in a nuntakna bulpi taanlawh dinga, a nuntakna a taanlawhte in a nuntakna bulpi hu zo ding hi." 
Luke17:34 Keʼn kong cih in ah, tua hun laitakin zanin lupna tungah a lum khawm mi nih sung panin khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi." 
Luke17:35 An a sukhawm numei nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi." 
Luke17:36 Lo a kuan khawm mi nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke17:37 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, koi laitak ah tua thute hong piang ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Jesu in, “Sapul omna peuh ah musane a om mah bangin mi omna peuh ah hong piang ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:1 Tua ciangin amaute in thu ngen tawntungin a lungkiat ngei loh nading uh a hilh nopna-in Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah thu gentehna khat gen a," 
Luke18:2 “Khuapi khat sungah Pasian a zahtak lo, mi zong a don lo thukhen mang khat a om hi." 
Luke18:3 Tua khua sung mahah meigong numei khat zong om a, ama kiangah hong pai tawntungin, ‘Ka thu uh hong khensak in,’ ci-in a thum tawntung hi." 
Luke18:4 Tawl khat sung thudon loin om a, ahi zongin a nung ciangin, ‘Pasian zahtak loin, mite zong ka don nop khol loh hangin," 
Luke18:5 hih meigongnu in hong nawngkaisak niloh ahih manin, a thu khensak kei leng, hong pai nilohin hong lunggimsak ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:6 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Hih mihoih lo thukhen paʼ kampauna ngaihsun un." 
Luke18:7 A sun a zanin ama tungah a thumthum ama miteʼ thu a manin Pasian in khensak lo ding ahi hiam? Amaute a huh ding kizekaisak ding ahi hiam? 
Luke18:8 Keʼn kong cih in ah, amauteʼ thu a manin manlang takin khensak ding hi. Ahi zongin Mihing Tapa hong pai ciangin leitungah amah a um mi a mu ding hiam?” ci-in a gen thuah hi." 
Luke18:9 Amaute hoih kisa mahmah in, midang khempeuh a simmawh bawl mite tungah Jesu in zong thu gentehna khat gen a," 
Luke18:10 “Thungen dingin biakinn ah mi nih a pai uh hi. Khat pen Farisi mi hi a, a khat pen siahdongpa ahi hi." 
Luke18:11 Farisi mipa dingin thu ngen a, ‘Pasian aw, kei pen midangte bangin a huaiham, a thuman lo, numei tungah a mawh mi ka hi kei hi; hua lai-a siahdongpa bang hi lo ka hih manin nangma tungah ka nuamna kong pulak hi." 
Luke18:12 Nipikal khatin ni nih sung an ka tang a, ka ngah khempeuh sung panin sawm-ah-khat nang tungah kong pia hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke18:13 Ahi zongin siahdongpa pen a gamla simah dinga, vantung lamah zong dak ngam loin a dip humin kuncip a, ‘Pasian aw, kei mimawh mi khial pa hong hehpih in,’ ci-in a ngen hi." 
Luke18:14 Keʼn kong cih in ah, hih mipa pen Pasian tawh a kilem sa-in a inn ah ciah a, a khat pa pen tua bangin ciah lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a kiliansakte pen kiniamkhiat suk dinga, a kiniamkhiatte pen a lianin kibawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:15 Jesu in thupha a piaksak ding a deihna-un mi pawl khat in a naupangnote nangawn uh Jesu kiangah hong paipih uh hi. A nungzuite in hih thu a theih uh ciangin amaute na taii uh hi. 
Luke18:16 Ahi zongin Jesu in naupangnote sam a, “Naupangte hong pai ding khaktan kei un; ka kiangah hong paisak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang a bang mite pen Pasianʼ Ukna sungah om thei bek hi." 
Luke18:17 Keʼn kong cih in ah, naupang bangin Pasianʼ Ukna a mang lo peuhmah Pasianʼ Ukna sungah om thei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:18 Jew mi ulian khat in Jesu kiangah, “A dik siapa aw, nuntak tawntungna ka ngah nadingin bang hih ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke18:19 Jesu in, “Bang hangin kei midik hong ci na hi hiam? Pasian sim loh kuamah a dik tat zo om lo hi." 
Luke18:20 Numei tungah mawh kei in; mi that kei in; miʼ neihsa gu kei in; zuau thu gen kei in; na nu na pa zahtak in, cihna thukhamte thei lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke18:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka neu tung a kipanin hih thukhamte khempeuh ka zuih sa ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:22 Jesu in hih thu a zak ciangin ama kiangah, “Na khat na kisam lai hi. Na neihsa khempeuh zuak inla, mizawngte tungah na sum khotte pia in. Tua hileh vantungah na hau ding hi. Tua khit ciangin ka nung hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:23 Ahi zongin tua mipa in hih thu a zak ciangin amah hau mahmah ahih manin a dah a suak hi. 
Luke18:24 Jesu in ama dahna a muh ciangin, “Pasianʼ Ukna sungah mihaute a lut ding bangzah takin haksa ahi hiam?" 
Luke18:25 Pasianʼ Ukna sungah mihau khat a lut ding sangin phim bilvang sungah kalaoh khat a lut ding baih zaw lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:26 Tua thu a za mite in, “Tua bang ahihleh kua in hotkhiatna ngah zo ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke18:27 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Mihingteʼ hih zawh loh pen Pasian in hih zo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:28 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Ko zong ka inn ka lo uh nusia-in nang ka hong zui uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke18:29 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “A mantakin kong genin ah, Pasianʼ Uk ding a deihna hangin a inn a lo, a zi a ta, a nu a pa, ahih kei leh a sanggamte a nusiate in," 
Luke18:30 tuhunin a zah tampi le hong tung ding hunah nuntak tawntungna a ngah lo ding kuamah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:31 Tua ciangin Jesu in nungzui sawm le nihte a tuamin paikhiat pihin amaute kiangah, “Tu-in Jerusalem khua ah a pai ding ihi a, kamsangte in Mihing Tapaʼ thu a gelh khempeuh, tua lai munah a hong tung ding hi." 
Luke18:32 Pasian in Gentail miteʼ khut sungah amah ap dinga, amaute in zahpihin, simmawhin, cilphih ding uh hi." 
Luke18:33 Tua ciangin amah satin that ding uh a, ahi zongin a ni thum ni-in hingkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:34 Ahi zongin nungzuite in hih ama thugente tel zo lo uh hi. Amauteʼ tel zawh loh dingin kihem gen ahih manin, Jesuʼ gente bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a thei kei uh hi." 
Luke18:35 Jerikho khua kiang Jesu a tun ciangin lampi gei ah khutdawh a ngen mittaw khat a na tu hi. 
Luke18:36 Mihon a paina a zak ciangin bang ahi hiam, ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke18:37 Mite in, “Nazareth khuami Jesu hong pai hi,” a na ci uh hi." 
Luke18:38 Tua ciangin nakpi takin amah kiko a, “Davidʼ suan Jesu aw, kei hong hehpih in,” a na ci hi." 
Luke18:39 A mai-a om mite in amah taii uh a, pau kei in, ci-in a kham uh hi. Ahi zongin amah kinakko semsem a, “Davidʼ suanpa aw, kei hong hehpih in,” ci veve hi." 
Luke18:40 Tua ahih manin Jesu zong khawl a, ama kiangah mittaw pa a kipaipih nadingin thu a pia hi. A gei nai hong tun ciangin Jesu in," 
Luke18:41 “Bang kong hihsak ding deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Topa aw, khua ka mukik thei nuam hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke18:42 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Na upna in nang hong damsak khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke18:43 Amah in zong thakhatin khua mu thei pah a, Jesu zui-in Pasian tungah a lungdamna a ko hi. Mihonpite in zong a muh ciangin a vekpi-un Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Luke19:1 Jerikho khua ah Jesu lut a, a paisuak dingin khua sung a nawk laitakin," 
Luke19:2 Zakkhias a kici siahdong ukpa khat na om a, amah mihau khat ahi hi." 
Luke19:3 Amah in Jesu kua hiam cih a muh nadingin hanciam hi; ahi zongin amah mi tuntom khat ahih manin mihon lakah a mu zo kei hi. 
Luke19:4 Tua ahih manin amah na ma tai a, Jesu a muh theih nadingin a tot nading lampi gei-a theithek kung tungah a na kah hi." 
Luke19:5 Jesu, tua mun a tun ciangin khuadak to-in ama kiangah, “Zakkhias aw, manlangin hong kum suk in. Na inn ah tu zan kong taam ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:6 Tua ahih manin Zakkhias zong hong kum mengmeng a, lungdam mahmah in a inn ah Jesu a tungsak hi." 
Luke19:7 Hih thu a thei mi khempeuh phun uh a, “Mimawh paʼ inn ah a giak dingin Jesu a pai hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke19:8 Tua ciangin Zakkhias dingin Topa kiangah, “Topa aw, ka neihsa a kim khat mizawngte tungah ka pia ding hi. Mi khatpeuh khemin a na ka laksak leh a zah li-in ka lohkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:9 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Tu ni-in hih innkuan in hotkhiatna a ngah hi. Hih mipa pen Abrahamʼ suante khat zong hi lai hi." 
Luke19:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a mangthangte a zong ding le a hon khia dingin Mihing Tapa a hong pai ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:11 Jesu pen Jerusalem khua a tung dektak hi a, Pasianʼ Ukna hun hong tung kuan ta ding hi, ci-in mite in zong ngaihsun uh ahih manin, mite in ama thugen a na ngaih laitakun Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna khat gen thuah lai a," 
Luke19:12 “Khat vei, ulian khat om a, kumpi za a lak khit ciangin a ciahkik dingin gamlapi gamah a pai dingin a ding khia hi." 
Luke19:13 A dinkhiat ma-in ama nasem mihing sawmte sam a, amaute tungah sum za khat ciat pia-in, ‘Ka om loh sungin hih sumte tawh na siam bangbangun sum na bawl ciat un,’ ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Luke19:14 Ahi zongin ama gam mite in hih ulian pa mudah uh ahih manin ama nungah kamtai sawl uh a, ‘Ka kumpi dingun nang kong deih kei uh hi,’ cisak uh hi." 
Luke19:15 “Ahi zongin hih ulian pa kumpi za ngah sa-in hong tunkik ciangin, sum a ap a nasemte in bangzah ciat a na meetsak uh hiam ci-in a theih nadingin a kiangah a nasemte hong pai nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Luke19:16 A nasem khat hong pai masa a, ‘Topa aw, nong sum piak za khat tawh tul khat ka meetsak hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Luke19:17 Amah in, ‘Hoih mahmah hi; nang pen nasem gina na hi hi. Thuneu ah citak na hih manin khuapi sawm na uk ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:18 Tua ciangin a nasem nihna pa hong pai a, ‘Topa aw, nong sum piak za khat tawh za nga ka meetsak hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Luke19:19 Amah in, ‘Khuapi nga na uk ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:20 Tua ciangin a nasem dang khat hong pai a, ‘Topa aw, hih lai ah na sum za khat om hi. Mainul khat tawh tunin ka seelcip hi." 
Luke19:21 Nang pen mi sit hak khat na hih manin kong kihta hi. Sum lam lopi-in sum deih pa na hi a, lokho lopi-in an la nuam pa na hi hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Luke19:22 A topa in ama kiangah, ‘Nasem gina lopa aw, nangma kampau mah tawh nang na kiman hi. Sum lam lopi-in sum ka deihlam, lokho lopi-in an la nuamin, mi sit hak ka hih lam nong thei hi." 
Luke19:23 Tua bangin hong thei na hih leh bang hangin sumkholna ah ka sumte na koih lo na hi hiam? Na koih hi lecin, kong tunkik ciangin a pi le a meet kigawm ka ngahkik ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:24 Tua ciangin a kiangah a ding a nasemte kiangah, ‘Ama tung panin a sum za khat la unla, sum tul khat a nei nasem pa tungah pia un,’ a ci hi." 
Luke19:25 Amaute in a topa kiangah, ‘Topa aw, amah in sum tul khat nei khin hi lo ahi hiam?’ a ci uh hi." 
Luke19:26 A topa in, ‘Keʼn kong cih in ah, a nei sate tungah kipia thuah dinga, ahi zongin a nei lote tung panin them khat a neihsun nangawn kilaksak ding hi." 
Luke19:27 Tu-in, kumpi dingin kei a hong deih lo ka galte pen hih lai ah hong paipih unla, keima muhna ah that un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:28 Jesu in hih thu teng a gen khit ciangin amah masa-in Jerusalem khua manawhin a paisuak hi. 
Luke19:29 Oliv Mual tunga a om Bethfage le Bethany khuanai a tun ciangin a nungzuite nih masawlin 
Luke19:30 amaute kiangah, “Mai-a om khua ah va pai un. A khua sung na lut uh ciangin kuamah a tuan ngei nai lohna la no khat khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. A khau sut unla, hih lai ah hong kai un." 
Luke19:31 Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Bang hangin sut na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi,’ ci-in dawng un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Luke19:32 Amau tegel zong pai pah uh a, Jesuʼ gen bang teekteek mahin a na om hi." 
Luke19:33 A la khau a sut laitakun la neite in, “Bang hangin sut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
Luke19:34 “Topa in deih hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke19:35 Amaute in Jesu kiangah a la paipih uh a, a la no tungah a puan uh phahin Jesu a tuangsak uh hi." 
Luke19:36 La tungah tuangin Jesu a pai laitakin a lampi tungah mite in a puante uh na phah uh hi. 
Luke19:37 Jerusalem khua a tun kuan, Oliv Mual a lam suk tuah a kipatna panin Jesuʼ nung a zui mihonpite khempeuh in amau muh sa nalamdang liante hangin, nakpi takin a gingin Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna ko-in amah phat ding kipan uh a," 
Luke19:38 “Pasian in Topaʼ tangin a hong pai kumpipa, thupha pia tahen. Vantungah nopna om henla, Pasianʼ min thang tahen,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Luke19:39 Tua ciangin mihon lak panin Farisi mi pawl khat in Jesu kiangah, “Sia aw, hih bangin a awng na nung hong zuite kham in,” a cih ciangin" 
Luke19:40 Jesu in, “Keʼn kong cih in ah, hih mite in hong phat loin khawl ta le-uh zong, hih lamdung a suangte in phatin awng veve ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke19:41 Jerusalem khua hong nai semsem a, a khuapi a muh ciangin Jesu in tamlawh a," 
Luke19:42 “Nopsak tawntung theih nading bang kisam hiam, ci-in tu ni-in thei lecin ut mahmah ing. Ahi zongin nang na theithei kei hi." 
Luke19:43 Na kimkot ah na galte in a panmun ding uh hong to-in, hong umcihin hong nehcih hun hong tung ding hi." 
Luke19:44 Nang le na kulh sunga om mi khempeuh hong sumai ding uh a, a omna ngei munah suang khat zong om nawn lo ding hi. Hih bang a pianna pen nang a hu dingin Pasian hong pai lam na phawk lohna hang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke19:45 Tua ciangin biakinn sungah Jesu lutin a sunga om sumbukte hawlkhiat ding kipan a," 
Luke19:46 “‘Ka inn pen thungetna inn kici ding hi,’ ci-in Pasian in a genna thu Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi. Ahi zongin note in gutateʼ bukna phualpi na suaksak uh hi,” ci-in amaute kiangah a gen hi." 
Luke19:47 Jesu in nisimin biakinn sungah thu a hilh hi. Siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate le upate in amah that nuam uh hi;" 
Luke19:48 ahi zongin mi khempeuh in a thugente mal khat zong khahsuah nuam loin a thu ngai tawntung uh ahih manin a suktheih nading uh a hun om thei lo hi. 
Luke20:1 Ni khat, Jesu in biakinn tual sungah mite kiangah thu hilhin, Lungdamna Thu genin a om laitakin, siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate le upate hong pai khawm uh a," 
Luke20:2 Jesu kiangah, “Kuaʼ thu tawh hih bangin gamta a, kua in thu hong pia ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Luke20:3 Jesu in, “Kei zong thu khat ka hong dong ding hi. Hong gen dih un." 
Luke20:4 Johanʼ tuiphumna pen Pasianʼ tung panin thu ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihing tung panin thu ngah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke20:5 Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Pasianʼ tung panin thu ngah hi,” ci lehang, “Bang hangin ama thu um lo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci dinga," 
Luke20:6 “Mihing tung panin a ngah hi,” ci leuleu lehang, Johan pen kamsang taktak hi, ci-in mi khempeuh in um uh ahih manin suang tawh hong deng lum ding uh hi, a kici uh hi." 
Luke20:7 Tua ahih manin Johanʼ tuiphumna pen kua thu tawh hiam, cih thei kei ung, ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke20:8 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Hih bangin ka nasepnate kuaʼ thu tawh ka sep hiam cih kei zong kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:9 Tua ciangin Jesu in mite kiangah thu gentehna khat gen a, “Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, lo khawhlawhte khawhlawh sakin, amah gam dangah pai-in sau veipi a tam hi." 
Luke20:10 Leenggah min hun a tun ciangin ama ngah zah tang ding a va la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte khat a sawl hi. Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in amah na sat gawp uh a, khut hawmguakin a ciahsak uh hi." 
Luke20:11 Tua ciangin nasem dang khat sawl leuleu a, lo khawhlawhte in tua pa zong na sat gawpin maizumsak gawp uh a, khut hawmguak mahin a ciahsak uh hi." 
Luke20:12 Tua ciangin a thum veina dongin a nasem dang khat mah sawl leuleu a, lo khawhlawhte in amah zong na liamsak gawpin na sawn khia uh hi." 
Luke20:13 Tua ciangin leenggah lo nei pa in, ‘Bang cih ding ka hi hiam? Ka it mahmah ka tapa ka sawl ding hi. Amaute in amah na zahtak bawl kha ding uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Luke20:14 Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in a tapa a muh uh ciangin khatlekhat in, ‘Hih pa, a gamhluah ding pa ahi hi. Ama gamhluah ding teng i ngah theih nadingin amah that ni,’ a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:15 Tua ahih manin amaute in lo nawl ah amah sawn khia-in a that uh hi. “Tua ahihleh lo nei pa in hih lo khawhlawhte bang cih ding ahi hiam? 
Luke20:16 Amah hong pai-in hih lo khawhlawhte that dinga, midangte khawhlawhsak ding hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin, “Hih bangin piang kei tapeuh hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:17 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute enin, “‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho in a gen pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?" 
Luke20:18 Tua suang tungah a kia mi khempeuh kizan gawp dinga, mi khatpeuh tungah tua suang a kiat leh zong deng vui gawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:19 Jesu in hih thu gentehna a gen pen amaute a cihnopna hi, ci-in Thukham hilh siate le siampi liante in thei uh ahih manin Jesu man pah nuam uh hi; ahi zongin mihonte kihta uh ahih manin man pah ngam lo uh hi." 
Luke20:20 Tua ahih manin a hunhoih ngakin vil gige uh a, ukna aana a neiteʼ khut sungah Jesu a ap theih nadingun ama kampau tawh a mat nopna-un, lungsim takpi tawh thu dong a va kineihkhem dingin mi pawl khat thukan dingin a cial uh hi." 
Luke20:21 Hih thukante in Jesu kiangah, “Sia aw, na thuhilhnate le na thugente man mahmah hi. Nang in mi liante zahtak bawl tuan loin, Pasianʼ thu a mantakin na hilhna ka thei uh hi." 
Luke20:22 Rom Kumpipa Sisarʼ tungah siah i piak ding a kilawm mah ahi hiam, kilawm lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Luke20:23 Ahi zongin Jesu in amauʼ ngianbawlna thei ahih manin," 
Luke20:24 “Sum peek khat hong lak dih un. Hih sum tunga om lim le min kua-aʼ ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Kumpipaʼ lim le min hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke20:25 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tua ahihleh, Kumpipa aʼ teng Kumpipa tungah na pia unla, Pasian aʼ teng Pasianʼ tungah na pia un,” a ci hi." 
Luke20:26 Ama kampauna tawh mihon lak panin a mat nadingun thu om thei lo ahih manin ama thudawnna hangin lamdang sa-in a om khikhe uh hi. 
Luke20:27 Tua ciangin, “Thawhkikna om lo hi,” a ci mi pawl khat Jesu kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Luke20:28 “Sia aw, Moses in eite adingin ngeina khat hong koihsak a, ‘Mi khat in ta nei loin a zi a sihsan leh, tua a sipaʼ khang a kizop theih nadingin a naupa in tua meigongnu teenpih tahen,’ ci hi." 
Luke20:29 Khat vei, unau pasal sagih om hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta nei loin a si hi." 
Luke20:30 Tua ciangin a naupa in teenpih a," 
Luke20:31 tua banah a nau sawn in teenpih leuleu hi. Tua bangin a unau sagih dongin teenpih uh a, ta nei lo vive-in a si khin uh hi." 
Luke20:32 A tawpna ah numei zong hong si hi. 
Luke20:33 A unau sagih mahin hih nu teenpih ciat khin uh ahih manin thawhkik ni ciangin hih numei pen a kua penʼ zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. 
Luke20:34 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tu hun a hih leitung mite in numei le pasal kiteenna nei uh hi." 
Luke20:35 Ahi zongin sihna panin thokikin a hong tung ding hunah a nungta dingin a kilawm mite in kiteenna cihte nei lo uh hi. 
Luke20:36 Amaute pen vantungmi tawh kibang uh a, si thei nawn lo uh hi. Sihna panin a thokik khinte ahih manin amaute pen Pasianʼ tate ahi uh hi." 
Luke20:37 Tua tham loin Moses in zong misite a thawhkikna thu teltakin hong lak hi. Sawlpang kuang thu a genna munah Topa pen, ‘Abraham Pasian, Isaac Pasian, Jakob Pasian,’ ci-in a na gen hi." 
Luke20:38 Amaute khempeuh hing uh ahih manin, Pasian pen mihingteʼ Pasian hi a, misiteʼ Pasian hi lo hi, a cihnopna ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke20:39 Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate pawl khat in, “Sia aw, na dawnna hoih mahmah hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke20:40 Tua ahih manin Saddusi mite in thu a dong ngam nawn kei uh hi. 
Luke20:41 Ahi zongin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in Khris pen Davidʼ suan hi, ci zenzen ahi uh hiam?" 
Luke20:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh David mahmah in La Bu sungah, ‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen a: Na galte, na khe nuai ah ka koih matengin ka tak lamah tu in,’ ci hi." 
Luke20:43  
Luke20:44 David in Khris pen, ‘Topa,’ ci ahih manin bang hangin Khris pen Davidʼ suan hi thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Luke20:45 Tua ciangin Jesu in mi khempeuh zakin a nungzuite kiangah," 
Luke20:46 “Thukham hilh siate na bat khak loh nadingun kidawm un. Amaute in puan tualpi silh nuam uh a, mihon lakah a kizahtak hopih ding deihin, kikhopna inn sung le pawi lakah a om uh ciangin ulianteʼ tutna mun hoihte bekah tu nuam uh hi." 
Luke20:47 Meigong numeite tungah nuamtak sa-in, khemin a neihsa teng uh laksak uh a, mite in mihoih a sak nading uh a deihna-un thu sau pipi a ngen uh hi. Amauʼ kineihkhemna tawh kizui-in a gimthuak ding uh lian zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:1 Jesu a khuadak leh mihaute in biakinn sumkuang sungah a letsong uh a khiatna," 
Luke21:2 le a zawng meigong khat in zong sumnen tang nih a khiat a mu hi. 
Luke21:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “Keʼn kong cih in ah, hih a zawng meigongnu in a dangte khempeuh sangin tam zaw a khia hi." 
Luke21:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh a dangte in a zat val uh sumte a khia uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin hih numei a zawng mahmah hi napi-in a nuntak nading khempeuh a khia khin ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:5 Mi pawl khat in suang hoih mahmahte tawh kilamin tua biakinn hoihin a thupi mahmahna le Pasian tungah letsong tampi a kipiaknate a gen uh ciangin Jesu in," 
Luke21:6 “Tu-a na muh uh hih nate khempeuh a siat gawp ding hun hong tung ding hi. Inn lamna-a a kiciang suangte a kithuapin a om nangawn om nawn loin kiphel kek mang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:7 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Cik ciangin hih thu hong piang dinga, hih thu a pian ding ciangin bang lim hong om ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Luke21:8 Jesu in, “Kidawm unla, miʼ khem sa-in ta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah a kineih mi tampi hong pai ding uh a, ‘Keimah, Khris ka hi hi; a hun hong tung ta hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Tua bang miteʼ nung zui kha kei un." 
Luke21:9 Gal thu ahi a, gam kilumlet nading thu ahi zongin na zak uh ciangin lau kei un. Hih bang thute a hong piang masa ding mah hi a, ahi zongin bei nading hong nai ta hi, a cihnopna hi nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:10 Tua ciangin Jesu in a thugen zom lai a, “Gam khat le gam khat hong kido-in, kumpi khat le kumpi khat hong kido ding hi." 
Luke21:11 Mun khempeuh ah nakpi takin zin hong liingin, kialpi le pulnatna zong hong tung ding hi. A kihtakhuai a tuamtuamte le lim lian pipi vanah hong kilang ding hi." 
Luke21:12 Ahi zongin hihte khempeuh hong pian ma-in keima hangin note hong kimanin hong kibawlsia ding hi. Kikhopna innte ah thusitna thuakin thong ah khiat dingin hong ki-ap dinga, ukpite le kumpite mai ah hong kipaipih ding hi." 
Luke21:13 Hih hunsung pen note in Lungdamna Thu na gen theih nading uh hunhoih ahi hi. 
Luke21:14 Tua hun ciangin eite in bangci gen ding cih lunghihmawhin nei kei un. 
Luke21:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua hun ciangin noteʼ gen ding thu le pilna kong guan dinga, na galte uh khat beek in noteʼ thugen hong nial zo loin, zong hong sel zo lo ding uh hi." 
Luke21:16 Na nu na pate, na sanggamte, na behte le na lawmte mahmah un note hong khia dinga, note pawl khat in thahna na thuak ding uh hi." 
Luke21:17 Mi khempeuh in keima hangin note hong mudah ding uh hi. 
Luke21:18 Ahi zongin na samzang khat nangawn uh mangthang lo ding hi. 
Luke21:19 Hih bangin thuak zo le-uhcin nuntakna taktak ngah ding na hih manun kip takin om un. 
Luke21:20 “Galkapte in Jerusalem khuapi a umcihna na muh uh ciangin tua khuapi a siat nading nai ta hi, ci-in na thei ding uh hi." 
Luke21:21 Tua ciangin Judea gam sunga omte mual tungah tai un. Jerusalem khua sunga omte zong tai khia unla, gam sung khua neu-a om mite, Jerusalem khua sungah lut nawn kei un." 
Luke21:21 Tua ciangin Judea gam sunga omte mual tungah tai un. Jerusalem khua sunga omte zong tai khia unla, gam sung khua neu-a om mite, Jerusalem khua sungah lut nawn kei un." 
Luke21:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin, ‘Gim Piak Ni,’ ahi hi." 
Luke21:23 Tua huna naupaiite le naungek neite adingin haksa mahmah ding hi. Hih leitungah gimna lianpi hong tung dinga, Pasian in hih mite gim a pia ding hi." 
Luke21:24 Mi pawl khat, namsau tawh kithat dinga, pawl khat, galmatin gam dangah kiciah pih ding hi. Tua ciangin Gentail miteʼ uk hun a bei matengin Jerusalem khuapi a siacipin om ding hi." 
Luke21:25 “Ni, kha le aksite tungah lim hong om ding hi. Tuipi ging le tuihual liante kihtakna hangin leitung mi khempeuh lau-in lunggim ding uh hi." 
Luke21:26 Leitungah tu-in bang hong piang ding, ci-in a ngaihsut kawmun mite lau-in sibup ding uh hi. Vantung a om nate a pai ngei bangin pai nawn loin lampial mangkhin ding uh hi." 
Luke21:27 Tua ciangin Mihing Tapa hong kilang dinga, minthanna le vangliatna tawh meii lakah hong pai ding hi." 
Luke21:28 Hih thute a pian ding hong kipat ciangin, note hong kihotkhiat ding hun hong nai ta ahih manin, dingin nuamna lungsim tawh khuadak un,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:29 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu gentehna khat gen a, “Theikung a kipan singkung khempeuh en dih un." 
Luke21:30 A teh hong no na muh uh ciangin khuakhal hong nai ta hi, ci-in na thei uh hi." 
Luke21:31 Tua mah bangin hih thute hong piang na muh uh ciangin Pasianʼ Ukna hun hong tung ta ding hi, ci-in na thei ding uh hi." 
Luke21:32 Hih lai-a om mite a sih khit ma-in hih thute hong piang ding ahihna phawk un. 
Luke21:33 Vanlelei a mangthang zongin ka thugente maimang ngei lo ding hi. 
Luke21:34 “Limtakin kidawm un. Thakhat thu-in tua Ni hong tung kha ding ahih manin zune anne le leitung nuntakna lunghimawhin thamang kei un. 
Luke21:35 Theih kholh lohin thang kisai bangin leitung mi khempeuh tungah hih thu hong piang vat ding hi. 
Luke21:36 Hih thupiang khempeuh thuak zawh nading thahatna na neih nading uh le Mihing Tapa mai ah na din theih nadingun a tawntungin thu ngenin vil niloh un,” a ci hi." 
Luke21:37 Tua sungteng nisimin Jesu in biakinn ah thu hilh a, nitak ciangin pai khia-in Oliv Mual tungah a giak zel hi." 
Luke21:38 Ama thuhilhna a ngai dingin mi khempeuh zingsang simin biakinn ah hong pai baih uh hi. 
Luke22:1 Tu-in Paisan Pawi a kici Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi hun hong nai ta hi. 
Luke22:2 Siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in mihonpite kihta uh ahih manin kuama theih lohin Jesu a kithah theih nading lampi a zong uh hi. 
Luke22:3 Tua ciangin sawm le nihte sung panin Iskariot tapa Judas sungah Satan hong lut hi. 
Luke22:4 Tua ahih manin Judas va paikhia a, siampi liante le biakinn cing palik maangte tawh va kiho uh a, amauteʼ khut sungah Jesu a piak theih nading zia a kikum uh hi." 
Luke22:5 Amaute na nuam mahmah uh a, sum tawh guaih dingin thuciam a na pia uh hi." 
Luke22:6 Judas zong thukim a, mihonteʼ theih lohin amauteʼ khut sungah Jesu a piak theih nading lampi zon ding a kipan pah hi." 
Luke22:7 Tua ciangin Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi hun sungin Paisan Pawi an-a nek ding tuuno gawh ni hun hong tung hi. 
Luke22:8 Jesu in Peter le Johan kiangah, “Va pai unla, eiteʼ Paisan Pawi annek ding va vaihawm un,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Luke22:9 “Koi lai ah va bawl le ung hong deih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. 
Luke22:10 Amah in, “Jerusalem khua sung na lut uh ciangin tuibeel a pua pasal khat na mu ding uh hi. Ama lutna inn ah zui unla," 
Luke22:11 a innteek pa kiangah, ‘Siapa in: Ka nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi an ka nek theih nading uh inn dei koi lai hiam, ci hi,’ ci-in va dong un." 
Luke22:12 Amah in a baih sa-in a na kikoih sa inn dei tungnung a zai khat hong lak ding hi. Tua lai ah a kisam khempeuh a baih sa-in na koih un,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:13 Amau tegel zong pai uh a, Jesuʼ gen sa bang teekteekin va mu uh a, tua lai ah Paisan Pawi annek ding a bawl uh hi." 
Luke22:14 A hun a tun ciangin Jesu zong sawltakte tawh sabuai ah a tu hi. 
Luke22:15 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Sihna ka thuak ma-in note tawh hih Paisan Pawi an i nekkhop ding ka ut mahmah khat ahi hi." 
Luke22:16 A mantakin kong genin ah, Pasianʼ Ukna sungah a cingtaak Paisan Pawi hun hong tun mateng, Paisan Pawi an ka ne ngei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:17 Tua ciangin Jesu in a hai sang a, Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin, “Hih hai hong sang unla, na vekpi-un na gual dawn un." 
Luke22:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Ukna hun hong tun mateng, tu a kipanin leenggahzu ka dawn nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:19 Tua ciangin anlum la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin amaute tungah pia a, “Hih pen note adingin a hong kipia keima pumpi ahi hi. Keimah nong phawk nadingun na ne un,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:20 Tua mah bangin an a nek khit uh ciangin amaute tungah hai pia a, “Hih leenggahzu pen note adingin a luang khia, Pasianʼ thuciamna thak a kipsak ka sisan ahi hi." 
Luke22:21 Ahi zongin kei hong lehhek ding paʼ khut in sabuai ah kei tawh an a sawk khawmna thu thei un. 
Luke22:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ seh sa bangin Mihing Tapa si dinga, ahi zongin amah a lehhek pa in gimna thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:23 Tua ciangin hih bangin a gamta ding eite lakah kua hi ding ihi hiam, ci-in amaute khatlekhat a kidong uh hi." 
Luke22:24 Nungzuite lakah kua a lian penin kingaihsun ding, ci-in kiseelna thu hong piang hi." 
Luke22:25 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Gentail mi hih leitung kumpite in a mite uh tungah ukna aana zang uh a, tua bangin mi a uk Gentail-te in amaute pen, ‘Miteʼ nopsak nadingin nasemte,’ a kicih ding deih lai uh hi." 
Luke22:26 Ahi zongin note lakah tua bang hi lo ding hi; a lian pen pa a neu pen bangin om dinga, a makai pen pa a nungzui nunung pen bangin om ding hi." 
Luke22:27 An ne dingin sabuai ah a tupa le an a pia pa kua lian zaw ahi hiam? An ne dingin a tupa lian zaw mah hi. Ahi zongin kei pen note lakah an pia-in na a sem pa bangin ka hong om hi. 
Luke22:28 “Gimna ka thuak sung khempeuh note in kei nong ompih uh hi. 
Luke22:29 Ka Pa in uk nading aana kei tungah hong piak mah bangin kei zong note tungah kong pia ding hi. 
Luke22:30 Keima Ukna sungah an ne tui dawnin sabuai kiimah na tu ding uh a, Israel minam sawm le nihte tungah thu a khen dingin thukhenna tokhom tungah na tu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:31 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Simon, Simon aw, lokho pa in buhhum a haih bangin note khempeuh hong ze-et nadingin Satan in thu a ngah khitna thu phawk in." 
Luke22:32 Ahi zongin, Simon aw, na upna na khahsuah loh nadingin nang adingin thu kong ngetsak khin hi. Kei kiangah nong kiheikik ciangin nungzui na lawmte na hanthawn in,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:33 Tua ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, nang tawh thong a kia khawm ding le a si khawm dingin a kiging sa-in ka om hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke22:34 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Peter aw, keʼn a mantakin kong genin ah, ‘Amah ka thei kei hi,’ ci-in thum vei nong nial khit matengin tu ni-in ak khuang lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:35 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note in sumbawm, ip le khedap keng loin kong sawlkhiat lai-in kitangsapna na nei uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Bangmah ka kitangsapna uh om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Luke22:36 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Ahi zongin, tu-in ahihleh, sumbawm ahi a, ip ahi zongin a neite in keng unla, namsau a nei lo peuhmah in na puansilh uh zuak unla khat lei un." 
Luke22:37 Bang hangin hih bangin hong gen ka hi hiam cih leh, Lai Siangtho in, ‘Mawhneite lakah amah kihelsak hi,’ ci-in keima thu a genna pen hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:38 Amaute in, “Topa aw, en in; hih lai ah namsau nih om hi,” ci-in a gen uh ciangin Jesu in, “Tua ahihleh pha zo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke22:39 Tua ciangin Jesu a pai ngei zel bangin, khua sung nusia-in Oliv Mual tungah pai a, a nungzuite in zong a zui uh hi." 
Luke22:40 Ama pai nopna mun a tun ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ze-etna na tuah khak loh nadingun thu ngen un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Luke22:41 Tua ciangin amaute kiang panin suanglot khat tan bang pai lai a, khukdinin thu ngen a," 
Luke22:42 “Pa aw, nangma ngaihsutna bang ahih khak leh hih ka thuak ding gimna tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahi zongin kei deihna bang hi loin nangma deihna bang hi tahen,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:43 Tua ciangin vantung panin ama kiangah vantungmi khat hong pai a, Jesuʼ tha a hatsak hi." 
Luke22:44 Lunggim mahmah ahih manin nakpi takin thu ngen semsem a, leilak a si mal gol taak bangin a khua-ul a taak hi." 
Luke22:45 A thungetna panin dingin a nungzuite kiangah paikik a, amaute a dahna hangun gimin ihmu-in a om a mu hi." 
Luke22:46 Jesu in, “Bang hangin ihmu na hi uh hiam? Tho unla ze-etna ah na puk khak loh nadingun thu ngen un,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:47 Tua bangin thu a gen laitakin mihonpi khat hong pai a, sawm le nihte sung panin Judas a kici mipa hong makai-in Jesu a nam dingin hong naih hi." 
Luke22:48 Ahi zongin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Judas aw, napna tawh Mihing Tapa lehhek na hi hiam?” a na ci hi." 
Luke22:49 Jesuʼ kiim a om mite in a thupiang ding a muh ciangun, “Topa aw, ka namsau uh tawh ka sat ding uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:50 Amaute khat in siampi lianpen paʼ nasem pa sat a, a taklam bil a sat khia hi." 
Luke22:51 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Tua bangin gamta nawn kei un,” ci-in a mipaʼ bil lawnsakin a damsak hi." 
Luke22:52 Tua ciangin Jesu in amah a man dingin a hong pai siampi liante, biakinn cing palik maangte le upate kiangah, “Namsau le molhtum tawh kei hih dingin nong kuan nadingun kei pen gal le sa ka hi hiam?" 
Luke22:53 Nisimin biakinn ah note tawh ka om khawm a, bangmah nong cih kei uh hi. Ahi zongin hih hun pen nomauʼ hun hi a, khuamial sung a uk Satanʼ vangliat hunsung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:54 Tua ciangin Jesu manin paikhiatpih uh a, siampi lianpen paʼ inn a tunpih uh hi. Peter in zong a kihalin nungzuih hi." 
Luke22:55 Inntual ah meiphual kicih a, tua meiphual kiim a tute lakah Peter zong a kihel hi." 
Luke22:56 Mei awi-a omte lakah Peter a om lam, nasem numei khat in a muh ciangin limtakin Peter en a, “Hih pa zong Jesu tawh a kikhawlte khat hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:57 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Ka nau aw, amah ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a nial hi." 
Luke22:58 Tua khit a sawt loin midang khat in amah hong mu leuleu a, “Nang zong amaute tawh pawl khat na hi hi,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin Peter in, “Lawm aw, ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke22:59 Tua khit nai lang bang ding ciangin midang khat in, “Hih mipa Galilee mi ahih manin amah zong Jesu tawh a kipawlte hi taktak hi,” hong ci teitei hi." 
Luke22:60 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Lawm aw, na thugen ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua bangin a pau laitakin thakhatin ak hong khuang hi." 
Luke22:61 Jesu zong kihei-in Peter hong en a, “Tu ni-in ak a khuan ma-in thum vei nong nial ding hi,” ci-in Topaʼ kampauna thu Peter in hong phawk vat hi." 
Luke22:62 Tua ciangin Peter pai khia-in nakpi takin a kap hi. 
Luke22:63 Jesu a cingte in simmawh bawlin a sat uh hi. 
Luke22:64 Puan tawh a mit tuamsak uh a, “Kuaʼn hong sat ahi hiam, thei dih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke22:65 Amah simmawh bawlna kam tampi a pau uh hi. 
Luke22:66 Khua a vak ciangin upate, siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate hong kikhawm uh a, uliante mai ah Jesu hong kipaipih hi." 
Luke22:67 Amaute in, “Khris na hi hiam, hong gen in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Jesu in, “Kong gen hangin nong um kei ding uh a," 
Luke22:68 thu kong dot hangin zong nong dawng kei ding uh hi. 
Luke22:69 Ahi zongin tu a kipanin a Vanglian Pasianʼ tak lamah Mihing Tapa tu ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi."
