Luke22:70 Tua ciangin a vekpi-un, “Tua ahihleh Pasianʼ Tapa na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin, “Pasianʼ Tapa hi, nong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke22:71 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Thudang bangmah kisam nawn lo hi. Ama kam mahmah panin i za khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:1 Tua ciangin a vekpi-in ding khia uh a, Pilat mai ah a paipih uh hi." 
Luke23:2 Tua lai panin amah mawh zon ding kipan uh a, “Hih mipa in ka mipihte uh lam khialsakin, kumpipa tungah siah piak loh dingin thu gen a, a mahmah zong Khris ahi kumpi khat ahihna a kigenna zong ka za uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:3 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Nang, Jew miteʼ kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Nang zong tua mah nong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke23:4 Tua ciangin Pilat in siampi liante le mihonte kiangah, “Hih mipa mawhsak nading thu bangmah ka mu kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:5 Ahi zongin amaute in nawhsa takin nak pau semsem uh a, “Amah in mite a buai nadingin thu hilh a, Galilee gam pan hong kipanin Judea gam sung khempeuh ah hong hilh a, tu-in hih lai mun hong tung ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:5 Ahi zongin amaute in nawhsa takin nak pau semsem uh a, “Amah in mite a buai nadingin thu hilh a, Galilee gam pan hong kipanin Judea gam sung khempeuh ah hong hilh a, tu-in hih lai mun hong tung ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:6 Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin, “Hih mipa Galilee mi ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Luke23:7 Jesu pen Herodʼ ukna sung mi ahih lam a theih ciangin, tua laitakin Herod mah zong Jerusalem ah om ahih manin ama kiangah a paisak hi." 
Luke23:8 Herod in Jesuʼ thu zaza a, amah a muhnop sawt mahmah khinta ahih manin Jesu a muh ciangin a nuam mahmah hi. Jesu in nalamdang a bawlte a mu dingin kilamen hi." 
Luke23:9 Tua ahih manin Herod in thu tampi tak dong a, ahi zongin Jesu in kam khat beek dawng lo hi." 
Luke23:10 Siampi liante le Thukham hilh siate in hong neh uh a, Jesu mawhsakna thu nakpi takin hong gen uh hi." 
Luke23:11 Tua ciangin Herod le galkapte in Jesu zahko-in simmawh bawl uh a, kumpi puan tualpi a silhsak khit uh ciangin Pilat kiangah a puakkik uh hi." 
Luke23:12 Hih hun ma-in Herod le Pilat kilem loin kigal bawl uh a, ahi zongin tua ni mahmah in amau tegel kilem kikin kipawl bawl uh hi." 
Luke23:13 Pilat in zong siampi liante, upate le mihonpite sam khawmin," 
Luke23:14 amaute kiangah, “Hih mipa in i mipihte lam khialsak hi, ci-in mawhsakin kei kiangah nong paipih uh hi. Note khempeuh mai mahah amah thu ka sit a, amah na mawhsakna uh thute khat beek ah a mawhna ka mu kei hi." 
Luke23:15 Tua mah bangin Herod in zong ama mawhna mu lo a, eite kiangah amah hong puakkik hi. Hih mipa in sihna a thuak nadingin ama gamtatna bangmah om lo hi." 
Luke23:16 Tua ahih manin amah satna tawh thuhilhin ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:17 (Paisan Pawi hun simin Pilat in amauteʼ deih thong kia khat a khah ding ahi hi.) 
Luke23:18 Tua ciangin mihon khempeuh kiko uh a, “Amah that in! Barabbas hong khahsak in!” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:19 Barabbas pen khua sungah mi a buaisakna hang le mi a thahna hangin thong sungah a kikhum ahi hi. 
Luke23:20 Pilat in Jesu khah nuam ahih manin mihonpite tungah khatvei a genkik hi. 
Luke23:21 Ahi zongin mihonpite in, “Singlamteh tungah that in, singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Luke23:22 Tua ciangin amaute tungah a thum veina thu gen a, “Amah in bang mawhna bawl ahi hiam? Sihna a thuak nadingin ama gamtatna bangmah ka mu kei hi. Tua ahih manin amah satin ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:23 Ahi zongin a aw neihzah uh tawh amaute awng semsem uh a, singlamteh tungah Jesu a thah nading gen uh ahih manin a tawpna ah a zo uh hi." 
Luke23:24 Tua ahih manin amauteʼ ngetna bangin piak dingin Pilat in thu a khen hi. 
Luke23:25 Mi buaisakna le mi thahna hangin thong sungah a kikhia mipa amauʼ ngetna bangin khah a, amauʼ deihna bangin a bawl dingun Jesu a pia khia hi." 
Luke23:26 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesu paikhiatpih uh a, gam sung panin khuapi sungah a hong pai, Sairin khuami Simon a kici mi khat tawh a kituak uh hi. Amaute in tua pa man pah uh a, a singlamteh suanin Jesuʼ nung zui-in a puasak uh hi." 
Luke23:27 Jesuʼ nung zui-in mi tampi tak pai uh a, tuate lakah Jesu kahin a tamlawh numei pawl khat zong a kihel hi." 
Luke23:28 Jesu zong amaute lamah kihei a, “Jerusalem khua numeite aw, kei hong kah kei unla, note le na tate uh adingin kap un." 
Luke23:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in, ‘Ta a nei ngei lo, naungek nawi a teepsak ngei lo numei ciingte mi hampha mahmah ahi hi,’ a cih hun hong tung ding hi." 
Luke23:30 Tua hun hong tun ciangin mite in, ‘Mual lian mual neute in hong cipnelhin a si khin hi lehang ut zaw hang,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Luke23:31 Singkung hing bang ahi kei tungah hih bangin hong bawl uh ahihleh singkung keu bang ahi note tungah hong nak hih zaw kan ding uh hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke23:32 Mi that ahi, thong a kikhum mi nih zong, Jesu tawh thah khawm dingin a paipih uh hi." 
Luke23:33 “Lutang Guh,” a kicihna mun a tun uh ciangin singlamteh tungah Jesu kilhcip uh a, tua mi that mi nihte zong, Jesuʼ tak lamah khat, a veilamah khat kilhcip uh hi." 
Luke23:34 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Pa aw, amaute in bang hih ihi hiam cih thei lo uh ahih manin a mawhna uh na maisak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amauʼ ngah ding ciat a theih nadingun aisanin a puante a hawm uh hi." 
Luke23:35 Jew mi upate in Jesu zahko-in, “Amah in midangte hon khia hi. Pasian teel sa Khris ahih takpi leh amah le amah kihon khia tahen,” ci-in a simmawh bawl laitakun tua lai-a ding mite in a enen uh hi." 
Luke23:36 Galkapte in zong zahpih bawl uh a, a kiangah hong pai-in leenggahzu thuk pia uh a," 
Luke23:37 “Jew Miteʼ Kumpipa na hih takpi leh nang le nang kihon khia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke23:38 “Jew Miteʼ Kumpipa hi,” ci-in a kigelh lai zong ama tung sanah kisuang hi." 
Luke23:39 Amah tawh a kikhai khawm mi that pa khat in zong Jesu zahko a, “Nang Khris hi lo na hi hiam? Nangmah kihon khia inla, tua ciangin kote zong hong hon khia in,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:40 Ahi zongin a khat pa in a lawmpa taii a, “Pasian nangawn kihta lo na hi hiam? I vekpi-in gim hong kipiakna kibang kim hi." 
Luke23:41 Ei tegel pen i gamtatna tawh kizui-in thu hong kikhen ahih manin ahi ding mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah in khialhna bangmah nei lo hi,” a cih khit ciangin" 
Luke23:42 Jesu kiangah, “Jesu aw, Kumpi-in nong pai ciangin kei zong hong phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:43 Jesu in ama kiangah, “A mantakin keʼn kong cih in ah: Tu ni-in Paradais ah kei tawh na om khawm ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:44 Tua hun laitak pen sunkim nai sawm le nih pawl hi a, ni mial ahih manin nitak lam nai thum ciang dong leitung khempeuh ah khua mial a," 
Luke23:45 tua hun sungin biakinn sung dalna puan kikekin phel nih a suak hi. 
Luke23:46 Tua ciangin nakpi takin Jesu kiko a, “Pa aw, nangma khut sungah keimah kong ki-ap hi,” a cih khit ciangin a si ta hi." 
Luke23:47 Galkap mangpa in hih thupiang a muh ciangin Pasian phat a, “Hih pa, mihoih taktak khat ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke23:48 Hih thute a en dingin a hong pai mihonpite in a thupiang teng a muh uh ciangin dahin dip hum sa-in a ciah uh hi. 
Luke23:49 Galilee gam panin Jesu a hong zui amah a thei ngei mite le numeite in gal et uh ahih manin a thupiang khempeuh a thei uh hi. 
Luke23:50 Tua laitakin Josef a kici mi khat om a, Judea gam sunga om Arimathea khuami ahi hi. Amah pen mihoih, a zahtakhuai mi khat hi a, Pasianʼ Uk ding hun lamenin a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Amah pen ulian thu vaihawm sunga kihel hi a, ahi zongin a lawmteʼ vaihawmna le a nasepnate uh thukimpih lo hi." 
Luke23:50 Tua laitakin Josef a kici mi khat om a, Judea gam sunga om Arimathea khuami ahi hi. Amah pen mihoih, a zahtakhuai mi khat hi a, Pasianʼ Uk ding hun lamenin a ngakngak mi khat ahi hi. Amah pen ulian thu vaihawm sunga kihel hi a, ahi zongin a lawmteʼ vaihawmna le a nasepnate uh thukimpih lo hi." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Hih mipa Pilat kiangah va pai-in Jesuʼ luang a ngen hi. 
Luke23:53 Tua ciangin Jesuʼ luang la suk a, puan kang tawh a tun khit ciangin kuamah a kivui ngei nai lohna suang kikhuak hankhuk sungah a vui hi." 
Luke23:54 Tua ni pen nipi zawh ni nga ni hi a, Sabbath ni hong hi dektak ta hi." 
Luke23:55 Galilee gam panin a hong zui numeite in zong a kivuina ah zui uh ahih manin a han phual le a luang kisial zia khempeuh zong a mu uh hi. 
Luke23:56 Tua ciangin amaute ciah uh a, Jesuʼ luang a nuh dingun paknamtui le sathau a bawl khol uh hi. Thukham zui-in Sabbath ni tawlnga-in a om uh hi." 
Luke24:1 Nipi ni zingsang tungin numeite in a bawl sa uh paknamtui tawi-in hanah va pai uh hi. 
Luke24:2 Han phual a tun uh ciangin hankhuk hukna suang a kilik khia mu uh ahih manin 
Luke24:3 a sungah tum pah uh a, ahi zongin Topa Jesuʼ luang na om lo hi." 
Luke24:4 Amaute in lamdang sa-in a om laitakun amaute gei ah puan pak a silh mi nih hong ding vat uh hi. 
Luke24:5 Numeite lau mahmah uh ahih manin lei lam nga-in kuncip uh hi. Tua mi nihte in, “Bang hangin misite lakah mihing zong na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke24:6 Hih lai ah om nawn lo hi; kithosak zo hi. Galilee gamah a om lai-in note kiangah thu hong genin," 
Luke24:7 ‘Mawhnei miteʼ khut sungah Mihing Tapa kipia dinga, singlamteh tungah kithatin, a ni thum ni-in hingkik ding hi,’ a cih thute phawk un,” a ci uh hi." 
Luke24:8 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesuʼ thugente phawkkik uh a," 
Luke24:9 han panin ciahkikin, nungzui sawm le khatte le midangte kiangah hih thute a gen uh hi." 
Luke24:10 Sawltakte kiangah hih thu a gen numeite pen Magdala khuami Mary, Joanna, Jamesʼ nu Mary le numei dangte ahi uh hi." 
Luke24:10 Sawltakte kiangah hih thu a gen numeite pen Magdala khuami Mary, Joanna, Jamesʼ nu Mary le numei dangte ahi uh hi." 
Luke24:11 Ahi zongin hih numeiteʼ thugen pen thu phuahtawm bangin ngaihsun uh a, um lo uh hi." 
Luke24:12 Ahi zongin Peter dingin hanah va tai a, han sung a et suk ciangin a kitunna puan bek na om hi. Tua ciangin amah in zong tua thupiang lamdang sa-in inn ah a ciahkik hi." 
Luke24:13 Tua ni mahin, Jesuʼ thu a zui mi nih, Jerusalem khua panin tai sagih bang a gamla Emmaus kici khua ah a pai uh hi." 
Luke24:14 A paikawmun hih thupiangte kikumkum uh hi. 
Luke24:15 Tua bangin kiho-in thu kikumin a om laitakun Jesu mahmah in hong naihin amaute tawh hong tonkhawm hi. 
Luke24:16 Amau tegel in a muh hangun Jesu ahih lam thei lo uh hi. 
Luke24:17 Jesu in, “Na lam paikawmun bang gengen na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amau tegel zong din khawl pah uh a, a maisuah uh dahmai mahmah lai hi." 
Luke24:18 Tua ciangin amau tegel sung panin Kleopas a kici pa in, “Jerusalem-a hawhte lakah tu sawng teng a tua lai-a thupiang a thei lo nang bek na hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke24:19 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Nazareth khuami Jesu tunga thupiang ahi hi. Amah pen kamsang khat hi a, Pasian le mite khempeuh in a thugen le a nasepna ah vang a nei mahmah khatin a ngaihsut uh ahi hi." 
Luke24:20 Ahi zongin ka siampi liante uh le ka uliante un sihna thukhenna a thuak dingin Pilat tungah ap uh a, singlamteh tungah kithat hi." 
Luke24:21 Amah pen Israel mite a hon khia ding pa hi, ci-in ka lamet uh ahi hi. Tua bang hi napi-in hih thu teng hong piang a, tu-in a thu pian zawh a ni thumna hi ta hi." 
Luke24:22 Ko pawlteʼ sung panin numei pawl khat in lamdang ka sak uh thu hong gen uh hi. Amaute, tu zingsang tungin hanah va pai uh a," 
Luke24:23 ahi zongin ama luang na om nawn lo hi. Tua ciangin amaute hong ciahkik uh a, vantung mite a muhna uh le tua vantung mite in Jesu a hinkik khitna thu a gennate uh hong gen sawn uh hi." 
Luke24:24 Tua ciangin ka lawmte uh pawl khat zong hanah va pai uh a, numeiteʼ gen bang teekteekin va mu uh a, ahi zongin Jesu mu lo uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Luke24:25 Tua ciangin Jesu in amau tegel kiangah, “Bangzah takin hai a, bang dingin kamsangteʼ thugen um thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke24:26 Khris in minthanna a ngah nadingin hih bang teng a thuak ding kisam hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Luke24:27 Tua ciangin Jesu in Lai Siangtho sungah ama thu a kigennate khempeuh, Moses laibu a kipanin kamsangteʼ laibu khempeuh a khiatna a gen hi." 
Luke24:28 Tua khua a tun uh ciangin Jesu a paisuak ding bangin hong om a," 
Luke24:29 ahi zongin amau tegel in kho-in, “Tu-in nitak lam hi ta a, ni tum dektak ahih manin ko tawh hong tam khawm in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesu zong amaute tawh a tam hi." 
Luke24:30 Amaute tawh an ne dingin a tut ciangin Jesu in anlum la a, Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin balnenin amaute a pia hi." 
Luke24:31 Tua laitakin a hak tawm bangin Jesu ahih lamtak mu-in thei uh a, ahi zongin amauʼ muhna panin Jesu a mang pah hi." 
Luke24:32 Amau tegel in, “Lampi ah i pai kawmin Lai Siangtho khiatna hong gen laitakin i lungsim hong lawpsak mahmah hi mah lo ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
Luke24:33 Amau zong thakhatin ding pahin Jerusalem ah paikik uh a, nungzui sawm le khatte le a dangte na kikhawmin," 
Luke24:34 “Topa hingkik khin takpi hi. Simon kiangah na kilak khinzo hi,” ci-in a kigengen laitak uh a tuak uh hi." 
Luke24:35 Tua ciangin tua mi nihte in zong a lam pai laitak uh a thupiang teng le anlum a balnen ciangin Topa ahih lamtak a theihnate uh a gen uh hi. 
Luke24:36 Amaute hih thu kikumin a om laitakun thakhat thu-in Jesu mahmah amaute lakah hong dinga, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in amaute a hopih hi." 
Luke24:37 Ahi zongin amaute lau-in liing lawng gawp uh a, sikha a mu hi ni, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Luke24:38 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin lungmang a, bang hangin lungka na hi uh hiam?" 
Luke24:39 Ka khut le ka khete en un; kei mahmah ka hi hi. Hong lawng unla hong thei un. Tu-a keima neih bangin sikha in pum le tak nei ahi hiam?” a cih khit ciangin 
Luke24:40 a khut le a khete a lak hi. 
Luke24:41 Amaute nuam lua kisa-in lamdang sa-in um zo lo phialin a om laitakun, “Nek theih khat peuhpeuh na nei uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Luke24:42 amaute in zong ngasa haankeu khat pia uh a," 
Luke24:43 Jesu in saangin amauteʼ muhin a ne hi. 
Luke24:44 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Tu-a thupiang khempeuh pen note tawh kong om khawm lai-a ka gengen thute mah ahi hi. Moses Thukham laibu sung, kamsangte laibu sung le Late sungah a kigelh thu khempeuh a tung ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Luke24:45 Tua ciangin Lai Siangtho sung thu a theih nadingun a lungsim uh honsak a," 
Luke24:46 amaute kiangah, “Khris in sihna thuakin, a ni thum ni-in sihna panin hingkik dinga," 
Luke24:47 Jerusalem khua a kipan minam khempeuh tungah a mawhna uh kisikin a kimaisak nading thu, ama min tawh kihilh ding hi, ci-in kigelh hi." 
Luke24:48 Note pen hih thu khempeuh a thei teci na hi uh hi. 
Luke24:49 Ka Paʼ hong ciam sa thu, note tungah kong pia ding hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin tua vangliatna na ngah mateng uh hih Jerusalem khuapi ah na ngak un,” a ci hi." 
Luke24:50 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua sung panin Bethany khua gei ciang amaute paipih a, tua lai panin a khut laam to-in amaute thupha a pia hi." 
Luke24:51 Amaute thupha a piak laitakin amaute kiang panin pai khia-in vantungah amah a kila to hi. 
Luke24:52 Amaute in amah bia uh a, lungdam mahmah in Jerusalem khua ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
Luke24:53 Tua ciangin Pasian tungah lungdamna a ko dingin biakinn ah a pai tawntung uh hi. 
John1:1 A kipat cil-in Thu na om a, tua Thu, Pasian tawh na om khawm a, tua Thu, Pasian ahi hi." 
John1:2 Tua hi a, a kipat cil a kipanin Thu le Pasian na om khawm hi." 
John1:3 Pasian in Thu tawh na khempeuh piangsak a, a kipiangsak na khempeuh, Thu tawh loin a kipiangsak khat beek om lo hi." 
John1:4 Nuntakna a nei khempeuh in tua Thu tung panin a nuntakna uh ngah a, tua nuntakna in mi khempeuh tungah khuavak hong tunpih hi." 
John1:5 Tua khuavak pen khuamial lakah taang a, khuamial in tua khuavak a zo kei hi." 
John1:6 Pasian in Johan kici mi khat kamtai dingin hong paisak a," 
John1:7 mi khempeuh in ama thugenna za-in tua khuavak a up theih nadingun tua khuavak thu a gen dingin a hong pai ahi hi. 
John1:8 Tua Johan mahmah pen khuavak hi lo a, khuavak thu a gen dingin a hong pai ahi hi." 
John1:9 Ama gen khuavak taktak pen zong leitungah hong tung khin a, mi khempeuh a taan khin hi." 
John1:10 Amah, leitungah om a, amah tawh leitung a kibawl hi napi-in leitung mite in amah na thei kha lo uh hi." 
John1:11 A khua le a tui ah va pai a, ahi zongin a khuapih a tuipihte in ama thugen na ngai lo uh hi." 
John1:12 Tua bang hitaseleh ama thu ngai-in amah a um mite khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ tate suah theih nading thu a pia hi. 
John1:13 Tua bangin Pasianʼ tate suahna pen leitung ngeina nute pate sung panin suahna tawh hi loin Pasian sung panin suahna ahi hi. 
John1:14 Tua Thu mihing hong suakin kote lakah hong om a, itna nei-in citak mahmah ahih manin Pasianʼ pianzia a neihna ka mu cian uh hi. Hih pianzia pen Pasianʼ Tapa khat bek hihna tawh a neih pianzia ahi hi." 
John1:15 Johan in ama thu gen a, “Keima nungah hong pai hi napi-in keima suah ma-in amah om khin ahih manin kei sangin amah lian zaw hi,” ci-in ka gen pa pen hih pa ahi hi, ci-in a kiko hi." 
John1:16 A kicing ama hong itna hangin eite khempeuh tungah thupha a banbanin hong pia hi. 
John1:17 Pasian in Moses tungtawnin Thukham hong pia a, ahi zongin Jesu Khris hangin itna le cihtakna thu hong pai hi." 
John1:18 Kuamah in Pasian mu ngei lo hi. Pasian tawh a kinai pen, Pasian mah ahi Tapa khat bek in Pasian hong kilangsak hi." 
John1:19 Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante in Johan kiangah siampite le Levi mite paisak uh a, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dongsak uh hi." 
John1:20 Johan in zong na ip bawl loin a siangtakin na gen khia a, “Kei pen Khris ka hi kei hi,” a na ci hi." 
John1:21 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahihleh kua na hi hiam? Elijah na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin, “Ka hi kei hi,” na ci hi. Kamsang pa na hi hiam, ci-in a dot uh ciangin, ka hi kei hi, a na ci leuleu hi." 
John1:22 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahihleh kua na hi hiam? Kote hong sawlte kiangah ka gen ding uh thu hong gen in. Nang, kua kici na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John1:23 Johan in, “Kamsang Isaiah in a na gen mah bangin, ‘Topaʼ tot ding lampi na tangsak un,’ ci-in gam sungah a kiko pa ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John1:24 Hih thu a dong mite pen Farisi mite in a sawl uh ahi hi. 
John1:25 Amaute in Johan kiangah, “Nang pen Khris lah hi lo, Elijah lah hi lo, kamsang lah hi lo na hih leh bang hangin tuiphum mawk na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John1:26 Johan in, “Keimah in tui sungah mite a phum lel ka hi hi. Ahi zongin tu mahmah in noteʼ muh ngei loh mipa, noteʼ lak mahah hong om hi." 
John1:27 Keima khit ciangin note lakah amah in nasep hong kipan ahih hangin, kei pen ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawm zo nai kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John1:28 Hih bang thu kidotna a pianna mun pen Johan in mite tui phumin a omna, Jordan Gun gal a om Bethany khua ahi hi." 
John1:29 A zing ciangin Johan in ama kiangah Jesu hong pai a muh ciangin, “En un, leitung mawhna a la khia Pasianʼ Tuuno hih lai ah hong pai hi." 
John1:30 Keima nungah mi khat hong pai dinga, keima suah ma-in amah om khin ahih manin kei sangin amah lian zaw hi, ci-in ka gen pa ahi hi." 
John1:31 Amah a bangci mi hi ding cih thei lo napi-in, Israel mite in amah a theih nadingun tui sungah mite a phum dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:32 Johan in hih mipa thu teci na pang a, “Vantung panin vakhu bangin Kha hong pai sukin ama tungah a om ka mu hi." 
John1:33 Keimah in amah ka theih nai loh hangin, tui sungah mite a phum dingin kei a hong sawl Pasian in, ‘A tungah Kha hong pai sukin a omna mipa pen Kha Siangtho sungah mite a phum ding pa ahi hi,’ ci-in hong gen khol hi." 
John1:34 Tua ahih manin hih mipa pen Pasianʼ Tapa hi, ci-in thei ka hih manin teci ka pang hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:35 A zing ciangin Johan le a nungzuite nih ding khawmin a om laitakin," 
John1:36 amaute gei ah Jesu hong pai a muh ciangin Johan in limtakin enin, “Hih lai ah Pasianʼ Tuuno hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:37 A nungzui tegel in hih a kampauna za uh ahih manin Jesu a zui pah uh hi. 
John1:38 Jesu kihei a, amau tegel in a zuih lam a muh ciangin, “Bang zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Sia aw, koi lai ah om na hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John1:39 Jesu in, “Hong pai unla, ka omna mun hong mu un,” a na ci hi. Amau tegel in zong Jesu va zui uh a, a omna mun a va mu uh hi. Tua hun pen nitak nai li hun pawl ahih manin ama kiangah a giak uh hi." 
John1:40 Johan kampauna za-in Jesu a zui nihte sung panin khat pen Simon Peterʼ naupa Andru ahi hi. 
John1:41 A zing ciangin a u Simon zong pahin ama kiangah, “Messiah ka mu zo uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua pen Khris a cihnopna ahi hi." 
John1:42 Tua ciangin Jesu kiangah a u Simon a paipih hi. Jesu in amah enin, “Nang pen Johanʼ tapa Simon na hi hi. Tu a kipanin Sifas hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Sifas pen Peter tawh a kibang hi a, suangtum a cihna ahi hi." 
John1:43 A zing ciangin Jesu in Galilee gamah pai ding ngaihsun hi. Filip tawh kituak a, ama kiangah, “Hong zui in,” a ci hi." 
John1:44 Filip pen Andru le Peterʼ teenna Bethsaida khuami mah ahi hi. 
John1:45 Nethanel tawh a kituah ciangin Filip in, “Moses in Thukham laibu sungah a gelh mipa le kamsangte in zong a gelh mipa ka mu khin uh hi. Amah Jesu hi a, Nazareth khuami Josefʼ tapa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:46 Nethanel in, “Nazareth khua panin bang hong piang peuhmah ding ahi hiam?” na cih san hi. Ahi zongin Filip in, “Hong pai inla, hong mu dih in,” a ci hi." 
John1:47 Jesu in ama kiangah Nethanel hong pai a muh ciangin, “En un, hih mipa, Israel mi taktak hi a, a lungsimah zuau thu om het lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:48 Nethanel in, “Kei hong bangci theih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesu in, “Filip in nang hong sap ma-in theikung nuai ah na om laitakin ka hong mu hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John1:49 Tua ciangin Nethanel in, “Sia aw, nang, Pasianʼ Tapa na hi hi. Israel miteʼ Kumpi zong na hi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John1:50 Jesu in, “Theikung nuai ah ka hong mu hi, ka hong cih manin Pasian Tapa le Israel mite Kumpi ka hih lam hong um na hi hiam? Hihte sangin a thu lian zaw na mu lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:51 4 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Keʼn a mantak kong genin ah, vantung a kihong na mu ding uh a, Mihing Tapa le vantung kikalah Pasianʼ vantung mite a kum suk a kah to na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:1 Tua zawh ni nih khit ciangin Galilee gam Kana khua ah mopawi om a, Jesuʼ nu zong tua pawi ah a om hi." 
John2:2 Jesu le a nungzuite zong tua pawi ah a kisam hi. 
John2:3 Leenggahzu a bei ciangin Jesuʼ nu in, “Leenggahzu om nawn lo hi,” ci-in Jesu kiangah a gen hi." 
John2:4 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Nu aw, bang hangin na lunghihmawhna hong ko zenzen na hi hiam? Keima hun tung nai lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John2:5 Ahi zongin Jesuʼ nu in nasemte kiangah, “Ama hong gen bangbangin gamta un,” a ci hi." 
John2:6 Jew mite in amau biakna ngeina ah kisilsiang nading ngeina nei uh ahih manin tua lai ah tui tambong guk tambong sagih bang a ta thei thambeel pi guk a om hi. 
John2:7 Jesu in nasemte kiangah, “Tua thambeelpite sungah tui a dimin koih un,” ci-in a sawl mah bangin a dim sitsetin tui a koih uh hi." 
John2:8 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tu-in tui pawl khat suak unla, zuphung pa kiangah va paipih un,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong tua mah bangin a va paipih uh hi." 
John2:9 Zuphung pa in leenggahzu a suak tui a ciap ciangin, (tui a sung nasemte in a theih hangin) koi panin kingah ahi hiam, ci-in thei lo ahih manin zi nei tangvalpa samin," 
John2:10 “Midangte in leenggahzu khumte hawm masakin nei uh a, mite in a kham gawp khit uh ciangin a ngeinate hawm pan uh hi. Ahi zongin nangmah in a khum pen teng tu dong na sitlai hi,” a ci hi." 
John2:11 Jesu in nalamdang a bawl masak pen Galilee gam Kana khua ah hih bangin Pasianʼ pianzia a neihna kilangsak a, a nungzuite in zong amah a um uh hi." 
John2:12 Tua khit ciangin Jesu le a nu, a sanggamte le a nungzuite, Kapernaum khua ah pai-in tua lai ah ni tawm khat a taam uh hi." 
John2:13 Jew miteʼ Paisan Pawi hun hong nai ta ahih manin Jerusalem khua ah Jesu a pai hi. 
John2:14 Biakinn huang sung a lut ciangin bawng, tuu le kawl vakhu zuakte mu a, sumkhekte zong a sumkhekna sabuai ah a tu mu hi." 
John2:15 Amah in zong khauteep bawlin biakinn huang sung panin tuu le bawng a kipan ganhing khempeuh hawl khia a, sumkhekteʼ sabuai zong sawn paihsakin a sum khempeuh a thehthangsak hi." 
John2:16 Tua ciangin kawl vakhu zuakte kiangah, “Na kawl vakhute uh hih lai panin paikhiatpih un. Ka Paʼ inn pen sumzuakna inn phualpi-in nei kei un,” a ci hi." 
John2:17 Hih bangin a gamtatna hangin, “Nangma inn ka deih luatna in ka lungsim hong uk lahsak hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna thu, a nungzuite in a phawk uh hi." 
John2:18 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua ah a om Jew uliante Jesu kiangah hong pai uh a, “Hih bangin na gamtat theih nading thu na neihna bang lim tawh hong lak thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John2:19 Jesu in, “Hih biakinn susia le-uhcin ni thum sungin ka dingsakkik ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John2:20 Tua ciangin Jew uliante in, “Hih biakinn kum sawm li le kum guk sung a kilam ahi hi. Ni thum sungin dingsakkik zo ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John2:21 Ahi zongin Jesu in biakinn a cih ciangin ama pumpi a cihna ahi hi. 
John2:22 Tua ahih manin sihna panin amah a kithawhkiksak ciangin a nungzuite in Jesuʼ thugen phawkkik uh a, Lai Siangtho le Jesuʼ thugente a um uh hi." 
John2:23 Paisan Pawi hun laitakin Jerusalem khua sungah Jesu a om sungin Jesu in vangliatna tawh nalamdang a bawlte mu uh ahih manin mi tampi in amah a um uh hi. 
John2:24 Ahi zongin Jesu in mi khempeuh limtakin thei tel ahih manin amaute muang lo hi. 
John2:25 Amah in miteʼ lungsim tawng dong thei ahih manin mite a bangci mi ahi hiam cih thu midangte in ama kiangah a gen ding kisam lo hi. 
John3:1 Nikodemas a kici Jew mi ulian khat om a, amah pen Farisi a kici mite pawl ahi hi." 
John3:2 Khat vei zan khuamial laitakin Jesu kiangah va pai a, “Sia aw, mi khat peuhpeuh Pasian in ompih lo hileh hih nalamdangte kuamah in bawl thei lo ding ahih manin nang pen Pasianʼ hong sawl siapa na hihna ka hong thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:3 Jesu in, “A mantakin kong genin ah, mi khatpeuh a suahkik kei leh Pasianʼ Ukna sungah lut thei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:4 Tua ciangin Nikodemas in, “Mi khat a teek khit ciangin bangci suahkik thei ding ahi hiam? A nuʼ sungah lutkikin suakkik thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John3:5 Jesu in, “A mantakin kong genin ah, mi khatpeuh tui le Kha Siangtho tawh a suahkik kei leh Pasianʼ Ukna sungah lut thei lo ding hi." 
John3:6 Mihing sung panin a suakte mihing mah hi bek a, Kha tawh a suakte pen kha mi ahi hi." 
John3:7 Tua ahih manin, ‘Na suahkik ding ahi hi,’ ka hong cihna hangin lamdang sa kei in." 
John3:8 Huih zong a utna peuhpeuh ah nung a, a huging na zak theih hangin koi lam panin hong nung a, koi lamah nung ahi hiam, cih na mu thei kei hi. Kha tawh a suak mite zong tua mah bang ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John3:9 Tua ciangin Nikodemas in, “Hih thu bangci pian theih mawk ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John3:10 Jesu in, “Israel miteʼ sia hi napi-in hih thu theithei lo na hi hiam?" 
John3:11 A mantakin kong genin ah, kote in ka theih sa uh thu bek genin, ka muh sa uh thu bek teci a pang ka hi uh a, ahi zongin note kuamah in ka thugente uh nong um nuam kei uh hi." 
John3:12 Hih leitung thute tawh a kisai thu kong gen ciangin um lo na hih uh leh vantung thute kong gen ciangin bangci up mah ding na hi uh hiam? 
John3:13 Vantung panin a hong pai suk Mihing Tapa keimah sim loh vantungah a pai to ding kuamah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John3:14 Moses in gamlak khuam tungah sumngo gul a khai mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong hong kikhai dinga," 
John3:15 amah a um mi khempeuh nungta tawntung ding hi. 
John3:16 Pasian in leitung mite hong it mahmah ahih manin ama Tapa a um mi khempeuh si nawn loin a hin tawntung theih nadingun a Tapa neihsun a hong piak dongin a hong itna a hong lak hi. 
John3:17 Pasian in leitungah a Tapa hong sawlna pen mawhsakna thukhen dingin a hong paisak hi loin, leitung mite a hon khia dingin a hong paisak hizaw hi." 
John3:18 Amah a um mite in mawhsak thukhenna thuak lo ding uh hi. Amah a um lote pen Pasianʼ Tapa neihsun um lo uh ahih manin mawhsak thukhenna a thuak khinta uh ahi hi. 
John3:19 Tua bangin mawhsak thukhenna a thuakna uh a hang in: Leitungah khuavak hong tung khin napi-in a gamtatna uh hoih lo ahih manin leitung mite in khuavak sangin khuamial deih zaw uh hi. 
John3:20 A gamtat hoih lo mite in a siatna uh a kilat khak ding ut lo uh ahih manin khuavak deih lo uh a, khuavak ah pai nuam lo uh hi." 
John3:21 Ahi zongin thumanin a gamta mite ahihleh a gamtatnate uh Pasianʼ deihna tawh kituak hi, ci-in a kilatsak theih nadingun khuavak sungah a pai uh hi." 
John3:22 Hih thute khit ciangin Jesu le a nungzuite Judea gamah pai uh a, tua gamah a nungzuite tawh omin mite tui a phum hi." 
John3:22 Hih thute khit ciangin Jesu le a nungzuite Judea gamah pai uh a, tua gamah a nungzuite tawh omin mite tui a phum hi." 
John3:23 Tuiphumpa Johan zong thong kia nai lo hi. Tua hi a, tui tampi omna Salim khua kiang Ainon kici munah Johan in mite tuiphum a, ama kiangah mite hong pai-in tui a kiphum uh hi." 
John3:24  
John3:25 Tua laitakin biakna vai-in kisiansuahna tawh kizomin Johanʼ nungzuite le Jew mi pawl khat thu kiseel uh hi. 
John3:26 Tua ahih manin Johan nungzuite a kiangah hong pai uh a, “Sia aw, Jordan Gun gal khat ah na om khawm pih ngei pa, ama thu na genna na phawk lai hiam? Tu-in amah in mi tui phumphum a, mi khempeuh in amah zuan uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh leh" 
John3:27 Johan in, “Pasian in hih theih nading thu pia kei leh kuamah in bangmah hih thei lo hi." 
John3:28 Kei pen Khris ka hi kei a, ama mai ah a hong kisawl pa ka hi lel hi, ci-in ka genna thu note mahmah in na zak sa uh ahi hi." 
John3:29 Mo pen zi nei ding tangvalpa ading bek ahi hi. Zineipa kiangah a ding a lawmpa in ama kampau ding bek ngai a, ama awging a zak ciangin nuam mahmah hi. Tua mah bangin tu-in ama hangin ka nuam a, keima lungdamna kicing ta hi." 
John3:30 Amah lian semsem dinga, kei ka hih leh ka neu semsem ding hi." 
John3:31 “Vantung pan hong pai pa pen a dang khempeuh sangin lian zaw hi. Leitung panin a piang mi pen leitung mi hi a, leitung thute bek mah a gen hi. Tua ahih manin vantung panin a hong pai pa ahihleh a dang khempeuh sangin a lian zaw ahi hi." 
John3:32 Amah in a muh sa leh a zak sa thu a gen hi napi-in kuamah in ama thugen um lo uh hi. 
John3:33 Ama thugen a umte pen, Pasianʼ thugen man hi, ci-in a um ahi uh hi." 
John3:34 Pasian in a sawl mipa tungah ama Kha a kicingin pia ahih manin a sawl mipa in Pasianʼ thugente mah a gen ahi hi. 
John3:35 Pa in Tapa it ahih manin ama khut sungah na khempeuh a pia hi. 
John3:36 Tua ahih manin Tapa a um mi peuhmah nungta tawntung dinga, Tapaʼ thu a mang lote in nuntak mu lo dinga, amaute tungah Pasian heh tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:1 Jesu in Johan sangin mi tam ngah zaw in a tuiphumna thu Farisi mite in a za uh hi. 
John4:2 (A taktakin Jesu mahmah in tuiphum loin a nungzuite bek in a phum ahi hi.) 
John4:3 Jesu in tua thu a phawk ciangin Judea gam panin pai khia-in Galilee gamah a paikik hi. 
John4:3 Jesu in tua thu a phawk ciangin Judea gam panin pai khia-in Galilee gamah a paikik hi. 
John4:4 Tua a paina ah Samaria gam a nawk ding kisam hi. 
John4:5 Tua bangin a nawk ciangin Samaria gam sungah Saikhar a kici khua khat a tung hi. Tua khua gei ah Jakob in a tapa Josef a piak lo khat om hi. 
John4:6 Tua lo sungah tuikhuk khat om a, a khualzinna-in Jesu gim ahih manin a tuikhuk gei ah a tu hi. Tua hun pen sunkim laitak ahi hi." 
John4:7 Tua laitakin Samaria numei khat tuitawi dingin tuikhuk ah a hong pai hi. Jesu in tua numei kiangah, “Na tui hong dawnsak in,” a ci hi." 
John4:8 Tua laitakin khua sungah an lei dingin Jesu nungzuite paikhia khin uh hi. 
John4:9 Jew mite in buah tang uh a, Samaria miteʼ nazatte zang lo uh ahih manin, Samaria numei in Jesu kiangah, “Bang hangin nang Jew mi in kei Samaria numei kiangah tui hong ngen na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John4:10 Jesu in, “Pasianʼ hong piak theih dingte le tui dawn ding hong ngen pa thei tel hi lecin, ama kiang pan tui a ngen ding na hizaw a, amah in nuntakna tui nang hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:11 Tua ciangin numei in, “Sia aw, tuikhuk thuk mahmah a, ahi zongin tui khai nading bangmah na nei kei hi. Koi panin tua nuntakna tui ngah thei ding na hi hiam?" 
John4:12 Tua tham loin, i pupi Jakob sangin lian zaw ding na hi hiam? Amah a kipan a tate le a ganhingte in a nek hih tui sangin a limci zaw koi ah ngah ding na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John4:13 Jesu in, “Hih tui a dawn khempeuh dangtakkik ding uh a," 
John4:14 ahi zongin keima piak ding tui a dawn khempeuh dangtakkik nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua ka piak tui a dawnte sungah nuntakna tuinak piang dinga, a nungtasak paisuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:15 Tua ciangin numei in, “Sia aw, tua bang ahihleh ka dang a tak nawn loh nading le hih lai ah tui tawi-in ka pai nawn loh nadingin kei zong tua tui hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
John4:16 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Va ciahin na pasal va sam inla, hih lai ah hong paikik un,” a ci hi." 
John4:17 Numei in, “Pasal ka nei kei hi,” a cih ciangin Jesu in, “‘Pasal ka nei kei hi,’ na cih pen man mahmah hi." 
John4:18 Pasal nga na nei khin ngei a, tu-a na ompih zong na pasal hi lo hi. Tua ahih manin na thugen man mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:19 Tua ciangin numei in, “Sia aw, nang pen kamsang khat na hihna thu ka hong thei hi." 
John4:20 Ko Samaria miteʼ pupite in hih lai mual tungah Pasian bia uh a, ahi zongin no Jew mite in Pasian biakna mun pen Jerusalem khua ahi hi, na ci uh hi,” a cih ciangin," 
John4:21 Jesu in, “Lawm aw, hih ka thugen ding hong um in: Mite in hih mual tung hitaleh Jerusalem hitaleh ah Pa Pasian a biak nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi." 
John4:22 No Samaria mite in na theih taktak lohpi uh na bia uh a, ahi zongin ko Jew mite tungtawnin hotkhiatna thu hong pai ahih manin kote in ka theih uh a bia ka hi uh hi." 
John4:23 Ahi zongin Pasian a bia taktakte in Pasianʼ Khaʼ lamlahna le thuman tak tawh a biak hun hong tung dinga, tu-in zong a hong tung khinta ahi hi. Pa Pasian in tu-a bangin amah i biak ding a hong deih ahi hi." 
John4:24 Pasian pen Kha ahi hi; amah a biate in tua Khaʼ lamlahna le thuman taktak tawh a bia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:25 Tua ciangin numei in, “Khris a kici Messiah hong pai nading thu ka thei hi. Amah hong pai ciangin thu khempeuh hong gen ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John4:26 Jesu in, “Tu-a nang tawh a kiho keimah pen tua na gen pa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:27 Tua laitakin Jesu nungzuite hong tung uh a, ahi zongin kuamah in, “Numei aw, bang deih na hi hiam?” cihna ahi a, “Bang hangin tua numei tawh kiho na hi hiam?” cihna ahi zongin dong ngam lo uh hi." 
John4:28 Tua ciangin numei in a tuibeel nusia-in khua sungah ciah a, a khuapih mite kiangah," 
John4:29 “Hong pai un. Ka gamtatna sa a hong thei pa va en ni. Amah Khris hi kha ding hi,” a va ci hi." 
John4:30 Tua ahih manin a khuapihte zong Jesu kiangah a va pai uh hi. 
John4:31 Mite a hong tun ma hunsung tengin a nungzuite in, “Sia aw, an ne in,” ci-in a kun uh hi." 
John4:32 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Note in na theih loh uh nek ding an ka nei hi,” a na ci hi." 
John4:33 Tua ahih manin a nungzuite khatlekhat kiho-in, “Mi khatpeuh in an na puak khin hi ding ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
John4:34 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Keimah hong sawl paʼ deihna bangin na semin, sep dingin hong piak nasep zawhna pen ka nuntakna an ahi hi." 
John4:35 Note in na paunak uh ah, ‘Khai tuh khit kha li ciangin anlak hun hi,’ na ci uh hi. Tu-in note khuadakin lote en un. An khempeuh min khinta a, lak ding bek in sam hi." 
John4:36 Khai tuh pa le an la pa a lungdam khawm theih nadingin an la pa thaman a kipiak mah bangin an la pa in zong a nungta tawntung dingin mi a khawm ding hi. 
John4:37 Tua ahih manin, ‘Khat in khai tuhin, a dang khat in a an la,’ ci-in paunak a om pen thuman mahmah hi." 
John4:38 Tua ahih manin note in na khawh loh uh lo ah an a la dingin ka hong sawl hi. Midang in tua lo na kho a, note in a lak bek a si na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John4:39 Tua numei in, “Ka gamtatna sate khempeuh hong thei hi,” ci-in a thugenna hangin tua khua sunga om Samaria mi tampi tak in Jesu a um uh hi." 
John4:40 Tua ahih manin Jesu kiangah Samaria mite a va tun uh ciangin amauteʼ khua ah a taam nadingin kun uh a, Jesu zong tua khua ah ni nih a taam hi." 
John4:41 Tua ahih manin tua numeiʼ thugenna hangin Jesu a um mi tampi tak kibehlap hi. 
John4:42 Tua thu um mite in tua numei kiangah, “Nangma thugenna hangin a um ka hi nawn kei uh a, komau mahmah in a thugen za-in, leitung mite a Hon khia ding pa taktak hi, ci-in thei ka hih manun a um ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John4:43 Tua lai ah ni nih a taam khit ciangin Galilee gamah a pai hi. 
John4:44 Jesu mahmah in zong, “Kamsang a kuamah peuh ama gamah kipakta ngei lo hi,” ci-in a gen ngei hi napi-in," 
John4:45 Paisan Pawi hun laitakin Jerusalem ah Galilee mite va pai-in, tua pawi sungah Jesuʼ septe khempeuh mu khin uh ahih manin, Jesu a tun ciangin Galilee mite in na limbawl mahmah uh hi." 
John4:46 Tui, leenggahzu a suahsakna Galilee gam Kana khua ah Jesu paikik hi. Tua laitakin Kapernaum khua ah kumpi nasem ulian khat om a, a tapa a ci a na hi." 
John4:47 A tapa gim mahmah in si dektak ahih manin, Judea gam panin Galilee gamah Jesu hong paina thu a zak ciangin ama kiangah va pai a, Kapernaum khua ah Jesu hong pai-in a tapa a damsak nadingin a va thum hi." 
John4:47 A tapa gim mahmah in si dektak ahih manin, Judea gam panin Galilee gamah Jesu hong paina thu a zak ciangin ama kiangah va pai a, Kapernaum khua ah Jesu hong pai-in a tapa a damsak nadingin a va thum hi." 
John4:48 Jesu in ama kiangah, “Note in lim le nalamdang lian ka bawl na muh kei uh leh Topa ka hihna thu na hong um kei ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John4:49 ulian pa in, “Sia aw, ka ta a sih ma-in hong pai tapeuh in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
John4:50 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Va ciah in. Na tapa nungta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ulian pa in Jesuʼ thugen um ahih manin a ciah hi." 
John4:51 Lampi ah a nasemte in na dawntuah uh a, “Na tapa dam ta hi,” ci-in na ko uh hi." 
John4:52 Amah in, “Bang hunin a noptuam hong kipan ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amaute in, “Zan sun nai khat pawlin a cisa hong kiam vat hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John4:53 Jesu in, “Na tapa nungta ding hi,” a cih hun tawh a kituak lian ahihna thu a pa in thei a, amah a kipan a innkuanpihte khempeuh in Jesu a um uh hi." 
John4:54 Hih nalamdang pen Judea gam panin Galilee gamah hong pai khit a kipanin Jesu in nalamdang a bawl a nihna ahi hi. 
John4:54 Hih nalamdang pen Judea gam panin Galilee gamah hong pai khit a kipanin Jesu in nalamdang a bawl a nihna ahi hi. 
John5:1 Tua khit ciangin, Jerusalem khua ah Jew mite biakna pawi kibawl ahih manin Jesu zong a pai hi." 
John5:2 Jerusalem khua sung Tuu Kongpi a kici gei ah Hebru pau-in Beth-zatha a kici bual khat om a, tua bual kimkot ah talap nga a om hi." 
John5:3 Hih talapte sungah a mittaw, a khebai, khutlekhe zaw, cina tampi lum phengphang uh hi. (Amaute in tua bualtui a kilawh ding ngakin a om uh ahi hi." 
John5:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ vantungmi khat in tua bualtui lok thei zel a, tui a kilawh khit ciangin tua lai a tung masa penpen ama natna panin a dam hi.)" 
John5:5 Tua talapte sung khat ah kum sawm thum le kum giat sung a cina khin mi khat a om hi. 
John5:6 Jesu in tua cina pa mu a, tua munah sau veipi a lup khitna a theih ciangin ama kiangah, “Na dam nuam hiam?” ci-in a dot leh" 
John5:7 cina pa in, “Sia aw, bualtui a kilawh ciangin kei hong pua ding kuamah om lo ahih manin, kei ka tun ma-in midang khat a bual sung na tung khin pahpah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John5:8 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Tho inla, na lupna pheek pua-in pai in,” a cih ciangin," 
John5:9 tua cina pa thakhatin dam pah a, a lupna pheek la-in a pai pah hi. Tua ni pen Sabbath ni hi citciat ahih manin," 
John5:10 Jerusalem khua sunga om Jew mi uliante in cina damkik pa kiangah, “Tu ni pen Sabbath ni ahih manin lupna pheek na puak ding ngeina hi lo hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John5:11 amah in, “Kei hong damsak pa in, ‘Na lupna pheek la inla pai in,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John5:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, “‘Na lupna pheek la inla pai in,’ hong ci kua ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John5:13 Ahi zongin tua munah mi tampi om a, Jesu paikhia ziau ahih manin cina damkik pa in amah a damsak kua ahi hiam, cih a thei kei hi." 
John5:14 Tua khit ciangin Jesu in biakinn sungah tua cina dam pa mukik a, ama kiangah, “Tu-in na dam khinta hi. Mawhna bawl nawn kei in. Tua hikeileh a sia zaw khat na thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John5:15 Tua ciangin amah zong pusuak a, Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante kiangah, “Keimah hong damsak pa pen Jesu ahi hi,” ci-in a va ko hi." 
John5:16 Tua ahih manin Jesu in Sabbath ni-in cina a damsakna hangin amaute in Jesu bawlsiat ding a kipan uh hi. 
John5:17 Ahi zongin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Ka Pa in tu ni dongin na sem tawntung ahih manin kei zong ka sep ding mah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John5:18 Hih bangin ama kampauna hangin amaute in Jesu that nuam semsem uh hi. Amah in Sabbath thukham a palsat bek hi loin, Pasian nangawn ka Pa ci ahih manin Pasian tawh a kikimin kiseh hi, ci-in a mawhsak uh hi." 
John5:19 Tua ahih manin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “A mantakin gen lehang: Tapa in ama thu bek tawh bangmah sem lo a, a Pa in a sep a muh teng bek a sem ahi hi. Tua hi a, a Pa in a sep teng mah a Tapa in zong a sem ahi hi." 
John5:20 Pa in a Tapa itin, ama sep teng mah lak a, mailam hunah zong hih sangin a lian zaw a sep ding lak lai ding ahih manin lamdang na sa mahmah ding uh hi." 
John5:21 Pa in mi si sate nangawn thosakin a nuntaksak mah bangin Tapa in zong a ut peuhpeuh nungtasak thei hi. 
John5:22 Pa in kuama tungah thukhen nasep sem lo hi. Mi khempeuh in Pa a zahtak mah bangin Tapa a zahtak theih nadingun Pa in thukhen nasep khempeuh a Tapa tungah a pia hi. Tua ahih manin Tapa a zahtak lo mi khempeuh pen Tapa a sawl Pa Pasian zong a zahtak lo ahi uh hi. 
John5:23  
John5:24 “A mantakin kong genin ah: Ka thugennate za-in kei hong sawl pa a um khempeuh a nungta paisuak ding hi ta hi. Mawhsak thukhenna ngah nawn loin, sihna panin a hingkik ta ahi hi." 
John5:25 A taktakin ci lehang: A si mite in Pasianʼ Tapaʼ aw a zak hun uh hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hun hong tung khin hi ta a, ama aw a za mi khempeuh nungta ding uh hi." 
John5:26 Pa in nuntakna a piak theih mah bangin Tapa in zong a piak theih nadingin Pa in a bawl hi. 
John5:27 Amah pen Mihing Tapa ahih manin thu khen theih nading aana ama tungah a pia hi. 
John5:28 Hih thu kong gen ciangin lamdang sa kei un. Han sungah a om misi khempeuh in ama aw za-in," 
John5:29 han sung panin a hong paikhiat uh hun hong tung ding hi. A gamtat hoih mite pen a nungta tawntung dingin hong thokik ding uh a, a gamtat siate ahihleh mawhsak thukhenna a thuak dingin hong thokik ding uh hi." 
John5:30 “Keima thu guak tawh ka hih theih bangmah om lo hi. Pasianʼ hong genna bang bekin thu ka khen hi. Keima ut bangin sem loin kei hong sawl paʼ deih bangin sem ka hih manin ka thukhenna thuman hi. 
John5:31 “Keima thu tawh kisai ah kei mahmah in teci pang leng kuamah in a thumanin sang thei lo ding hi. 
John5:32 Tua ahih manin keima ading teci a pang ding mi khat om a, keima thu genin teci a panna thuman hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
John5:33 Note in Johan kiangah thu a dong dingin mi na sawl uh a, amah in note kiangah a thuman hong gen zo hi." 
John5:34 Keimah in mihingteʼ teci panna a kisam ka hi kei a, note in hotkhiatna na ngah theih nadingun note ading ngaihsutna tawh hih thu teng a hong gen ka hizaw hi." 
John5:35 Johan pen meivak bangin kuangin a taang hi a, ama khuavak sungah tawl khat nuamsa-in om ding na ut uh hi." 
John5:36 Ahi zongin Johanʼ teci panna sangin a lian zaw teci khat ka nei a, tua in: Ka Pa in sep dingin a hong piak tu-a ka sep thute in kei adingin teci a pang hi a, Pa in kei a hong sawl taktak ahihna hong kilangsak hi." 
John5:37 Tua ban panin kei a hong sawl Pasian in zong keima adingin teci a pang hi. Note in Pasianʼ sawl paʼ thu um lo na hih manun Pasianʼ aw lah za ngei lo, a maitang lah mu ngei lo, na lungsim uh ah zong ama thu a ciing lo na hi uh hi." 
John5:38  
John5:39 Nuntak tawntung ngah theih nading lametna tawh Lai Siangtho sung na lim sim mahmah uh a, tua na sim uh Lai Siangtho in keima thu mah genin teci pang napi-in," 
John5:40 na nuntak theih nadingun kei kiangah nong pai nuam kei veve uh hi. 
John5:41 “Hih bangin kong gen ciangin mihingte in hong pahtak ding ka deihna hi lo a," 
John5:42 noteʼ lungsim sungah Pasian itna na neih het lohna uh ka theihna hang hizaw hi. 
John5:43 Ka Paʼ thu tawh kei hong pai napi-in na hong sang nuam kei uh hi. Tua hi napi-in midang khatpeuh ama thu tawh hong pai tawm leh na sang ding uh hi. 
John5:44 Pasianʼ pahtak theih nading hanciam nuam loin, note khatlekhat na kiphat theih nading uh a hanciam miteʼ thugen, a bang hangin um zawsop na hi uh hiam?" 
John5:45 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin ka Pa kiangah note a hong mawhsak ding pa hi, ci-in hong ngaihsun kei unla, note in suan belin na neih uh Moses pen a hong mawhsak ding pa ahih zawkna thu thei ta un." 
John5:46 Moses in keima thu gen belin nei ahih manin Moses um taktak hi le-uhcin kei zong na hong um ding uh hi. 
John5:47 Ahi zongin Mosesʼ laigelh thute um lo na hih manun kei hong bangci up theih mah ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
John6:1 Tua khit ciangin Tiberias zong a kici Galilee Tuili gal khat lamah Jesu a pai hi. 
John6:2 Jesu in cinate damsakin nalamdang lian pipi a bawlte mi tampi in mu khin uh ahih manin mi tampi tak in Jesu nung a zui uh hi. 
John6:3 Jesu zong a mual tung lamah kah to-in a nungzuite tawh a tukhawm hi. 
John6:4 Jew miteʼ Paisan Pawi hun nai mahmah ta hi. 
John6:5 Jesu khuadak a, ama lamah mihonpi hong pai muaimuai a muh ciangin Filip kiangah, “Hih mihonpiteʼ nek ding an koici ngah theih ding ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John6:6 (Jesu in a hih ding thei napi-in Filip a ze-etna-in hih bangin a dong lel ahi hi.) 
John6:7 Filip in, “Ngun peek za nih tawh an i lei hangin tawmno bekin cing pan ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:8 Tua laitakin a nungzuite sung panin Simon Peterʼ nau Andru in Jesu kiangah," 
John6:9 “Hih lai ah mangbuhham kibawl anlum nga le ngasa tawn nih sun-an a pua tangval khat om sam hi; tuate lah mihing hi zah lakah cihtaak ding ahi hiam?” ci hi. 
John6:10 Ahi zongin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mihonte tusak un,” a ci hi. (Tua lai ah lopa tampi om hi.) Tua ahih manin mihonte tu uh a, pasal tul nga bang pha uh hi." 
John6:11 Jesu in anlum la-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a koh khit ciangin mihon a tute lakah a hawm hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa zong hih a, mi khempeuh in a duh zahzah uh a ne ciat uh hi." 
John6:12 Mi khempeuh in a kham khit uh ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “A kikhamvalte kaikhawmkik un; bangmah mawk valsak kei ni,” a ci hi." 
John6:13 Tua ahih manin mihonpi in anlum nga a nek khit uh ciangin a khamvalte uh kaikhawm uh a, paipel sawm le nih dim a pha hi." 
John6:14 Jesuʼ nalamdang bawl a muh uh ciangin tua lai-a om mihonpite in, “Leitungah kamsang hong pai ding a kici pa pen hih pa hi taktak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John6:15 Mihonte in thatang hat thu tawh kumpi-in amah a koih sawmna thu Jesu in a theih ciangin mual tung lamah amah guak a kihem khia hi. 
John6:16 A nitak ciangin tui gei ah a nungzuite pai suk uh a," 
John6:17 gunkuang tungah tuangin Kapernaum khua lam manawhin a pai uh hi. Khua hong mial ta a, ahi zongin amaute kiangah Jesu hong tung nai lo hi." 
John6:18 Huih nakpi-in hong nung ahih manin tui hong kilok gawp hi. 
John6:19 Tui gei panin tai thum tai li bang gunkuang a hawh khit uh ciangin tui tungah Jesu hong pai-in gunkuang lam a hong naih a mu uh hi. Amaute na lau mahmah uh ahih manin 
John6:20 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Keimah ka hi hi; lau kei un,” a ci hi." 
John6:21 Tua ciangin amaute nuam mahmah uh a, gunkuang tungah Jesu kah to sakin, a sawt loin a pai nading mun uh a tung pah uh hi." 
John6:22 A zing ciangin tui gal khat ah a om lai mihonte in tui gei ah gunkuang khat a om lai mu uh a, a zan nitakin gunkuang tungah a tuan uh ciangin a nungzuite lakah Jesu a om lohna thu zong thei uh ahih manin a nungzuite bek a pai-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
John6:23 Ahi zongin Tiberias khua panin gunkuang dang tampi hong pai a, Jesu in lungdamna a koh khit ciangin an a nekna uh munah hong tung uh hi." 
John6:24 Tua lai ah Jesu le a nungzuite a om nawn lohna thu mihonte in a theih uh ciangin gunkuang tungah tuangin Jesu a zong dingin Kapernaum khua lamah a pai uh hi. 
John6:25 Tui gal khat ah Jesu a muh uh ciangin, “Sia aw, bang hunin hih lai na tung na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John6:26 Jesu in, “A mantakin ci lehang: Ka nalamdang bawlte na muh uh ciangin kei hong umin a hong zong na hi kei uh a, an na kham takun na nek uh manin a hong zong na hi bek uh hi." 
John6:27 A ning thei ante ngaihsutin nei masa kei unla, nuntak tawntungna an kan masa zaw un. Pa Pasian in tua an a pia dingin kei hong seh sa ahih manin keimah in note tungah nuntak tawntungna an kong pia ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:28 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua ahihleh Pasian ka lungkimsak theih nadingun bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John6:29 Jesu in, “Pasian in a hong sawl pa um le-uhcin Pasian a lungkim nadingin a gamta na hi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:30 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kote in mu-in ka hong up theih nadingun bang nalamdang hong bawl dinga, bang hong sem ding na hi hiam?" 
John6:31 Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Amauteʼ nek dingin van panin an a pia hi,’ ci-in a kigelh mah bangin ka pu ka pate un gam sungah manna an ne uh hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John6:32 Jesu in, “A mantakin ci lehang: Moses in a piak an pen vantung an hi lo hi. Vantung an taktak pen ka Pa in hong pia hi." 
John6:33 Pasian in a hong piak an pen vantung panin hong pai-in leitung mite a nungtasak pa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:34 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Sia aw, kote tungah tua an hong pia tawntung in,” a ci uh hi." 
John6:35 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kei pen nuntakna an ka hi hi. Ka kiangah hong paite gilkial ngei nawn lo dinga, kei hong umte dangtak ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
John6:36 Ahi zongin note tungah ka hong gen nop thu in: Note in kei hong mu khin napi-in na hong um nuam kei uh hi. 
John6:37 Ka Pa in kei tungah a hong piak mi peuhmah ka kiangah hong pai dinga, ka kiangah a hong pai mi peuhmah ka hawl khia kei ding hi." 
John6:38 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima ut bangin a sem ding hi loin kei hong sawl paʼ deihna bangin a sem dingin vantung panin a hong pai ka hi hi. 
John6:39 Kei hong sawl paʼ deihna in: Ka khut sungah a hong piak mi khempeuh khat zong khahsuah loin nitawp ni ciangin ka hinsakkik ding ahi hi. 
John6:40 Tua ahih manin Tapa mu-in a um mi khempeuh in nuntak tawntungna ngahin, nitawp ni ciangin ka hinsak ding, ka Pa in hong deih ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:41 Jesu in, “Kei pen vantung panin a hong pai an ka hi hi,” a cihna hangin mihonte phun ngeingai uh a," 
John6:42 “Hih Jesu pen a nu le a pa i theih hi a, Josefʼ tapa hi lel hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hi napi-in bang hangin, ‘Vantung panin ka hong pai,’ cithei peuhmah ahi hiam?” ci-in a kiphunsan uh hi." 
John6:43 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Note khatlekhat kiphunsan kei un." 
John6:44 Kei hong sawl Pa in a kaih loh mite ka kiangah hong pai thei lo dinga, ka kiangah hong pai mite nitawp ni ciangin ka hingsak ding hi." 
John6:45 Kamsangte in a lai gelhna uh ah, ‘Pasian in mi khempeuh a hilh ding hi,’ na ci uh hi. Tua ahih manin Pa kiang panin thu za-in a thei mi khempeuh ka kiangah a hong pai ahi hi." 
John6:46 Hih bang ka cih ciangin Pa tawh a kimu khin ngei om hi, ka cihna hi lo hi. Pasian kiang panin hong pai pa bek in Pa a mu ngei ahi hi." 
John6:47 A mantakin kong genin ah, kei hong umte bek in nuntak tawntungna ngah hi." 
John6:48 Kei pen nuntakna an ka hi hi. 
John6:49 Na pu na pate un gam sungah manna ne uh a, a vekpi-un si veve uh hi." 
John6:50 Ahi zongin vantung panin a hong pai an a ne mi peuhmah si lo ding hi. 
John6:51 Kei pen vantung panin a hong pai suk nuntakna an ka hi hi. Tua an a ne mi peuhmah nungta tawntung ding hi. Leitung mite a nuntak nadingin ka piak ding an pen keima sa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:52 Hih bangin a thugenna hangin mihonpite khatlekhat kitawng uh a, “Bangci-in hih mipa in nek dingin ama sa hong pia thei ding ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
John6:53 Tua ahih manin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “A mantakin kong genin ah, Mihing Tapaʼ sa na nek kei uh a, a sisan na dawn kei uh leh note sungah nuntakna om lo ding hi." 
John6:54 Ka sa ne-in ka si a dawnte a nungta tawntung hi a, nitawp ni ciangin ka hingsak ding hi." 
John6:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sa, an taktak hi a, ka sisan, dawn ding tui taktak ahi hi." 
John6:56 Ka sa ne-in ka si a dawnte pen kei tawh pum khat ka hi uh hi. 
John6:57 A nungta Pa Pasian in kei hong sawl ahih manin ama hangin ka nuntak mah bangin keima sa a ne mite zong keima hang mahin nungta ding hi. 
John6:58 Tua ahih manin kei pen vantung panin a hong pai an ka hi a, na pu na pate un ne-in a sih veve-na ante tawh kibang lo hi. Hih keiʼ hong piak an a nete ahihleh nungta tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:59 Hih thute pen Kapernaum khua-a kikhopna inn sunga a thuhilhna ah a gen ahi hi. 
John6:60 A nungzuite nangawn un hih thu a zak ciangun, “Hih thugen haksa lua hi. Kua in zui zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John6:61 Ahi zongin Jesu in hih thu ah a nungzuiteʼ phunna thei ahih manin, “Hih ka thugenna in note hong lungkiasak ahi hiam?" 
John6:62 Mihing Tapa ama omna ngei ah a ciah tokik a mu hi le-uhcin bang na ci ding uh hiam? 
John6:63 Nuntakna a pia thei pen Pasianʼ Kha hi a, mihingteʼ hih theih bangmah om lo hi. Keima hong gen thute pen nuntakna a hong pia thei tua Kha thu ahi hi." 
John6:64 Tua hi napi-in note pawl khat in na um kei uh hi,” a ci hi. (Jesu in a kipat cil pek a kipanin kua teng in ama thu um dinga, kua teng in amah lehpei ding cih thu thei khinzo hi.)" 
John6:65 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Ka Pa in ahi thei dingin bawl kei leh ka kiangah kuamah hong pai thei lo ding hi, ka cihna thu pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi,” ci-in a gen thuah lai hi." 
John6:66 Hih bangin a thugenna hangin a nung a zui a thu ngai mi tampi kilehkikin Jesu zui nawn lo uh hi. 
John6:67 Tua ahih manin Jesu in a nungzui sawm le nihte kiangah, “Note zong na ciahkik nuam mai uh hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John6:68 Simon Peter in, “Topa aw, ciah le ung kua kiang zuan mawk ding ka hi uh hiam? Nangmah in nuntak tawntung nading thu na nei hi." 
John6:69 Tu-in nang ka hong um uh a, Pasian kiang panin a hong pai a Siangtho Pa na hihna thu ka hong thei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John6:70 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Note na sawm le nih mahun ka hong teel hi napi-in khat pen dawi na suak mawk uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John6:71 Sawm le nihte sung panin amah a lehpei ding ahih manin Simon Iskariotʼ tapa Judas thu a genna ahi hi. 
John7:1 Tua khit ciangin Galilee gam sungah Jesu zin kawikawi hi. Jerusalem khua-a om Jew mi uliante in amah that nuam uh ahih manin Judea gam sungah zin nuam nawn lo hi. 
John7:1 Tua khit ciangin Galilee gam sungah Jesu zin kawikawi hi. Jerusalem khua-a om Jew mi uliante in amah that nuam uh ahih manin Judea gam sungah zin nuam nawn lo hi. 
John7:2 Jew miteʼ Buk Pawi hun hong nai ta ahih manin," 
John7:3 ama sanggamte in Jesu kiangah, “Na nung hong zui mihonte in na nasepna a muh theih nadingun hih lai panin pai khia-in Judea gamah va pai in." 
John7:3 ama sanggamte in Jesu kiangah, “Na nung hong zui mihonte in na nasepna a muh theih nadingun hih lai panin pai khia-in Judea gamah va pai in." 
John7:4 Miteʼ theih ding a ut pa in a simthamin na sem ngei lo hi. Hih bangin na semsem na hih manin na sepna thu mi khempeuh theisak vet in,” ci-in zahpihna tawh thu gen uh a," 
John7:5 ama sanggamte mahmah in zong Jesu um lo uh hi. 
John7:6 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Kei adingin pai ding a hunhoih hi nai lo hi; ahi zongin note adingin a hunhoih hi tawntung hi." 
John7:7 Leitung miteʼ gamtatnate hoih lo hi, ci-in gen tawntung ka hih manin amaute in kei hong mudah uh hi; ahi zongin note hong mudah lo uh hi." 
John7:8 Tua ahih manin pawi siim dingin note va pai un. Kei adingin a hunhoih hi nai lo ahih manin kei ka hong pai kei ding hi,” ci-in dawng a," 
John7:9 amah pai loin Galilee gam sung mahah a om lai hi. 
John7:10 Ahi zongin a sanggamte a dinkhiat khit ciangin Jesu zong Jerusalem ah Buk Pawi siim dingin a nung pai hi. Ahi zongin a kilang lua-in pai loin a sim pai ahi hi. 
John7:11 Jerusalem-a om Jew mi uliante in tua pawi lak khawng Jesu zong uh a, “Koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:12 Ama thu hangin mihonte lakah kam kihona tampi om a, “Amah mihoih mahmah khat hi,” ci uh a, pawl khat in, “Mi khemin a lam khialhpih ding pa ahih manin mihoih hi het lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:13 Ahi zongin Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante a kihtakna hangun kuamah in Jesu thu a kilangin gen ngam lo uh hi. 
John7:14 Pawi kham hunsung alang bang a bei khit ciangin biakinn sungah Jesu lutin thuhilh ding a kipan hi. 
John7:15 Jew mi uliante in lamdang sa mahmah uh a, “Hih mipa cikmah a sang kah ngei lo kimlai bang hangin thu hih zah thei ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:16 Tua ahih manin Jesu in, “Ka thugente pen keima thu hi lo a, kei a hong sawl Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahi hi." 
John7:17 Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamta nuam mi peuhmah in, ka thugente pen Pasianʼ kiang panin a hong pai thu a gen ka hihna leh keima thu bek tawh a gen ka hihna khen thei ding uh hi." 
John7:18 Amauʼ thu bek tawh thu a gente in amauʼ minthan nading a zong hi a, ahi zongin a hong sawl paʼ minthan nading a zong keimah in thuman thutak gen ka hih manin zuau thu kihel lo hi." 
John7:19 Moses in note tungah Thukham hong pia napi-in kuamah in na zui kei uh hi. Tua hi napi, bang hangin thah dingin kei hong sawm na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
John7:20 Tua ciangin mihonte in, “Dawivei hi teh! Kua in nang thah hong sawm ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:21 Jesu in, “Sabbath ni-in cina damsakna nalamdang khat ka bawlna hangin lamdang na sa mahmah uh hi." 
John7:22 Moses in na tapate uh vun na at ding uh thu hong pia a, (a taktakin Moses thupiak ma pekin na pu na pate un a palsat thu ahi hi) vun at ni ding le Sabbath ni a kituah khak ciangin a vun na at veve uh hi." 
John7:23 Moses thupiakna a kipelh loh nadingin Sabbath ni-in vun at na hih uh leh Sabbath ni-in mi khat ka damsak manin bang hangin kei tungah heh na hi uh hiam? 
John7:24 A tungtham a kimu nate siksanin thu khen kei unla, thu taktak siksanin thu khen zaw un,” a ci hi." 
John7:25 Jerusalem khuami pawl khat in, “Thah dingin a sawm pa uh hih pa hi lo ahi hiam?" 
John7:26 Tua hi napi, mihon lakah thu gengen napi-in kuamah in bangmah cih lo uh hi. Uliante in Khris hi, ci-in theihtelna nei uh hi ding hiam?" 
John7:27 Tua ding lah, hih mipa hong pian khiatna i theih hi a, Khris hong pai ciangin ama pian khiatna kuamah in a theih ding hi lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:28 Tua ahih manin biakinn sungah a gen mah bangin mi khempeuh zakin gen khia a, “Kei hong thei tel taktak a, ka hong pian khiatna mun a thei takpi mah na hi uh hiam? Keima thu tawh a hong pai tawm ka hi kei hi; kei a hong sawl a thuman pa a thei lo na hi uh hi." 
John7:29 Ahi zongin amah in kei hong sawlin, ama kiang panin a hong pai ka hih manin keʼn ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John7:30 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesu mat ding hanciam uh hi; ahi zongin ama hun tung nai lo ahih manin kuamah in va su lo hi. 
John7:31 Ahi zongin mihon lak panin mi tampi mah in amah um uh a, “Khris hong pai ciangin hih mipa sangin nalamdang tam zaw hong bawl tuan ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:32 Hih bangin mihonpite a kihona thu Farisi mite in za uh ahih manin amaute le siampi liante in Jesu a man dingin biakinn cing palikte pawl khat a sawl uh hi. 
John7:33 Jesu in tua mite kiangah, “Note lakah tawl khat ka om lai dinga, tua ciangin kei hong sawl pa kiangah ka pai ding hi." 
John7:34 Keima omna munah note hong pai thei lo ding na hih manun tua hun ciangin kei nong zon uh hangin nong mu kei ding uh hi,” a na ci hi." 
John7:35 Tua ciangin Jew mi uliante khatlekhat kiho uh a, “I muh zawh loh dingin hih mipa koi lai ah pai sawm hi ding ahi hiam? Jew mite omna Grik khuapi tuamtuamte ah pai-in Grik mite kiangah thu hilhsawm hi ding ahi hiam?" 
John7:36 ‘Kei nong zon uh hangin nong mu zo kei ding uh hi,’ a cihna leh ‘Keima omna munah nong pai thei kei ding uh hi,’ a cih ciangin bang a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a kikum uh hi." 
John7:37 Pawi bei ni ding pen a thupi pen ni hi a, tua ni-in mihon lakah Jesu dingin nakpi takin kiko a, “A dangtak na om uh leh ka kiangah hong pai unla tui hong dawn un." 
John7:38 Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Kei hong um mite sung panin nuntakna tui luang khia ding hi,’ a cih mah bangin kei hong um mite ka kiangah hong pai-in hong dawn ta un,” a ci hi." 
John7:39 Jesu in hih bang a gen ciangin amah a umte in a ngah ding Kha Siangtho thu a genna hi a, tua hun laitakin Pasianʼ pianzia nei-in sihna panin Jesu kithokiksak nai lo ahih manin Kha Siangtho kipia khia nai lo hi." 
John7:40 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihon pawl khat in, “Hih pa pen Kamsang pa taktak hi,” ci uh a," 
John7:41 pawl khat in, “Hih pa, Khris ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin pawl khat in, “Galilee gam panin Khris hong piang ding ahi hiam?" 
John7:42 Khris i cih pen Davidʼ suan hi dinga, Davidʼ suahna Bethlehem khua ah suak ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John7:43 Tua ahih manin Jesu thu tawh kisai ah mihonteʼ lungsim kituak lo hi. 
John7:44 Mi pawl khat in Jesu man nuam uh hi; ahi zongin kuamah in su ngam lo hi. 
John7:45 Tua ciangin siampi liante le Farisi mite kiangah palikte a va ciahkik uh ciangin, “Bang hangin amah hong kai lo na hi uh hiam” a na ci uh hi." 
John7:46 Palikte in, “Hih mipaʼ thugen bangin a gen kuamah om nai lo hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John7:47 Farisi mite in, “Note zong hong khem khinzo ta ahi hiam?" 
John7:48 Jew mi uliante hitaleh Farisi mite hitaleh sung panin amah a um, na theih uh om nai ahi hiam?" 
John7:49 Hih mihonte in ahihleh Moses Thukham thei lo uh ahih manin Pasianʼ samsiatna a thuak dingte hi lel uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John7:50 Tua hun ma-in Jesu kiangah a va hawh sim ngei Nikodemas zong uliante sungah kihel ahih manin 
John7:51 amah in, “Mi khat peuhmah a thu dongin ama gamtatnate i theih masak mateng mawhsakna thu i khen ding pen i Thukham tawh kituak lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John7:52 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nang zong Galilee gam mi na hi hiam? Lai Siangtho sung sim lecin Galilee gam sung panin kamsang khat beek a pian ngei lohna thu na thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John8:1 (Tua ciangin mi khempeuh a inn ciat uh ah ciah uh a, Jesu ahihleh Oliv Mual tungah a pai to hi." 
John8:2 Ahi zongin a zing ciang zingsang tungin biakinn ah paikik a, mihon tampi ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh ahih manin amaute tungah thuhilh ding a kipan hi." 
John8:3 Tua laitakin Thukham hilh siate le Farisi mite in pasal tawh a mawh laitakin a kiman numei khat hong paipih uh a, amaute mai ah a dingsak uh hi." 
John8:4 Tua ciangin Jesu kiangah, “Sia aw, pasal tawh a mawh laitakin hih numei a kiman ahi hi." 
John8:5 Hih bang mite pen suang tawh den lup dingin i Thukham sungah Moses in na gen hi. Tu-in nangmah in bangci ngaihsut na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. 
John8:6 Hih bangin a dot uh ciangin Jesu a mawhsak theih nadingun a thangsiahna uh ahi hi. Jesu zong kun suk a, a khutme tawh leilak a gelh hi." 
John8:7 Amaute in Jesu kiangah dong teitei uh ahih manin amah zong dingin amaute kiangah, “Note lakah mawhna a nei het lopa in deng masa un,” a cih khit ciangin," 
John8:8 kunin leilak a gelh leuleu hi. 
John8:9 Ahi zongin hih kammal a zak uh ciangin amaute a khangham pen panin khatkhatin paikhia uh a, a tawpna ah Jesu le a mai ah a ding numei bek a om lai hi." 
John8:10 Tua ciangin Jesu khuadak to-in numei kiangah, “Numei aw, amaute koi lai tung khin uh ahi hiam? Nang mawhsakin thu hong khen ding kuamah om nawn lo ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John8:11 numei in, “Topa aw, kuamah in thu hong khen lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kei zong nang tungah thu kong khen kei hi. Ciah inla, mawhna bawl nawn kei in,” a ci hi.)" 
John8:12 Tua khit ciangin Jesu in mihonte kiangah a thugenna khat ah, “Kei pen leitung khuavak ka hi hi. Kei hong zuite in khuavak nuntakna nei ding uh a, khuamial gamtatna nei lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:13 Tua ciangin Farisi mite in, “Nang le nang a kigentawm na hih manin na thugente a manin kisang thei lo hi,” a cih uh ciangin" 
John8:14 Jesu in, “Kei le kei a kigentawm ka hih hangin ka thugente a man mah hi veve hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh koi panin hong pai-in koi lai ah pai ding cih ka kithei a, note in kei ka hong pai khiatna le ka pai nading a thei lo na hizaw uh hi." 
John8:15 Thu a thei lopi-in kei na hong mawhsak uh hi; ahi zongin keʼn kuamah ka mawhsak kei hi. 
John8:16 Mi mawhsakin thu a khen hi ta mah leng zong, a thukhen pen kei bek hi loin kei a hong sawl Pa Pasian le keimah in a khen khawm ka hih manun ka thukhennate a man taktak ahi hi." 
John8:17 Na Thukham sung uh ah zong, ‘Thu khat peuhpeuh ah mi nih in a manna teci pangin a gen leh a genna uh thuman hi,’ ci-in na kigelh ahih mah bangin," 
John8:18 keima ading teci ka pang a, kei hong sawl Pa Pasian in zong keima adingin teci a pang hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:19 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Na pa koi ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in dong uh a, Jesu in, “Kei ka hi a, ka Pa ahi zongin na hong thei kei uh hi. Kei hong thei hi le-uhcin ka Pa zong na thei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:20 Jesu in hih thute pen sumpi khiatna kuang a kikoihna biakinn dei sungah a gen hi a, ahi zongin ama hun tung nai lo ahih manin kuamah in amah man lo uh hi." 
John8:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Kei ka paikhia ding hi. Note in kei na hong zong ding uh a, ahi zongin na mawhna uh na sihpih ding uh hi. Ka paina ah note na hong pai thei kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:22 Tua ahih manin Jew mi uliante in, “‘Ka paina ah note na hong pai thei kei ding uh hi,’ ci ahih manin a mahmah kithattawm ding a cihna hi ding hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John8:23 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note pen nuai lam mi na hi uh a, kei pen tung lam mi ka hi hi. Note pen hih leitung mi na hi uh a, kei pen hih leitung mi ka hi kei hi." 
John8:24 Kei pen, ‘Kei ka hih lam na hong up kei uh leh na mawhna uh a sihpih ding na hih manun, na mawhna uh na sihpih ding uh hi,’ ci-in ka hong genna pen hih thu hang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:25 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Jesu in, “A kipat cil a kipan ka hong gen sa mah ka hi hi." 
John8:26 Noteʼ thu genin, noteʼ thu ka khen ding tampi tak om hi. Kei a hong sawl pa a thuman a thutak hi a, ama tung panin ka zak sa thute bek leitung mite tungah a pulak ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:27 Jesu in Pa Pasianʼ thu a gengen ahih lamtak amaute in thei lo uh hi. 
John8:28 Tua ahih manin Jesu in, “Mihing Tapa na khai khit uh ciangin ‘Kei kua ka hi hiam?’ cih thu na hong thei ding uh hi. Tua hun ciangin keiʼ thu bek tawh bangmah hih loin, ka Paʼ hong hilh sa teng bek a gen ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi." 
John8:29 Kei a hong sawl paʼ lungkimna bang bekin gamta tawntung ka hih manin amah in kei guak hong nusia loin, hong ompih tawntung hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:30 Tua bangin Jesu in thu a gen ciangin mi tampi in amah a um uh hi. 
John8:31 Tua ahih manin amah a um Jew mite kiangah Jesu in, “Ka thuhilhnate na zuih paisuak nak uh leh ka nungzui taktakte na hi ding uh hi." 
John8:32 Tua ciangin thuman na thei ding uh a, tua thuman in note hong suaktasak ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John8:33 amaute in, “Kote Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte ka hi uh a, cikmahin kuama salin ka omngei kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin bang hangin, ‘Note suakta ding,’ hong cithei na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John8:34 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “A mantakin ci lehang mawhna a bawl mi peuhmah mawhnaʼ sila ahi uh hi." 
John8:35 Silate pen innkuan mite tawh om khawm paisuak lo a, tapa ahihleh om paisuak hi." 
John8:36 Tua ahih manin Tapa in note hong khah le a suakta takpi na hi uh hi. 
John8:37 Note pen Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte na hihna uh ka thei hi. Ahi zongin ka thugente hong um lo na hih manun kei thah dingin nong sawm uh hi. 
John8:38 Tua ahih manin keimah in ahihleh ka Paʼ hong lah sa thute bek a gen ka hi a, ahi zongin note na hih uh leh na pa uh hong sawl bangin a gamta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John8:39 Amaute in, “Koteʼ pa Abraham ahi hi,” ci-in a dawn uh ciangin Jesu in, “Abrahamʼ tate taktak hi le-uhcin Abrahamʼ gamtat bangin na gamta ding uh hi." 
John8:40 A taktakin ci lehang, ka hihna khempeuh Pasianʼ kiang panin ka zak sa thuman thu kong gen hi napi-in note in kei thah ding na hong sawm uh hi. Hih noteʼ gamtat bangin Abraham gamta lo hi." 
John8:41 Note pen na pa uh gamtat bangin a gamta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kote pen zawlta ka hi kei uh a, ka Pa uh Pasian ahi hi,” a cih uh ciangin," 
John8:42 Jesu in, “Kei pen Pasian kiang panin hong pai-in hih lai ah hong om ka hih manin, Pasian pen na pa taktak uh hileh kei na hong it ding uh hi. Keima thu-in a hong pai tawm ka hi kei a, ama hong sawl ka hi hi." 
John8:43 Bang hangin ka thugente theithei lo na hi uh hiam? Ka thugente na ngaih nop loh man uh ahi hi. 
John8:44 Note pen na pa uh Dawimangpaʼ tate na hi uh a, na pa uh deihna bangin a gamta nuam na hi uh hi. A kipat a kipanin na pa uh mi that hi a, thuman gen ngei lo ahih manin thuman tawh kipawl thei lo hi. Amah pen zuauna khempeuh a pianna a zuaugen pa ahih manin zuau a gen ciangin ama ngeina hi lel hi." 
John8:45 Tua ahih manin thuman kong gen ciangin na hong um thei kei uh hi. 
John8:46 Note lakah kua in ka mawhna na hong lak thei uh hiam? Hong lak thei lo na hih manun thuman ka gen ciangin bang hangin hong um lo na hi uh hiam? 
John8:47 Pasian kiang panin a paite in Pasianʼ thugen za thei hi. Ahi zongin note pen Pasian kiang pan hi lo na hih manun Pasianʼ thu na ngai nuam kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:48 Tua ciangin Jew mihonte in, “Nang Samaria mi hi-in, dawivei hi teh, ka hong cih uh a man mah hi lo ahi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John8:49 Jesu in, “Kei dawivei ka hi kei hi. Keimah in ka Pa ka zahtak bawl a, ahi zongin note in kei nong simmawh bawl uh hi." 
John8:50 Kei ka minthan theih nading ka hanciam kei a, ahi zongin keima minthan nading zongin, kei a hong angvan ding thukhen ding Khat om hi." 
John8:51 A mantakin ci lehang, keima thuhilhna a zui peuhpeuh si nawn lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:52 Tua ciangin mihonte in, “Dawivei taktak na hihna thu tu-in ka hong thei uh hi. Kamsangte khempeuh le Abraham zong si napi-in, ‘Keima thuhilhna a zui peuhpeuh si nawn lo ding,’ na ci lailai hi." 
John8:53 Koteʼ pupi Abraham zong si ahih manin amah sangin a lian zaw dingin ki-um na hi hiam? Tua banah kamsangte khempeuh zong si ahih manin nang a kua-in kingaihsun na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin," 
John8:54 Jesu in, “Kei le kei a kipahtawi hi leng ka kipahtawina a mawkna hi ding hi. Ahi zongin kei hong pahtawi pa pen ka Pasian uh ahi hi, na cih uh keima Pa ahi hi." 
John8:55 Note in amah na thei ngei kei uh a, ahi zongin keʼn ka thei hi. Amah ka thei kei hi, a ci hi leng, note mah bangin kei zong a zuau ka hi ding hi. Ahi zongin keʼn amah thei ka hih manin ama thu ka mang hi." 
John8:56 Noteʼ pupi Abraham in keima hun a tun ding lawp mahmah a, amah in tua hun mu-in nuam mahmah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:57 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nang pen kum sawm nga zong pha nai lo na hih manin Abraham mu ding na hi hiam?” a cih uh leh" 
John8:58 Jesu in, “A taktakin ci lehang, Abraham a pian ma-in kei ka om khin hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John8:59 Tua bang a cih ciangin amaute in amah a den nading suang tawm uh a, ahi zongin biakinn sung panin Jesu a gel khia hi." 
John9:1 Tua bangin Jesu a paikhiat ciangin a pianpih mittaw mi khat a mu hi. 
John9:2 A nungzuite in, “Sia aw, hih pa a mittawtna ama mawhna hang ahi hiam, a nu a pateʼ mawhna hang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:3 Jesu in, “A mittawtna pen ama mawhna le a nu le a pateʼ mawhna hang hi lo a, ama tungah Pasianʼ vangliatna a kilat theih nadingin a mittaw ahi hi." 
John9:4 Sun khuavak lai teng kei hong sawl paʼ na i sem ding hi. Kuamah in na a sep theih loh zan hun zong hong tung ding hi. 
John9:5 Leitungah ka om lai teng kei pen leitung mite adingin khuavak ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:6 Tua khit ciangin leilak ah a cil sia-in buannawi bawl a, a mipaʼ mitah tua buannawi a nuh kawmin," 
John9:7 “Siloam Bual ah na mai va phiat in,” ci-in a sawl hi. (Siloam a cih ciangin, Sawl, a cihna ahi hi.) Tua ahih manin mittaw pa zong va pai-in a mai va phiat a, khua mu thei sa-in hong paikik hi." 
John9:8 Tua hun ma-in amah ngettawm suangin a om a mu a veengte le amah a mu ngei mite in khua a muh theihna a muh uh ciangin, “Ngettawm suangin a tutu mipa hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John9:9 Mi pawl khat in, “Amah hi mah hi,” ci uh a, ahi zongin pawl khat in, “Amah hi lo hi; a kisun lel ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Kei pen tua mipa ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John9:10 amaute in, “Tua pa na hih leh bangci-in khua mu theikik na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:11 Amah in, “Jesu a kici mi khat in a cil tawh buan bawlin ka mitte hong nuhsak a, ‘Siloam Bual ah pai inla na mai va phiat in,’ hong ci ahih manin kei zong va pai-in ka mai ka phiat leh khua ka mu theikik hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua mipa koi ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh leh, “Ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:13 Amaute in Farisi mite kiangah tua mittaw ngei pa a paipih uh hi. 
John9:14 Jesu in buan bawlin a mit a vaksak ni pen Sabbath ni ahi hi. 
John9:15 Farisi mite in tua mipa in khua a muh theih kikna zia thu dong leuleu uh hi. Amah in, “Tua mipa in ka mitah buan hong nuh a, ka mai ka phiat leh khua ka mu theikik hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:16 Farisi mi pawl khat in, “Amah in Sabbath ni tang lo ahih manin Pasian kiang panin hong pai mi hi lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahi zongin pawl khatte in, “A gamta khial mi in bang hangin hih bangin nalamdang bawl thei ding ahi hiam?” ci leuleu ahih manin miteʼ ngaihsutna kituak lo hi." 
John9:17 Tua ahih manin Farisi mite in mittaw pa kiangah, “Ka mit khua hong musak hi, ci na hih manin amah kua hi dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?” ci-in a dotkik uh ciangin, “Amah kamsang khat hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:18 Jerusalem khua-a om Jew mi uliante in hih mipa a mittaw ngei hi napi-in tu-in khua mukik thei hi, cih pen um thei lo uh ahih manin a mittaw paʼ nu le pate sam uh a," 
John9:19 amaute kiangah, “A pianpih a mittaw na cih uh na tapa uh hih pa mah ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh bangci-in khua mukik thei ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John9:20 a nu le a pate in, “Hih mipa pen ka tapa uh ahihna le a pianpih mittaw ahihna thu ka thei uh hi." 
John9:21 Ahi zongin bangci-in khua mukik thei hiam cihna le kua in khua mu theisakkik hiam cih thu ka thei kei uh hi. Amah naupang hi nawn lo ahih manin a mahmah dong le-uhcin hong gen thei ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John9:22 Jesu pen Khris hi, ci-in a gen peuhpeuh, kikhopna inn panin hawl khia ni, ci-in Jew mi uliante in thukimna nei khin uh ahih manin, Jew mi uliante a kihtakna uh hangin a nu le a pate in hih bangin a gen uh ahi hi." 
John9:23 Tua ahih manin a nu a pate in, “Amah naupang hi nawn lo ahih manin a mahmah dong un,” a ci uh ahi hi." 
John9:24 Tua ciangin a mittaw ngei pa mah samkik leuleu uh a, “Pasianʼ mai ah kiciamin a man taktak hong gen in. Kote in hih mipa thukham palsatin a gamta pa hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi,” a cih uh ciangin amah in," 
John9:25 “Amah a gamta khial ahih le ahih loh bangmah ka thei kei hi. Keima theih thu in: Nidangin a mittaw kimlai, tu-in khua ka mukik thei ta hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:26 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Amah in nang bang hong cih a, na mit khua hong bangci muhsak ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin," 
John9:27 “A thu teng kong gen khit sa hi napi, ka thugen na um kei uh hi. Bang dingin za kikkik nuam na hi uh hiam? Note zong ama nungzui suak nuam na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:28 Tua ciangin amaute in mittaw ngei pa kobawlin, “Nang pen ama nungzui na hi a, kote ka hih uh leh Mosesʼ nungzui ka hi uh hi." 
John9:29 Pasian in Moses a hopihna thu ka thei uh a, hih mipa ahihleh koi lai panin hong piang ahi hiam cih nangawn ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John9:30 Tua ciangin mittaw ngei pa in, “Amah in kei khua hong musak thei napi, amah koi pan a hong piang ahi hiam cih na theih loh uh lamdang mahmah hi." 
John9:31 Pasian in thukham a palsat miteʼ thu ngai lo a, amah bia-in, ama deih bangin a gamta miteʼ thu ngai hi, ci-in ko ka thei uh hi." 
John9:32 Leitung piancil a kipanin pianpih mittaw khua a musak thei a om lam kiza ngei nai lo hi. 
John9:33 Tua ahih manin Pasian kiang panin hong pai hikeileh hih bang hih thei lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John9:34 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Mawhna bulomtang sung panin suakin a khang khia mipa in kote tungah thu hong hilhsawm na hi hiam?” ci-in tua mittaw ngei pa a hawl khia uh hi." 
John9:35 Hih mipa a kihawlkhiatna thu Jesu in za ahih manin amah a muh ciangin, “Mihing Tapa na um hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John9:36 Amah in, “Amah ka up theih nadingin amah kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John9:37 Jesu in, “Amah na mu khin a, nang tawh a kiho mipa ahi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John9:38 amah in, “Topa aw, ka hong um hi,” ci-in Jesu a bia hi." 
John9:39 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mittawte in khua a muh theih nading le khua mu thei a kineite mittaw a bat theih nadingin leitungah thukhen dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John9:40 Ama kiangah a om Farisi mi pawl khat in hih bangin a thugenna a zak uh ciangin, “Kote zong a mittaw-in hong ngaihsun na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
John9:41 Jesu in, “A mittaw hi le-uhcin mawhna tawh na kipelh ding uh hi. Ahi zongin khua mu thei ung, ci na hih manun na mawhna uh a ngei mahin a om lai ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John10:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “A mantakin ci lehang, tuukulh kongah lut loin a mun dang panin kahin a lut mite pen a guta a buluh ahi hi." 
John10:2 Ahi zongin tuukulh kong tawnin a lut mipa ahihleh a tuute a cing pa ahi hi. 
John10:3 Tua ahih manin tuukong cing pa in a kong hon a, a tuute a min ciatin a sap ciangin a tuute in a thu mang a, amah in tuukulh panin a tuute a pusuahkhiat pih hi." 
John10:4 A tuute khempeuh a pusuahkhiat khit ciangin tuate mai ah a cing pa pai a, a cing paʼ aw thei uh ahih manin tuute in amah a zui uh hi." 
John10:5 Tuute in midangteʼ nung zui lo uh hi; midangteʼ aw theithei lo uh ahih manin lau-in taisan zaw uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John10:6 Jesu in hih thu gentehna tawh thu a gen hangin amaute in Jesuʼ gen nop thu a theithei tuan kei uh hi. 
John10:7 Tua ahih manin Jesu in amaute kiangah thu genkik leuleu a, “A mantakin ci lehang, kei pen tuuteʼ paina kongpi ka hi hi." 
John10:8 Keima hun ma-in a hong pai mite ahihleh guta buluhte ahih manun tuute in amaute don lo uh hi. 
John10:9 Kei, kongpi ka hi hi. Keimah tawnin a pai tuu khempeuh in lauhuaina tuak kha loin, a ututun sung tumin pusuakin lo nona mun a mu ding uh hi." 
John10:10 Gutate pen a gu ding, a that ding le a siasak ding bekin hong pai hi. Kei ka hih leh tuute a nungta maimai bek hi loin nuntakna cingtaak a neih theih nadingun a hong pai ka hi hi." 
John10:11 “Kei, tuucing hoih ka hi hi. Tuucing hoih in a tuute sihpih ngam hi." 
John10:12 Tuu nei taktak ahi lo, a kicial tawm tuucingpa in ngia khawng a muh ciangin a tuute nusia-in taisan ahih manin ngia in tuute man a, tuute a kithehthang gawp hi." 
John10:13 Amah a kicial tawm ahih manin a tuute khualna lungsim nei loin a taisan ahi hi. 
John10:14 Kei, tuucing hoih ka hi hi. Pa in kei hong thei-in, kei zong Pa ka theih mah bangin keimah in ka tuute ka thei a, ka tuute in zong kei hong thei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ka tuute ka sihpih ngam hi." 
John10:15  
John10:16 Hih tuukulh sungah a om lo tuu dang ka nei lai hi. Tuate zong tuukulh sungah ka khum dinga, amaute in keima thu ngai-in, keima khut sungah ka tuu om sate tawh hon khat suak khawm ding uh hi." 
John10:17 Ka nuntakkik theih nadingin si ngam ka hih manin ka Pa in kei hong it hi.
