John10:18 Kuamah in ka nuntakna hong laksak thei lo a, keima utthu tawh ka piak hizaw hi. Ka nuntakna piakkhiat theih nading le lakkik theih nading thu ka Pa in kei tungah a hong piak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John10:19 Hih bangin thu a gen ciangin Jew mihonte a ngaihsutna uh kituak lo leuleu hi. 
John10:20 Mi tampi tak in, “Hih pa pen dawivei, mihai hi lel ahih manin a thugen ngaih taak lo hi,” ci uh a," 
John10:21 pawl khat in, “Dawiveite in hih bangin thu gen thei lo hi. Dawi in mittawte khua musak thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John10:22 Jerusalem ah Biakinn Apkikna Pawi bawl hun hong tung a, phalbi hunsung ahi hi." 
John10:23 Biakinn huang sung Solomonʼ Talap a kici sungah Jesu vak kawikawi-in a om laitakin 
John10:24 Jew mihonte ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh a, “Thu kitel loin bang tanvei koih hong sawm na hi hiam? Khris na hih leh zong teltakin hong gen in,” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
John10:25 Jesu in, “Hong gen khin napi ing-in Topa ka hihna thu na hong um kei uh hi. Ka Paʼ thu tawh na ka septe in hong kilangsak khinzo hi." 
John10:26 Ahi zongin note pen keima tuu hi lo na hih manun Khris ka hih lam na hong um kei uh hi. 
John10:27 Keima tuute in ka aw za-in thei uh ahih manin kei hong zui uh hi. 
John10:28 Tua ahih manin amaute tungah nuntak tawntungna pia ka hih manin si ngei nawn lo ding uh a, keima khut sung panin kuamah in amaute hong sut zo lo ding uh hi." 
John10:29 Ka khut sungah a hong pia ka Pa sangin a lian zaw kuamah om lo ahih manin ka Paʼ khut sung panin kuamah in la khia zo lo ding hi. 
John10:30 Kei le ka Pa pum khat ka hi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John10:31 Tua ciangin Jew mihonte in amah deng dingin suang tawm leuleu uh ahih manin 
John10:32 Jesu in, “Ka Paʼ hong sawl bangin noteʼ muhna ah na hoih tampi ka hong sepna hangin suang tawh den hong sawm na hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John10:33 mihonte in, “Nasep hoih na sep manin hong deng nuam ka hi kei uh a, Pasian na simmawh bawl manin hong deng nuam ka hi uh hi. Nang pen mi hi lel hi napi-in Pasian na kineih nuam hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John10:34 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Na Thukham sung uh ah Pasian in, ‘Note pen pasian-te na hi uh hi,’ ci hi." 
John10:35 Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thute a tawntungin a thuman hi a, Pasianʼ thu a ngah mite pen Pasian in, ‘pasian-te,’ na ci hi." 
John10:36 Tua ahih manin kei pen Pa Pasian in hong teelin leitungah a hong sawl ka hih manin, ‘Pasianʼ Tapa ka hi hi,’ ka cih ciangin bang hangin Pasian simmawh bawl hong cithei na hi uh hiam?" 
John10:37 Ka Paʼ na a sem lo hi leng na hong up loh mah ding uh ahi hi. 
John10:38 Ahi zongin keimah in ka Paʼ na sem ka hih manin keima thu na hong um nuam lo uh ahi ta zongin, Pa tawh pum khat ka hihna thu na theih nadingun ka nasepnate na up dingun kilawm buang hi,” a ci leuleu hi." 
John10:39 Tua ciangin amaute in Jesu mat sawm uh hi; ahi zongin amauteʼ khut sung panin Jesu a suakta hi. 
John10:40 Tua ciangin Jordan Gun kantanin amah pai leuleu a, Johan in mite a tuiphum masakna munah tungin tua lai ah a om hi." 
John10:41 Ama kiangah mi tampi tak hong kikhawm uh a, “Johan in nalamdang bangmah bawl lo hi. Ahi zongin Johan in hih mipa thu a gen khempeuh a vekpi-in mankim hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John10:42 Tua ahih manin tua lai ah mi tampi in Jesu a um uh hi. 
John11:1 Tua laitakin Mary le a unu Marthaʼ omna Bethany khua ah Lazaras a kici mi khat a ci na hi. 
John11:2 Mary i cih pen Jesu sathau nuhin a sam tawh a nulsak nu hi a, Lazaras pen ama u ahi hi." 
John11:3 Tua ahih manin a nau numei tegel in Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, na it mipa a ci na hi,” ci-in thu a zasak uh hi." 
John11:4 Ahi zongin Jesu in tua thu a zak ciangin, “Hih natna pen sih nading natna hi lo a, Pasianʼ Tapa in Pasianʼ pianzia a neihna mite in a theih nading le Pasian a phat theih nadingin a na ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:5 Jesu in Martha-te unau le Lazaras it mahmah hi. 
John11:6 Tua hi napi-in a cinat a zak khit ciangin tua lai ah ni nih taam lai veve hi. 
John11:7 Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Judea gamah paikik ni,” a cih leh" 
John11:7 Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite kiangah, “Judea gamah paikik ni,” a cih leh" 
John11:8 a nungzuite in, “Sia aw, zan mah deuhin Judea gam mite in nang den lup hong sawm uh ahih manin tua gamah paikik sawm na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John11:8 a nungzuite in, “Sia aw, zan mah deuhin Judea gam mite in nang den lup hong sawm uh ahih manin tua gamah paikik sawm na hi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John11:9 Jesu in, “Sun khuavak hun nai sawm le nih sung hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khatpeuh tua khuavak sungah lampai leh puk kha cih om lo hi." 
John11:10 Ahi zongin zan khuamial sungah lampai leh khuavak nei lo ahih manin puk thei hi,” a cih khit ciangin" 
John11:11 a nungzuite kiangah, “I lawmpa Lazaras ihmu zo hi. Ahi zongin amah a phong dingin ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:12 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in, “Topa aw, amah ihmu ahihleh a nuamtuam hi ta ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:13 Jesu in amah si hi, a ci nuam hi napi-in, a nuamtuamin a ihmu hi, a ci-in a nungzuite in ngaihsun uh hi." 
John11:14 Tua ahih manin Jesu in a teltakin gen a, “Lazaras si khinta hi." 
John11:15 Ahi zongin note in na up theih nadingun tua lai ah kei om kha lo ka hih manin note kong khualna-in ka nuam mahmah hi. Ahi zongin tu-in ama kiangah va pai ni,” a ci hi." 
John11:16 Tua ciangin, “Unau Peeng,” min no a nei Thomas in, “Ei zong amah tawh a si khawm dingin va zui ni,” ci-in a nungzuihpihte a zawn hi." 
John11:17 Jesu a tun ciangin Lazaras a kivui zawh ni li a phak khitna thu a thei hi. 
John11:18 Bethany le Jerusalem kikal tai nih bang bek kigamla ahih manin," 
John11:19 a upa uh Lazaras a sihna hangin Martha le Mary a hehnem dingin Jew mi tampi zong hong pai uh hi. 
John11:20 Jesu hong paina thu Martha in a zak ciangin a dawn dingin va paikhia a, Mary ahihleh a inn mahah om lai hi." 
John11:21 Martha in Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, hih lai ah a om hi lecin ka u si het lo ding hi." 
John11:22 Tu nangawnin na nget peuhpeuh Pasian in hong piak ding ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:23 Jesu in, “Na u hong thokik ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John11:24 Martha in, “Nitawp ni-a thawhkik ni ciangin hong thawhkik ding ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:25 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Keimah in a si sa mite thosakin a hingsak thei pa ka hi hi. Kei hong um mi peuhmah a sih hangin nungta ding hi." 
John11:26 A nungta a kei hong um mite si ngei nawn lo ding hi. Hih thu na um hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
John11:27 “Ka um hi, Topa aw; leitungah a hong pai ding Pasianʼ Tapa, Khris na hihna thu ka um hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John11:28 Tua khit ciangin Martha a inn ah va tai-in a naunu Mary va huausim a, “Siapa hong pai a, nang hong sam hi,” a ci hi." 
John11:29 Tua thu a zak ciangin Mary dingin Jesu a dawn dingin a paikhia hi. 
John11:30 Jesu, khua sung hong tung nai lo a, Martha tawh a kimuhna mun mahah na om lai hi." 
John11:31 Amah hehnemin inn ah a ompih mite in Mary dingin a pai khiatna a muh uh ciangin, hanah a kap dingin a pai ding hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a zui uh hi." 
John11:32 Jesu omna munah Mary tungin amah a muh ciangin ama khe mai ah bok a, “Topa aw, nang hong om hi lecin ka u si het lo ding hi,” ci-in a kap hi." 
John11:33 Jesu in Mary le amah hong zui Jew mite a kahna a muh ciangin a lungsim nakpi takin su kha-in lunggim mahmah ahih manin," 
John11:34 “Koi ah vui na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Topa aw, hong pai inla hong en in,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:35 Tua ciangin Jesu zong a kap hi. 
John11:36 Tua ahih manin amaute in, “Jesu in zong Lazaras nak it mahmah hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John11:37 Ahi zongin pawl khatte in, “Mittawte khua a musak thei hih mipa in amah a sih loh nadingin bawl thei lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
John11:38 Jesu a dah hong suakkik mahmah ahih manin leihawm sungah kivui-in suangtum tawh a gong a kihukna hanah a pai hi. 
John11:39 A phual a tun ciangin, “Suangtum lik khia un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin misi paʼ naunu Martha in, “Topa aw, a kivui zawh ni li pha khin ahih manin uih ta ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John11:40 Jesu in, “Na up nakleh Pasianʼ vangliatna na mu ding hi, ci-in hong gen khin hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John11:41 Tua ahih manin a suangtum a lik khia uh hi. Jesu zong van lam dak to-in, “Pa aw, ka thungetna hong ngai na hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
John11:42 Ka thungetna na hong ngaih tawntungna thu ka thei a, ahi zongin hih lai ah a om mite in kei na hong sawlna thu a up theih nadingun tu-a bangin kam a hong pau ka hi hi,”" 
John11:43 a cih khit ciangin nakpi takin kiko-in, “Lazaras aw, hong pusuak in,” a ci hi." 
John11:44 Tua ciangin a misi pa a khut a khe dial tawh kituamin, a maitang puan tawh a kitun sa-in hong pusuak hi. Jesu in amaute kiangah, “A dial le a puante phel khia un,” a ci hi." 
John11:45 Tua ahih manin Mary kiangah hawhin Jesuʼ hihna a mu Jew mi tampi in amah a um uh hi. 
John11:46 Ahi zongin amaute pawl khat Farisi mite kiangah pai-in Jesuʼ sep nate a va ko uh hi. 
John11:47 Tua ahih manin siampi liante le Farisi mite in thu vaihawm uliante tawh kikupna khat nei uh a, “Hih mipa in nalamdang tampi bawl ahih manin bang cih ding ihi hiam?" 
John11:48 Hih bangin omom sak lehang mi khempeuh in amah um ding uh a, Rom kumpite in i Biakinnpi hong suksiatsakin i minam bup zong hong su gawp ding uh hi,” a kici uh hi." 
John11:49 Tua laitakin amaute sung panin tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafas a kici mipa in, “Note in bangmah na thei kei uh hi." 
John11:50 I minam bup in siatna a thuak sangin i minam bup tangin mi khat si leh a hoihzawkna thu phawk lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
John11:51 Hih bangin thu a gen ciangin ama lungsim a gen hi lo a, tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem ahihna tawh Jew miteʼ tangin Jesu a si ding ahihna thu a gen khol ahi hi." 
John11:52 Jew mite ading bek hi loin a kithehthang Pasianʼ mi khempeuh pum khat a suah nadingin a kikaihkhop nading thu zong a gen khol ahi hi. 
John11:53 Tua ahih manin tua hun a kipanin Jesu a thah theih nadingun a vaihawm uh hi. 
John11:54 Tua ahih manin Judea gam sungah a kilangin Jesu khualzin nawn lo a, amah pai khia-in sehnel gam gei-a om Efraim a kici khua ah tungin tua lai ah a nungzuite tawh a om hi." 
John11:54 Tua ahih manin Judea gam sungah a kilangin Jesu khualzin nawn lo a, amah pai khia-in sehnel gam gei-a om Efraim a kici khua ah tungin tua lai ah a nungzuite tawh a om hi." 
John11:55 Jew miteʼ Paisan Pawi hun hong nai ciangin, tua pawi kipat ma hun sungin biakna vai-in kisiansuahna a bawl dingin gam sung khuate panin Jerusalem khuapi ah mi tampi hong pai uh hi." 
John11:56 Biakinn sungah kikhawmin a om laitakun Jesu a mu dingin amaute khuadak kawikawi-in kiho uh a, “Jesu hong pai dingin na um hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat kidong uh hi." 
John11:57 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi liante le Farisi mite in Jesu a mat theih nadingun, “Jesu a omna a thei na om uh leh hong ko un,” ci-in thupiakna nei khinzo uh hi." 
John12:1 Paisan Pawi hun a tun ding ni guk in a sap ni-in sihna panin a thawhsak Lazaras a teenna Bethany khua ah va tung hi. 
John12:2 Amaute in nitak an na vak uh a, Lazaras ahihleh Jesu tawh an ne-in tukhawmin, Martha pen an pia-in a manlah hi." 
John12:3 Tua laitakin Mary in a manpha mahmah nard sathau namtui thawl khat hong paipih a, Jesuʼ khe a nuh khit ciangin a sam tawh a nulsak hi. Tua inn sung khempeuh sathau namtui gim hong nam hi." 
John12:4 Tua laitakin Jesuʼ nungzuite sung panin amah a lehhek ding Judas Iskariot in," 
John12:5 “Bang hangin hih sathau namtui ngun peek za thumin kizuakin a sumte mizawngte tungah kipia zaw lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
John12:6 Hih bangin kam a pauna pen mizawngte a khualna hang hi lo a, amah sumkem ahih manin a sumte gu-in a ututin a zang zel pa ahihna hang hizaw hi." 
John12:7 Tua ahih manin Jesu in, “Bangmah cih se dah un! Ama neih laite zong ka kivui cianga dingin kemsak hoh un." 
John12:8 Mizawngte pen note tawh hong om khawm niloh dinga, kei ka hih leh note tawh ka hong om khawm tawntung kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:9 Bethany khua ah Jesu a omna thu a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi hong pai uh hi. Jesu a mu nuamin hong pai hi bek lo uh a, Jesu in sihna panin a thawhsakkik Lazaras zong a mu nuam kawm uh ahi hi." 
John12:10 Lazarasʼ hangin Jew mi tampite in amauʼ makaite taisanin Jesu um uh ahih manin siampi liante in Lazaras zong thah a sawm uh hi. 
John12:11  
John12:12 A zing ciangin Paisan Pawi a siim mihonpite in Jerusalem khua ah Jesu hong pai nading thu a za uh hi. 
John12:13 Tua ahih manin amah a dawn dingin Jerusalem panin mihonpi pai khia-in nisuh hiangte tawi kawmin, “Pasian phat un! Pasian in Topaʼ min tawh hong pai pa thupha pia tahen! Pasian in Israel Kumpipa thupha pia tahen!” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
John12:14 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Zion khua mite aw, lau kei un. En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai a, la no tungah hong tuang hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Jesu in la no khat mu ahih manin tua la no tungah a tuang hi." 
John12:15  
John12:16 Tua hun laitakin a nungzuite in hih thu a khiatna thei lo uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ pianzia nei-in Jesu a thawhkik khit ciangin Lai Siangtho in amah a gen ahihna le ama adingin hih bangin a piang ahihna thu a nung phawk uh hi. 
John12:17 Jesu in han sung panin Lazaras samin, sihna panin a thawhsakkik a mu mihonte in tua thu mah gen belin a nei uh hi." 
John12:18 Jesu in tua bang nalamdang lian a bawlna thu mihonte in za khin uh ahih manin amah a dawn dingin a pai uh hi. 
John12:19 Tua ciangin Farisi mite khatlekhat kiho uh a, “Bangmah i cih zo het kei hi. En un, mi khempeuh in amah a zui khinta uh ahi hi,” a kici uh hi." 
John12:20 Pawi hun sungin Pasian bia dingin Jerusalem khua ah a hong pai mite lakah Grik mi pawl khat a om uh hi. 
John12:21 Galilee gam Bethsaida khuami Filip kiangah amaute hong pai-in, “Sia aw, kote in zong Jesu ka mu nuam uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh ciangin" 
John12:22 Filip in Andru kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin Andru le Filip pai khawmin Jesu kiangah a gen uh hi. 
John12:23 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mihing Tapa in Pasianʼ pianzia a ngah ding hun hong tung ta hi." 
John12:24 A mantakin ci lehang, mangbuh hum tang khat leilak ah kituhin si masa kei leh tang khat bek mah hi ngitnget hi; ahi zongin si masa leh tang tampi tak hong nei thei hi." 
John12:25 Tua ahih manin hih leitung nuntakna a itte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh dinga, hih leitung nuntakna a it lote in nuntakna taktak nei tawntung ding hi." 
John12:26 Ka nasemte keima omna ah a om theih nadingin ka na a sem nuam peuhmah in kei hong zui ding uh a, ka Pa in ka na a sem mite a pahtawi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:27 Tua khit ciangin Jesu in, “Tu-in ka lunggim mahmah hi. Bang cih ding ka hi hiam? ‘Pa aw, hih hun tawh hong kipelhsak in,’ ci ding ka hi hiam? Tua bang cih ding lah hih bang a thuak ding mahin a hong pai ka hi hi." 
John12:28 Pa aw, nangma min thangsak ta in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Ka thangsak zo a, khatvei ka thangsakkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:29 Tua kiim a ding mihonte in a awging za uh a, “Van ging bang hi,” a ci uh hi. Pawl khatte in, “Vantungmi in amah hopih hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John12:30 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Hih awging pen keima ading ngaihsutna hi lo a, note ading ngaihsutna-in hong ging hizaw hi." 
John12:31 Tu-in leitung thukhen ding hun hong tung ta a, hih leitung a ukpa kilawn khia ding hi." 
John12:32 Leilak panin kei hong kikhai toh ciangin ka kiangah mi khempeuh ka kai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John12:33 (Hih bangin a gen ciangin ama sihna ding zia a genna ahi hi.) 
John12:34 Tua ciangin mihonte in, “Khris nungta tawntung ding hi, ci-in Thukham sungah kigen hi. Bang hangin Mihing Tapa kikhai to ding ci na hi hiam? Hih Mihing Tapa kua ahi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin" 
John12:35 Jesu in, “Note kiangah tawmvei sung khuavak hong om lai ding hi. Khuamial sungah a pai mi in a paina mun thei lo ahih manin khuamial in note hong phak loh nadingin khuavak na neih sungun na gamtat ngei uh zom paisuak un." 
John12:36 Khuavak mite na suah theih nadingun khuavak na neih hun sungun tua khuavak um un,” a ci hi. Jesu in hih thu teng a gen khit ciangin pai khia-in amaute kiang panin a bu hi." 
John12:37 Amauteʼ muhin Jesu in hih nalamdang khempeuh a bawl hangin amaute in um lo uh hi. 
John12:38 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Topa aw, kua in ka thugente um a, Topaʼ vangliatna kua tungah kilak ahi hiam?” ci-in a genna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
John12:39 Tua ahih manin amaute in um nuam lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaiah mah in," 
John12:40 “Amauteʼ natna ka damsak loh nadingin a mit un mu loin, a lungsim un a theihtheih loh nadingun amauteʼ mit ka tawsak a, a lungsim uh ka mawlsak hi, Pasian in ci hi,” ci-in zong na gen lai hi." 
John12:41 Isaiah in Jesuʼ neih Pasianʼ pianzia mu ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi. 
John12:42 Tua bang hitaseleh Jew mi ulian tampi in Jesu a um uh hi. Ahi zongin Farisi mite in kikhopna inn panin a hawlkhiat ding lau uh ahih manin a kilangin gen khia ngam lo uh hi. 
John12:43 Pasianʼ pahtak ding sangin miteʼ pahtak ding ut zaw uh ahih manin a tua ci om ahi uh hi. 
John12:44 Tua ciangin Jesu nakpi takin kiko a, “Kei hong um khempeuh in kei bek hong um hi loin kei hong sawl pa zong a um ahi hi." 
John12:45 Kei hong mu khempeuh in kei hong sawl pa zong a mu ahi hi. 
John12:46 Kei hong um mi khempeuh, khuamial sungah a om nawn loh nadingun leitung khuavak bangin ka hong pai hi." 
John12:47 Ka thugenna za napi-in a zui lo mite tungah thu ka khen kei ding hi. Leitung mite mawhsakin thukhen dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, a hon khia dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi." 
John12:48 Kei hong nialin ka thugen a sang lo mite in thukhen ding khat nei uh hi. Nitawp ni ciangin keima thugente pen amauteʼ thukhen ding ahi hi. 
John12:49 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima utthu tawh thu a mawk gen ka hi kei a, kei hong sawl Pa Pasian in ka gen ding thu teng a hong piak ahi hi." 
John12:50 Gen dingin a hong sawl thute in nuntak tawntung a piangsak thei ahihna thu ka thei hi. Tua ahih manin Pa in gen dingin a hong sawl teng bek a gen ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:1 Tu-in Paisan Pawi hun ding ni khat bek in sam a, Jesu in hih leitung nusia-in a Pa kiangah a pai ding hun a tunna thu a thei hi. Hih leitungah a om ama mite it mahmah ahih manin a hih theihna zah ciang tawh a itna a lak hi." 
John13:2 Jesu le a nungzuite nitak an ne-in a tukhawm uh hi. Tua hun laitakin dawimangpa in Simon Iskariotʼ tapa Judasʼ lungsim sungah Jesu lehhek nading ngaihsutna koih khinzo hi. 
John13:3 A Pa in ama khut sungah vangliatna khempeuh a piakna le Pasian in amah a sawl mah bangin tu-in Pasian kiangah a paikik ding ahihna thu zong a thei hi. 
John13:4 Tua ahih manin a annekna sabuai panin Jesu ding khia-in a puan tungsilh suah khia a, a kawng ah a mainulpi a teeng hi." 
John13:5 Tua ciangin kuangpi sung khat ah tui sung a, a nungzuiteʼ khe silsakin a kawng ah a teen a mainulpi tawh a nul keusak dingin a kipan hi." 
John13:6 Simon Peterʼ khe silsak dingin a kipat ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, ka khe hong silsak zenzen ding na hi hiam?” a na ci hi." 
John13:7 Jesu in, “Tu-a ka gamtatna thu na theih loh hangin nidang ciangin na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:8 Peter in, “Nang peuhmah ka khe ka hong silsak ngei buang kei ding hi,” a cih ciangin, “Na khe hong silsak kei leng, kei tawh na kipawl thei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:9 Tua ciangin Simon Peter in, “Topa aw, tua bang ahihleh ka khe bek hong silsak kei inla, ka khutte le ka lu zong hong silsak in,” a na ci leuleu hi." 
John13:10 Jesu in, “A kipumsil khin sa mite siangtho ta ahih manin a khe sim loh silkik ding kisam nawn lo hi. Note sung panin khat sim loh na vekpi-un na siang khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:11 Jesu in amah a lehhek ding pa thei khin ahih manin, “Note sung panin khat sim loh na siang khin uh hi,” a ci ahi hi." 
John13:12 Jesu in amauteʼ khe a silsak khit ciangin a puan silhkik a, annek sabuai ah a tutnasa mun hong zuanin, “Tu-a note tungah ka hong gamtatna thu na thei uh hiam?" 
John13:13 Note in kei pen Siapa le Topa, na hong ci uh hi. Na hong cih uh mah bangin a man ka hi hi." 
John13:14 Noteʼ Topa le Siapa in na khe uh hong silsak ka hih leh note khatlekhat na kisilsak kan ding uh kilawm hi. 
John13:15 Note tungah ka hong gamtat bangin note na gamtat theih nadingun a lim a hong lak ka hi hi. 
John13:16 A mantakin ci lehang, sila pen a topa sangin lian zaw ngei lo a, a kisawl pa zong a sawl pa sangin lian zaw ngei lo hi." 
John13:17 Hih thu thei-in na zuih uh leh na lung uh nuam mahmah ding hi. 
John13:18 “Hih bangin ka hong genna in note khempeuh hong huam kim lo hi. Ka teel sa mite ka thei hi. Lai Siangtho in, ‘Ka an a ne pa in kei hong langpang hi,’ a cihna thu a tun ding kisam hi." 
John13:19 Hih thu hong tun taktak ciangin, ‘Kei kua ka hihna,’ na hong theih nadingun a hun ma-in a hong ma gen ka hi hi." 
John13:20 A mantakin ci lehang, keima hong sawl mite a sangte in kei zong a hong sang ahi uh a, kei a hong sangte in kei a hong sawl pa zong a sang ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:21 Jesu in hih thu teng a gen khit ciangin lungkham mahmah ahih manin, “A mantakin ci lehang, note khat in kei nong lehhek ding uh hi,” ci-in a kilangin a gen khia hi." 
John13:22 Kua a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in a nungzuite khatlekhat a ki-en uh hi." 
John13:23 Jesu in a it diak a nungzuite khat ama kiangah tu ahih manin," 
John13:24 Simon Peter in a mitheek tawh amah hopih a, “Kua a cihnopna ahi hiam?” dong in, ci-in a sawl hi." 
John13:25 Tua ahih manin tua nungzui pa in zong Jesu neh phei lai deuhin, “Topa aw, kua ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John13:26 Jesu in, “Anlum, meh sungah diahin ka piak ding pa ahi hi,” a cih khit ciangin a anlum diahin Simon Iskariotʼ tapa Judas a pia hi." 
John13:27 Judas in tua an a nek khit phetin ama sungah Satan hong lut pah hi. Tua ahih manin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Na hih ding peuhpeuh hih pak in,” a ci hi." 
John13:28 Ahi zongin sabuai ah a tut khawm pih mite in hih bangin a cihna thu thei lo uh hi. 
John13:29 Amah sumkem ahih manin hih pawi a zat ding a kisam na pawl khat a lei dingin a sawl hi ding hi; tua ahih kei leh zong mizawngte pawl khat tungah sum a pia dingin a sawl hi ding hi, ci-in nungzui pawl khat in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
John13:30 Tua hi a, Judas in a an a san khit ciangin a paikhia pah hi. Tua hunin khua mial khinta hi." 
John13:31 Judas a paikhiat khit ciangin Jesu in, “Tu-in Mihing Tapa in Pasianʼ pianzia a neihna hong kilang ding hi ta hi; ama hangin Pasian in minthanna a ngah ding ahi hi." 
John13:32 Ama hangin Pasian in minthanna a ngah mah bangin Pasian in zong ama pianzia amah ngahsak dinga, a sawt loin ngahsak pah ding hi." 
John13:33 Ka tate aw, note tawh sauvei ka hong om khawm nawn kei ding hi. Note in kei na hong zong ding uh a, ahi zongin Jerusalem khua-a Jew uliante kiangah, ‘Ka paina munah na hong pai thei kei ding uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen mah bangin note kiangah zong tu-in kong gen hi." 
John13:34 Note tungah ka hong piak thak thu in: Note khatlekhat na ki-it ding uh ahi hi. Note ka hong it mah bangin note khatlekhat na ki-it un. 
John13:35 Note khatlekhat ki-it le-uhcin keima nungzuite na hihna uh mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John13:36 Tua ciangin Simon Peter in, “Topa aw, koi ah pai ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesu in, “Ka paina dingah tu-in na hong zui thei nai kei ding hi; ahi zongin nidang ciangin na hong zui ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John13:37 Peter in, “Bang hangin tu-in hong zui thei lo ding ka hi hiam? Nang ka hong sihpih ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John13:38 Jesu in, “Kei hong sihpih ngam ding na hi hiam? A mantakin kong genin ah, kei thum veina hong nial khit matengin ak khuang lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John14:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in a nungzuite kiangah, “Note lunghimawh kei un. Pasian um unla, kei zong hong um un." 
John14:2 Noteʼ om nading mun a bawl khol dingin a pai ding ka hi hi. Ka Paʼ inn sungah om nading mun tampi om hi. A om lo ding hileh hih bangin thu kong gen kei ding hi. 
John14:3 Kei va pai-in noteʼ om nading mun ka va bawl kholh khit ciangin keima omna munah note na hong om theih nadingun note a hong la dingin ka hong paikik ding hi. 
John14:4 Ka pai nading mun tun theih nading lampi na thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:5 Tua laitakin Thomas in, “Topa aw, na pai nading mun thei lo ka hih manun a lampi ding bangci theih ding ka hi uh hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
John14:6 Jesu in ama kiangah, “Keimah in Lampi ka hi a, Thuman le Nuntakna zong ka hi hi. Kei hong suang loin Pa kiangah kuamah tung thei lo ding hi." 
John14:7 Note in kei na hong theih nak uh leh ka Pa zong a thei na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu a kipanin Pa thei-in a mu khinta na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:8 Tua ciangin Filip in, “Topa aw, Pa hong lak lecin ka lung uh kim pah ding hi,” a cih leh" 
John14:9 Jesu in, “Filip aw, hih tanvei om khawm khin napi kei hong thei nai lo lai na hi hiam? Kei a hong mu khinte in Pa a mu khin ahih manin bang hangin, ‘Pa hong lak in,’ ci thei na hi hiam?" 
John14:10 Kei pen Pa tawh pum khat ka hih lamtak um lo na hi hiam? Note tungah kong gen thute keima thu bek tawh a hong gen ka hi kei a, kei tawh a om Pa Pasian in na semin a hong gen ahi hi." 
John14:11 Pa tawh pum khat ka hihna thu hoihtakin hong um un. Na hong up nai kei uh leh zong ka nalamdang bawlnate hangin hong um beek un. 
John14:12 A mantakin ka hong genin ah, kei hong umte in keima sep nate mah sem ding hi. Pa kiangah kei ciah ding ka hih manin keima sep sangin zong a lian zaw sem lai ding uh hi." 
John14:13 Tapaʼ hangin Pasianʼ pianzia a kilat theih nadingin keima min paulamin na hong nget khempeuh uh kong pia ding hi. 
John14:14 Keima min paulamin na hong nget nak uh leh kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:15 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kei na hong it uh leh ka thupiakte zong na zui ding uh hi." 
John14:16 Keimah in Pa kiangah ka ngen dinga, note tawh a om khawm tawntung dingin Thuman a hong lak Kha Siangtho, note hong Huhpa ding a hong pia ding hi." 
John14:17 Leitung mite in tua Kha Siangtho mu thei lo, theithei lo uh ahih manin sang thei lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note sungah tua Kha Siangtho hong om ding ahih manin note in na thei ding uh hi." 
John14:18 “Note a cimawh dingin ka hong nusia kei ding hi. Note kiangah ka hong paikik ding hi. 
John14:19 Tawl khat khit ciangin leitung mite in kei hong mu nawn lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kei ka nuntak mah bangin note zong nungta ding na hih manun note in kei na hong mu ding uh hi. 
John14:20 Tua hun ciangin Pa sungah kei ka omna thu le note sungah ka hong om mah bangin keima sungah na omna thu uh na thei ding uh hi. 
John14:21 Keima thupiakte sangin a zuite in keimah hong it ahi uh hi. Kei hong it mite pen ka Pa in zong it dinga, keimah in zong itin amaute tungah ka kilang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John14:22 Tua ciangin Judas Iskariot ahi lo Judas dang khat in, “Topa aw, leitung mite tungah kilang loin kote tungah bangci-in hong kilang tuam thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John14:23 Jesu in, “Kei hong itte in ka thu zui ding uh hi. Ka Pa in zong it dinga, ka nihun tua mite kiangah pai-in amaute tawh ka om khawm ding uh hi." 
John14:24 Kei hong it lote in ka thugente zui lo ding uh hi. Tu-a na zak uh thute pen keima thu hi lo a, kei hong sawl Pa Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahi hi." 
John14:25 “Note tawh ka hong om khawm hun sungin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi. 
John14:26 Ahi zongin Pa in keima tangin a hong sawl ding Huhpa Kha Siangtho a hong tun ciangin note tungah thu khempeuh hong hilh dinga, note tungah ka hong gen sa thu khempeuh zong hong phawksakkik ding hi." 
John14:27 Note tungah keima neih bang lungnopna kong pia ding hi. Tua ka hong piak ding lungnopna pen leitung mite in a piak theih a kip lo lungnopnate pawl hi lo hi. Tua ahih manin lau kei unla, zong lungkham kei un." 
John14:28 ‘Ka va paikhia dinga, ahi zongin note kiangah ka hong paikik ding hi,’ ka cihna thu na za khin uh hi. Kei sangin a lian zaw Pa Pasian kiangah a va pai ding ka hih manin kei na hong it nak uh leh ama kiangah ka paina hangin na nuam zaw ding uh hi." 
John14:29 A thu hong pian taktak ciangin ka thugente na up theih nadingun a pian ma-in a hong gen khol ka hi hi. 
John14:30 Tu-in hih leitung a ukpa hong tung ta ahih manin note kiangah thu kong gen man nawn kei ding hi. Amah in keima tungah aana nei lo hi. 
John14:31 Ahi zongin leitung mite in Pa Pasian ka itna thu a theih nadingun Paʼ vaihawmna bangbangin a gamta ding ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin kithawi un; hih lai mun panin paikhia ta ni,” a ci hi." 
John15:1 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kei pen leenggui taktak ka hi a, ka Pa pen leenggui lo nei pa ahi hi." 
John15:2 Amah in gah a nei lo ka hiang khempeuh sat khia a, gah a nei hiangte ahihleh a gah semsem theih nadingin a puah hi." 
John15:3 Note tungah ka hong thugennate hangin note a siang na suak khinzo uh hi. 
John15:4 Kei tawh hong kizom paisuak le-uhcin kei zong note tawh a kizom paisuak ka hi ding hi. A hiang pen a gui tawh kizom kei leh gah a gah theih loh mah bangin note zong kei tawh na kizop kei uh leh gah na gah thei kei ding uh hi. 
John15:5 “Kei pen leenggui ka hi a, note pen a hiang na hi uh hi. Note in kei tawh loin bangmah hih thei lo ding na hih manun kei tawh a kizomte in gah tampi na gah ding uh hi." 
John15:6 Kei tawh a kizom lo mite pen leenggui hiang bangin kipaai khia-in keutum hi. Tua bang hiangte meikhuk sungah kilawnin a kaang tum hi. 
John15:7 Kei tawh na hong kizop uh a, note sungah ka thu a om nakleh na deih peuhpeuh uh hong ngen le-uhcin hong kipia ding hi." 
John15:8 Gah tampi gah le-uhcin ka Paʼ minthanna a kilangsak na hi ding uh a, keima nungzui na hihna uh kilang ding hi." 
John15:9 Ka Pa in kei hong it zahin note hong it ka hih manin keima hong itna sungah om un. 
John15:10 Ka Paʼ hong thupiakte zui-in ama itna sungah ka om mah bangin note in zong ka thupiaknate na hong zuih uh leh ka itna sungah a om na hi ding uh hi. 
John15:11 Note hangin kei ka lungdam theih nading le noteʼ lungdamna a cingtaak a suah theih nadingin hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi. 
John15:12 “Note tungah ka hong piak thu in: Note ka hong it zahin note khatlekhat na ki-it un. 
John15:13 Lawmteʼ tang ding sih ngamna sangin lawmte itna a lian zaw om nawn lo hi. 
John15:14 Ka hong thupiak bangin na gamtat uh leh ka lawmte na hi uh hi. 
John15:15 Nasemte in a toteʼ nasepna bangmah thei lo ahih manin note pen nasemte ka hong ci nawn kei ding hi. Ka Paʼ tung panin ka zak thu khempeuh note kiangah hong gen khin ka hih manin note, lawm, ka hong ci zaw ding hi." 
John15:16 Note in kei na hong teel kei uh a, ahi zongin keimah in note ka hong teel a, note va pai-in a kimang tawntung ding gah a gah dingin ka hong seh hi. Tua ahih manin keima min suangin Pa kiangah na nget peuhpeuh uh hong pia ding hi." 
John15:17 Tua hi a, note kong thupiak in: Khatlekhat na ki-it un, cihna ahi hi." 
John15:18 “Leitung mite in note hong muhdah leh kei a hong mudah masa ahihna thu na thei un. 
John15:19 Hih leitung mite tawh a kipawl hi le-uhcin leitung mite in amau pawlte hong it ding hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung mite lak panin note ka hong teel khia a, amaute tawh kipawl nawn lo na hih manun a hong mudah ahi uh hi." 
John15:20 ‘Sila pen a topa sangin lian zaw lo hi,’ ci-in ka hong thugenna phawk un. Amaute in kei hong bawlsiat uh leh note zong hong bawlsia ding hi. Ka thugente hong zuih uh leh noteʼ thugente zong hong zui ding hi." 
John15:21 Ahi zongin amaute in kei hong sawl pa thei lo uh ahih manin keima mi na hihna uh hangin amaute in hih bangin hong bawl ding uh ahi hi. 
John15:22 Kei hong pai kei-in amaute tungah thu a gen lo hi leng amaute in mawh pua lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh a mawhna thu uh ah kiphel nading a paulap ding uh bangmah om nawn lo hi. 
John15:23 Kei hong mudahte in ka Pa zong a mudah ahi hi. 
John15:24 Kuamah in a bawl ngei loh nalamdangte amaute lakah a bawl lo hi leng amaute in mawh pua lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ka nalamdang bawlte mu khin uh ahih manin kei le ka Pa a hong mudah khawm uh ahi hi. 
John15:25 Amauteʼ Thukham sungah, ‘Thu om lopi-in kei hong mudah uh hi,’ ci-in a kigelhna thu a tun theih nadingin a hici mah ding ahi hi." 
John15:26 “Ahi zongin Thuman a hong lak ding Huhpa ahi Kha Siangtho ka Pa kiang panin ka hong sawl ding hi. Amah hong tun ciangin keima thu hong gen ding hi. 
John15:27 A kipat cil a kipanin kei tawh om khawm na hih manun note in zong keima thu na gen ding uh hi. 
John16:1 “Note na puk khak loh nadingun hih thute a hong gen ka hi hi. 
John16:2 Amaute in a kikhopna uh innte panin note hong hawl khia ding uh hi. Note hong that mite pen Pasianʼ nasemin a kingaihsut ding uh hun hong tung ding hi. 
John16:3 Amaute in ka Pa ahi a, kei ka hi zongin hong thei lo uh ahih manin tu-a bangin note a hong bawl ding uh ahi hi." 
John16:4 Hih bangin a hong gamtat hun uh hong tun ciangin kong gen thute na phawk theih nadingun a hong gen khol ka hi hi. “Note tawh hong om khawm ngawn ka hih manin a kipat tuung lamin hih thute kong gen kei hi. 
John16:5 Tu-in ahihleh kei hong sawl pa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi. Tua hi napi-in, ‘Koi ah pai ding na hi hiam?’ ci-in kuamah in na hong dong kei uh hi." 
John16:6 Ahi zongin hih thute kong gen ciangin na lungsim uh dah mahmah hi. 
John16:7 A taktakin ci lehang, kei paikhia kei leng note hong Huh ding pa hong pai lo dinga, kei paikhia leng note hong Huh ding pa hong sawl ding ka hih manin kei va paikhia leng note adingin hoih zaw tham hi." 
John16:8 Amah hong tun ciangin leitung mite tungah mawhna thu, thuman thu leh thukhenna thu laktel ding hi." 
John16:9 Amaute in kei hong up loh manun a mawhna uh lak dinga," 
John16:10 Pa kiangah pai ding ka hih manin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh hi, ka cihna thu a manna lak dinga," 
John16:11 hih leitung a ukpa pen thukhenna a thuak khin ahihna thu zong lak ding hi. 
John16:12 “Ka hong gen ding tampi tak om lai hi; ahi zongin hong gen lai leng note adingin tam lua ding hi. 
John16:13 Tua ahih manin thuman hong lak ding Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin thu khempeuh a manin hong hilh ding hi. Ama ngaihsut tawm thu hong gen ding hi lo a, ama tungah a kigen thute le a hong tung ding thute a hong gen ding ahi hi." 
John16:14 Amah in keima gen ding thute note tungah hong gen ding ahih manin Pasianʼ pianzia ka neihna hong kilangsak ding hi. 
John16:15 Ka Paʼ neihsa khempeuh keima-aʼ suak khin ahih manin keima gen ding thute le a gen dingin ka sawl teng Kha Siangtho in note kiangah hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John16:16 “Tawl khat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawl khat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin," 
John16:17 a nungzuite pawl khat kidong uh a, “Tawl khat khit ciangin kei na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawl khat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi, a cihna le Pa kiangah a ciahkik ding ka hi hi, a cihnate bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a kici uh hi." 
John16:18 Tawl khat a cihcih pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, i thei kei hi, a kici uh hi." 
John16:19 Jesu in amauteʼ theihnop lamtak phawk ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Note khatlekhat na kidot uh, ‘Tawl khat khit ciangin na hong mu nawn kei ding uh a, tawl khat khit ciangin na hong mukik ding uh hi,’ ka cihnopna a kidong na hi uh hiam?" 
John16:20 A taktakin ka hong genin ah, note dahin na kap ding uh a, ahi zongin leitung mite lungdam ding uh hi. Note na dah ding uh a, ahi zongin na dahna uh lungdamna hong suak ding hi." 
John16:21 Numei in a ta a suah hun a tun ciangin na sa ahih manin a dah hi. Ahi zongin a ta a suah khit ciangin leitungah naungek khat a piangsak khin ahihna hangin lungdamin a natna teng a mangngilh ta hi. 
John16:22 Note zong tua mah tawh na kibang ding uh hi. Note zong tu-in na dah uh hangin note tawh kimukik ding ihih manin na lung uh dam mahmah dinga, tua na lungdamna uh kuamah in hong beisak thei lo ding hi." 
John16:23 “Tua hun ciangin kei kiangah bangmah nong ngen nawn kei ding uh hi. A mantakin kong genin ah, keima min suangin na nget peuhpeuh uh Pa in hong pia ding hi." 
John16:24 Tu ni ciang dong keima min suangin bangmah na ngen nai kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin ngen le-uhcin hong kipia ding ahih manin na lungdamna uh hong cingtaak ding hi. 
John16:25 “Tu hun ciang dong hih thute thu gentehna zangin kong gen hi. Ahi zongin thu gentehna ka hong zat nawn loh hun hong tung dinga, tua hun ciangin a teltakin Pa Pasianʼ thu kong gen ding hi." 
John16:26 Tua hun hong tun ciangin, Pa Pasian kiangah ka hong ngetsak ding hi, ka hong ci nawn kei dinga, nomau mahmah in ka min suangin Pa kiangah na ngen pah ding uh hi." 
John16:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei hong itin, Pa kiang panin a hong pai ka hihna thu um na hih manun Pa mahmah in note hong it ahihna hang ahi hi." 
John16:28 Pa kiang panin hong pai-in leitung a hong tung ka hi a, tu-in leitung nusia leuleu-in Pa kiang a zuankik ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
John16:29 Tua ciangin a nungzuite in, “Tu-in thu gentehna zang nawn loin a kitel takin thu na hong gen hi." 
John16:30 Tu-in na khempeuh na theih khitna thu ka phawk uh a, ka theihnop uh thute kote in ka hong dot ding uh zong kisam nawn lo ahih manin Pa kiang panin a hong pai na hihna thu ka hong um uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John16:31 Jesu in, “Tu-in hong um ta na hi uh hiam?" 
John16:32 Note khempeuh kithehthangin na inn ciat uh zuanin kei bek na hong nusiat ding uh hun a hong tung ding hi bek loin tu-in a hong tung hi ta hi. Ahi zongin kei guak a hong kinusia hi lo a, Pa in kei hong ompih hi." 
John16:33 Keimah tawh na hong kipawlna uh hangin lungnopna na neih theih nadingun hih thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Leitung gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin keimah in leitung nate zo khinta ka hih manin lungnuamin om un,” a ci hi." 
John17:1 Jesu in hih thute a gen khit ciangin vantung lam en to-in, “Pa aw, a hun hong tung ta ahih manin na Tapa in na pianzia hong kilatsak theih nadingin tu-in na Tapaʼ pianzia hong kilangsak ta in." 
John17:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tapa tungah na piak mi khempeuh tungah Tapa in nuntak tawntungna a piak theih nadingin mi khempeuh tungah ukna aana a neih nadingin Tapa tungah na hong piak sa ahi hi. 
John17:3 Nang bek a man Pasian na hihna thu le nangmah in na hong sawl Jesu Khris hong theihna pen amaute adingin nuntak tawntung ngah nading lampi ahi hi. 
John17:4 Nangmah in sep dingin na hong piak nasep khempeuh sem khinta ka hih manin leitungah na min a thangsak ka hi hi. 
John17:5 Pa aw, leitung a kipiansak ma-in nang tawh i neihkhawm na pianzia mah tu-in nangma omna munah hong pia ta in." 
John17:6 “Leitung mite sung panin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite tungah nangma min ka pulak khinzo ta hi. Tua mite in nangma thu mangin nangma mi hi uh a, ahi zongin keima khut sungah amaute na hong pia hi." 
John17:7 Tu-in amaute in keima neih khempeuh nangma hong piak ahihna thu a thei uh hi. 
John17:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh gen dingin na hong sawl thu khempeuh amaute kiangah ka gen ciangin um uh a, nangma kiang panin a pai ka hihna thu hong thei uh a, nangma hong sawl ka hihna thu zong hong um uh hi." 
John17:9 “Amaute adingin thu ka hong ngetsak hi. Leitung mite adingin a hong ngetsak hi loin keima khut sungah na hong piak mite nangma mi ahih manin tua mite adingin a hong ngetsak ka hi hi. 
John17:10 Keima neih khempeuh nangma aʼ hi a, nangma neih khempeuh keima-aʼ ahih manin, tua miteʼ hangin nangma pianzia ka neihna hong kilang hi." 
John17:11 Tu-in nangma kiangah kei a hong pai ta ding ka hih manin leitungah ka om nawn kei dinga, ahi zongin amaute a om lai ding uh ahi hi. Tua ahih manin a Siangtho ka Pa aw, nang le kei pum khat ihih mah bangin amaute zong pum khat ahih nadingun na vangliatna tawh hoihtakin na kem in." 
John17:12 Amaute tawh ka om khawm hun lai-in nangma hong piak na min vangliatna tawh amaute ka kem hi. Amaute ka hu a, a maimang ding pa sim loh khat zong ka kisamsak kei hi. Tua a maimang pa lah Lai Siangtho sung thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
John17:13 Tu-in nangma kiangah a hong pai ta ding ka hih manin keimah bangin amaute in lungdamna cingtaak a neih theih nadingun leitungah ka om lai-in hih thute a gen ka hi hi. 
John17:14 Amaute tungah na thu ka gen khin hi. Ahi zongin keimah bangin amaute zong hih leitung mite tawh kipawl lo uh ahih manin leitung mite in a mudah uh hi. 
John17:15 Leitung panin amaute na lakkhiat ding a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a, a Gilopaʼ bawlsiat nading panin na kep ding a hong ngen ka hi hi." 
John17:16 Hih leitung tawh kei ka kipawl loh mah bangin amaute zong a kipawl lo uh ahi hi. 
John17:17 Nangma thuman hilhna tawh amaute a siangtho nangma zat dingin na bawl in. 
John17:18 Leitungah kei na hong sawl mah bangin kei zong leitung mahah amaute ka sawl hi. 
John17:19 Nangma tungah thuman takin amaute zong hong ki-ap theih nadingun amaute ka khualna-in nangma tungah kei ka hong ki-ap hi. 
John17:20 “Hih mite ading bek thu a hong ngetsak ka hi kei a, amauteʼ thugenna hangin kei hong um mite ading zong a hong ngetsak ka hi hi." 
John17:21 Pa aw, amaute khempeuh pum khat a suah theih nadingun ka hong ngetsak hi. Nangmah in kei na hong sawlna thu leitung mite in a up theih nadingun ei tegel pawl khat ihih mah bangin amaute zong eite tawh pawl khat hong hi tahen." 
John17:22 Nang le kei pum khat ihih mah bangin amaute zong pum khat a suah theih nadingun keima tungah na hong piak pianzia mah amaute tungah ka pia hi. 
John17:23 Leitung mite in kei na hong sawlna thu a theih nading le kei na hong it mah bangin amaute na itna thu a theihna hangun amaute pum khat a suah taktak theih nadingun amaute lakah kei ka om a, kei tawh nang na hong om khawm hi." 
John17:24 Pa aw, leitung a pianmapekin kei na hong itna hangin na hong piak pianzia a mu dingin keimah na hong piak mite zong ka omna ah a hong pai theih nading ka deihsak hi." 
John17:25 A Thuman ka Pa aw, leitung mite in nang hong thei lo uh hi. Ahi zongin keimah in nang ka hong thei a, kei na hong sawlna thu hih mite in zong a thei uh hi." 
John17:26 Kei na hong itna zah itna mah amaute sungah omin, amaute tawh kei ka om khawm theih nadingin amaute tungah nangma min ka gen khin a, mai lamah zong ka gen lailai ding hi,” ci-in thu a ngen hi." 
John18:1 Jesu in tu-a bangin thu a nget khit ciangin a nungzuite tawh Kidron lui kantanin a pai hi. Tua lai ah huan khat om a, tua huan sungah a nungzuite tawh a lut hi." 
John18:2 Jesu le a nungzuite tua munah pai zelzel uh ahih manin Jesu a lehhek Judas in zong tua mun a thei hi. 
John18:3 Tua ahih manin Judas zong, siampi liante le Farisi mite in a sawl galkap hon khat le biakinn cing palik pawl khat tawh hiam tawi-in lalcin leh meilah de-in tua huanah a hong pai uh hi." 
John18:4 Jesu in zong ama tungah a piang ding thu khempeuh thei khin ahih manin hong pai khia-in amaute kiangah, “Kua zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
John18:5 Amaute in, “Nazareth khuami Jesu a zong ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Jesu a lehhek Judas zong tua mihonte tawh hong ding khawm hi." 
John18:6 Jesu in, “Keimah ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin amaute nungkinin a puk uh hi." 
John18:7 Jesu in, “Kua zong na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dotkik ciangin amaute in, “Nazareth khuami Jesu a zong ka hi uh hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi." 
John18:8 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Keimah ka hi hi, ci-in kong gen khinzo hi. Kei hong zong na hih uh leh hih a dangte khah lel un,” a ci hi." 
John18:9 Hih bang a cihna pen, “Kei na hong piak sate khat zong ka kisamsak kei hi,” ci-in a thugenna a tun nading ahi hi." 
John18:10 Simon Peter in namsau kuah ahih manin a namsau dokin siampi lianpen paʼ silapa a sat leh a taklam bil a sat khia hi. Tua silapaʼ min Malkhus ahi hi. 
John18:11 Tua ciangin Jesu in Peter kiangah, “Na namsau a paai ah siat in. Ka Pa in thuak dingin a hong piak thu thuak lo ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John18:12 Tua ahih manin galkapte le a bute le Jew mi palikte in Jesu manin hen uh a," 
John18:13 tua kumin siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafasʼ sungpa Annas kiangah a paipih masa uh hi. 
John18:14 Mihonteʼ tangin mi khat a sih ding kilawm zaw hi, ci-in Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante kiangah thu a gen pa Kaiafas ahi hi." 
John18:15 Simon Peter le a nungzui dang khat in zong Jesu a zui uh hi. Hih a nungzui dang khat pa le siampi lianpen pa kithei uh ahih manin siampi lianpen paʼ inntual dongah Jesu tawh a lut khawm hi. 
John18:16 Ahi zongin Peter ahihleh kong pua lamah a khawl hi. Tua ahih manin siampi lianpen pa tawh a kithei nungzui dang khat pa zong va paikikin kongcing numei a hopih khit ciangin Peter zong a tumpih hi. 
John18:17 Kongcing numei in Peter kiangah, “Hih mipaʼ nungzuite khat hi lo na hi hiam?” a cih leh, “Ka hi kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:18 Khua dam mahmah ahih manin nasemte le palikte in meihol cih a, tua mei awi-in a kiimah ding uh ahih manin Peter zong va pai-in mei awi-in amaute tawh a ding khawm hi." 
John18:19 Siampi lianpen pa Annas in Jesu kiangah ama nungzuite thu le a thuhilhna tawh kisai thu a dong hi. 
John18:20 Jesu in, “Mi khempeuhʼ theihin thu ka gen tawntung hi. Jew mihonpi a kikhopna innte le Biakinn sungah thu ka hilh a, thu ka sim genna omngei lo hi." 
John18:21 Tua ahih manin bang hangin kei kiangah hong dong se na hi hiam? Ka thugen a za mite kiangah dong lecin ka gen teng amaute in hong gen thei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:22 Hih bangin Jesu a pau ciangin biakinn cing palikte khat in Jesu beeng a, “Bang hangin hih bangin siampi lianpen pa tungah kampau ngam na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John18:23 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “A man loin kampau khial ka hih leh ka khialhna hong lak in. Ka thugen a man ahih manin bang hangin hong beeng zenzen na hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:24 Tua ciangin Annas in Jesu a kikhih sa mahin siampi lianpen pa Kaiafas kiangah a puak hi. 
John18:25 Tua bangin mei awi-in Simon Peter a din laitakin a kiim a om midangte in, “Nang, hua mipaʼ nungzuite khat hi lo na hi hiam?” a cih uh leh Peter in, “Ka hi kei hi,” ci-in a nial leuleu hi." 
John18:26 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen paʼ nasem, Peter in a bil a sat khiatsak paʼ behte khat in, “Huan sungah amah tawh na om khawm lai-un hong mu hi lo ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin," 
John18:27 Peter in nialkik leuleu a, tua khit phetin ak a khuang hi." 
John18:28 Tua ciangin Kaiafasʼ inn panin gam ukpa Pilatʼ omna kumpi inn ah Jesu a paipih uh hi. Tua hun pen zingsang tung ahi hi. Jew mite ahihleh Paisan Pawi annekna sungah kihel nuam uh ahih manin biakna vai-in a siang a suah theih nadingun kumpi inn huang sungah lut lo uh hi. 
John18:29 Tua ahih manin amaute kiangah Pilat hong pusuakin, “Hih mipa na mawhsakna uh bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
John18:30 amaute in, “Hih mipa a gamtat a sia lo hileh nang kiangah ka hong paipih kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John18:31 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Jerusalem khua-a om no Jew mi uliante mah in paikhiatpih unla, nomau Thukham tawh kizui-in ama tungah thu khen un,” ci-in a gen ciangin Jew mite in ama kiangah, “Kote in mi thah theih nading thu ka nei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John18:32 (Jesu in ama sihna ding zia a gen sa thu a tun theih nadingin hih bangin a piang ahi hi.) 
John18:33 Tua ciangin kumpi huang sungah Pilat ciahkik a, Jesu samin, “Nang Jew miteʼ kumpi na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh" 
John18:34 Jesu in, “Nangʼ lungsimah a piangtawm hong dong na hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh midangte in keima thu hong gen ahi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John18:35 Pilat in, “Kei, Jew mi hong sa na hi hiam? Na Jew mipihte le na siampi liante un kei kiangah nang hong ap uh hi. Bang gamta khial na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
John18:36 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Keima ukna pen hih leitung gam hi lo hi. Keima ukna hih leitung gam hileh Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi ulianteʼ khut sungah hong kipiak loh nadingin ka nungzuite in a do ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin keima ukna pen hih leitung tawh kizom lo hi,” a ci hi." 
John18:37 Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Tua ahihleh nang kumpi hi lo na hi hiam?” a cih leh Jesu in, “Kumpi hi, nangmah in na hong ci hi. Hih thuman a gen khia dingin mi hong suakin leitungah a hong pai ka hi hi. Hih thuman tawh a kizom mi peuhmah in keima thugen hong zui uh hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John18:38 Pilat in, “Thuman na cih bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Tua ciangin Jew mihonte kiangah Pilat va pai khiakikin amaute kiangah, “Ama khialhna bangmah ka mu kei hi." 
John18:39 Tua ahih manin na Paisan Pawi hun uh ciangin note adingin mi khat ka khahkhiat a ngeina ahih manin note adingin hih Jew kumpipa hong khah khia leng na ut uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
John18:40 amaute awng gawpin, “Hih mipa khah kei in! Barabbas hong khah in!” ci-in a dawng uh hi. (Barabbas pen mi suamin thong kia khat ahi hi.)" 
John19:1 Tua ciangin Pilat in ama kiangah Jesu paipih sakin a satsak hi. 
John19:2 Galkapte in a kumpi lukhu dingin ling vialin Jesu khusak uh a, a kumpi puan dingin puansan a silhsak khit uh ciangin" 
John19:3 ama kiangah nehin, “Jew mite Kumpipa, na khansau tahen!” ci-in hopihin a khut uh tawh a beeng uh hi." 
John19:4 Pilat zong khatvei hong pusuakkikin mihonte kiangah, “Ama khialhna bangmah a mu lo ka hihna thu na theih nadingun note kiangah Jesu ka hong pai khiasak hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:5 Tua ahih manin Jesu zong ling lukhu khu kawm leh puansan silh kawmin hong pusuak a, Pilat in mihonte kiangah, “En un, hih lai ah na mipa uh om hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:6 Siampi liante le biakinn cing palikte in a muh uh ciangin “Singlamteh tungah that in, singlamteh tungah that in!” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Pilat in amaute kiangah, “Na ut uh leh paipih unla, singlamteh tungah that un! Keʼn ama khialhna ka mu kei hi,” a cih ciangin" 
John19:7 Jew mihonte in, “Amah Pasianʼ Tapa-in kigen ahih manin a kithah theih nading Thukham ka nei uh hi,” ci-in a genna uh" 
John19:8 Pilat in a zak ciangin a lunghimawh semsem hi. 
John19:9 Tua ahih manin kumpi inn huang sungah lutkikin Jesu kiangah, “Koi lai panin a hong pai na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Ahi zongin Jesu in dawng lo ahih manin," 
John19:10 “Hong dawng lo ding na hi hiam? Nang thah theih nading le khah theih nading thu ka neih lam phawk lo na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin 
John19:11 Jesu in, “Pasian in nang tungah hong pia lo hileh kei tungah thu na nei het kei ding hi. Tua ahih manin nangma khut sungah kei hong apteʼ mawhna lian zaw hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John19:12 Pilat in hih thu a zak ciangin Jesu a khah theih nading lampi zongin a hanciam hi. Ahi zongin Jew mihonte awngin kiko uh a, “Hih mipa na khah peuhmah leh Rom gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa tawh a kipawl lo na hi ding hi. Kumpi hiʼng, a ci khempeuh pen gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa a langpang ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John19:13 Pilat in hih bangin miteʼ kikona a zak ciangin Jesu paikhiatpih a, Hebru pau-in Gabbatha a kici Suangphahpek tunga thukhenna tokhom tungah a tu hi." 
John19:14 Tua ni pen Paisan Pawi hun ding Kigin ni hi a, sunkim laitak hun ahi hi. Pilat in Jew mihonte kiangah, “Hih lai ah na Kumpipa uh om!” a cih ciangin" 
John19:15 amaute in, “That in, that in, singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Pilat in, “Na Kumpipa uh that mawk ding ka hi hiam?” a cih ciangin siampi liante in, “Rom gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipa sim loh kumpi dang ka nei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John19:16 Tua ahih ciangin singlamteh tungah thah dingin amauteʼ khut sungah Jesu a pia ta hi. 
John19:17 Tua ahih manin amaute in Jesu la-in paikhiatpih uh a, ama kikhai nading singlamteh mah puasakin Hebru pau-in Golgotha a kici Lutang Guh mualah a paipih uh hi." 
John19:18 Tua lai mun panin singlamteh tungah khai uh a, ama lang tuakah zong midang khat tuak mah khai-in a laizang ah Jesu a kikhai hi." 
John19:19 Pilat in lai khat gelhsakin, “Jew miteʼ Kumpipa, Nazareth khuami Jesu,” cisak a, singlamteh tungah a suangsak hi." 
John19:20 Jesu a kikhaina mun pen Jerusalem khuapi tawh kinai ahih manin Judea gam mi tampi in hih lai kigelh a sim uh hi. Tua lai pen Hebru lai, Latin lai le Grik lai-in a kigelh hi." 
John19:20 Jesu a kikhaina mun pen Jerusalem khuapi tawh kinai ahih manin Judea gam mi tampi in hih lai kigelh a sim uh hi. Tua lai pen Hebru lai, Latin lai le Grik lai-in a kigelh hi." 
John19:21 Tua ciangin Jew siampi liante in Pilat kiangah, “‘Jew miteʼ Kumpipa,’ ci-in gelh kei inla, ‘Hih mipa in Jew miteʼ kumpi ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci-in gelh in,” a cih uh leh" 
John19:22 Pilat in, “Ka gelh sa pen ka gelh sa bangbangin kip hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John19:23 Galkapte in singlamteh tungah Jesu a khai khit uh ciangin a puante la uh a, khen khat ciatin a ngah dingun khen li a suah uh hi. Mong a nei lo, a kiphan a puan tualpi zong a la uh hi." 
John19:24 Ahi zongin amaute in, “Hih puan bal kek kei ni. A ngah ding i theih nadingin ai san ni,” a kici uh hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Amaute in ka puante hawm uh a, ka puan tualpi ngah nadingin ai a san uh hi,” ci-in a kigelhna a tun nadingin hih bangin galkapte a gamta ahi uh hi." 
John19:25 Jesuʼ singlamteh gei ah ama nu; ama nu no ahi, Klopasʼ zi Mary; le Magdala khuami Mary a ding uh hi." 
John19:26 Jesu in ama nu le a it a nungzui pa a ding khawm a muh ciangin a nu kiangah, “Nu aw, tua lai ah na tapa om hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:27 Tua ciangin a nungzui pa kiangah, “Na nu tua lai ah om hi,” a ci leuleu hi. Tua ahih manin tua hun a kipanin nungzui pa in ama inn ah Jesuʼ nu Mary a kem hi." 
John19:28 Tua hun ciangin Jesu in na khempeuh kicing ta hi, ci-in thei ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thu a tun theih nadingin, “Ka dangtak hi,” a ci hi." 
John19:29 Tua lai ah beel khat dimin leenggah-zuhau om ahih manin amaute in tua sungah tuihupna diahin puknah hiang dawnah a koih khit uh ciangin Jesuʼ kam ah a va tah to uh hi. 
John19:30 Jesu in tua leenggah-zuhau ciamin, “Man khinta hi,” a cih khit ciangin a lu puksukin a si ta hi." 
John19:31 Tua ni pen Kigin ni hi a, a zing ciang Sabbath ni thupi diak ahih manin tua ni-in singlamteh tungah a luangte a om lai ding deih lo uh ahih ciangin Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante, Pilat kiangah va pai-in a khete uh kuaitanin a luangte a lakkhiat nadingun a ngen uh hi." 
John19:32 Tua ahih manin galkapte hong pai uh a, a tuah masak pa uh a khe a kuaihtansak khit uh ciangin a lang khat a om pa aʼ zong a kuaihtansak uh hi." 
John19:33 Ahi zongin Jesuʼ khe kuaitan dingin a kithawi uh ciangin amah a na sih khitna thei uh ahih manin a khe a kuaihtansak nawn kei uh hi. 
John19:34 Ahi zongin galkapte khat in a teipi tawh Jesuʼ pangpi a sut leh sisan le tui hong leeng khia hi. 
John19:35 (Note in na up theih nadingun hih thupiang a mu pa in ama muhna bang a hong gen ahi hi. Ama thugente a man thu hi a, a gen pa in a man taktak a gen ahihna thu zong a thei hi.)" 
John19:36 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Ama guhte khat zong kitan lo ding hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tun theih nadingin hih bangin a piang ahi hi." 
John19:37 Tua banah Lai Siangtho mun dang khat ah, “Teipi tawh a sut pa uh a en ding uh hi,” na kici lai hi." 
John19:38 Tua ciangin Arimathea khuami Josef in Jesuʼ luang a lakkhiat theih nadingin Pilat kiangah va pai-in a ngen hi. (Josef i cih pen Jesuʼ nung a zui khat hi a, ahi zongin Jerusalem khua-a Jew uliante a kihtakna hangin a sim zuih khat ahi hi.) Josef in Jesuʼ luang a lakkhiat theih nadingin thu ngah ahih manin va pai-in Jesuʼ luang a la khia hi." 
John19:39 Jesu kiangah a zan hawh ngei Nikodemas zong hong pai a, Jesuʼ luang a siat loh nadingin a bawl nading myrrh le aloes paknamtui kigawm tawi sawm nih bang a gik a hong pua hi." 
John19:40 Tua mi nihte in si a vui uh ciangin a bawl ngeina bangun a paknamtuite nuhin puan tawh a tun uh hi. 
John19:41 Jesu, singlamteh tungah a kithahna mun tawh kinai ah huan khat om a, tua huan sungah kuamah a kivui ngei nai lohna hankhuk thak khat a om hi." 
John19:42 Tua ni pen Kigin ni hi a, Jew miteʼ Sabbath ni hong nai ta ahih manin, tua hankhuk a nai ahihna hangin nawhsa thu-in tua lai munah Jesu a vui uh hi." 
John20:1 Nipi ni zingsang khuavak ma-in Magdala khuami Mary zong hanah va pai-in a et ciangin hankhuk kihukna suangtum a kilik khia khin a mu hi. 
John20:2 Amah zong tai-in Simon Peter le Jesu in a it a nungzui pa kiangah, “Amaute in hankhuk panin i Topa la khia khin uh a, koi lai ah koih ahi uh hiam, cih ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
John20:3 Tua ciangin nungzui dang khat pa tawh Peter zong pai khia-in han lam a manawh uh hi. 
John20:4 A nih tuakun tai khawm uh a, ahi zongin nungzui dang khat pa in Peter makhelhin hanah a tung masa hi." 
John20:5 Han khuk sung a et suk ciangin a kitunna puante a om mu a, ahi zongin lut suk lo hi." 
John20:6 Ama nungah Simon Peter hong tungin han sungah a lut suk pah hi. A luang tunna puan mu a," 
John20:7 a lu tunna puan pen a luang tunna tawh om khawm loin a tuamin a kizialin a om a mu hi. 
John20:8 Tua ciangin han a tung masa nungzui dang pa zong lutsukin a thupiangte mu ahih manin a um hi. 
John20:9 (Sihna panin thokik ding hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in a genna thu a theithei nai lo uh ahi hi.)" 
John20:10 Tua ciangin nungzuite a inn uh ah a ciah uh hi. 
John20:11 Ahi zongin han pua lamah Mary kap a, a kah kawmin hankhuk sung lamah kunin en a," 
John20:12 Jesuʼ luang a kisialna a lu lamah khat, a khe lamah khat, puan pak silhin a tu vantungmi nih a mu hi." 
John20:13 Tua vantung mite in Mary kiangah, “Bang hangin kap na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin amah in, “Amaute in ka Topa paikhiatpih uh a, koi lai ah koih ahi uh hiam, cih ka thei kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John20:14 Tua khit ciangin a kihei leh Jesu mu a, ahi zongin Jesu ahih lam thei lo hi." 
John20:15 Jesu in, “Numei aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam? Kua zong na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Mary in huan cing pa sa ahih manin, “Sia aw, amah na puakkhiat leh koi lai ah koih na hi hiam hong gen in. A luang ka la nuam hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:16 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Mary!” a cih leh Mary zong ama lamah kihei a, “Rabboni,” ci-in a dawng hi. (Rabboni pen Hebru pau hi a, “Siapa,” a cihna ahi hi.)" 
John20:17 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kei hong lenlen nawn kei in. Ka Pa kiangah a pai to nai lo ka hi hi. Ka sanggamte kiangah va pai inla, ‘Keima Pa le noteʼ Pa, keima Pasian le noteʼ Pasianʼ kiangah ka pai ding hi,’ ci hi, ci-in va gensak zaw in,” a ci hi." 
John20:18 Tua ahih manin Magdala khuami Mary zong nungzuite kiangah pai-in Topa a muh khitna thu va gen a, hih a kam vaikhakte zong a zasak hi." 
John20:19 Tua ni pen Nipi ni nitak lam hi a, nungzuite zong a nitakin inn sung khat ah a kikhop laitakun Jerusalem khua-a Jew mi uliante a kihtakna uh hangin inn a kikalhnelh uh hi. Tua bang hi napi-in amaute lakah Jesu hong dinga, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in a hopih hi." 
John20:20 Tua bangin a hopih khit ciangin a khutte le a pangpi zong a lak hi. Topa a muhna hangun nungzuite a nuam mahmah uh hi. 
John20:21 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Note in nopna ngah ta un. Pa in kei a hong sawl bangin note zong ka hong sawl hi,” ci-in a vaikhak leuleu hi." 
John20:22 Tua khit ciangin amaute lamah a hu sang a, “Kha Siangtho na sang un." 
John20:23 Miteʼ mawhna na maisak uh leh amauteʼ mawhna a mai hi dinga, na maisak kei uh leh amauteʼ mawhna a mai lo hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:24 Nungzuite kiangah Jesu a kilah laitakin sawm le nihte sung panin Unau Peeng min no a nei Thomas om lo hi. 
John20:25 Tua ahih manin nungzui dangte in ama kiangah, “Topa ka mu uh hi,” a cih uh leh amah in, “A khut, siktukkilh tawh a kikilhna mate mu-in, tua a siktukkilh ma vangah ka khutmete ka va khum teek kei a, ama pangpi zong ka khut tawh ka lawn teek kei leh ka um kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:26 Tua zawh nipikal khat ciangin nungzuite zong inn sung khat ah kikhawm leuleu uh a, tua hunin Thomas zong a om hi. Amaute kong kikhaknelh uh hi napi-in Jesu hong pai-in amaute lakah hong dinga, “Nopna ngah ta un,” ci-in a hopih khit ciangin" 
John20:27 Thomas kiangah, “Na khutme tawh hong lawng inla ka khutte en in. Na khut zan inla ka pangpi zong lawng in. Um lah nawn kei inla, um taktak in,” a ci hi." 
John20:28 Thomas in zong, “Ka Topa, ka Pasian!” ci-in a dawn ciangin" 
John20:29 Jesu in, “Kei na hong muh khit ciang bekin hong um pan na hi hiam? Kei hong mu lo napi-in hong umte adingin lungdamhuai mahmah zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
John20:30 Jesu in a nungzuiteʼ muhna ah nalamdang lian tampi bawl a, ahi zongin hih laibu sungah a kigelh lo tampi tak om lai hi." 
John20:31 Hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute pen Jesu, Pasianʼ Tapa, Khris ahihna thu na up theih nading uh le ama min hangin tua upna tawh nuntakna na ngah theih nading uh deihna tawh a kigelh ahi hi." 
John21:1 Tua khit ciangin a nungzuite omna Tiberias Tuili gei ah Jesu kilang leuleu a, a thu pianzia hih bang ahi hi:" 
John21:2 Simon Peter, Unau Peeng min no a nei Thomas, Galilee gam Kana khuami Nethanel, Zebediʼ tapate le nungzui dang nihte mun khat ah a om khawm uh hi." 
John21:3 Simon Peter in a lawmte kiangah, “Kei, ngasa bengin kuan ning,” ci-in a gen leh a lawmte in, “Ko zong hong kuan nung,” ci uh ahih manin, amaute kuan khia-in gunkuang tungah a tuang uh hi. Ahi zongin tua zanin ngasa khat zong man lo uh hi." 
John21:4 Zingsang khua a vak ciangin tui gei ah Jesu dinga, ahi zongin a nungzuite in amah ahih lam thei lo uh hi." 
John21:5 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Tangvalte aw, ngasa na man uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh amaute in, “Bangmah ka man kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
John21:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Na gunkuang taklam pang uh ah na ngen uh paai le-uhcin na man ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong a ngen uh paai uh a, ngasa tam awk lua ahih manin a ngen uh a kai zo kei uh hi." 
John21:7 Tua ciangin Jesu in a it nungzui pa in Peter kiangah, “Topa hi!” a ci hi. Simon Peter in Topa ahihna thu a zak ciangin (a nga betna uh ah a puante uh suah khia uh ahih manin) a puan silh buatbuatin tui sungah a leeng khia hi." 
John21:8 Nungzui dangte ahihleh gunkuang mahah tuangin a ngen uh tawh ngasa a dimtakin a hong kai uh hi. Tua lai mun le a tui gei pen pi za thum bang bek kigamla hi. 
John21:9 Tui gei a tun uh ciangin mei-am tungah ngasa le anlum a ki-em a mu uh hi. 
John21:10 Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Tu-a na ngasa matte uh pawl khat hong paipih un,” ci-in a gen ciangin" 
John21:11 Simon Peter zong gunkuang tungah va kahin ngasa a dimin a om ngen va kai a, ngasa a vekpi-in za le sawm nga le thum pha-in tam mahmah napi-in a ngen uh them khat zong kikeek lo hi." 
John21:12 Tua ciangin Jesu in amaute kiangah, “Hong pai un; zing an ne ni,” a ci hi. Amah pen Topa ahih lamtak thei uh ahih manin, “Nang kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a nungzuite khat beek in dong ngam lo uh hi." 
John21:13 Jesu hong pai-in anlum la-in amaute tungah pia a, tua mah bangin ngasa zong a pia hi." 
John21:14 Hih pen sihna panin Jesu a kithawhkiksak khit zawh nungzuite tungah a kilah a thum veina hi ta hi. 
John21:15 An a nek khit uh ciangin Jesu in Simon Peter kiangah, “Johanʼ tapa Simon aw, hih a dang khempeuhteʼ hong it sangin kei na hong nak it zaw hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin amah in, “Topa aw, ka hong it zaw hi. Nang ka hong itna na thei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John21:16 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Ka tuunote na kem in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesu in a nih veina dong leuleu a, “Johanʼ tapa Simon aw, kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Topa aw, nang ka hong it a, ka hong itna thu na thei hi,” a cih ciangin, “Ka tuute na kem in,” a ci leuleu hi." 
John21:17 Jesu in a thum veina dong leuleu a, “Johanʼ tapa Simon aw, kei na hong it hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Kei na hong it hiam?” ci-in thum vei tak a dotna hangin Peter zong a dah suak hi. Tua ahih manin, “Topa aw, nangmah in na khempeuh na thei a, nangmah ka hong itna thu zong na thei hi,” ci-in a dawn ciangin Jesu in, “Ka tuute na kem in." 
John21:18 A mantakin ci lehang, na khangno lai-in na kawnggak gakin na utna peuh ah na pai zialzial thei hi. Ahi zongin na khangham ciangin na khutte na zan dinga, midangte in na khutte hong henin na ut lohna pi ah hong paipih ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
John21:19 (Hih bangin a thugenna pen Peter a sih nading zia le Pasianʼ min a thansak nading thu a gen nopna ahi hi.) Tua ciangin Jesu in Peter kiangah, “Hong zui un,” a ci hi." 
John21:20 Peter a kihei ciangin, nitak an a nek lai-un Jesuʼ gei ah tu-in, “Topa aw, nang kua in hong lehhek ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong, Jesuʼ it a nungzui pa ama nungah a om a mu hi." 
John21:21 Peter in amah a muh ciangin Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, hih mipa bangci ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot leh" 
John21:22 Jesu in, “Ka hong paikik mateng amah a nungta dingin ka deih nakleh nang bang phamawh sa na hi hiam? Nangmah in ka nung hong zui peuh in,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John21:23 Tua ahih manin hih nungzui pa si lo ding hi, ci-in a nungzuite lakah a kigen hi. Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Amah si lo ding hi,” a ci hi loin, “Ka hong paikik mateng amah a nungta dingin ka deih nakleh nang bang phamawh sa na hi hiam?” a ci bek ahi hi." 
John21:24 Jesu in tua a cih nungzui pa pen hih thute genin lai sungah a gelh pa hi a, ama thugente a man taktak hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi." 
John21:25 Jesu in a sep thute tampi tak om lai hi. A sep khempeuh a banbanin laibu sungah a kigelh hileh a laibute pen leitungah ta zo lo ding hi, ci-in ka um hi." 
Acts1:1 Lawm Theofilas aw, Lai ka hong gelh masakna sungah Jesu in nasep a kipat tung a kipanin vantungah amah a kilaktoh hun ciang dong, a thuhilhna le a septe khempeuh cing takin ka gelh hi. Ama sawltak dingin a teel sa mite, Kha Siangtho tungtawnin thu a vaikhak khit ciangin vantungah amah kila to hi." 
Acts1:2  
Acts1:3 Ama sih khit zawh ni sawm li sung amaute tungah tam veipi kilang a, amah a nungta taktak ahihna teltakin a kithei ahi hi. Amaute in amah mu uh a, Pasianʼ Ukna thu amaute tungah a gen hi." 
Acts1:4 Amaute tawh a om khawm laitakin amah in amaute kiangah, “Jerusalem khua panin paikhia kei unla, note kiangah ka hong gen sa ka Paʼ hong kamciam thu na ngak un." 
Acts1:5 Johan in tui sungah mite phum a, ahi zongin a sawt loin Pasian in Kha Siangtho tawh note hong kidimsak ding hi,” ci-in thu a pia hi." 
Acts1:6 Tua bangin Jesu tawh a om khawm laitakun sawltakte in Jesu kiangah, “Topa aw, tutungin Israel minamte tungah ukna aana na piakik ding hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin" 
Acts1:7 Jesu in, “Ka Pa in ama thu tawh a seh sa hun le nite, cik ciangin hong tung ding cih thu noteʼ theih ding thu hi lo hi." 
Acts1:8 Ahi zongin note tungah Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin vangliatna tawh na kidim ding uh a, Jerusalem khua sung, Judea gam sung, Samaria gam sung le leimong dongin note in keima thu na gen ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts1:8 Ahi zongin note tungah Kha Siangtho hong tun ciangin vangliatna tawh na kidim ding uh a, Jerusalem khua sung, Judea gam sung, Samaria gam sung le leimong dongin note in keima thu na gen ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts1:9 Hih thu a gen khit ciangin amauteʼ muh tangpi mahin vanah Jesu kila to a, meiipi in liah ahih manin amah mu thei nawn lo uh hi." 
Acts1:10 Tua bangin Jesu a kilaktoh ciangin amaute in vantung lam enenin a om laitakun amaute kiangah puan pak a silh mi nih hong ding vat a," 
Acts1:11 “Galilee mite aw, bang hangin vantung lam enin ding niloh na hi uh hiam? Note kiang panin vantungah a kila to hih Jesu pen, vantungah a pai toh na muh uh bang teekteek mahin khatvei hong pai sukkik ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts1:12 Tua ciangin Jerusalem pan tai lang bang a gamla tua Oliv Mual tung panin Jerusalem ah sawltakte a ciahkik uh hi. 
Acts1:13 Jerusalem a tun uh ciangin amauteng, Peter, Johan, James le Andru, Filip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthai, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa) le Jamesʼ tapa Judas a tunna uh inn dei ah a kah to uh hi." 
Acts1:13 Jerusalem a tun uh ciangin amauteng, Peter, Johan, James le Andru, Filip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthai, Alfeasʼ tapa James, Simon (gam khual pa) le Jamesʼ tapa Judas a tunna uh inn dei ah a kah to uh hi." 
Acts1:14 Numeite, Jesuʼ nu Mary le Jesuʼ naute tawh thungen khawm dingin a kikhawm zelzel uh hi." 
Acts1:15 Tua khit a sawt loin thu um mi za khat le sawm nih bang a kikhop khawm laitakun Peter hong dingin thu hong gen a," 
Acts1:16 “Lawmte aw, Jesu a mante lam a lak Judas thu, Kha Siangtho in Davidʼ kam panin a gen kholhna Lai Siangtho sung thu a tun ding kisam hi." 
Acts1:17 Judas pen eite tawh na a sem khawm dingin a kiteel khia ahih manin eima pawl mi ahi hi. 
Acts1:18 (“Tu-in hih mipa in a gitloh gamtatna thamanin a ngah sum tawh amah in lo khat lei a, tua lo sungah kia-in a si hi. Amah kitamzan a, a sungkua khempeuh kitheh kek hi." 
Acts1:19 Jerusalem khua sunga teeng mi khempeuh in hih thu za uh a, amauʼ pau-in tua lo pen ‘Akeldama,’ ci uh hi. Akeldama a khiatna in, ‘Mi Thahna Lo,’ a cihna ahi hi.)" 
Acts1:20 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Late Laibu sungah, ‘Ama teenna mun gamdai henla, tua munah kuamah teeng kei hen,’ kici a, tua banah, ‘Ama nasep midang khat in sem tahen,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Acts1:21 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Jesuʼ thawhkikna thu teci pangin a hong genpih dingin Judas tangin mi khat i lak ding kisam hi. Tua mipa pen Johanʼ tuiphum kipat hun a kipanin Jesu vanah a kilaktoh hun ciang dong, Jesuʼ nasepna khempeuh ah eite tawh a om khawm mi khat ahih ding kisam hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Tua ciangin amaute in Josef (min dang nih a nei, Barsabbas le Justas zong a kici pa) le Matthias a pulak uh hi." 
Acts1:24 Tua ciangin amaute in thu ngen uh a, “Mihing khempeuhʼ lungsim sung thu a thei Topa aw, ama om nadingin a kilawm munah a om dingin sawltak nasep panin a hong paisan Judas tang dingin, hih mi nih sung panin na teel penpen hong hilh in,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts1:25  
Acts1:26 Tua ciangin a teel nadingun lai ai san uh a, Matthias in ngah ahih manin sawltak sawm le khatte tawh a kisim khawm pah hi." 
Acts2:1 Pentekos ni hong tun ciangin Jesu a um mi khempeuh mun khat ah kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts2:2 Tua laitakin huihpi nung bangin huging khat hong tung vat a, amauteʼ kikhopna inn sung khempeuh hong dim hi." 
Acts2:3 Tua ciangin leii tawh a kibang meikuang bang pian amaute lakah hong kithehthang a, tuate in mi khempeuh su kha kim hi." 
Acts2:4 Amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidim uh a, tua Kha in minam dangteʼ pau tawh amaute a pau theisak hi." 
Acts2:5 Tua laitakin biakna pawi siim dingin gam tuamtuam panin a hong pai Jew mi biakna hahkat mi tampi tak, Jerusalem khua sungah a om uh hi." 
Acts2:6 Hih huging a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi tak hong kikhawm uh a, hih Jesu a um miteʼ thugen pen amauʼ pau ciatin za uh ahih manin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts2:7 Amaute in hih thu lamdang sa mahmah uh ahih manin, “Hih thugen mite pen Galilee mi vive hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Acts2:8 Tua hi napi-in bang hangin amauteʼ thugen pen eima pau ciatin za ihi hiam? 
Acts2:9 Eite pen Parthia gam, Media gam, Elam gam, Mesopotamia gam, Judea gam, Kappadosia gam, Pontas gam, Asia gam," 
Acts2:9 Eite pen Parthia gam, Media gam, Elam gam, Mesopotamia gam, Judea gam, Kappadosia gam, Pontas gam, Asia gam," 
Acts2:10 Frigia gam, Pamfilia gam, Egypt gam le Sairin khuapi gei-a om Libya gamte pan ihi a, pawl khatte Rom gam pan ihi hi." 
Acts2:11 Jew mite le Gentail mi Jew biakna a zuite ihi a, pawl khatte pen Krete gam le Arabia gam pan ihi hi. Tua bang hi napi-in, Pasianʼ sep nalamdang liante a kigenna eima pau ciatin i za hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts2:12 Amaute in lamdang sa-in lungmang mahmah uh a, “A bangci thu ahi hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat a kidong uh hi." 
Acts2:13 Ahi zongin mi pawl khatte in hih Jesu a umte simmawh bawl uh a, “Zukham ahi uh hi,” ci-in a zahko uh hi." 
Acts2:14 Tua ciangin sawltak sawm le khatte tawh a om khawm Peter hong ding to-in, mihonte tungah nakpi takin thu hong gen a, “Ka mipih ahi Jew mite le Jerusalem khua sunga om mi khempeuhte aw, hih thupiang hong gen ding ka hih manin limtakin na ngai un." 
Acts2:15 Tu hun pen zingsang nai kua hi pan ahih manin, noteʼ ngaihsut bangin hih mite zukham hi lo uh hi." 
Acts2:16 Hih thupiang pen kamsang Joel in a gen sa thu hi a, tua sungah," 
Acts2:17 ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Nitawp ni ciangin, mi khempeuh tungah ka Kha ka sung dinga, na tanute uh le na tapate un keima thu taangko ding uh hi; na tangvalte un maang mu ding uh a, na puteekte un mang man ding uh hi." 
Acts2:18 Tua ni ciangin ka nasem numeite le ka nasem pasalteʼ tung nangawn ah ka Kha ka sung dinga, amaute in keima thu gen ding uh hi." 
Acts2:19 Tua ciangin vantung le leitungah hilhkholhna lim le nalamdang ka bawl ding hi. Sisan kiluansakna, meikatna le meikhu sahpi hong om ding hi." 
Acts2:20 Topaʼ ni, a lian thupi ni, hong tun ma-in ni hong mialin, kha, sisan hong bang ding hi." 
Acts2:21 Ahi zongin Topa tungah huhna a ngen khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi,’ ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Acts2:22 “Ka mipih Israel-te aw, hih ka thugen na ngai un: Nazareth khuami Jesu tungtawnin Pasian in lim le nalamdangte bawlin na hong sem ahih manin, Jesu pen Pasianʼ sawl nasem ahihna teltakin na thei uh hi. Hih thu pen note lakah a piang thu ahih manin nomau mahmah in na thei uh hi." 
Acts2:23 Pasian in thu a ma-theih kholhna le a ma-geelna tawh kizui-in noteʼ khut sungah tua Jesu a hong piak ding a ngaihsut sa hi a, note in singlamteh tungah khai-in migiloteʼ khut tawh amah na that uh hi." 
Acts2:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in misite lak panin amah hingkiksak a, sihna in amah lencip zo lo ahih manin sihna hanga gimna panin amah a suaktasak hi." 
Acts2:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh David in ama thu a genna ah, “‘Topa ka maingat tawntung a, ka tak lamah amah om ahih manin lungkhamna ka thuak kei ding hi." 
Acts2:26 Tua ahih manin ka lungdam a, kei ka nuam hi. A si thei mihing ka hih lel hangin lungmuang takin ka om ding hi." 
Acts2:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh misiteʼ gamah kei nong nusiacip kei dinga, na nasem keimah muatna nong thuaksak kei ding hi." 
Acts2:28 Nangmah in nuntakna lampi na hong lak khin a, nong ompihna tawh kei nong lungdamsak hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts2:29 “Sanggamte aw, noteʼ theih dingin i pupi Davidʼ thu a teltakin kong gen ding hi. Amah si-in kivui a, a han zong tu mahmah in eite kiangah om lai hi." 
Acts2:30 David pen kamsang hi a, ama tunga Pasianʼ thuciam a thei hi. Ama suante khat, amah bang teek mahin kumpi-in a bawl nading Pasian in thu a ciam hi." 
Acts2:31 Pasian in a sep ding thu David in mukhol ahih manin, ‘Misite gam sungah amah kinusia lo a, a sa a muat kei hi,’ ci-in a gen ciangin, Khrisʼ thawhkik nading thu a gengen ahi hi." 
Acts2:32 Pasian in sihna panin hih Jesu hingkiksak a, kote khempeuh pen hih thu a thei teci vive ka hi uh hi." 
Acts2:33 Amah in Pasianʼ tak lamah omna dongin liatna ngah a, ama tungah Pasian in a ciam sa Kha Siangtho zong a ngah khin hi. Tu laitak a na muh na zak uh nate pen kote tungah a hong piak tua Kha Siangtho ahi hi." 
Acts2:34 David pen vantungah a kah toh loh hangin amah in, ‘Topa in keima Topa kiangah: Na khe nuai ah na galte kong koihsak matengin ka tak lamah na tu in, ci-in gen hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts2:35  
Acts2:36 “Tua ahih ciangin singlamteh tungah na thah uh hih Jesu pen Pasian in Topa le Khris in a bawl khitna thu, Israel mi khempeuh in teltakin thei ta un,” a ci hi." 
Acts2:37 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungsim uh nakpi takin su kha a, Peter le sawltak dangte kiangah, “Sanggamte aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Acts2:38 Tua ciangin Peter in amaute kiangah, “Na mawhna uh kisik unla, na mawhna uh hong kimaisak theih nadingin Jesu Khris min tawh tui kiphum ciat un. Tua hileh Pasianʼ piakkhong Kha Siangtho na ngah ding uh hi." 
Acts2:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama kamciamna pen note tung, na suan na khakte uh tung le gamlapi-a om mi khempeuh, i Topa Pasian in a sap mi khempeuh tungah a hong bawl ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts2:40 Tua ciangin Peter in amaute tungah thu tampi gen thuahin hanthawn a, “Hih migiloteʼ gimthuak ding na tuah khak loh nadingun nomau mah in na suahtak nading uh lampi zong ciat un,” a ci hi." 
Acts2:41 Mi tampi in ama thugen umin tui kiphum uh a, tua ni-in mihing tul thum bang kibehlap uh hi." 
Acts2:42 Amaute in sawltakte tung panin thu sinin amaute tawh kikhawl uh a, amaute tawh an ne khawmin, thu zong a ngen khawm uh hi." 
Acts2:43 Sawltakte in lim le nalamdang tampi bawl uh a, mi khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts2:44 Thu um khempeuh kikhawlin om khawm uh a, a neihsate uh zong a neikhawm uh hi." 
Acts2:45 Amaute in a neih a lam teng uh zuak uh a, a sumte pen amau kisapna tawh kizui-in amaute lakah a hawm uh hi." 
Acts2:46 Nisimin biakinn ah kikhawm uh a, a innte uh ah an ne khawmin, lungdamna le kiniamkhiatna tawh a ne ciat uh hi." 
Acts2:47 Pasian phat uh a, khatlekhat thupha kideihsakin a om uh hi. Pasian in nisimin hotkhiatna a ngah mi kibehlapsak tawntung hi." 
Acts3:1 Ni khat, thunget hun nitak nai thum laitakin biakinn ah Peter le Johan a pai uh hi." 
Acts3:2 Kongpi Hoih a kici gei ah a suah tung a kipan a khebai mi khat na om hi. Biakinn ah a pai mite tung panin sum a ngen dingin nisimin hih kongpi gei ah amah hong kikoih zel hi. 
Acts3:3 Peter le Johan, biakinn ah a hong pai a muh ciangin sum a na ngen hi." 
Acts3:4 Amau tegel in tua mipa limtakin en uh a, Peter in, “Kote hong en dih in,” a ci hi." 
Acts3:5 Bang khat peuhpeuh ngah ding, ci-in kilamen ahih manin amaute a en hi." 
Acts3:6 Peter in ama kiangah, “Sum ka nei peuhmah kei hi; ahi zongin ka neih kong pia ding hi. Nazareth khuami Jesu Khris min tawh, dingin lam na pai nadingin thu kong pia hi,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Acts3:7 a taklam khutin lenin kai to a, thakhat thu-in a khe le a siakmitte hong khauh pah hi." 
Acts3:8 Tua ciangin amah hong diangin ding to a, lam a pai kawikawi hi. Tua ciangin biakinn ah amaute zui a, lam paikawm diangkawmin Pasian a phat hi." 
Acts3:9 Mi khempeuh in amah lam pai-in Pasian a phatna mu uh a," 
Acts3:10 biakinn Kongpi Hoih gei ah sum ngenin a tupa hi, ci-in a thei uh hi. Ama tunga thupiang a muh uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts3:11 Tua mipa in Peter le Johan beel cinten a, mi khempeuh in hih thupiang lamdang sa uh ahih manin amauteʼ omna Solomonʼ Talap a kici ah mite a hong tai uh hi." 
Acts3:12 Peter in hih mite a muh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ka mipih Israel mite aw, bang hangin hih thupiang lamdang sa a, bang hangin ko hong hici et na hi uh hiam? Hih mipa lam ka paisak theihna uh, komauʼ vang le komauʼ hoihna hang sa na hi uh hiam?" 
Acts3:13 I pupite Abrahamʼ Pasian, Isaacʼ Pasian le Jakobʼ Pasian in a nasem Jesu tungah ama vangliatna a pia hi. Note in aana neite khut sungah tua Jesu na pia uh a, Pilat mangpa in amah khah dingin a ngaihsut khit nangawnin Pilatʼ maitang mahah amah na nial teitei uh hi." 
Acts3:14 Amah mihoih mi siangtho hi napi-in, amah na nial zawsop uh a, mi that khat a khahkhiat nadingin Pilat kiangah na ngen uh hi." 
Acts3:15 Tua ahih ciangin mite tungah nuntakna a pia pa na that uh a, ahi zongin sihna panin Pasian in amah hingkiksak hi. Ko tegel pen hih thu a thei teci ka hi uh hi." 
Acts3:16 Hih Jesu minʼ vangliatna in hih khebai mipa tungah thahatna a pia ahi hi. Note khempeuh in na theih uh mah bangin hih mipa bangzah takin khebai ahih hangin Jesu upna le ama min hangin hih mipa in dam sianthona a ngah ahi hi. 
Acts3:17 “Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, note le na makaite uh hih bangin Jesu tungah na gamtatna uh na theih lohna hang uh hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Acts3:18 Ama Khris in a thuak nading thu, Pasian in tanglai pekin kamsangte khempeuh tungtawnin gen khol a, tu-in hih bangin a thugen kholhna a hong tungsak ahi hi." 
Acts3:19 Tua ahih ciangin na mawhnate uh hong sawp siangsak theih nading, Topa kiang panin a hong pai lungsim nopna hun na ngah theih nading uh le note adingin a seh sa Jesu Khris a hong sawl theih nadingin na mawhna uh kisik unla, Pasian kiang zuan un." 
Acts3:20  
Acts3:21 Pasian in ama kamsang mi siangthote tungtawnin tanglai-in a gen kholh sa bangin, na khempeuh a thakin a kibawl hun dong mateng vantungah Jesu a om ding ahi hi." 
Acts3:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in, ‘Kei a hong sawl mah bangin note sung mah panin note ading kamsang khat Topa na Pasian un note kiangah hong sawl ding hi. Ama hong thugen khempeuh na mang ding uh hi." 
Acts3:23 Tua kamsang paʼ thugen a mang lo khempeuh, a Jew mipihte kiang panin kikhen khia-in kisusia ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts3:24 Samuel a kipan ama nung a hong piang kamsang khempeuh in tu laitak a thupiangte mah gen khol ciat uh hi. 
Acts3:25 Pasian in Abraham kiangah, ‘Na suan na khakte thupha ka piak bangin leitung mi khempeuh thupha ka pia ding hi,’ ci ahih manin, Pasian in ama kamsangte tungtawnin a thuciamte khempeuh eite ading hi a, Pasian in i pu i pate tawh a thuciamte, eite in zong a ngah ding ihi hi." 
Acts3:26 Eite khempeuh i gitlohna panin kikheelin thupha a hong piak theih nadingin Pasian in a Nasem dingin Jesu teelin, eite kiangah a hong sawl masa ahi hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi."
