Acts4:1 Peter le Johan om khawmin, tua bangin Peter in mite kiangah thu a gen laitakin siampite, biakinn upate le Saddusi mite hong pai uh hi." 
Acts4:2 Hih sawltak nihte in misite thokik ding hi, cih a lahtel nadingun sihna panin Jesu thokik hi, ci-in mite kiangah thu hilh uh ahih manin nawngkai a sa uh hi." 
Acts4:3 Tua ahih manin amau tegel man uh a, ni tum kuan ta ahih manin a zing ciang dong thong sungah a khum uh hi." 
Acts4:4 Ahi zongin amauteʼ thugen a za mi tampi in um uh a, thu um mi tul nga bang a pha ta uh hi." 
Acts4:5 A zing ciangin Jew mi makaite, upate le Thukham hilh siate, Jerusalem ah hong kikhawm uh hi." 
Acts4:6 Siampi lianpen a sem ngei Annas, siampi lianpen a sem Kaiafas, Johan, Alexander le siampi lian pente beh mi khempeuh tawh kikhopna khat a bawl uh hi." 
Acts4:7 Amauteʼ mai ah sawltak tegel dingsak uh a, “Kuaʼ vangliatna le kuaʼ min tawh hih bangin na sem na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Acts4:8 Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin Peter in dawng a, “Makaite le upate aw," 
Acts4:9 hih khebai mipa tungah thuhoih a kibawlna le ama damna thu tawh kisai-in kote thu hong sit na hih uh leh," 
Acts4:10 note in singlamteh tungah na thah uh, Pasian in sihna panin a thawhkiksak Nazareth khuami Jesu Khris min vangliatna tawh hih mipa a ci damin hih lai ah ding ahihna thu, note le Israel mi khempeuh in na theih dingun a kilawm thu khat ahi hi." 
Acts4:11 Lai Siangtho in, ‘No innlamte in na nilkhiat uh suangtum pen innkiu suang bulpi a suak hi,’ ci-in a gen pen hih Jesu ahi hi." 
Acts4:12 Ama hang bek tawh hotkhiatna kingah thei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in hotkhiatna i ngah theih nadingin leitung khempeuh ah Pasian in hong piak min dang khat zong om lo hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts4:13 Uliante in Peter le Johan a han mahmahna thu le amaute pilna sang a nei lo mi mawkmawk ahihna thu a theih uh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesu tawh a kikhawl khin ngeite ahihna uh a phawk uh hi. 
Acts4:14 Ahi zongin a kidamsak mipa pen Peter le Johan-te gei ah om gige ahih manin a nial nading uh thu mu zo lo uh hi. 
Acts4:15 Tua ahih manin tua inn sung panin amaute pusuaksak phot uh a, tua khit ciangin amaute thu kikumin," 
Acts4:16 “Hih mite bang cih ding ihi hiam? Jerusalem khua sunga om mi khempeuh in hih miteʼ bawl a lamdang mahmah nate thei ciat uh a, i nial theih nading bangmah om lo hi." 
Acts4:17 Ahi zongin mite lakah hih thute a kitheihthang thuah loh nadingin, Jesuʼ min tawh kuama kiangah thu a gen ngei nawn loh nadingun taii ni,” a kici uh hi." 
Acts4:18 Tua ciangin sawltakte samkik uh a, Jesuʼ min tawh thugen ahi a, thuhilh ahi zongin a hih nawn het loh nadingun thu a pia uh hi." 
Acts4:19 Ahi zongin Peter le Johan in, “Noteʼ thu man zawk ding le Pasianʼ thu man zawk ding, Pasianʼ muhna panin koi pen man zaw ding cih thu nomau mah in zong ngaihsun ciat un." 
Acts4:20 Tua ahih manin kote in ka muh sa uh le ka zak sa uh thute gen loin ka om thei kei ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts4:21 Ahi zongin uliante in a khauh zaw-in thu a gen khit uh ciangin a khah uh hi. Hih thupiang hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian phat uh ahih manin hih mite gim a piak nading uh a thu mu thei lo uh hi. 
Acts4:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih nalamdang a kibawlna mipa pen a khan kum sawm li val a pha khin sa mi khat ahi hi. 
Acts4:23 Peter le Johan a kikhahkhiat khit phetin a lawmte uh kiangah pai-in siampi liante le upate in amaute tungah a thugente khempeuh a zasak uh hi. 
Acts4:24 A lawmte un hih thu a zak uh ciangin a vekpi-un lungsim kikhatin Pasianʼ kiangah thu ngen uh a, “Vanlelei, tuipi tuineu le a sunga om khempeuh a piangsak Topa aw," 
Acts4:25 koteʼ pupi, na nasem pa David tungah na Kha Siangtho tawh thu na gen a, amah in, ‘Bang hangin Gentail mite heh mahmah a, a tangtung lo dingpi vaihawm uh ahi hiam?" 
Acts4:26 Topa le ama Khris a do dingin leitung kumpite kithawi uh a, gam ukte kikaikhawm uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts4:27 A cih mah bangin Herod le Pontias Pilat in hih khuapi sung teek mahah Gentail mite le Israel mite tawh kikupna nei uh a, nangmah in Khris dingin na bawl, a siangtho na Nasem pa Jesu thah dingin a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts4:28 Nangmah in na deihna bangin a piang dingin na vangliatna tawh na khensat sa thu khempeuh a sem dingin amaute kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts4:29 Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, amaute in kote hong tawnnate thei inla, nangma nasem kote in lungsim han mahmahna tawh nangma thu ka gen theih nadingun hong huh in." 
Acts4:30 Cinate damsak theih nading vangliatna hong pia inla, a siangtho na Nasem pa Jesuʼ min tawh nalamdang kibawl tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts4:31 Tua bangin thu a nget khit uh ciangin amauteʼ kikhopna mun hong kiliing gawp hi. Amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidim uh a, hang takin Pasianʼ thu gen ding a kipan uh hi." 
Acts4:32 Thu um mi khempeuh a lungsim uh le a ngaihsutna uh kikhat uh a, kuamah in ama neihsa kei-aʼ tuam ci loin, a neih khempeuh uh a neikhawm ciat uh hi." 
Acts4:33 Topa Jesuʼ thawhkikna thu, sawltakte in vangliatna tawh teci pang uh a, Pasian in amaute khempeuh tungah thupha tampi a pia hi." 
Acts4:34 Inn ahi a, lo ahi zongin a neite in zuak uh a, a sum ngahte uh sawltakte kiangah a ap uh hi. Mi khempeuh tungah a kisapna bang ciat un a sumte hawm uh ahih manin amaute lakah sum kitangsam kuamah om lo uh hi." 
Acts4:35  
Acts4:36 Tua hi a, Saipras tuikulh a suak, Levi mi Josef, sawltakte in Barnabas (Hanthawn Siampa a cihnopna) min a phuah pa in," 
Acts4:37 ama neih a lo zuak a, a sum hong paipihin sawltakte khut sungah a ap hi." 
Acts5:1 Ahi zongin Ananias a kici pasal khat le a zi Sapfira a kici, nupa kop khat om uh hi. A neihsa uh pawl khat zuak uh a," 
Acts5:2 ahi zongin a zi tawh thukimin a sumte pawl khat im-in, a dang teng sawltakte kiangah a va ap hi." 
Acts5:3 Peter in, “Ananias aw, bang hangin Satanʼ thu-in gamta a, na lo zuak man sumte pawl khat kem simin, Kha Siangtho khem na hi hiam?" 
Acts5:4 Tua lo na zuak ma-in nangma aʼ hi a, na zuak khit ciangin a sum zong nangma aʼ mah ahi hi. Tua hi napi-in bang hangin tua bangin gamtat ding ngaihsun peuhmah na hi hiam? Mite a khem hi loin Pasian a khem na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:5 Ananias in hih thu a zak phetin thakhatin si-in puk suk pah a, hih thu a za mi khempeuh a lau mahmah uh hi." 
Acts5:6 Tua ciangin tangvalte hong kipanin puan tawh a luang tun uh a, pua khia-in a va vui uh hi." 
Acts5:7 Tua khit nai thum bang ding ciangin a zi hong pai a, ahi zongin tua lai-a thupiang bangmah thei lo hi." 
Acts5:8 Peter in tua nu kiangah, “Nang le na pasal in na lo zuak man uh sum pen a vekpi-in hih zah mah ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” ci-in a dong hi. Amah in, “Hi hi, tua zah mah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts5:9 Tua ciangin Peter in tua nu kiangah, “Bang dingin na nupa-un Topaʼ Kha Siangtho ze-et ding thukim khawm na hi uh hiam? En in, na pasal a vuite kongkhak gei mahmah ah om uh a, nang zong hong pua khia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:10 Amah zong thakhat thu-in si-in Peter khe kiangah a puk suk hi. Tua ciangin tangvalte hong lut uh a, a sih khit lam a muh uh ciangin pua khia-in a pasalʼ gei ah a phum uh hi." 
Acts5:11 Pawlpi mi khempeuh le hih thu a za mi khempeuhte nakpi takin a lau uh hi. 
Acts5:12 Sawltakte in mite lakah lim le nalamdang tampi a bawl uh hi. Thu um mi khempeuh Solomonʼ Talap ah kikhawmin a om uh hi. 
Acts5:13 Midangte in thupi sa-in hoih sa mahmah uh a, ahi zongin amaute pawlpih taktak ngam lo uh hi." 
Acts5:14 Topaʼ thu a um numei pasal tampi tak hong kibeh laplap uh hi. 
Acts5:15 Hih bangin sawltakteʼ nasepna hangin kongzing ah cinate hong kipua a, Peter hong pai ciangin a liim in cinate a liah khak theih nading deihin a lupna le a lupna pheekte uh tawh lam gei ah a koih uh hi." 
Acts5:16 Jerusalem khua kiim a om khuapite panin mite hong pai-in, cinate le dawivei mite hong paipih uh a, a vekpi-in damna a ngah uh hi." 
Acts5:17 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa le amah tawh a kipawl tua lai-a Saddusi mite in sawltakte haza-in thangpai uh ahih manin thu bawl ding a ngaihsun uh hi. 
Acts5:18 Tua ahih manin sawltakte manin thong sungah a khum uh hi. 
Acts5:19 Ahi zongin tua zanin Topaʼ vantungmi khat in thong kongkhakte hong a, sawltakte a paikhiatpih khit ciangin amaute kiangah," 
Acts5:20 “Biakinn ah pai unla, hih nuntak thakna thu mite kiangah va gen un,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Acts5:21 Ama gen mah bangin sawltakte zong zingsang ciangin biakinn ah pai-in thuhilh ding a kipan uh hi. Siampi lianpen pa le ama kikholhpihte in ulian kikhopna a cingtaak khat a om theih nadingin Jew mi upa khempeuh a kikhop nadingun a sam uh hi. Tua khit ciangin thong panin sawltakte va kai-in uliante mai ah a hong paipih nadingun palikte a sawl uh hi. 
Acts5:22 Ahi zongin thong ah palikte a va tun uh ciangin sawltakte na om lo hi. Tua ahih manin uliante kiangah kilehkikin," 
Acts5:23 “Thongah ka tun uh ciangin a kongkhakte limtak mahin tawh kikalh a, thongcingte in zong kongpi ah limtak mahin a na cing ka mu uh hi. Ahi zongin thong kong ka hon uh ciangin a sungah kuamah na om lo hi,” ci-in a zasak uh hi." 
Acts5:24 Biakinn ukpa le siampi liante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hih sawltakte a bangci thu hi ding hiam, ci-in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts5:25 Tua laitakin mi khat hong pai-in amaute kiangah, “Thong sungah na khum uh mite in tu mahmah in biakinn sungah thuhilhin om uh hi,” ci-in a hong gen hi." 
Acts5:26 Tua ciangin biakinn ukpa le a mite va pai-in sawltakte hong paipihkik uh hi. Mihonte in suang tawh amaute a den gawp khak ding lau uh ahih manin sawltakte ngongbawl loin thudam tawh a paipih uh hi. 
Acts5:27 Tua ciangin uliante mai ah sawltakte dingsak uh a, siampi lianpen pa in sawltakte kiangah thu genin," 
Acts5:28 “Hih mipaʼ min tawh thu na hilh nawn loh nadingun khauh takin thu kong pia uh hi. Tu-in na gamtatna sate uh thei un. Jerusalem khua sung khempeuh ah thu na genthang uh a, ama sihna pen kote nong ngawh nuam uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts5:29 Ahi zongin Peter le sawltak dangte in, “Miteʼ thu sangin Pasianʼ thu ka mang zaw ding uh hi." 
Acts5:30 Note in singlamteh tungah Jesu khai-in na thah khit uh ciangin i pu i pateʼ Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak khinzo hi. 
Acts5:31 Israel mite kisikkikin Pasian in a mawhna uh a maisak theih nadingin Ukpi le Honpa-in tua Jesu bawlin ama tak lamah a tusak hi. 
Acts5:32 Hih thute thei-in teci a pangte pen ko sawltakte bek hi loin Kha Siangtho tawh zong ka hi uh a, tua Kha Siangtho pen amah a um mite tungah Pasian in a khongin a piak ahi hi,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi." 
Acts5:33 Uliante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh ahih manin sawltakte thah dingin a ngaihsun uh hi. 
Acts5:34 Ahi zongin amaute sung panin Farisi mi Gamaliel, Thukham hilh sia khat ahi, mi khempeuh in zong a zahtak bawl mipa khat hong dinga, tawl khat sung sawltakte a kipusuah pih nadingin thu pia a," 
Acts5:35 tua khit ciangin a lawm uliante kiangah, “Israel mite aw, hih mite na bawl nading uh tawh kisai-in limtakin kidawm un." 
Acts5:36 Tu ma lam tawl khat lai-in Thudas a kici mi khat hong khang hi. Mi lian khat ka hi hi, ci-in gen a, mihing za li ding bang in amah pawlpih uh hi. Ahi zongin amah kithatin, a nungzui khempeuh kithehthang a, ama vai bei ta hi." 
Acts5:37 Hih thu a pian khit ciangin, mi bangzah pha hiam, ci-in gam sung mi khempeuh a kisim laitakin Galilee mi Judas a kici mi khat hong khang leuleu a, amah in zong nungzui mihonpi mah a nei hi. Amah zong kithat leuleu a, a nungzuite kithehthangin maimang hi." 
Acts5:38 Tu-in zong tua bangmahin thu hong piang leuleu hi. Note kiangah kong gen nop thu in: Hih mite bangmah cih kei unla, hici omsak lel un. Mihingteʼ bawl tawm vaihawmna ahihleh ama thu-in hong bei lel ding hi." 
Acts5:39 Ahi zongin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai thu ahihleh na zo zo ngei kei ding uh hi. Pasian tawh a kido na hi ding uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts5:40 Tua ahih manin uliante in Gamalielʼ thugen a mang uh hi. Sawltakte samkiksak uh a, a sat khit uh ciangin Jesuʼ min tawh thu a hilhkik ngei loh nadingun thu a pia uh hi. Tua khit ciangin sawltakte a khah uh hi." 
Acts5:41 Uliante omna panin sawltakte paikhia uh a, Jesuʼ hangin mindaina a thuak dingin Pasian in kilawm hong sa hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Acts5:42 Nisimin biakinn sung le mite inn ah thu hilh uh a, Jesu, Khris hi, cih Lungdamna Thu a gengen uh hi." 
Acts6:1 Tua khit ciangin thu um mi hong tam tektek a, Jew mite le Grik pau a zang Jew mite kikalah kiphunsanna thu hong om hi. Grik pau a zang Jew mite in, “Annek tui dawn, sumlepai hawmna ah ka meigong numeite uh hong kipiaksak lo hi,” ci-in lungkim lo uh hi." 
Acts6:2 Tua ahih manin sawltak sawm le nihte in thu um mi khempeuh samin kaikhawm uh a, “Kote in Pasianʼ thu hilh ding don man lo liangin an nek tui dawn sumlepai vai ah kong manlah ding uh kilawm lo hi." 
Acts6:3 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, note lak panin pilna le Kha Siangtho a nei mihing sagih hong kiteng khia unla, hih thute a vaihawm dingin i koih ding hi." 
Acts6:4 Tua hileh kote in ka hun khempeuh uh thungetna le thuhilhna-in kong zang thei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts6:5 A vekpi-un sawltakteʼ thugente thukimpih uh ahih manin, Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin upna a nei Stefen, Filip, Prokhoras, Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas le Antiok khua pan Gentail mi ahi Jew biakna a zui Nikolas a teel uh hi." 
Acts6:6 Amaute in sawltakte kiangah hih mite paipih uh a, sawltakte in a lu tung uh ah a khut uh nga-in thu a ngetsak uh hi." 
Acts6:7 Tua bangin Pasianʼ thu kizelin hong khang semsem hi. Jerusalem khua sungah thu um mi tampi tak hong kibehlap a, siampi tampi tak in zong Lungdamna Thu a hong um uh hi." 
Acts6:8 Pasian in Stefenʼ tungah thupha tampi tak pia-in vangliatna lianpi neisak a, amah in mite lakah lim le nalamdang lian pipi a bawl hi." 
Acts6:9 Ahi zongin mi pawl khat in Stefen langpan uh hi. Tua mite pen mite in, “Sal Suakta Mite,” a cihte pawl uh hi a, Sairin khua le Alexandria khua panin a hong pai Jew mite ahi uh hi. Hih Jew mite, Silisia le Asia gam pan a hong pai Jew mite tawh kipawlin Stefen tawh thu kiseel dingin hong kipan uh hi." 
Acts6:10 Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho in Stefen tungah pilna guan ahih manin amaute in thusel zo lo uh hi. 
Acts6:11 Tua ciangin amaute in mi cialin sumgolh pia uh a, “Moses le Pasian langpangin thu a genna ka za uh hi,” cisak uh hi." 
Acts6:12 Amaute in hih bangin zuauna tawh mihonte, upate le Thukham hilh siate a holhthawh uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute hong pai-in Stefen man uh a, uliante mai ah a hong paipih uh hi." 
Acts6:13 Tua ciangin zuau thu a gen dingin mi pawl khat hong paipih uh a, “Hih mipa in a siangtho i biakinnpi le Moses Thukham gensia tawntung hi." 
Acts6:14 Hih Nazareth khuami Jesu in biakinnpi phel gawpin, Moses tung pek panin a hong kipan ngeina khempeuh khel mang ding hi, ci-in a thuhilhna ka za uh hi,” a cisak uh hi." 
Acts6:15 Ulian kikhopna sunga a kihel mi khempeuh in Stefen en uh a, a maitang pen vantungmi maitang tawh kibang hi, ci-in a mu kim uh hi." 
Acts7:1 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa in Stefen kiangah, “Tu-a amauteʼ gen bang takpi mah ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Acts7:2 Stefen in, “Ute pate aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. I pupi Abraham, Haran khua ah a tenma, Mesopotamia gamah a om lai-in, ama kiangah a minthang Pasian kilang a," 
Acts7:3 ‘Na gam na lei, na beh na phungte kiang panin paikhia inla, nangma tungah kong lah ding gamah pai in,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:4 Amah zong Khaldea gam panin pai khia-in Haran khua ah teeng hi. A pa a sih khit ciangin Pasian in tu-a na teenna uh hih gamah amah na lalsak leuleu hi. 
Acts7:5 Pasian in Abraham tungah ama aituam dingin leitang khut peek cia nangawn pia lo napi-in, amah le a suan a khakte tungah hih gam a piak nading thu a ciam hi. Pasian in tua thuciamna a piak laitakin Abraham in ta nei nai lo hi." 
Acts7:6 Tua bang hi napi-in, Pasian in Abraham kiangah, ‘Na suan na khakte amauʼ leitang ahi lo gam dangah salin om ding uh a, tua lai ah amaute kum za li sung nakpi takin gimna thuak ding uh hi." 
Acts7:7 Ahi zongin sila-in a nei gam mite tungah thu ka khen dinga, na suan na khakte tua gam panin pai khia-in hih lai gamah kei hong bia ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:8 Tua ciangin Pasian in Abraham tungah kiciamna limin vun-atna ngeina na pia hi. Tua ahih manin Abraham in a tapa Isaac a suah zawh nipikal khat khit ciangin a vun at a, Isaac in a tapa Jakobʼ vun at leuleu a, Jakob in eiteʼ pupite ahi a tapa sawm le nihteʼ vun na at leuleu hi." 
Acts7:9 “I pupi dangte in Josef na haza uh a, mi tungah na zuakin, a leite in Egypt gamah sal dingin a na zuak sawn uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in i pupi Josef na huh a," 
Acts7:10 a thuakna khempeuh panin na hon khia hi. Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ mai ah Josef a tun ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pilna le a deihhuai gamtat hoih na guan hi. Tua ahih manin Faro in ama khutnuai ah a gam a uk sawn ding le a kumpi inn sung khempeuh a van dingin a koih hi. 
Acts7:11 Tua ciangin Egypt gam le Kanaan gam khempeuh ah kialpi tung a, mi khempeuh in haksatna thuak uh ahih manin i pupite in zong annek ding mu zo nawn lo uh hi." 
Acts7:12 Tua ahih manin Egypt gamah an om hi, ci-in Jakob in thu a zak ciangin i pupite ahi a tapate a khat veina na na paisak hi." 
Acts7:13 A nih veina a pai uh ciangin a sanggamte tungah i pupi Josef na kipulak a, tua hun a kipanin Faro in zong Josef innkuan sung thu na thei hi." 
Acts7:14 Tua ciangin Josef in a pa Jakob kiangah mi sawl a, amah a kipan a innkuan mi khempeuh Egypt ah a pai nadingun a gensak hi. Tua hun laitakin Jakob innkuan mi sawm sagih le nga pha uh hi." 
Acts7:15 Tua ahih manin Jakob zong Egypt gamah pai a, amah a kipan i pupite khempeuh tua gamah a si uh hi." 
Acts7:16 Amauʼ luanghawmte, Shekhem khua ah kipua a, Abraham in Hamor-te beh tung panin han dingin sum tawh a lei leitang ah kiphum hi." 
Acts7:17 “Pasian in Abraham tungah a thuciamna a tunsak ding a nai kuan ciangin Egypt gamah ei mite tampi tak na pha ta uh hi. 
Acts7:18 A tawpna ah Josef a thei lo kumpi dang khat, Egypt gam sung a uk dingin hong kipan hi." 
Acts7:19 I mipihte na khem gawpin na khelbawl a, a ta ngeekte uh a sih nadingin inn panin mun dangah a koih khiasak hi." 
Acts7:20 Hih hunin naungek melhoih mahmah khat na suak hi. Inn ah kha thum sung kikem a," 
Acts7:21 inn panin a kikoihkhiat ciangin Faroʼ tanu in a ta dingin la a, ama tapa bang teekteek mahin bawlin a khansuah hi." 
Acts7:22 Egypt gam sunga pilna om khempeuh ama tungah kihilh a, thugenna le nasepna ah mi lian mahmah khat a suak hi." 
Acts7:23 “Amah kum sawm li a phak ciangin Israelʼ suan a mipihte lakah pai nopna lungsim a nei hi. 
Acts7:24 Tua bangin a mipihte lakah a va pai ciangin Egypt mite khat in a Israel mipihte khat a bawlsiatna mu a, a mipih pa a hutna-in Egypt mipa a sat lum hi." 
Acts7:25 Amah pen eite hong hon khia dingin Pasian in a zat ding mipa hi, ci-in a mipihte in a thei ding sa a, ahi zongin a mipihte in na thei lo uh hi." 
Acts7:26 A zing ciangin Israel mi nih a kilaii mu leuleu a, amaute a phelh dingin kipanin, ‘Lawmte aw, minam khat hi lo na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin khatlekhat tua ci kibawl na hi uh hiam?’ ci hi." 
Acts7:27 A lawmpa a bawlsia pa in Moses sawn khia-in, ‘Kote a hong uk ding le thu a hong khen dingin kua in nang hong koih ahi hiam?" 
Acts7:28 Zan a Egypt mipa na thah bangin kei zong thah hong sawm na hi hiam?’ a na ci hi. 
Acts7:29 Moses in hih thu a zak ciangin Egypt gam panin tai khia-in Midian gamah ten ding kipan a, tua gamah tapa nih a nei hi." 
Acts7:30 “Tua gamah kum sawm li a teen khit ciangin, Sinai Mual tung gamlak ah sawlpang kawm, meikuang sung panin vantungmi khat ama kiangah hong kilang hi." 
Acts7:31 Moses in a muh ciangin lamdang sa a, a nai takin a muh theih nadingin sawlpang kuang kiangah a va pai hi. Ahi zongin Topaʼ awging za a," 
Acts7:32 ‘Kei pen na pu na pate uh ahi Abraham, Isaac le Jakob-teʼ Pasian ka hi hi,’ a na ci hi. Moses zong lau-in liing gawp a, en ngam lo hi." 
Acts7:33 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, ‘Na dinna mun pen a siangtho leitang ahih manin na khedap suah in." 
Acts7:34 Ka mite in Egypt gamah bawlsiatna a thuaknate teltakin ka mu khin hi. Amauteʼ tauna awging ka za a, amaute a hon khia dingin a hong pai suk ka hi hi. Hih lai ah hong pai in; Egypt gamah nang ka hong paisak ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Acts7:35 “Moses pen Israel mite in deih loin, ‘Kote a hong uk ding le thu a hong khen dingin kua in hong koih ahi hiam?’ a cih pa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin Moses pen sawlpang kuang sung pan ama kiangah a kilang vantungmiʼ huhna tawh ukpa le hon khia pa ahi dingin Pasian in a sawl pa ahi hi." 
Acts7:36 Amah in Egypt gam le San Tuipi ah lim le nalamdangte bawlin, Egypt gam panin Israel mite paikhiatpih a, gamlak ah kum sawm li sung amaute a makaih hi." 
Acts7:37 Hih Moses pen Israel mite tungah, ‘Pasian in kei hong sawl mah bangin, i mipihte sung mah panin note ading kamsang khat hong sawl ding hi,’ a ci pa ahi hi." 
Acts7:38 Amah pen Israel mite tawh gamlak ah a om pa hi a, Sinai Mual tunga ama kiangah thu a gen vantungmi le i pute tawh a kikhawl pa ahi hi. Eite tungah hong gen sawn dingin Pasian kiang panin a tul ngei lo thu a ngah ahi hi." 
Acts7:39 “Ahi zongin i pute in ama thu na mang nuam loin, amah na nawlkhiin uh a, Egypt gamah ciahkik nopna lungsim na nei uh hi." 
Acts7:40 Tua ahih manin amaute in Aaron kiangah, ‘Egypt gam panin eite a hong paikhiatpih tua Moses tungah bang thu piang hiam cih thei lo ihih manin, eiteʼ mai ah i paisak ding milim pasian pawl khat hong bawlsak in,’ ci uh hi." 
Acts7:41 Tua ahih manin amaute in bawng no tawh a kibang lim khat bawl uh a, ganhing tawh tua milim bia-in, amauteʼ bawl tawm pasian hangin lungdamin pawi a na bawl uh hi." 
Acts7:42 Tua ahih manin kamsangte laibu sungah, ‘Israel mite aw, gamlak ah kum sawm li sung, gan go-in biakna na piakte uh kei tunga nong piak uh hi lo hi. Note in na puak uh puanbuk pen Molok pasian milim puanbuk le noteʼ aksi pasian Refanʼ puanbuk ahi hi. Tuate pen na biak dingun noteʼ bawl tawm milim ahih manin Babylon khuapi khen pekah salin ka hong paisak ding hi,’ ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Pasian in amaute nungngat a, van a om aksite a bia dingin amaute a sawl khia hi." 
Acts7:43  
Acts7:44 “Gamlak ah a om lai-un i pute in Pasianʼ ompihna puanbuk nei uh a, Pasian in Moses tungah a gen sa, a lim ding a lah sa bang teekteekin a kibawl ahi hi." 
Acts7:45 Tua khit ciangin i pute in amauʼ pate tung panin a ngah uh tua puanbuk pen amauʼ ten nading gam a la dingin a kuan uh ciangin na pua uh a, Pasian in amauteʼ mai ah tua gam mite hawl khiatsak ahih manin tua gam a luah uh ciangin a puanbuk zong a na tunpih uh hi. Tua ahih manin Davidʼ hun ciang dong tua puanbuk na om hi." 
Acts7:46 David in Pasianʼ maipha ngah ahih manin, Jakob Pasian adingin biakinn khat a vaihawmsak nadingin Pasian kiangah a ngen hi." 
Acts7:47 Ahi zongin Pasian adingin biakinn a lamsak pen David hi loin a tapa Solomon ahi hi. 
Acts7:48 Ahi zongin kamsang pa in, ‘Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung pen keima tokhom hi a, leitung zong ka khengakna mun ahi hi. Kei ading bang biakinn hong lamsak thei dinga, ka om nading koi lai mun hi thei ding ahi hiam? Hih nate khempeuh keima bawl sa hi lo ahi hiam, ci hi,’ ci-in a gen mah bangin mihingteʼ lam sa inn sungah a Lianpen Pasian a teeng hi lo hi." 
Acts7:49  
Acts7:50  
Acts7:51 “Na lungsim uh khauh mahmah a, lawki lungsim paii-in, Pasianʼ thu ah bilngong na bang uh hi. I pu i pate mah bangin Kha Siangtho thu na mang nuam kei uh hi." 
Acts7:52 I pu i pate in kamsang a bawlsiat loh khat beek om lo hi. Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamta a Nasem pa a hong pai nading thu a gen khol Pasianʼ kamtaite na that uh a, tu-in note in tua nasem pa leh hekin na that leuleu uh hi." 
Acts7:53 Note in vantungmi tungtawnin Pasianʼ hong piak thukham ngah napi-in na mang nuam kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:54 A kikhawm uliante in Stefenʼ thugen a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin heh uh a, a ha uh gawi san uh hi." 
Acts7:55 Ahi zongin Stefen ahihleh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin vantung lam en to a, Pasianʼ minthanna vang le Pasianʼ tak lamah Jesu a ding mu ahih manin," 
Acts7:56 “En un! Vantung kihong a, Pasianʼ tak lamah Mihing Tapa a ding ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:57 Ahi zongin amaute in a bil uh hum sanin nakpi takin kiko-in Stefen bawhhuan uh a," 
Acts7:58 khua pua lamah kai khia-in suang gol pipi a khiat uh hi. Hih thu ah teci pangin Stefen a deng mite in a puan tungsilh uh suahin Saul a kici tangval khat kiangah lawnin a kemsak uh hi. 
Acts7:59 Tua bangin suang a khiat thuahthuah laitakun Stefen in thu ngen a, “Topa Jesu aw, ka kha hong la in,” a ci hi." 
Acts7:60 Tua ciangin amah kunin nakpi takin kiko a, “Topa aw, hih miteʼ mawhna na maisak in,” a cih khit ciangin a si ta hi." 
Acts8:1 Hih Stefen thahna thu ah Saul in zong thukimpih hi. Tua ni a kipanin Jerusalem khua-a om pawlpite in nakpi takin bawlsiatna thuak ding kipan uh hi. Sawltakte sim loh, thu um midang khempeuh, Judea gam le Samaria gamah kithehthang gawp uh hi." 
Acts8:1 Hih Stefen thahna thu ah Saul in zong thukimpih hi. Tua ni a kipanin Jerusalem khua-a om pawlpite in nakpi takin bawlsiatna thuak ding kipan uh hi. Sawltakte sim loh, thu um midang khempeuh, Judea gam le Samaria gamah kithehthang gawp uh hi." 
Acts8:2 Thu um mi pawl khat in Stefen vui uh a, nakpi takin dahin a kap uh hi." 
Acts8:3 Ahi zongin Saul in pawlpi suksiat ding hanciam a, inn khat pan inn khat ah pai kawikawi-in, thu um numei le pasalte kai-in thong sungah a khia hi." 
Acts8:4 Tua bangin a kithehthang mite pai kawikawi-in thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts8:5 Filip zong Samaria gam khuapi ah pai-in Khris thu a hilh hi. 
Acts8:6 Mihonte in Filip’ thugen le a nalamdang bawlte a muh uh ciangin a thugen khempeuh limtakin a ngai uh hi. 
Acts8:7 Mi tampite sung panin dawite nakpi takin kiko-in paikhia uh a, khut zaw khe zaw mite zong kidamsak hi." 
Acts8:8 Tua ahih manin tua khuapi sunga om mite lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts8:9 Tua khua sungah Simon a kici mi khat om a, amah mitphial bawl siampi hi a, Samaria mite in lamdang sa mahmah uh hi. Amah mi lian mahmah khatin kigen a," 
Acts8:10 tua khua sunga om mi lian mi neu a om khempeuh in a thu limtakin ngai-in, “Vanglian Pa,” a kici Pasian pen amah ahi hi, a ci uh hi." 
Acts8:11 Amah in sau veipi sung mitphial bawl a, mite in lamdang sa mahmah uh ahih manin a thu a um uh hi." 
Acts8:12 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ Ukna Lungdamna Thu le Jesu Khris thu, Filip’ gente a up uh ciangin, numei pasal a um khempeuh tui a kiphum uh hi." 
Acts8:13 Simon mahmah in zong um a, tui a kiphum khit ciangin Filip zui tawntung a, lim le nalamdang lianpipite a bawl a muh ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah hi." 
Acts8:14 Samaria mite in Pasianʼ thu a san khitna uh, Jerusalem-a om sawltakte in a zak uh ciangin amaute kiangah Peter le Johan a paisak uh hi." 
Acts8:15 Amaute a tun uh ciangin tua lai-a om thu um mite in Kha Siangtho a ngah nadingun thu a ngetsak uh hi. 
Acts8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Topa Jesu min tawh a kituiphum hi pan bek uh a, amaute khat beek in Kha Siangtho ngah nai lo uh hi." 
Acts8:17 Peter le Johan in amaute lu tungah a khut uh a ngak khit uh ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngah uh hi. 
Acts8:18 Sawltakte in amaute tungah a khut uh a ngak ciangin Kha Siangtho a ngahna uh mu ahih manin Simon in Peter le Johan kiangah sum pia a," 
Acts8:19 “Kei zong ka khut ka ngakna mi peuhpeuh in Kha Siangtho a ngah theih nadingin hih bang vangliatna kei zong hong pia un,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:20 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Pasianʼ piakkhong na pen sum tawh lei theih dingin ngaihsun na hih manin na sum teng tawh si khawm in." 
Acts8:21 Pasian in na lungsim man hong sa lo ahih manin koteʼ nasepna ah nang nong kihel thei kei ding hi. 
Acts8:22 Tua ahih manin na ngaihsut hoih lohna panin kisikkik inla, hih bang na ngaihsutna thu ah na mawhna hong maisak theih nadingin Topa kiangah thu ngen in." 
Acts8:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in en luatna lungsim nei-in, mawhna in hong valhcip mi khat na hih lamtak ka hong thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:24 Tua ciangin Simon in Peter le Johan kiangah, “Tu-a na thugente uh kei tungah khat beek hong tun loh nadingin thu hong ngetsak un,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:25 Amaute in Jesu Khris thu a theihte uh genin Topaʼ thugente a hilh khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khua ah a ciahkik uh hi. A ciahkik kawmun Samaria khua neu lampite ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts8:26 Topaʼ vantungmi khat in Filip kiangah, “Kithawi inla, Jerusalem khua panin Gaza khua paina lampi zuan dingin leitaw lam manawhin pai in,” a ci hi. (Tua lampi tu-in kizang pha nawn lo hi.)" 
Acts8:27 Filip zong kithawi-in a pai hi. Lampi ah Ethiopia mi mang lian khat tawh kituak hi. Tua mangpa pen Ethiopia kumpinu Kandeis khutnuai-a mang lian khat hi a, kumpinu neihsa khempeuh a ukpa ahi hi. Jerusalem khua ah Pasian bia dingin a va pai hi a," 
Acts8:28 inn zuan dingin leeng sungah a tuan kawmin kamsang Isaiah laibu a sim hi. 
Acts8:29 Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho in Filip kiangah, “Pai inla tua leeng mai ah va om in,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Acts8:30 Filip zong ama kiangah va tai a, kamsang Isaiah laibu a simna za ahih manin, “Na laisim a khiatna na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts8:31 Amah in, “Mi khatpeuh in hong hilh tel lohpi-in bangci theih ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in dawng a, ama leeng tungah Filip a tuang dingin a sam hi." 
Acts8:32 Tua a sim Lai Siangtho mun pen, “A kigo dingin a kikai tuuno ham lo a, a mul a kimeetsak tuuno a ham loh mah bangin, amah kam khat beek pau lo hi." 
Acts8:33 Mite in amah simmawh bawl gawp a, amah a huh kuamah om lo hi. Ama nuntakna leitungah bei ahih manin, a suan a khakteʼ thu, ci-a gen ding om lo hi,” ci-in a kigelhna mun ahi hi." 
Acts8:34 Tua ciangin mangpa in Filip kiangah, “Hih kamsang pa in amah a kicihna ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh midang khatpeuh a cihna ahi hiam, hong gen dih in,” a ci hi." 
Acts8:35 Filip zong a kam ka-in thugen ding kipan a, tua a Lai Siangtho simna mun a kipanin Jesu thu ciang dong a gen hi." 
Acts8:36 Lampi ah a pai laitakun tui omna mun tung uh a, mangpa in, “Hih lai ah tui om hi. Tui kiphum nuam peuh leng kuaʼn hong kham thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts8:37 Filip in, “Na lungsim takpi tawh na up nakleh tui na kiphum thei ding hi,” a cih ciangin, “Jesu Khris pen Pasianʼ Tapa hi, ci-in ka um hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts8:38 Tua ciangin a leeng a khawlsak nadingin mangpa in thu pia a, Filip tawh a nihun tui phualah pai-in Filip in amah a tuiphum hi." 
Acts8:39 Tui sung panin a paikhiat khit uh ciangin Topaʼ Kha Siangtho in Filip paikhiatpih hi. Mangpa in Filip mu nawn lo hi; ahi zongin lungdam takin a lampai a zom hi. 
Acts8:40 Tua ciangin Filip pen Azotas khua ah a om ahih lamtak amah kiphawk a, tua khua a kipanin Sisaria khua a tun dongin khua khempeuh ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh hi." 
Acts9:1 Tua hun sungteng Saul in Topaʼ thu a um mite thah dingin a hanciamna zom lai hi. Siampi lianpen pa kiangah pai a," 
Acts9:2 Topaʼ thu a zui mi numei pasal a muh peuhpeuh manin Jerusalem khua ah a ciahpih theih nadingin Damaskas khua-a Jew mi kikhopna inn ukte kiangah a lah dingin lai a ngen hi. 
Acts9:3 Damaskas khua a zuan dingin pai a, a tun dektak ciangin thakhat thu-in van panin ama kimkot ah a hong taangzaih khat a om hi." 
Acts9:4 Saul, leilak ah puk suk a, tua laitakin awging khat in ama kiangah, “Saul, Saul aw, bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts9:5 Saul in, “Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Na hong bawlsiat Jesu ka hi hi." 
Acts9:6 Ahi zongin tho-in khuapi sungah lut in; tua lai panin na gamtatna ding teng hong kigen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:7 Saul tawh a tonkhawm mite in a awging a zak uh hangin kuamah mu lo uh ahih manin lamdang sa lua-in pau thei lo liangin a om uh hi. 
Acts9:8 Saul zong leilak panin tho to a, a mit a hah hangin khua mu thei lo hi. Tua ahih manin a kikholhpihte in a khutin lenin Damaskas khua ah a paipih uh hi." 
Acts9:9 Ni thum sung khua mu thei loin, anletui zong a ne kei hi." 
Acts9:10 Tua laitakin Damaskas khua ah Ananias min nei thu um mi khat a om hi. Amah in maang mu a, a mang sungah Topa in, “Ananias aw,” ci-in a sam hi. Ananias in, “Topa aw, ka om hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts9:11 Tua ciangin Topa in Ananias kiangah, “Kithawi-in Kongzing Tang gei-a Judas inn ah va pai inla, Tarsas khuami Saul min nei mi khat va kan in. Tua Saul in thu ngen a," 
Acts9:12 khua a muhkik theih nadingin Ananias min nei mi khat hong pai-in ama lu tungah a khut a ngakna thu, a maang muhna sungah a mu hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:13 Ahi zongin Ananias in, “Topa aw, hih mipa in Jerusalem khua-a om nangma mite a bawlsiatna thu khempeuh, mi tampi tak in kei tungah hong gen khinzo uh hi." 
Acts9:14 Tu-in zong nangmah a hong bia mi khempeuh a mat theih nadingin siampi liante tung panin thu a ngah khit ciangin Damaskas khua ah a hong tung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:15 Ahi zongin Topa in Ananias kiangah, “Gentail mite, kumpite le Israel mite tungah keima min a kitheisak ding, keima na a sem dingin teel khin ka hih manin ama kiangah va pai in." 
Acts9:16 Keima hangin a thuak ding thu khempeuh zong, kei mahmah in ama tungah ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:17 Tua ahih manin Ananias zong pai a, inn sungah a lut khit ciangin Saul lu tungah a khut nga a, “Sanggam Saul aw, hih lai ah nong pai lai-in nangma tungah a hong kilang Jesu mahmah in kei hong sawl hi. Nangmah in khua mu theikikin, Kha Siangtho tawh na kidim theih nadingin nangma kiangah a hong paisak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts9:18 Tua laitakin Saulʼ mit panin ngasa lip tawh a kibang na pawl khat kia a, khua a mukik thei hi. Saul zong tui kiphum pah a," 
Acts9:19 an a nek khit ciangin a tha hong hatkik hi. Damaskas khua ah a om thu um mite tawh tawl khat sung a om khawm hi. 
Acts9:20 Kikhopna innte ah va pai-in, “Jesu pen Pasianʼ Tapa ahi hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding a kipan hi." 
Acts9:21 Ama thuhilh a za mi khempeuh in lamdang sa uh a, “Pasian a bia mi peuhpeuh, Jerusalem khua sungah a that pa hi lo ahi hiam? Hih lai ah zong thu um mite manin siampi liante kiangah a ciah pihkik dingin a hong pai hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Acts9:22 Ahi zongin a thuhilhna ah Saul hong siam semsem a, Jesu pen Khris hi, ci-in teltakin lak thei ahih manin, Damaskas khua-a om Jew mite in a nial nading uh om thei lo hi." 
Acts9:23 Tua zawh ni tampi khit ciangin Jew mite kikaikhawmin Saul thah sawm uh a," 
Acts9:24 ahi zongin Saul in amah a kisawm lamtak na phawk hi. Jew mite in Saul a thah theih nadingun a sun a zanin khua kongpi ah a pang uh hi. 
Acts9:25 Ahi zongin Saulʼ nungzuite in zanin khuakulh tungah kah tohpihin kulh pua lamah bawm tawh a khai suk uh hi. 
Acts9:26 Jerusalem khua ah Saul pai a, thu um mite tawh kipawl dingin a vaihawm hi. Ahi zongin amaute in Saul pen thu um dingin na ngaihsun zo lo uh ahih manin na kihta mahmah uh hi." 
Acts9:27 Tua ciangin Barnabas in Saul hong huh a, sawltakte kiangah Saul a va paipih hi. Lam a pai laitakin Saul in Topa a muhna thu, Topa in Saul kiangah a thugennate le Damaskas khua ah Saul in hang takin Jesuʼ min tawh thu a hilhnate khempeuh sawltakte kiangah a gensak hi." 
Acts9:28 Tua ahih manin Saul zong sawltakte tawh kikhawl a, Jerusalem khua sungah vak kawikawi-in, Topaʼ min tawh hang takin thu a hilh hi." 
Acts9:29 Grik pau a zang Jew mite tawh zong thu gen khawmin kiseel uh a, amaute in Saul thah dingin a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts9:30 A lawmte in hih thu a phawk uh ciangin Sisaria khua ah Saul paipih suk uh a, tua lai panin Tarsas khua ah a ciahsak uh hi." 
Acts9:31 Tua ahih manin Judea gam, Galilee gam le Samaria gam sunga om pawlpite in bawlsiatna thuak nawn loin nuam takin om uh a, Topa zahtakna tawh gamta uh ahih manin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh a mi khangin a kibehlap uh hi." 
Acts9:31 Tua ahih manin Judea gam, Galilee gam le Samaria gam sunga om pawlpite in bawlsiatna thuak nawn loin nuam takin om uh a, Topa zahtakna tawh gamta uh ahih manin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh a mi khangin a kibehlap uh hi." 
Acts9:32 Peter khualzinin pai kawikawi a, khatvei Lydda khua-a teng Pasianʼ mite kiangah a hawh hi." 
Acts9:33 Tua khua a tun ciangin a khutlekhe a zaw, kum giat sung tawntung lupna ngakin a om, Aineas kici mi khat a mu hi." 
Acts9:34 Peter in tua pa kiangah, “Aineas aw, Jesu Khris in nang hong damsak hi; tho-in na lupna zial in,” a ci hi. Amah zong thakhatin tho to pah hi." 
Acts9:35 Tua khua-a teeng mi khempeuh le Sharon zanglei-a teeng mi khempeuh in Aineas mu uh ahih manin Topa a um uh hi. 
Acts9:36 Joppa khua ah Pasianʼ thu a um, Tabitha min nei numei khat a om hi. (Tua nuʼ Grik min pen Dorkas hi a, sakhi a cihnopna ahi hi.) Tua nu a tawntungin a hoihin gamta-in mizawngte a huh hi." 
Acts9:37 Tua laitakin amah a ci na-in a si hi. Amah a sil khit uh ciangin inn dei tungnung ah a sial uh hi. 
Acts9:38 Joppa khua le Lydda khua kigamla lo ahih manin, Joppa khua-a teng thu um mite in Lydda khua ah Peter om hi, ci-in thu a zak uh ciangin Peter kiangah mi nih sawl uh a, “A manlang theithei-in ko kiangah hong pai in,” ci-in a samsak uh hi." 
Acts9:39 Peter zong kithawi-in a samte tawh pai khawm pah a, tua khua a tun ciangin inn dei tungnung ah a na paipih to pah uh hi. Tua lai ah a na om meigong numei khempeuh in Peter na umcih uh a, Dorkas a hin lai-in amaute adingin a bawlsak puan-akte le puan tungsilhte, a kah kawmun Peter kiangah a lak uh hi." 
Acts9:40 Peter in inn sung panin amaute khempeuh a pusuahsak khit ciangin khukdinin thu a ngen hi. Tua ciangin misi nu lamah kihei a, “Tabitha aw, tho in,” a cih ciangin a mit hong hak a, Peter a muh ciangin a tu to hi." 
Acts9:41 Peter in a khut khakin a ding tosak hi. Tua ciangin thu um meigong numeite a kipanin thu um khempeuh samkikin amaute kiangah Dorkas a nungta-in a lak hi. 
Acts9:42 Joppa khua sung khempeuh ah hih thu kithei kim a, mi tampi in Topa a um uh hi." 
Acts9:43 Joppa khua ah ni tampi sung Peter tam lai a, savun nim nasepin a nei Simon a kici mipa tawh a om khawm hi." 
Acts10:1 Sisaria khua ah Kornelias a kici mi khat om a, Rom galkap honte sung panin “Italy Galkapte,” a kici sungah galkap bu a sem ahi hi." 
Acts10:2 Amah biakna a hahkat mahmah mi khat hi a, a innkuan bupun Pasian bia uh hi. Amah in Jew mizawngte huh nadingin nakpi takin na sem a, Pasian kiangah thu a ngen tawntung mi khat ahi hi." 
Acts10:3 Khat vei nitak nai thum pawlin maang mu a, Pasianʼ vantungmi khat hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Kornelias aw,” ci-in a sapna teltakin a thei hi." 
Acts10:4 Amah in zong laukawmin vantungmi en a, “Topa aw, bang thu ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Pasian in na thungetna hong za a, mizawngte na huhna zong hong thei-in nang hong phawk hi." 
Acts10:5 Tu-in Joppa khua ah mi sawl inla, Simon Peter a kici mipa samsak in." 
Acts10:6 Tua mipa pen, tuipi gei-a teng savunnim nasepin a nei Simon inn ah zin tungin a om ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:7 Tua khit ciangin ama kiangah thu a gen vantungmi paikhia a, Kornelias in zong ama inn sung nasemte nih le biakna a hahkat mahmah, ama sawltakin a neih galkapte khat sam a," 
Acts10:8 a thupiang khempeuh amaute kiangah a gen khit ciangin Joppa khua ah a paisak hi. 
Acts10:9 A zing ciangin Joppa khua ah amaute a tun dektak laitakun, thungen dingin sun laitakin innkhum zang ah Peter a kah to hi." 
Acts10:10 Peter a gil kialin an duh mahmah hi. A zinte in an a huanhuan laitakin Peter in maang a mu hi. 
Acts10:11 Vantung kihong a, sik li a nei a peek deda khat a kiu ciatah khau kivawhin leitungah a hong kikhai suk a mu hi." 
Acts10:12 Tua a peek tungah ganhing namkim, a bokvak namkim le vasa namkim a om hi." 
Acts10:13 Awging khat in ama kiangah, “Peter aw, tho inla tuate go-in ne in,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:14 Ahi zongin Peter in, “Topa aw, tuate go-in ka ne het kei ding hi. A ninin a kingaihsun peuhmah ka ne ngei het kei hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts10:15 A awging in ama kiangah, “Pasian in a siangin a gen sa khat peuhpeuh a ninin ngaihsun kei in,” a ci leuleu hi." 
Acts10:16 Tu-a bangin a thum veina dong a cih khit ciangin vantung lamah tua a peek deda a kilatokik hi. 
Acts10:17 Peter in tua a maangmuhna bang a cihnopna hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in lamdang sa-in a om laitakin, Kornelias in a sawl mite in Simonʼ inn hong kan kawikawi uh a, a inn hong thei uh ahih manin a kong biang hong tung ta uh hi." 
Acts10:18 Amaute in, “Simon Peter a kici mi khat, hih lai ah zin hong tung kha hiam,” ci-in a hong dong uh hi." 
Acts10:19 Tua bangin Peter in a maang muh lungngaingai-in a om laitakin Kha Siangtho in, “En in, mihing thum in nang hong zong uh hi." 
Acts10:20 Amaute nang kiangah a hong pai dingin ka hong sawl ahih manin kithawi-in kum suk inla, lunghiang loin amaute zui pah in,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:21 Tua ciangin Peter zong amaute kiangah pai suk a, “Kei pen na zon pa uh ka hi hi. Bang thu ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts10:22 Amaute in, “Galkap bupa Kornelias in nang kiangah kote hong sawl hi. Amah pen Pasian a bia mihoih mahmah khat hi a, Jew mi khempeuh in zong a zahtak mahmah khat uh ahi hi. Amah in nangma thugente a zak theih nadingin a inn ah nang a hong sap nadingin Pasian in a vantung mite khat ama kiangah gensak hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts10:23 Tua ahih manin amah tawh a giak khawm dingin Peter in amaute a sam hi. A zing ciangin Peter zong kithawi-in amaute tawh pai khawm a, Joppa khua-a om thu um mi pawl khatte in zong a zui uh hi." 
Acts10:24 A zing ciangin Sisaria khua a tung uh hi. Kornelias in zong amauteʼ tun ding lamen ahih manin, a beh a phungte le a lawm it teng a inn ah a na sam khol hi." 
Acts10:25 Peter hong tun ciangin Kornelias in na dawn a, a khe kiangah bokin a bia hi." 
Acts10:26 Ahi zongin Peter in amah kai to a, “Ding in; kei zong mihing mah ka hi lel hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:27 Tua bangin a kiho kawmin Peter zong inn sungah tum a, mi tampi tak a na om a muh ciangin" 
Acts10:28 amaute kiangah, “Note mahmah in zong limtakin na theih ciat uh mah bangin Jew mite pen minam dangte kiangah hawhin a kikholh ding a ngeina hi lo hi. Ahi zongin mi khat peuhpeuh a nin hi, ci-in ka ngaihsut loh nadingin Pasian in kei tungah a thu hong lak khinzo hi." 
Acts10:29 Tua ahih manin kei nong sap uh ciangin nial loin kong pai hi. Tu-in bang thu-a hong sam na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. 
Acts10:30 Kornelias in, “Tu ni tawh sim tu ma ni li lai-in tu bang hun nitak nai thum laitakin ka inn ah thungenin ka om hi. Tua bangin thungenin ka om laitakin puan pak mahmah a silh mi khat ka mai ah hong ding vat a," 
Acts10:31 ‘Kornelias aw, Pasian in na thungetnate hong za a, mizawngte na huhnate zong a hong thei hi." 
Acts10:32 Simon Peter a kici mipa a sam dingin Joppa khua ah mi sawl in. Amah pen savunnim nasepin nei-in tuipi gei ah a teeng Simonʼ inn ah zin tungin a om hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts10:33 Tua ahih manin nang kong samsak pah a, midik na hih manin hih lai ciang a hong tung na hi hi. Topa in na gen dingin a hong sawl thu khempeuh na hong gen ding ngakin Pasianʼ omna hih lai munah a om ka hi uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts10:34 Tua ciangin Peter a kam ka-in thu hilh ding kipan a, “Pasian in kuamah angvan tuam nei loin," 
Acts10:35 kua mi kua mi hitaleh amah zahtakin a manin a gamta mi khempeuh a sanna thu teltakin ka thei hi. 
Acts10:36 Mi khempeuhʼ Topa ahi Jesu Khris hangin a kingah Lungdamna Thu, Israel mite tungah Pasian in a puakna thu na thei uh hi." 
Acts10:37 Johan in tuiphumna thu a hilh khit a kipanin Galilee gam a kipan Judea gam khempeuh ah a piang thu lianpite na thei uh hi. 
Acts10:37 Johan in tuiphumna thu a hilh khit a kipanin Galilee gam a kipan Judea gam khempeuh ah a piang thu lianpite na thei uh hi. 
Acts10:38 Nazareth khuami Jesu tungah Pasian in Kha Siangtho le vangliatna pia a, Pasian in a ompihna hangin tua Jesu in a paina khempeuh ah na hoih semin, Dawimangpa in a gimsak mite khempeuh a damsakna thu zong na thei uh hi." 
Acts10:39 Amah in Jerusalem khua le Jew mite omna mun dang khempeuh ah a septe khempeuh a thei tecite ka hi uh hi. Jew mite in sing tungah amah khai-in a that uh hi. 
Acts10:40 Ahi zongin Pasian in a ni thum ni-in amah hingkiksakin hong kilangsakkik hi. 
Acts10:41 Mi khempeuh tungah kilangsak loin, a thei teci dingin Pasian in a hong teel sa kote bek tungah hong kilangsak hi. Sihna panin a hinkik khit ciangin kote in amah tawh an nekhawm tui dawnkhawmin ka om uh hi." 
Acts10:42 Kote in mite kiangah thu ka hilh nading uh le mihing le misite tungah thu a khen dingin Pasian in amah a sehna thu teci a pang dingin a hong sawl hi. 
Acts10:43 Amah a um mite khempeuh in ama min hangin a mawhna uh a mai nading thu, kamsangte khempeuh in zong gen belin a neih khat uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts10:44 Tua bangin Peter in thu a hilh laitakin tua thuhilhna a ngai mite khempeuh tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung suk hi. 
Acts10:45 Gentail mite tungah zong Pasian in a Kha Siangtho a piakkhongna thu a muh uh ciangin Joppa khua panin Peter tawh a hong pai khawm Jew mi thu umte in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi. 
Acts10:46 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in pau lamdang pau-in Pasianʼ liatna a phatnate uh amau bil mahmah tawh a za uh hi. Tua ciangin Peter in," 
Acts10:47 “Eite mah bangin hih mite in zong Kha Siangtho ngah uh hi. Tui sungah a kiphum ding uh kuaʼn kham thei ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a gen khit ciangin," 
Acts10:48 Jesu Khris min tawh amaute tui a kiphum nading uh a sawl hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah Peter a tam lai nadingin a thum uh hi. 
Acts11:1 Gentail mite in zong Pasianʼ thu a upna uh, Judea gam sunga om sawltakte le thu um mite in a za uh hi." 
Acts11:1 Gentail mite in zong Pasianʼ thu a upna uh, Judea gam sunga om sawltakte le thu um mite in a za uh hi." 
Acts11:2 Tua ahih manin Jerusalem khua ah Peter a pai ciangin Gentail mite zong vun a ki-at ding uh ahi hi, ci-in a ngaihsun mite in Peter mawhsak uh a," 
Acts11:3 “Bang hangin vun a ki-at lo Gentail miteʼ inn ah tung a, amaute tawh an nangawn nekhawm na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Acts11:4 Tua ahih manin Peter in a thupiang khempeuh a patna panin a banbanin gen a," 
Acts11:5 “Joppa khua ah thungenin ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi. A peek deda khat a kiu li ah khau kivawhin vantung panin hong kikhai suk ka mu a, keima mai sanah hong khawl hi." 
Acts11:6 Tua a peek deda tung, limtakin ka et ciangin ganhing, gamsa, a bokvak ganhing le vasate ka mu hi." 
Acts11:7 Tua ciangin awging khat in kei kiangah, ‘Peter aw, tho inla tuate go-in ne in,’ hong cihna ka za hi." 
Acts11:8 Ahi zongin keimah in, ‘Topa aw, tuate go-in ka ne het kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ninin a kingaihsun an peuhmah ka kam ka tun ngei kei hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Acts11:9 Ahi zongin van panin a awging in, ‘Pasian in a siangin a gen sa khat peuhpeuh a nin na ci kei ding hi,’ hong cikik hi." 
Acts11:10 Tu-a bangin a thum veina dong hong cih khit ciangin vantungah tua a peek deda kilatokik hi. 
Acts11:11 Tua laitakin Sisaria khua panin kei kiangah a hong kisawl mihing thumte, ka zintunna inn ah hong tung uh hi." 
Acts11:12 Lunghiang loin amaute ka zuih pah nadingin Kha Siangtho in kei tungah hong gen khinzo hi. Joppa khua panin hih i sanggam gukte in zong Sisaria khua ah hong zui uh a, ka vekpi-un Kornelias inn ah ka lut uh hi." 
Acts11:13 Tua ciangin amah in vantungmi khat a inn sungah a ding mu-in, tua vantungmi in ama kiangah, ‘Simon Peter a kici mipa a sam dingin Joppa khua ah mi sawl in." 
Acts11:14 Amah in nang le na innkuan khempeuh un hotkhiatna na ngah nading uh thu hong gen ding hi,’ a cihna thu a hong gen hi." 
Acts11:15 Tua thu gen dingin ka kipat laitakin eite in Kha Siangtho i ngah cil huna mah bangin amaute tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung hi. 
Acts11:16 Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Johan in tui sungah hong phum a, ahi zongin Pasian in Kha Siangtho tawh note hong kidimsak ding hi,’ a cih sa thu ka phawkkik hi." 
Acts11:17 Eite in Topa Jesu Khris i up ciangin eite tungah hong piak mah bangin Pasian in hih Gentail mite tungah zong a kibangin a piakna teltakin kithei ahih manin, hih Pasianʼ nasepna a khaktan zo dingin kei kua ka hi hiam?” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts11:18 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin mawhsakna thu gen nawn lo uh a, “Gentail mite zong kisikin a nuntak theih nadingun Pasian in hunhoih pia hi,” ci-in Pasian a phat uh hi." 
Acts11:19 Stefen a kithah huna bawlsiatna hangin thu um mite tampi kithehthang uh hi. Mi pawl khatte Foenisia gam, Saipras gam le Antiok khua ciang dong tung uh a, Jew mite kiang bekah Pasianʼ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts11:20 Ahi zongin Saipras gam mi le Sairin khuami thu um mi pawl khatte Antiok khua ah pai uh a, Topa Jesu hanga Lungdamna Thu, Gentail mite kiangah zong a gen uh hi." 
Acts11:21 Topa in nakpi takin amaute huh ahih manin mi tampi in thu umin Topa lamah a kihei uh hi. 
Acts11:22 Jerusalem-a om pawlpite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Antiok khua ah Barnabas a paisak uh hi. 
Acts11:23 Barnabas a tun ciangin Pasian in amaute thupha a piakna mu-in lungdam mahmah a, amaute citakin a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa tungah a thuman nadingun a hanthawn hi." 
Acts11:24 Barnabas pen mihoih mahmah, upna nei-in, Kha Siangtho tawh a kidim mi khat ahi hi. Mi tampi in Pasian a um uh hi." 
Acts11:25 Tua ciangin Saul a zong dingin Barnabas pai a, Tarsas khua ah a tung hi." 
Acts11:26 Saul a muh ciangin Antiok khua ah a paipih hi. Kum khat sung tawntung tua lai-a om pawlpi mite tawh amau tegel om khawm uh a, mi tampi tak thu a hilh uh hi. Thu um mite pen Khristian ci-in min a kiphuah masakna mun in Antiok khua ahi hi." 
Acts11:27 Tua hun pawl laitakin Jerusalem khua panin Antiok khua ah kamsang pawl khat pai suk uh hi. 
Acts11:28 Amaute sung panin Agabas a kici kamsang pa hong dinga, leitung khempeuh ah kialpi hong tung ding hi, ci-in Kha Siangtho sawlna tawh a gen khol hi. (Tua kialpi pen Klaudias in Gam uk Kumpi a sep laitakin a tung hi.)" 
Acts11:29 Tua lai-a om thu um mite in amau hih zawh zah ciat hanciamin Judea gam a om thu um mite kiangah huhna a puak nading uh a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts11:29 Tua lai-a om thu um mite in amau hih zawh zah ciat hanciamin Judea gam a om thu um mite kiangah huhna a puak nading uh a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts11:30 Amaute in huh nading sum a kaihkhop khit uh ciangin pawlpi upate tungah a na piak dingun Barnabas le Saul a puasak uh hi. 
Acts12:1 Hih hun pawl laitakin Herod Kumpipa in pawlpi mite pawl khat bawlsiat ding kipan hi. 
Acts12:2 Johanʼ u James pen namsau tawh thatsak hi. 
Acts12:2 Johanʼ u James pen namsau tawh thatsak hi. 
Acts12:3 Hih bangin thahna hangin Jew mite a lungdamna a theih ciangin Peter zong mansak leuleu hi. (Hih pen Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi hunsung ahi hi.) 
Acts12:4 Peter a kimat khit ciangin thong ah kikoih a, galkap li ciat a om galkap pawl lite in a cin dingin ki-ap hi. Herod in Paisan Pawi a ven ciangin mipi mai ah Peter thu sit dingin a ngaihsut ahi hi." 
Acts12:5 Tua ahih manin thong sungah Peter kikhum a, ahi zongin pawlpi mite in lungsim takpi tawh ama adingin Pasian kiangah thu a ngetsak uh hi." 
Acts12:6 Herod in Peter thu sit dingin a lakkhiat ding ma a zan sungin, Peter a khut nih tuakin sikkhau kikhihin alang tuakah galkapte in lenin tua galkap nih kikalah kilumsak a, tua banah thongcingte in a kongah cing lai uh hi." 
Acts12:7 Thakhatthu-in Peter gei ah Topaʼ vantungmi khat hong omin thong sung khempeuh khua a vak hi. Vantungmi in Peterʼ liangko lokin phong a, “Manlangin tho in,” a ci hi. Thakhatin Peterʼ khut panin a sikkhaute kitol khia hi." 
Acts12:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi in, “Na kawng hoihtakin gakin na khedap bulh in,” ci-in a gen bangin Peter zong a gamta hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in, “Na puan silh inla hong zui in,” a cih mah bangin," 
Acts12:9 thong sung panin Peter in amah zui-in a paikhia hi. Ahi zongin tua vantungmiʼ gamtatna pen ahi takpi mah ahi hiam cih thei lo ahih manin maang a mu-in kingaihsun hi. 
Acts12:10 Thongcingteʼ vilna mun a khatna le a nihna a khen khit uh ciangin khuapi sung lut nading sik kibawl thong kongpi a tung uh hi. Tua kongpi pen ama thu-in hong kihong tawm a, amaute a paikhia uh hi. Khua sung lampi ah a pai laitakun thakhatin vantungmi in Peter guak a nusia hi." 
Acts12:11 Tua ciangin Peter in khua phawk a, “Maang a mu ka kisak leh a takpi na hi mawk! Topa in a vantungmi kei kiangah hong sawl a, Herod in hong gimsak nading le Jew mite in gimna hong thuaksak nading panin kei hong hon khia hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts12:12 Hih thu a phawk khit ciangin Johan Marka nu Mary’ inn ah a pai hi. Tua lai ah mi tampi kikhawmin thu a na ngen uh hi. 
Acts12:12 Hih thu a phawk khit ciangin Johan Marka nu Mary’ inn ah a pai hi. Tua lai ah mi tampi kikhawmin thu a na ngen uh hi. 
Acts12:13 Peter in inntual kongpi hong kiu a, a en dingin nasem numei Roda va pai hi." 
Acts12:14 Peter hi, ci-in a aw-in a theih ciangin nuam lua ahih manin inntual kong nangawn hong loin inn sungah va tai a, inntual kongah Peter ding hi, ci-in a va gen hi." 
Acts12:15 Amaute in, “A hai hi teh!” na cih san lel uh hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Peter a om taktak mah hi,” a cih teitei ciangin amaute in, “Amah a cing vantungmi hi ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts12:16 Tua sung tengin Peter in a kong mah hong kiukiu lai a, a tawpna ah a hon uh ciangin Peter ahih lam thei uh ahih manin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi." 
Acts12:17 Amaute a pau nawn loh nadingun Peter in a khut van a, thong sung panin Topa in amah a paikhiat pihna zia teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin, “James le pawlpi midangte kiangah hih thu na gen un,” ci-in a vaikhak khit ciangin mun dangah a paikhia hi." 
Acts12:17 Amaute a pau nawn loh nadingun Peter in a khut van a, thong sung panin Topa in amah a paikhiat pihna zia teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin, “James le pawlpi midangte kiangah hih thu na gen un,” ci-in a vaikhak khit ciangin mun dangah a paikhia hi." 
Acts12:18 Zingsang khua a vak ciangin Peter bangci ahi hiam, ci-in thongcingte lakah buaina lianpi hong om hi." 
Acts12:19 Peter a zon nadingun Herod in thu pia a, ahi zongin mu zo lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin thongcingte thu kisit a, thah dingin thu a khen nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin Judea gam panin Sisaria khua ah Herod pai suk a, tua lai ah tawl khat sung a om hi." 
Acts12:19 Peter a zon nadingun Herod in thu pia a, ahi zongin mu zo lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin thongcingte thu kisit a, thah dingin thu a khen nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin Judea gam panin Sisaria khua ah Herod pai suk a, tua lai ah tawl khat sung a om hi." 
Acts12:20 Taia khua mite le Sidon khua mite tungah Herod heh mahmah ahih manin Herod tawh a kimu dingin hih khua nih mite hong pai khawm uh hi. A masa-in kumpi inn sunga ulian nasem ahi Blastus a pawlmat phot uh hi. Hih khua nihteʼ an nek tui dawn pen hih kumpipaʼ gam panin a ngah uh ahih manin Blastus makai sakin Herod kiangah va pai-in kilem nading thu a va gen uh hi. 
Acts12:21 Kumpipa in a thugen hun ding a ciam kholh ni a tun ciangin a kumpi puan silhin a kumpi tokhom tungah tu a, mite tungah thu a gen hi." 
Acts12:22 Mite in a thugen a zak uh ciangin, “Hih thugen pen mihing hi loin pasian ahi hi,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts12:23 Herod in mite, Pasian phatsak loin amah phatsak ahih manin thakhatin Topaʼ vantungmi in Herod cinasak a, a hut in amah netumin a si hi." 
Acts12:24 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ thu kizelin a khang semsem hi. 
Acts12:25 Barnabas le Saul in a nasep a man khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khua panin ciahkik uh a, Johan Marka zong a ciahpih uh hi." 
Acts12:25 Barnabas le Saul in a nasep a man khit uh ciangin Jerusalem khua panin ciahkik uh a, Johan Marka zong a ciahpih uh hi." 
Acts13:1 Antiok khua pawlpi sungah kamsang pawl khat le sia pawl khat om uh hi. Tuate pen Barnabas, Mi Vom pa zong a kici Simon, Sairin khuami Lusias, gam ukpipa khutnuai ah gam a uk sawn Herod tawh a khangkhawm Manaen le Saul ahi uh hi." 
Acts13:2 Amaute in an tangin Pasian bia-in a om laitakun Kha Siangtho in amaute kiangah, “Keima na a sem dingin ka sap sa ahih manin kei adingin Barnabas le Saul hong pia khia un,” a ci hi." 
Acts13:3 Amaute in zong an tangin, a lu tung uh ah a khut uh nga-in thu a ngetsak khit uh ciangin a kuan khiasak uh hi." 
Acts13:4 Kha Siangthoʼ sawlna mah bangin Seleusia khua ah pai suk uh a, tua khua panin teembaw tuangin Saipras tuikulh ah a pai uh hi." 
Acts13:5 Saipras tuikulh a om Salamis khua a tun uh ciangin Jew miteʼ kikhopna innte ah Pasian thu a hilh uh hi. Tua a nasepna uh ah a huh dingin Johan Marka zong amaute tawh a om khawm hi. 
Acts13:5 Saipras tuikulh a om Salamis khua a tun uh ciangin Jew miteʼ kikhopna innte ah Pasian thu a hilh uh hi. Tua a nasepna uh ah a huh dingin Johan Marka zong amaute tawh a om khawm hi. 
Acts13:6 Tua tuikulh tung khempeuh ah zin kawikawi-in Pafos khua a tun uh ciangin mitphial a bawl, kamsang a kineih, Barjesuh min nei Jew mi khat a tuak uh hi." 
Acts13:7 Tua mipa pen tua tuikulh a uk sawn, a pil mahmah Sergius Paulus tawh a kithei mahmah mi khat ahi hi. Tua gam ukpa in Pasianʼ thu za nuam ahih manin Barnabas le Saul a sam hi." 
Acts13:8 Ahi zongin tua mitphial siampa Elymas (a Grik min) in Barnabas le Saul na nial a, gam ukpa in Pasianʼ thu a up theih loh nadingin a na hanciam hi." 
Acts13:9 Tua ciangin Saul (Paul zong a kici pa) Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin tua mipa limtakin en a," 
Acts13:10 “Dawimangpa tawh a kibang mipa aw, thuhoih khempeuh nialin, gitlohna ngian tuamtuam na nei a, Topaʼ thuman pen zuau suahsak ding na hanciam tawntung hi." 
Acts13:11 Tu-in Topa in nang hong su dinga, na mit taw-in tawl khat sung khua na mu kei ding hi,” a cih khit phetin, meii vom in Elymasʼ mit tuamcip a, a khut lenin amah a paipih ding mi a zawt kawikawi hi." 
Acts13:12 Gam ukpa in hih thupiang a muh ciang le Topa thu a kigente a zak ciangin lamdang sa mahmah in Pasian a um hi. 
Acts13:13 Tua ciangin Pafos khua panin Paul le a lawmte teembaw tuangin Pamfilia gam Perga khua a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin Johan Marka in amaute nusia-in Jerusalem khua ah a ciahkik hi. 
Acts13:13 Tua ciangin Pafos khua panin Paul le a lawmte teembaw tuangin Pamfilia gam Perga khua a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin Johan Marka in amaute nusia-in Jerusalem khua ah a ciahkik hi. 
Acts13:14 Ahi zongin Perga khua panin amaute paisuak uh a, Pisidia gam Antiok khua a tung uh hi. Sabbath ni-in kikhopna inn ah pai-in a tu uh hi." 
Acts13:15 Kikhopna inn ukte in Moses Thukham Laibu sung le kamsangteʼ laibute a sim khit uh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Sanggamte aw, mihonte tungah hanthotna kam na gen nop uh leh thu nong gen ding uh ka deih uh hi,” a cisak uh hi." 
Acts13:16 Tua ahih manin Paul hong dinga, a khut vanin thugen ding hong kipan a, “Israel mipihte le hih lai ah Pasian a bia Gentail mite aw, ka thugen na ngai un." 
Acts13:17 Hih Israel miteʼ biak Pasian in ko Israel miteʼ pu le pate na na teel a, Egypt gamah peemta-in a om sungun minam lian khatin a na bawl hi. Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh Egypt gam panin amaute na paikhiatpih a," 
Acts13:18 kum sawm li sung gam sungah amaute na ompih kenkon hi. 
Acts13:19 Pasian in Kanaan gam sungah minam sagih a suksiat khit ciangin kum za li le kum sawm nga sung bang ama mite a luahsak hi. 
Acts13:20 “Tua khit ciangin kamsang Samuel hun ciang dong amauteʼ vai a hawm dingin ukpite a pia hi. 
Acts13:21 Amaute in kumpi ding a nget uh ciangin Pasian in Benjamin minam sung pan Kishʼ tapa Saul, kum sawm li sung amauteʼ kumpi dingin a pia hi." 
Acts13:22 Pasian in kumpi dingin Saul a zat nawn loh ciangin amauteʼ kumpi dingin David a semsak hi. Pasian in Davidʼ thu genin, ‘Ka sawl khempeuh a sem ding, ka deih bang mi khat, Jessiʼ tapa David ka mu khin hi,’ a cih sa thu ahi hi." 
Acts13:23 Pasian in ama ciam sa bangin Israel mite a hon khia dingin hih Davidʼ suan sung pan Jesu a bawl hi. 
Acts13:24 Jesu in nasep a kipat ma-in, a mawhna panun kisikin tui a kiphum nadingun Johan in Israel mi khempeuh tungah thu a hilh hi." 
Acts13:25 Johan in ama nasep a zawh kuan ciangin mite kiangah, ‘Kei kua hi hong ci na hi uh hiam? Kei pen noteʼ ngak pa ka hi kei hi. En un, kei nungah na ngak pa uh hong pai a, ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawm zo nai kei hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts13:26 “Abrahamʼ suan ka behte le Pasian a bia Gentail mi khempeuh aw, hih hotkhiatna thu pen eite adingin Pasian in a hong puak ahi hi." 
Acts13:27 Jerusalem khua-a a teeng mite le a makaite un Jesu pen Honpa ahih lamtak na thei lo uh a, Sabbath nisimin a kisim niloh kamsangteʼ thu zong na tel lo uh hi. Amaute in Jesu na mawhsak uh ahih manin kamsangteʼ thugente a manin hong tung hi." 
Acts13:28 Amaute in Jesu in sihna a thuak nadingin thukhenna a ngah nading thu mu zo lo napi uh, Pilat in thah nading thu a piak nadingin na ngen teitei uh hi." 
Acts13:29 Lai Siangtho in Jesuʼ thu a gen bang teekteekin a bawl khit uh ciangin singlamteh tung panin la khia sukin han sungah a koih uh hi. 
Acts13:30 Ahi zongin Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak a," 
Acts13:31 Galilee gam le Jerusalem khua kikalah amah tawh khual a zinzin khawm ngei mite tungah tam veipi a mun tuamtuam ah na kilang hi. 
Acts13:32 Kote pen note kiangah Lungdamna Thu a puak dingin hih lai ah a hong om ka hi uh hi. Tua thu in: Pasian in i pu i pate tungah a ciam thu pen Jesu a hinkiksakna tawh, Israelʼ suan ahi eite le midang khempeuh adingin tu-in a hong tungsak ahi hi. Late a lian nihna sungah, ‘Nang pen ka Tapa na hi a, tu ni-in nangma Pa ka suak hi,’ a cihna thu hong tungsak hi." 
Acts13:33  
Acts13:34 Muatna a thuakkik ngei nawn lo dingin sihna panin amah a hinkiksakna tawh kisai-in Pasian in a thugenna ah, ‘David tungah ka ciam sa mah bangin note tungah thupha siangtho kong pia takpi ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts13:35 Tua mah bangin Late a gelh pa in zong, ‘Nang tungah a hong thuman na nasem pa muatna na thuaksak kei ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Acts13:36 David in ama hun lai-in Pasianʼ deihna bangin na sem a, a sih ciangin a pu a pate gei mahah kisialin muatna a thuak hi." 
Acts13:37 Ahi zongin Pasian in sihna panin a hinkiksak Jesu in muatna thuak lo hi. 
Acts13:38 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, hih Jesu hangin mawhmaisakna thu note tungah hong kihilh ahihna teltakin na theih ding uh ahi hi." 
Acts13:39 Tua tham loin Jesu a um mite khempeuh pen Moses Thukham in a suahtaksak zawh loh mawhna khempeuh panin a suakta ahihna thu na theih ding uh ahi hi. 
Acts13:40 Tua ahih manin kamsangte in, ‘Pasian a thusim lo mite aw, lamdang sa lua-in na si ding uh hi. Na nuntak sungun note lakah ka sepkhiat ding uh thu pen mi khatpeuh in hong gen hileh na up het loh ding uh thu ahi hi,’ ci-in a gen uh thute, note tungah hong pian khak loh nadingin kidawm un,” a ci hi." 
Acts13:41  
Acts13:42 Kikhopna inn panin Paul le Barnabas a ciah ding uh ciangin, Sabbath ni kik ciangin hih thute mah hong gen lai un, ci-in mite in a vaikhak uh hi." 
Acts13:43 Kikhopna inn panin a ciahkhiat uh ciangin Jew mi tampite le Jew biakna a zui Gentail mi tampite in Paul le Barnabas zui uh a, amau tegel in zong tua mite hanthawnin, Pasianʼ hehpihna suangin kip takin a om nadingun a gen uh hi." 
Acts13:44 A Sabbath ni kik ciangin Pasianʼ thu a ngai dingin a khuazang phialun hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts13:45 Jew mite in mi tampi tak a hong kikhawm a muh uh ciangin Paul le Barnabas haza uh ahih manin Paulʼ thugente a man lopi hi, ci-in Paul a gen sia uh hi." 
Acts13:46 Tua ciangin Paul le Barnabas in hang takin thu gen uh a, “No Jew mite tungah Pasianʼ thu kong gen masak ding mah uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin note in Pasianʼ thu nialin, nuntak tawntungna a ngah dingin kilawm zo kisa lo na hih manun, note kiang panin pai khia-in Gentail mite kiangah ka pai ding uh hi." 
Acts13:47 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kote kiangah thu hong pia khinzo a, ‘Leitung mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngah theih nadingin Gentail miteʼ khuavak ahi dingin ka hong koih hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts13:48 Gentail mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lungdam mahmah uh a, Pasianʼ thu hoih mahmah hi, ci-in a phat uh hi. Nuntak tawntungna a ngah dingin Pasian in a teel sa mite in Pasianʼ thu hong um uh hi." 
Acts13:49 Tua gam kiim khempeuh ah Topaʼ thu kizel hi. 
Acts13:50 Ahi zongin Jew mite in tua khua sung uliante le Gentail mi numei citheite holhthawh uh a, Paul le Barnabas bawlsiat ding kipanin, tua gam panin a tai khiasak uh hi." 
Acts13:51 Sawltakte in zong a khe uh a leivui baangte sinkhiat sanin Ikonium khua ah a pai uh hi. 
Acts13:52 Antiok khua-a om thu um mite ahihleh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin lungdam mahmah in a om uh hi. 
Acts14:1 Ikonium khua a tun uh ciangin Paul le Barnabas zong Jew mite kikhopna inn ah pai uh a, amauteʼ thuhilhna hangin Jew mi le Gentail mi tampi tak in Pasian thu um uh hi." 
Acts14:2 Ahi zongin thu um lo Jew mite in Gentail mite holhthawh uh a, thu um mite a mudahsak uh hi." 
Acts14:3 Tua lai ah sawltakte sau veipi tam uh a, Topa Jesu thu hang takin a hilh uh hi. Ama dikna thu a hilhnate uh man hi, ci-in a lah nadingin Topa in amaute tungah lim le nalamdang bawl theih nading vangliatna a pia hi." 
Acts14:4 Tua khua sunga om mite pawl nih pha uh a, pawl khat in Jew mite panpihin, pawl khat in sawltakte a panpih uh hi." 
Acts14:5 Gentail mi le Jew mite in a uliante uh tawh kopin sawltakte bawlsia-in suang tawh den ding a vaihawm uh hi. 
Acts14:6 Sawltakte in tua thu a theih uh ciangin Likaonia gam sunga om Lystra khua, Derbe khua le tua gam kiim a om khuate ah tai uh a," 
Acts14:7 tua a taina uh khuate ah Lungdamna Thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts14:8 A suah tung a kipanin lam a pai thei lo khe zaw mi khat Lystra khua ah a om hi. 
Acts14:9 Amah in Paulʼ thuhilhte limtakin a ngai hi. Tua mipa in damna a ngah zawh nading zahin upna nei hi, ci-in Paul in a muh ciangin limtakin amah en a," 
Acts14:10 “Na khe-in ding to in!” nakpi takin a ci hi. Tua mipa zong dingin lam pai kawikawi dingin a kipan hi. 
Acts14:11 Mihonte in Paulʼ nasepna a muh uh ciangin amauʼ Likaonia pau tawh, “Mihing mel pua-in pasian-te i kiangah hong pai hi,” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Acts14:12 Barnabas pen Zeus ci-in min phuah uh a, Paul pen a thugenpi pen ahih manin Hermes ci-in min a phuah uh hi." 
Acts14:13 Zeus pasian biakna inn tua Lystra khua nawl ah a om hi. Tua Zeus pasianʼ na a sem siampipa in khuapi nawl a a biakinn kongah bawngtalte le pakkualte hong paipih hi. Amah le mihonte in sawltakte a biak nadingun tua bawngte go-in pakkualte a pia nuam uh hi. 
Acts14:14 Ahi zongin Barnabas le Paul in hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonteʼ vaihawmna a nialna limun a puan uh bal kekin mihon lakah tai-in kiko uh a," 
Acts14:15 “Lawmte aw, bang hangin hih bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Kote pen note mah bangin mihing ka hi lel uh hi. Bangmahin a kimang lo hih milimte na biakna uh panin kihei-in, vantung, leitung, tuipi le tuate tung le a sunga om khempeuh a bawl a nungta Pasian na biak nadingun Lungdamna Thu note kiangah a gen dingin hih lai ah a hong om ka hi uh hi." 
Acts14:16 A beisa hun sungah Pasian in mi khempeuh amau ut bang ciatin hong gamtasak hi. 
Acts14:17 Ahi zongin amah in a bangci Pasian hiam cih hong lahna-in mite adingin na hoih nono a hong pia hi. Amah in van panin guah hong zusakin, a hunhunin anlak hun ding hong tungsak hi. Amah in noteʼ nek ding an hong pia a, lungdamin a hong omsak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts14:18 Hih bangin thu a genna uh tawh mihonte in amaute a biak loh nadingun a kho zo liailiai uh ahi hi. 
Acts14:19 Ahi zongin Pisidia gam a om Antiok khua le Ikonium khua panin Jew mite hong pai uh a, mihonte hong holhthawh gawpin suang tawh Paul deng gawp uh a, si khin hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin khua nawl ah a kai khia uh hi." 
Acts14:20 Ahi zongin thu um mite in amah umcihin a om laitakun amah hong tho-in khua sungah a lutkik hi. A zing ciangin Barnabas tawh Derbe khua ah a pai uh hi. 
Acts14:21 Paul le Barnabas in Derbe khua ah Lungdamna Thu hilh uh a, mi tampi in Pasian a um uh hi. Tua lai panin kilehkikin Lystra khua, Ikonium khua le Pisidia gam a om Antiok khua ah a pai uh hi." 
Acts14:22 Thu um mite a upna uh ah citakin a om nadingun hanthawnin tha pia uh a, “Pasianʼ Ukna sungah i om theih nadingin haksatna tampi thuak ding hi hang,” ci-in a hilh uh hi." 
Acts14:23 Khua pawlpi simah pawlpi upa ding sehsak uh a, an tangin thungetna tawh amauteʼ muan ahi Topaʼ khut sungah tua mite a ap uh hi." 
Acts14:24 Pisidia gam a khen khit uh ciangin Pamfilia gam a tung uh hi. 
Acts14:25 Tua gam sunga om Perga khua ah thu hilh uh a, tua khua panin Attalia khua ah a pai suk uh hi." 
Acts14:26 Attalia panin tu-a a zawh uh nasep a kipat nadingun Pasianʼ khut sungah amaute a ki-apna Antiok khua teembaw tuangin a zuankik uh hi. 
Acts14:27 Antiok khua a tun uh ciangin amaute in pawlpi mite khawm uh a, a khualzinna uh ah Pasian in na a seppihna khempeuh le Gentail mite in zong thu a up theih nadingun Pasian in lam a honsaknate khempeuh a gen uh hi." 
Acts14:28 Tua khua ah thu um mite tawh sau veipi sung a om khawm uh hi. 
Acts15:1 Judea gam panin Antiok khua ah mi pawl khat hong pai uh a, innkuan khat bangin a om thu um mite kiangah, “Moses Thukham sungah a kigen bangin na vun uh na at kei uh leh hotkhiatna na ngah kei ding uh hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding hong kipan uh hi." 
Acts15:1 Judea gam panin Antiok khua ah mi pawl khat hong pai uh a, innkuan khat bangin a om thu um mite kiangah, “Moses Thukham sungah a kigen bangin na vun uh na at kei uh leh hotkhiatna na ngah kei ding uh hi,” ci-in thu hilh ding hong kipan uh hi." 
Acts15:2 Hih thu huhau-in Paul le Barnabas le hih mite kikalah nakpi takin thu kinialna omin thu kiseel uh ahih manin, Paul le Barnabas le Antiok khua-a a om mi pawl khatte Jerusalem khua ah va pai-in, hih thu tawh kisai-in tua lai-a om sawltakte le upate tawh a kimuh nadingun a vaihawm uh hi." 
Acts15:3 Amaute a pai uh ciangin pawlpi mite in khua nawl ciang va kha uh a, Gentail mite zong Pasian lamah a kiheina thu, a nawkna uh Foenisia gamah gen kawikawi uh ahih manin thu um mite khempeuh a nuam mahmah uh hi." 
Acts15:4 Jerusalem khua a tun uh ciangin sawltakte, upate le pawlpite in limtakin zin na do uh a, Pasian in na a seppihna thu, amaute kiangah a gen uh hi." 
Acts15:5 Ahi zongin Farisi mite sung panin thu um mi pawl khat in, “Amaute in Moses Thukham zui-in, a vun uh a ki-at nading uh gen ding kisam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts15:6 Tua ahih manin hih thu a kikum dingin sawltakte le upate a kikhawm uh hi. 
Acts15:7 Sau veipi a kiseel khit uh ciangin Peter hong dinga, “Lawmte aw, Gentail mite in Pasianʼ thu za-in a up theih nadingun amaute tungah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin sawtpi lai pekin note lak panin Pasian in kei hong teel khiatna thu na thei uh hi." 
Acts15:8 Mihingteʼ lungsim sung thu a thei Pasian in Gentail mite in zong thu a up theih ding mah hi, cih a lahna-in eite tungah a hong piak mah bangin amaute tungah zong Kha Siangtho a pia hi." 
Acts15:9 Pasian in eite le Gentail mite deidanna hong nei lo a, amaute in zong a up manun mi siangtho-in a bawl hi." 
Acts15:10 Tua ahih ciangin i pute i pate a kipan ei mahmah in i puak zawh loh van gik pen Pasianʼ heh theihtheih nadingin bang hangin thu um mite tungah suan ding ihi hiam? 
Acts15:11 Tua bangin i gamta het kei ding hi. Amaute mah bangin eite in zong i up manin Topa Jesu hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna i ngah hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi." 
Acts15:12 Tua ciangin Barnabas le Paul in Gentail mite lakah amau tungtawnin Pasian in lim le nalamdang a bawlnate khempeuh a gen laitakun mi khempeuh pau loin a om uh hi. 
Acts15:13 A thugen uh a man khit ciangin James in thu hong gen a, “Lawmte aw, ka thugen hong ngai dih un." 
Acts15:13 A thugen uh a man khit ciangin James in thu hong gen a, “Lawmte aw, ka thugen hong ngai dih un." 
Acts15:14 Pasian in Gentail mite lak panin ama mi dingin mi pawl khat a lakna tawh Gentail mite a kin ahih lamtak a hong lahna thu, Simonʼ genna i za zo hi." 
Acts15:15 Kamsangteʼ thugente zong tu-a tawh kituak mahmah hi. Lai Siangtho sungah," 
Acts15:16 ‘Tanglai pek panin hih thu a hong theisak Topa in hih bangin a gen hi: Keima mi ahi dingin ka sap sa Gentail mite le midangte khempeuh in Topa a zon theih nadingun a nung ciangin ka hong paikik dinga, a kisia sa Davidʼ ukna gam ka puahkik ding hi. A siate a ngei bangsakkikin ka dingsakkik ding hi, ci hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Acts15:17  
Acts15:18  
Acts15:19 Tua ahih ciangin keima ngaihsutna ah, Pasianʼ lamah a kihei hih Gentail mite nawngkaisak lo zaw-in," 
Acts15:20 milim biakna-a kizang an khempeuh a siang lo suak ahih manin a nek loh nading uh, numei tawh khialhnate panin a kikep nading uh, a si luang khiasak loin a kigawlmek sate le sasi khat peuhpeuh a nek loh nadingun lai i gelh zawk ding hoih ka sa hi." 
Acts15:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Sabbath nisimin kikhopna innte ah Moses Thukhamte kisim ngitnget a, khua khempeuh ah Moses thugente mah hilh belin kinei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts15:22 Tua ciangin sawltakte, upate le pawlpi buppi in amau sung panin mi pawl khat teelin Paul le Barnabas tawh Antiok khua ah a paikhawmsak ding uh a vaihawm uh hi. Amaute tawh a pai khawm dingin thu um mite in a zahtak bawl mahmah mi nih, Barsabbas Judas le Silas teel khia uh a," 
Acts15:23 a nuai-a kigelh bangin lai a puasak uh hi. Tua a lai puaksak uh sungah, “Sawltakte le upate ahi ko na sanggamte un, Antiok khua, Syria gam le Silisia gam a om thu upna sungah sanggam ahi Gentail mite tungah hopihna kam kong khak uh hi." 
Acts15:24 Kong sawl lohpi-in ko kiang panin mi pawl khat hong pai-in a thugenna uh tawh note hong buaisakin hong lung-amsak hi, ci-in ka za uh hi." 
Acts15:25 Tua ahih manin kote kikhawmin thu ka kikum uh a, mi pawl khat teelin no kiangah kong paisak ding uh ka kithukim uh hi. Tua ka teel uh mite pen i Topa Jesu Khris nasepna ah a nuntakna uh a pia ngam i sanggam it Paul le Barnabas tawh kong paisak uh hi." 
Acts15:26  
Acts15:27 Tua ahih manin ka teel uh Judas le Silas kong paisak uh a, hih lai sunga ka gelh uh thute mah amau kam mahmah tawh hong gen ding uh hi." 
Acts15:28 A kisam mahmah hih a nuai-a thute sim loh, note tungah van gik dang suat ding pen Kha Siangtho le kote ka thukim kei uh hi." 
Acts15:29 Tua a kisam thute in: Milim biakna-in a kipia sa an khat peuhpeuh na nek loh nading uh, sasi na nek loh nading uh, a si luang khiasak loin a kigawlmek sa khat peuhpeuh na nek loh nading uh le numei tawh khialhna panin na kikep nading uh ahi hi. Hih thute hoihtakin zui le-uhcin note adingin hoih ding hi. Na cidam ta un,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Acts15:30 Tua bangin amaute paisak uh a, Antiok khua a tun uh ciangin thu um mi khempeuh khawmin amaute tungah a lai puak uh a pia uh hi." 
Acts15:31 Mite in tua laikhak a sim uh ciangin a thu kigelhte hangin amaute tha nuamin lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts15:32 Judas le Silas zong kamsangte mah hi uh a, thu um mite tawh sau veipi thu kikum uh a, amauteʼ lungsim thanuam sakin a thahatsak uh hi." 
Acts15:33 Tua lai ah tawl khat a taam khit uh ciangin thu up pih lawmte in lungdam takin Judas le Silas, amau a sawlte kiangah a ciahkiksak uh hi." 
Acts15:34 Ahi zongin Antiok khua ah Paul le Barnabas taam lai uh a, midang tampite tawh kopin Topaʼ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Acts15:35  
Acts15:36 Tawl khat khit ciangin Paul in Barnabas kiangah, “Topaʼ thu i hilhna sa khua tuamtuam a i sanggamte kiangah va hawhkikin bang a cici uh hiam cih va en ni,” a ci hi." 
Acts15:37 Tua bangin a pai ding uh ciangin Barnabas in Johan Marka tonpih nuam a," 
Acts15:37 Tua bangin a pai ding uh ciangin Barnabas in Johan Marka tonpih nuam a," 
Acts15:38 ahi zongin Johan Marka in a khualzin masakun a tawp dongin zui loin Pamfilia gam panin ciah san ahih manin Paul in hoih sa lo hi. 
Acts15:38 ahi zongin Johan Marka in a khualzin masakun a tawp dongin zui loin Pamfilia gam panin ciah san ahih manin Paul in hoih sa lo hi. 
Acts15:39 Hih thu hangin amau tegel nakpi takin kinial uh ahih manin kikhen lawh uh a, Barnabas in Johan Marka zawnin Saipras tuikulh gam a zuan dingin teembaw tawh a pai hi." 
Acts15:39 Hih thu hangin amau tegel nakpi takin kinial uh ahih manin kikhen lawh uh a, Barnabas in Johan Marka zawnin Saipras tuikulh gam a zuan dingin teembaw tawh a pai hi." 
Acts15:40 Paul in zong Silas teel a, thu um mite in Topaʼ khut sungah a ap khit uh ciangin," 
Acts15:41 Syria gam le Silisia gam nawkin pai-in pawlpite hanthawnin a thahatsak hi. 
Acts16:1 Paul paisuak lai-in Derbe khua tung a, tua panin Lystra khua a tung hi. Tua Lystra khua ah Timoti a kici thu um mi khat om a, a nu zong thu um Jew mi hi a, a pa pen Grik mi ahi hi." 
Acts16:2 Lystra khua le Ikonium khua-a om thu um mite in Timoti pen a zahtak mahmah uh mi khat ahi hi. 
Acts16:3 Paul in Timoti tonpih nuam ahih manin a vun a atsak hi. Tua gam a om Jew mi khempeuh in Timotiʼ pa pen Grik mi ahih lamtak thei kim uh ahih manin tua bangin a atsak ahi hi. 
Acts16:4 Thuhilhin a paina uh khua khempeuh a thu um mite kiangah Jerusalem khua-a om sawltakte le upate in zuih dingin a khensat uh ngeinate gen kawikawi uh a, tua ngeinate a zuih nadingun a hanthawn uh hi." 
Acts16:5 Tua ahih manin pawlpi mite a upna uh ah kip semsemin, a nini-in mi a kibeh laplap hi." 
Acts16:6 Asia gam sungah thu a hilh ding uh Kha Siangtho in phal lo ahih manin Frigia le Galatia gam sung tengah a zin uh hi. 
Acts16:7 Mysia gamgi a tun uh ciangin Bithynia gam sungah lut dingin kithawi uh a, ahi zongin tua gamah a pai ding uh Jesuʼ Kha Siangtho in phal lo hi." 
Acts16:8 Tua ahih manin Mysia gam nawkin pai uh a, Troas khua ah a tung uh hi." 
Acts16:9 Troas khua ah a tun ni zanin Paul in maang mu a, Masedonia gam mi khat in ama kiangah, “Masedonia gamah hong pai inla, kote hong huh in,” ci-in a thum hi." 
Acts16:10 Paul in maang a muh khit phetin, tua lai-a om mite kiangah Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Pasian in eite hong sam hi, ci-in ngaihsun ka hih manun Masedonia gamah a pai dingin ka kithawi pah uh hi." 
Acts16:11 Tua ahih manin Troas khua panin teembaw tuangin Samothrasia tuikulh ka tung uh a, a zing ciangin Ne-apolis khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts16:12 Tua khua panin khe tawh pai-in Masedonia gam sunga om Rom mite a teenna Filippi khua ka tung uh a, tua khua ah ni tampi sung ka taam uh hi." 
Acts16:13 A Sabbath ni ciangin Jew miteʼ thungetna mun om ding hi, ci-in ka upna uh khua pualam a gun gei ah ka pai uh a, tua lai ah tu-in a kikhawm numeite tungah thu ka hilh uh hi." 
Acts16:14 Tua ka thuhilhna uh a za mite lakah Thiatira khuami, a manpha mahmah puansan a zuak, Lydia kici numei khat a om hi. Tua nu pen Pasian a bia numei khat hi a, Paulʼ thugente a sang thei dingin Pasian in a lungsim a honsak hi." 
Acts16:15 Amah le a inn sunga om mi khempeuh tui kiphum uh a, “Topa thu a um mi taktak hi, ci-in na hong ngaihsut nak uh leh hong pai unla, ka inn ah hong tung un,” ci-in hong samin a hong zol hi." 
Acts16:16 Ni khat, thungetna mun a zuan dingin ka pai laitakun mailam thu a gen thei dawivei nasem numei khat in kote hong dawntuah hi. Tua numei in mailam thu a genna tawh a tote adingin sum tampi a ngahsak hi." 
Acts16:17 Tua numei in Paul le kote hong zui-in, “Hih mite, A Lianpen Pasianʼ nasemte ahi uh hi. Note a hong kihotkhiat theih nading thu a hong gen uh ahi hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Acts16:18 Tua bangin ni tampi sung awng ngitnget ahih manin a sawtna ciangin Paul in nawngkai sa ahih manin kihei-in a dawi kiangah, “Hih numei sung panin na paikhiat nadingin Jesu Khris min tawh thu kong pia hi,” a cih khit phetin, tua numei sung panin dawi a paikhia pah hi." 
Acts16:19 Tua numeiʼ tote in a sum ngah nading uh bei ta hi, ci-in a phawk uh ciangin Paul le Silas man uh a, thukhente omna sumbuk tual ah a kai uh hi." 
Acts16:20 Rom ulian thukhente kiangah paipih uh a, “Hih mite, Jew mi hi a, i khua sungah nawngkaina hong piangsak hi." 
Acts16:21 Amaute in koteʼ ngeina tawh kituak lo thute hong hilh uh a, kote Rom mi ka hih manun amau thugente ka sang thei kei uh a, ka zui thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts16:22 Mihonte in zong amau tegel vuak pih ngeingai uh a, uliante in Paul le Silasʼ puan bal keksak uh a, tua mi tegel a sat nading uh thu a pia uh hi." 
Acts16:23 Nakpi takin a kisat khit ciangin thong sungah koihsak uh a, limtakin tawh a kalh nadingin thongcing pa kiangah thu a pia uh hi." 
Acts16:24 Tua bangin thu a ngah ciangin thongcing pa in thong sung tawng nung ah amaute koihin, singkol lianpi sungah a khe uh a gak cipsak hi." 
Acts16:25 Zankim laitakin Paul le Silas in Pasian kiangah thu ngenin la sa uh a, thong kia dangte in amauʼ thungetna le lasaknate a ngai uh hi." 
Acts16:26 Thakhatin nakpi takin zin hong liing a, thonginn a bulpi dongin a lok gawp hi. Thakhatthu-in thong kongkhak khempeuh kihong a, thongkiate a kikhihna sikkhau khempeuh a kiphel khia hi." 
Acts16:27 Thongcing pa zong khanglo a, thong kongkhakte a kihong a muh ciangin thong kia mi khempeuh tai khia mang khin hi, ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin a namsau dokin a mahmah a kithat dingin a kithawi hi."
