Acts16:28 Ahi zongin a aw neihzah tawh Paul kiko a, “Bangmah kicih kei in! Ka vekpi-un kim ung!” a ci hi." 
Acts16:29 Thongcing pa in zong meivak a la dingin mi khat sawl a, thong sungah tai-in laukawm liingkawmin Paul le Silas khe kiang va kidenna-in a va bok suk hi." 
Acts16:30 Tua ciangin amaute pusuah pih a, “Tote aw, hotkhiatna ka ngah nadingin bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts16:31 Amaute in, “Topa Jesu um in. Tua hileh nang le na innkuanpihte in hotkhiatna na ngah ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts16:32 Tua ciangin amaute in amah le a inn sunga om mi khempeuh tungah Topaʼ thu a hilh uh hi. 
Acts16:33 Tua zankim lai takpi mahin thongcing pa in amauteʼ liammate sawp siangsak a, amah le a innkuan pih mi khempeuh a kituiphum pah uh hi." 
Acts16:34 Tua ciangin a inn ah amaute ciah pihin an a pia hi. Tu-in Pasian thu um uh ahih manin amah a kipan a innkuan pih khempeuh a lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts16:35 A zingsang ciangin Rom thukhen uliante in palikbute samin, “Tua mite va khah un,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts16:36 Tua ahih manin thongcing pa in zong Paul kiangah, “Thukhen uliante in nang le Silas kong khah nading uh thu hong pia khin ahih manin lungnuam takin na ciah khia thei ta ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts16:37 Ahi zongin Paul in palikbute kiangah, “Kote in khialhna bangmah gamta lo napi-in mihon mai ah hong kisat gawp hi. Kote pen Rom gam mi hi ung! Hong kisat khit ciangin thong sungah hong kikoih lai hi. Tu-in kuama theih lohin kote hong khah sim nuam ahi uh hiam? Tua bang mawk hi thei peuhmah lo ding hi. Rom thukhen uliante mahmah hih lai ah hong pai uh henla, kote hong khah khia tahen,” a ci hi." 
Acts16:38 Palikbute in zong Rom thukhen uliante kiangah hih thu va ko uh hi. Paul le Silas pen Rom gam mi ahih lamtak a phawk uh ciangin lunghimawh uh a," 
Acts16:39 amau mahmah va pai-in a va thum khit uh ciangin thong sung panin khah khia uh a, tua khua panin a paikhiat nadingun a thum uh hi." 
Acts16:40 Paul le Silas zong thong panin pai khia-in Lydiaʼ inn a zuan uh hi. Tua lai ah thu um mite tawh kikhawm uh a, hanthotna kam a gen khit uh ciangin tua khua panin a ding khia uh hi." 
Acts17:1 Amfipolis khua le Apollonia khua nawkin amaute zin uh a, Jew mite kikhopna inn a omna Thesalonika khua a tung uh hi." 
Acts17:2 A pai ngei zel mah bangin Paul zong kikhopna inn ah pai a, Sabbath ni thum sung Lai Siangtho siksanin mite tawh thu kikum a," 
Acts17:3 Khris in sihna thuakin, sihna panin a thawhkik ding a kisam ahi hi, ci-in a laktel hi. Tu-a note kiangah kong pulak Khris pen Lai Siangtho sunga kigen Khris ahi hi, ci-in Paul in a gen hi." 
Acts17:4 Mi pawl khat in a thugen uh man sa uh ahih manin Paul le Silas pawlpih uh a, tua mah bangin Pasian a bia mi tampi tak le ulianteʼ zi tampi mah in zong a pawlpih uh hi." 
Acts17:5 Tua bangin mi tampi in Paulʼ thugen a up uh ciangin Jew mite thangpai uh a, kongzing lakah a vakvai migilo hon khat kaikhawmin a pawlmat uh hi. Khua sung khempeuh buaisak henhanin, mihonte lakah Paul le Silas a kaihkhiat theih nadingun Jasonʼ inn a va sim gawp uh hi." 
Acts17:6 Tua inn ah Paul le Silas a muh loh uh ciangin a innteek pa Jason le midang pawl khat kai khia-in uliante kiangah paipih uh a, “Hih mite in mun khempeuh ah buaina piangsak uh hi. Tu-in i khua sung hong tung uh a," 
Acts17:7 Jason in a inn ah amaute tungsak hi. Amaute in gam khempeuh a uk Kumpipaʼ thu palsat uh a, Jesu kici kumpi dang khat om hi, ci-in gen uh hi,” ci-in a awng gawp uh hi." 
Acts17:8 Hih thu a zak uh ciangin mihonte le khua sung uliante heh mahmah uh a," 
Acts17:9 Jason le a lawmte a kitat nading uh sum a piaksak khit uh ciangin tua khua sung uliante in amaute a khah pan uh hi. 
Acts17:10 Tua zan ciangin thu um mite in Berea khua ah Paul le Silas a paisak uh hi. Tua khua a tun uh ciangin Jew mite kikhopna inn ah a pai uh hi. 
Acts17:11 Thesalonika khua mite sangin Berea khua mite in mipi lungsim nei zaw uh hi. Amaute in lawp mahmahna tawh Paulʼ thugente ngai uh a, Paulʼ thugente man taktak hiam ci-in a theih nadingun nisimin Lai Siangtho a sim uh hi." 
Acts17:12 Mi tampi in Pasianʼ thu um a, tuate sungah a cithei Grik numei tampi le Grik mi pasal tampi a kihel uh hi." 
Acts17:13 Berea khua ah zong Paul in Pasian thu a hilhna a zak uh ciangin Thesalonika khua panin Jew mite hong pai-in Berea khua ah zong mite hong holhthawh gawp uh hi. 
Acts17:14 Tua ciangin thu um mite in tuipi gei ah Paul paikhiatpih uh a, ahi zongin Silas le Timoti pen Berea khua ah a taam lai uh hi." 
Acts17:15 Tuipi gei ah Paul a paipih thu um mite in Athen khua ciang dong a va zui uh hi. Athen khua panin Berea khua ah hong ciahkik uh ciangin, Silas le Timoti in a manlang theithei-in hong delh uh hen, ci-in Paulʼ kam vaikhak thu a hong pua uh hi." 
Acts17:16 Paul in Athen khua ah Silas le Timoti ngakin a om laitakin tua khua sungah milim a dimin a om lamtak mu ahih manin a lungsim om mawk thei lo hi. 
Acts17:17 Tua ahih manin Pasian a bia Jew mite le Gentail mite tawh kikhopna inn sungah thu kikupna nei uh a, mihon kikhopna munah hong pai mi khempeuh tawh zong nisimin a kikum uh hi." 
Acts17:18 Epikuras thu ngaihsutzia le Stoik thu ngaihsutzia a um mite pawl khat, Paul tawh thu kinial uh a, “Hih mi kipilsak thu mawk gengen pa in bang gen nuam ahi hiam?” cih san uh a, pawl khat in, “Minam dangteʼ pasian thu a gen tawh kibang hi,” a ci uh hi. Paul in Jesu thu le a thawhkikna thu hilh ahih manin hih bangin a gen uh ahi hi." 
Acts17:19 Tua ahih manin amaute in Paul samin, Areopagas mualbo ah paipih uh a, “Tu-a na gengen thuthakte ka thei nuam uh hi." 
Acts17:20 Tu-a na gengen ka zak uh thu pawl khatte, ko adingin a lamdangpi khat hi a, a thu a cingin ka thei nuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts17:21 (Athen khua mite le tua khua-a om gamdang mite in thu thak la thak ngaihsunin kikup ding sim loh thudang ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi.) 
Acts17:22 Tua ahih manin Paul zong kikhopna mun Areopagas a kici mualbo tungah dingin, “Athen khua mite aw, biakna a hahkat mahmah mite na hihna uh ka thei hi." 
Acts17:23 Na khua sung uh ah ka pai kawmin na biakna munte uh ka et ciangin, ‘A kithei lo Pasian ading,’ ci-in biakna tau tungah lai a kigelh nangawn ka mu hi. Tu laitakin keiʼ kong pulak Pasian pen, thei lo napi-in na biakbiak uh Pasian ahi hi." 
Acts17:24 Tua Pasian pen leitung buppi le a tunga om khempeuh a piangsak Pasian hi a, vanlelei a uk Topa ahih manin mihingteʼ lam sa biakinn sungah teeng lo hi." 
Acts17:25 Amah pen mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna le na khempeuh a pia pa ahih manin mihingte in ama adingin na khat peuhpeuh a sepsak ding a kisam ahi kei hi. 
Acts17:26 Mihing khat tung panin leitung minam khempeuh hong piangsakin, leitung khempeuh ah a omsak hi. Amah in mihingte a piansak ma pekin, mihingteʼ nuntak tanvei ding le a ten nading uh mun a seh sa ahi hi." 
Acts17:27 Hih bangin ahihna pen mite in amah zongin a muh theih nading uh a deihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin eite kiang panin Pasian gamla om het lo hi. 
Acts17:28 Mi khat in, ‘Pasian hangin eite piangin, hingin i gamtang hi,’ ci-in gen a, note sung panin laphuah siampa khat in zong, ‘Eite zong ama tate ihi hi,’ na na ci hi." 
Acts17:29 Eite pen Pasianʼ tate ihih manin, mihing khutsiamte in bawlin a zep ngunte, khamte, suang milimte tawh a kibang dingin Pasian i ngaihsun kei ding hi." 
Acts17:30 Pasian in mihingteʼ theih loh hun lai-a a gamtatnate uh phamawh a sak loh hangin, tu-in mun khempeuh a om mi khempeuhte a gamtat siatna panun a kihei nadingun thu a hong pia khinzo hi." 
Acts17:31 Amah in leitung mi khempeuh thu a mantakin ama teel mipa a hong khensak nading ni a sehkhol khinzo hi. Tua a ngaihsutna a man taktak hi, ci-in mi khempeuh tungah a hong lah nadingin a teel mipa, sihna panin a hingkiksak zo hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Acts17:32 Sihna panin thawhkikna thu Paul in a gen a zak uh ciangin mi pawl khat in zahpih bawl uh a, ahi zongin mi pawl khat in, “Hih thu khatvei zakik nuam lai ung,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts17:33 Tua ciangin tua kikhopna panin Paul a paikhia hi. 
Acts17:34 Mi pawl khat in thu umin Paul pawlpih uh a, tuate lakah Areopagas mualbo a thu vaihawm pawl sungah a kihel Dionisias le Damaris a kici numei khat le mi pawl khat ahi uh hi." 
Acts18:1 Tua khit ciangin Athen khua panin Paul pai khia-in Korin khua ah a tung hi. 
Acts18:2 Tua lai ah Pontas gam a suak, Jew mi Aquila a kici mi khat tawh a kimu hi. Gam uk Kumpipa in Jew mi khempeuh Rom khua panin a taikhiat nadingun thu pia ahih manin Aquila le a zi Prisilla pen Italy gam panin Korin khua a hong tun uh a sawt nai lo ahi hi. Tua nupate tawh a kimu dingin Paul zong a inn uh ah va hawh a," 
Acts18:3 tua nupate mah bangin Paul zong puanbuk bawl nasep tawh a nungta ahih manin amaute tawh om khawmin na a sem khawm uh hi. 
Acts18:4 Sabbath nisimin kikhopna inn ah limtakin thu gen a, Jew mi le Grik mite in thu a up nadingun a hanciam hi." 
Acts18:5 Masedonia gam panin Silas le Timoti hong tun ciangin Paul in a hun neih khempeuh thuhilhna-in zang a, Jesu pen Khris ahi hi, ci-in Jew mite kiangah teltakin a gen hi." 
Acts18:6 Jew mite in ama thuhilhna nialin a gensiat uh ciangin Paul in a puan tunga leivui baangte sinsanin, “Pasian tawh kikhenin siatna na tuah uh leh nomau khialhna hi a, kei nong ngawh nading uh om lo hi. Tu a kipanin Gentail mite kiangah thu ka hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts18:7 Tua ahih ciangin Paul in tua Jew mite nusia-in Pasian a bia Gentail mi Titus Justasʼ inn ah a tung hi. Tua mipaʼ inn pen kikhopna inn gei mahmah ahi hi. 
Acts18:7 Tua ahih ciangin Paul in tua Jew mite nusia-in Pasian a bia Gentail mi Titus Justasʼ inn ah a tung hi. Tua mipaʼ inn pen kikhopna inn gei mahmah ahi hi. 
Acts18:8 Kikhopna inn ukpa Krispas le a inn sunga om mi khempeuh in Topa thu um uh a, Korin khua-a om midang tampite in zong thuhilhna ngai-in um uh a, tui a kiphum uh hi." 
Acts18:9 Zan khat, Paul in maang mu a, a maang sungah Topa in, “Lau kei in. Lungkia kei inla, na thugen zom in." 
Acts18:10 Hih khua sungah keima mi tampi om a, nang hong ompih ka hih manin kuamah in nang bangmah hong cih lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts18:11 Tua ahih manin tua khua ah kum khat le alang sung om lai-in mite kiangah Pasian thu a hilh hi. 
Acts18:12 Rom khutnuai ah Akhaia gam sung a uk dingin Gallio a kikoih ciangin Jew mite hong kikaikhawm uh a, Paul manin zumah a paipih uh hi." 
Acts18:13 Amaute in, “Hih mipa in ngeina om lopi-in mite in Pasian a biak nadingin zol ding hanciam hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts18:14 Paul in a kam ka-in thugen dingin a kipat laitakin Gallio in Jew mite kiangah, “Hih thu pen gamtat khialhna ahi a, gitloh tatna ahi zongin a gamtatna hang hileh no Jew miteʼ thugente limtakin kong ngaih ding a kilawm mah ahi hi." 
Acts18:15 Ahi zongin hih thu pen kam zat zia, min le na ngeina uh a kituh na hih manun nomau mah in khen tawm un. Tua bang thute keimah in ka hong khen kei ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Acts18:16 zum panin amaute a hawl khia hi. 
Acts18:17 Amaute in kikhopna inn ukpa Sosthenes manin, zum mai ah sat gawp uh a, ahi zongin Gallio in them khat zong phamawh sa lo hi." 
Acts18:18 Korin khua ah ni tampi sung thu um mite tawh Paul om khawm lai a, tua khit ciangin amaute mangpha khakin Syria gam a zuan dingin Prisilla le Aquila tawh teembaw a tuang uh hi. Paul in Pasian tungah thuciamnasa nei ahih manin teembaw a tuan ma-un Korin khuapi teembaw khawlna Kenkhrea munah a sam a metsak hi." 
Acts18:19 Tua bangin a pai uh ciangin Efesa khua tung uh a, Paul zong kikhopna inn ah pai-in Jew mite tawh thu a kiseel uh hi. Tua khua ah Prisilla le Aquila-te nupa a taam lai nading Paul in a gen hi." 
Acts18:20 Thu um mi pawl khatte in ni tampi sung Paul a taam nadingin gen uh a, ahi zongin amah taam nuam lo hi;" 
Acts18:21 a dinkhiat ding ciangin, “Pasian deihna ahih nakleh note kiangah ka hong hawhkik ding hi,” ci-in vaikhakin, Efesa khua panin teembaw tawh a ding khia hi." 
Acts18:22 Sisaria khua a tun ciangin Jerusalem khua ah pai-in pawlpite va hopih a, tua ciangin Antiok khua ah a pai hi." 
Acts18:23 Antiok khua ah tawl khat a taam khit ciangin Galatia gam le Frigia gam sungah pai-in thu um mi khempeuh a va tha khauhsak hi. 
Acts18:24 Alexandria khuami Apollos a kici Jew mi khat, Efesa khua ah hong pai hi. Amah thugen siam mahmah a, Lai Siangtho zong a thei mahmah khat ahi hi." 
Acts18:25 Amah in Topaʼ zia thei a, lawp mahmahna tawh Jesuʼ thu a mantakin a hilh hi. Ahi zongin amah in Johanʼ tuiphumna thu bek a thei hi." 
Acts18:26 Amah in kikhopna inn sungah hang takin thu hilh ding kipan a, Prisilla le Aquila in ama thuhilhna a zak uh ciangin a omna uh inn ah Apollos ciah pihin, Pasianʼ thu pai ziate a mantakin a hilh tel uh hi." 
Acts18:27 Akhaia gamah Apollos pai ding a sawm ciangin, Akhaia gam a om thu um mite in limtakin a na pawlbawl nading uh deihna tawh Efesa khua-a om thu um mite in lai a khak uh hi. Amah a tun ciangin Pasian hehpihna hangin Jesu thu a um tua lai-a om mite adingin nuamtuam mahmah hi." 
Acts18:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Lai Siangtho sung siksanin Jesu pen Khris ahi hi, ci-in mihon lakah Jew mite tawh thu kiseelin a zo gawp hi." 
Acts19:1 10 Korin khua ah Apollos a om laitakin Paul khual hong zinin Efesa khua hong tung hi. Tua khua ah thu um mi pawl khat tawh kimu a," 
Acts19:2 “Thu na up uh ciangin Kha Siangtho na ngah uh hiam?” ci-in a dot leh, “Kha Siangtho a om lam nangawn ka za nai kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts19:3 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Tua ahihleh na kituiphumna dan uh bangci bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Tuiphumpa Johanʼ thugen bang pawl ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Acts19:4 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Johanʼ hilh tuiphumna pen mawhna a kisik mite ading ahi hi. Amah in Israel mite kiangah, ‘Keima nung a hong pai ding pa Jesu um un,’ ci-in gen hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:5 Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Topa Jesuʼ minin tui a kiphum uh hi. 
Acts19:6 Paul in amaute tungah a khut a ngak khit ciangin amaute tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung hi. Amaute in pau lamdang hong pau pah uh a, Pasianʼ thu zong a gen uh hi." 
Acts19:7 Tua mite sawm le nih a pha uh hi. 
Acts19:8 Tua ciangin Paul in kikhopna inn sungah hang takin kha thum sung thu hilh a, mite in Pasianʼ Ukna thu a up zawh nadingun nakpi takin a gen hi." 
Acts19:9 Ahi zongin mi pawl khat in kin het loin um nuam lo uh a, mipiʼ zakin Topaʼ thu pai ziate gensia gawp uh ahih manin Paul in amaute nusia-in thu um mite paikhiatpih a, Tirannas in thugenna-in a neih innpi sungah nisimin thugenna hun a zang hi." 
Acts19:10 Hih bangin kum nih sung tawntung thu gen niloh ahih manin Asia gam sunga om Jew mi le Gentail mi khempeuh in Topaʼ thu a za uh hi. 
Acts19:11 Pasian in Paulʼ tungtawnin nalamdang lian pipi a bawl hi. 
Acts19:12 Ama zat mainul ahi a, a puante ahi zongin cinate kiangah a kipaipih ciangin a natnate uh damin, a sunga om dawite zong a tai khia uh hi." 
Acts19:13 Dawi hawl khia-in a vak kawikawi Jew mi aitawi pawl khat in zong Topa Jesuʼ min zangin dawi hawlkhiat ding a sawm uh hi. Amaute in dawite kiangah, “Paul in a gengen Jesuʼ min tawh thu kong pia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts19:14 Siampi lianpen Skevaʼ tapa sagihte in tu-a bang danin na sem uh hi. 
Acts19:15 Ahi zongin dawite in amau kiangah, “Jesu ka thei uh a, Paul zong ka thei uh hi. Note kua na hi uh hiam?” a cih khit uh ciangin," 
Acts19:16 dawi lutna mipa in amaute buan gawpin zo gawp ahih manin, a liam a bai, puan kek sa-in tua mipaʼ inn panin a tai khia uh hi." 
Acts19:17 Efesa khua-a om Jew mi le Gentail mi khempeuh in hih thu za-in lau mahmah uh a, Topa Jesuʼ min nakpi takin a kiphat semsem hi." 
Acts19:18 Thu a um midang tampi tak zong hong pai uh a, mipiʼ zakin a gamtatna sate khempeuh uh hong pulak uh hi." 
Acts19:19 Ai a san ngei mi tampi tak in zong a aisanna laibute uh hong paipih uh a, mi khempeuhʼ muhin a hal tum uh hi. Tua laibu mante a gawm uh ciangin ngun peek then nga man bang ahi hi." 
Acts19:20 Tu-a bang danin Topa thu nakpi takin hong khangin hong kizel semsem hi. 
Acts19:21 Hih bang thu teng a pian khit ciangin Masedonia gam le Akhaia gamah Paul zinin Jerusalem ah paisuak ding a ngaihsun hi. Tua khit ciangin Rom khua ah zong pai ning, a ci hi." 
Acts19:22 Tua ahih manin amah a huh Timoti le Erastas, Masedonia gamah paisak a, amah in Asia gam sungah tawl khat hun a zang hi." 
Acts19:23 Tua hun laitakin Topaʼ thu hangin Efesa khua ah buaina lianpi khat a hong piang hi. 
Acts19:24 Demetrias min nei ngunseek mipa khat in Artemis nusian biakna inn lim ngun tawh bawl a, tua nasepna in amah le a nasep pih mite adingin hauhna lianpi a piangsak hi." 
Acts19:25 Tua ahih manin amauteʼ sep bang a sem midang khempeuh kaikhawmin, “Lawmte aw, hih nasepna hangin a hau ihihna thu na thei uh hi." 
Acts19:26 Nomau mahmah in hih Paulʼ thugen khempeuh za-in na thei uh hi. Amah in mihingteʼ bawl pasian-te pen pasian hi het lo hi, ci-in thu hilh a, hih Efesa khua le Asia gam sung khempeuh ah mi tampi tak a umsak hi." 
Acts19:27 Tua ahih manin i nasepna a siat khak ding lauhuai hi. Tua bek hi loin, Asia gam sung mi le leitung mi khempeuh in a biak Artemis nusian biakna innpi a mawkna hong suahkhak ding le a liatna teng a maiman khak ding lauhuai mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:28 Mihonte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh a, “Efesa khua miteʼ Artemis lian pen hi,” ci-in awngkek gawp uh hi." 
Acts19:29 Khua sung khempeuh ah tua buaina hong kizel a, mihonte in Paul tawh a kikhawl Masedonia mi Gaias le Aristarkhas manin mihon kikhopna innpi ah a kai uh hi." 
Acts19:30 Paul zong tua inn sung mihonte mai ah thugen dingin pai nuam a, ahi zongin thu um mite in a pai ding a phal kei uh hi." 
Acts19:31 Paulʼ lawm ahi tua gam a ulian pawl khatte in Paul kiangah kamtai paisak uh a, hih kikhopna munah hong kilak het kei in, ci-in nakpi takin a khosak uh hi." 
Acts19:32 Tua innpi sungah mihonpi buai ngeingai uh a, mi a tam zaw in a paina thu uh thei lo uh ahih manin, pawl khat in thu khat genin awng gawp uh a, a dang pawl khat in a thu tuampi khat na awng leuleu uh hi." 
Acts19:33 Jew mite in mihonpi mai ah Alexander hong dingsak uh ahih manin, mi pawl khat in hih thupiang ama hang hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Alexander in mihonte a gamdaih nadingin a khut hong van a, a mawh lohna uh thu a gen dingin hong kipan hi." 
Acts19:34 Ahi zongin Jew mi ahih lamtak a theih uh ciangin, “Efesa khua miteʼ Artemis lianpen hi,” ci-in a kituakin nai nih sung a awng uh hi." 
Acts19:35 A tawpna ciangin khua sung lai-at pa in mihonte a gamdaih nadingin kho zo a, “Efesa khuapi mite aw, Efesa khuapi pen, a lian mahmah Artemis biakna innpi le van panin a hong kia biakna suang a kem khuapi ahihna thu mi khempeuh in a theih sa ahi hi." 
Acts19:36 Hih thu pen kuamah in hong nial thei lo ding hi. Tua ahih manin gamdai takin om unla, a kilawm lo na khat peuhpeuh gamta kei un." 
Acts19:37 Hih mite in i biakna inn lah bangmah cih lo, i nusian zong bangmah gensiatna nei lo napi-in hih lai ah na hong paipih uh hi." 
Acts19:38 Tua ahih ciangin Demetrias le a pawlte in mi khatpeuh tungah lungkim lohna nei uh ahihleh thu sit ni ding hun om a, thukhen uliante zong om uh ahih manin tuate mai ah thu kineih ta uh hen." 
Acts19:39 Ahi zongin hih thu ah lungkim zo nai lo na hih uh leh zong a ngeina cingin a kikhop uh ciangin gen ding ahi hi. 
Acts19:40 Tu ni-a thupiang hangin eite buaina piangsak, ci-in hong kimawhsak khak ding lauhuai hi. Hih bangin buaina a om nading bangmah a thu om lopi hi a, i siksan ding bangmah thu om het lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts19:41 Hih thu teng a gen khit ciangin mihonte a ciahsak hi. 
Acts20:1 Hih buaina thu a ven ciangin Paul in thu um mite kaikhawmin, hanthotna kam genin amaute mangpha khak a, Masedonia gam a zuan dingin ding khia hi." 
Acts20:2 Hih gam sungah khualzinin hanthotna tampi a gen khit ciangin Grik gamah pai a," 
Acts20:3 tua gamah kha thum sung a taam hi. Syria gam manawh dingin a kithawi laitakin tua gam a om Jew mite in lamkal ah amah a thahsawmna thu za ahih manin Masedonia gam tawn kikin khualzin ding a ngaihsun hi. 
Acts20:4 Berea khuami Pirrasʼ tapa Sopater, Thesalonika khuami Aristarkhas le Sekundus, Derbe khuami Gaias, Timoti le Asia gam sung panin Tikhikas le Trofimas te in zong a zui uh hi." 
Acts20:5 Amaute na mapai uh a, Troas khua ah kote hong ngak uh hi." 
Acts20:6 Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi a ven khit ciangin Filippi khua panin teembaw tawh ka ding uh a, ni nga khit ciangin Troas khua tungin amaute tawh ka kimu uh a, tua lai ah nipikal khat sung ka taam uh hi." 
Acts20:7 Sani nitakin an nekhawm dingin ka kikhawm uh a, a zing ciangin a ding khia ding ahih manin Paul in a thuhilh zankim ciang dong a zomsuak hi." 
Acts20:8 Ka kikhopna uh inn dawl tungnung sungah meivak tampi a kivak hi. 
Acts20:9 Tawlet gei ah Eutikhas a kici tangval khat tu a, Paul in a thugen zomzom ahih manin tua tangvalpa a ihmut suakin lusu a, a sawtna ciangin ihmusip kha-in inn dawl thumna panin leilak ah a kia suk hi. Amaute in a va phot uh ciangin amah na si khinta hi." 
Acts20:10 Paul zong va kum sukin tangvalpa tungah bokin kikhuangin kawi a, “Lunghimawh kei un, hing lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts20:11 Tua ciangin inn dawl tungnung ah kah tokikin anlum balnenin thu um mite tawh a nekhawm hi. Zingsang khuavak dong amaute tawh thu kikum uh a, tua ciangin a ding khia hi." 
Acts20:12 Amaute in tua tangvalpa a inn ah va kha uh a, a lungsim uh nuamkik mahmah hi." 
Acts20:13 Tua ciangin Paul in, Assos khua ciang dong khe-in pai ning, ci-in ko kiangah hong gen ahih manin, Troas khua panin teembaw tuangin Assos ah ka pai uh a, tua khua ah Paul tawh a kituah ding ka hi uh hi." 
Acts20:14 Assos khua ka tun uh ciangin Paul in zong teembaw hong man a, Mitylene khua ah ka paisuak uh hi." 
Acts20:15 Tua panin ding leuleu-in a zing ciangin Khios tuikulh khengin Samos tuikulh ka tung uh hi. Tua panin a zing ciangin Miletas khua ka tung uh hi. 
Acts20:16 Paul in Jerusalem khua ah Pentekos Pawi hun lap nuam ahih manin Asia gam sungah ban man dingin ngaihsun lo a, Efesa khua ah taam sawm lo hi." 
Acts20:17 Paul in Miletas khua panin Efesa khua ah thu puak a, Efesa pawlpi upate in a na dawntuah nadingin a vaikhak hi." 
Acts20:18 Efesa pawlpi upate hong tun ciangin Paul in amaute kiangah, “Asia gam sung kong tun ni a kipanin note tawh ka om sungteng ka nasepna khempeuh note in na thei uh hi." 
Acts20:19 Jew mite in kei hong thahsawmna hangin kiniamkhiatna le khitui naptui tawh haksapi-in Topaʼ na ka sem hi. 
Acts20:20 Mihon lak ahi a, noteʼ inn sungah ahi zongin ka hong thuhilhna khempeuh ah noteʼ phattuam nading a om khempeuh siit nei loin kong gen khin hi." 
Acts20:21 Jew mi le Gentail mite a mawhna panun Pasianʼ lamah kihei-in i Topa Jesu a up nadingun thu ka gen khinzo hi. 
Acts20:22 Tu-in ahihleh Kha Siangthoʼ hong sawlna mangin, kei tungah bang thu hong piang ding hiam, cih thei lopi-in Jerusalem khua ah a pai ding ka hi hi." 
Acts20:23 Thongkiatna le gimna ka thuak nading thu bekbek, ka omna khua khempeuh ah Kha Siangtho in hong gen tawntung hi." 
Acts20:24 Ahi zongin Topa Jesu in kei sep dingin a hong piak, Pasian hehpihna hangin Lungdamna Thu, mite kiangah gen ding nasep ka tangtut zawh nakleh kei nuntakna ah bangbang hong piang taleh a thupi-in ka ngaihsun kei hi." 
Acts20:25 “A beisa hunah Pasianʼ Ukna thu a hilhin note lakah kong vak kawikawi a, ahi zongin tu-in kuamah in nong muhkik nawn loh ding uh ka thei hi." 
Acts20:26 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni mahmah in note tungah limtakin kong gen nop thu in: Note khat peuhpeuh Pasian tawh kikhenin siatna na tuah uh leh keiʼ tavuan hi nawn lo hi. 
Acts20:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah Pasianʼ thu kong gen loh khat zong om nawn lo hi. 
Acts20:28 Kha Siangtho in noteʼ khut sungah a hong koih pawlpi mite le nomau pumpi mahmah limtakin na kem un. Pasian in a Tapa a sihna tawh a ngah a pawlpi hoihtakin a kemte na hi ta un. 
Acts20:29 Kei ka om nawn loh ciangin, sa gilote in gannote a phial gawp bangin, mi pawl khat in thu um mite hong phial gawp ding lamtak ka thei hi." 
Acts20:30 Note sung mahmah panin zong mi pawl khat in thu um mite khemin a zol khiat hun hong tung ding hi. 
Acts20:31 Tua ahih ciangin limtakin kiging unla, kum thum sung tawntung khitui naptui tawh note khempeuh ka hong thuhilhna na ciamteh un." 
Acts20:32 “Tu-in Pasianʼ khut sung le ama dikna thu sungah note ka hong ap hi. Amah in note hong khangtosak thei-in, ama mite khempeuh adingin a koih thuphate note tungah hong pia thei hi." 
Acts20:33 Kuama neihsa, ngun, kham le puante en dingin ka ngaihsun ngei kei hi." 
Acts20:34 Kei le ka kithuahpihteʼ kisapna khempeuh ka ngah theih nadingin keima khut mahmah tawh na ka sepna thu note in na thei uh hi. 
Acts20:35 Topa Jesu mahmah in, ‘Ngahna sangin piak khiatna ah lungdamna lian zaw hi,’ a cihna phawk kawmin nakpi takin nasepna tawh na khempeuh ah a zawngkhalte huh ding hi hang, ci-in note kiangah kong lak khinzo hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Acts20:36 Paul in hih bangin kam a vaikhak khit ciangin a vekpi-un khukdin uh a, Paul in thu a ngen hi." 
Acts20:37 Amaute a kikhen dingin mangpha a kikhak uh ciangin khatlekhat kilen kikawi-in a kap uh hi. 
Acts20:38 Paul in, “Kuamah in nong mukik nawn kei ding uh hi,” a cihna hangin a dah mahmah uh hi. Amaute in teembaw tung ciang dong Paul a hong kha uh hi." 
Acts21:1 Amaute tawh ka kikhen khit uh ciangin teembaw tawh pai suakin Kos tuikulh ka tung uh hi. A zing ciangin Rods tuikulh ka tung uh a, tua lai panin a zing ciangin Patara khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts21:2 Tua lai panin Foenisia gamah a pai ding teembaw khat na om ahih manin tua teembaw tuangin ka pai uh hi. 
Acts21:3 Saipras tuikulh a kigal muhna mun ka tun uh ciangin tua tuikulh leitaw lam pang kantanin Syria gam lam manawhin ka paisuak uh a, Taia khua ka tun uh ciangin teembaw in a van puakte suah ahih manin teembaw tung pan ka tuak khia uh hi." 
Acts21:4 Tua khua ah ka kan uh leh thu um mi pawl khat na om uh a, amaute kiangah nipikal khat sung ka taam uh hi. Jerusalem khua ah Paul a pai loh nadingin Kha Siangthoʼ lamlahna tawh amaute in a gen uh hi." 
Acts21:5 Amaute kiang panin ka ciahkhiat ding uh hun hong tun ciangin ka ding khia uh a, a zite a tate uh tawh a vekpi-un khua nawl ciang hong zui uh hi. Tuipi gei ka tun uh ciangin khukdinin thu ka ngen uh hi." 
Acts21:6 Tua ciangin khatlekhat mangpha kikhakin teembaw tungah ka tuang uh a, amaute zong a inn uh ah a ciah uh hi." 
Acts21:7 Taia khua panin teembaw tawh pai-in Tolemais khua ka tung uh a, tua lai ah thu um mite kiangah sun khat kulhin amaute tawh ka kiho uh hi." 
Acts21:8 A zing ciangin ding leuleu-in Sisaria khua ka tung uh a, Pasian thu a hilh Filip’ inn ah tungin tua lai ah ka taam uh hi. Tua pa pen Jerusalem khua-a a kiteel mi sagihte sungah a kihel ahi hi." 
Acts21:9 Amah in Pasian thu a hilh ta nungak li nei hi. 
Acts21:10 Tua lai ah tawl khat ka taam khit uh ciangin Judea gam panin Agabas min nei kamsang khat hong tung hi. 
Acts21:10 Tua lai ah tawl khat ka taam khit uh ciangin Judea gam panin Agabas min nei kamsang khat hong tung hi. 
Acts21:11 Koteʼ kiangah amah hong pai-in Paulʼ kawnggak hong laksak a, tua kawnggak tawh ama khut le a khete a gakcip khit ciangin, “Kha Siangtho in, ‘Jerusalem khua sungah hih bangin Jew mite in hih kawnggak nei pa hencip dinga, Gentail miteʼ khut sungah pia ding hi,’ ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Acts21:12 Hih thu ka zak uh ciangin kote le tua lai-a om thu um mite in Jerusalem ah Paul a pai loh nadingin ka thum uh hi. 
Acts21:13 Ahi zongin Paul in, “Bang hangin hih bangin kapin ka lungsim a tapkhap nadingin gamta na hi uh hiam? Jerusalem khua ah khihcipna a thuak ding bek hi loin, Topa Jesu hangin a si ding ciang dongin a kithawi sa ka hi hi,” ci-in a hong dawng hi." 
Acts21:14 Thu ka gen pihpih uh hangin hong mang zo lo ahih manin, ka cih nading uh thei nawn loin, “Topaʼ deihna bangbang hi tahen,” ci-in ka om ta uh hi." 
Acts21:15 Tua lai ah tawl khat ka taam khit uh ciangin ka vante uh kithawi-in Jerusalem khua a zuan dingin ka dinkhiat uh ciangin," 
Acts21:16 Sisaria khua panin thu um mi pawl khat in zong hong zui uh a, ka tun nading uh Mnasonʼ inn ah hong paipih uh hi. Mnason pen Saipras tuikulh gam mi hi a, sawt pek a kipanin thu um mi a na hi khin sa ahi hi." 
Acts21:17 Jerusalem khua ka tun uh ciangin thu um mite in lungdam mahmah in a hong hopih uh hi. 
Acts21:18 A zing ciangin James kiangah Paul tawh ka hawh uh a, tua lai ah pawlpi upa khempeuh a na om uh hi." 
Acts21:18 A zing ciangin James kiangah Paul tawh ka hawh uh a, tua lai ah pawlpi upa khempeuh a na om uh hi." 
Acts21:19 Paul in amaute hopih a, Pasian in amah Paul tungtawnin Gentail mite lakah na a sepna khempeuh a banbanin a cing takin a gen hi." 
Acts21:20 Ama thugen teng a zak khit uh ciangin a vekpi-un Pasian a phat uh hi. Tua ciangin Paul kiangah, “Sanggam aw, hih lai ah na theih ding thu khat om hi. Hih lai ah thu um Jew mi tampi tak om a, amaute in thukham nak zuih mahmah uh hi." 
Acts21:21 Gentail mite lak a om Jew mi khempeuh tungah na thuhilhna, amaute in Moses thukham zui loin, Jew ngeina zui nawn loin, a tate uh zong vun a at loh nadingun na thugente khempeuh, hih lai-a om Jew mite tungah kigen hi." 
Acts21:22 Hih lai nong tun khitna thu amaute in pel loin za khin ding uh ahih manin bang cih ding ihi hiam? 
Acts21:23 Tua ahih manin kong gen bangun gamta in. Pasian tungah thuciamna a bawl khin sa mihing li om hi. 
Acts21:24 Tua mite tawh va kipawl inla, a kisiansuahna uh ah nang zong va kihelin, a sum bei teng khempeuh nangmah in sik in. A kisiansuah khit uh ciangin amaute in a sam uh met thei ta ding uh hi. Hih bangin gamta lecin a beisa huna nangma thu a kigente khempeuh a man khat zong om loin, nang mahmah zong Moses Thukham a zui na hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Acts21:25 Thu um Gentail mite tawh kisai-in ahihleh, amaute in milim biakna an khat peuhpeuh, sasi le a si kiluang khiasak loin gawlmek a kigo sate a nek loh nading uh le numei tawh khialhna panin a kikep nading uh hoih hi, ci-in thu khensatin lai ka khak khinzo uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts21:26 Tua ahih ciangin Paul, a zing ciangin tua mi lite tawh va pai khawmin kisiansuahna a va bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin biakinn sungah amah va pai a, a kisiansuah hunsung uh a hun sawt ding tan, tua mi lite adingin biakna a kipiak ding ni a va zasak hi." 
Acts21:27 Tua ni sagih hunsung a bei dektak ciangin Asia gam panin a hong pai Jew mite pawl khat in, biakinn sungah Paul a omna a mu uh hi. Amaute in mihonte sosuah in Paul man uh a," 
Acts21:28 “Israel mite aw, hong huh un. Mun khempeuh ah thu hilh kawikawi-in, Moses Thukham le hih biakinn langpangin mi khempeuh kiangah Israel mite a hong gensia pa ahi hi. Tu-in Gentail mite nangawn biakinn sungah hong paipihin hih biakinn siangtho a ninsak hi,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts21:29 (Hih bang a cihtheihna uh pen khua sungah Paul le Efesa khuami Trofimas a kikhawl mu uh a, Paul in biakinn sungah tua mipa a lutpih a sa kha uh ahi hi.)" 
Acts21:30 Tua ciangin hih thu in khua sung khempeuh hong zel a, mite hong tai-in hong kikhawmin Paul man uh a, biakinn pua lamah kai khia-in, biakinn kongkhakte a khak pah uh hi." 
Acts21:31 Mihonte in Paul that dingin a kithawi laitakun Jerusalem khua sung buai mahmah hi, ci-in Rom galkap mangpa kiangah thu na kipuak hi." 
Acts21:32 Galkap mangpa in zong thakhatin galkap bute le galkapte samin mihonte lak a va kidenna uh hi. Mihonte in galkapte tawh hong pai lam a muh uh ciangin Paul a sat nawn kei uh hi. 
Acts21:33 Paul kiangah galkap mangpa hong pai-in man a, sikkhau nih tawh Paul a khih nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin, “Hih mipa kua hi a, bang gamta ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin," 
Acts21:34 mihonte sung panin pawl khat in thu khat genin, pawl khat in a dang khat a gen hi. Mihon kibuai lua a, bang teng taktak hiam, cih thei khia zo lo ahih manin galkap inn ah a paipih nadingun a mite thu a pia hi." 
Acts21:35 Galkap huang sung lutna kahlei a tun uh ciangin mihonte in nehcip lua uh ahih manin galkapte in Paul laam to-in a paipih uh hi. 
Acts21:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihonte in hong nungzuihin, “Amah that un,” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts21:37 Amaute in galkap huang sungah Paul a lutpih dektak laitakun Paul in galkap mangpa kiangah, “Nang tung thu tawm khat kong gen thei ding hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin galkap mangpa in, “Grik pau siam hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Acts21:38 Tua ahih manin tu ma lamin kumpi lehdo dingin mihing tul li tawh gam sungah a pai Egypt mipa hibuang kei ni teh maw?” a ci hi. 
Acts21:39 Paul in, “Kei pen Silisia gam Tarsas khua-a suak Jew mi ka hi a, khua thupi sungah a teeng mi ka hi hi. Nong hehpihna-in hih mihonte tungah thu hong gensak in,” a ci hi." 
Acts21:40 Galkap mangpa in zong thu a gen ding phal ahih manin kahlei cial tungah Paul dinga, mite a gamdaih nadingin a khut a van hi. Mite a gamdaih khit ciangin Paul in Hebru pau-in mite tungah thu gen a," 
Acts22:1 “Pate, ute, khangualte aw, hih thu ah bangmah ka mawh lohna thu kong gen laitakin na ngai un,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:2 Hebru pau-in thu a genna mihonte in a zak uh ciangin amaute gamdai zaw kan uh ahih manin Paul in a thugen zomin," 
Acts22:3 “Kei pen Silisia gam Tarsas khua-a suak Jew mi ka hi a, ahi zongin hih lai Jerusalem khua ah Gamalielʼ khutnuai ah sangnaupang hi-in a khangto ka hi hi. I pu i pateʼ Thukham limtakin hong kihilh a, tu-a note zah mahin Pasian tungah a kipia mi khat ka hi hi." 
Acts22:4 Hih Thu a zui numei pasal a kuamah peuh manin thong sung ka denna a, sihna ciang dongin amaute ka bawlsia hi." 
Acts22:5 Hih ka thugente a man ahihna thu, siampi lianpen pa le upa khempeuh in hong gen thei ding uh hi. Damaskas khua-a om i Jew mipihte ka lah dingin amaute in lai hong pia uh ahih manin, upate in gim a piak theih nadingun tua khua-a om thu um mite manin sikkhau khihin Jerusalem khua ah a ciahpih dingin ka va pai hi." 
Acts22:6 “Damaskas khua a zuan dingin pai-in ka tun dektak sunkim pawl laitakin, thakhat thu-in van panin ka kimkot hong taangzaih hi." 
Acts22:7 Leilak ah pukin ka om laitakin awging khat ka za a, ‘Saul, Saul! Bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam?’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:8 Kei zong, ‘Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin, ‘Nangmah in na hong bawlsiat, Nazareth khuami Jesu ka hi hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Acts22:9 Ka tonpih mite in a khuavak taang mu uh a, ahi zongin keiʼ tungah thu hong gen paʼ awging za lo uh hi." 
Acts22:10 Tua ciangin kei zong, ‘Topa aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin amah in, ‘Tho inla, Damaskas khua ah pai in. Nangʼ hih dingin Pasian in a seh sa thu khempeuh, tua khua panin hong kigen ding hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Acts22:11 Tua khuavak taang lua hangin khua mu thei nawn lo ka hih manin ka tonpihte in ka khutin hong lenin Damaskas khua ah a hong paipih uh hi. 
Acts22:12 “Tua khua ah Ananias min nei, Thukham limtakin zui-in biakna hahkat mahmah, Damaskas khua-a om Jew mite in a zahtak mahmah mi khat a na om hi." 
Acts22:13 Amah hong pai-in ka kiangah hong dinga, ‘Sanggam Saul aw, khua mukik in,’ hong cih phetin ka mit hong vakin amah ka mu thei pah hi." 
Acts22:14 Tua ciangin amah in, ‘I pu i pateʼ Pasian in ama deihna a thei ding, a thuman a Nasem pa a mu ding le ama kam mahmah tawh a thugen a za dingin nang hong teel khinzo hi." 
Acts22:15 Tua ahih manin na muh sa le na zak sa thu khempeuh, mi khempeuh tungah genin teci a pang ding na hi hi." 
Acts22:16 Tu-in bang ngak lai ding na hi hiam? Tho inla, Pasian kiangah thu ngenin kituiphum inla, na mawhnate silsiangsak in,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:17 “Tua ciangin Jerusalem khua ah ka ciahkik a, biakinn sungah thu ngenin ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi." 
Acts22:18 Tua ka maang sungah Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih lai-a om mite in keima thu na gennate hong um lo ding uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua panin kuan khia mengmeng in,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:19 Kei zong, ‘Kikhopna innte ah pai kawikawi-in nangma thu hong um mite manin ka sat gawpna thu amaute mahmah in teltakin hong thei uh hi." 
Acts22:20 Nangma thu a gen Stefen a kithah laitakin kei mahmah zong ka om a, tua a kithahna thukimpihin a thatteʼ puante nangawn ka kepsak hi,’ ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Acts22:21 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Gentail mite omna gamlapi ah hong sawl ding ka hih manin pai peuh in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:22 Paul in Gentail mite kiang a pai nading thu a gen matengin mite in limtakin a ngai uh hi. Ahi zongin tu-a thu a pulak ciangin a aw neihzah uh tawh mite kiko-in, “Leitungah hih bang mi omsak kei un! That un! A hing dingin kilawm lo!” ci-in a awng uh hi." 
Acts22:23 Mihonte heh lua-in awngkek gawp uh a, a puan uh suahin vanah lawnin, leivui zong van lamah a lawn uh hi." 
Acts22:24 Tua ciangin Rom galkap mangpa in galkap huang sungah Paul a paipih nadingun thu pia a, bang hangin Jew mite hih bangin ama tungah hehin awngkek gawp uh ahi hiam, ci-in a theih nadingin a satsak hi." 
Acts22:25 Amaute in sat dingin a hen khit uh ciangin Paul in a gei-a ding galkap bupa kiangah, “Khial hi, ci-in thu nangawn a kisit nai lo Rom mi khat na sat ding uh ngeina ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts22:26 Galkap bupa in hih thu a zak ciangin galkap mangpa kiangah pai-in, “A bangci na hi hiam? Hua mipa, Rom gam mi ahi hi,” a cih ciangin," 
Acts22:27 galkap mangpa zong Paul kiangah va pai-in, “Rom gam mi na hi hiam, hong gen dih in,” a cih leh Paul in, “Ka hi mah hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts22:28 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in, “Hih Rom gam mi suah nadingin sum tampi tawh ka lei hi,” a ci hi. Paul in, “Kei ka pianin Rom mi-a piang ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts22:29 Tua ahih manin Paul thu a dong dingin a gei-a om mite a paikhia uh hi. Sikkhau tawh a khih khit ciangin Paul pen Rom gam mi ahihna a phawk ciangin galkap mangpa zong lau-in a lunghimawh hi. 
Acts22:30 Jew mite in bang hangin Paul mawhsak ahi uh hiam, ci-in teltakin galkap mangpa in thei nuam ahih manin a zing ciangin Paul a khihsakna sikkhaute sutsak a, siampi liante le upate thu kikupna a nei dingin a samsak hi. Tua ciangin Paul paikhiat pihin uliante mai ah a dingsak hi." 
Acts23:1 Paul in ulian kikhawmte limtakin enin, “Lawmte aw, tu ni ciang dong ka nuntak sung tawntung, Pasian mai ah kisuanna ka nei het kei hi,” a cih leh" 
Acts23:2 siampi lianpen pa Ananias in Paul gei-a omte kiangah, “A muk na betsak un,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:3 Paul in, “Leikang tawh a kizut kulh tawh a kibang pa aw, Pasian in nang hong beeng gawp taktak ding hi. Keimah thusitna ah Thukham a zui ding pa hi napi-in Thukham zui loin kei hong kibet nadingin thu na pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:4 Paul gei-a om mite in, “Pasianʼ siampi lianpen pa na zahko hi,” a cih ciangun" 
Acts23:5 Paul in, “Lawmte aw, siampi lianpen pa ahih lam ka thei kei hi. Lai Siangtho in, ‘Na mite uh a ukpa na gensia kei ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts23:6 Paul in tua uliante lakah Saddusi mi le Farisi mi a om lam a muh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Lawmte aw, kei pen Farisi miteʼ suan ahi Farisi mi ka hi hi. Misite hingkik ding hi, ci-in lamenin upna ka neih manin hih lai ah thusitna ka thuak hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:7 Tua thu a gen khit phetin Saddusi mite le Farisi mite kitawng pah uh a, tua uliante khen nih a pha uh hi." 
Acts23:8 (Bang hang hiam cih leh Saddusi mite in mi a sih khit ciangin hingkik nawn lo ding hi. Vantungmi ahi a, kha ahi zongin om lo hi, ci uh hi. Ahi zongin Farisi mite in hih thu thumte om hi, ci-in a um uh hi.)" 
Acts23:9 Amauʼ kitotna awging hupha semsem a, Farisi mite pawl sung a om Thukham hilh siate pawl khat hong dingin nakpi takin hong pau uh a, “Hih mipa tungah khialhna them khat zong om lo hi. Vantungmi ahi a, Pasianʼ sawl khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin ama tungah thu a gen hi kha thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts23:10 Amauteʼ kitotna hong husia semsem ahih manin amaute in Paul bal thang gawp kha ding hi, ci-in galkap mangpa lunghimawh hi. Tua ahih manin galkapte in Paul va kai khia-in galkap inn ah a paipih nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Acts23:11 Tua zanin Paul kiangah Topa hong dinga, “Hang takin om in. Hih Jerusalem khua sungah keima thu genin teci na pan mah bangin Rom khuapi ah zong keima thu genin teci na pang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:12 A zing ciangin Jew mite pawl khat kikhawm uh a, Paul i thah khit ciang bekin an ne tui dawn pan ding hi hang, ci-in kiciamna a nei uh hi." 
Acts23:13 Hih bangin a vaihawm mihing sawm li val bang a pha uh hi. 
Acts23:14 Siampi liante le upate kiangah pai uh a, “Paul ka thah khit mateng uh anletui ka nek loh nadingun khauh takin thuciamna khat ka nei khin uh hi." 
Acts23:15 Tu-in note le uliante in galkap mangpa tungah thu zasak unla, Paulʼ thu a cingin a thei nuam kineihin, note kiangah Paul hong paipihsak nadingin na ngen un. Hih lai mun hong tun ma-in kote in lamkal ah ka na that ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts23:16 Ahi zongin hih a thahsawmna thu uh, Paul sanggamnuʼ tapa in za ahih manin galkap inn ah va pai-in Paul kiangah a va gen hi." 
Acts23:17 Tua ciangin Paul in galkap bute khat samin ama kiangah, “Galkap mangpa kiangah hih tangvalpa va paipih in. Amah in thugen ding khat a nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:18 Galkap bupa in zong galkap mangpa kiangah va paipih a, “Hih tangvalpa in nang tungah gen nop khat hong nei ahih manin nang kiangah kong paipih nadingin thong kia Paul in a hong sawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:19 Galkap mangpa in zong a khutin tua pa lenin amau gel guak paikhia uh a, “Bang hong gen nuam na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts23:20 Tangvalpa in, “Uliante in Paulʼ thu a cingin a thei nuam kineihin, zing ciangin amaute kiangah Paul na paisak nadingin Jew mi aana neite in nget ding a thukim uh hi." 
Acts23:21 Ahi zongin lamkal ah Paul a pangsim dingin mihing sawm li val bang om uh ahih manin amauteʼ hong ngetna pia kei in. Tua mihing sawm lite in Paul a thah khit mateng uh anletui a nek loh nadingun kiciamna khat bawl khin uh hi. Amaute a kithawi sa-in om uh a, nangma thupiak ding bek a ngak uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:22 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in tangvalpa kiangah, “Kei kiangah hih thu nong kohna thu kuamah theisak kei in,” ci-in a vaikhak khit ciangin a ciahsak hi." 
Acts23:23 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in galkap bute nih samin, “Sisaria khua ah a pai ding galkap za nih sam unla, sakol tung tuang galkap sawm sagih le tei tawi galkap za nih tawh zong pai unla, tu zan nai kua hunin ding khia un." 
Acts23:24 Paulʼ tuan nading sakol pawl khat zong keng unla, Menzipa Feliks kiangah hoihtakin va tunpih un,” a ci hi." 
Acts23:25 Tua ciangin galkap mangpa in hih a nuai-a bangin lai khat gelh hi: 
Acts23:26 “A Lian Menzipa aw, Keimah Klaudias Lysias in hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi." 
Acts23:27 Jew mite in hih mipa manin that dektak uh hi. Rom gam mi ahih lam ka theih ciangin ka galkapte tawh pai-in ka va hon khia hi. 
Acts23:28 Amauteʼ mawhsakna bang thu ahi hiam, ci-in thei nuam ka hih manin thusit dingin amauʼ uliante kiangah ka paipih hi." 
Acts23:29 Thongkhiat nading le sihna thuak nadingin khialhna a bawlna bangmah ka mu kei hi. A mawhsaknate uh amauʼ thukham ngeina tawh kisai hi lel hi. 
Acts23:30 Jew mite pawl khat in amah a thahsawmna thu hong kikoh ciangin nangma kiangah puak dingin ka ngaihsun hi. Amah a mawhsakte in nangma mai ah thu a hong gen nadingun amaute kiangah ka gen hi,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
Acts23:31 Galkapte zong a thu ngahna bangun gamta uh a, tua zanin Paul paikhiat pihin Antipatris khua dong a paipih uh hi." 
Acts23:32 A zing ciangin khe galkapte kilehkik uh a, sakol tung tuang galkap teng bek a kha suaksak uh hi." 
Acts23:33 Amaute in Sisaria khua ah Paul tunpih uh a, menzipa kiangah a lai puak uh pia-in, ama tungah Paul a ap uh hi." 
Acts23:34 Menzipa in tua laikhak sim a, koi lai gam mi na hi hiam, ci-in Paul a dong hi. Amah in Sisaria gam mi ahih lam a theih ciangin," 
Acts23:35 “Na langte hong tun ciangin thu kong sit ding hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin, Herod in a lam inn sungah Paul koihin a cin nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Acts24:1 Tua khit ni nga ciangin siampi lianpen pa Ananias le upate, amauʼ thu a gensak ding Tertullas a kici mipa tawh Jerusalem khua panin Sisaria khua ah hong tung uh a, menzipa Feliks kiangah pai-in Paul a mawhsakna uh thute a va gen uh hi." 
Acts24:2 Thugen dingin Tertullas a kisawl ciangin hih a nuai-a bangin mawhsakna thu a gen hi: “A Lian Menzipa! Nangma makaih siamna hangin hun saupi sung nuam takin ka om khin uh a, koteʼ gam sung a hoih nadingin puahphatna zong tampi tak kibawl khin hi." 
Acts24:3 Hih thute hangin nang tungah mi khempeuh ka lungdam mahmah uh hi. 
Acts24:4 Na hun tampi tak hong beisak nuam lo ka hih manun, thu a tom theithei a kong gennate uh hehpihna tawh nong ngaih nadingin kong thum uh hi." 
Acts24:5 Hih mipa, buaina a piangsak, a kihtakhuai mi ahihna ka mu uh hi. Mun khempeuh a om Jew mite lakah buaina piangsak a, Nazareth mi pawl a kicite a makai pa ahi hi." 
Acts24:6 Biakinn nangawn thusim loin min siatsak sawm ahih manin amah ka man uh hi. (Komauʼ thukham tawh kizui-in ama tungah thu khen ka sawm uh hi. 
Acts24:7 Ahi zongin galkap mangpa Lysias hong pai-in kote kiang panin amah hong kai khia hi. 
Acts24:8 Tua ciangin amah a mawhsakte, nangma kiangah hong pai nadingin Lysias in thu a pia hi.) Tu-in hih mipa thu sit lecin, ka mawhsakna uh thu khempeuh nangmah in na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts24:9 Jew mite in zong panpih uh a, hih a gen khempeuh a man mah ahi hi, ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Acts24:10 Paul in thu a gen nadingin menzipa in a khut tawh a lah ciangin Paul in, “Hih minamte tungah thukhenin sau veipi na om khitna thu ka hong thei hi; kei hong kimawhsaknate nangma mai ah phel theih nading hun ngah ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
Acts24:11 Nang mahmah in na theih ding mah bangin, Jerusalem khua ah Pasian bia dingin ka paina pen ni sawm le ni nih khawng pha pan hi." 
Acts24:12 Biakinn sung ahi a, kikhopna inn sung ahi a, khua sung mun khat peuhpeuh ah ahi zongin mi khat peuhpeuh tawh ka kitotna ahi a, mihon in thusia a bawl nadingin ka hanthotna ahi zongin, hih Jew mite in hong mu het lo ding uh hi." 
Acts24:13 Tu-a kei hong mawhsaknate uh zong a manna thu hong lak thei het lo ding uh hi. 
Acts24:14 Ahi zongin nangma kiangah kong pulak nop thu in: Amaute in man lo hi, a cih uh tua Thu zui-in koteʼ pu le pateʼ Pasian ka bia hi. Mosesʼ Thukham laibu sunga a kigelh thu khempeuh le kamsangteʼ laibu sunga a kigelh khempeuh zong ka um hi." 
Acts24:15 Amauteʼ up le lamet mah bangin, Pasian in miphate le misiate a kibangin sihna panin hingkiksak khawm ding hi, ci-in umin ka lamen hi." 
Acts24:16 Tua ahih manin Pasian mai le mite mai ah lungsim kisuanna a om het lo dingin a tawntungin ka gamta hi. 
Acts24:17 “Jerusalem panin kum tampi sung ka paikhiat khit ciangin ka mipihte a kihuhna sumte a puak ding le gan go-in Pasian a bia dingin Jerusalem ah ka pai hi. 
Acts24:18 Biakinn sungah keimah kisiansuahna ka bawl khit ciangin amaute in kei hong mu uh a, buaina zong bangmah om lo hi." 
Acts24:19 Tua laitakin Asia gam panin a hong pai Jew mite pawl khat om uh hi. Kei mawhsak nading thu a neih uh leh amaute mahmah hong pai-in nangma mai ah hong gen ding uh a kilawm ahi hi. 
Acts24:20 Tua ahih kei leh zong, uliante mai ah thusitna thuakin ka om laitakin ka mawhna bang mu uh ahi hiam, cih thu hih mite gensak in." 
Acts24:21 Amauteʼ mai ah, ‘Misite hingkik ding hi, ci-in ka upna hangin kei tungah thu nong khen uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen sim loh amauteʼ heh nading bangmah om lo hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi." 
Acts24:22 Tua ciangin tua Thu paizia teltakin a thei Feliks in a thusitna hial bawl a, “Galkap mangpa Lysias hong tun ciangin na thu uh kong khensak ding hi,” ci-in a gen khit ciangin," 
Acts24:23 Paul cin ding tavuan a la bupa kiangah thu pia a, “Paul hoihtakin cingsak inla, ahi zongin a lawmte in a kisapna peuhpeuh a piak theih nadingun kimuh theih nading hun pia zel in,” ci-in a vaikhak hi." 
Acts24:24 Tua zawh a sawt loin Feliks le Jew mi ahi a zi Drusilla, Paul a kikhumna ah hong pai-in amah sam khiasak uh a, Paul in Jesu Khris upna thu a gennate a nupa-un a ngai uh hi." 
Acts24:25 Ahi zongin Paul in thu gengenin, a hoihin a gamtat nading, pumpi ki-uk zawh nading le hong tung ding Thukhenna Hunte a gen tohtoh ciangin, Feliks hong lau a, “Va paikik phot in. Hun ka ngah ciangin kong samkik ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Acts24:26 Paul in sumgolh zong hong pia thei leh ci-in ngaihsun kawm ahih manin Paul kiangah va pai zelin a kiho zelzel uh ahi hi. 
Acts24:27 Ahi zongin tua zawh kum nih hong bei ciangin Feliks sepna pen Porsias Festas in hong laih hi. Feliks in Jew miteʼ pahtak ding ut ahih manin thong sungah Paul a omsak suak hi. 
Acts25:1 Tua gam a uk dingin Festas hong tunzawh ni thum ciangin Sisaria khua panin Jerusalem khua ah a va zin hi. 
Acts25:2 Tua lai panin siampi liante le Jew upate in Paul a mawhsakna thu uh ama kiangah na gen uh hi. Amaute in lamkal ah Paul that lum nuam uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua ah Paul a paisak nadingin Festas kiangah nakpi takin a thum uh hi. 
Acts25:3  
Acts25:4 Festas in, “Sisaria khua ah Paul kikhum a, kei zong ciahkik baih ding ka hih manin," 
Acts25:5 Paul in khialhna khat peuhpeuh gamta kha ahihleh zong ama khialhna thu a gen dingin na makaite un kei hong zui uh hen,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts25:6 Tua lai ah Festas ni giat, ni sawm bang a taam khit ciangin Sisaria khua ah a ciah hi. A zing ciangin thukhen tokhom tungah tu a, ama mai ah Paul a kipaipih nadingin thu a pia hi." 
Acts25:7 Paul hong kipaipih ciangin Jerusalem khua panin a hong pai Jew mite in amah umcih a, thu lian pipi tawh Paul a mawhsakna uh tampi gen uh a, ahi zongin a mawhsaknate uh man hi, ci-in a lahtel theih uh bangmah om lo hi." 
Acts25:8 Paul in, “Jew miteʼ Thukham ahi a, Rom gam uk kumpipa tungah ahi zongin ka khialhna bangmah om het lo hi,” ci-in a kisut hi." 
Acts25:9 Jew miteʼ pahtak ding ut ahih manin Festas in Paul kiangah, “Jerusalem khua ah va pai-in, keima mai mahah hih thute tawh kisai-in thusitna hong kinei leh na ut hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin" 
Acts25:10 Paul in, “Keimah thu hong kisit nading munin a kilawmna, gam uk kumpipa thukhenna mai ah ka va ding ding hi. Nang mahmah in zong teltakin na theih ding bangmahin Jew mite tungah bangmah siatna ka bawl kei hi." 
Acts25:11 Thukham palsatin sihna thuak nading thu khat peuhpeuh a gamta hi leng, suahtak nading thu ka gen het kei ding hi. Hih amauteʼ hong mawh zonnate a man lo ahihleh zong kuamah in amauteʼ khut sungah hong ap zo lo ding uh hi. Gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu ka khan hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts25:12 Tua ciangin Festas in, “Gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu khan khin na hih manin ama kiangah na pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:13 Tua zawh tawl khat khit ciangin gam uk kumpipaʼ khutnuai mahah a uk sawn Agrippa le a sanggamnu Bernis, a hong tung thak Festas kiangah a hawh dingin Sisaria khua ah a hong pai uh hi." 
Acts25:14 Tawl khat a taam khit uh ciangin Festas in tua kumpipaʼ kiangah Paulʼ thu gen a, “Feliks in thong sunga a na nusiat mi khat hih lai ah a om hi." 
Acts25:15 Jerusalem khua ah ka va pai ciangin Jew siampi liante le upate in amah a mawhsakna uh thu tampi gen uh a, amah mawhsakin thu ka khen nading hong gen uh hi." 
Acts25:16 Ahi zongin keʼn ka dawnna ah, ‘Mi khat peuhpeuh in mawhsakna a thuak ciangin, mawhsakna a thuak pa le a mawhsakte maitang kimu-in thu kiseel a, mawhsakna a thuak pa in amah a kiphel theih nading thugenna hun a ngah matengin, mawhsak thukhenna piak ding pen Rom ngeina hi lo hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Acts25:17 Ka cih mah bangin hih lai ah amaute a hong tun uh a zing ciangin thukhenna tokhom tungah tu pahin, a mipa hong kipaipih nadingin thu ka pia hi." 
Acts25:18 A langte hong ding uh a, a mawhna a lian pipi hong gen ding uh hi, ci-in ka up leh, tua bang hong hi lo hi." 
Acts25:19 Amauʼ thu kituhna pen amauʼ biakna thu le a si khin sa hi napi-in Paul in, ‘Hing hi,’ a cih Jesuʼ thu peuh na hi lel hi." 
Acts25:20 Hih bang thu ka kan khiatna ding zia thei lo ka hih manin Paul kiangah, ‘Hih thute tawh kisai-in thu kisit dingin Jerusalem ah va pai lecin na ut hiam?’ ci-in ka dot leh amah ut lo hi." 
Acts25:21 Amah in a zu khan a, thong mahah kikoih lai-in gam uk kumpipa in ama thu a khensak nading a ngen hi. Tua ahih manin gam uk kumpipa kiangah ka puakkhiat theih mateng thong sungah a khum nadingun thu ka pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts25:22 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Festas kiangah, “Kei mahmah in hih mipaʼ thugen za nuam ing,” a cih ciangin, “Zing ciangin na za ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Acts25:23 Tua ahih manin a zing ciangin a thupi takin lian bawl mahmahna tawh Agrippa le Bernis hong pai uh a, galkap maangte le khua sung uliante tawh kikhopna inn lianpi sungah a hong lut uh hi. Tua ciangin Festas in Paul hong kitumpih nadingin thu a pia hi." 
Acts25:24 Tua ciangin Festas in, “Kumpi Agrippa le hih lai-a om mi khempeuh aw, hih lai khua hitaleh Jerusalem khua ah hitaleh Jew mi khempeuh in kei tungah amah mawhsakna thu hong gen uh hih mipa na mu uh hi. Hih mipa hinkhawi ding kilawm lo hi, ci-in amaute awng gawp uh hi." 
Acts25:25 Ahi zongin sihna thuak nadingin ama gamtat khialhna bangmah ka mu het kei hi. A mahmah in gam uk kumpipa tungah a zu khan khin ahih manin kumpipa kiangah puak dingin ka ngaihsut sa ahi hi. 
Acts25:26 Ahi zongin kumpipa tungah bang teng taktak gelh ding cih ka thei kei hi. Tua ahih manin ama thu a kikan khit ciangin ka gelh ding thu ka theih nadingin note mai ah, a diakdiakin kumpipa Agrippa mai ah amah kong paipih hi." 
Acts25:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mawhna hih bang teng hi, ci-in gentelna om lopi-in thong kia mi khat, kumpipa kiangah ka puak ding, a thu kicing ka sa zo kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:1 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Paul kiangah, “Tu-in thugen theih nading hun na nei hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin Paul in a khut zanin a kiphel nading thu hong gen a," 
Acts26:2 “Kumpi Agrippa aw, Jew mite in kei hong mawhsakna thu ka kiphel nadingin nangma mai ah tu ni-in hun ngah ka hih manin hampha ka kisa mahmah hi." 
Acts26:3 Nangmah in Jew miteʼ nuntak zia le amauʼ thu kituh theihna thute khempeuh limtakin na theih khit sa ahih manin hampha ka kisa diak hi. Tua ahih manin lungduai takin ka thugente nong ngaih nadingin kong thum hi. 
Acts26:4 “Jew mite khempeuh in ka neu tung a kipan, keima pianna gam le Jerusalem khua-a ka om zia khempeuh hong thei uh hi." 
Acts26:5 Koteʼ biakna sungah a hahkat phadiak Farisi pawl a kicite sunga ka om cil a kipanin ka nuntak zia khempeuh, a gen nop nak uh leh hong gen thei ding uh hi." 
Acts26:6 Ko Israel minam sawm le nihte in Pasianʼ thuciam ngah ding lametna tawh a sun a zanin Pasian ka biabia uh a, ka pu ka pate uh tungah Pasian in a thuciamna ngah ding lamenin ka omna hangin hih lai ah thusitna thuakin a ding ka hi hi. Kumpipa aw, hih thu ka lametna hangin Jew mite in kei hong mawhsak ahi uh hi." 
Acts26:7  
Acts26:8 Bang hangin no Jew mite in Pasian in misite a thawhkiksakna thu um thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Acts26:9 “Nazareth khuami Jesuʼ min a siattheih nadingin langpangin nial ding hi, ci-in kei mahmah in ka ngaihsun ngei hi." 
Acts26:10 Tua mah bangin Jerusalem khua sungah ka sem pah a, siampi liante tung panin thu ngahna tawh Pasianʼ mi tampi thong sungah ka khum hi. Tua mite a sih nadingun thu a kikhen ciangin zong a thukimpih pawl ka hi hi." 
Acts26:11 Kikhopna inn khempeuh ah amaute gim ka thuaksak zelzel a, a thu upnate uh ka khawlsak hi. Amaute tungah heh lua mahmah ka hih manin gamdang nangawn ah pai-in thu umte ka bawlsia hi." 
Acts26:12 “Hih thu hang mahin siampi liante tung panin thu ngahna lai tawh Damaskas khua ah ka va pai hi. 
Acts26:13 Tua hi a, kumpipa aw, Damaskas khua ka tun ma sun laitakin kei leh ka tonpih miteʼ kiimah sun sangin a taang zaw khuavak khat vantung panin hong taangzaih hi." 
Acts26:14 Ka vekpi-un leilak ah ka puk uh a, tua laitakin kei kiangah Hebru pau tawh thu hong kigen a, ‘Saul, Saul aw, bang hangin kei hong bawlsia na hi hiam? Bawngtal in a hawlteʼ ciangzum peek le na a sak zawk bangin keiʼ thu nong nial manin nang adingin na zaw hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts26:15 ‘Topa aw, kua na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dot ciangin Topa in, ‘Na hong bawlsiat Jesu ka hi hi." 
Acts26:16 Tu-in tho-in na khe-in ding in. Keima na a sem dingin a hong sawl dingin nang tungah a hong kilang ka hi hi. Tu ni-a kei nong muhna thu teng le nang tungah ka hong lah lai ding thu khempeuh, midangte tungah a gen ding na hi hi." 
Acts26:17 Israel mite le Gentail mite lakah nang kong sawl dinga, amaute in nang hong suksiat loh nadingun ka hong kem ding hi." 
Acts26:18 Pasianʼ teel miteʼ omna mun a amau om nading mun sanah hong om theih nadingun keimah hong upna uh tawh a mawhna uh a kimaisak theih nadingin Satanʼ khut sung panin Pasianʼ khut sungah a hei khia ding le khuamial panin khuavak lamah hei-in a mit uh khua a musak ding pa na hi hi,’ a hong ci hi." 
Acts26:19 “Tua bang hi a, kumpi Agrippa aw, ka maangmuhna sunga vantung pan a hong pai paʼ thugen ka mang hi." 
Acts26:20 Mite a mawhna uh panin kisikin Pasian kiang a zuat nading uh le a kisikna uh a kilatsak nadingun a gamtat ding uh a masa-in Damaskas khua ah thu hilhin, a zomin Jerusalem khua ah, tua ciangin Jew mite omna gam khempeuh le Gentail mite lakah thu ka hilh hi." 
Acts26:21 Hih bangin ka thuhilhna hangin biakinn sungah ka om laitakin Jew mite in hong manin thah hong sawm uh hi. 
Acts26:22 Ahi zongin Pasian in tu ni ciang dong hong huh ahih manin mi lian mi neu, a kuamah peuh tungah thu a hilh ka hi hi. Keima thuhilhte pen kamsangte le Moses in hong tung ding hi, ci-in a gen thute mah ahi hi." 
Acts26:23 Tua thu in: Khris pen sihna thuakin a hingkik masa pa hi dinga, Jew mite le Gentail mite tungah hotkhiatna khuavak thu a hong gen pa hi ding hi, cihna thu ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:24 Hih bangin amah kiphelna thu Paul in a gen ciangin Festas in, “Paul aw, mihai na hi ta hi. Na pil sinna teng in mihai hong suaksak ta hi,” ci-in nakpi takin a kiko hi." 
Acts26:25 Ahi zongin Paul in, “Menzi Festas aw, mihai ka hi kei a, lungsim pilin thuman a gen ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawn khit ciangin," 
Acts26:26 “Kumpi Agrippa aw, hih thu khempeuh na theih sa ahih manin nangma mai ah hang takin thu ka gen ngam hi. Hih thu pen kuama theih lohna mun simtham a thupiang hi lo ahih manin, a vekpi-in thei khin dingin ka hong um hi." 
Acts26:27 Kumpi Agrippa aw, kamsangteʼ thugente um hi lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Acts26:28 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Paul kiangah, “Hih hun tomno sungin Khristian hong suaksak zo dingin kingaihsun na hi hiam?” a cih ciangin" 
Acts26:29 Paul in, “Nangmah a kipan tu ni-a ka thugen a za mi khempeuh hun tomno sung ahi a, hun sau sungin ahi zongin, hih bangin sikkhau hong kikhihna sim loh, keimah nong batkim nadingun Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts26:30 Tua ciangin kumpi Agrippa le menzi Festas hong ding uh a, Bernis le a tut pih midangte zong hong ding khia uh hi." 
Acts26:31 Amaute a paikhiat khit uh ciangin, “Hih mipa in thongkiat nading ahi a, sih nading ahi zongin a thuak nadingin bangmah om lo hi,” a kici uh hi." 
Acts26:32 Tua ciangin Agrippa in Festas kiangah, “Gam uk kumpipa Sisarʼ tungah a zu na khan khin hikeileh khah ding hi lel hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:1 Italy gamah teembaw tawh ka pai ding uh thu a khen khit uh ciangin Paul le thong kia dangte pawl khat, “Kumpipaʼ Galkapte,” a kici Rom galkapte a uk bu Juliasʼ khut sungah a ap uh hi." 
Acts27:2 Adramittium khua teembaw khawlna panin Asia gam lam manawh dingin a kithawi teembaw ah tuangin ka ding khia uh hi. Masedonia gam Thesalonika khuami Aristarkhas in zong kote hong zui hi. 
Acts27:3 A zing ciangin Sidon khua ka tung uh a, Paul tungah bu Julias dik mahmah ahih manin a lawmte tawh a kimu ding le a lawmte in a kisapnate a piak theih nadingin a pai khiasak hi." 
Acts27:4 Tua lai panin ka ding leuleu uh a, huih in hong maiphut ahih manin Saipras tuikulh pang beelin ka pai uh hi." 
Acts27:5 Silisia le Pamfilia gam tawh a kizom tuipi kantanin ka pai uh a, Lysia gam Myra khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts27:6 Tua lai panin bupa in Alexandria khua pan Italy gam a manawh ding teembaw khat hong mu ahih manin tua teembaw tungah kote hong tuangsak hi. 
Acts27:7 Tua lai panin ni tampi sung damdamin ka pai uh a, haksa pipi-in Nidas khuapi san tak ka tung uh hi. Tua lai panin ka paisuak nop uh hangin huih kiphu zo nawn lo ahih manin Krete tuikulh beelin ka suk pai uh a, Salmone leidawk gei tawnin ka paisuak uh hi." 
Acts27:8 Tuipi gei neh cintenin ka pai uh a, Lasia khua tawh a kigamla lo, Khawlmun Nuam a kici khua khat, haksa pipi-in ka tung leuleu uh hi." 
Acts27:9 Tua lai ah ni tampi sung taam ka hih manun Mawhmaisak Ni hun nangawn kheng khin ahih manin teembaw tawh pai lai ding lauhuai ta hi. Tua ahih manin Paul in amaute kiangah," 
Acts27:10 “Lawmte aw, tu-in teembaw tawh khualzin ding lauhuai ta a, teembaw le a van puakte a siat gen loh, mihing mahmah in zong i sih lawh ding lauhuai hi,” ci-in a ngaihsutna a gen hi." 
Acts27:11 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in Paulʼ thugen sangin teembaw ukpa le teembaw nei paʼ thugen um zaw hi. 
Acts27:12 Phalbi hun sungteng tua ka khawlna mun uh belh dingin hoih lo ahih manin, mi tampiteʼ ngaihsutna ah, pai khia-in ahih theih le Foenik teembaw khawlna ciang tunzawh nading hanciam ding hoih sa uh hi. Tua lai mun pen Krete tuikulh ah teembaw khawlna khat hi a, khang nitumna pan sak nitumna lam a nga teembaw khawlna ahih manin phalbi hun sungteng nuam takin tua lai ah a ki-om thei ding ahi hi." 
Acts27:13 Leitaw lam panin huih hong nun hiauhiau ciangin eiʼ deihna bang hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin teembaw khihna sikkawipi kai khiato uh a, Khawlmun Nuam panin Krete tuikulh a kineh thei zahzahin neh kawmin ka pai uh hi." 
Acts27:14 Ahi zongin a sawt kihal loin, “Leilu Nisuahna Huihpi,” a kici huihpi hat mahmah khat tuikulh lam panin hong nung hi." 
Acts27:15 Teembaw hong mut gawpsak ahih manin nang zo nawn lo a, cih nading kithei nawn lo ahih manin ama hong mutna tuipi lamah ka zui lel uh hi." 
Acts27:16 Kauda tuikulh leitaw lam pang san ka tun uh ciangin tua tuikulh in huihpi tawm khat hong dal ahih manin, teembaw tawh a kikhih khawm gunkuang a siat loh nadingin haksa pipi-in ka hu zo uh hi." 
Acts27:17 Teembaw tungah gunkuang a koih khit uh ciangin, teembaw a kitap khak leh cihna-in a kimkot ah khauhual tawh a gak uh hi. Libya gam tui daina sehnel lakah awk kha ding, ci-in lau uh ahih manin teembaw puan zaak khia suk uh a, huih mutna tawh damdamin a paisak uh hi." 
Acts27:18 Huihpi dai thei tuan lo ahih manin a zing ciangin teembaw puak vante tui sungah a lawn khia uh hi. 
Acts27:19 A thai ciangin teembaw vanzatte pawl khat, a khut mahmah uh tawh tui sungah khia leuleu uh hi." 
Acts27:20 Ni tampi sung ni ahi a, aksi ahi zongin mu loin huihpi nakpi takin hong nung tawntung ahih manin suahtak zawh nading lametna peuhmah om nawn lo hi." 
Acts27:21 Teembaw hawlte an ne loin sau veipi a om khit uh ciangin amaute mai ah Paul hong dinga, “Lawmte aw, keima thugen hong mangin Krete tuikulh panin a paikhia lo hi lehang, hih siatna le supna khempeuh tawh i kipelh ding hi." 
Acts27:22 Ahi zongin tu-in note lunghimawh kei un. Teembaw sia bek dinga, mihing a si kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Acts27:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei tawh a kipawl ka biak Pasianʼ vantungmi, tu zanin ka kiangah hong pai a," 
Acts27:24 ‘Paul aw, lunghimawh kei in. Gam uk kumpipa mai ah na ding dinga, Pasian in nang hong hehpih ahih manin nang le na khualzinpihte khempeuh na suakta ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts27:25 Tua ahih manin lawmte aw, kuamah lunghimawh kei un. Kei tungah hong gen bangin hong piangsak ding hi, ci-in Pasian ka muang hi." 
Acts27:26 Tuikulh gei khat peuhpeuh ah huih in hong tun hamtang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:27 Tua bangin huihpiʼ mutin Mediterranean tuipi tungah teembaw tawh ka laam zawh uh a zan sawm le li zankim laitakin lei tawh kinai ta hi hang, ci-in teembaw hawlte in a ummawh uh hi." 
Acts27:28 Khau mongah sik khihin tui thukna a teh uh ciangin pi za le sawm nih thuk a, a den zek ciangin teh leuleu-in pi sawm kua a thuk hi." 
Acts27:29 Ka teembaw uh le suang a kitah khak ding lau uh ahih manin teembaw nung lam panin teembaw khawlsakna sikkawipi li khia suk uh a, khuavak ding ngakin ka om uh hi." 
Acts27:30 Teembaw panin teembaw hawlte taikhiat sawm uh ahih manin teembaw tung panin gunkuang khia suk uh a, teembaw mailam panin a khawl nading sikkawipi a khia suk ding kineih uh hi." 
Acts27:31 Ahi zongin Paul in galkap bupa le galkapte kiangah, “Teembaw hawlte teembaw tungah hong om nawn kei leh na suakta zo kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:32 Tua ahih manin galkapte in gunkuang a kikhihna khau sattatin a khah khia uh hi. 
Acts27:33 Khua a vak kuan ciangin mite in an a nek nadingun Paul in hanthawn a, “An ne lo tui dawn loin lungkhamin na om zawh uh tu-in ni sawm le li a phak ni hi ta hi." 
Acts27:34 An na nek nadingun kong thum hi. An ne loin na nungta zo kei ding uh hi. Tutungin bangmah na ci peuhmah kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts27:35 Hih bangin thu a gen khit ciangin Paul in anlum la a, amaute khempeuh mai ah Pasian tungah a lungdamna ko-in a anlum balnenin ne dingin a kipan hi." 
Acts27:36 Amaute khempeuh zong a lungsim uh hong nuam a, an a ne ciat uh hi." 
Acts27:37 Tua teembaw sunga om mi a vekpi-in za nih le sawm sagih le guk ka pha uh hi. 
Acts27:38 Mi khempeuh in an a kinek khit ciangin teembaw a zan nadingin a sunga mangbuhte a lawn khia uh hi. 
Acts27:39 Khua hong vak ciangin koi lai gam hiam, cih teembaw hawlte in thei tuan lo uh hi. Ahi zongin tuidawk le a gei-a leilak mu uh a, ahih theih leh tua lai ah teembaw khawlsak dingin a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Acts27:40 Tua ahih ciangin teembaw khihna sikkawipi khaute sattatin tui sungah khia suk uh a, teembaw heina a kizang sing peekpi khihna khaute zong a sut uh hi. Tua ciangin huih in hong mutin tui gei lamah ka pai theih nadingun a mailam a teembaw puan a sang khai uh hi." 
Acts27:41 Ahi zongin teembaw in sehnel hong phukha-in a tum hi. Teembaw mailam lei sungah tumin taang thei nawn lo a, teembaw nung lam pen tuihual in hong satkham gawp hi." 
Acts27:42 Thong kia mi khempeuh tui peekin a tai mang ding uh lau uh ahih manin galkapte in thongkiate thah a sawm uh hi. 
Acts27:43 Ahi zongin galkap bupa in Paul suaktasak nuam ahih manin tua bangin a thah ding uh a kham hi. Tua ahih manin tuipeek thei khempeuh in teembaw panin a nawl ah tui va peekin," 
Acts27:44 a dangte in teembaw sing kitamte lenin a om nadingin thu a pia zaw hi. Tua bangin ka vekpi-un tui gei ah ka suakta uh hi. 
Acts28:1 Leilak ka tunkim khit uh ciangin tua mun pen Malta tuikulh ahihna thu ka thei uh hi. 
Acts28:2 Tua lai-a teeng mite ko tungah hong nuam mahmah uh hi. Guahzu-in khua dam mahmah ahih manin meiphual pi hong cihsak uh a, limtakin zin hong do uh hi." 
Acts28:3 Paul in singkang pawl khat khawmin meipi tungah hong koih a, a mei sa sa ahih manin gul khat hong tai khia-in Paulʼ khut a vial hi." 
Acts28:4 Tua lai-a teeng mite in Paulʼ khut tunga gul kivial a muh uh ciangin, “Hih mipa pen mi that hi takpi ding hi. Hih tuipi lauhuai panin a suahtak hangin a thuman pasian in hingsak tuan lo ding hi,” ci-in khatlekhat a kikum uh hi." 
Acts28:5 Ahi zongin Paul in meikhuk sungah tua gul sing khia a, bangmah a ci kei hi." 
Acts28:6 Paul pen a ci hong bawk gawp ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong hong si-in puk gawp ding hi, ci-in um uh ahih manin a en gige uh hi. Ahi zongin sau veipi enenin, Paul tungah thu lamdang a piang bangmah a muh loh uh ciangin a lungsim uh kikheel a, “Hih mipa pen pasian ahi hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi." 
Acts28:7 Tua lai panin a gamla lo mun khat ah tua tuikulh hausa pa Publiasʼ lo a om hi. Amah in limtakin kote zin hong do a, ni thum sung ama zinin ka om uh hi." 
Acts28:8 Publiasʼ pa cisa nat leh gilsan thuahin cina-in lupna tungah a lum hi. Paul zong ama lupna ah va pai-in thu ngetsak a, a tungah a khut nga-in a damsak hi." 
Acts28:9 Hih bangin a damsak khit ciangin tua tuikulh tunga om cina dang khempeuh zong hong paipih uh a, Paul in amaute a damsak hi." 
Acts28:10 Amaute in na tampi tak hong pia uh a, teembaw tungah ka tuankik uh ciangin lamkal a zat ding a kisam khempeuh hong puak uh hi." 
Acts28:11 Tua lai ah kha thum ka om khit uh ciangin Alexandria khua panin a hong pai, tua tuikulh tungah phalbi sung a taam, “Pasian Nih,” lim a kisuang teembaw tungah ka tuang leuleu uh a," 
Acts28:12 Sirakus khua ka tun uh ciangin tua lai ah ni thum sung ka taam uh hi. 
Acts28:13 Tua panin pai leuleu-in Regium khua ka tung uh hi. A zing ciangin leitaw lam panin huih nun ding hong kipan a, ni nih sungin Puteoli khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts28:14 Tua khua ah thu um mi pawl khat tawh ka kimu uh a, nipikal khat sung hong taam un, ci-in hong kho uh hi. Tua bang danin Rom khua ka tung uh hi." 
Acts28:15 Rom khua-a om ulenaute in koteʼ thu na za uh ahih manin pawl khat in, “Appias Sumbuk,” ciang dong hong dawn uh a, pawl khat in “Ansai Thumna,” ciang hong ban uh hi. Paul in amaute a muh ciangin Pasian tungah a lungdamna ko a, a lungsim hong nuam mahmah hi." 
Acts28:16 Rom khua ka tun khit uh ciangin Paul pen ama ututna ah a om theih nadingin thu kipia a, a tai khak loh nadingin galkap khat bek kicingsak hi." 
Acts28:17 A tunzawh ni thum khit ciangin Paul in Jew makaite sam a, amaute hong kikhop ciangin amah in, “Ute naute aw, i mipihte tung ahi a, i pu i pateʼ ngeina tawh kisai-in ahi zongin khialhna bangmah nei lo napi-in Jerusalem khua ah hong kimanin thong ah hong kikoih a, Rom kumpiteʼ khut sungah hong ki-ap hi." 
Acts28:18 Kei thu hong sit uh ciangin sihna ka thuak nading thu bangmah om lo ahih manin hong khah khia nuam uh hi. 
Acts28:19 Ahi zongin kei hong kikhah ding thu ah i Jew mipihte a lungkim loh uh ciangin i mipihte tungah mawhsak nading thu bangmah ka neih loh hangin gam uk kumpipa Sisar tungah a zu ka khan loh hong phamawh hi. 
Acts28:20 Israel mite in a lamet uh mipaʼ hangin sikkhau khihna thuakin thong kia mi ka suak hi. Hih thute khempeuh note kiangah hong gen nuam ka hih manin a hong samsak ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts28:21 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Judea gam panin nangma thu tawh kisai-in lai bangmah ka ngah kei uh a, tua gam panin a hong pai i mipihte tung panin zong nang hong kimawhsakna kam ahi zongin bangmah ka za kei uh hi." 
Acts28:21 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Judea gam panin nangma thu tawh kisai-in lai bangmah ka ngah kei uh a, tua gam panin a hong pai i mipihte tung panin zong nang hong kimawhsakna kam ahi zongin bangmah ka za kei uh hi." 
Acts28:22 Ahi zongin tu-a nangma kipawlna miteʼ thu pen a koimah peuh ah mi khempeuh in gensia uh ahih manin nangma ngaihsutna taktak ka za nuam uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Acts28:23 Tua ahih manin Paul tawh a kimuh nading uh a ni khat seh uh a, tua a kiciam ni-un Paul a zintunna munah Jew mite tampi tak a kikhawm uh hi. Paul in zingsang a kipan nitak dongin amaute tungah Pasianʼ Ukna thu gen tel a, Jesuʼ thu man hi, ci-in a up theih nadingun Moses Thukham le kamsangteʼ laigelhte siksanin a gen hi." 
Acts28:24 Pawl khatte in Paulʼ thugente um uh a, ahi zongin pawl khat in um lo uh hi." 
Acts28:25 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Kha Siangtho in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin na pu na pate uh tungah a thugen man mahmah hi. Tua a genna ah, ‘Pai inla, hih mite tungah hih bangin va gen in: Thu na ngaihngaih uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite lungsim mawk a, a bil uh humcip uh a, mit sicip uh hi. Tua bang hi kei le-uh, a mit un khua mu dinga, a bil un khua za dinga, a lungsim un thu mu thei ding hi. Tua bang hileh kei lamah hong kihei ding uh a, keimah in amaute ka damsak ding hi,’ ci-in a gen hi,” a cih khit ciangin amaute khatlekhat kithutuak loin a paikhia uh hi." 
Acts28:26  
Acts28:27  
Acts28:28 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Tua ahihleh tu-in Gentail mite tungah Pasianʼ hotkhiatna thu kigen ta ding hi. Amaute in um ding uh hi. Hih thu hoihtakin thei un,” ci-in a thugenna a khum hi." 
Acts28:29 (Paul in hih thu a gen khit ciangin Jew mite khatlekhat kitawng gawpin a ciah uh hi.) 
Acts28:30 Paul kum nih sung ama saap tawm inn sungah amah bekin om a, ama kiangah a hawh khempeuh tawh thu a kikum hi." 
Acts28:31 Amah in Pasianʼ Ukna thu le Topa Jesu Khrisʼ thu, hang takin a ututin genin a hilh hi." 
Romans1:1 Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin Pasianʼ teelna tawh sawltak ahi, Jesu Khrisʼ sila keimah Paul in lai ka hong khak hi." 
Romans1:2 Pasian in kamsangte tungtawnin hih Lungdamna Thu a gen sa hi a, Lai Siangtho sungah a om sa thu ahi hi." 
Romans1:3 Tua thu pen eiteʼ Topa Jesu Khris ahi ama Tapaʼ thu ahi hi. Tua Tapa pen leitung si le sa lam panin Davidʼ suan hi a," 
Romans1:4 Kha Siangtho thu lamsang ah ci lehang misite lak panin vangliatna tawh a thawhsakkikna hangin Pasianʼ Tapa ahihna thu Pasian in a kilangsak hi. 
Romans1:5 Minam khempeuh in ama thu umin a zuih theih nadingun Khris hangin sawltak nasep sep theih nading hamphatna thu Pasian in Khrisʼ na sep nadingin kote a hong pia hi. 
Romans1:6 Pasianʼ sapna za-in Jesu Khris tawh a kipawl Rom khua-a a om note khempeuh zong tua minamte sungah a kihel na hi uh hi. 
Romans1:7 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hong it a, ama mi dingin a hong sap, no Rom khua-a a om Khristiante khempeuh tungah lai ka hong khak hi. I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen." 
Romans1:8 Jesu na upna thu uh leitung mi khempeuh in gen belin nei uh ahih manin tua Jesu hangin Pasian tungah ka lungdamna thu koh belin ka nei hi. 
Romans1:9 Ama Tapa hangin Lungdamna Thu ka lungsim khempeuh tawh hilhin a na ka sep Pasian in hih ka thugente a man taktak ahihna thu hong thei hi. 
Romans1:10 Thu ka nget simin note ka hong phawk tawntungna le ama deihna ahih nakleh khatvei teitei ciangin note kiangah ka hong pai theih nading ka utna thu Pasian in a thei hi. 
Romans1:11 Kha thu ah note na thahat theih nadingun Pasian in a hong piak thuphate hong genpih nuam ka hih manin note tawh kimuh ding ka ut mahmah hi. 
Romans1:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin keiʼ upna in note hong tha khauhsakin, noteʼ upna in zong kei hong tha khauhsakin, phattuamna i ngah tuak theih nading ka deihna ahi hi." 
Romans1:13 Khris sungah sanggamte aw, Gentail midangte lakah thu um mi ka ngah mah bangin note lakah zong ngah ding lametna tawh note kiangah pai ding tam veipi ka geel zel hangin ka hong pai theih lohna thu nong theih ding uh ka ut hi." 
Romans1:14 Nuntakna sang mite le nuntakna niam mite, mipilte le mihaite, a kuamah peuh ka huh ding ka tavuan ahih manin," 
Romans1:15 Rom khua-a a om note tungah zong Lungdamna Thu hilh ding ka lawp mahmah hi. 
Romans1:16 Lungdamna Thu ka muang mahmah hi. Tua thu pen a masa-in Jew mi, tua zomin minam dangte, thu um mi khempeuh a hon khia zo Pasianʼ vangliatna ahi hi." 
Romans1:17 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Pasian a upna hangin amah tawh pawl khat ahi mite nungta ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Pasian in amah tawh a kipawl theih nadingin mite a bawlna zia, lungdamna thu in hong kilangsak hi. Tua pen, a patna panin a tawp dongin upna hang bek tawh ahihna thu hong laktel hi." 
Romans1:18 Mihingte in a mawhna le a gitlohna hangun Pasianʼ thuman seelcip uh ahih manin van panin a hehna hong kilangsakin a gimpiakna ding zia hong kilangsak hi. 
Romans1:19 Pasian mahmah in amaute tungah limtakin laktel ahih manin Pasianʼ thu teltakin a theih khit uh ciangin a gamtatna uh ahih manin Pasian in gim a pia ahi hi. 
Romans1:20 Pasian in leitung a piansak cil a kipanin a kimu thei lo ama pianzia ahi tawntung vanglian pa le Pasian ahihna thute ama bawl sa nate tung panin teltakin hong kilang hi. Tua ahih manin, “Thei kei ing,” ci-in paulap a zon theih nading uh om lo hi." 
Romans1:21 Amaute in Pasian thei napi-in a zahtak dingun a kilawm bangin zahtak loin, a tungah a lungdam dingun a kilawm bangin lungdam lo uh hi. Amaute in thuhoih ngaihsun nuam lo uh a, a ngaihsutnate uh a mawknapi a suak hi." 
Romans1:22 Amaute pil a kisak mahmah uh hangin a hai mahmah uh ahi hi. 
Romans1:23 A hing tawntung Pasian bia loin, mi, vasa, ganhing, ahih kei leh a bokvak ganhingte tawh a kibang limte a bia zawsop uh hi." 
Romans1:24 Mihingte tua zahta-in hai lua uh ahih manin amau ututin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in khah khong vet a, a zumhuai mahmah pi-in a gamta uh hi." 
Romans1:25 Amaute in a man ahi Pasianʼ thu um nuam lo uh a, a tawntungin phat dingin a kilawm a Piangsak pa bia loin, Pasianʼ bawl sa nate bia-in a zui uh hi. Tu-a bangin hi takpi uh hi." 
Romans1:26 Tua ahih manin amau utna bangin a zumhuai pi-in a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khah khong hi. A numeite un pasal tawh lup khop ngeina zang loin a numeipihte mah uh lunggulhin lum khawm uh a," 
Romans1:27 a pasalte uh zong numei tawh lum khawm loin pasalte mah lunggulhin lum khawm uh a, a zumhuai pi-in a gamta uh hi. Tua ahih manin amauteʼ gamtat siatna tawh kituakin Pasian in gim a pia hi." 
Romans1:28 Mite in a man ahi Pasianʼ thu ngaihsutin nei nuam lo uh ahih manin amauteʼ ngaihsut hoih lo bangin a gamtat theih nadingun Pasian in a khah khia hi. Tua ahih manin a gamtat dingun a kilawm lo pipi-in a gamta uh hi. 
Romans1:29 Siatna nam khempeuh ahi, hoih lohna, huaihamna, khatlekhat kisiatsak nopna, hazatna, mi thahna, kitotna, khemna, a sia lam bekbek ngaihsutna, zuaugenna," 
Romans1:30 mi gensiatna, Pasian muhdahna, midangte a heh theih a maizum theih nadingin gamtatna, kiphatsakna, kisialhna, thusia bawlna, nu le pateʼ thu man lohna," 
Romans1:31 gamtat siatna, ciampelna, midangte khual lo, hehpihna nei loin, a sia namkim a gamta uh hi." 
Romans1:32 Tua bangin a gamtate in sihna thuak ding hi, ci-in Pasianʼ thukhenna thei napi-in, tua bangin amaute a gamtat uh banah, tua bangin a gamtate pakta-in a awi zawsop lai uh hi." 
Romans2:1 Tua ahih ciangin midangteʼ thu a khen note pen kuakua hi ta le-uhcin na suakta tuan kei ding uh hi. Midangte na mawhsakna uh thute mah note zong gamta veve na hih manun, no zong a mawh mah na hi uh hi." 
Romans2:2 Tua bang mawhna a gamtate, Pasian in gim a piak pen a man mah ahihna i thei ciat hi." 
Romans2:3 Midangte a mawhna hangin thu khenin, no zong tua amau mawhnate mah na bawl veve uh ciangin Pasianʼ thukhenna tawh kipelh tuan dingin ki-um peuhmah na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:4 Pasian migi-in thu a diah hithiatna pen na kisikkik theih nading uh a deihna ahih lamtak phawk kha loin, a migitna, a lungduaina, a hong thuaknate neu ngaihsut kha na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:5 Lungsim khauhin na kisik nop lohna hangun Pasianʼ hehna le a manin a thukhenna a hong kilat Ni ding ciangin na gimthuak ding uh a nasia semsem dingin a bawl na hi uh hi. 
Romans2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in thukkik ding hi. 
Romans2:7 Pahtakna, minthanna le hin tawntungna deihin a gamtat hoih tawntung mite tungah Pasian in nuntak tawntungna pia dinga," 
Romans2:8 ahi zongin ama deihna bek zui-in, a gamtat dingin a kilawm bangin gamta loin, a man loin a gamta mite tungah Pasian in ama hehna hangin gimna tungsak ding hi." 
Romans2:9 Jew mi a kipan Gentail mi dongin a gamtat sia mi khempeuh in gimna le lungkhamna thuak ding uh hi. 
Romans2:10 Tua mah bangin Jew mi a kipanin Gentail mi dongin a gamtat hoih mi khempeuh in minthanna, pahtawina le nopsakna ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kuamah deidan loin mi khempeuh tungah a kibangin thu a khen hi. 
Romans2:12 Moses Thukham a nei lo Gentail mite a khialh uh ciangin thukham nei lopi mahin siatna thuak uh a, Moses Thukham a nei Jew mite a khialh uh ciangin tua thukham tawh kizui-in amaute tungah thu kikhen hi." 
Romans2:13 Thukham zakna bek hangin Pasian tawh kipawlna a piang hi lo a, thukham sunga Pasianʼ genna bangin a gamtate bek Pasian tawh a kipawl thei ahi hi." 
Romans2:14 Gentail mite in thukham a neih loh uh hangin amauʼ ngaihsut tawmna tawh thukhamʼ deihna bang a gamtat uh ciangin tua thukhamʼ deihna a zui uh hi a, thukham a neih loh uh hangin a gamtat dingun a kilawm amau mahmah in a thei tawm uh ahi hi." 
Romans2:15 Amauʼ lungsim sungah thukhamʼ deihnate om khin ahihna thu a gamtatna un hong kilangsak hi. Amau mahmah zong khat veivei hoih kisa, khat veivei sia kisa uh ahih manin, amauʼ lungsim sungah thukhamʼ deihnate theihna om khin ahihna thu, hih amauʼ kiphawk tawmna lungsim in nakpi takin hong kitelsak hi." 
Romans2:16 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in mihingte lungsim sunga a ngaihsutnate uh, Jesu Khris thu a khensak Ni ciangin, tu-a kong gen bang teekteekin a hong piang ding ahi hi." 
Romans2:17 Tu-in Jew mi ka hi uh, a ci note in thukham suan belin nei-in Pasian na theihna uh na kisialh pih uh hi." 
Romans2:18 Thukham thei na hih manun Pasianʼ deihnate na thei uh a, a man le a man lo na khen thei uh hi."
