Romans2:19 Mittawte lam a lak ding, khuamial sunga om mite khuavak a musak ding," 
Romans2:20 mihaite a hilh ding, naupangte a hilh dingte ihi a, thukham sunga om thu khempeuh thei-in i gen khempeuh man mahmah hi, ci-in na kimuang uh hi." 
Romans2:21 Midangte a hilh note in, nomau mah kihilh lo ding na hi uh hiam? “Guta kei un,” ci-in mi hilh napi-in nomau mahmah guta hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:22 “Numei tawh mawh kei un,” ci-in mi hilh napi-in nomau mahmah mawh hi lo na hi uh hiam? Milimte mudah napi-in milim biakna inn sunga nate gu hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Romans2:23 Note in thukham kisaktheih pih napi-in thukham palsatin Pasianʼ min na daisak uh hi. 
Romans2:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “No Jew miteʼ hangin Gentail mite lakah Pasian kigensia hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans2:25 Thukham zui le-uhcin na vun atna uh man nei takpi mah hi. Ahi zongin thukham na zuih kei uh leh na vun atna uh a mawkna a suak ahi hi. 
Romans2:26 Tua ahih manin vun ki-at lo Gentail mite in thukham a zuih nak uh leh Pasian in vun at mah bangin ngaihsun ding hi lo ahi hiam? 
Romans2:27 Tua ahih manin thukham nei-in vun ki-at napi-in tua thukham a zui lo no Jew mite pen vun ki-at lo thukham a zui Gentail mite in thu hong khen ding hi lo ahi uh hiam? 
Romans2:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pualam bek a Jew mi hihna le a pualam vun ki-atna lel bek in Jew mi taktak suaksak zo lo hi. 
Romans2:29 Jew mi taktak i cihte pen, a sung lamah Jew mi ahite ahi hi. A vun ki-atna uh lungsim vun atna hi a, kha thu tawh a kisai ahi hi. Thukham zui-in pumpi tung vun atna pawl hi lo hi. Hih bang mite pen mihingte in phat loin Pasian in phatin a pakta hi." 
Romans3:1 Tua ahihleh Jew mite in Gentail mite sangin bang hamphatna nei zaw a, vun ki-atna in bang phattuamna nei ahi hiam?" 
Romans3:2 Lam tampi ah a phattuamna a om hi. A masa penin, Pasian in Jew mite tungah ama thute a gen hi." 
Romans3:3 Ahi zongin Jew mi pawl khatte in Pasianʼ thuciamna zui lo uh hi. Hih mi pawl khatteʼ thupalsatna hangin Pasian in a thuciamna maimangsak dingin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? 
Romans3:4 Tua bang hi het lo hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Thu na gen peuhmah ciangin a man na genna thu mite in hong thei ding uh a, mite in nang hong mawhsakna na genkik ciangin na kiphel lah ding khat beek om lo ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin mi khempeuh in zuau a gen zongin Pasian in thuman gen veve ding hi." 
Romans3:5 Pasian a manin gamta ahihna eiteʼ gamtat khialhna in kilangsak semsem ahih ciangin eite in bang gen ding nei nawn ihi hiam? Pasian in eite gim a hong piak ciangin a thuman lo ahi hiam? (Hih bangin thu ka gen ciangin leitung mihingteʼ kammal zat ngeite a zang ka hi hi.) 
Romans3:6 Gim hong piakna ah a thuman lo hi het lo hi. A thuman lo hi zenzen leh bangci-in leitung mi khempeuhʼ thu khen thei ding ahi hiam? 
Romans3:7 Keima zuautatna in Pasian a thumanna kilangsakin a min thangsak semsem ahihleh bang hangin mawhnei-in kei hong kiseh lailai ahi hiam? 
Romans3:8 Thupha a pian nadingin gamtat sia gamta ni, ci ding ihi hiam? Mi pawl khatte in tu-a bang teek mahin gen hi, ci-in hong mawhsak uh a, ka heh theihtheih nadingin kam a pau se uh hi. Tua bang mite in amau thuak dingin a kilawm gimna a thuak ding uh hi." 
Romans3:9 Tua ahihleh Gentail mite sangin ko Jew mite hampha zaw ka hi uh hiam? Bangmah hamphatna nei tuan lo hi ung. Jew mite le Gentail mite a kibangin mawhna khut sungah om uh hi, ci-in ka gen khinzo hi." 
Romans3:10 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Pasianʼ muhna ah mi man kuamah om lo a," 
Romans3:11 a man a thei kuamah om lo a, Pasian tawh kipawl ding a hanciam kuamah om lo hi." 
Romans3:12 Kuamah in Pasian ngaihsutna nei lo uh a, na-a kimang kuamah om lo a, a hoih gamtat kuamah om lo hi." 
Romans3:13 A kam uh tawh mi that uh a, a kam uh tawh zuau thu gen uh a, a kampaute uh gulgu tawh kibang hi." 
Romans3:14 A kam uh tawh mi samsia uh a, gitlohna bek tawh a kidim uh hi." 
Romans3:15 Mi that pakpak uh a," 
Romans3:16 a paina khempeuh uh ah lungkhamna a piangsak uh hi. 
Romans3:17 Nopna a pian nadingin gamta ngei lo uh a," 
Romans3:18 Pasian zahtak ding ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans3:19 Tua ahih manin kuamah in paulap a zon theih loh nading le mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ thukhenna a thuak theih nadingin Thukham a nei mite khempeuh in tua Thukham a zuih ding uh ahihna thu i thei hi. 
Romans3:20 Thukham in mihingte a mawhna kilangsak thei bek ahih manin thukham zuihna hangin kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah zo lo hi. 
Romans3:21 Ahi zongin tu-in thukham zuihna hang hi loin thudang khat hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading lampi hong kilang zo a, Thukham le kamsangte in zong hih thu ah teci a pang uh hi." 
Romans3:22 Tua thu in: Jew mi le Gentail mi kuamah a kilamdanna om loin Jesu Khris upna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah hi. 
Romans3:23 Mi khempeuh mawh ciat uh a, a hong hon khia Pasian tawh kigamla uh hi." 
Romans3:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong hehpihna hangin Khris Jesu tawh hong tatkhiat manin amah tawh i kipawl theikik hi. 
Romans3:25 Ama hong sihna hangin mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasian in Jesu hong pia a, amah a umte in mawhmaisakna a ngah uh hi. Amah tawh i kipawl theih nading zia hong lahna-in hih bangin Pasian a hong gamta ahi hi. Pasian a lungduaina hangin a beisa hunah i mawhnate hong en khong phot hi." 
Romans3:26 Ahi zongin tu hun ciangin Jesu a um mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nading le amah thuman ahihna a kilatsak nadingin mihingteʼ mawhna tawh kisai-in na hong sem hi. 
Romans3:27 Tua ahihleh mihingte in i kisialh pih ding bang om ahi hiam? Bangmah om lo hi. Bang bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Thukham zuihna bulphuh ding ihi hiam? Hi lo hi. I upna a bulphuh ding ihi hi. 
Romans3:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theihna pen Thukham zuih zawhna hang hi loin upna hang hi, ci-in i gen zo hi." 
Romans3:29 Pasian, Jew miteʼ Pasian bek hi a, Gentail miteʼ Pasian hi lo ahi hiam? Gentail miteʼ Pasian zong hi veve hi." 
Romans3:30 Pasian khat bek hi a, a upna uh hangin Jew mite amah tawh a kipawl thei-in a bawl mah bangin Gentail mite zong a upna uh hang mah tawh amah tawh a kipawl thei-in a bawl hi." 
Romans3:31 Tua ahihleh hih upna thu i gen ciangin Thukham a phiat ihi hiam? Hi lo hi; a kipsak semsem ihi hi. 
Romans4:1 Tu-in eiteʼ pianna i pupi Abrahamʼ thu ngaihsun ni. Ama tunga thupiang hih bang ahi hi: 
Romans4:2 Abraham in a sepna hangin amah tawh a kipawl dingin Pasian in sang hileh Abraham in kisialh pih ding thu a nei ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ mai ah Abraham a kisialh nading bangmah thu om lo hi. 
Romans4:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans4:4 Na a sem mipa a sep thaman kipia hi. Tua a nasepna thaman pen a thalawh sa ahih manin piakkhongin kingaihsutsak lo hi. 
Romans4:5 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ maipha ngah nadingin nasepna suang loin upna a suang mipa pen Pasian in mimawh kimlai midik hi, ci-in sang ahih manin, amah tawh a kipawl theih nadingin Pasian in tua mipaʼ upna thupi san hi." 
Romans4:6 Tua ahih manin nasepna hang tawh hi loin Pasian in mi khat mi dikin a sanna hangin David in zong a lungdamna thu na gen a," 
Romans4:7 “Pasian in a mawhnate maisakin a khialhnate a seelcipsak mite thupha ngah ahi uh hi. 
Romans4:8 Topa in a mawhnate a ciaptehsak loh mipa, thupha ngah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Romans4:9 David in a gen hih thupha pen vun ki-atte bek in ngah thei ahi hiam? Hi lo hi; vun ki-at lote in zong ngah thei uh hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci hi, ci-in i gen khinzo hi." 
Romans4:10 Hih mihoihin a san bang hun ahi hiam? Abraham a vun a ki-at ma ahi hiam, a ki-at zawh ahi hiam? A vun a ki-at khit hi loin a ki-at ma ahi hi." 
Romans4:11 Abraham a vun a ki-at ma-in a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sanna lahtel nadingin a vun a kinung-at ahi hi. Tua ahih manin vun a ki-at loh hangin a upna uh hangin mihoihin a kisang mite khempeuh adingin Abraham pen kha thu lamah pupi ahi hi. 
Romans4:12 A vun a ki-at ma-in i pupi Abraham a upna hangin a gamtat mah bangin a gamta, a vun a ki-at mite adingin zong Abraham pen pupi mah ahi hi. Tua pen vun ki-at lelna hang hi loin upna hang ahi hi." 
Romans4:13 Abraham le a suan a khakte in leitung luah ding hi, ci-in Pasian in thu a ciamna pen Abraham in Thukham a zuihna hang hi loin, a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sanna hang ahi hi." 
Romans4:14 Thukham zuihna hangin Pasianʼ thuciamnate a kingah ding hileh miteʼ upna pen a kimanna om loin, Pasianʼ thuciamnate zong a mawkna suak ding hi." 
Romans4:15 Thukham in Pasianʼ heh nading piangsak hi. Ahi zongin thukham om kei leh thukham zui lo cih zong om thei lo hi. 
Romans4:16 Tua ahih manin Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ hehpihna piakkhong a suah theih nadingin Thukham a zuite bek in ngah loin, Abrahamʼ up bangin a umte in zong a ngah theih nadingun upna bulphuhin thuciamna kipia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abraham pen kha thu lamah eite khempeuhʼ pupi ahi hi." 
Romans4:17 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Minam tampiteʼ pupi dingin kong bawl khin hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi. Tua hi a, bangmah a om nai lopi a thupiakna tawh a omsak thei, a site a hingsak thei, Abraham in a up Pasianʼ muhna ah hih thuciamna kipin a kizang ahi hi." 
Romans4:18 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Na suanlekhakte aksi zahin tam ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin tua bang a pian theih nading lametna a om nai lopi mahin Abraham in umin lamen ahih manin minam tampiteʼ pupi a suak hi." 
Romans4:19 Abraham kum za khat bang pha dektak ta a, a si dektak ta ahihna le a zi Sarah a ciinna thute a theih hangin a upna kiam tuan lo hi." 
Romans4:20 Amah in Pasianʼ thuciamna muanlah dingin ngaihsun lo a, a upna khahsuah het lo hi. A upna hangin thakhauh semsemin Pasian a phat hi." 
Romans4:21 Pasian in a thuciam sa tungsak zo taktak ding hi, ci-in a muang hi." 
Romans4:22 Tua ahih manin, “A upna pen hoihna-in Pasian in a sang hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans4:23 “A upna pen hoihna-in kisang,” ci-in a kigelh ciangin ama ading bekin a kigelh hi lo hi." 
Romans4:24 Sihna panin i Topa Jesu a hingsak pa a um eite khempeuh zong i upna hangin mihoihin hong kisang ding hi, ci-in eite adingin zong a kigelh ahi hi." 
Romans4:25 Eiteʼ mawhna hangin a si dingin Jesu kipia a, Pasian tawh eite i kipawl theih nadingin kihingkiksak hi." 
Romans5:1 Tu-in upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin i Topa Jesu Khris hangin Pasian tawh a kilemkik ta ihi hi. 
Romans5:2 Ama hangin upna tawh tu-a i omna Pasian hehpihna sungah a tung ihi a, Pasian tawh minthanna ngahkhawm ding, ci-in lamen ihih manin i lung a dam hi." 
Romans5:3 Haksatna i thuak laitak nangawnin i lungdam veve hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh haksatna in thuak zawh hatna piangsak a," 
Romans5:4 thuak zawh hatna in Pasianʼ pahtakna hong ngahsak a, ama hong pahtakna in lametna lianpi hong neisak ahihna thu i thei hi." 
Romans5:5 Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak a Kha Siangtho tawh eite sungah ama itna hong guang ahih manin hih lametna in eite hong lungkiasak ngei lo hi. 
Romans5:6 Eite cimawhin i om laitakin Pasianʼ hoihsak hunin ei migilote adingin Khris hong si hi. 
Romans5:7 Mihoih khat adingin a si ngam a om kha ahi zongin thukham zui zo mipa adingin sih ngam nading a thuhaksa mahmah khat ahi hi. 
Romans5:8 Ahi zongin eite mawhna nei ihih laitakin eite adingin Khris hong si ahih manin Pasian in eite hong it mahmahna thu hong lak khin hi. 
Romans5:9 Ama sihna hangin tu-in Pasian tawh kipawl thei ihih manin Pasianʼ hehna hangin gimna panin zong hong suaktasak zaw kan lai ding hi. 
Romans5:10 Pasian tawh eite i kilangneih laitakin ama Tapaʼ sihna hangin amah tawh hong kilemsak ahihleh tu-in Pasian tawh kipawl khinta ihih manin Khris nuntakna in eite hong hon khia zo zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam? 
Romans5:11 Tua teng bek hi lo lai a, Pasian tawh hong kilemsak i Topa Jesu Khris hangin Pasian tungah i nuam mahmah hi." 
Romans5:12 Mi khat hangin leitungah mawhna hong om a, tua mawhna hangin sihna hong piang hi. Mi khempeuh mawh uh ahih manin tu-a bangzia-in mi khempeuh tungah sihna hong tung hi." 
Romans5:13 Thukham a om ma pekin leitungah mawhna na om khin a, thukham a om lohna munah Pasian in mawhna a ciaptehna laibu nei lo hi." 
Romans5:14 Ahi zongin Adam hun a kipan Moses hun dongin sihna in mite uk a, Adam in Pasianʼ thupiak a man loh manin a khialh bangin a khial nai lo mite nangawn sihna khutnuai mah hi veve uh hi. Adam pen a hong pai lai ding mipaʼ lim ahi hi." 
Romans5:15 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ hong piak letsong pen Adamʼ mawhna tawh kibang lo ahih manin tua tegel tehkak theih ding hi lo hi. Tua mi khat a khialhna hangin mi tampi a sihna pen a man mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin Pasianʼ hong itna le hong hehpihna nakpi takin lian zaw lai a, mi khat ahi tua Jesu Khrisʼ hehpihna hangin mi tampi tak tungah hong kipia letsong lian mahmah hi." 
Romans5:16 Pasianʼ letsong le mi khatʼ mawhna a hatna zia kilamdang hi. Khialhna khat a om khit ciangin, “Mawh hi,” ci-in thukhenna kipia a, ahi zongin khialhna tampi tak a om khit ciangin a kilawm lopi mahin, “Dik hi,” cihna piakkhong thupha a om hi." 
Romans5:17 Mi khat bekʼ mawhna hangin sihna in hong uk ahihleh mi khat mah ahi Jesu Khris hangin nakpi takin a lian Pasianʼ hehpihna le mi hoih a sanna a ngah mite nungta-in thahat zaw kan ding uh hi. 
Romans5:18 Tua hi a, khialhna khat in mi khempeuh tungah thukhenna tungsak ahih mah bangin gamtatna hoih khat mah in mi khempeuh khahin nungtasak hi." 
Romans5:19 Mi khat in thu a man loh manin mi tampi mimawh a suahsak mah bangin mi khat in thu a manna hangin mi tampi in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah ding uh ahi hi. 
Romans5:20 Khialhna a tam semsem nadingin thukham hong kipia hi. Ahi zongin khialhna a tamna munah Pasianʼ hehpihna hong lian zaw zel hi. 
Romans5:21 Tua ahih manin mawhna thahatin hong sihsak mah bangin, i Topa Jesu Khris hangin Pasianʼ hehpihna thahat zaw lai a, mihoihin hong sangin nuntak tawntungna sung a hong tunpih hi." 
Romans6:1 Tua ahihleh Pasianʼ hehpihna a liat theih nadingin mawhna bawlbawl ding ihi hiam? 
Romans6:2 Tua bang hi dek lo ding hi. Mawhna thu ah a si eite in bangci-in mawhna bawl thei nawn ding ihi hiam? 
Romans6:3 Khris Jesu tawh i kipawl theih nadingin ama sungah a kiphum eite pen ama sihna mahah zong a si khawm ihih lam thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Romans6:4 I Paʼ vangliatna tawh sihna panin Khris a kithawhkiksak mah bangin eite zong nuntakna thak i nuntak theih nadingin tui i kiphum ciangin amah tawh kiphum khawmin a si khawm ihi hi. 
Romans6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama sihna ah si khawmin pawl khat i suah leh amah a thawhkikna ah zong pawl khat suakin i thokhawm ding hi. 
Romans6:6 Mawhna khutnuai ah eite i om nawn loh nadingin mawhnopna lungsim i neihna teng i sucip a, singlamteh tungah Khris a sih laitak mahin i ngeina lui teng a sisak khawm ihihna thu i thei hi." 
Romans6:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat a sih ciangin mawhna vangliatna panin a suakta ahi hi. 
Romans6:8 Ahi zongin Khris tawh i sih khawm leh amah tawh ei zong i hing khawm ding hi, ci-in i um hi." 
Romans6:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin Khris kihingkiksak khin a, sikik ngei nawn lo ding hi. Ama tungah sihna in vangliatna nei nawn lo hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
Romans6:10 Ama sihna pen mawhna thu tawh kisai-a sihna hi a, sih kikkik kul loin a kuamah peuh zong khatvei bek a kisi ahi hi. Tu-a a nuntakna pen Pasianʼ thu tawh kisai-a nuntakna ahi hi." 
Romans6:11 Tua mah bangin note zong Khris Jesu tawh kipawlin mawhna thu ah si-in, Pasianʼ thu ah a nungta-in na kingaihsut ding uh ahi hi." 
Romans6:12 Tua ahih ciangin na pumpi uh deihna na zuih loh nadingun na pumpi uh, mawhna na uksak nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Romans6:13 Mawhna gamtat nadingin na pumpi nate uh khat beek na zang nawn kei ding uh hi. Note pen misi hi napi-in a kihingkiksak mite bang na hih manun, a hoihin a hong zat theih nadingin na pumpi bup uh Pasianʼ tungah na pia zaw ding uh hi." 
Romans6:14 Note pen thukhamʼ sawlna hangin nasem hi loin Pasianʼ hong lah thuhoihteʼ hangin nasem na hih uh manin mawhnaʼ sawlna mangin na gamta nawn kei un. 
Romans6:15 Eite pen thukhamʼ uk hi loin Pasianʼ hehpihna in hong uk ahih manin mawhna i gamta kei ding hi. 
Romans6:16 Mi khatpeuhʼ thu a mang dingin ama khut sungah na kipiak uh ciangin a thu na mante uhʼ sila na hi uh hi. Mawhna na bawl uh leh sihna a thuak ding na hi uh a, thumangin na om uh leh Pasian tawh pawl khat a suak ding na hi uh hi." 
Romans6:17 Nidangin silate bangin mawhnaʼ thu a mang hi napi-in, tu-in note tungah a hong kipia thuhilhna kipte, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh zui na hih manun Pasian tungah i lungdam mahmah hi." 
Romans6:18 Mawhnaʼ vangliatna panin na suakta khinta uh a, a manin a gamta ding mite na hi ta uh hi." 
Romans6:19 Noteʼ theihtheih nadingin nisim nuntakna ziate tawh a hong genteh ka hi hi. Nidang lai-in hoih lohna le gitlohna a gamta dingin na pumpi uh na buppiak uh mah bangin, tu-in a man nate a sem dingin na pumpi uh buppiak unla, nuntakna siangtho nei ta un." 
Romans6:20 Mawhna khut sungah na om laitakun Pasianʼ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh kisam lo hi. 
Romans6:21 Ahi zongin, tuhunin gamtat dingin zumhuai na sakte uh, tua hun lai-in na gamtat manun bang thaman ngah na hi uh hiam? Tua na gamtatna thaman uh sihna ahi hi." 
Romans6:22 Ahi zongin tu-in mawhna bawlnopna panin suakta-in Pasianʼ khut sung mi na hi ta uh hi. Tua thu hangin na ngah uh na pen Pasian adingin a kipia khin nuntakna hi a, a tawntung nuntakna tawh a kizom ahi hi." 
Romans6:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna in thaman hong piak pen sihna hi a, ahi zongin i Topa Jesu tawh i kipawl manin Pasianʼ hong piakkhong pen nuntak tawntungna ahi hi." 
Romans7:1 Lawmte aw, note khempeuh in thukham thei na hih manun tu-a kong gen dingte na tel mahmah ding uh hi. Mi khat a nuntak sungteng bek thukham in uk thei hi." 
Romans7:2 Gentehna-in, pasal nei numei khat pen a pasal a nuntak sungteng bek, tua thukham in a pasal tawh lencip hi. Ahi zongin a pasal a sih ciangin tua a pasal tawh a lencip thukham panin a suakta hi." 
Romans7:3 Tua ahih manin a pasal a nuntak hun sungin pasal dang tawh a lup khop leh mi tawh a mawh kici hi. Ahi zongin a pasal a si hileh thukham tawh kisai-in a suakta hi a, pasal dang a teenpih hangin mi tawh a mawh hi lo hi." 
Romans7:4 Sanggamte aw, note zong tua mah tawh a kibang na hi uh hi. Khris tawh pum khat na hihna uh hangin thukham tawh kisai thu ah a si khin na hi uh a, Pasianʼ nasepna ah eite a man nei i suah theih nadingin sihna panin a kithokiksak Khris tawh nupa na hi uh hi." 
Romans7:5 I leitung lungsim tawh i nuntak lai teng, thukham hangin i hih nop semsem mawh nopnate i gamta a, tuate khempeuh sihna tawh a kizom ahi hi." 
Romans7:6 Ahi zongin nidangin a hong lencip thukham panin Pasian in eite hong suaktasak khin ahih manin tua thukham tawh kisai ah eite a si khin ihi hi. Lai sungah a kigelh thukham lui sungah nungta nawn loin, Kha Siangthoʼ hong piak nuntakna thak ah a nungta ihi hi." 
Romans7:7 Tua ahihleh Thukham mahmah pen a siahuai ahi hiam? A sia hi lo hi. Mawhna bang hiam cih Thukham in hong theitelsak hi. Thukham in, “Hazatna lungsim nei kei in,” ci-in gen lo hileh, haza i cih bang ahi hiam, ci-in ka thei kei ding hi." 
Romans7:8 Thukham a omna hangin mawhna in nuamtak sa-in hazatna a tuamtuam ka neih theih nading hong piangsak hi. Thukham om kei leh mawhna in bangmah sem thei lo hi. 
Romans7:9 Thukham ka theih ma-in mi nungta ka hi ngei a, thukham ka theih ciangin mawhnopna lungsim hong khangin kei ka si hi." 
Romans7:10 Nuntak ngah nadingin a kibawl thukham pen keima adingin sihna hong hi zawsop hi. 
Romans7:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham a om manin mawhna in nuamtak sa a, kei hong khemin tua thukham tawh a hong that hi." 
Romans7:12 Tua ahih ciangin Thukham mahmah hitaleh thupiaknate hitaleh hoihin man a, siangtho hi." 
Romans7:13 Tua ahihleh a hoih na khat in keiʼ sih nading hong piangsak ahi hiam? Hi lo hi. Tua sihna pen mawhnaʼ nasepna hi a, mawhna pianzia bangci bang taktak hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin a hoih na khat zangin kei tungah sihna a hong piangsak ahi hi. Tua ahih manin thukham a om manin mawhna a siahuai mahmah ahihna hong kilang zaw kan lai hi." 
Romans7:14 Thukham pen i kha thu tawh kisai hi, ci-in i thei hi. Ahi zongin kei pen leitung pumpi tawh a nungta mi ka hi a, mawhna thu mangin a sal a suak ka hi hi." 
Romans7:15 Ka hih nop teng hih kha loin ka hih nop loh teng keek mah hih zawsop ka hih manin keima gamtatna mahmah zong ka tel thei kei hi. 
Romans7:16 Ka hih nop loh teng ka hih veve ciangin Thukham a deihhuai khat hi, ci-in ka ngaihsutna hong langsak hi." 
Romans7:17 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta taktak pen kei hi loin ka sunga om mawhna hizaw hi. 
Romans7:18 Ka leitung pumpi sungah a hoih na khat beek om lo hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Ka sungah a hoih gamtat nopna lungsim a om hangin ka hih zo kei hi." 
Romans7:19 A hoih ka gamtat nop teng gamta loin, ka hih nop loh siatnate ka gamta zawsop hi." 
Romans7:20 Ka gamtat nop loh teng ka gamtat veve ciangin tua a gamta pen kei hi nawn loin ka sunga om mawhna a gamta ahihna a hong kilang hi. 
Romans7:21 Tua ahih ciangin a hoih gamta nuam hi napi-in a sia bekbek a gamta kha ka hihna ka thei hi. 
Romans7:22 Ka lungsim tawng taktak ah Pasianʼ thukham hoih ka sa hi. 
Romans7:23 Ahi zongin keiʼ deih loh thudang khat in ka lungsimah na hong sem hi. Tua ka sunga na hong sem pen in mawhna thu ah kei hong mancip hi. 
Romans7:24 Kei pen a lungkham mi ka hi ta hi. Kei a hong sisak ding hih lungsim lui panin kua in kei hong hon khia zo ding ahi hiam? 
Romans7:25 I Topa Jesu Khris in hong hon khia zo ding ahih manin Pasian tungah ka lung a dam hi. Keiʼ om zia taktak ahihleh: Ka lungsim tawh Pasianʼ thu ka zui a, ka pumpi in mawhna a piangsak thu a zui hi." 
Romans8:1 Ahi zongin tu-in ahihleh Khris Jesu tawh kipawlin a nungta mite pen mawhna thukhenna tawh kipelh hi. 
Romans8:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris Jesu tawh a hong kipawlsak Kha Siangtho in mawhna le sihna a piangsak thukham panin kei hong suaktasak khinta hi. 
Romans8:3 Mihingte thahat lo ihih manin Thukham in ahih zawh loh thute Pasian in a hih zo hi. Mawhna a beisak theih nadingin mihingte sunga om mawhna tungah thu a khenna-in ama Tapa hong sawl a, amah pen mihingteʼ mawhna lungsim mah a nei-in a hong pai hi." 
Romans8:4 Eiteʼ deihna bangin nungta loin Pasianʼ Kha Siangthoʼ deihna bangin a nungta eite sungah Thukhamʼ deihna teng a kicin theih nadingin Pasian in a Tapa a hong sawl ahi hi. 
Romans8:5 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a nungtate, amau pumpi deihna in a lungsim uh a uk hi; Kha Siangtho deihna bangin a nungtate, Kha Siangtho in amau lungsim a uk hi." 
Romans8:6 I ngaihsutna, i pumpi deihna uksak lehang sihna tawh kizom hi; i ngaihsutna, Kha Siangtho uksak lehang nuntakna le nopsakna tawh a kizom hi." 
Romans8:7 Mi khatpeuh in ama pumpi deihna a ki-uksak ciangin Pasianʼ thukhamte zui lo ahih manin Pasianʼ gal suak a, a zuih nop hangin zong zui thei lo hi." 
Romans8:8 Amau pumpi deihna bangin a gamtate in Pasian lungdamsak thei lo uh hi. 
Romans8:9 Note sungah Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho hong om nakleh nomau pumpi deihna bangin gamta loin Kha Siangtho deihna bangin na gamta ding uh hi. Khris lungsim a nei lote Khris tawh kipawl lo hi. 
Romans8:10 Ahi zongin note sungah Khris hong om leh mawhna hangin na pumpi uh a si veve ding ahi zongin, note pen Pasian tawh kipawl khin na hih manun note adingin Kha Siangtho pen nuntakna ahi hi." 
Romans8:11 Sihna panin Jesu a thokiksak Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho note sungah hong om leh sihna panin Khris a hingkiksak pa mah in note sungah a om ama Kha Siangtho mah tawh a si thei pumpi a hong nungtasak ding hi. 
Romans8:12 Tua ahih ciangin lawmte aw, i pumpi deihna bang zui-in gamtat ding a kiphamawh hi lo hi." 
Romans8:13 Na pumpi uh deihna zui-in na gamtat uh leh na si ding uh a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh na mawh gamtatnate uh na sihsak uh leh na nungta ding uh hi." 
Romans8:14 Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho in a makaih mite, Pasianʼ tate ahi uh hi." 
Romans8:15 Note tungah Pasian in a hong piak a Kha Siangtho in note na lau nadingun sila-in a hong bawl hi lo a, Kha Siangtho in Pasianʼ tate a hong suaksak ahi zaw hi. Tua Kha Siangtho mah in Pasian pen, “Pa aw, Pa aw,” hong ci theisak hi." 
Romans8:16 Eite, Pasianʼ tate ihihna thu eima lungsim bek in a gen hi loin Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho in zong hong genpih hi." 
Romans8:17 Eite pen ama ta ihih manin mite adingin a koih thuphate i ngah banah Khris adingin a koihte zong i ngahkhawm lai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris in a thuak mah bangin i thuak nakleh amah a minthan mah bangin ei zong i minthang ding hi. 
Romans8:18 Tu hun a i thuaknate pen Pasian in a hong piak ding minthanna tawh ka ngaihsut khawm ciangin gentham ka sa het kei hi. 
Romans8:19 Pasianʼ bawl sa khempeuh in Pasianʼ tate a hong kilahkhiat hun ding lawp mahmah in a ngak uh hi. 
Romans8:20 Pasianʼ bawl sate, amau utthu tawh hi loin siatna a thuak dingin Pasian mahmah in a ngaihsut sa ahi hi. Ahi zongin lametna om lai hi." 
Romans8:21 Pasianʼ bawl sate, ni khat ni ciangin muat theih nading thu panin suakta-in Pasianʼ tate tawh a nuam suahtakna a ngahkhawm ding uh hi." 
Romans8:22 Tu hun ciang dong Pasianʼ bawl sa khempeuh nupi nausuak ding bangin na sa-in a tauna uh i thei hi. 
Romans8:23 Pasianʼ bawl sa nate bek hi lo a, Pasianʼ hong piakkhong Kha Siangtho maleep a ngah eite mahmah nangawn in zong, Pasian in ama tate-in hong bawlin i buppi-in a hong suahtaksak ding i ngak kawmin thumin tau-in i om hi." 
Romans8:24 Hih bangin lamenin i upna in eite hong hon khia khin hi. Ahi zongin i lamet pen i muh ciangin tua pen lamet hi nawn lo hi. Kua in a muh sa nate lamen nawn ahi hiam? 
Romans8:25 I muh lohte i lamet ciangin lungduai takin i ngak thei hi. 
Romans8:26 Tua ahih manin eite bangzahin gina lo hitale hang eite a hong huh dingin Kha Siangtho a hong pai hi. Eite in a kilawm bangin thunget ding nangawn i thei kei a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho mah in tauna tawh eite adingin a hong thumsak hi." 
Romans8:27 Kha Siangtho in Pasianʼ deihna tawh kizui-in Pasianʼ mite adingin hong thumsak ahih manin mihingteʼ lungsim tawng thu a thei Pasian in Kha Siangthoʼ ngaihsutna a thei hi. 
Romans8:28 Ama deihna bang a sem dingin Pasian in a hong sap, amah a it eite adingin piangsak hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
Romans8:29 Pasianʼ Tapa mi khempeuh lakah a upa pen a suah theih nadingin Pasian in a teel kholh sa mite, a Tapa tawh a kibang dingin a seh sa ahi hi." 
Romans8:30 Tua ahih manin ama sap mite a seh sa hi a, a sap mite amah tawh a kipawlin bawl a, amah tawh a kipawlin a bawl mite ama minthanna zong a hawm hi." 
Romans8:31 Hih teng bang ahih khit ciangin bang gen ding om nawn ahi hiam? Pasian in eite hong kop pih peuh leh kua in eite hong zo zo ding ahi hiam? 
Romans8:32 Ama Tapa nangawn siit loin eite khempeuh adingin hong pia khia ahih manin, na dang khempeuh zong hong pia zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:33 Pasian in mawh lo hi, ci-in a gen khit sa ahih manin, Pasianʼ teel sa mite tungah kua in mawhna guan thei nawn ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:34 Tua ahih manin kua in amaute tungah thu khen thei nawn ding ahi hiam? Eite adingin a hong thumsak pa pen Pasianʼ tak lamah a tu, a sih khit ciangin sihna panin a kihingkiksak Khris Jesu hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:35 Tua ahih manin bangin Khrisʼ itna tawh hong kikhensak zo ding ahi hiam? Haksatna, lungkhamna, bawlsiatna, gilkialna, zawnna, lauhuaina, sihnate khat peuhpeuh in hong khen zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans8:36 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Note hangin sun thapai-in siat nading lauhuaina ka thuak uh a, gawh ding tuu bangin a hong kibawl hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans8:37 Eite a hong it paʼ hangin hih thu khempeuh ah a gualzo pente ihi hi. 
Romans8:38 Bangmah in ama hong itna tawh hong kikhensak zo het lo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Sihna, nuntakna, vantung mite, vantung vangliatnate, tu hun nate le a hong tung ding nate," 
Romans8:39 leitung a om nate, leinuai-a om nate, Pasianʼ bawl sa nate khat peuhpeuh in i Topa Khris Jesu hangin Pasian in eite hong itna tawh hong khen zo het lo ding hi." 
Romans9:1 Kei, Khris tawh kipawl ka hih manin zuau thu ka gen thei kei hi. Kha Siangtho lamlahna tawh, ka lungsim kitheihna ah zuaugen het loin a mantakin ka gen thu in:" 
Romans9:2 Leitung si le sa ah ka mipihte adingin nakpi takin dahin ka lunggimna a khang hi. 
Romans9:3 Hi thei ding hileh amauteʼ hoih nadingin keimah in Pasianʼ samsiatna thuakin Khris tawh kikhen nading ciang dong nangawnin amaute ka huh nuam hi. 
Romans9:4 Amaute pen Pasianʼ teel Israel mite hi a, Pasian in ama ta-in bawlin a minthanna a hopte, amaute tungah thuciamna bawlin Thukham a piakte, a man taktakin biak theihna nei-in thuciamna a ngahte," 
Romans9:5 le a thupi pupiteʼ suanlekhakte hi uh a, leitung si le sa tawh kisai-in Khris zong amau minam sung panin a piang ahi hi. Hih thute hangin mi khempeuh in na khempeuh a uk Pasian phat tawntung ta uh hen! Amen." 
Romans9:6 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ thuciamnate a mawkna a suak hi sam lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh Pasianʼ teel mi hi khin lo hi. 
Romans9:7 Abrahamʼ suanlekhak khempeuh zong Pasianʼ tate hi kim lo hi. Pasian in Abraham kiangah, “Na ta Isaacʼ suanlekhakte bek nangma suanlekhak-in kisim ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:8 Tua ahih manin leitung ngeina tawh a suak tate pen Pasianʼ ta hi lo a, Pasianʼ thuciamna tawh kizui-a a suakte bek suanlekhak taktakin a kisim pan hizaw hi." 
Romans9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in hih bangin thuciamna bawl a, “A hun a tun ciangin kong paikik dinga, Sarah in tapa khat a nei ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:10 Tua bek zong hi lo lai hi. Rebekah in eiteʼ pupi Isaac tawh tapa nih nei hi. 
Romans9:11 Pasianʼ teelna pen a teel miteʼ nasepna hang hi loin Pasianʼ sapna tawh kisai zaw hi, ci-in a kilat nadingin a tate a sia a pha a gamtat theih ma, a suah ma pek mahin" 
Romans9:12 Rebekah kiangah Pasian in, “A u zaw in a nau zawʼ na sem ding hi,” na ci khinzo hi." 
Romans9:13 Tua mah bangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Jakob ka it a, Esau ka mudah hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans9:14 Tua bang ahihleh Pasian thutang lo hi, a kici thei ding hiam? Kici thei lo ding hi." 
Romans9:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Ka hehpih nopte ka hehpih dinga, ka khasiat nopte ka khasiat ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:16 Tua ahih ciangin miteʼ utna le sepna tawh kisai lo a, Pasianʼ hehpihna bek tawh kisai zaw hi." 
Romans9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah Pasian in Faro kiangah, “Ka vangliatna lah nading le leitung khempeuh ah ka min a kitheih nadingin kong zat nop manin kumpi a hong suaksak ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:18 Tua ahih manin Pasian in a hehpih nopte hehpih a, a paupeensak nopte paupeengsak hi." 
Romans9:19 Note in, “Tua bang ahihleh bang hangin Pasian in mi mawhsak thei ahi hiam? Pasianʼ cih sa kua in kheel zo ding ahi hiam?” na ci nuam kha ding uh hi." 
Romans9:20 Lawmte aw, ahi zongin kua in Pasianʼ thu nial ngam ding na hi uh hiam? Beel in amah a seek pa kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin hong seek na hi hiam?” ci ngei lo hi." 
Romans9:21 Beelseek pa in tungman lom khat sung panin hun thupi diakin zat ding beel le zat mawkmawk ding beelin a ututin seek theih nading thu a nei hi. 
Romans9:22 Tua mah bangin Pasian in zong a beisa hunah siatna a thuak dingin a kilawm mite susia loin a ki-ipipna mite tungah a hehna le a vangliatna a lah theih nading thu a neih mah bangin," 
Romans9:23 ama minthanna a lah theih nadingin ama minthanna a ngah dingin a hong seh sa eite tungah zong ama hehpihna a hong piak theih nading thu a nei hi. 
Romans9:24 Tua bangin a hong sap eite pen Jew mite sung bek pan hi loin Gentail mite sung panin zong ahi hi. 
Romans9:25 Hosea Lai Siangtho sungah, “Keima mi ahi lote, ‘Keima mi,’ ka ci dinga, ka it loh mite, ‘Ka itte,’ ka ci ding hi." 
Romans9:26 ‘Ka mite hi kei uh teh,’ a kicihna leitang teekteek mahah, ‘A nungta Pasianʼ tate na hi uh hi,’ kici ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans9:27 Isaiah in Israel miteʼ thu a genna ah, “Israel mite, tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hangin mi tawmno khat bek suakta ding uh hi." 
Romans9:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leitung mite thu hong khen baih ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:29 Hih thu pen Isaiah mah in, “Vanglian Topa in eiteʼ suanlekhak ding hong siitsak lo hileh Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua mite i bang ding hi,” ci-in a gen kholh sa thu ahi hi." 
Romans9:30 Tua ahihleh Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading hanciamna a nei lo Gentail mite pen upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl thei a," 
Romans9:31 Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nadingin thukham zuihna tawh hanciam napi-in a zuih zawh lohna hangun Israel mite kipawl thei lo ahihleh a bangci thu ahi hiam? 
Romans9:32 Amaute in upna suang loin nasepna a suan hang uh ahi hi. Amaute pen Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin, “Puk nading suang,” a kici tungah a puk kha uh ahi hi." 
Romans9:33 Lai Siangtho in, “En un, keimah in Zion ah mite a muk tuk theih nading, mite a puk theih nading suang khat ka koih hi. Ahi zongin amah a muang mite khempeuh tavai cih omngei lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans10:1 Sanggamte aw, i mipihte in hotkhiatna a ngah nading deihsakin lungsim takpi tawh Pasian kiangah thu ka ngetsak hi." 
Romans10:2 Amaute in Pasian a kin mahmah lamtak uh thei-in teci-in ka pang ngam hi. Ahi zongin amaute in a man lampi tawh kin kha lo uh hi. 
Romans10:3 Amaute in Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading lampi man thei loin amau theih tawmna tawh hanciam kha uh ahih manin amah tawh kipawl theih nadingin lampi a khun zui kha lo uh hi. 
Romans10:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh upna a nei mi khempeuh Pasian tawh a kipawl theih nadingin Khris in Thukham a beisak hi. 
Romans10:5 Moses in a laigelhna sungah, “Thukham deihna bangin a gamta zo mi khempeuh a nungta ding hi,” ci-in Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading thu a na gen hi." 
Romans10:6 Ahi zongin upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna thu a kigenna ah, “Vantungah kua va pai to dinga,” ci kei unla, “Leinuai ah kua va pai suk ding ahi hiam?” zong ci kei un, ci hi. Tua a cihna pen vantung panin Khris a la suk ding le sihna panin a thosak ding cihna ahi hi." 
Romans10:7  
Romans10:8 Tua bang a cih ciangin, “Pasianʼ thu pen nai mahmah in note kam sung le na lungsim sung uh ah om hi,” a cihnopna ahi hi. Tua Pasianʼ thu pen koteʼ hilhhilh, “Pasian um un,” cihna thu ahi hi." 
Romans10:9 Jesu pen Topa hi, ci-in mite kiangah genin, Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkiksak zo hi, ci-in na lungsim sung uh ah na up taktak uh leh hotkhiatna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Romans10:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh i lungsim ah i up taktakna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna kingah a, i kamin i genna hangin hotkhiatna a kingah ahi hi." 
Romans10:11 Lai Siangtho in, “Amah a um mi peuhmah tavai lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Romans10:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi le Gentail mi a kideidanna om lo ahih manin Topa pen mi khempeuhʼ Topa hi kim a, ama kiangah a ngen khempeuh tungah thupha tampi tak a pia hi." 
Romans10:13 Lai Siangtho in zong, “Topa tungah huhna a ngen khempeuhte in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Romans10:14 Ahi zongin a up loh pa uh tungah kua in thu ngen thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu za ngei kei leh kua in a thu um thei ding ahi hiam? Ama thu kigen kei leh kua in za thei ding ahi hiam? 
Romans10:15 A gen dingin kisawl kei leh kua in a thu gen thei ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Lungdamna thu a hilh dingin a hong pai mite hangin kinuam mahmah hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans10:16 Ahi zongin Isaiah in, “Topa aw, ka thugente uh kua in um ahi hiam?” a cih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu a za mi khempeuh in um kim lo uh hi." 
Romans10:17 Tua ahih ciangin zakna panin upna hong piang thei a, Khris thu up nading pen hilhna panin hong piang thei pan hi." 
Romans10:18 Tua ahihleh amaute in thu za lo uh ahi hiam? Lai Siangtho sungah, “Amauʼ awgingte leitung khempeuh ah kizel a, a thugente uh in mun khempeuh a ban hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin amaute in thu za khinzo uh hi." 
Romans10:19 Tua ahihleh Israel mite in a thei uh hiam? Moses mahmah in Pasianʼ min tawh thu na gen a, “Keima mi pawl ahi lote thupha pia-in, noteʼ hazat dingin ka bawl dinga, tua mihaiteʼ hangin note na heh nadingun kong bawl ding hi,” a cih mah bangin Israel mite in a thu a thei lo uh hi lo hi." 
Romans10:20 Tua banah Isaiah in Pasianʼ min tawh hang takin thu na gen a, “Kei hong zong lo mite in kei hong mu uh a, kei hong kan lo mite tungah ka kilak hi,” ci-in na gen hi." 
Romans10:21 Tua ciangin Israel mite tawh kisai-in, “Ka thu a mang lo, kei hong langpang mite tawh ka kilemkik theih nadingin a tawntungin ka hanciam hi,” ci-in a na gen hi." 
Romans11:1 Tua ahihleh Pasian in ama mi Israel-te nialin nusia mang khin ahi hiam? Tua bang hi dek lo hi. Kei mahmah zong Abrahamʼ suan Israel mite ka hi a, tua sung panin Benjaminʼ suan ka hi hi." 
Romans11:2 Pasian in tanglai panin a teel sa mite nusia lo hi. Elijah in Israel mite mawhsakin Pasian kiangah nakpi takin thu a genna Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
Romans11:3 Tua sungah, “Topa aw, Israel mite in na kamsangte thatin nangma biakna taute phelin susia gawp uh a, kei bekbek ka om lai hi. Kei nangawn thah hong sawm lai uh hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans11:4 Ahi zongin Pasian in, “Baal milim a bia nai lo mihing tul sagih ka nei lai hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Romans11:5 Tua mah bangin tuhunin zong Pasian in ama hehpihna tawh a teel sa mi tawm khat om lai hi. 
Romans11:6 A teelna ah miteʼ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hi loin ama dikna hangin a teel hizaw hi. Pasian in mihingteʼ nasepna bulphuhin a teel hileh Pasianʼ dikna pen dikna kici thei lo ding hi. 
Romans11:7 A thu om zia taktak hih bang ahi hi. Israel mi a tam zaw in a hanciamciam uh ngah lo uh hi. Pasianʼ teel mi tawm khat bek in ngah uh a, a dangte in Pasianʼ sapna thudon lo uh hi." 
Romans11:8 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Pasian in thu a ngaihsun thei lo, khua a phawk thei loin amaute bawl a, amaute in tu ni dongin khua mu thei lo, khua za thei loin a om uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans11:9 Tua ciangin David in zong, “Amaute in a pawi bawlnate uh awk lawh uh henla, kiat lawhin gimna ngahlawh uh hen!" 
Romans11:10 Khua a muh loh nadingun a mit uh taw henla, lungkhamna van gik lelin awn tawntung ta uh hen!” ci-in a gen lai hi." 
Romans11:11 Jew mite a puk uh ciangin sia paisuak ahi uh hiam? Sia paisuak lo uh hi. Amauʼ mawhna hangin Gentail mite in hotkhiatna ngah uh hi. Gentail mite in hotkhiatna a ngah pen Jew mite in enna lungsim a neih theih nading uh deihna ahi hi. 
Romans11:12 Jew miteʼ mawhna pen leitung khempeuh thupha ngahna suak a, amauʼ gitnat lohna pen Gentail miteʼ hamphatna suak ahihleh Jew mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngah kim uh ciangin bangzahin hoih kan ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans11:13 Tu-in no Gentail mite tungah thu kong gen nuam hi: No Gentail mite adingin sawltak ka sep sungteng ka nasep a thupi mahmah in ka ngaihsun ding hi. 
Romans11:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mipihte in note hong en theih nading uh piangsak thei-in, tua manin amaute pawl khat in hotkhiatna a ngah nading uh piangsak zo kha dingin ka kilamen hi." 
Romans11:15 Amaute a kinialna hangin Pasian tawh leitung mi khempeuh kipawl theihna piang ahihleh amaute a kisan hun ciangin a si sate nangawn a hinkikna hong hi ta ding hi. 
Romans11:16 Anlum a ki-em masa sung panin a them khat Pasian biakna-in a kipiak ciangin a anlum buppi zong Pasian-aʼ mah hi pah a, singkung khatʼ zung zong Pasian a kipiak ciangin a hiang khempeuh zong Pasian-aʼ mah ahi hi." 
Romans11:17 A kiciing oliv kung a hiangte kisat khia-in gamlak oliv hiangte tawh kipeh hi. No Gentail-te pen tua gamlak oliv hiangte tawh a kibang na hi uh a, Jew miteʼ hamphatna teng a ngahkhawm na hi uh hi." 
Romans11:18 Tua ahih manin oliv hiang a kisat khia tawh a kibang Jew mite simmawh bawl kha kei un. Note na kiphatsak theih nading uh a thu om lo hi. Note pen a hiang tawh a kibang lel na hi uh a, note in a zungpi a hingsak hi loin, a zungpi in note a hong hingsak ahi zaw hi." 
Romans11:19 Note in, “Eite tawh hong kipeh theih nadingin a hiangte a kisat khia ahi hi,” na ci nuam ding uh hi." 
Romans11:20 Tua pen thuman ahi hi. Amaute in a up lohna hangun a kisat khia hi a, note in na upna hangun amauteʼ munah a om na hi uh hi. Tua ahih manin kiphatsakna lungsim nei kei unla, lamdangsakna tawh om khikhe zaw un." 
Romans11:21 Pasian in oliv hiang ngeite dawm lo ahihleh note hong dawm tuan lo ding hi. 
Romans11:22 Hih thu ah Pasian a migit mahmahna le a khauh mahmahna i mu hi. A khial mite tungah khauh mahmah a, ama migitna a kizop paisuak theih nadingin na up paisuak nak uh leh note tungah hong migi mahmah hi. Ahi zongin na zop paisuak kei uh leh note zong hong kisat khia ding hi." 
Romans11:23 Tua ciangin Jew mite in zong a lungsim uh kheelin Pasian a up uh leh Pasian in a pehkik theih nading vangliatna nei ahih manin amaute zong amauʼ mun ngei mahah pehkik ding hi. 
Romans11:24 Note pen na pian ngei uh gamlak oliv kung panin hong kisat khia-in noteʼ pian ngei ahi lo a kiciing oliv kung tungah hong kipeh thei ahihleh a kiciing oliv kung panin a kisat khia tawh a kibang Jew mite pen Pasian in amau omna ngei ah a pehkik ding ol zaw mahmah lai ding hi. 
Romans11:25 Sanggamte aw, note in na theih dingun ka deih thusim khat om hi. Thei le-uhcin, “A pil mahmah hi hang,” na kici nawn kei pah ding uh hi. Tua thu in: Israel mite in a up nop lohna pen a tawntung ding thu hi lo hi. Pasian kiangah Gentail mite a pai ding zah in Pasian a zuat hun ciang dong ding bek ahi hi." 
Romans11:26 Tua hi a, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Zion panin Honpa hong pai dinga, Jakobʼ suanlekhakte sunga om gitlohna khempeuh maisak ding hi." 
Romans11:27 Amauteʼ mawhna ka maisak ciangin hih ka thuciamna ka pia ding hi,” ci-in gen hi." 
Romans11:28 Jew mite in Lungdamna Thu um loin Pasianʼ gal ahihna pen no Gentail miteʼ hamphat nading hi a, ahi zongin Pasianʼ teelna tawh kisai-in a pupite uh tungah a thuciamna huhau-in Pasianʼ pawlte mah hi lai veve uh hi." 
Romans11:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in a teel mite le thupha a piak mite tawh kisai-in a thu dokkik lo hi. 
Romans11:30 No Gentail mite in a beisa hunah Pasianʼ thu na mang kei uh a, ahi zongin Jew miteʼ thuman lohna hangin tu-in Pasianʼ hehpihna na ngah uh hi." 
Romans11:31 Tua mah bangin amauteʼ thuman lohna hangin note in Pasianʼ hehpihna na ngahna uh pen Jew mite in zong Pasianʼ hehpihna a ngahkik theih nading uh ahi hi. 
Romans11:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna a piak theih nadingin a thuman lohna hangun mi khempeuh thong kia a bangsak hi. 
Romans11:33 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ hong hehpihna nak liat mahmah a, a pilna le a thu theihnate nak thuk mahmah hi. Ama thukhennate kuaʼ gen theih ding hi lo a, a nasepna ziate kuaʼ tel zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Romans11:34 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “Kua in Topaʼ lungsim thei dinga, kua in ngaihsutna va pia thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Romans11:35 Amah in hong thukkik theih nadingin kuamah in ama tungah thupha va bawl ngei lo hi,” na ci hi." 
Romans11:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh ama piansak hi a, na khempeuh ama hang le ama minthan nading bekin a om ahi hi. Mi khempeuh in Pasian phat tawntung tahen! Amen." 
Romans12:1 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Pasian in eite tam veipi tak hong hehpih ahih manin ama lungkim nading le ama nasep nadingin nomau mahmah a hingtangin Pasian tungah na kipiak nadingun kong thum hi. Tua banga kipiakna pen Pasian biakna man taktak ahi hi." 
Romans12:2 Leitung mihingteʼ gamtat bangin gamta kei unla, na lungsim uh kikheelin Pasian kipuahphasak un. Tua hileh a hoih nate bang hi a, bangte in amah lungkimsakin, bangte a kicing hiam ci-in thei-in Pasianʼ deihna na phawk thei ding uh hi." 
Romans12:3 Pasian in kei tungah hehpihna hong piakkhongna hangin note tungah kong gen nop thu in: Note tawh a kituak zah valin kilian ngaihsut zaw kha kei un. Pasian in note tungah upna hong piakzah tawh kizui-in kingaihsun bek zaw unla, a kilawm ciang khat bekin kingaihsun un." 
Romans12:4 I pumpi tungah zong na tampi i nei a, tua nateʼ nasep a tuamtuam ahi hi." 
Romans12:5 Tua mah bangin eite mi tampi ihih hangin pum khat ihi a, pumpi nate bangin khatlekhat a kizom ciat ihi hi." 
Romans12:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian in hehpihna hong piakkhongna tawh kizui-in i siamna a tuamtuamte zang ciat ni. I siamna pen Pasianʼ thu gen theih nading siamna ahihleh i upna neihzah tawh kizui-in gen ni. 
Romans12:7 Nasep nading siamna a nei ihih leh na sem ni. Hilh nading siamna a nei ihih leh hilh ni. 
Romans12:8 Midangte hanthot theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh midangte hanthawn ni. Midangte hop theih nading a nei ihih leh citna taktak tawh hawm ni. Makaih theih nading siamna a nei ihih leh hoihtakin na sem ni. Midangte hehpih theih nading a nei ihih leh maitai takin hih ni. 
Romans12:9 Na ki-itnate uh lungsim takpi tawh hisak unla, a siate mudahin a hoihte lenkip un." 
Romans12:10 Unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla, khatlekhat kizahtak bawl ding lamsang kidem un." 
Romans12:11 Thadah kei unla, nakpi takin na sem un. Lawp mahmahna lungsim tawh Topaʼ na sem un." 
Romans12:12 Lamet na neihna hangun lungdamin om tawntung unla, lungkhamna na thuak uh ciangin lungduai-in thu na ngen tawntung un." 
Romans12:13 Na Khristian pihte uh a kisapna bangin na neihsate uh na hawm unla, zin le leengla do a siam mite na hi ta un." 
Romans12:14 No a hong bawlsia mite, Pasian in thupha a piak nadingin thu ngetsak unla, tua bang mite samsia loin thupha pia zaw un." 
Romans12:15 A lungdam mite lungdam pih unla, a dah mite dahpih un." 
Romans12:16 Mi deidan loin a kibangin en un. Kiphasak loin mi neute tawh kikhawl thei unla, kipilsak se kei un." 
Romans12:17 Midangteʼ gitlohnate thukkik kei unla, mi khempeuh in hoih hi, ci-in a ngaihsut ding bangin gamta un." 
Romans12:18 Ahih theih lai teng mi khempeuh tawh na kilem nadingun hanciam un. 
Romans12:19 Lawmte aw, na hehna uh kuama tungah thukkik kei unla, Pasianʼ thukkik dingin koih lel un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Keimah in amaute tungah ka thuk dinga, midangte a gimsak bangun ka gimsak ding hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Romans12:20 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Na galte uh a gil a kial leh an na pia un. A dang a taak leh tui na pia un. Tua bangin na gamtat uh leh amauteʼ maizum nadingin a bawl na hi uh hi,” ci-in a kigelh bangin gamta zaw un." 
Romans12:21 Tua ahih manin gitlohna kizosak kei unla, a pha gamtatna tawh gitlohnate a zo na hi ta un." 
Romans13:1 A kuamah peuh in hong ukteʼ thu na mang ciat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ thukimpih lohin kuamah in ukna thu nei lo hi; ukna thu nei i cih mite pen Pasianʼ koih mite ahi hi. 
Romans13:2 Tua ahih manin ukna thuneite a nialte pen Pasianʼ koih sa mite a nial suak a, tua bang mite in thukhenna a thuak ding uh hi." 
Romans13:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam uk mite pen a gamtat hoih miteʼ kihtak ding hi lo a, mi tatsiateʼ kihtak ding hi bek hi. Ukna thu a neite kihta loin na om nop uh leh a hoihin gamta un. Tua hileh amaute in note hong pakta-in hong phat ding uh hi." 
Romans13:4 Ukna thuneite pen noteʼ hoih nadingin Pasianʼ nasemte ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin a sia-in na gamtat uh leh gim hong pia taktak ding uh ahih manin na lau ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Pasianʼ nasemte hi a, a sia-in a gamta mite tungah Pasianʼ hehna bangin gim a pia dingte ahi uh hi." 
Romans13:5 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ gimpiak ding kihtakna hang bek hi loin, ahi ding thu mah hi, ci-a theihna tawh ukna thu a neiteʼ thu na man ding uh ahi hi." 
Romans13:6 Ukna thu a neite in amauʼ sep ding teng a kimtakin a sep uh ciangin Pasian adingin na a semte hi uh ahih manin tua thu hang mahin zong mangmu a pia na hi uh hi. 
Romans13:7 Tua ahih manin phiangsiah piak dingte tungah pia-in, mangmu piak dingte tungah pia-in, zahtak dingte zahtak bawlin, pahtawi dingte pahtawi ta un." 
Romans13:8 Khatlekhat ki-it ding cih loh buang, kuama tungah leiba nei kei un. Midang a itte in Thukham deihna teng a zui khin ahi hi." 
Romans13:9 Thukham sungah, “Nulepa mawhna bawl kei in, mi that kei in, guta kei in, hazatna lungsim nei kei in,” cihna le a dang khempeuhte pen, “Nang na ki-it bangin na veengte na it in,” cihna thu in huam khin mang hi." 
Romans13:10 Midangte a it mi peuhmah in amaute tungah siatna bawl het lo ahih manin itna i neih ciangin Thukham buppi a zui khinta ihi hi. 
Romans13:11 Tu hun pen bang hun hi ta ahi hiam, ci-in thei ta na hih manun tu-a bangin na gamtat ding uh ahi hi. Tu-in note in khua phawkin na khanlawh ding uh hun hi ta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jesu Khris i up cil lai hun sangin tu-in Pasian in leitung haksatna panin eite hong hotkhiat ding hun hong nai zaw hi." 
Romans13:12 Zan khuamial bei dektak a, sun khuavak hong tung dektak ta hi. Khuamial sunga gamtatnate khawlin khuavak sunga nazatte zam ta ni." 
Romans13:13 Sun khuavak sunga om mite bangin a kilawmin gamta ni. Gualnopna le zukhamna, mawhna le thangtatna, kitotna le kihazatnate-in i hun beisak kei ni." 
Romans13:14 Kidal nadingin, Topa Jesu Khrisʼ hong piak galhiamte zang unla, na pumpi uh deihna bangin gamtat nading hun omsak nawn kei un." 
Romans14:1 Upna neu mite pawlbawl unla, na ngaihsutna uh a kituah kei leh zong mawhsak kei un." 
Romans14:2 Mi pawl khat in na khempeuh ka nek theih ding hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi; ahi zongin upna neute in anteh bek ne ngam uh hi." 
Romans14:3 Tua ahih manin a ne mite in a tang mite simmawh bawl kei henla, a tang mite in zong a ne mite simmawh bawl kei hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ne mite zong Pasian in a san mite mah ahi hi." 
Romans14:4 Mi khatʼ nasemte tungah kua in thu khen thei ding na hi uh hiam? A gina le a gina lo a khen ding pa pen amauʼ Topa ahi hi. A Topa un hoih hi, a cih leh a kipsak zawh nading vangliatna nei ahih manin a kip hi lel ding uh hi." 
Romans14:5 Mi pawl khatte in ni khatpeuh a dang sangin thupi zaw hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh a, pawl khatte in ni khempeuh kibang kim hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in amauʼ hoihsakna thu ciantakin thei ta uh hen." 
Romans14:6 Ni khatpeuh thupi diak hi, ci-in a tang mite in Topa a pahtawina-in a tang ahi uh hi. An khempeuh a ne mi in zong Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna ko-in ne uh ahih manin Topa a pahtawina mahin a ne uh ahi hi. Nek dingin kilawm lo hi, ci-in a ne lo mite in zong Pasian tungah lungdamna mah ko ahih manin Topa a pahtawina mahin a ne lo uh ahi hi." 
Romans14:7 Ama ading bekin kuamah nungta lo a, ama ading bekin kuamah si lo hi." 
Romans14:8 I nuntak leh Topa adingin a nungta ihi a, i sih leh zong Topa ading mahin a si ihi hi. Tua ahih manin i si a, i hing zongin Topa aʼ ihi hi." 
Romans14:9 Hih thu hangin Khris pen a site le a hingteʼ Topa ahih theih nadingin hong si-in hong nungtakik hi. 
Romans14:10 Tua ahihleh bang hangin na Khristian pihte uh tungah thu khen a, bang hangin simmawh bawl thei na hi uh hiam? Thukhenna a thuak dingin Pasianʼ mai ah eite khempeuh a ding ciat ding ihi hi." 
Romans14:11 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Kei pen a nungta ka hih mah bangin ka mai ah mi khempeuh hong kun dinga, Pasian ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in pulak taktak ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans14:12 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna ciat Pasianʼ mai ah a va kigen tel ciat ding ihi hi. 
Romans14:13 Tua ahih manin khatlekhat kimawhsakin thu kikhen kei unla, i Khristian pihte i puksak khak loh nading, a dongtangsak ihih khak loh nadingin ngaihsun ciat ni." 
Romans14:14 Topa Jesu tawh kipawlin a lungsim ka theihna tawh, na khat peuhpeuh ama thu-in a dawizek om het lo hi, ci-in teltakin ka thei hi. Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in dawizek hi, ci-in a ngaihsut leh ama adingin a dawizek hi pah hi." 
Romans14:15 An khatpeuh na nekna uh hangin na Khristian pihteʼ lungnopmawhna na piansak uh leh itna lungsim tawh a gamta na hi nawn kei uh hi. Na annekna uh tawh, Khris in a sih lawh miteʼ siat nading piangsak kei un." 
Romans14:16 Tua ciangin note in hoih na sak uh thute, midangte in a sia-in a gen khak loh theih nadingun na gamta un." 
Romans14:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Ukna pen nekledawn tawh a kisai thu hi lo a, Kha Siangtho hangin i ngah Pasianʼ deih bangin gamtatna, kilemna, lungdamna, cihte hizaw hi." 
Romans14:18 Hih bang danin Khrisʼ na a sem mite in Pasian lungdamsak a, mite zong a lungkimsak uh hi." 
Romans14:19 Tua ahih ciangin mi tawh kilem theih nading le kha thu ah khatlekhat thahatna i kipiak theih nading thute hanciam ciat ni. 
Romans14:20 Annek huhau-in Pasianʼ sep sa thute susia kei ni. An khempeuh a kine thei ding ahi hi; ahi zongin tua nekna hangin mi khat peuhpeuh a puk ding ahihleh a khial ihi hi. 
Romans14:21 Midangte in a puk lawh theih annekna, zunekna le na khat peuhpeuh i kikep ding a man pen ahi hi." 
Romans14:22 Hih thu ah noʼ upna le noʼ ngaihsutnate, Pasian tawh noteʼ kikal thu hisak un. Amau lungsim sungah man a sak bangun a gamta zote pen a lung uh nuam mahmah hi." 
Romans14:23 Ahi zongin lunghimawh pipi-in a ne a om leh, a upna uh tawh kizui-in a gamta hi lo uh ahih manin Pasian in tua bang mite a mawhsak ding hi. I upna bangin gamtat lohna peuhpeuh mawhna ahi hi." 
Romans15:1 Upna lamah a thahat eite in upna zawngkhalteʼ ginat lohna i thuakpih ding kilawm hi; eima ut bangin i gamta kei ding hi. 
Romans15:2 Midangte a upna uh hong khangin, mihoih hong suah theih nadingun i gamta ciat ding hi." 
Romans15:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris zong ama nopsak theih nadingin gamta lo zaw hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Note hong kisimmawhna thute kei tungah hong tu hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi." 
Romans15:4 Lai Siangtho sungah a om thu khempeuh pen eite hilh nading, eite in lametna nei-in i thuak zawh nading le i thahat theih nadingin a kigelh ahi hi." 
Romans15:5 Note in lungsim kikhatin i Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa ahi Pasian na phatkhawm theih nadingun Pasian in thuak zawhna le thahatna hong pia henla, Jesu Khris deihna bangin gamta-in khatlekhat kithutuak takin hong omsak tahen." 
Romans15:6  
Romans15:7 Tua ahih ciangin Khris in note hong san mah bangin midangte in Pasian a phat theih nadingun note khatlekhat na kisang un. 
Romans15:8 Hih banga kong genna pen, Pasian thuman hi, ci-in a kilat nadingin pupite tungah Pasianʼ thuciamna a tungsak dingin, Jew mite hoih nading," 
Romans15:9 le Gentail mite in zong ama hehpihna hangin Pasian a phat theih nadingun Khris a hong paina hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tua ahih ciangin Gentail mite lakah ka lungdamna nang tungah kong ko dinga, nangma minphatna late ka sa ding hi,” cihna le" 
Romans15:10 tua ciangin, “Gentail mite aw, ama mite tawh lungdam khawm un,” cihna le" 
Romans15:11 tua ciangin, “Gentail mi khempeuh aw, Topa phat un; mi khempeuh aw, amah phat un,” cihna le" 
Romans15:12 tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Jessiʼ suante khat hong khang dinga, Gentail mite a uk dingin mi lian hong suak dinga, ama hangin Gentail mite in lamet lungmuanna nei ding uh hi,” cihnate a kigelh hi." 
Romans15:13 Kha Siangthoʼ huhna tawh noteʼ lametna a khan semsem theih nadingin, lametna a hong pia thei Pasian in, amah na upna uh hangin lungdamna le nopsakna tawh note hong kidimsak tahen." 
Romans15:14 Thu upna sungah sanggamte aw, note mihoih hi-in, bangci gamtat ding cih thei-in, khatlekhat zong a kihilh thei dingin kong muang mahmah hi." 
Romans15:15 Ahi zongin hih kong laikhakna sungah noteʼ phawkkik dingin thu ka hong genna pawl khatte ah kong telkheh mahmah hi. Tua bangin ka hong telkhehna thu pen," 
Romans15:16 Gentail mite tungah na a sem dingin Khris Jesu sawltak hih theih nading hamphatna lianpi Pasian in kei a hong piakna hang ahi hi. Gentail mite pen Kha Siangtho in Pasianʼ tungah a piak, ama san theih biakpiaknate a suah theih nadingin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu ka hilhna ah siampi bangin na ka sem hi." 
Romans15:17 Tua ahih manin Khris tawh kikopin Pasian ading na ka sepna ah kei ka kisathei mahmah hi. 
Romans15:18 Kha Siangthoʼ vangliatna tawh lim le nalamdangte zangin, Gentail mite in Pasian thu a zuih theih nadingun Khris in ka thatang le ka kam ka muk a zatna thute bekah hang takin genin ka telkheh ding hi. Tua ahih manin Jerusalem khua panin Illyrikam gam ciang dong ka zinna khempeuh ah Jesu Khris hangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh khinzo hi." 
Romans15:19  
Romans15:20 A tawntungin keima tup thu in: Mi khatpeuh in a pat sa nasep maban, ol takin zomin a sem mi ka suahkhak loh nadingin Khris thu a kizak ngei nai lohna munte bekah Lungdamna Thu hilh ding keima utna ahi hi." 
Romans15:21 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Ama thu a kigen ngei nai lohna mite in mu ding uh a, ama thu a za ngei nai lote in tel theih ding uh hi,” na kici hi." 
Romans15:22 Note kiangah ka hong pai pak theih lohna pen tu-a kong genna thu hang ahi hi. 
Romans15:23 Ahi zongin hih gam kiim teng a ka nasepna man khinta ing a, note tawh ka kimuh nop zong kum tampi tak pha khinta ahih manin," 
Romans15:24 tu-in note tawh kimu thei ta dingin ka kilamen hi. Spain gam ka pai kawmin note kiang ka hong nawk nuam a, note tawh tawl khat i kikholh khit ciangin Spain gam ka paina dingah nong huh ding uh ka ut hi." 
Romans15:25 Ahi zongin tu laitakin ahihleh Jerusalem khua-a Pasian mite a kihuhna a puak dingin ka va pai masa ding hi. 
Romans15:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Masedonia gam le Grik gam sunga om pawlpite in Jerusalem khua-a om Pasianʼ mi a zawngte huh nadingin sum piak ding amau thu-in a vaihawm tawm uh hi. 
Romans15:27 Hih pen amau ngaihsut tawmna tawh lawptakin a huh uh ahi hi. A taktakin ci lehang hih mizawngte a huh dingun a kilawm mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite in kha thu tawh kisai nate Gentail mite hawm uh ahih manin Gentail mite in zong leitung nate tawh Jew mite a huh dingun a kilawm khat ahi hi. 
Romans15:28 Amaute adingin a kikaikhawm hih sumte a cingin amaute tungah apin, hih nasep ka man khit ciangin Spain gam manawh dingin ka hong paikhia dinga, note kiangah kong baang ding hi." 
Romans15:29 Note kiang ka hong tun ciangin Khris kiang panin thupha tampi tak ka hong puak ding lamtak ka thei hi. 
Romans15:30 Lawmte aw, kei adingin Pasian kiangah thu na hong ngetsak nadingun i Topa Jesu Khris i upna hang le Kha Siangtho in a hong piak itna tawh a hong thum ka hi hi." 
Romans15:31 Judea gam sunga a om thu um lo mite in kei hong gimsak khak loh nading le Jerusalem khua-a a om Pasian mite adingin nasepnate lungdam takin a hong san theih nadingun thu hong ngetsak un. 
Romans15:31 Judea gam sunga a om thu um lo mite in kei hong gimsak khak loh nading le Jerusalem khua-a a om Pasian mite adingin nasepnate lungdam takin a hong san theih nadingun thu hong ngetsak un. 
Romans15:32 Tua bangin thu hong ngetsak le-uhcin, Pasianʼ deihna ahih nakleh note kiangah lungdam takin ka hong tung dinga, note tawh nuam takin i kimu ding hi." 
Romans15:33 Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in note khempeuh hong ompih tahen. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Kenkhrea khua-a om pawlpite lakah na a sem, thu upna sungah i sanggamnu Foebe pen mihoih mahmah khat ahihna thu noteʼ theih dingin ka deih hi." 
Romans16:2 Amah pen keimah a kipan mi tampi adingin lawm hoih mahmah khat ahih manin, Pasianʼ mite in a hih dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin Topaʼ thu sungah mihoihin na sang unla, noteʼ huh ding a kisapna khempeuh ah hoihtakin na huh un." 
Romans16:3 Khris Jesu sungah na ka sep khop pih Prisilla le Aquila na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:4 Amaute pen kei adingin a si ngam uh ahi hi. Amaute tungah a lungdam kei guak bek zong hi loin, Gentail pawlpi mi khempeuh zong a lungdam ahi hi." 
Romans16:5 Amauʼ inn-a kikhawm pawlpi mi khempeuh zong na hopihsak un. Asia gam sungah Khris thu a um masa pen pa ahi ka lawm it mahmah Epainetas zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:6 Note adingin nakpi takin na a sem Mary zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:7 Jew mipih ahih banah ka thongkiat pih ahi Andronikas le Junias zong na hopihsak un. Amaute pen keiʼ Khristian suah ma pekin a na suak khin sate na hi uh a, sawltakte khempeuh in a theihkim uh mite ahi uh hi." 
Romans16:8 Topa thu sungah ka lawm it mahmah ahi Ampliatas zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:9 Khris nasepna sungah na ka sep khop pih uh ahi Urbanas le ka lawm Stakhus zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:10 Khris tungah mi citak mahmah ahi Apelles zong na hopihsak un. Aristobulas innkuan pih mite zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:11 Jew mipih Herodion le Narsissas innkuan sunga i Khristian sanggamte zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:12 Topaʼ na a sem Trifana le Trifosa le Topa adingin na tampi tak a sem ka lawm it Persis zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:13 Topaʼ nasepna sungah a kikhai mahmah Rufas le ta bangin kei a hong bawl tawntung ama nu zong na hopihsak un. 
Romans16:14 Asinkritas, Flegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas le amaute tawh a kikhawm khawm Khristian sanggamte zong na hopihsak un." 
Romans16:15 Filologas le Julia, Nereas le a sanggamnu le Olympas le amaute tawh a kikhawm khawm Pasianʼ mi khempeuh zong na hopihsak un." 
Romans16:16 Sanggam ki-itna taktak tawh note khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khris pawlpi khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. 
Romans16:17 Lawmte aw, noteʼ theih sa thute gensia langpangin, miteʼ upna nawngkaisakin pawl a kikhensak mite kidawm un. Tua bang mite tawh kikhawl vet kei un." 
Romans16:18 Tua bang mite in i Topa Khrisʼ na a sem hi loin, gilpi vai bek a sem uh ahi hi. Amaute in mite phatin kam khum nono zang uh ahih manin mihoih pawl khat a khem zo uh hi." 
Romans16:19 Lungdamna thu tawh kisai ah na cihtakna uh mi khempeuh in thei ahih manin hih thu ah kong lungdam pih mahmah hi. A hoih bang hiam, ci-in theih nading pilna nei-in, a sia peuhmah tawh na kizop khak het loh nading uh kong deihsak hi." 
Romans16:20 Tua hileh eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Pasian in Satan tuancilin noteʼ khenuai mi hong hisak baih ding hi. I Topa Jesu Khris hong hehpihna thupha, note tungah om tahen." 
Romans16:21 Ka nasep pih Timoti in note hong hopih a, Jew mipih Lusias, Jason le Sosipater-te in zong hong hopih uh hi." 
Romans16:22 Hih lai a gelhsak keimah Tertias in zong upna kikhat ihihna tawh ka hong hopih hi. 
Romans16:23 Keima zintunna pa le pawlpiteʼ kikhopna inn nei pa zong ahi Gaias in zong hong hopih hi. Ka omna khuapi sumkem pa Erastas le i Khristian sanggam Kuartas in zong hong hopih uh hi. 
Romans16:24 (I Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong om tahen. Amen.) 
Romans16:25 Eite khempeuh in Pasian phat ni. Keima hilh Jesu Khris thu ahi Lungdamna Thu le tanglai-in a ki-imcip, tu-in a kipholak thu ah, amah pen noteʼ upna a hong kipsak thei pa ahi hi." 
Romans16:26 Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasian umin a zuih theih nadingin tu-in kamsangteʼ laigelhnate le a nungta tawntung Pasianʼ thupiakna tawh tua thu ki-imcip pen a hong kipholak ta ahi hi. 
Romans16:27 Thu khempeuh ah pilna a nei, amah bek ahi Pasian in Jesu Khris hangin a tawntungin phatna ngah tahen! Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Khris Jesuʼ sawltak dingin Pasian in a hong teel keimah Paul le thu upna sungah i sanggam Sosthenes in," 
1Corinthians1:2 Jesu Khris tawh kipawlna hangin Pasianʼ mi suakin, Pasianʼ mi siangtho cihna a ngah, Korin khua-a om Pasianʼ pawlpi mite le eiteʼ Topa bek hi loin, amauteʼ Topa zong ahi, i Topa Jesu Khris tungah thu a ngen, mun khempeuh ah a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:3 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
1Corinthians1:4 Jesu Khris hangin note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha hong pia ahih manin ka lungdamna thu, Pasian tungah ka ko tawntung hi." 
1Corinthians1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris tawh na kipawlna hangun, thugen siamna le thu theih tel siamna a kipan siamna nam khempeuh na nei kim uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:6 Note sungah Khris thu kip takin om ahih manin," 
1Corinthians1:7 i Topa Jesu Khris hong kilatkik ding ngakin na om hun sungun thupha na ngah loh uh khat beek om lo hi. 
1Corinthians1:8 Ama hong kilatkik hun ciang dong, a tawp dongin mawhna le kisuanna nei loin na om nadingun i Topa Jesu Khris mah in note hong huh ding hi." 
1Corinthians1:9 Ama Tapa ahi i Topa Jesu Khris tawh a kikhawl dingin a hong sam Pasian pen a citak Pasian hi a, a gen sa bangin a hong tungsak takpi ding ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:10 Sanggamte aw, note khatlekhat kithutuakin, pawl kikhenna om kha loin, na lungsim, na ngaihsutna uh le na ngimna uh na kikhatsak nadingun i Topa Jesu Khris min tawh kong thum hi." 
1Corinthians1:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh sanggamte aw, note lakah kitot kiseelna a omna thu, Khloeʼ innkuan pih mite in kei kiangah hong gen uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:12 Tua bang ka cih ciangin note pawl khat in, “Kei, Paulʼ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi a, pawl khat in, “Kei, Apollosʼ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi a, pawl khat in, “Kei, Peterʼ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi a, pawl khat in, “Kei, Khrisʼ pawl ka hi hi,” cihna ahi zongin na kampaunate uh ka cihna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:13 Note in Khris na phel suah zenzen uh hi. Note adingin Paul in singlamteh tungah khaina thuak ahi hiam? Note, Paulʼ nungzui dingin tui kiphum na hi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians1:14 Krispas le Gaias cih sim loh note khat beek hong tuiphum lo ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. 
1Corinthians1:15 Tua bang hikeileh keima min tawh a kiphumin na kigen kha ding uh hi. 
1Corinthians1:16 (Eh! Stefanas-te innkuan zong ka tuiphum mah hi. Tuate cih sim loh kuamah dang ka tuiphum lam ka thei kei hi.) 
1Corinthians1:17 Khris in tuiphum nasep a sem dingin kei hong sawl lo a, Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin a hong sawl bek ahi hi. Ka thuhilhna ah zong thugen siamna le pilna a nei ka hi kei hi. Tua bang hi kei henla, pilna le gen siamna a nei hi leng, Khris in singlamteh tunga a thuakna thu in vangliatna a neihna hang kisa lo kha ding hi." 
1Corinthians1:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna a thuak mite adingin singlamteh tungah Khris sihna thu pen a haihuai thu ahi hi. Ahi zongin hotkhiatna a ngah eite adingin Pasianʼ vangliatna ahi hi. 
1Corinthians1:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “Mipilteʼ pilna ka susia dinga, miteiteʼ teina ka heikhiatsak ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
1Corinthians1:20 Tua ahih manin tu hun a mipilte, miteite le thusel a siamte, bangin kimang ahi hiam? Hih leitung pilna pen haina a suahsak khitna kilang khinzo hi." 
1Corinthians1:21 Pasian in ama pilna hong zang a, mihingte in amauʼ pilna tawh pasian a theih zawh loh nadingun a bawl hi. Tua ahih manin mite in, “A haihuai thu,” ci-in a ngaihsut uh i thuhilhna a umte, Pasian in hotkhiatna a pia zaw hi." 
1Corinthians1:22 A up theih nadingun Jew mite in nalamdang kal uh a, Grik mite in pilna a thupisak uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:23 Ahi zongin kote in singlamteh tungah a kikhai Khrisʼ thu ka hilh uh a, tua thu pen Jew mite adingin a hehhuai thu hi a, Gentail mite adingin a haihuai thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:24 Ahi zongin Pasian in a hong sap ei Jew mite le Gentail mite adingin Khris pen Pasianʼ vangliatna le Pasianʼ pilna ahi hi. 
1Corinthians1:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ haina pen miteʼ pilna sangin sang zaw lai a, Pasianʼ thaneemna pen miteʼ hatna sangin hat zaw lai hi." 
1Corinthians1:26 Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note hong sap laitakin na om zia uh ngaihsun un. Leitung miteʼ hong muhna panin note a tam zaw, mipil na hi kei uh a, mi vanglian zong na hi kei uh a, mi thupi zong na hi kei uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Ahi zongin Pasian in mipilte a maizumsak nadingin mihaite hong teel a, mi thahatte a maizumsak nadingin mi thaneemte a hong teel hi." 
1Corinthians1:28 Leitung mite in thupi a sakte uh a suksiat theih nadingin Pasian in leitung miteʼ simmawh a niamte, bangmahin a ngaihsut loh uh mite a teel hi." 
1Corinthians1:29 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ mai ah mite a kisaktheih nading thu om lo hi. 
1Corinthians1:30 Ahi zongin Pasian in Jesu Khris hangin note tungah nuntakna hong pia a, tua Jesu Khris pen eiteʼ pilna, Pasian tawh i kipawl theihna, Pasianʼ mi siangtho suakin, hotkhiatna i ngah theihna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:31 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “A kisathei mite, Topaʼ hang bekin kisathei tahen,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
1Corinthians2:1 Sanggamte aw, Pasianʼ thu hilhin note kiangah kong pai lai-in, mipilteʼ zat kam thuk pipi le pilna kamte ka zang kei hi." 
1Corinthians2:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka om laitakin singlamteh tungah Jesu Khris a sihna thu sim loh thudang peuhmah ngaihsut loh dingin ka ngaihsut sa ahi hi. 
1Corinthians2:3 Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong pai lai-in thaneemin, launa tawh ka liing a," 
1Corinthians2:4 thu kong hilh ciangin zong leitung mipilteʼ zat kammalte le siamnate ka zang kei a, Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh thu kong hilh hi." 
1Corinthians2:5 Tua ahih manin noteʼ thu upna pen mihingteʼ pilna hang hi loin, Pasianʼ vangliatna hangin a um na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians2:6 Ahi zongin kha thu lamah a khangham mite tungah pilna thu ka gen hi. Tua ka gen pilna pen tu-in a maimang kuankuan ta ding hih leitung miteʼ pilna le vangliatna thu hi lo hi. 
1Corinthians2:7 Tua ka gen pilna thu pen miteʼ theih lo dingin Pasian in a ipcip Pasianʼ pilna thusim hi a, eiteʼ minthan nadingin leitung pianmapekin Pasian in a na koih sa thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians2:8 Hih leitung a uk mite kuamah in hih pilna thu thei lo uh hi. Thei hi le-uh, a minthang Topa pen singlamteh tungah na that lo ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians2:9 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Kuamah in a muh ngei loh, a zak ngei loh, piang thei dingin zong a ngaihsut loh uh thu pen Pasian in amah a it mite adingin a bawl kholh sak sa ahi hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
1Corinthians2:10 Ahi zongin Pasian in a Kha Siangtho tawh eite tungah tua thusim a hong langsak hi. Tua Kha Siangtho in na khempeuh kan khia a, Pasianʼ ngimna a ki-imcip a thu tawng dong takin a kan khia hi." 
1Corinthians2:11 Mihing khatʼ ngaihsutna pen ama lungsim bek mah in a theih mah bangin Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho bek mah in Pasianʼ thu a cingin a thei hi. 
1Corinthians2:12 Eiteʼ ngah lungsim pen leitung miteʼ lungsim hi lo a, Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak na khempeuh i theih nadingin Pasianʼ hong piak Kha Siangtho lungsim ahi hi." 
1Corinthians2:13 Tua ahih manin hih bangin thu kong gen uh ciangin zong, mihingteʼ hong hilh pilna kamte a zang hi loin, Kha Siangtho a nei mite tungah kha tawh kisai thu ka gen uh ciangin Kha Siangtho in a hong hilh kammalte zangin a gen ka hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians2:14 Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho a nei lo mite in Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho in a hong piak nate sang thei lo uh hi. Kha Siangtho a nei mite bek in theithei uh ahih manin amaute in tel thei lo uh a, amau adingin a haihuai thu khat ahi lel hi." 
1Corinthians2:15 Kha Siangtho a nei mite in na khempeuh theithei uh a, ahi zongin leitung mite in bangmah thei lo uh ahih manin a lungmang uh hi." 
1Corinthians2:16 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “Kua in Topaʼ lungsim thei a, ama gamtat nading lam lak thei ahi hiam?” na ci hi. Ahi zongin eite in Khris lungsim i nei hi." 
1Corinthians3:1 Sanggamte aw, a taktakin ci lehang, kha nuntakna a nei mite tungah thugen bangin kong gen thei kei hi. Leitung mite tungah thugen bang le Khris upna sungah naungek a bangte tungah thugen bangin kong gen ding kisam hi." 
1Corinthians3:2 Note in antak ne zo nai lo na hih manun nawitui ka hong tulh hi. Tu mahmah in zong nawi bek mah tulh ding a kisam lai na hi uh hi. 
1Corinthians3:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ deihna bangin gamta loin, leitung lungsim deihna bangin gamta lai na hih manun upna sungah naungek bang ahi lai na hi uh hi. Note khatlekhat kihaza-in kitawng kiseelin na om uh ciangin hih leitung mite mah a bang lel na hihna uh hong kilang hi." 
1Corinthians3:4 Pawl khat in, “Keimah, Paulʼ pawl ka hi hi,” ci-in, pawl khat in, “Apollosʼ pawl ka hi hi,” na cih uh ciangin leitung mi mawkmawkte mah bangin a gamta na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians3:5 A taktakin ci lehang, Apollos i cihte, Paul i cihte, bangpi hi zenzen ka hi uh hiam? Note in thu na up theih nadingun Pasianʼ nasemte ka hi lel uh hi. Topa in koteʼ sep dingin a hong piak nasep tuak a sem ka hi lel uh hi." 
1Corinthians3:6 Keima nasep pen khaici vawh hi a, Apollosʼ nasep pen tuibuah hi a, ahi zongin a khangsak pa ahihleh Pasian ahi hi." 
1Corinthians3:7 Khaici vawh pa le tui buak pa a thupi hi lo a, a khangsak Pasian a thupi hi bek hi." 
1Corinthians3:8 Khaici vawh pa le tui buak pa a kizakim ahi hi. Pasian in komau sepna tuak tawh kizui-in thaman hong pia ding hi. 
1Corinthians3:9 Kote pen Pasian adingin na a sem khawm mite ka hi uh a, note pen Pasianʼ lo na hi uh hi. Note pen Pasianʼ inn zong na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians3:10 Pasian in kei tungah a hong piak siamna zangin, inn lam siamteʼ nasep teng semin, a khuam thupi teng ka phut a, Apollos in tua khuam phuh sa tungah inn lam a zom hi. Tua khuam tungah inn a lam pa a kingaihsut mahmah ding kisam hi." 
1Corinthians3:11 Keima phuh sa khuam thupi teng ahi Jesu Khris cih sim loh kuamah dang in khuam thupi dang phut thei nawn lo ding hi. 
1Corinthians3:12 Ahi zongin tua khuam tungah kham, ngun, suangmanpha, sing, bi, lopa, a nam tuamtuam kilam thei hi." 
1Corinthians3:13 Tua a kilam nate mei tawh a kize-et ding Ni hong tung dinga, tua nasepnate a bangci hiam, ci-in mei in ze-et ding ahih manin a lam miteʼ nasep ciat hong kilang ding hi." 
1Corinthians3:14 Mi khat in tua khuamte tungah a lam nate bangmah a cih zawh kei leh a nasep thaman a ngah ding hi. 
1Corinthians3:15 Ahi zongin mi khat in a lam nate a kattum leh amah a sum hi ding hi. Tua nate a lam pa ahihleh mei kat nading panin a suakta bang keekin a suakta bek ding hi. 
1Corinthians3:16 Note pen Pasianʼ biakinn na hihna uh le note sungah Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho a teeng ahih lamtak na theih sa uh ahi hi. 
1Corinthians3:17 Mi khatpeuh in Pasianʼ biakinn susia leh Pasian in tua mipa susia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ biakinn a siangtho hi a, note zong tua biakinn siangtho na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians3:18 Note khatpeuh hih leitung ngeina ah a pilin na kingaihsut uh leh a pil taktak na hih theih nadingun a hai na suak phot un. 
1Corinthians3:19 Hih leitung mite in pilna hi, ci-in a ngaihsutte, Pasian adingin a haihuai thu ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Mipilte amauʼ ngian mahah awksak hi,” a na ci hi." 
1Corinthians3:20 Tua ciangin, “Mipilteʼ ngaihsutna a mawkna hi, ci-in Topa in a thei hi,” ci-in zong na gen lai hi." 
1Corinthians3:21 Tua ahih manin kuamah in midangteʼ siamna kisialh pih kei un. A taktakin ci lehang na khempeuh nomau aʼ hizaw hi. 
1Corinthians3:22 Paul, Apollos, Peter cihte ahi a, hih leitung, nuntakna, sihna, tu hun le mailam hun, cihte a kipan na khempeuh nomau aʼ ahi hi." 
1Corinthians3:23 Note pen Khris aʼ na hi uh a, Khris pen Pasian aʼ ahi hi." 
1Corinthians4:1 Kote pen Khrisʼ nasem le Pasianʼ thusim a zeekte in nong ngaihsut ding uh ahi hi. 
1Corinthians4:2 Nasem i cih mite pen a topa uh tungah citakin a thuman ding uh kisam hi. 
1Corinthians4:3 Note na hi uh a, leitung mite in ahi zongin kei tungah mawhna hong zongin thu nong khen uh hangin bangmah phamawh ka sa kei hi. Kei mahmah zong kimawhsakin thu ka kikhen kei hi." 
1Corinthians4:4 Ka kisuan nading thu bangmah ka thei het kei hi. Ahi zongin tua pen ka dik hi, cihna hi pah lo hi. Keima thu a hong khen ding pa pen Topa ahi hi." 
1Corinthians4:5 Tua ahih manin a hun a tun ma-in kuamah mawhsakin thu khen kei un. Topa hong pai ciangin a tawpna thukhenna hong om dinga, amah in thusimte hong pholakin, mihingte in a lungsim sung uh ah a ipcip uh thute hong telkheh ding hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in amauʼ ngah dingin a kilawm phatna, Pasianʼ kiang panin a ngah ciat ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians4:6 Sanggamte aw, note ading ka ngaihsutna-in hih thu khempeuh Apollos le keima pumpi tungah ka zat uh thu ahi hi. “A khengvalin gamta kei un,” cihna thu na theih nadingun ko tegel, etteh dingin ka hong zang hi. Note in mi khatpeuh kisaktheih pihin mi khatpeuh na simmawh bawl kei ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians4:7 Note in bang kisaktheih pih na hi uh hiam? Tu-a na neih khempeuh uh Pasianʼ hong piak hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahihleh hong kipia sa bek ahih manin a bang kisaktheih pih na hi uh hiam? 
1Corinthians4:8 Na deih khempeuh uh nei khin na kisa uh a, hau khin na kisa uh hi. Koteʼ om loh kalin kumpi a suak khinin na kingaihsun uh hi. Note tawh kumpi hi khawm ding ihih manin kumpi taktak a suak takpi na hi le-uhcin ka ut mahmah hi." 
1Corinthians4:9 Ko sawltakte pen vantungmi le leitung mi khempeuh in a et dingin mipiʼ mai ah thahna a thuak dingin thukhenna a kipia mi bangin Pasian in a zaneu penin hong koih tawntung tawh kibang ka sa hi. 
1Corinthians4:10 Khris hangin mite mai ah kote mihai ka suak uh a, ahi zongin note pen Khris sungah mipil na kisa uh hi. Kote ka thaneem uh a, ahi zongin note a hat na kisa uh hi. Kote hong kisimmawh bawl a, ahi zongin note hong kizahtak bawl na kisa uh hi." 
1Corinthians4:11 Tu ni ciang dong gilkial dangtakin puansilh ding nangawn nei loin ka om uh hi. Inn le lo zong nei loin hong kinot suk hong kinot to kawikawi hi. 
1Corinthians4:12 Koteʼ nektawm ding ka thatang mahmah uh tawh nakpi takin ka sem uh hi. Hong kisamsiat ciangin thupha ka lehpiak uh a, hong kibawlsiat ciangin ka gumthuak uh hi." 
1Corinthians4:13 Zahpihna kam tawh hong kihopih ciangin kam khum tawh ka dawng uh hi. Miteʼ muhna ah tu ni ciang dong ninbulom le leivui them bang bek ka hi uh hi. 
1Corinthians4:14 Hih bangin lai ka hong gelh ciangin na maizum nading uh ka deihna hi lo a, ta itte thuhilh bangin a hong thuhilh ka hi hi." 
1Corinthians4:15 Khris thu hong hilh ding mi a tul a za-in na nei uh ahi zongin pa a na neih ding uh kei bek a om ka hihna thu na phawk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah lungdamna thu ka hong hilhna hangin Jesu Khris sungah nomauʼ pa ka suak hi. 
1Corinthians4:16 Tua ahih manin keima gamtatzia na hong zuih nadingun kong thum hi. 
1Corinthians4:17 Tua thu hangin note kiangah, ka it mahmah, Topa thu sungah a citak mahmah, ka tapa Timoti ka hong paisak hi. Amah in, Jesu Khris thu sungah ka nuntakna ziate le pawlpi a tuamtuamte kiangah ka thuhilhte khempeuh, note tungah hong hilh ding hi." 
1Corinthians4:18 Note kiangah kei hong hawh lo ding, ci-in ngaihsun kha uh ahih manin mi pawl khat a kiphasak uh hi." 
1Corinthians4:19 Ahi zongin Topa in hong thukimpih nakleh kei ka hong hawh baih dinga, tua a kiphatsak pau mawkmawkte in bang ciang taktak a hih zo ngap uh hiam, cih thu keima pumpi tawh ka mu ding hi." 
1Corinthians4:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Ukna thu i cih pen kampi bek tawh genna hi lo a, Pasianʼ vang tawh nungta-in gamtatna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians4:21 Tua ahih manin note taii-in gim a hong pia dingin ka hong pai ding le itna le lungnemna lungsim tawh ka hong pai ding koi deih zaw na hi uh hiam? 
1Corinthians5:1 Note lakah numei tawh paktatna nasia mahmah in, lawkite nangawn a gamtat lohte na gamtatna uh hong kigen a, mi khat in ama nukik nangawn a luppihna thu ka za hi." 
1Corinthians5:2 Tua bang kimlai bangci kisaktheih ding na hi uh hiam? Note na dah mahmah ding uh hizaw a, tua bang mite pen note lak panin na hepkhiat ding uh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians5:3 Note tawh ka pumpi-in ka hong omkhop loh hangin note tawh ka lungsim hong om khawm a, ka pumpi-in note tawh a hong om khawm zah mah bangin tua bang a gamta mite tungah i Topa Jesuʼ min tawh mawhsakna thu ka khen khinzo hi." 
1Corinthians5:4 Note na kikhop khawm uh ciangin i Topa Jesu Khris vangliatna in eite hong ompih ahih manin, note tawh ka lungsimin ka hong om khawm hi." 
1Corinthians5:5 Topaʼ Ni hong tun ciangin tua bang miteʼ kha in hotkhiatna a ngah theih nadingin Satan in amau pumpi a gimsak dingin na pia khia ta un. 
1Corinthians5:6 Note lakah hih bang gamtatna om napi-in na kisaktheih uh dahhuai mahmah hi. Silngo them khat in annel lompi a pawmsak theih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? 
1Corinthians5:7 Note na siangtho theih nadingun mawhna silngo luite na paikhia un. Tua hileh silngo sawh loh annel lom thak na hi ding uh a, zong ahi takpi mah na hi uh hi. Bang hang hiam ci leh i Paisan Pawi hun hong tung ta a, eiteʼ Paisan Tuuno ahi Khris kigo khinzo ta hi." 
1Corinthians5:8 Tua ahih ciangin mawhna le gitlohna ahi silngo lui a kisawh anlum tawh Paisan Pawi bawl loin, silngo a kisawh lo, sianthona le thutakna tawh bawl zaw ni." 
1Corinthians5:9 Lai ka hong gelhna sungah, numei tawh a paktat mite tawh na kikholh loh nading uh kong gen hi."
