1Corinthians5:10 Tua bang ka hong cih ciangin numei tawh a paktat, a huaiham, a guta, milim a bia lawkite tawh na kikhawl kei un, ka cihnopna hi lo hi. Tuate tawh kikhawl lo ding ci lehang, leitung panin paikhia un, cihna suak ding hi." 
1Corinthians5:11 Tua ka hong laigelhna sungah ka cihnopna pen, thu upna sungah unau khat hi hang, ci napi-in numei tawh a paktat, a huaiham, milim a bia, mi gensia, zukham, ahih kei leh a guta theite tawh kikhawl kei un, cihnopna ahi hi. Tua bang mite tawh an ne ding nangawnin zong na tukhawm kei un." 
1Corinthians5:12 Tua bang a pualam mite mawhsakin thu ka khen ding keiʼ nasep hi lo hi. Pasian in amauteʼ thu khen ngawn ding hi. Ahi zongin note in na pawlpih uh mite tungah thu na khen ding uh ahi hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Note lak panin migilo pa na la khia un,” na ci hi." 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Note khatlekhat thu na kineih uh ciangin Pasianʼ mi siangthote khensak zaw loin lawki thukhenteʼ mai na kitun ngam uh hi. 
1Corinthians6:2 Pasianʼ mite in leitung miteʼ thu a khensak zaw ding ahih lam thei lo na hi uh hiam? Note pen leitung miteʼ thu a khensak ding na hih uh ciangin tua bang thu neute khen thei lo lawmlawm na hi uh hiam? 
1Corinthians6:3 Eite pen vantung miteʼ thu nangawn a khensak ding ihih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih manin hih leitung a noʼ thu neuneute leltak na khen theih zawk kan ding uh ahi hi. 
1Corinthians6:4 Tua bang hi napi-in hih bang thu themthem hong pian ciangin pawlpi sungah bangmahin a kisim lo miteʼ mai kitun ding na hi uh hiam? 
1Corinthians6:5 Note adingin zumhuai mahmah hi. Note khatlekhat na kithuneihnate uh a khen thei ding note lakah mipil khat beek om buang ding hi. 
1Corinthians6:6 Tua hi napi, khatlekhat thu kineihin zum na kitun uh a, lawki thukhente na khensak tazen uh hi." 
1Corinthians6:7 Note khatlekhat zum na kitut mahmah uh zong a gina het lo na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. Bang hangin thuak zaw mai lo a, sum ngam zaw mai lo na hi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Note khatlekhat kisu-in, khatlekhat na kisut zawsop uh a, na sanggamte teekteek nangawn uh tawh thu na nei uh hi." 
1Corinthians6:9 Migilote, Pasianʼ Ukna sungah a lut het loh nading thu na thei uh hi. Note kihai bawl kei un. Numei tawh a paktatte, milim biate, mi zi ahih kei leh mi pasal tawh a mawhte, pasal le pasal a khialte," 
1Corinthians6:10 a gutate, a huaihamte, zukhamte, mi gensiate, ahih kei leh miʼ na a sutte khat beek, Pasianʼ Ukna sungah lut thei het lo ding hi." 
1Corinthians6:11 Note pawl khat, tua bangin na gamta uh hi. Ahi zongin note pen i Topa Jesu Khris le i Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho hangin mawhna panin a hong kisiangsak khin sa, Pasianʼ tungah a kipia sa, Pasian tawh a kipawl sa mite na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Ka ut peuhpeuh ka hih theih nading thu om hi,” a ci om kha ding hi. Ahi zongin na khempeuh hih ding kilawm lo hi. Kei zong ka ut khempeuh ka hih theih hangin tua bang gamtatna khat peuhpeuhʼ sila ka suak nuam kei hi." 
1Corinthians6:13 “An pen i gilpi ading hi a, gilpi zong an ading mah hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci zong om kha ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in tua tegel a beisak hun hong tung ding hi. Pumpi pen paktatna-in zat ding hi lo a, Topaʼ na sepna-in zat ding hizaw hi. Topa in pumpi ading na hong sem hi." 
1Corinthians6:14 Pasian in sihna panin Topa thokiksak hi. Tua mah bangin eite zong ama vangliatna tawh hong thokiksak ding hi. 
1Corinthians6:15 Na pumpi uh, Khris pumpi nate khat ahih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Khris pumpi nate khat la-in numei tawh paktatteʼ pumpi nate khat suaksak ding ihi hiam? Tua cih ngei ding hi peuhmah lo hi." 
1Corinthians6:16 Numei paktat tawh a pumpi a kizomsak pa pen tua numei tawh pum khat sakhat a suak ahih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Tua mi nihte pum khat a suak ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
1Corinthians6:17 Ahi zongin Topa tawh a kizomte pen kha thu tawh kisai-in amah tawh pum khat ahi uh hi. 
1Corinthians6:18 Numei tawh mawhna na pelh un. Mi khat in a bawl mawhna tuamtuamte in ama pumpi su kha lo hi, a ci om hi. Ahi zongin numei tawh a mawhte, ama pumpi tungah a khial ahi hi." 
1Corinthians6:19 Na pumpi uh, Pasian in a hong piak, noteʼ sungah a teeng Kha Siangthoʼ biakinn ahih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Noteʼ pumpi, nomauʼ neihsa hi lo a, Pasian aʼ ahi hi." 
1Corinthians6:20 Note pen Pasian in a hong lei sa na hih manun na pumpi uh Pasianʼ minthan nadingin na zang un. 
1Corinthians7:1 Tu-in nong laigelhna uh thu tawh kisai-in: Pasal in zi nei kei leh hoih zaw lo ding ahi hiam, na ci uh hi." 
1Corinthians7:2 Ahi zongin numei tawh paktatna tam lua ahih manin pasal in ama zi tuam nei henla, numei in ama pasal tuam nei leh hoih hi." 
1Corinthians7:3 Pasal in a zi a luppih dingin a kilawm zahin luppih dinga, a zi in zong a pasal a luppih dingin a kilawm zahin a luppih ding ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:4 Zi in ama pumpi a ut bangin zang thei nawn loin a pasalʼ zat ding hi a, tua mah bangin a pasal in zong ama pumpi a ut bangin zang thei nawn loin a ziʼ zat ding ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:5 Thungetna-in hun na zat theih nadingun tawl khat sung tuam om ding thukim khawm masa lopi-in lup khop ding kinial kha kei un. Tua bangin tawl khat sung na tuam om khit uh ciangin noteʼ pumpiʼ deihna hangin Satanʼ ze-etna sungah na puk khak loh nadingun a ngeina bangin lup khop ding kipankik un. 
1Corinthians7:6 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin a hoih pen hi, ci-in thugenna hi lo a, noteʼ pianzia tawh kizui-in hi thei tei hi, cihna lel ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:7 Mi khempeuh keimah bangin om ciat le-uh hoih ka sa hi. Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ piak hih zawhna a tuamtuam nei a, khatlekhat kibang lo hi." 
1Corinthians7:8 Pasal nei nai lote le meigongte pen keimah bangin tanggawl om paisuak le-uh hoih ka sa hi. 
1Corinthians7:9 Ahi zongin a pumpi uh a ki-uk zawh kei ding uh leh pasal nei le-uh hoih zaw hi. Nei nuam pipi a neih loh tentan sangin pasal neih hoih zaw hi. 
1Corinthians7:10 A nei sate tungah, keiʼ ngaihsutna hi lo, Topaʼ ngaihsutna ka gen nop thu in: Zi in a pasal ciah san kei tahen." 
1Corinthians7:11 A ciah san leh zong pasal nei loin om paisuak hen. A om paisuak zawh kei leh a pasal ngei mah zuankik hen. Pasal in a zi ma kei tahen. 
1Corinthians7:12 A dangte tungah, Topaʼ cih hi lo, keima ngaihsutna ka gen nop thu in: Mi khatpeuh in thu um lo mi khat zi-in a neih leh, pasal mahin neih ding a zi a lungkim ahih nakleh ma kei tahen." 
1Corinthians7:13 Numei khat in thu um lo mi khat pasal-in a neih leh, zi mahin neih ding a pasal a lungkim ahih nakleh ma tuan kei tahen." 
1Corinthians7:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu um lo pasal pen a ziʼ hangin thu um mi suak thei dinga, thu um lo zi pen a pasalʼ hangin thu um mi suak thei ding hi. Tua bang hileh a tate uh thu um mi suak thei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin tua bang hi kei le-uh a tate uh thu um mi suak thei lo ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians7:15 Ahi zongin thu um lo zi in ahi a, thu um lo pasal in ahi zongin kikhen ding a ut leh kikhen ta uh hen. Tua bang thute ah thu um zi ahi a, thu um pasal ahi zongin a awk nading thu om lo hi. Pasian in nuam takin a nungta dingin a hong sap ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:16 Thu um zi in, “Ka pasal hon khia zo kei ning,” bangci-in cithei dinga, thu um pasal in, “Ka zi hon khia zo kei ning,” bangci-in cithei zenzen ding ahi hiam?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Mi khempeuh, Pasian in amauʼ nuntak nadingin a sehna le Pasian in a sap laitakin a om zia bangbangun nungta uh hen. Hih bangzia-in om ding pen pawlpi khempeuh ah hilhin ka neih ngeina khat ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:18 Vun ki-at sa mi khat Pasian in a sap leh, a vun ki-atna lim phiat tuan kei tahen." 
1Corinthians7:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh vun atna le vun at lohna a thupi hi lo a, Pasianʼ thupiakte zuih ding a thupi ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:20 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh, Pasian in a sap laitakun a om zia bangbangun a om paisuak ding uh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:21 Sila ahi mi khat Pasian in a sap leh phamawh lo hi; sila mahin ki-om thei veve hi. Ahi zongin suahtak theih nading lampi a om leh tua hunhoih hamphatna zang tahen. 
1Corinthians7:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a sap sila ahi mi pen Topa adingin mi suakta hi a, tua mah bangin Khris in a sap a suakta mi pen Khris adingin sila ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:23 Note pen Pasianʼ hong lei sa na hih manun miteʼ sila suak kei un. 
1Corinthians7:24 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, hong kisap laitakin na om zia uh mah bangin Pasianʼ sungah na om paisuak un." 
1Corinthians7:25 Tu-in a nungak lai a tangval laite thu tawh kisai-in: Topa kiang panin thu ngahna ka neih loh hangin Topaʼ hehpihna tawh a muantaak ahi keima ngaihsutna kong gen ding hi. 
1Corinthians7:26 Tu laitakin a om bangun om paisuak leh hoih zaw ding hi, cihna thu tawh kisai-in, tu laitak a lungkham huai thu ka ngaihsut ciangin tu laitakin a om bangun om paisuak leh hoih zaw mah dingin ka ngaihsun hi." 
1Corinthians7:27 Ahi zongin zi neite in kikhen ding ngaihsutin nei kei tahen. Nungak lai tangval laite in lawm zong kei tahen. 
1Corinthians7:28 Ahi zongin pasal in zi a neih hangin a khial hi lo a, numei in zong pasal a neih hangin a khial hi lo hi. Ahi zongin zi nei, pasal neite in leitung lungkhamna tampi thuak uh ahih manin tuate tawh kipelh zaw le-uh hoih ka sa hi." 
1Corinthians7:29 Sanggamte aw, tua bang ka cih ciangin a kiseh hun hong nai mahmah ta hi, ka cihnopna ahi hi. Tua ahih manin zi neite pen zi nei lo mah bangin kingaihsun uh henla," 
1Corinthians7:30 a dahte pen a dah lo mah bangin kingaihsun uh henla, a lungdamte pen a lungdam lo mah bangin kingaihsun uh henla, na a leite pen bangmah a nei lo mah bangin kingaihsun uh henla," 
1Corinthians7:31 leitung na nuam takin a zangte pen a zang lo mah bangin kingaihsun ta uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih leitung pen sau veipi kip nawn lo ding hi. 
1Corinthians7:32 Note, lunghihmawhna tawh na kipelh ding uh ka hong deihsak hi. Zi a nei lote in Topa a lungdamsak theih nadingun Topaʼ thu bek kinin nei uh hi." 
1Corinthians7:33 Ahi zongin zi neite in a zi a lungdamsak theih nadingun hih leitung vai kinin nei uh a," 
1Corinthians7:34 a ngaihsutna uh khen nih pha hi. Pasal a nei lo numeite in a lungsim le a pumpi uh Topa adingin zang nuam uh ahih manin Topaʼ nasep bek kinin nei uh hi. Ahi zongin pasal a nei numeite in a pasal uh a lungdamsak theih nadingun hih leitung vai kinin nei uh hi. 
1Corinthians7:35 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin noteʼ haksat nading deihna hi loin noteʼ hoih nading ka deihna ahi hi. Note a kilawm a kituakin gamta-in, lungsim le thatang siit nei loin Topaʼ na na sep theih nading uh ka hong deihsakna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:36 Teen pih dingin lawm dong khin napi-in kiteen nawn loh ding a ngaihsunteʼ thu panin: Teen pih kei leng a numei tungah a thuman lo hi ding cihna ahi a, zi a deihna lungsim a lian lua ahi a, teenpih ding mah hoih hi, ci-in ngaihsutna ahi zongin a neih leh a lungkimna bangun gamta-in teenpih uh hen. Tua thu ah bangmah khialhna om lo hi." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ahi zongin kuama sawl hi loin zi nei lo dingin a lungsimah khauh takin khensatin, a lungsim ki-uk zo taktakin a ngaihsut sa ahih nakleh a neih loh hangin phamawh lo hi." 
1Corinthians7:38 Tua ahih manin a neite zong hoih a, a nei loin a kikem zote hoih zaw lai hi." 
1Corinthians7:39 Pasal a nei numei pen a pasal a nuntak lai teng suakta lo hi. A pasal a sih leh a deih peuhpeuh tawh kiteeng thei dinga, ahi zongin thu um mi bek teenpih ding hi." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ahi zongin keima ngaihsutna ah pasal a neih se sangin tua ci om leh lungdam zaw dingin ka um a, Pasianʼ Kha Siangthoʼ ngaihsutna mah zong hi-in ka um hi." 
1Corinthians8:1 Tu-in milim biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Amaute in, “Ka thei uh hi,” a cih mah bangin eite khempeuh in theihna i neih ciatna thu i thei hi. Tua bang theihna in mite kisatheisak a, ahi zongin itna in mite kipsak hi." 
1Corinthians8:2 Mi khat in thu a thei-in a kingaihsut leh a taktakin a theih dingin a kilawm zah a thei nai lo ahi hi. 
1Corinthians8:3 Mi khat in Pasian a it leh Pasian in tua mipa a na thei hi. 
1Corinthians8:4 Tua ahih manin biakna sa tawh kisai thu panin: Milim i cih pen bangmah a om lopi khat lim dingin a kibawl na hi a, Pasian khat bek a om ahihna thu i theih ciat ahi hi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Leitung le vantungah pasian le topa a kici tampi a om ahi zongin," 
1Corinthians8:6 eite adingin Pasian khat bek, Pa khat bek a om hi. Ama adingin i nuntakna pa, na khempeuh a piangsak pa ahi hi. Eite tungah nuntakna a hong pia, na khempeuh a piangsak Topa Jesu Khris khat bek a om hi." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in hih thu thei kim lo uh hi. Mi pawl khatte, milim biakna thu ah kingeina seh lua khin uh ahih manin tu hun mahmah in zong biakna sate a nek uh ciangin tua milim tawh kisai sa mahin ngaih sunsun lai uh hi. Amaute lungsim thaneem uh ahih manin tua sate a nek uh ciangin a zehphi mahin kingaihsun uh hi." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ahi zongin tua i nek ante in Pasian tawh i kizopna hong hoihsak tuan lo hi. I nek loh hangin siatna om tuan lo a, i nek hangin zong phatna om tuan sam lo hi." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ahi zongin noteʼ ut bangin gamtat theih nading thu na neihna uh hangin upna a neu laite a puksak na suahkhak loh nadingun hoihtakin kidawm un. 
1Corinthians8:10 No thu thei-a a kineite, milim biakna inn sungah milim biakna sa na neklam uh, hih thu tawh kisai ah a lungsim hat zo nai lote in hong mu kha zenzen leh milim biakna sa nek ding a hanthawn na suak kha ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians8:11 Tua ahih manin noteʼ thutheihna hangin, Khris in sihna a thuakpih, thu upna sungah i sanggamte a siasak na suak ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians8:12 Tua bangin lungsim thaneemte gimsakin, thu upna sungah na sanggamte uh tungah na khialh uh ciangin Khris tung mahmah ah a khial na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians8:13 Tua ahih manin nekna in thu upna sungah ka sanggamte khat a khialsak ding ahihleh, amah a puk khak loh nadingin milim biakna sa ka ne ngei het kei ding hi." 
1Corinthians9:1 Kei pen sawltak ka hi a, mihingteʼ khutnuai-a nasem ka hi kei hi. I Topa Jesu tawh a kimu mi ka hi a, Topa adingin na ka sepna hangin note pen thu um a suak na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians9:2 Midangte in sawltakin hong ngaihsun ta kei le-uh, note in sawltakin na hong ngaihsut uh a kul ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa sungah na omna uh pen sawltak ka hih lam a kilatna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians9:3 Mite in kei hong mawhsak uh ciangin ka gen thu in: 
1Corinthians9:4 Ka nasepna hangin an nek tui dawn hong kipiak ding mah ahi hi. 
1Corinthians9:5 Sawltak dangte, Topaʼ naute le Peter mah bangin ka khualzinna ah thu um mi ka zi a tonpih thei ding ka hi hi." 
1Corinthians9:6 Kei le Barnabas bek, nektawm zon tawh a thuah ding ka hi zenzen kei uh hi." 
1Corinthians9:7 Kuamah in ama sum bei-in galkap na sem lo uh hi. Leenggui suan napi-in a leenggah a ne lo kuamah om lo hi. Tuu cing napi-in a tuunawi a ne lo kuamah om lo hi. 
1Corinthians9:8 Hih ka hong gente pen mihingteʼ zat ngeina hi a, Thukham in zong a tua ci ding mahin a gen thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses Thukham sungah, “Buh a cil bawngtal a muk na tuam kei in,” ci hi. Hih bang a gen ciangin Pasianʼ lunghihmawh pen bawngtalte hi zenzen lo hi." 
1Corinthians9:10 Hih bang a gen ciangin ei mihingte hong cihnopna hi a, eite adingin a kigelh thu ahi hi. Lo a kho pa le an a la pa in amauʼ ngah dingin a kilawm an a ngah dingin lametna tawh nasem ahi uh hi." 
1Corinthians9:11 Note lakah kha thu tawh kisai khaici hong vawh ka hih manun, note tung panin leitung nate ka ngah uh hangin a lian lua hi lo hi." 
1Corinthians9:12 Midangte in note tung panin ngah theih nading thu nei uh ahihleh ko ka nei pha zaw lai uh hi. Ahi zongin note tung panin ngah theih nading thu a om hangin bangmah ka hong la kei uh a, Khris hangin Lungdamna Thu a dongtangsak ka suahkhak loh nadingun na khempeuh ah ka thuak tentan uh hi." 
1Corinthians9:13 Biakinn ah nasem dingin a kicial mite in biakinn mah panin an ngah uh a, biakna tau ah na a semte in biakna sa mah a ngahna uh thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Tua mah bangin lungdamna thu a hilhte in tua nasepna mah panin nuntakna a ngah nading uh Topaʼ thupiak ahi hi. 
1Corinthians9:15 Ahi zongin hih ngah theih ding hamphatnate khempeuh ka la kei a, tu-in zong ka ngah theih nadingin hih lai a hong gelh ka hi kei hi. Hih ka kisialhna teng a mawkna a suah ding sangin ka si nuam zaw hi." 
1Corinthians9:16 Lungdamna thu ka hilh hangin kisialh nading thu bangmah om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu a hilh ding mahin a hong kisawl ahi hi. Tua ahih manin lungdamna thu hilh kei leng kei adingin a dahhuai mahmah ahi hi. 
1Corinthians9:17 Keima utthu tawh a sem hi leng sep thaman ka lamen ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in a sem dingin hong sawl ahih manin ka sep ding nasep a sem ka hi hi. 
1Corinthians9:18 Tua ahihleh ka sep thaman bang ahi hiam? Ka thaman pen, lungdamna thu tawh kisai ka sepna ah thaman ngen loin, a khongin Lungdamna Thu hilh ding hamphatna ka neihna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians9:19 Kei pen kuama khutnuai mi hi loin a suakta mi hi napi-in, mi a tam theithei ka ngah zawh nadingin mi khempeuhʼ khutnuai mi-in ka kibawl hi." 
1Corinthians9:20 Jew mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngah zawh nadingin Jew mite khat mah bangin ka gamta a, Moses Thukham ka zuih ding a kisap loh hangin a zuite ka ngah zawh nadingin amaute lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute mah bangin ka gamta hi." 
1Corinthians9:21 Tua mah bangin Jew miteʼ Thukham in a huam loh Gentail mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngah zawh nadingin Gentail mite bangmahin ka gamta hi. Hih bangin ka gen ciangin Pasianʼ thukham a zui lo, cihna hi loin Khrisʼ thukham zui-in a gamta ka hi hi." 
1Corinthians9:22 Upna neu mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngah zawh nadingin amaute mah bangin ka gamta hi. Tua ahih manin ahih theihna lam peuhpeuh ah mite ka ngah zawh nadingin mi khempeuhʼ ngeina ka zui hi. 
1Corinthians9:23 Hih bangin ka gamtatna pen amaute tungah Lungdamna Thu ka tut theih nading le keima nasep hoihtakin ka sep theih nading ka deihna ahi hi. 
1Corinthians9:24 Tai kidemna ah mi khat bek in thaman a ngah ding hi napi-in a vekpi-un tai veve uh hi. Tua ahih manin thaman na ngah zawh nadingun na tai un. 
1Corinthians9:25 Kimawlna sungah a kihel mi khempeuh in thu khempeuh ah a pumpi uh uk ciat uh hi. Amaute pen a kisia thei pak a ngah nadingun a hanciam uh hi a, eite pen a kisia thei lo i ngah nadingin a hanciam ihi hi." 
1Corinthians9:26 Tua ahih manin ngimna nei lopi-in a mawk tai ka hi kei a, huihlak khawng a mawk tuptup ka hi kei hi." 
1Corinthians9:27 Kimawlna sungah midangte a kihel dingin a sam hi napi-in tua kimawlna ah a kihel zo lo mi ka suahkhak loh nadingin ka pumpi seekin hoihtakin ka ki-uk hi. 
1Corinthians10:1 Sanggamte aw, Moses a zui i pu i pate tungah a piang thu na phawk ding uh ka deih hi. Meiipi in amaute khempeuh na hu a, a vekpi-un nuam takin San Tuipi na kantan zo uh hi." 
1Corinthians10:2 Meiipi sung le tuipi sungah ama nungzui a suak dingin Moses sungah amaute na kiphum uh hi. 
1Corinthians10:3 A vekpi-un kha tawh kisai an ne uh a," 
1Corinthians10:4 a vekpi mahun kha tawh kisai tui na dawn uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a tonpih, kha tawh kisai suangpi panin tui na dawn uh a, tua suangpi pen Khris ahi hi." 
1Corinthians10:5 Ahi zongin amaute a tam zaw tungah Pasian lungkim lo ahih manin gam sung tengah amauteʼ luanghawm kithehzak hi. 
1Corinthians10:6 Amaute tungah a piangte khempeuh, eite adingin hilhkholhna ahi hi. Amaute bangin a sia nate i deih kei dinga," 
1Corinthians10:7 amaute pawl khat in a biak bangin milim i bia kei ding hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Anne zune dingin mite tu uh a, tua khit ciangin a lam dingin a ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
1Corinthians10:8 Amaute pawl khat bangin numei tawh paktatna i gamta kei ding hi. Ni khat thu-in mi tul sawm nih le tul thum a si uh hi. 
1Corinthians10:9 Amaute pawl khat bangin Topa i ze-et kei ding hi. Gul in amaute na tu lum hi. 
1Corinthians10:10 Amaute pawl khat bangin Pasian i phunsan kei ding hi. Vantung mite in amaute na sulum hi. 
1Corinthians10:11 Leitung bei kuan hun sungah a om eite adingin hih thupiangte i etteh ding thu hi a, eite hilhkholh nadingin lai sungah a kiciamteh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians10:12 Lungkip takin ka om zo hi, ci-in a kingaihsun mite a puk khak loh nadingun kikem uh hen." 
1Corinthians10:13 Na tuah uh ze-etnate khempeuh pen miteʼ tuah ngeingeite mah ahi hi. Pasian in citakin a thuciamna lenkip ahih manin noteʼ thuak zawh loh ding ze-etna hong tuaksak lo ding hi. Ze-etna na tuah hun uh ciangin zong na thuak zawh nading uh thahatna hong guan ding ahih manin na suahtak zawh nading uh lampi hong honsak ding hi. 
1Corinthians10:14 Tua ahih manin lawm itte aw, milim biakna pelh un." 
1Corinthians10:15 Thu ngaihsun thei mite tungah thugen bangin a hong gen ka hi hi. Ka thugente nomau mah in na ngaihsun tawm un. 
1Corinthians10:16 Nekkhawm bawlna ah leenggahzu hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko-in i dawn ciangin Khris sisan hangin thuphate eite in zong a ngahkhawm cihna hi lo ahi hiam? I balnen anlum i nek ciangin zong Khris pumpi hangin thuphate mah a ngahkhawm cihna hi lo ahi hiam? 
1Corinthians10:17 Anlum khat bek hi a, eite mi tampi hi napi-in tua lum khat bek mah nekhawm ihih manin eite pum khat bek mah ihi hi." 
1Corinthians10:18 Israel miteʼ thu ngaihsun dih un. Biakna sa a ne khempeuh pen biakna tau tungah Pasian biakna thu ah a kipawl hi lo ahi uh hiam? 
1Corinthians10:19 Hih bang ka cih ciangin bang ka cihnopna ahi hiam? Milim ahi a, milim biakna sa ahi zongin thupi hi, a ci nuam ka hi kei hi." 
1Corinthians10:20 Ka cihnopna pen, lawkite in gan a gawh uh ciangin dawi a biakna uh hi a, Pasian a biakna uh hi lo hi. Dawi biakna ah note na kihel ding uh ka hong deih kei hi." 
1Corinthians10:21 Note in Topa tawh nekkhawmna hai sung pan le dawi tawh nekkhawmna hai sung panin na dawn khawm thei kei ding uh hi. Topa tawh nekkhawmna an leh dawi tawh nekkhawmna an zong na nekhawm thei kei ding uh hi. 
1Corinthians10:22 A nih tuakah kihel khawm lehang Topa a heh nadingin a gamta ihi dinga, eite pen Topa sangin i hat zaw het kei hi." 
1Corinthians10:23 “Ka ut peuhpeuh ka hih theih nading thu om hi,” a ci om kha ding hi. Ahi zongin na khempeuh ka hih ding kilawm lo hi. Na khempeuh hih theih nading thu a om hangin a kihih thei khempeuh hihna in midangteʼ hoih nading piangsak lo hi." 
1Corinthians10:24 A kuamah peuh in noteʼ angsung ding bek zong kei unla, midangteʼ phattuam nading zong zaw un." 
1Corinthians10:25 Na lungsim uh ah kisuanna a om loh nadingin sa zuakna ah a kizuak sa peuhpeuh bang sa ahi hiam, ci-in dong se loin na ututun na ne thei ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians10:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Leitung le a sungah a om khempeuh pen Topa aʼ ahi hi,” na ci hi." 
1Corinthians10:27 Thu um lo mi khat in an nek pih dingin hong samin tua an ne dingin na pai leh, na lungsimah kisuanna a om loh nadingin bang sa ahi hiam, ci-in dong se loin ne lel in." 
1Corinthians10:28 Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in, “Milim biakna sa hi,” hong cih leh, tua a hong gen mipa na khualna le nangma lungsim nopmawhna a om loh nadingin ne kei pah in." 
1Corinthians10:29 Nangma lungsim nuam lo ding cihna hi loin a hong gen paʼ lungsim nuam lo ding ahih manin ne kei in, a ci ka hi hi. Mi pawl khat in, “Bang hangin keiʼ gamtat nading miteʼ ngaihsutna in hong khaktan thei ding ahi hiam?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Keimah in Topa tungah lungdamna ko-in ne ka hih manin tua ka lungdamkohna thu ah bang hangin hong kimawhsak thei ding ahi hiam?” cithei kha ding hi. 
1Corinthians10:31 Tua ahih manin keimah in ka hong gen nop thu in: Na hihna khempeuh uh, nekna dawnna ah ahi zongin Pasianʼ minthan nadingin na hih un." 
1Corinthians10:32 Jew mi ahi a, Gentail mi ahi a, Pasianʼ pawlpi mi ahi zongin na lungnopmawhsak loh nadingun na gamta un." 
1Corinthians10:33 Mite in hotkhiatna a ngah theih nadingin ka sepna khempeuh ah keima angsung ngaihsun loin mi khempeuh phattuam nading hanciamin, a kuamah peuh a lungkim nadingin ka gamtat mah bangin note zong na gamta un." 
1Corinthians11:1 Keimah in Khris gamtatzia ka zuih mah bangin note in zong keima gamtatzia hong zui ta un. 
1Corinthians11:2 Note in kei hong phawk tawntungin kong hilh thu khempeuh zui na hih manun kong phat mahmah hi. 
1Corinthians11:3 Ahi zongin na theih ding uh ka deih thu in: Mi khempeuhʼ lutang pen Khris hi a, numeiʼ lutang pen pasal hi a, Khrisʼ lutang pen Pasian ahihna thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:4 Pasal khatpeuh in mihon biakna sungah a lukhu la khia lopi-in thungen ahi a, Pasianʼ thugen ahi zongin a om leh Khrisʼ min a daisak ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Tua mah bangin mihon biakna sungah numei khatpeuh in a lu khuh lopi-in thungen ahi a, Pasianʼ thugen ahi zongin a om leh a pasalʼ min a daisak hi a, a lu a met numei mah tawh a kilamdanna a om lo ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:6 Numeite in a lu a khuh kei ding uh leh a sam uh met vet uh hen. Tua ahih manin numeite in a sam uh a met ding a zumhuai mahmah khat ahih mah bangin a lu uh khuh ta uh hen. 
1Corinthians11:7 Pasalte pen Pasianʼ lim le a minthanna a kilangsak ahih manin a lu uh a khuh ding uh kilawm lo hi. Ahi zongin numeite pen pasalteʼ minthanna a kilangsak ahi hi. 
1Corinthians11:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh numei tung panin pasal kipiangsak lo a, pasal tung panin numei kipiangsak zaw hi." 
1Corinthians11:9 Numei hangin pasal a kipiangsak hi lo a, pasal hangin numei a kipiangsak hizaw hi." 
1Corinthians11:10 Tua ahih ciangin a pasalte uh ukna nuai ah a om ahihna a lah nadingun vantung miteʼ muhna ah numeite in a lu uh a khuh ding uh kilawm hi. 
1Corinthians11:11 Ahi zongin Topa thu sunga i nuntakna ah numeite pen pasal tawh loin a tangdin zo hi lo a, pasalte zong numei tawh kop loin a tangdin zo hi tuan lo hi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh numei pen pasal tung panin a kipiangsak hi a, pasal pen numei sung panin a suak ahi hi. Tua hi a, na khempeuh, Pasian kiang panin a hong pai ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:13 Hih thu nomau mah in ngaihsun tawm un. Numeite in a lu uh khuh lopi-in mihon biakna lakah Pasian kiangah thu a nget ding uh kilawm ahi hiam? 
1Corinthians11:14 I pianpih ngeina mahmah ah zong pasalte in sam sau a hawi pen amau adingin a zumhuai thu ahihna," 
1Corinthians11:15 le numeite in sam sau a neih pen a minthanna uh ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi lo ahi hiam? Numeiteʼ sam sau pen a lu uh a tuam nadingin a kipia ahi hi. 
1Corinthians11:16 Hih thu a nial nuam a om khak zenzen leh eite a kipan Pasian pawlpi mi a kuamah peuh in tu-a kong gen ngeina lobuang a dang a thei om lo hi, ci-in gen ding lobuang bangmah dang om lo hi." 
1Corinthians11:17 Ahi zongin a nuai-a thu tawh kisai-in note ka hong pakta kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pawlpi kikhopna na neih uh ciangin phatna sangin siatna na piangsak zaw uh hi. 
1Corinthians11:18 A masa penin, pawlpi na kikhop uh ciangin note lakah pawl kikhenna om hi, ci-in ka za hi. Hih ka zak thu a manna om kha dingin ka um hi." 
1Corinthians11:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh kua teng pawlpi mi citak ahi hiam, ci-in a kilat nadingin kikhenna a om mah ding ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:20 Nekkhawmna a bawl dingin note na kikhop uh ciangin Topaʼ Nekkhawmna a ne dingin na pai kei uh hi. 
1Corinthians11:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh nekkhawmna ne dingin na pai uh ciangin pawl khatte amauʼ an tawh na tung masa-in ne pah uh ahih manin, pawl khatte a kham mahmah in na om uh hangin pawl khatte gil kialin a om uh hi." 
1Corinthians11:22 Hih bangin na gamtat uh, anletui na nek nading uh inn nei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh Pasianʼ pawlpi simmawh bawlin pawlpi mizawngte na maizumsak nopna uh ahi hiam? Hih thu tawh kisai ah hong pakta ding nong sak uh leh note ka hong pakta het kei hi." 
1Corinthians11:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah kong gen thu pen Topa kiang panin ka ngah thu hi a, tua thu in: Topa Jesu a kilehhek ding nitakin anlum la-in," 
1Corinthians11:24 Pasian tungah lungdam a koh khit ciangin balnen a, “Hih pen note adingin a hong kipia keima pumpi ahi hi. Kei na hong phawk nadingun na ne un,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians11:25 Tua mah bangin nitak an a nek khit uh ciangin hai la a, “Hih hai sunga om leenggahzu pen keima sisan tawh a kikipsak Pasianʼ thuciamna thak ahi hi. Hih bangin na dawn simun, kei na hong phawk nadingun na dawn un,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians11:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin anlum ne-in hai sung panin leenggahzu na dawn simun, Topa a hong paikik matengin ama sihna thu a gengen na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians11:27 Tua ahih manin a kilawm lopi-in Topaʼ anlum ne-in, a hai panin leenggahzu a dawn mi peuhmah pen Topaʼ pumpi le a sisan a mindaisak hi-in a mawh ahi uh hi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh ki-entel masa phot uh henla, tua khit ciangin Topaʼ anlum ne-in a hai panin leenggahzu dawn pan tahen." 
1Corinthians11:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ pumpi a khiatna thei lopi-in anlum ne-in hai panin leenggahzu a dawn mi pen a mahmah mawhsak thukhenna a kipiatawm ahi hi. 
1Corinthians11:30 Tua bang mawhna hangin note tampi tak cina-in na zawngkhal uh a, pawl khat zong na si uh hi." 
1Corinthians11:31 Eite hoihtakin ki-entel masa peuh lehang Pasianʼ mawhsak thukhenna i thuak kei ding hi. 
1Corinthians11:32 Ahi zongin eite in hih leitung mite tawh mawhsakna i thuak khawm loh nadingin Topa in eite hong thuhilhin gim hong pia hi. 
1Corinthians11:33 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, nekkhawm ne dingin na kikhop uh ciangin kingakkim dimdiam un." 
1Corinthians11:34 Tua bangin na kikhop uh ciangin Pasianʼ thukhenna na thuakkhak loh nadingun a gilkial na om uh leh zong na inn uh ah an ne masa un. Thu dangdangte ahihleh ka hong pai ciangin kong gen ding hi. 
1Corinthians12:1 Sanggamte aw, Kha Siangthoʼ hong piak siamna a tuamtuamte tawh kisai thu na theih loh khak ding uh ka deih kei hi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Lawki na hih lai-un a pau thei lo milimteʼ thu-in na gamta uh a, na lungsim uh tua milimte in hong zo mahmah hi." 
1Corinthians12:3 Tua ahih manin Kha Siangtho in lam a lah mite in, “Jesu in samsiatna ngah tahen,” a cih lohna le Kha Siangtho in lamlak kei leh kuamah in, “Jesu pen Topa hi,” a cih theih loh nading thu na theih ding uh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:4 Tu-in siamna a nam tuamtuam om a, ahi zongin a hong pia Kha Siangtho a kibang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:5 Nasepna a nam tuamtuam om a, ahi zongin a na i sepsak Topa a kibang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:6 Nasep nading siamna a nam tuamtuam om a, ahi zongin sep theih nading siamna a hong pia Pasian a kibang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:7 Mi khempeuh adingin phattuamna a om theih nadingin Kha Siangthoʼ hong ompihna a nam tuamtuamin hong kilang hi. 
1Corinthians12:8 Kha Siangtho in mi khat tungah thuthuk pilna hong guan a, tua Kha Siangtho mah in a dang khat tungah thugen siamna hong guan hi." 
1Corinthians12:9 A dang khat tungah upna hong guan a, a dang khat tungah cina damsak theihna hong guan hi." 
1Corinthians12:10 A dang khat tungah nalamdang bawl theihna, a dang khat tungah Pasianʼ thu hilh ding siamna, a dang khat tungah Kha Siangtho piak siamna ahi leh ahi lo khen theih nading siamna, a dang khat tungah pau lamdang pau theihna, a dang khat tungah tua pau lamdang tuamtuam paunate a khiatna gen theihna hong pia hi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Hih siamna a tuamtuamte a hong pia pen Kha Siangtho a kibang khat bek mah hi a, mi a tuamtuamte tungah ama hoihsak bangin a hong piak ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:12 Pumpi pen khat bek hi napi-in na a tuamtuam a nei hi. Pumpi in na a tuamtuam tampi a neih hangin pumpi khat bek mah ahih veve mah bangin Khris zong pumpi na a tuamtuam a nei pumpi khat ahi hi. 
1Corinthians12:13 Jew mi ihi a, Gentail mi ihi zongin, sila ihi a, sila ahi lo ihi zongin, eite minam tuamtuam ihih hangin Kha Siangtho khat bek mah in Jesuʼ pumpi a suak dingin ama sungah hong phum a, eite khempeuh tungah a hong kipia pen tua a kibang Kha Siangtho khat bek mah ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:14 Pumpi in na khat bek nei loin nam tampi tak a nei hi. 
1Corinthians12:15 Khe in, “Kei, khut hi lo ka hih manin pumpi tawh ka kizom kei hi,” a cihmawk hangin pumpi na khat ahihna a bei hi tuan lo hi." 
1Corinthians12:16 Bil in, “Kei, mit hi lo ka hih manin pumpi tawh ka kizom kei hi,” a cihmawk hangin pumpi na ahihna a bei hi tuan lo hi." 
1Corinthians12:17 Pumpi khempeuh mit suak khin leh bang tawh khua za ding ahi hiam? Pumpi khempeuh bil suak khin leh bang tawh a gimnam thei ding ahi hiam? 
1Corinthians12:18 Ahi zongin tu-a i neih bang tektekin, Pasian in ama deih bangin pumpi na a tuamtuam a hong bawlsak hi." 
1Corinthians12:19 A vekpi-in pumpi na nam khat bek hi khin leh a pumpi ding koi ah om nawn ding ahi hiam? 
1Corinthians12:20 Ahi zongin tu-a i neih bangin pumpi khat bek om a, na tampi a nei hi." 
1Corinthians12:21 Tua ahih manin mit in khut kiangah, “Nang ka hong kisam kei hi,” ci thei lo a, lutang in zong khe kiangah, “Nang ka hong kisapna om lo hi,” ci thei lo hi." 
1Corinthians12:22 Pumpi na a gina lo tawh a kibangte a kimanna lian mahmah zawsop a," 
1Corinthians12:23 pumpi na bangmah gen taak lo i sakte pawl limtakin kep kul zawsop hi. I pumpi na hoih i sak khol lohte pen," 
1Corinthians12:24 pumpi na hoih i sakte i lim et ding a kisap khol loh bang hi loin, lim kep diak peuh kul zaw se hi. Ahi zongin i pumpi na thupi i sak khol lohte limtakin i kep diak ding a kisamin i pumpi a na bawl se hi." 
1Corinthians12:25 Tua ahih manin i pumpi nate khatlekhat kithutuak lo cih om loin a vekpi-in a kilemkim uh hi. 
1Corinthians12:26 Khat in natna ngah leh a vekpi-un thuak khawm uh a, khat in pahtakna ngah leh a vekpi-un lungdam khawm uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Tu-in note khempeuh pen Khris pumpi na hi uh a, na vekpi-un a pumpi na khat ciat na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:28 Tua ahih manin Pasian in pawlpi sungah mi khempeuh ama panmun ciat dingah a hong bulh hi. A masa-in sawltakte, a nihna ah kamsangte, a thumna ah laihilhte, tua ciangin nalamdang bawl theite, cina damsak theite, midang a huh theite, thu vaihawm a siamte le pau lamdang a pau theite ahi uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:29 A vekpi-un sawltak hi lo a, a vekpi-un kamsang zong hi lo uh hi. A vekpi-un laihilh, thuhilh hi lo uh a, a vekpi-un nalamdang zong bawl lo uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:30 A vekpi-un cina damsak nading siamna nei lo uh a, a vekpi-un pau lamdang pau thei lo uh a, a vekpi-un tua pau lamdangte a khiatna gen thei lo uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:31 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ hong piak siamna a hoih pente deih belin na nei ta un. Tu-in a hoih pen thu khat kong gen ding hi. 
1Corinthians13:1 Keimah in mihingte pau a tuamtuamte le vantung miteʼ pau nangawn ka pau theih hangin itna ka neih kei leh a bil-aphuai zam le daltuah kitum tawh a kibang lel ka hi hi. 
1Corinthians13:2 Thuhilh siamna nei-in, thusim khempeuh thei-in, na khempeuh thei-in, mualte kinsak zawh nading upna ka neih hangin itna ka neih kei leh ka kimanna bangmah om lo hi." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ka neih khempeuh midangte tungah pia-in, Pasianʼ nasepna hangin kihal tum na ka thuak ahi zongin itna ka neih kei leh ka phattuamna bangmah om lo hi." 
1Corinthians13:4 Itna neite a lungduai-in migi hi. Itna neite in hazatna lungsim nei loin, zong kisathei lo hi." 
1Corinthians13:5 Itna neite a kilawm loin gamta lo, heh pakpak lo, miteʼ mawhna ciamteh lo hi." 
1Corinthians13:6 Thuman lote ah lungdam ngei lo uh a, thumante bekah lungdam uh hi." 
1Corinthians13:7 Itna neite lungkia cih omngei lo hi; a upna, a lametna, lungduai takin a ngaknate uh a mawkna cih omngei lo hi." 
1Corinthians13:8 Itna pen a tawntungin a kip ahi hi. Thuhilh siamna a om tei hangin tawl khat sung bek kimangin, pau lamdang pau theih siamnate a om hangin bei dinga, thutheih siamna a om hangin maimang ding hi." 
1Corinthians13:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh eiteʼ neih thutheih siamnate le i thuhilh siamnate a kicing hi lo hi. 
1Corinthians13:10 Ahi zongin a kicing thu hong tun ciangin a kicingtaak lo thu teng maimang ding hi. 
1Corinthians13:11 Naupang ka hih hun lai-in naupang mah bangin kampau-in, thu ngaihsunin, ka gamta hi. Ahi zongin tu-in khangham ka hih manin naupang vaite ka zang nawn kei hi." 
1Corinthians13:12 Dal limlang sunga et bangin tu laitakin a kitel pha loin i mu milmial a, ahi zongin mai lamah maitang kituahin i mu ding hi. Tu laitakin i theihnate kicing lo a, ahi zongin mai lamah Pasian in eite hong theih mah bangin a kicing takin amah i thei ding hi." 
1Corinthians13:13 Tu laitakin a om lai thu thumte pen upna, lametna le itna hi a, tua thumte sung panin itna mah a thu lian pen ahi hi." 
1Corinthians14:1 Na deih lian pen uh ki-itna na hisak un. Kha Siangthoʼ hong piak siamna a tuamtuamte sung panin thuhilh siamna neih ding na hanciam pha pen un. 
1Corinthians14:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh pau lamdang a paute pen miteʼ tungah thugen hi loin Pasianʼ tungah thugen ahi hi. Amauteʼ pau kuamah in thei lo a, Kha Siangthoʼ vangliatna tawh Pasianʼ thusimte a gengen ahi uh hi." 
1Corinthians14:3 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ thu a hilhte pen mite tungah thugen hi a, mite tungah huhna, hanthotna le hehnepna a pia ahi hi." 
1Corinthians14:4 Pau lamdang a paute pen amau mahmah a phattuam nadingin a pau hi a, Pasianʼ thu a hilhte ahihleh pawlpiʼ phattuam nadingin nasem ahi hi." 
1Corinthians14:5 Note khempeuh pau lamdang na pau theih ding uh kong deihsak hangin Pasianʼ thu hilh ding siamna na neih ding uh ka hong deihsak zaw hi. Pawlpi in phattuamna a ngah theih nadingin note lakah a khiatna a gen thei pah ding om ahih kei buang leh, pau lamdang a paute sangin Pasianʼ thu a hilhte a lian zaw ahi hi." 
1Corinthians14:6 Sanggamte aw, note kiangah hong pai-in pau lamdang tawh thu hong gen leng, bangin kimang ding ahi hiam? Note-aʼ in Pasianʼ thutheihna, pilna le siamna a hong piansak kei leh a kimanna them khat zong om het lo hi." 
1Corinthians14:7 Nuntakna a nei lo tamngai le harp lasaknate nangawn, a aw a kitelin ging sensen kei leh bang la kisa ahi hiam, ci-in kua in theithei ding ahi hiam?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Galdo nading peengkul a tum pa in a aw a kitelin tum kei leh galdo dingin kua kithawi thei ding ahi hiam? 
1Corinthians14:9 Tua mah bangin na thugenna uh kammal kitel sinsen kei leh kua in noteʼ thugen theithei ding ahi hiam? Na thugen uh huih lakah a maimang suak lel ding hi. 
1Corinthians14:10 Leitungah pau nam tampi om a, ahi zongin khiatna a nei lo khat beek om lo hi." 
1Corinthians14:11 Ahi zongin a kipau pau nam thei kei leng, kei pen a pau pa adingin mi namdangpi ka hi dinga, a pau pa zong kei adingin mi namdangpi khat hi ding hi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Note in zong Kha Siangthoʼ hong piak siamnate deih belin nei na hih manun pawlpi adingin phattuamna taktak a piangsak ding siamnate mah nget belin na nei ta un. 
1Corinthians14:13 Tua ahih manin pau lamdang a paute in, amau paute a khiatna a gen theih nading uh siamna a neih nadingun thu ngen ta uh hen." 
1Corinthians14:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh pau lamdang tawh thu ka nget ciangin lungsim takpi tawh thungen ka hih tei hangin bang ngen ka hi hiam cih ka ngaihsun thei kei hi. 
1Corinthians14:15 Tua ahihleh bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam? Ka lungsim tawh thu ka ngen dinga, ka ngette ka theih nading tawh zong ka ngen ding hi. Ka lungsim tawh la ka sa dinga, ka sakte ka theih nading tawh zong ka sa ding hi." 
1Corinthians14:16 Na lungsim bek tawh Pasian tungah lungdamna na koh ciangin kikhopna sungah a om midangte in bangci-in nangʼ thungetna, “Amen,” hong cih pih thei ding ahi hiam? Nangma thungette a theihtheih nading uh bangmah om lo hi." 
1Corinthians14:17 Pasian tungah lungdam ko-in na thungetna a hoih mahmah hangin midangte in bangmah phattuamna ngah het lo hi. 
1Corinthians14:18 Note khempeuh sangin pau lamdang pau thei zaw ka hih manin Pasian tungah ka lungdam hi. 
1Corinthians14:19 Ahi ta zongin pawlpiteʼ biak kikhopna sungah pau lamdang kam tul sawm bang ka pau sangin midangteʼ phattuam nadingin a theih ding uh kammal nga bek ka pau zaw ding hi. 
1Corinthians14:20 Sanggamte aw, na thu ngaihsutnate uh ah naupang bang kei un. Gitlohna lamah naupang bang unla, ahi zongin thu ngaihsutna ah a khangham hi ta un." 
1Corinthians14:21 Lai Siangtho sungah, “A lamdang kampau tawh amaute hopihin, minam dangteʼ pau tawh thu ka gen dinga, tua bang nangawnin hih mite in keima thugen hong ngai lo ding uh hi, ci-in Topa in a gen hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
1Corinthians14:22 Tua ahih manin pau lamdang pen thu um mite ading hi loin, thu um lo mite in a up theih nading uh lim ahi hi. Tua mah bangin Pasianʼ thuhilhna pen thu um mite ading hi a, thu um lo mite ading hi lo hi." 
1Corinthians14:23 Tua ahih manin pawlpi mi khempeuh na kikhopna uh ah na vekpi-un pau lamdangin pau-in, mi mawkmawkte ahih kei leh thu um lo mite in hong mu zenzen leh, note pen mihai hontang hi, hong ci ding hi lo ahi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Ahi zongin na vekpi-un hoihtakin Pasianʼ thu na gen laitakun mi mawkmawkte ahih kei leh thu um lote hong pai leh, a zak uh thute hangin a mawhna uh kiphawkin a hoih lohna uh kithei ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians14:25 A lungsim sung uh ah a ipcipte uh kipholak dinga, khukdinin Pasian bia-in, “Hih mite lakah Pasian om taktak hi,” ci ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians14:26 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, ka hong gen nop thu a tomin: Pasian bia dingin note na kikhop uh ciangin khat in la sak ding nei, khat in Pasianʼ thu a gen ding nei, khat in pau lamdang tawh thugen ding nei, khat in tua a kigente a khiatna gen theih nading nei cih bangin na om ding uh hi. Hih a tuamtuamte khempeuh, pawlpiʼ phattuam nading ahih ding kisam hi." 
1Corinthians14:27 Pau lamdang tawh thugen nuam a om leh zong, nih bang, ahih kei leh a tam penin thum bang in gen bek dinga, tua bangin a gen uh ciangin zong khat a man khit ciangin khat in a banbanin gen ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians14:28 Ahi zongin a khiatna a gen thei ding a om kei leh zong, kikhopna sungah pau lamdangin a pau nuam pa gamdai takin om dinga, amah le Pasian tawh kikal bekah kigen ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians14:29 Pasian thu gen ding a neite sung panin nih le thum bang bek in a banbanin gen ding uh a, a dangte in limtakin na tel ngaih ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians14:30 A kikhawm mite sung panin mi khatpeuh in Pasian thu gen ding hong neih leh tua a thugen lai pa khawl phot ding hi. 
1Corinthians14:31 Na vekpi-un a thu thei-in thahatna na ngah theih nadingun no thugen ding a neite khempeuh in khatkhatin thu na ban gen ding uh hi. 
1Corinthians14:32 Pasian in eite ahi zelzul dingin a hong sam hi lo a, hoihtak nuam takin a om dingin a hong sam ahih manin Pasianʼ thu gen ding lawpna lungsim pen a gen ding pa a ki-uk zawh ding a kisam ahi hi. Pasianʼ pawlpi mite khempeuh lakah a kizang ngeina ahih mah bangin," 
1Corinthians14:33  
1Corinthians14:34 mihon biak kikhopna sungah numeite pau loin om uh hen. Numeite a kiniamkhiat nading thu Jew Thukham in a gen mah bangin amaute in mihon lakah thu a gen ding uh kiphal lo hi. 
1Corinthians14:35 Amaute in a theihnop uh thu a om leh, inn panin a pasalte uh dong ta uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihon lakah numeite kam a pau ding zumhuai hi." 
1Corinthians14:36 Note kiang bek panin Pasianʼ thu hong kipan a, note tung bekah a hong tung sa zenzen na hi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Mi khatpeuh in Kha Siangtho hong piak siamna a nei, Pasian thugen ka hi hi, ci-in a kingaihsut leh hih lai ka hong gelhte pen Topaʼ thupiakna tawh a gelh ka hih lamtak a phawk ding kisam hi." 
1Corinthians14:38 Hih ka thugente a don kei leh amah zong don kei pah un. 
1Corinthians14:39 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Pasianʼ thu hilh ding ngaihsut lian penin na nei unla, ahi zongin pau lamdang a paute na kho dah hoh un." 
1Corinthians14:40 Na khempeuh a kilawm a kituakin na hih un. 
1Corinthians15:1 Sanggamte aw, note kiangah kong hilh, note in hong sangin kip takin na let uh thu, na phawkkik ding uh ka deih hi." 
1Corinthians15:2 Keiʼ hong hilh thu pen lungdamna thu ahi hi. Note in kip takin tua lungdamna thu na let nak uh leh hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. Tua hikeileh na upna uh a mawkna ahi hi. 
1Corinthians15:3 Kei tungah a hong kihilh a thupi pen note tungah ka hong gen sawn a, tua in: Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin eiteʼ mawhna tang dingin Khris hong si-in" 
1Corinthians15:4 kivui a, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin a ni thum ni-in Pasian in hingkiksak hi." 
1Corinthians15:5 Tua ciangin Peter kiangah kilang a, a zomah sawltak sawm le nihte kiangah kilang hi." 
1Corinthians15:6 Tua ciangin thu um mi za nga val tungah thakhatin kilang hi. Tua mi za nga valte, pawl khat a sih khit tei hangin a tam zaw nungta lai uh hi." 
1Corinthians15:7 Tua ciangin James tungah kilang a, tua banah sawltak sawm le nihte tungah kilang leuleu hi." 
1Corinthians15:7 Tua ciangin James tungah kilang a, tua banah sawltak sawm le nihte tungah kilang leuleu hi." 
1Corinthians15:8 A tawpna pen ah, kei pen a ngeina bangin a suak lo naungek tawh a kibang hi napi-in kei tungah zong hong kilang hi." 
1Corinthians15:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Pasianʼ pawlpi a bawlsia mipa ka hih manin sawltak cih dingin zong a kilawm lo zah dongin sawltakte lakah a neu pen ka hi hi. 
1Corinthians15:10 Tua bang hitaseleh Pasianʼ hehpihna tawh tu-a ciangah ka om a, kei tungah a hong piak ama hehpihna a mawkna suak lo hi. Sawltak dangte khempeuh sangin na nakpi takin ka sem zawsop hi. Tua ka sep zawhna pen keima hatna hang hi loin Pasianʼ hong hehpihna hang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:11 Tua ahih ciangin kei ka hi a, sawltak dangte in ahi zongin hong hilh thu pen Khrisʼ thawhkikna thu mah hi a, noteʼ up zong tua thu mah ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:12 Tu-in gen penin a kinei thu in: Sihna panin Khris kihingkiksak hi, cihna thu ahih manin, bang hangin note pawl khat in, misite thokik lo ding hi, ci thei na hi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Tua bangin misite a thokik lo hileh Khris zong a kithokiksak lo hi ding hi. 
1Corinthians15:14 Khris a kithokiksak lo hileh koteʼ thuhilhna a mawkna hi dinga, noteʼ thu up zong a mawkna mah suak ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:15 Tua bek zong hi lo lai-in, misite a kihingkiksak lo ding hileh Pasian in Khris hingkiksak hi, ci-in teci pang ka hih manun, mite kiangah Pasianʼ thu a man lopi-in a gen ka suak ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians15:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh misite a kihingkiksak lo ding hileh Khris zong kihingkiksak lo ding hi. 
1Corinthians15:17 Khris a kihingkiksak lo hileh noteʼ upna a mawkna hi dinga, na mawhna sung mah uh ah note a om lai na suak ding uh hi." 
1Corinthians15:18 Khris thu a um, a si sa mite zong a mawkna mah hi lai ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:19 Khris hangin i lamet thu pen hih i leitung nuntak sung thu ding bek hi takpi leh leitung midang khempeuhte sangin a hehpihhuai zaw ihi ding hi. 
1Corinthians15:20 Ahi zongin a thuman taktak ci lehang, a si sa mite zong hingkik takpi ding hi cih a kitel theih nadingin sihna panin Khris kihingkiksak khinzo hi." 
1Corinthians15:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat hangin sihna a om mah bangin mi khat hang mahin misite zong hinkikna om hi. 
1Corinthians15:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Adam tawh a kizop manin mi khempeuh si a, tua mah bangin Khris tawh a kizom khempeuh zong kihingkiksak ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:23 Ahi zongin tua hinkikna pen ama hun tawh kizui-in a banbanin hi ding hi. A masa penin Khris hi a, Khris hong paikik ciangin ama pawlte khempeuh hingkik ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:24 Tua ciangin Khris in ukna, vangliatna, aana a nei ama galte khempeuh a zawh gawp khit ciangin Pa Pasian tungah ukna aana ap dinga, tua ciangin hih leitung hun beina hong tung ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in a galte khempeuh zo-in a khe nuai ah a koih khit hun dong mateng Khris in uk ding hi. 
1Corinthians15:26 A tawpna ah suksiat ding a gal nunung pen in sihna ahi hi. 
1Corinthians15:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Pasian in na khempeuh ama khe nuai ah koih hi,” na ci hi. “Na khempeuh,” a cih ciangin Khrisʼ khutnuai ah na khempeuh a koih Pasian mahmah sim loh a vekpi-in a huam khin ahihna kitel hi." 
1Corinthians15:28 Khrisʼ khutnuai ah na khempeuh a kikoih ciangin ama khutnuai ah na khempeuh a koihsak Pasianʼ khutnuai ah Tapa mahmah zong om dinga, Pasian pen na khempeuh le a kuamah peuh tungah a lian pen hi ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:29 Tua ciangin thu khat ah, a si sa miteʼ tang dingin tui a kiphum mite in bang a deihna uh ahi hiam? Misite kihingkiksak het lo ding ahihleh bang hangin a si sateʼ tang dingin tui kiphum ahi uh hiam?" 
1Corinthians15:30 A site hinkikna om lo ding hileh bang hangin kote in nisimin gimna le sihna zah dong dingin lauhuaina thuakin na sem nuam ding ka hi uh hiam? 
1Corinthians15:31 Sanggamte aw, i Topa Jesu Khris thu ah note hangin ka kisaktheih zah mah bangin nisim mahin sihna a thuakthuak ka hi hi." 
1Corinthians15:32 Hih leitung a phattuam nading bekin ngaihsun ni ci lehang, sahang tawh kilaii bang keekin Efesa khua mite tawh ka kihihna uh ah gim thaman bang ngah ka hi uh hiam? Misite hinkikna om lo ding hileh, “Zing ciangin si kha ding ihih manin i duhduhin an ne zu ne-in nuam takin om ni,” ci-in paunak a om bangin gamtat lel ding ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:33 Sanggamte aw, miʼ khem sa-in ta kei un. Kikholhpih hoih lote in mi siasak thei hi." 
1Corinthians15:34 Hoihtakin thu ngaihsun phakik unla, mawhna gamta nawn kei un. Note pawl khat in Pasian thei het lo na hih manun maizumhuai mahmah hi." 
1Corinthians15:35 Mi pawl khatte in, “A si sa mite bangci thawhkik dinga, bang pumpi tawh thokik ding ahi hiam?” ci kha thei hi." 
1Corinthians15:36 Tua bang ngaihsutna haihuai mahmah hi. Khaici na tuh uh ciangin a muat lopi-in hong po thei lo hi. 
1Corinthians15:37 Mangbuh ci ahi a, khaici dang khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin na tuh uh ciangin hong po-in a khan khit ciangin a kung om zia ding teng tawh a tuh na hi kei uh a, a khaici bek a tuh na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians15:38 Ahi zongin Pasian in ama hoihsak bangin a kung ding na pia a, khaici nam tuamtuamte ading kung nam tuamtuam a guan hi." 
1Corinthians15:39 Tua mah bangin sa a nei nuntakna nam khempeuh zong a sa kibang kim lo hi. Mihing sa, ganhing sa, vasa sa, ngasa sa, cih bangin a nam tuamtuam a om hi." 
1Corinthians15:40 Vantung pumpi om a, leitung pumpi zong om hi. Vantung pumpi a hoihna a tuam khat hi a, leitung pumpi a hoihna zong a tuam khat mah ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ni a hoihna a tuam khat hi a, kha a hoihna a tuam khat hi a, aksite a hoihna a tuam khat mah ahi hi. Aksite nangawn a hoihna a tuamtuamin om lai hi." 
1Corinthians15:42 Misite a thawhkikna zong hihte mah tawh kibang hi. A kiphum pen a muat thei hi a, a thokik pen a muat thei lo ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:43 A kiphum laitakin hat loin melsia a, a kithawhkiksak ciangin thahatin a melhoih hi." 
1Corinthians15:44 A kiphum laitakin leitung pumpi hi a, a kithawhkiksak ciangin kha pumpi ahi hi. Leitung pumpi a om mah bangin kha pumpi zong a om ding ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:45 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “A masa Adam pen leitung nuntakna a nei mihing hong suak hi,” na ci hi. Ahi zongin a nunung Adam pen nuntakna a pia thei Kha ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:46 Ahi zongin kha pumpi a om masa hi loin leitung pumpi a om masa hi a, leitung pumpi a om khit ciangin kha pumpi a om thei pan ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:47 A masa Adam pen leitung leivui tawh a kibawl hi a, a nunung Adam pen vantung panin a hong pai ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:48 Leitung tawh a kipawl mite pen lei tawh a kibawl mite tawh a kibang hi a, vantung tawh a kipawl mite pen vantung panin a hong pai mipa tawh a kibang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:49 Eite in lei tawh a kibawl miteʼ lim i puak mah bangin vantung panin a hong pai Mipaʼ lim zong a pua ding ihi hi. 
1Corinthians15:50 Sanggamte aw, note kiangah ka hong gen nop thu in: Pasianʼ Ukna sungah hih leitung si le sa pumpi lut thei lo dinga, a sia thei pumpi pen a sia thei lo pumpi suak thei lo ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:51 Kuamah kim in a theih loh thusim khat na ngai un. Eite khempeuh a si khin ding ihi kei a, thakhat thu-in a kikhel vat ding ihi hi." 
1Corinthians15:52 Peengkul nunung hong gin ciangin mitphiat kikal sungin i kikhel pak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh peengkul hong gin ciangin misite a si thei nawn lo dingin hong tho dinga, i vekpi-in i kikheel ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:53 A muat thei pumpi pen a muat thei lo pumpi-in hong kikheel dinga, a si thei pumpi pen a si thei lo pumpi-in hong kikheel ding hi." 
1Corinthians15:54 A muat thei pen a muat thei lo hong suakin, a si thei pen a si thei lo hong suah ciangin Lai Siangtho thu hong tung taktak ding hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Sihna maimangin gualzawhna in khup let hi." 
1Corinthians15:55 Sihna aw, na gualzawhna koi ah om a, midangte na suksiat zawh nading na thahatna koi ah om ta ahi hiam?” na ci hi." 
1Corinthians15:56 Sihna a pianna mawhna hang hi a, mawhna a kitheihna Thukham hang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:57 Ahi zongin i Topa Jesu Khris hangin gualzawhna a hong pia Pasian tungah i lung a dam hi. 
1Corinthians15:58 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it sanggamte aw, Topaʼ hangin na nasepnate uh a mawkna hi ngei het lo hi, ci-in na theih uh mah bangin Topa adingin a tawntungin na sem unla, liing het loin lungsim kip takin na om ta un." 
1Corinthians16:1 Tu-in Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading sum kaihkhop nading thu tawh kisai-in: Galatia gam a pawlpite in a hih ding zia uh ka gen bangin note in zong na hih un. 
1Corinthians16:1 Tu-in Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading sum kaihkhop nading thu tawh kisai-in: Galatia gam a pawlpite in a hih ding zia uh ka gen bangin note in zong na hih un. 
1Corinthians16:2 Kei ka hong pai ciangin sumpi kaihkhop tawm a om loh nadingin na ngahna uh tawh kizui-in Nipi simin na tuam koih unla, na na khol un." 
1Corinthians16:3 Kei ka hong tun ciangin Jerusalem khua ah na huhna uh sumte a puak dingin hoih na sak uh mite sawlin, lai tawh i paisak ding hi." 
1Corinthians16:4 Kei mahmah zong ka va pai ding hoih i sak leh amaute tawh ka va pai khawm ding hi. 
1Corinthians16:5 Masedonia gam nawkin khualzin sawm ka hih manin tua gam sung ka zin khit ciangin no kiangah ka hong pai ding hi. 
1Corinthians16:6 Note kiang panin mun dang ka zin nading peuhpeuh ah kei na hong huh theih nadingun note kiangah tomno sung bek hi loin phalbi hunsung tawntung bang ka hong taam thei kha ding hi. 
1Corinthians16:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong thukimpih nakleh khualzin kawmin a hong nawk bek hi loin, note kiangah hunhoih khop khat ka om nuam hi." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ahi zongin hih Efesa khua mahah Pentekos Pawi hun ciang dong ka om ding hi. 
1Corinthians16:9 Hong langpang tampi a om tei hangin limtakin na sep theih nading lam tampi tak a om hi. 
1Corinthians16:10 Note kiangah Timoti hong pai zenzen khak leh, amah pen keimah bangin Topaʼ na a sem ahih manin nuam a sak theihtheih nadingin na bawl un." 
1Corinthians16:11 Kuamah in na simmawh bawl kha kei unla, kei kiang a hong tunkik theih nadingin nuam takin a khualzin a hong zoptheih nadingin na huh un. Thu up pih i sanggam dangte tawh kei kiangah a hong pai dingin ka lamet ahi hi." 
1Corinthians16:12 I sanggam Apollos ahihleh, thu up pih sanggam dangte tawh no kiangah hong hawh nadingin ka hanthot zel hangin tu tadihin hong hawh pah ding lungtung zo nai lo hi. Ahi zongin hunhoih a ngah peuhpeuh ciangin hong pai ding hi." 
1Corinthians16:13 Kiging tawntungin na upna uh ah kip unla, thahatin hang un." 
1Corinthians16:14 Na sepna khempeuh uh ah ki-itna tawh na gamta un. 
1Corinthians16:15 Sanggamte aw, Stefanas-te innkuan pen Akhaia gam sunga thu um masa pente ahihna le Pasianʼ mite adingin nasem dingin a kipia mite ahihna thu na thei uh hi." 
1Corinthians16:16 Tua bang mite le amaute tawh tua bangmahin na a sem khawm miteʼ thu na man nadingun kong thum hi. 
1Corinthians16:17 Stefanas, Fortunatas le Akhaikas te hong paina hangin ka nuam mahmah hi. Note tawh ka kimuh mah tawh hong kibangsak a," 
1Corinthians16:18 note hong lungnopsak mah bangin kei zong ka lung hong nuamsak hi. Hih bang mite, limtakin na phawk ding uh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians16:19 Asia gam a om pawlpi a tuamtuamte in note hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. Aquila le Prisilla-te in zong amauʼ inn-a kikhawm pawlpite tawh Topaʼ hangin lungsim taktak tawh hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. 
1Corinthians16:20 Hih lai ah a om thu upna sungah i sanggamte khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi. A siangtho kinapna tawh note khatlekhat na kihopih un. 
1Corinthians16:21 Keimah Paul in ka hong hopih hi, cihna kamte ka khut mahmah tawh ka gelh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians16:22 Topa a it lo mi peuhmah in samsiatna ngah tahen. I Topa hong pai tahen. 
1Corinthians16:23 Topa Jesu hong hehpihna thupha, note tungah hong tung tahen." 
1Corinthians16:24 Jesu Khris sungah note ka hong itna, note tungah hong kip tahen. Amen." 
2Corinthians1:1 Jesu Khrisʼ sawltak ahi dingin Pasian in a hong seh keimah Paul le thu upna sungah i sanggam Timoti in, Korin khua ah a om Pasianʼ pawlpi mite le Akhaia gam sungah a om Pasianʼ mite khempeuh tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:2 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note khempeuh tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
2Corinthians1:3 Eiteʼ Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa ahi, hehpihna a nei Pa, i kisapna khempeuh ah a hong huh Pasian in thupha ngah tahen." 
2Corinthians1:4 Amah in koteʼ haksatna khempeuh ah hong huh ahih manin, kote in zong Pasianʼ tung panin ka ngah uh tua huhna mah zangin haksatna a nam tuamtuam a thuakte ka huh sawn thei leuleu uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:5 Khris hangin gimna tampi ka thuak uh mah bangin amah in zong kote tungah huhna tampi mah a hong pia hi. 
2Corinthians1:6 Kote in gimna ka thuak uh leh noteʼ phattuam nading le hotkhiatna na ngah nading uh ahi hi. Kote in huhna ka ngah uh leh zong, note zong a hong kihuh hi a, koteʼ thuak bang gimnate na thuak uh ciangin lungduai takin na thuak zawh nading uh thahatna a hong kipia ahi hi." 
2Corinthians1:7 Note ka hong muanna uh kiam tuan lo hi. Koteʼ thuak bangin na thuak uh leh Pasian in kote hong huh mah bangin note zong hong huh ding hi. 
2Corinthians1:8 Sanggamte aw, Asia gam sunga ka thuaknate uh na hong phawkpih ding uh ka deih uh hi. Ka thuakna uh lian lua mahmah ahih manin nuntak zawh nading lametna om lo hi." 
2Corinthians1:9 A si ding taktak hi ta hang, ci-in ka kingaihsun uh hi. Ahi zongin tua zahin ka thuakna uh pen koteʼ thatang kimuang loin sihna panin misite a hingkiksak Pasian ka muan theih nadingun a piang ahi hi." 
2Corinthians1:10 Tua zahin a lauhuai sih nading panin hong hon khia khinzo a, zong hong hon khia lai ding hi. Mailam hunah zong hong hon khia kikkik ding hi, ci-in amah ka muang uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:11 Kote adingin thu hong ngetsak un. Tua hileh mi tampi in kote adingin thu a hong ngetsaknate uh Pasian in a hong piakna hangin mi tampi mah in koteʼ tang dingin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko thei ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians1:12 Koteʼ kisialh pih thu in: hih leitung a ka gamtatnate uh le a diakdiakin note tungah kong gamtatnate uh ah, mihingteʼ pilna a zang hi loin Pasian hehpihna vang tawh, Pasianʼ deihna bangin lungsim takpi tawh a gamta hi ung, ci-in ka kitheihna lungsim uh ahi hi." 
2Corinthians1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in sim thei-in a thu na theihtheih dingte bek uh a hong gelh ka hi uh hi. Tuhunin a cingin na theih lohte uh zong," 
2Corinthians1:14 Topa Jesu hong paikik Ni ciangin a cing takin thei ding na hih manun note hangin ka kisialh uh mah bangin note zong kote hangin na kisial ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians1:15 Tu-a bangin piang taktak ding ci-in tel theih ka hih manin note in hamphatna nih vei na ngah nadingun ka geel a," 
2Corinthians1:16 Masedonia gam ka pai ciangin hong nawk masa-in, Masedonia gam panin ka kilehkik ciangin zong Judea gam a ka paina dingah nong huh theih nadingun hong nawk leuleu dingin ka ngaihsun masa phot hi." 
2Corinthians1:16 Masedonia gam ka pai ciangin hong nawk masa-in, Masedonia gam panin ka kilehkik ciangin zong Judea gam a ka paina dingah nong huh theih nadingun hong nawk leuleu dingin ka ngaihsun masa phot hi." 
2Corinthians1:17 Hih bangin ka ngaihsutna pen a mawk kheel themthum hong sa na hi uh hiam? Leitung mihingte bangin angsung phattuam nading a om kei leh a gen sa thu a kheel themthumte bang hong sa na hi uh hiam? 
2Corinthians1:18 Pasian a thuman a citak ahih mah bangin note tungah ka hong gente uh zong a kheel themthum ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians1:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh Silvanas, Timoti le keimah in note lakah a thu ka hong hilhhilh uh Pasianʼ Tapa Jesu Khris pen hih ding a cihte hih lo ding ci-in a thu a kheel themthum pa hi lo a, hih ding a cihte hih ding mah hi pah hi." 
2Corinthians1:20 Pasianʼ thuciamte khempeuh a hih pa pen amah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin Jesu Khris hangin Pasian phatin, “Amen,” i cihna zong hih thu hang mah ahi hi." 
2Corinthians1:21 Khris sungah kote le note a hong kipsak pa le nasem dingin kote a hong sawl pa pen Pasian ahi hi. 
2Corinthians1:22 Amah in eite pen ama aʼ ihihna ciaptehna eite tungah hong bawl a, ama aʼ ihihna le eite tungah a hong piak ding na khempeuh a hong pia takpi ding ahihna a kitel nadingin eiteʼ lungsim sungah Kha Siangtho a hong ma piak hi." 
2Corinthians1:23 Note kiangah kong pai lohna pen note ka hong dopna hizaw hi. Hih thu hong theih pih ka teci pen Pasian ahi hi. 
2Corinthians1:24 Hih bangin um un, ci-in thatang hat thu tawh a hong gen ding ka hi kei uh hi. Note na upna uh ah kip khin na hih manun noteʼ lungdam nadingin note tawh na a sem khawm ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians2:1 Tua ahih manin hong pai leng noteʼ dah nading hong piang ding ahih manin ka hong pai loh nadingin ka lungsim ka khensat hi. 
2Corinthians2:2 Kei a hong lungdamsak ding note keʼn hong dahsak leng, kei kua in hong lungdamsak nawn ding ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Kei lungdam leng note khempeuh zong a lungdam ding na hihna uh teltakin thei ka hih manin, kei a hong lungdamsak ding note in keiʼ dahna nong piansak khak loh nading uh ka deihna tawh kei hong pai loin tua lai a hong gelh ka hi hi." 
2Corinthians2:4 Tua lai ka gelh laitakin, noteʼ dah nading piangsak kha loin note ka hong it mahmahna na phawk nading uh ka deihna tawh ka gelh hi a, lungkham sinkhamna le khitui naptui kai-in a gelh ka hi hi." 
2Corinthians2:5 Mi khatpeuh in heh nading a piansak ciangin kei bek a hong hehsak hi loin note khempeuh zong a hong hehsak ahi hi. Tua ahih manin tua bang mi tungah khauh tat lua nawn kei un. 
2Corinthians2:6 Noteʼ gimpiakna sa pen kicing khinzo ka sa hi. 
2Corinthians2:7 Tua ahih manin a mawhna maisak ta unla hehnem zaw un. Tua hikeileh dah lua-in siatlawh kha ding hi. 
2Corinthians2:8 Amah na itkik ding uh ka hong thumna thu zong amah na theisak un. 
2Corinthians2:9 Note in ze-etna bangzah ciang thuak zo-in, ka thugente na hong mang zo uh hiam cih ka theih nadingin tua lai a hong gelh ka hi hi." 
2Corinthians2:10 Note in mawhna na maisak uh ciangin kei zong a maisak ka hi hi. Mawhna maisak ding om ahihleh zong, mawhna ka maisak ciangin Khris hang le noteʼ phattuam nadingin a maisak ka hi hi." 
2Corinthians2:11 Mawhna maisak kei lehang Satan in nuamtak sa-in eite tungah hong gualzo kha ding ahih manin mawhna a maisak ihi hi. Satanʼ nasepna zia a thei lo ihi kei hi. 
2Corinthians2:12 Khris hangin lungdamna thu a hilh dingin Troas khua ka tun ciangin tua lai ah nasep theih nadingin Topa in lampi hong honsakna thu ka mu hi. 
2Corinthians2:13 Ahi zongin tua lai ah i sanggampa Titus na om lo ahih manin ka lungsim om thei nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin tua lai-a om mite nusia-in Masedonia gamah ka paisuak hi. 
2Corinthians2:13 Ahi zongin tua lai ah i sanggampa Titus na om lo ahih manin ka lungsim om thei nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin tua lai-a om mite nusia-in Masedonia gamah ka paisuak hi. 
2Corinthians2:14 Ahi zongin Pasian tungah lungdam mahmah nading thu a om hi. Khris tawh ka kipawlna hangun gualzawhna tawh Khris a paina khempeuh ah Pasian in kote hong zuisak hi. Mun khempeuh ah paknamtui a kizelh bangin Khris thutheihna a kizelsak dingin Pasian in kote hong zang hi. 
2Corinthians2:15 Hotkhiatna a ngah mite le a ngah lo mite lakah kote pen Khris in Pasian tungah a piak paknamtui tawh ka kibang uh hi. 
2Corinthians2:16 Tua a nam pen, thu um lo mite adingin mi a sisak thei a nam khauh mahmah hi a, hotkhiatna a ngah mite adingin mi a hingsak thei a namtui mahmah ahi hi. Hih nasep a sem dingin kua kilawm ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Ahi zongin kote pen, van gina tum lo a zuak mite tawh a kibang ahi, Pasianʼ thu a gen mawkmawk midangte bang ka hi kei uh a, Pasian in a nasem dingin kote hong sawl ahih manin Khris nasem hihna tawh ama mai ah lungsim takpi tawh thugente ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians3:1 Hih bangin thu ka gen uh ciangin koleko a kiphattawm ka bang zel uh hiam? Midang pawl khatte bangin note kiangah lah ding mihoih hihna lai ka kisam kei uh a, note in zong kote nong lah ding uh mihoih hihna lai a kisam na hi kei uh hi." 
2Corinthians3:2 Note mahmah pen mihoih ka hihna uh lah nadingin koteʼ lai na hi uh a, mi khempeuh in simin a theih nadingun koteʼ lungtang tungah a kigelh lai na hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians3:3 Hih lai pen Khris mahmah in gelhin kote a hong puasak ahihna thu kitel mahmah hi. Laidal le suangpek tungah laitui le laikung tawh a kigelh hi lo a, mihing lungtang tungah a nungta Pasian Kha Siangtho tawh a kigelh ahi hi." 
2Corinthians3:4 Khris hangin Pasian muang ka hih manun hih bangin a hong gen ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians3:5 Hih bang sep zawh nadingin kote in siamna nei ung a ci hi loin, sep zawh nading siamna pen Pasian hong piak ahi hi." 
2Corinthians3:6 Thuciamna thak nasem thei dingin kote tungah siamna a hong pia hi. Tua hong piakna pen lai-a kigelh thukham tawh hi loin Kha Siangtho tawh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lai-a kigelh thukham in sihna piangsak a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho in nuntakna hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Thukham pen suangpek tungah a kigelh laimal hi a, a kipiak hunin Pasianʼ minthanna tawh hong tonkhawm hi. Mosesʼ maitang a taang mahmah pen mual khin tei napi-in, nak taan lua mahmah ahih manin Israel mite in Mosesʼ maitang en zo lo lai uh hi. Sihna a piangsak thei bek Thukham hong kipiak ciangin tua zah minthanna vang taang tawh hong kizui ahihleh," 
2Corinthians3:8 nuntakna a pia Kha Siangtho nasepna bangzahin minthanna lian tawh hong kizui zaw kan ding ahi hiam? 
2Corinthians3:9 Mite mawhsakin thukhen nasepna ah tua zahin minthanna vang taang om ahihleh mite dik hi, ci-in genkhiat nasepna ah a minthanna vang taang lian zaw kan lai ding hi." 
2Corinthians3:10 Tuhunin a taang pha zaw minthanna vang hong om ta ahih manin nidangin minthangin a vang taang mahmah i cih pen a bei hong suak mai hi. 
2Corinthians3:11 Tawl khat sung bek a kimang na in minthanna nei ahihleh a kip tawntung na in minthanna lian zaw nei kan ding hi. 
2Corinthians3:12 Hih bang lametna nei ka hih manun hang takin a om ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians3:13 A maitang panin a vang taang a bei lam Israel mite in a muh khak ding uh a deih lohna-in Moses in a maitang puan tawh a liah bangin a gamtate ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians3:14 Amauteʼ lungsim khauh ahih manin tu dongin bangmah thei tuan loin om uh a, thuciamna lui laibu a sim uh ciangin puan tawh liah bangmahin bangmah mu thei lo, theithei lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh Khris tawh a kipawl ciang bekin a muh theih nadingin a kiliahna puan a kila khia pan ahi hi." 
2Corinthians3:15 Tu hun dongin amaute in Moses Thukham laibu a sim uh ciangin liahna puan in a lungsim uh a liah lai hi. 
2Corinthians3:16 Ahi zongin Lai Siangtho in, “Topaʼ mai ah Moses a pai ciangin a kiliahna puan a la khia hi,” a cih mah bangin Topa lamah mi khatpeuh a kihei ciangin a liah puan kila khia hi." 
2Corinthians3:17 Hih lai munah Topa a cih pen Kha Siangtho hi a, Topaʼ Kha Siangtho a omna mun peuhpeuh ah suahtakna om hi." 
2Corinthians3:18 Tua ahih manin eite khempeuh i maitang hong kiliah nawn loin Topaʼ minthanna vang taang i kilangsak hi. Topa kiang panin a hong pai Kha Siangtho ahi tua minthanna vang in amah tawh a kibang dingin eite hong bawl pha a, minthanna khat panin minthanna sang zaw ah hong omsak hi." 
2Corinthians4:1 Pasian in hong hehpihna tawh hih nasep hong pia ahih manin ka thaneem het kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians4:2 Ka thuhilhna uh ah mite khembawl loin, Pasian thu zong a man lopi-in ka gen kei uh a, tua bang a zumhuai simtham tatnate ka zang het kei uh hi. Pasian muhna ah a langtangin thuman takin ka gamta uh a, mi khempeuh a lungkim theih nadingin ka hanciam uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:3 Lungdamna thu ka hilhte uh kitel lo ahihleh zong siatna a thuak mite ading bekin a kitel lo hi ding hi. 
2Corinthians4:4 Tua bang mite pen hih leitung pasian gilote in a lungsim mit uh tawsak ahih manin um lo uh a, Pasian tawh a kibang teekteek Khris minthanna hangin amaute tungah a hong taang lungdamna thu khuavak mu thei lo uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh koteʼ hilh thu pen komauʼ thu hi lo a, Khris Jesu pen Topa ahi hi, ci-in a hilh ka hi uh a, kote pen Khris hangin nomauʼ na a semte ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:6 “Khuamial sung panin khuavak taang hen,” a ci Pasian mah in Jesuʼ maitang a taangsak Pasianʼ vangliatna thu theih nading khuavak ka ngah theih nadingun kote lungsim sungah khuavak hong taangsak hi." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ahi zongin vangliatna taktak Pasian aʼ hi a, kote aʼ hi lo hi, ci-in a kilat nadingin kha tawh kisai na manpha a nei kote pen na kikoihna leibeel tawh a kibang bek ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:8 Gimna ka tuah zelzel uh hangin ka si kei uh a, lunghihmawhna ka tuah zelzel uh hangin ka lungkia kei uh a," 
2Corinthians4:9 gal tampi ka neih uh hangin pawl ka kitasam ngei kei uh a, liamna baina ka tuah uh hangin ka si kei uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:10 Koteʼ pum tung panin Jesuʼ nuntakna a kilat theih nadingin hih ka leitung pumpi nuntakna mahmah uh ah zong Jesuʼ sihna bangmah ka thuak zelzel uh hi. 
2Corinthians4:11 Tua ahih manin koteʼ leitung pumpi ah Jesu Khris nuntakna a kilat nadingin Jesu hangin ka leitung nuntak sungun sih nading lauhuaina ka phu kha tawntung uh hi. 
2Corinthians4:12 Tua ahih manin kote adingin sih nading a kisepsep laitakin noteʼ nuntak nading a kisem niloh ahi hi. 
2Corinthians4:13 Lai Siangtho in, “Um ka hih manin ka gen hi,” a cih mah bangin kote in zong um ka hih uh manin a gen ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:14 Topa Jesu a hingkiksak pa in Jesu mah tawh kote zong hong hingkiksak khawmin note tawh ama omna ah hong paipih khawm ding hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:15 Hih thute khempeuh note ading a kikhualna hi a, Pasianʼ hehpihna in mi tam ban semsem leh mi a tam semsem mah in Pasianʼ minthan nadingin lungdam ko-in thu ngen ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:16 Tua thu hangin ka lungkia tuan kei uh hi. Koteʼ leitung pumpi in damdamin muat lam a manawh ahi zongin ka kha nuntakna uh a nini-in thaksuak semsem hi. 
2Corinthians4:17 Tu hun laitakin tomno sung lungkhamna ka thuakte uh in ka thuakna uh sangin nakpi takin a lian zaw tawntung minthanna sung hong tunpih ding hi. 
2Corinthians4:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kimu thei nate a mitsuan ka hi kei uh a, a kimu thei lo nate a mitsuan ka hi uh hi. A kimu thei nate tomno sung bek kimang a, a kimu thei lo nate a tawntungin a kip ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:1 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ka teenna ka leitung pumpi uh a sih ciangin mihingte bawl ahi lo, Pasian in a kip tawntung dingin kote adingin a hong bawlsak inn, vantungah a nei ding ka hihna uh ka thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:2 Tu laitakin ka vantung inn uh ah ka om nopna uh lian lua mahmah ahih manin ngaklahin ka khui sasa uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:3 Vantung inn ah ka om uh ciangin pumpi nei loin guak om ding ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:4 Hih leitung pumpi tawh ka om uh laitakin lungkhamin ka khui sasa uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uh ka nusiat nopna hang uh hi loin a si thei pumpi pen a si thei nawn lo pumpi tawh a kilaih theih nadingin ka vantung pumpi uh ka deihna hang uh ahi hi. 
2Corinthians5:5 Hih kikheel nading a hong vaihawmsak pa pen Pasian hi a, kote a hong piak dingte khempeuh hong pia taktak ding cih a lahna-in kote tungah ama Kha Siangtho a hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:6 Tua ahih manin lungmuang takin ka om tawntung uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uh ah ka om lai teng uh Topaʼ hong piak ding pumpi tawh a om khawm nai lo ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:7 Muhna hang tawh lungmuangin a om hi loin upna hang tawh lungmuang takin a om ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:8 Lungmuang takin a ki-om hithiat hi a, hih leitung pumpi nusia-in Topa tawh om khawm ding a ki-ut zaw ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:9 Tua ahih manin hih lai inn ah a ki-om ahi a, hua lai vantung inn ah a ki-om ahi zongin thudang khempeuh sangin Topa lungdamsak ding ngaihsutpi-in a kinei ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris mai ah thusitna a thuak dingin eite khempeuh a kilak ding ihi a, leitung i pumpi-in i om lai-in i gamtatna tawh kizui-in eite tawh a kituak ciatin a sia ahi a, a pha ahi zongin a ngah ciat ding ihi hi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Pasian zahtak nading thu ka lungsim uh ah om tawntung ahih manin mite ka zol zawh nadingun ka hanciam uh hi. Pasian in koteʼ lungsim teltakin hong thei a, note in zong na lungsim uh ah kei hong thei dingin ka hong um hi." 
2Corinthians5:12 Note in na hong thupi ngaihsut theih nadingun koleko a hong kiphattawm zel ka hi kei uh a, lungsim tawng hoih lo napi-in a puatham siamna hangin a kisial mite nial thei-in, koteʼ hangin note na kisaktheih nading uh deihna hizaw hi." 
2Corinthians5:13 Mihai ka hih uh leh zong Pasianʼ minthan nading hi a, mipil ka hih uh leh zong noteʼ phattuam nading mah hi veve hi." 
2Corinthians5:14 Mi khempeuh adingin mi khat si khin ahih manin mi khempeuh zong a ngeina lui uh ah si khinta hi, ci-in ka theihna hangun tua Khrisʼ itna in koteʼ nuntakna hong uk hi." 
2Corinthians5:15 Ama hangin a nungtate, amau adingin nungta nawn loin, amauʼ hangin si-in a kihingkiksak pa adingin a nuntak theih nadingun mi khempeuh adingin amah a hong si hi." 
2Corinthians5:16 Tua ahih manin kote in mihingteʼ ngeina zia tawh kuamah ka en nawn kei uh hi. Khris mahmah zong mihing lungsim ngaihsutna zia tawh ka et ngei uh hangin tu-in tua bangin ka ngaihsun nawn kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:17 Tua ahih manin mi khatpeuh, Khris tawh a kipawl ciangin mi thak suak a, a mi lui ngeina bei-in a mi thak ngeina a nei ta ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:18 Hih thu khempeuh Pasianʼ vaihawm hi a, eite pen Pasianʼ gal hi napi-in Khris hangin amah tawh a kilem mi hong hisak a, kote tungah tua kilem nading nasep hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:19 Tua ahih manin koteʼ thugen bulpi in: Pasian in miteʼ mawhnate ngaihsun nawn loin, Khris hangin leitung mi khempeuh le amah a kilemin hong bawl a, tua kilemna thu a gen dingin kote hong seh hi." 
2Corinthians5:20 Tua ahih ciangin kote pen Khris tangin nasem ka hi uh a, Pasian in kote zangin note tungah thu a hong gen ahi hi. Pasian tawh kilemin pawl khatin na om nadingun Khris tangin a hong thum ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:21 Khris tawh i kipawlna hangin eite zong Pasian tawh a kibangin midik i suah theih nadingin mawhna a nei lo Khris pen eiteʼ tang dingin Pasian in mawhnei mi a suaksak hi. 
2Corinthians6:1 Tua bangin Pasian tawh na sem khawmin om ka hih manun Pasianʼ hong hehpihna thu a mawkna na suahsak khak loh nadingun ka hong thum uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in, “A hunhoih a tun ciangin noteʼ hong ngetna ka hong ngai a, kong hotkhiat ni ding ciangin note kong huh hi,” na ci hi. Tua hi a, tu hun pen a hunhoih hi a, tu hun pen hotkhiat ni hun hi ta hi." 
2Corinthians6:3 Ka nasepna uh ah mite in mawhna hong zon ding uh ut lo ka hih manun kuamah ka nawngkaisak khak loh nadingun ka hanciam uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:4 Tua ahih manin ka sepna khempeuh uh ah Pasianʼ nasemte ka hihna uh ka kilangsak uh a, lungduai takin gimna, haksatna, lungkhamnate ka thuak uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:5 Kote hong kisatin, thong ah hong kikhia-in, mihonpi in hong hih gawp uh hi; nakpi takin na semin, an ne lo, ihmu lo liangin ka om uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:6 Siangtho takin nuntakna, thutheihna, lungduaina, migitna, Kha Siangthoʼ huhna, itna taktak neihna," 
2Corinthians6:7 thuman genna le Pasianʼ nasemte ka hihna uh, Pasianʼ vang tawh ka kilangsak uh hi. Kote in kihut nading le galsim nadingin hiamin thuman ka zang uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:8 Kote hong kipahtawi-in hong kimindaisak zel a, hong kisimmawh bawlin zong hong kiphat zel hi. Thuman gen hi napi-in zuaugen bangin hong kingaihsun a," 
2Corinthians6:9 mi khempeuh in hong theih hi napi-in theih loh mi bangin hong kibawl a, nong theih uh mah bangin kote a nungta hi napi-in misi bangin hong kingaihsun hi." 
2Corinthians6:10 Dahna ka thuak uh hangin ka lungdam uh a, kote a zawng tawh kibang napi-in mi tampi ka hausak uh a, bangmah a nei het lo tawh kibang napi-in a taktakin ka neih loh uh bangmah om lo hi." 
2Corinthians6:11 Korin khua-a om lawmte aw, kote in bangmah ip nei loin lungsim takpi tawh thu kong gen uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:12 Kote in ka lungsim uh a hong pia lo hi loin note in na lungsim uh a hong pia lo na hizaw uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:13 Tua ahih manin tate tungah thugen bangin thu kong gen hi. Koteʼ ngaihsut bangin note in zong hong ngaihsun unla, na lungsim uh hong taanzausak ta un." 
2Corinthians6:14 Thu um lo mite tawh na nasem khawm kei un. Midik le mimawh bangci-in kipawl thei dinga, khuavak le khuamial bangci-in om khawm thei ding ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Khris le Dawimangpa bangci-in kithutuak thei dinga, thu um mi le thu um lo mi bangci-in a ngaihsutna uh kibang thei ding ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians6:16 Pasianʼ biakinn le lawkiteʼ milim bangci kilem theih ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in, “Ka mite lakah teengin amaute tawh ka om khawm ding hi. Kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, amaute, keima mi ahi ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:17 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa keimah in kong genin ah: Amaute tawh kikhenin amaute kiang panin paikhia unla, a siang lo peuhmah su kha kei un. Tua hileh note ka hong ngai ding hi." 
2Corinthians6:18 Kei pen noteʼ Pa hong hi-in, note, keima tate na hi ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians7:1 Tua ahih manin ka hong it lawmte aw, pumpi le lungsim a ninsak theite khempeuh panin kisiansuahin, Pasian zahtakna tawh nungta-in siangtho sinsenin om ni." 
2Corinthians7:2 Kuama tungah kote hong khial lo, kuamah hong siasak lo, noptak sa-in kuama tungah hong gamta lo ka hih manun na lungsim uh hong pia un." 
2Corinthians7:3 Hih bang ka hong cih ciangin note mawhsak nopna tawh thu a hong gen ka hi kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong gen sa mah bangin note hong it mahmah ka hih manun note na hin uh leh hing khawm, na sih uh leh zong a si khawm ngam ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:4 Note hong muang mahmah in note hangin ka kisathei a, lungkhamna a tuamtuam ka tuah hangin lunghimawh loin ka lungnuam mahmah hi." 
2Corinthians7:5 Masedonia gam ka tun khit uh ciang nangawnin tawldam cih om thei tuan lo a, a koimah peuh ah kitotna le lungkhamna om kawikawi ahih manin lungsim patauhna hi tawntung hi." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahi zongin a lungkia mite a hanthawn Pasian in Titus hong tunna tawh kote hong tha khauhsak hi. 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahi zongin a lungkia mite a hanthawn Pasian in Titus hong tunna tawh kote hong tha khauhsak hi. 
2Corinthians7:7 Ama hong tunna hang bek zong hi loin ama lungsim a thahat nadingin noteʼ gamtatna zong a hong zasak hi. Note in kei nong muhnopna thu uh, note na dahna thu uh le kei nong hutnopna thu uh hong gen ahih manin ka lung a dam semsem hi." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ka hong laigelhna in note tawl khat sung a hong dahsak manin ka lungsim nuam lo ahi tei ta zongin tua ka hong laigelhna hangin ka kisik kei hi. 
2Corinthians7:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in ka lung a dam hi. Note ka hong dahsak khakna hangin a lungdam hi loin note na dahna hangun na ngaihsutna uh kheel thei na hih manun a nuam ka hi hi. Tua na dahna uh Pasian in a hoih lamin hong zang ahih manin note adingin siatna a hong piangsak ka hi kei zaw uh hi. 
2Corinthians7:10 Tua na dahna uh hotkhiatna ngah theih nadingin na lungsim uh na kheel nadingun Pasian in hong zang ahih manin dah nading bangmah om lo hi. Ahi zongin hih leitung dahna lelte in ahihleh sihna piangsak hi. 
2Corinthians7:11 Hih noteʼ dahna pen Pasian in a hoih lamin hong zatsak ahih manin mawk om nawn loin lungsim takpi tawh kinna na nei uh a, hoih lo hi, ci-in ka hong gente lunghimawhin siansak nopna lungsim na nei uh hi. A thupiang sate hangin lau-in, lunghimawhin a hoih lote gim na pia nuam uh hi. Hih thu khempeuh ah note na paubaan nading uh a om lo hong suaksak hi."
