2Corinthians7:12 Tua bangin lai ka hong gelh hangin a khial pa ahih kei leh a thuak pa ngaihsutna tawh hong gelh hi lo zaw-in, Pasianʼ thu sungah koteʼ thu bangzahin na hong mang uh hiam cih a kitheih nadingin a hong gelh ka hizaw uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka lung uh nuam mahmah hi. Koteʼ lungsim hong nuamsak bek hi loin, Titus lungsim a nop theih nadingin ama tungah na gamta na hih manun ama lungdamna in zong koteʼ lungdamna hong behlap to sawnsawn hi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka lung uh nuam mahmah hi. Koteʼ lungsim hong nuamsak bek hi loin, Titus lungsim a nop theih nadingin ama tungah na gamta na hih manun ama lungdamna in zong koteʼ lungdamna hong behlap to sawnsawn hi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Titus mai ah note ka hong kisialh pih ngei a, note in ka kisialhna thu ah kei na hong zahhuaisak kei uh hi. Note tungah thuman bekbek a hong gen ka hih mah bangun Titus tungah ka kisialhna uh zong a kisial khial ka hih lohna uh hong kilang hi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Titus mai ah note ka hong kisialh pih ngei a, note in ka kisialhna thu ah kei na hong zahhuaisak kei uh hi. Note tungah thuman bekbek a hong gen ka hih mah bangun Titus tungah ka kisialhna uh zong a kisial khial ka hih lohna uh hong kilang hi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Note in ama thu mangin, launa le linna tawh amah na zindona uh a ngaihsut ciangin Titus in note hong itna khang semsem hi."

2Corinthians7:16 Note hong muang mahmah ka hih manin ka lungsim a nuam hi. 
2Corinthians8:1 Sanggamte aw, Masedonia gam pawpite ah Pasianʼ hehpihna hangin a piang thute ka hong theisak nuam uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:2 Amaute in haksatna a tuamtuam phukha-in nakpi takin ze-etna thuakin, amaute zawng mahmah hi ta se le-uh lungdam mahmah uh ahih manin piakna lamsang ah cingh thei mahmah uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:3 Amaute in amau ngahna tawh kituak bekin a pia hi loin, a piak zawh zah dingun a kilawm sangin a tam zaw a piakna uh ka thei taktak uh hi. Kuama sawl hi loin amau lungsimah a uttawmna uh tawh," 
2Corinthians8:4 Judea gam a Pasian mite, ko zong hong huhsak un, ci-in hong thumthum uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:4 Judea gam a Pasian mite, ko zong hong huhsak un, ci-in hong thumthum uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:5 Hih bangin a gamtatna uh koteʼ lamet sangin sang zaw pek hi. Amaute pen Topa tungah kipia masa uh a, tua ciangin Pasianʼ deihna bangin kote tungah zong a hong kipia uh ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Tua mah bangin Titus in zong hih bang nasep nading hong pat khit ahih mah bangin midang huh nading na sepnate uh note lakah hong zawh pih vet dingin ka hanthawn uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:6 Tua mah bangin Titus in zong hih bang nasep nading hong pat khit ahih mah bangin midang huh nading na sepnate uh note lakah hong zawh pih vet dingin ka hanthawn uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:7 Note pen thu upna, thugenna, thutheihna, midang huh ding lawpna le kote nong itna uh a kipanin na khempeuh ah midang sangin gina zaw na hih mah bangun midang huh nading hih nasepna ah zong na cingh mahmah ta un." 
2Corinthians8:8 Hih bang kong gen ciangin thupiakna tawh a hong gen hi loin, midangte in tua zahin mi huh nading kin ahihleh note in zong midang na itna uh bangzah taktak ahi hiam, ci-in ka theihnopna ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa Jesu zong hau mahmah napi-in ama zawnna tawh note mihau na suah theih nadingun noteʼ hangin mi zawngin hong kibawl ahih manin i Topa Jesu Khris hong itna bangzah takin lian hiam, cih thu na thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Hih thu tawh kisai-in keima ngaihsutna panin: Note in ni kumin hih bang nasep ding utna lungsim a nei bek hi loin a pan khia masate na hih uh mah bangin na tangtut ding uh hoih pen hi. 
2Corinthians8:11 Tua ahih manin na pat sa uh thu a bei dongin zomsuak unla, na geel sa uh na tangtunsak theih nadingun na neihsa uh tawh lawptakin na sem un." 
2Corinthians8:12 Piak nopna lungsim na neih nak uh leh na neih lohnate uh siksan hi loin na neihna uh tawh kizui-in na piak uh Pasian in hong sang ding hi. 
2Corinthians8:13 Hih bangin kong gen ciangin midangte in noptuamna a ngah nadingin note in haksapi-in tuam gimpih ding ka cihna hi lo hi. 
2Corinthians8:14 Tu laitakin note cithei na hih manun amau cihmawhnate ah huh le-uhcin, note in haksat na tuah hun uh ciangin zong amaute in hong huh ding uh ahih manin note khatlekhat na kihuh diamdiam ding uh ka deihna ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in zong, “An tampi a lapa in an hau lua tuan lo a, tawmno a lapa zong zawng lua tuan lo hi,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians8:16 Koteʼ hong kin zahin Titus in note hong kin nadingin Pasian in lungsim guan ahih manin Pasian tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:16 Koteʼ hong kin zahin Titus in note hong kin nadingin Pasian in lungsim guan ahih manin Pasian tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:17 Amah in kote hong sawlna a hong mang ciang bek hi loin, amah in note huhnopna lungsim nei tawm ahih manin note kiangah pai ding hong ngaihsun hi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Lungdamna thuhilh nasepna ah pawlpi khempeuh in a zahtak mahmah, thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh tawh zong ka hong kithuahsak uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:19 Tua tham loin, Pasianʼ minthan nading le midangte ka huhnopna uh a kilat nadingin hih bangin mi huh nading vaihawmin ka khualzinna peuh uh ah a hong zui dingin pawlpite in teelin a seh pa uh zong ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Citna tawh mi huh nadingin a kipia hih sum ka zeekna uh tawh kisai-in mi a phun khak loh nadingun a kidawm mahmah ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ hoihsak ding bek hi loin mite in zong hoih a sak ding bangin na a sem nuam ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:22 Amau tegel tawh hong kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggam uh a dang khat tawh zong ka hong tonsak uh hi. Amah pen na khempeuh ah thuman mahmah hi, ci-in ka theih khit sa uh hi a, note hong muan mahmahna hangin note hong huh ding a lawpna khang semsem hi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus ahihleh note ading ka nasepna ah ka kikholh pih ka nasep pih mi hi a, amah tawh hong kithuah ka sanggam tegel uh ahihleh pawlpiteʼ tang hi uh a, Khrisʼ min a thangsakte ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus ahihleh note ading ka nasepna ah ka kikholh pih ka nasep pih mi hi a, amah tawh hong kithuah ka sanggam tegel uh ahihleh pawlpiteʼ tang hi uh a, Khrisʼ min a thangsakte ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:24 Tua ahih manin note ka hong kisialhpihna uh ah a kisial khial ka suah loh nading uh le pawlpi khempeuh in a theih tel nadingun hih ka sanggamte uh limtakin na limbawl un. 
2Corinthians9:1 Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading tawh kisai-in lai kong gelh ding kisam nawn lo hi. 
2Corinthians9:1 Judea gam a om Pasian mite huh nading tawh kisai-in lai kong gelh ding kisam nawn lo hi. 
2Corinthians9:2 Noteʼ huhnopna thu ka theih khit sa hi a, Masedonia gam a pawlpite kiangah zong note ka hong kisialh pih khit sa ahi hi. “Akhaia gam a pawlpite in ni kum a kipanin huh dingin a kithawi sa uh ahi hi,” ci-in ka na gen hi. Tua banga noteʼ lawpna in amaute tampi tak tha nuamsak hi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ahi zongin note ka hong kisialhpihna uh a mawkna a suahkhak loh nadingin na huh nading uh na kiging khol un, ka hong cih mah bangin na kigin kholh theih nadingun ka sanggamte uh ka hong ma paisak hi." 
2Corinthians9:4 Tua bang hikeileh kei ka hong pai ciangin Masedonia gam a ka lawmte in hong zui kha zenzen henla, note a kiging lopi-in a om hong tuak kha leh, note ka hong muan gen mahmah sa ahih manin noteʼ maizum ding gen loh, kote bangzah takin maizum ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
2Corinthians9:5 Tua ahih manin piak dingin na kamciam sa uh huhna sumte a baih sa-in a om theih nadingin hih ka sanggamte a hong mapai ding kisam ka sa hi. Tua hileh kei ka hong tun ciangin a baih sa-in na om dinga, note in piak loh phamawh cihna lungsim tawh hi loin utna lungsim tawh a pia na hihna uh hong kilang ding hi." 
2Corinthians9:6 Note in na phawk ding uh thu panin: Khaici tawm a vawhte in tawm mah la dinga, tampi a vawhte in tampi mah la ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Pasian in piak nopna lungsim tawh a pia mite bek deih ahih manin, a kuamah peuh in na lungsim sung uh ah na ngaihsut sa zah ciat uh na pia unla, pia nuam lo pipi le sawl zawh thu bek tawh na pia kei un." 
2Corinthians9:8 Note in na kisap khempeuh uh na neih theih nading uh le midangte huh nading zong na neih thuah theih nadingun Pasian in hong pia thei hi. 
2Corinthians9:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Amah in citna tawh mizawngte pia zuahzuah a, ama migitna kip tawntung hi,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians9:10 Tua ahih manin vawh ding khaici le nek ding an hong pia Pasian in noteʼ cit piakna hangin nopsakna lian tampi na ngah theih nadingun note tungah a kisam khaici hong guanin a pungsak ding hi. 
2Corinthians9:11 Kote tungtawnin noteʼ huhna sumte a ngahna uh hangin mi tampi in Pasian a phat theih nadingin note na cit gamtat zawh tawntung nadingun Pasian in hong hausak tawntung ding hi. 
2Corinthians9:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ huhna sumte in Pasianʼ mi a cimawhteʼ dong a hu bek hi loin, Pasianʼ tungah lungdamkoh nading zong a piangsak ahi hi." 
2Corinthians9:13 Note in na up uh Jesu hangin lungdamna thu ah na cihtakna uh le amaute le midang khempeuh tungah na cit piakna hangun mi tampite in Pasianʼ min phat ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians9:14 Note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha a val a kanin hong piakna hangin amaute in note hong mu nuam mahmah in thu zong hong ngetsak ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians9:15 A manphatna a kigen zo lo Pasianʼ hong piak hih thupha hangin Pasian tungah i lungdamna ko ciat ni. 
2Corinthians10:1 Keimah Paul in Khris migitna le lungduaina tawh note kiangah kong thum hi. Kei pen note tawh ka hong om khawm laitakin a meidawi, note tawh ka om khawm loh ciangin a tapkual han in hong kigen hi." 
2Corinthians10:2 Note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong hangsan khak loh nadingin na om nadingun kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung ngaihsutna tawh nasem hi, ci-in kote a hong ngaihsunte tungah hang takin ka gamta ding hi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kote pen leitungah a teeng mi ka hi mah uh hi; ahi zongin leitung lungsim ngimna tawh galdo ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:4 Koteʼ zat galdona hiam pen leitung galhiam lelte hi lo a, galteʼ panmun phualpi a susia zo ding Pasianʼ galhiam khauhte ahi hi." 
2Corinthians10:5 Miteʼ ngaihsutna a man lote ka thal nial gawp zo uh a, Pasianʼ thu theih nading a khaktan thei nate ka susia gawp uh a, mi khempeuhʼ ngaihsutna zo gawpin Khrisʼ thu a mang dingin ka bawl uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:6 Note thumanin na cihtakna uh a kitheihtel khit ciangin a thuman lo a citak lo khempeuh gimpiak ding ka kipan ta ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:7 Note in na khatpeuh na ngaihsut uh ciangin a tungtham ah a kimu thei teng na siksan kha thei uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in Khris tawh ka kipawl hi, ci-in a kingaihsut leh, amah a kipawl ahih zah mah bangin kote zong Khris tawh a kipawl ka hihna thu uh limtakin ngaihsun tahen." 
2Corinthians10:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ siat nading hi loin noteʼ hoih nadingin Topa in kote tungah hong piak thuneihna hong nak zat lua-in ka kisialh pih hangin them khat zong ka maizum kei hi. 
2Corinthians10:9 Hih bangin lai ka hong gelhna tawh note a hong lau gawpsak nuam ka hi kei hi. 
2Corinthians10:10 Mi pawl khat in, “Paulʼ laigelhte khauhin nasia mahmah a, ahi zongin eite kiangah amah a om ciangin bangmah thupi khol lo hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:11 Tua ahih manin lai ka hong gelhna sung uh ah ka thugente uh le note kiangah ka hong pai uh ciangin ka sepna dingte uh bangmah a kilamdang het lo ding ahihna thu tua mite in teltakin thei ta uh hen. 
2Corinthians10:12 Kote ahihleh tua bangin a kiliansak mahmah mite tawh a kikimin ka kingaihsun ngam buang kei ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat ki-en kakin thupi kisa mahmah uh ahih manin mihai taktak ahi uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:13 Ahi zongin kote ka kisialh nading uh kiciangtan a, note lakah na ka hong sep nadingun Pasian in a hong sehsak sa thu sung ciang bekah ka kisial thei uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:14 Note kiangah Khris hangin lungdamna thu a hong hilh masate ka hih manun note kiangah thu ka hong hici gen uh ciangin a ciangtan khengvalin a gamta ka hi kei uh hi. 
2Corinthians10:15 Tua ahih manin Pasian in kote adingin a hong sehsak sa khengvalin midangteʼ nasepna ah a kisial ka hi kei uh a, Pasianʼ hong piak koteʼ huam sungah noteʼ upna khangin note lakah ka nasepna uh a tangzai zaw a suah nading a lamen ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:16 Tua hileh noteʼ gam banah gam dangah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh thei ding uh a, midangteʼ nasepna sa sungah zong ka kisialh ding uh kul lo ding hi." 
2Corinthians10:17 Lai Siangtho in, “Mi khat peuhpeuh a kisialh nop leh Topaʼ nasepnate bek kisialh pih hen,” na ci hi." 
2Corinthians10:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat peuhpeuh amah a kiphattawm ciangin a kipakta hi lo a, Topa in a phat ciangin a kipakta hi pan hi." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ka hai ahi phial zongin ka haina mah hong thuakpih le-uhcin ka ut hi. Hong thuakpih taktak ta un. 
2Corinthians11:2 Pasian in hong aam mahmah bangin note ka hong aam mahmah hi. Nungak le tangval nupa dingin a kigawm mah bangin khat bek ahi Khris tawh a kigawm dingin nungak siangtho bang na hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:3 Ahi zongin gulpi in ama zuau ngian tawh Eve a khem zawh bangin na lungsim uh kihei-in Khris tungah na kipiaknate uh na nusiat khak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi. 
2Corinthians11:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh koteʼ hilh ahi lo a dang Jesuʼ thu a hilh hong pai ciangin lungdam takin na sang pahpah uh a, koteʼ hong hilh Kha Siangtho le lungdamna thu tawh a kibang lo kha thu le lungdamna thu hong hilh a om ciangin na sang pahpah uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:5 Note in sawltak thupi mahmahte hi, ci-in na ngaihsut uh mite sangin themkha zong a neu zaw-in ka kingaihsun het kei hi." 
2Corinthians11:6 Thugen siamna le pilna thuk ka nei kei kha mah ding hi. Hih thu tawh kisai-in ahihleh, a tawntungin na khempeuh ah ka hong gen sa uh ahi hi." 
2Corinthians11:7 Note kiangah Pasian hangin Lungdamna Thu kong hilh ciangin note tung panin thaman bangmah ka hong ngen het kei a, note a thupi na suah ding uh ka deihna-in kei ka kiniamkhiat hi. Hih thu tawh kisai-in a sia lamin kei hong leh ngaihsut zawsop na hi uh hiam?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Note kiangah na ka sep laitakin pawlpi dangte in kei hong vak uh ahih manin, note huh nadingin midangteʼ na a kisut ahi hi." 
2Corinthians11:9 Note lakah na ka sep laitakin Masedonia gam panin a hong pai pawlpi mite in ka sapna khempeuh hong puak uh ahih manin note khat beek ka hong gimsak kei hi. A beisa hunah note ka hong gimsak khak loh mah bangin mailam hunah zong ka hong gimsak kha het kei ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:10 Khris thuman keima sungah om ahih mah bangin no Akhaia gam sungah hih ka kisialhna thu mah kizom paisuak ding hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi." 
2Corinthians11:11 Hih bangin kam ka pau ciangin note ka hong it loh man ahi hiam? Note ka hong itna hang hizaw hi. Hih thu Pasian in thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:12 Tua sawltak dangte in, “Kote in zong amauʼ sep zia mah bangin ka sem uh hi,” ci-in a kisialh theih loh nadingun tuhunin nasep thaman bangmah kong lak loh mah bangin mai lamah zong ka hong la kei ding hi." 
2Corinthians11:13 Amaute pen sawltak taktak hi loin, sawltak a kineihkhemte hi uh a, a nasepna uh ah zong zuau-in, Khrisʼ sawltak taktak a bat theih nadingun a mel kiseel ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:14 Tua pen lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Satan nangawn Pasianʼ vantungmi tawh a kibangin kibawl tawm thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:15 Tua ahih manin Satanʼ sawltakte pen thuman nasem bangin a kibawl manin lamdangsak ding hi lo hi. Hun bei ni ciangin amau gamtatna bangun thuak ngawn ding uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:16 Kuamah in mihai-in hong ngaihsun kei hen, ka ci kikkik nuam hi. Ahi zongin a hai-in hong ngaihsun na om uh leh zong tawm khat ka hong kisialh theih nadingin ka hai sapi mahin hong sang veve un." 
2Corinthians11:17 Tu-in kong gen ding thute pen Topaʼ hong sawl hi lo hi. Tu-a kisialhna kam ka hong pau ciangin mihai taktak mah bangin a pau ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians11:18 Mi tampi in hih leitung ngeinate kisialh pih thei uh ahih manin kei zong ka hong kisial ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:19 Note pil kisa mahmah na hih manun lungdam takin mihaite na sang pahpah uh hi. 
2Corinthians11:20 Note, sila-in hong bawlin, note hong thangsiahin, na haina uh nuamtak sa-in hong hih thopthopin, note hong simmawh bawlin, na paang uh a hong bengbengte na sang uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Tua bangin na om uh zumhuai mahmah hi. Kote ahihleh note tungah ka hong tua ci gamtat ngam kei uh hi. Ahi zongin a kisial ngam om ahihleh kei zong mihai bangin ka hong kisial ngam ding hi. 
2Corinthians11:22 Amaute Hebru mi ahihleh kei zong Hebru mi mah ka hi hi. Amaute Abrahamʼ suan Israel mite ahihleh kei zong Abrahamʼ suan Israel mi mah ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Amaute Khris nasem ahihleh kei zong hong hai pau mai ning. Khris nasem a hoih zaw pekpek ka hi hi. Amaute sangin na ka nak sep zaw a, satna tamvei ka thuak zaw a, sih dektakna tamvei ka tuak zaw hi." 
2Corinthians11:24 Jew miteʼ khut sungah sawm thum le kua vei satna nga vei tak ka thuak hi. 
2Corinthians11:25 Rom mite in thum vei hong sat a, khatvei suang tawh hong deng uh hi. Teembaw siatna thum vei ka tuak a, sun khat le zan khat tawntung tui tungah ka laam ngei hi." 
2Corinthians11:26 Khual ka zinzinna lamin tuikhang lauhuaina, misuamte lauhuaina, ka mipihteʼ suk ding lauhuaina, Gentail miteʼ suk ding lauhuaina, khuapi sung le gamlak ah lauhuaina, tuipi tungah lauhuaina, lawm man loteʼ hih ding lauhuaina a tuamtuamte ka phu kha hi." 
2Corinthians11:27 Nasem silbawlin ki-om tawntung a, ihmu man lo liangin zong ka om zel hi. Gilkial dangtakin ka om zel a, annek ding nei lo, giah nading om lo, puansilh ding nei loin ka om hun tampi a om hi." 
2Corinthians11:28 Tua bang haksatna a tuamtuam ka thuak banah nisimin pawlpi a tuamtuamte adingin lunghimawhin ka lunggimpih lai hi. 
2Corinthians11:29 A thaneem a om ciangin lungkhampihin kei zong ka thaneem a, mawhna ah a puk kha a om ciangin dahin ka lunggimpih hi." 
2Corinthians11:30 Ka kisialh leh zong ka ginat lohna hong kilangsak nate hangin ka kisial bek hi. 
2Corinthians11:31 Topa Jesuʼ Pa Pasian in thupha ngah tawntung tahen. Amah in ka zuau het loh lamtak a hong thei hi. 
2Corinthians11:32 Damaskas khuapi sungah ka om laitakin Kumpi Aretas khutnuai-a gam ukpa in kei hong mat theih nadingin Damaskas khuakulh kongpi cingsak a," 
2Corinthians11:33 ahi zongin kulh tawlet vang panin hong kikhai khia suk ahih manin ama khut sung panin ka suakta hi. 
2Corinthians12:1 Bangmah phattuam napi a om khol lo ahi zongin ka kisialsial lai ding hi. Tu-in Topa in maang hong muhsakna le ka muhte kong gen ding hi. 
2Corinthians12:2 Tu ma kum sawm le kum li hun lai-in vantung a dawl tungnung pen ah Khristian khat kila to hi. A pumpi taktak hiam, maang mu ahi hiam ka thei kei hi. Pasian in thei hi." 
2Corinthians12:3 Tua mipa pen Paradais ah a om ahi hi. A pumpi taktak tawh ahi hiam, maang mu ahi hiam ka thei kei a, Pasian in thei hi." 
2Corinthians12:4 Mite kiangah genkhiat sawn dingin a kiphal lo a lamdang mahmah thu a za hi. 
2Corinthians12:5 Tua bang thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hi napi-in ka kisialh pih kei hi. Kei a gina lo hi napi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hi napi-in ka kisialh pih kei hi. Kei a gina lo hi napi ama minthan nadingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu ka kisialh pih bek hi. 
2Corinthians12:6 Hih ka muh thu pen thuman ahih manin a kisialh pih hi taleng zong mihai ka hi kei hi. Ahi zongin mite in keima sepna le keima genna a muh a zak banah a valin hong thupi ngaihsut khak ding uh ut lo ka hih manin hih thu ka kisialh pih nuam kei hi. 
2Corinthians12:7 Ahi zongin hih a lamdang na tampite ka muhna hangin kisialin ka kisaktheih khak loh nadingin Satanʼ sawltak bangin na a sem, keima pumpi sungah natna khat hong kipia ahih manin ka kisaktheih luat loh nadingin a hong kham hi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Tua natna tawh ka kipelh theih nadingin Topa kiangah thum vei tak thu ka ngen hi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Ahi zongin Topa in kei kiangah, “Na tha a nem ciangin keima vangliatna hat mahmah ahih manin nangma kisapna pen keima hehpihna hi bek hi,” ci-in hong dawng hi. Tua ahih manin keima sungah Khris vangliatna hong om theih nadingin lungdam takin ka thaneemna ka kisialh pih semsem hi." 
2Corinthians12:10 Kei ka thaneem mahmah laitakin a thahat mahmah suak ka hih manin Khris hangin ka thaneemna, simmawh ka thuakna, haksatna, bawlsiatna le lungkhamna ka thuaknate tawh ka lung a kim mahmah hi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Note in kei a hong pakta ding hi napi-in hong pakta lo na hih manun noteʼ bawlin mihai bangin kisialin ka gamta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen bangmah pi ka hih loh hangin sawltak thupi mahmah in na ngaihsutte uh sangin them khat zong ka neu zaw tuan het kei hi. 
2Corinthians12:12 Sawltak man taktak ka hihna lim a kilangsak nate, note lakah lungduai takin hong kisem a, lim, nalamdang le na a tuamtuamte note lakah hong kibawl hi." 
2Corinthians12:13 Note lakah na ka sepna hangin huhna bangmah kong nget loh cih sim loh, pawlpi dangte sangin kong hamsiatsak zawkna bangmah om het lo hi. Tua bangin note kiang panin bangmah kong nget lohna hangin midang tawh hong kibangsak lo suak ka hih manin, tua khialhna hong maisak ta un." 
2Corinthians12:14 Tu-in kong hawh nading pen a thum vei nading hi ta a, noteʼ gim nadingin bangmah ka hong ngen het kei ding hi. Keima deih pen noteʼ sum le paite hi loin note mahmah na hi uh hi. A taktakin ci lehang, tate in nu le pate a huh ding hi lo a, nu le pate in tate a huh ding hizaw hi." 
2Corinthians12:15 Note kong huh theih nadingin lungdam takin ka neih khempeuh kong piak nop banah keima pumpi mahmah zong ka hong kipia nuam hi. Tua zah takin ka hong itna pen it lohna tengin hong nei zawsop ding na hi uh hiam? 
2Corinthians12:16 Sumlepai vai-in note them khat zong ka hong gimsak het lohna na theih sa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin mi pawl khatte in, kei pen ngian zangin khemna tawh a lamdang khat ah sum tam zaw ka ngah nading a vaihawmin hong gen uh hi." 
2Corinthians12:17 Note kiangah ka hong paisak mite tungtawnin note kiang panin keima hamphat nading bang la ka hi hiam? 
2Corinthians12:18 Note kiangah Titus a hong pai nading ka hahsawl a, amah tawh a kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh zong ka hong paisak hi. Titus in nuamtak sa-in note tungah bang hong ngen zenzen ahi hiam? Kote in lungsim kibangin na semin ka kalsuanna zia uh zong a kibang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Note kiangah Titus a hong pai nading ka hahsawl a, amah tawh a kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh zong ka hong paisak hi. Titus in nuamtak sa-in note tungah bang hong ngen zenzen ahi hiam? Kote in lungsim kibangin na semin ka kalsuanna zia uh zong a kibang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Note mai ah ka mawhna uh a kiphelphel bang khatin na hong ngaihsut khak uh leh tua bang hi lo hi. Lawmte aw, ka hihna khempeuh uh noteʼ phattuam nading ka deihna uh tawh Khris in koteʼ gen ding a hong deih bangin Pasianʼ mai ah thu genin nasem ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians12:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin noteʼ om zia ding ka deih bangin na om loh khak ding uh le note in keima maisuah na muhnop zia bangun na hong muh loh khak ding uh ka lunghimawh hi. Note lakah kitotna, hazatna, hehna, huaihamna, mi zahpihna, mi gensiatna, kiphatsakna le buaina a om khak ding ka lunghimawh hi." 
2Corinthians12:21 Note kiangah ka hong tun ciangin a beisa hunah note tampi tak thaangtatin, numei tawh mawhna, hukna, lannate hangin na khialhnate uh na kisik loh manun keimah dahin kapin, noteʼ muhna ah ka Pasian in kei hong maizumsak khak ding ka lunghimawh mahmah hi." 
2Corinthians13:1 Tu-a ka hong pai nading pen a thum veina hi ta hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Mawhna a bawl khat peuhpeuh a thei mi nih le thum a om ciang bekin a mawh hi, ci-in kingaihsun pan ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin tua bangin ka hong sem ding hi." 
2Corinthians13:2 A beisa hunah mawhna a gamtate le a dangte khempeuh kiangah, a nih veina ka hong hawh lai-in keima kam tawh kong gen bangin tu-in zong lai tawh ka hong gelh nop thu in: Ka hong paikik ciangin kuamah hong zah nawn lo ding ka hih manin gim na thuak pelmawh ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:3 Khris in keima tungtawnin thu hong gen taktak mah ahi hiam, ci-in theihtelna na deih uh mah bangin tu-in na deihdeih uh na thei ta ding uh hi. Note tungah amah in na hong sep ciangin hong dam hih het loin khauh takin hong hih ding hi." 
2Corinthians13:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh thaneemna hangin singlamteh tungah a kikhai ahi zongin a hinkikna pen Pasianʼ vangliatna hang ahi hi. Amah tawh ka kipawl manun kote zong ka tha uh nem a, ahi zongin note tungah na ka hong sep uh ciangin Pasianʼ vangliatna zangin ka hong sem khawm ding uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:5 Thu um taktak mah ihi hiam, ci-in nomau mahmah ki-entel un. Na ki-ettelna uh ah a cingtaak lo na hih kei nak-uh leh note sungah Jesu Khris om ahih thu thei un." 
2Corinthians13:6 Na ki-ettel uh ciangin a cingtaak mi hikim dingin ka hong lamen hi. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kote in ka nasepna uh a tangtun zo lo tawh ka kibang kha uh ahi zongin, koteʼ nasepna a tangtun ding deih hi lo zaw-in, note gamta khial kha loin a manin na gamtat nading uh ka deihna uh tawh thu ka hong ngetsak zaw uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh kote pen thuman nasepna a khaktan thei dingte hi loin a khan nadingin nasemte ka hi uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:9 Koteʼ deih bulpi pen note na cingtaak theih nading uh ahih manin noteʼ thahat laitakin kote ka thaneemna uh zong ka nuam veve uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:10 Noteʼ siat nading hi loin noteʼ phattuam nadingin Topa in kei tungah a hong piak thuneihna pen note tungah khauh takin ka hong zat khak loh nadingin lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians13:11 Sanggamte aw, tu-in mangpha na man un. Na om zia uh na kipuahpha-in ka hong thugente na zui unla, khatlekhat kithutuak kilem takin na om un. Itna le kilemna a pia thei Pasian in note hong ompih tahen." 
2Corinthians13:12 Unau ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kihopihin na kinam un. 
2Corinthians13:13 Hih lai-a om Pasianʼ mite khempeuh in note hong hopih uh hi. 
2Corinthians13:14 Topa Jesu Khris hong hehpihna thupha le Pasianʼ hong itna le Kha Siangtho tawh kikholh theihna, note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen." 
Galatians1:1 Mihingteʼ hong sehna le hong sawlna tawh sawltak na a sem hi loin, Jesu Khris le sihna panin tua Jesu a thosakkik Pasianʼ hong sawlna tawh sawltak na a sem keimah Paul in Galati gam a om pawlpi tuamtuamte tungah lai ka hong khak hi." 
Galatians1:2 Kei tawh a om khawm i Khristian pihte in zong note hong hopih uh hi. 
Galatians1:3 Eiteʼ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note khempeuh tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Galatians1:4 A siahuai tu hunsung panin eite a hong suahtaksak nadingin eiteʼ Pa Pasianʼ deihna tawh kizui-in i mawhna hangin tua Jesu Khris a mahmah a hong kipiatawm ahi hi. 
Galatians1:5 Pasianʼ min thang tawntung tahen! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 A hong hehpihna tawh Khris hangin note a hong sam Pasian nusiakik pakin lungdamna thudang khat na sang malam na hih manun lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. 
Galatians1:7 A taktakin ci lehang lungdamna thu a dang a om hi lo a, mi pawl khatte in noteʼ lungsim hong toknawi-in, Khris hanga lungdamna thu hei-in thudang tawh laih nuam uh ahih manin, tua amauʼ deih thu pen lungdamna thu a cihsak mawkmawk ka hi hi." 
Galatians1:8 Note tungah ka hong hilh sa uh lungdamna thu tawh a kilehngatin, kote a kipan vantungmi dongin thudang a hong hilh a om leh tua a hong hilh mipa hell khuk sungah tung tahen!" 
Galatians1:9 Ka hong gen ngeisa mah bangin kong genkikin ah: Noteʼ san sa lungdamna thu tawh a kilehngatin thudang a hong hilh mi peuhpeuh hell khuk sung tung tahen! 
Galatians1:10 Hih bangin thu ka gen ciangin miteʼ hong pahtak theih nading a zong tawh kibang na hong sa uh hiam? Miteʼ pahtak ding a ut ka hi kei a, Pasianʼ hong pahtak ding a hanciam ka hi hi. Mihingteʼ hong pahtak theih nadingin a gamta hi zenzen leng, Khrisʼ nasem ka hi kei ding hi." 
Galatians1:11 Sanggamte aw, keima hilh lungdamna thu pen mihingte tung panin a hong kipan ahih lohna thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi." 
Galatians1:12 Mi khatpeuh tung panin ka ngah hi lo a, mi khatpeuh in hong hilh zong hi lo hi. Jesu Khris in kei tungah a hong lahna hang bekin hih thu a thei ka hi hi."

Galatians1:14 le ka khangualte lakah Jew biakna lamah a makai pen ka hihna thu le ka pu ka pate uh tang ngeinate a nak kin mahmah ka hihna a kipanin ka pianzia ngeisate khempeuh na zak sa na theih sa uh ahi hi.

Galatians2:2 Pasianʼ hong sawlna tawh tua lai ah a pai ka hi hi. Ka nasepnate a mawkna a suahkhak ding ut lo ka hih manin makai lian a kineite tawh a tuamin kimuhna khat ka nei a, Gentail mite lakah ka hilh lungdamna thute amaute kiangah gentelna khat ka nei hi."

Galatians2:5 Lungdamna thuman taktak pelhem het loin note adingin a kipsuak theih nadingin amauteʼ deihna them khat zong ka zui het kei uh hi. 
Galatians2:6 Jerusalem khua-a om makai lian a kinei mite in keiʼ nasepna tawh kisai thu ah bangmah gen thuah ding nei lo uh hi. (Pasian in maitang zahtak tuam nei tuan lo ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ngam ka hi hi.) 
Galatians2:7 Amaute in gen thuah ding a neih gen loh, Jew mite tungah lungdamna thu hilh ding nasep, Pasian in Peter tungah a piak mah bangin, Gentail mite tungah lungdamna thu hilh nading nasep, Pasian in kei tungah a hong piakna thu a mu zaw uh hi." 
Galatians2:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mite lakah sawltak nasep a sem dingin Peter a koih mah bangin Gentail mite lakah sawltak nasep a sem dingin Pasian in kei a hong koih hi. 
Galatians2:9 Makai a kinei James, Peter le Johan-te in Gentail mite lakah nasem dingin Pasian in kei hong sehna thu thei uh ahih manin, Pasian sungah nasem khawm khat ihi hi, cih hong lahna uh limin kei le Barnabas tawh khut kiletna hong bawl uh hi. Kei le Barnabas in Gentail mite lakah na semin amaute in Jew mite lakah na a sep nading uh thukimna ka nei uh hi." 
Galatians2:9 Makai a kinei James, Peter le Johan-te in Gentail mite lakah nasem dingin Pasian in kei hong sehna thu thei uh ahih manin, Pasian sungah nasem khawm khat ihi hi, cih hong lahna uh limin kei le Barnabas tawh khut kiletna hong bawl uh hi. Kei le Barnabas in Gentail mite lakah na semin amaute in Jew mite lakah na a sep nading uh thukimna ka nei uh hi." 
Galatians2:10 Kote in amaute lakah a om mizawngte ka phawk ding uh hong kal bek a, tua lah kei zong ngaihsut penin ka neihsa thu mah ahi hi." 
Galatians2:11 Antiok khua ah Peter hong hawh sungin a gamtat khialhna hangin thu up pih mite lak mahah amah ka taii hi. 
Galatians2:12 James in a hong sawl mi pawl khatte, tua khua ah a hong tun ma-in Peter in thu um Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm napi-in, Gentail mite vun at ding hi, a ci mite a kihtakna hangin tua mite hong tun ciangin Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm ngam nawn loin hong kihem khia hi." 
Galatians2:12 James in a hong sawl mi pawl khatte, tua khua ah a hong tun ma-in Peter in thu um Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm napi-in, Gentail mite vun at ding hi, a ci mite a kihtakna hangin tua mite hong tun ciangin Gentail mite tawh an nekhawm ngam nawn loin hong kihem khia hi." 
Galatians2:13 Thu um Jew midangte zong hong meidawi suah a, amauteʼ gamtatna hangin Barnabas nangawn meidawi-in amaute bangin hong gamta hi." 
Galatians2:14 Lungdamna thu tawh kizui-in a mantakin gamta lo uh hi, ci-in ka muh ciangin amaute khempeuhʼ zakin Peter kiangah, “Nang pen Jew mi hi napi-in Jew mi bangin gamta loin Gentail mite bangin a gamta khin sa na hi hi. Tua bangin a gamta khin sa hi napi-in bang hangin tu-in Gentail mite, Jew mite bangin a gamtat nadingun na gamtatna tawh lakkik na hi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Galatians2:15 A taktakin ci lehang kote pen ka pian ka pat-un Jew mi ka hi uh a, “Mawhnei Gentail mi,” ka cih pawlte uh ka hi kei uh hi." 
Galatians2:16 Ahi zongin Jesu Khris upna hang bek tawh Pasian tawh kipawl theihna kingahin, Thukham zuihna hang tawh kingah ngei lo hi, ci-in ka thei uh hi. Kote mahmah in zong, Khris hangin Pasian tawh ka kipawl theih nadingun Jesu Khris ka um uh a, Thukham deihna ka zuihna hang uh tawh hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Thukham zuihna hang tawh kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah zo lo hi." 
Galatians2:17 Tua ahihleh Khris ka upna hangun Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading ka hanciam uh ciangin mimawh mah ka hihna uh ka thei uh hi. Tua ahihleh Khris pen mawhna a piangsak a suak ding hiam? Suak het lo ding hi. 
Galatians2:18 Thukham zuihna hang hi lo hi, ci-in ka phiat sa uh thu tu-in pankik leuleu leng kei mahmah Thukham khial pa ka suakkik zel ding hi." 
Galatians2:19 Thukham tawh kisai-in ahihleh Pasian adingin ka nuntak theih nadingin tua Thukham mah in kei hong that khin ahih manin Thukham tawh kisai thu ah misi bang ka hi hi. Singlamteh tungah Khris a kithah lai-in kei zong amah tawh a si khawm ka hi hi. 
Galatians2:20 Tua ahih manin tu hun a ka nuntakna zia pen kei hang hi nawn loin ka sungah a hong om Khris hang ahi hi. Tua hi a, keimah hong itin, keima adingin a nuntakna a hong pia Pasianʼ Tapa ka muanna tawh tu laitakin a nungta ka hi hi." 
Galatians2:21 Hih bang ka gen ciangin Pasianʼ hehpihna thupha ka deih lohna ahi kei a, Thukham zuih zawhna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna om hileh, singlamteh tungah Khris sihna a mawkna hi lel ding hi, a ci nuam ka hizaw hi." 
Galatians3:1 Galati mihaite aw, singlamteh tungah Jesu Khris a sihna thu teltakin na theih sa uh ahih manin kuaʼ khem sa-in hici thei mawk na hi uh hiam?" 
Galatians3:2 Thukham na zuihna hangun Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho ngah na hi uh hiam, ahih kei leh lungdamna thu za-in na upna hang uh hizaw ahi hiam?" 
Galatians3:3 Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho tawh na pat khit uh ciangin nomauʼ thatang hat thu tawh khup a sawm ding zahin hici hai lawmlawm na hi uh hiam? 
Galatians3:4 A beisa huna na tuah sa uh thute khempeuh a mawkna suak khin zen ding ahi hiam? Tawm khat beek phattuamna hong pia thei tei dingin ka um hi. 
Galatians3:5 Note in Thukham na zuihna hangun Pasian in Kha Siangtho hong pia-in nalamdang hong bawl ahi hiam, ahih kei leh lungdamna thu za-in na upna hang uh hizaw ahi hiam?" 
Galatians3:6 Abraham tunga thupiang ngaihsun dih un. Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in amah tawh a kipawl thei dingin mihoihin a sang hi,” na ci hi." 
Galatians3:7 Tua ahih manin Abrahamʼ suanlekhak a man taktak i cihte pen upna a nei mite ahihna thu na theih ding uh ahi hi. 
Galatians3:8 Jew mite mah bangin Gentail mite in zong a upna uh hangin amah tawh a kipawl thei dingin Pasian in a bawl nading thu, Lai Siangtho in na ma-theih hi. Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in Abraham tungah Lungdamna Thuthak na ma hilh khol a, “Pasian in leitung mi khempeuh thupha a piak nadingin nangmah hong zang ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Galatians3:9 Abraham in a up manin Pasian in thupha a piak mah bangin Pasian a um midang khempeuh in zong thupha a ngah ahi uh hi. 
Galatians3:10 Hih thu tawh kisai-in Lai Siangtho in, “Thukham laibu sunga kigelh khempeuh a vekpi-in a zui khin tawntung lote in Pasianʼ samsiatna thuak hi,” ci ahih manin Thukham a suangte pen samsiatna a ngah mite ahi uh hi." 
Galatians3:11 Tu-in Lai Siangtho in, “Upna hangin Pasian tawh a kipawl thei mite bek nungta ding hi,” na ci ahih manin Thukham hangin kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah lohna thu teltakin hong kilang hi." 
Galatians3:12 Lai Siangtho in, “Thukhamʼ deih bangin a gamta zote nungta ding hi,” na ci ahih manin Thukham zuihna le upna thu na kimemat kha lo hi." 
Galatians3:13 Lai Siangtho in, “Sing tungah a kikhai mi peuhmah Pasianʼ samsiat mi ahi hi,” na ci ahih manin eite adingin Khris in samsiatna a thuak manin Thukham zuih lahna hangin samsiatna panin eite a hong tan khia ahi hi." 
Galatians3:14 Khris in eite a hong tatna pen, eite in i upna hangin Pasian in a hong ciam Kha Siangtho ngahin, Pasian in Abraham tungah a ciam thuphate zong, Jesu Khris hangin Gentail mite tungah a kipiak theih nading a deihna ahi hi." 
Galatians3:15 Khris sungah sanggamte aw, i theihtheih ngei gentehna khat ka hong zang ding hi. Mi nih in thu khatpeuh ah thukimna nei-in letmat a thuh khit uh ciangin kuamah in tua thukimna nung phiat thei lo, zong behlap thei lo hi." 
Galatians3:16 Tu-in Pasian in Abraham le ama suan pa tungah thuciamna nei hi. Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna ah, mi tampi a cihnopna ahi, “Na suan le na khakte,” cih kammal na zang lo a, mi khat bek ahi Khris a cih nopna-in, “Na suan pa,” ci-in na gen hi." 
Galatians3:17 Tu-in ka hong gen nop thu in: Pasian in Abraham tawh thuciamna bawl a, tua a thuciamna peksat sawm lo hi. Tua ahih manin tua thuciamna a kibawl zawh kum za li le kum sawm thum khit ciangin a kinung piak Thukham in tua thuciamna pek satin phiat thei lo ding hi." 
Galatians3:18 Pasianʼ hong piakkhong pen Thukham zuihna hang tawh a kingah hi mawk lehpiak ding hong ciamna hangin a kingah hi nawn lo ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah letsong a piakna pen a thuciamnasa tawh kizui-in a piak ahi hi. 
Galatians3:19 Tua ahihleh Thukham bangin a kimang ding ahi hiam? Khialhna cih bang ahi hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin thuciamna banah hong kipia thuah hi a, thuciam a kipiakna, Abrahamʼ suan paʼ hun ciang dong bek a kimang dingin a kingaihsun ahi hi. Mihingte tungah Thukham hong kipiak lai-in vantungmi hong kisawl sawn a, mihing ahi Moses tungah hong kipia sawn hi." 
Galatians3:20 Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah thuciamna a bawl laitakin kuamah sawl sawn nei loin amah bek in a piak ahi hi. 
Galatians3:21 Tua ahihleh Thukham le Pasianʼ thuciamnate a kilehngat ahi uh hiam? Hi het lo hi. Mihingte tungah hong kipia Thukham in nuntakna taktak hong pia thei hileh tua Thukham zuihna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah ding uh hi. 
Galatians3:22 Ahi zongin Jesu Khris a um mite tungah a upna hangun Pasianʼ thuciam a kipiak theih nadingin Lai Siangtho in, “Mawhna khutnuai ah leitung mi khempeuh a om hi,” na ci hi." 
Galatians3:23 Tua ahih manin upna thu hong tun ma hun sungteng, upna thu a kilahkhiat ding ngakna-in Thukham in eite a hong hencip phot ahi hi." 
Galatians3:24 Tua hi a, i upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna i ngah nadingin Khris a hong pai hun ciang dong, Thukham in eite a hong uk ahi hi." 
Galatians3:25 Tu-in ahihleh upna hun hi ta ahih manin Thukham in eite hong uk thei nawn lo hi. 
Galatians3:26 Khris Jesu tawh na kipawl manun note khempeuh Pasianʼ tate na suah theihna uh pen na upna hang uh ahi hi. 
Galatians3:27 Khris sungah a kiphum note in Khrisʼ pianzia a nei khinta na hi uh hi. 
Galatians3:28 Tua ahih manin Jew mi le Gentail mi, sila le sila ahi lo, numei le pasal cih bangin kideidanna om nawn lo a, note khempeuh Khris tawh na kipawlna hangun pawl khat hi-in, a kibang kim na hi uh hi." 
Galatians3:29 Khris tawh na kipawl nak uh leh Abrahamʼ suante na hi ta uh a, Pasianʼ hong khap thute a ngah ding na hi uh hi." 
Galatians4:1 Ahi zongin gamhluah ding tapa in a paʼ neihsa khempeuh a luah ding hi napi-in a neu lai hun sungteng silate mah bangin bangmah thu nei lo hi. 
Galatians4:2 A pa in ama gamhluah ding teng a piak ma, a neu lai hun sungteng, midang in tua naupang kemin a vai ding a hawmsak hi." 
Galatians4:3 Tua mah bangin eite zong kha thu ah i neu lai hun sungteng huihlak a uk vangneiteʼ khutnuai ah a om ihi hi. 
Galatians4:4 Ahi zongin a hun a cin ciangin eite khempeuh Pasianʼ tate i suah theih nadingin Thukham nuai ah a om mite a hong tan khia dingin Pasian in a Tapa hong paisak a, tua Tapa pen leitung ngeina bangin numei sung panin hong suakin, Jew Thukham sungah hong nungta hi." 
Galatians4:5  
Galatians4:6 Note pen ama tate na hihna uh a hong lah nadingin Pasian in ama Tapaʼ Kha Siangtho, eite sungah hong tumsak a, tua Kha Siangtho in Pasian pen, “Pa aw, pa aw,” hong cisak hi." 
Galatians4:7 Tua ahih manin note pen sila hi nawn loin Pasianʼ tate na hih manun Pasian in ama tate adingin a koih khempeuh, note tungah hong pia ding hi." 
Galatians4:8 A beisa hunah Pasian thei lo na hih manun Pasian ahi lo vangliatna a neiteʼ sila-in na om uh hi. 
Galatians4:9 Ahi zongin note in tu-in Pasian meltheih khinin, tua ahih kei leh Pasian in note hong meltheih khinta ahih manin, a bang hangin bangmah a hih zo lo, a gina lo tua bangte lamah kiheikik nuam a, sila va suakkik nuam na hi uh hiam?" 
Galatians4:10 Note in nite, khate, hunte, kumte a kipan pawi tuamtuamte limtakin tan ding na hah ngaihsut mahmah uh hi." 
Galatians4:11 Tua ahih manin note adingin ka nasepna khempeuh a mawkna a suahkhak ding ka hong lunghihmawhsak mahmah hi. 
Galatians4:12 Sanggamte aw, Thukham thu tawh kisai-in noteʼ gamtat bangin ka hong gamtat mah bangin keiʼ gamtat mah bangin na hong gamtat ding uh kong thum hi. A beisa hunah kei tungah na hong gamta khial nai kei uh hi." 
Galatians4:13 Note kiangah lungdamna thu hilh ding ka hong kipatna pen ka pumpi cidam lohna hang ahihna thu na theih sa uh ahi hi. 
Galatians4:14 Ka pumpi cidam lohna pen note adingin thu haksapi hi napi-in kei na hong simmawh bawl tuan kei uh a, zong na hong nolh tuan kei uh hi. Vantung panin a hong pai vantungmi zin do bang le Khris Jesu mahmah zin a do bangin na hong limbawl uh hi." 
Galatians4:15 Tua hun laitakin lungdam mahmah napi-in tu-in a bangci ta na hi uh hiam? Ahi thei khat hileh, tua hunin na mittang nangawn uh khel khia-in kei a hong pia nuamte na hihna uh teltakin ka thei hi." 
Galatians4:16 Note kiangah thuman ka hong genna hangin kei a hong galbawl na hi uh hiam? 
Galatians4:17 Tua mi pawl khatte in note hong engin hong kin mahmah uh hi; ahi zongin amauteʼ ngimna a hoih hi khol lo hi. Amauteʼ hong kin bangin note in zong amaute kinin na kipawl theih nadingun kei kiang panin note a hong khen khia nuam ahi lel uh hi. 
Galatians4:18 Ngimna hoih nei ahih nak uh leh noteʼ phattuam nading kinna pen note tawh ka hong om khawm sung bek hi loin, a tawntungin kin ding a hoih ahi hi." 
Galatians4:19 Taneute aw, note in Khrisʼ pianzia bang na neih dong uh, naupaii nupi in ta a suah ding a gimpih bangin note ka hong lunggimpih ding hi." 
Galatians4:20 Note in ka maisuah na muh theih nadingun hi thei hileh note tawh ka om khawm nuam mahmah hi. Tu-in note ka hong lunghimawh mahmah hi. 
Galatians4:21 Thukham nuai ah a om nuam mite aw, Thukham in a gen thu a tel taktak mah na hi uh hiam?" 
Galatians4:22 Lai Siangtho sungah hih bangin na kigelh hi: Abraham in tapa nih nei a, khat pen a ziʼ silanu tawh a neih a tapa hi a, a khat pen a zi tawh a neih a tapa ahi hi." 
Galatians4:23 Silanu tawh a neih a tapa pen leitung ngeina bangin a suak mawkmawk hi a, ahi zongin a zi tawh a neih a tapa pen Pasianʼ thuciamna tawh kizui-in a suak ahi hi." 
Galatians4:24 Hihte pen gentehna lim ahi hi. Hih nupi nihte pen thuciamna nam nih a lahna ahi hi. Sila a suak tate a hing khia nu Hagar hi a, Sinai Mual tunga kipia thuciamna a lahnopna ahi hi." 
Galatians4:25 Arabia gam a om Sinai Mual lim ahi Hagar pen tu laitakin a mite tawh salin a om Jerusalem khuapi a cihnopna ahi hi. 
Galatians4:26 Ahi zongin vantung Jerusalem pen sal hi lo a, eiteʼ pianna nu ahi hi." 
Galatians4:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A ciing nupi aw, lungdam in. Nausuah natna a thei ngei lo nupi aw, nuamin kiko in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pasal in a nusiat nupi in a pasal tawh a om tawntung nupi sangin ta hau zaw ding hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
Galatians4:28 Tu-in eite zong, Isaac mah bangin Pasianʼ thuciamna hangin a piang tate ihi hi." 
Galatians4:29 Tua hun laitakin leitung ngeina bangin a piang mawkmawk tapa in Pasian Kha Siangtho hangin a piang tapa a bawlsiat mah bangin, tuhunin zong eite hong kibawlsia hi." 
Galatians4:30 Ahi zongin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Sila numeiʼ tapa in sila ahi lo numeiʼ tapa tawh gamhluah khawm thei lo ding ahih manin, sila numei le a tapa hawl khia in,” na kici hi." 
Galatians4:31 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, eite pen sila numeiʼ tate ihi kei a, sila ahi lo numeiʼ tate ihi hi." 
Galatians5:1 Khris in eite hong khahkhiat khitna hangin mi suaktate hi khinta ihih manin tua suahtakna thu ah kipin om unla, sila va suakkik nawn kei un." 
Galatians5:2 Tu-in keimah Paul in kong gen ding thu limtakin na ngai un: Note in vun-atna na zat uh leh note adingin Khrisʼ nasepna a kimanna a om het lo ahi hi. 
Galatians5:3 Vun-atna a zang mi khempeuh in Thukham dang khempeuh zong a vekpi-in a zuih ding a tavuan ahihna thu teltakin phawk ta uh hen. 
Galatians5:4 Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theih nading a hanciamte pen Khris tawh a kikhen na hi uh a, Pasianʼ hehpihna in note hong huam thei lo hi." 
Galatians5:5 Kote ahihleh Pasian in amah tawh a kipawl thei dingin hong bawl ding hi, ci-in lamenin, koteʼ upna hangin Kha Siangthoʼ vangliatna tawh hong piang ding hi, ci-in a om ka hi uh hi." 
Galatians5:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jesu Khris tawh i kipawl ciangin vun atna le vun at lohna a thupi tuan om lo a, Khris i upna hangin midangte i itna a thupi hi bek hi." 
Galatians5:7 A beisa hunah hoihtakin a gamtate na hi uh hi. Tu-in a manin na gamtat loh nadingun kua in lam hong pialsakin Pasianʼ thu hong mang losak ahi hiam? 
Galatians5:8 Note a hong sam Pasian in note na pial nadingun hong zol khia het lo ding hi. 
Galatians5:9 Silngo themno khat in annel lom buppi tawk thei hi, na kici hi." 
Galatians5:10 Eite, Topa tawh a kipawl khawmte ihih manin kei tawh a kilamdangin note in bangmah ngaihsut tuam nei het lo ding, ci-in kong muang a, a kua a kua hitaleh note hong nawngkaisakte pen Pasian in gim pia ding hi, ci-in ka um hi." 
Galatians5:11 Sanggamte aw, vun-atna kisam hi, ci-in a hilh lai hi leng, bang hangin bawlsiatna thuak zenzen ding ka hi hiam? Tua bangin thu a hilh hi leng, singlamteh tunga Khrisʼ sihna thu ka hilhna hangin bangmah buaina a om kei ding hi." 
Galatians5:12 No hong lungkhamsak mite in a maban uh nawtsuak uh henla, a ut leh a pasal na teng nangawn uh at khia mangkhin vet uh hen!" 
Galatians5:13 Sanggamte aw, note na hih uh leh a suakta mi ahi dingin Pasian in a hong sap ahi hi. Ahi zongin tua suahtakna pen na pumpi uh ut bangbangin gamtat theih nadingin paulam zonna-in nei kei unla, itna tawh khatlekhat kikhualna-in zang zaw un." 
Galatians5:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Thukham khempeuh thu khatin kigawm thei a, “Nangmah na ki-it bangin na veengte na it in,” cihna tawh kitomlak thei hi." 
Galatians5:15 Ahi zongin note pen gamsa bangin khatlekhat kiphuai-in kipet kha le-uhcin na vekpi-un na siatlawh khak ding uh lauhuai ahih manin hoihtakin na kidawm un. 
Galatians5:16 Note kiangah kong gen thu in: Kha Siangthoʼ hong sawlna bangin gamta unla, na pumpi uh utna bangin gamta kei un." 
Galatians5:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh eiʼ pumpi ut bangin gamta lehang Kha Siangthoʼ deihna tawh na kituak lo a, Kha Siangthoʼ deihna bangin gamta lehang eiʼ pumpi deihna tawh na kituak lo zel ahih manin hih nih tegel a kilangpang niloh na hi a, noteʼ ut bangin a gamta thei lo na hi uh hi." 
Galatians5:18 Kha Siangthoʼ deihna bangin na gamtat uh leh Thukham khutnuai ah na om nawn kei uh hi. 
Galatians5:19 Tu-in mihing pianzia hong kitel a, tuate pen: Numei tawh mawhna, thangtatna, lan luat man a khialhna," 
Galatians5:20 milim biakna, mi bumna, kilangbawlna, kitotna, hazatna, hehna, huaihamna, kikhenna, pawl tuam lungsim neihna," 
Galatians5:21 enna, zukhamna le biakna pawi ah zukhamna a kipan a dangdangte ahi hi. A beisa hunah ka hong hilhkholh sa bangin tu-in ka hong genkikin ah: Hih bangin a gamta mite pen Pasianʼ Ukna sungah om kha het lo ding hi." 
Galatians5:22 Ahi zongin Kha Siangthoʼ sawlna bangin gamtatnate pen: Itna, lungdamna, lungnopna, lungduaina, migitna, hoihna, cihtakna," 
Galatians5:23 dikna le pumpi ki-uk zawhna hi a, hih bangin a gamta mite, Thukham in bangmah cih thei lo hi." 
Galatians5:24 Tua hi a, Jesu Khris a zui mite in a leitung lungsim pianzia uh le a leitung lungsim deihna khempeuh uh a phiat khit sa ahi hi." 
Galatians5:25 Kha Siangtho in eite hong nungtasak khinta ahih manin ama hong sawlna bangin eite a nungta ding ihi hi. 
Galatians5:26 Kuamah kiphasak loin, khatlekhat kiphin loin, kuamah i kihaza kei ding hi." 
Galatians6:1 Sanggamte aw, mi khatpeuh a gamta khial a om ciangin, Kha Siangthoʼ deihna bangin a nungta note in tua a khial pa a manin a gamtatkik theih nadingin thunem zangin na huh un. Note in zong amah bangin ze-etna na tuah khak loh nadingun na kikem un." 
Galatians6:2 Thuhaksa na tuah uh ciangin khatlekhat na kihuh un. Tua hileh Khrisʼ thukham a zui na hi uh hi. 
Galatians6:3 Mi khatpeuh, bangmah hi lo napi-in amah a kithupi ngaihsut mawkmawk leh amah le amah a kikhem ahi hi." 
Galatians6:4 A kuamah peuh in ama gamtatna ciat en tel henla, kisialh nading a om leh ama gamtatna siksanin kisial henla, midangte tawh ki-ettehin kisial kei hen." 
Galatians6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna bang ciatin a ngah ding ihi hi. 
Galatians6:6 Pasian thu hilhna a za mipa in ama neih na hoihte khempeuh zong, amah a hilh pa tawh zangkhawm tahen." 
Galatians6:7 Pasian a kikhem zo dingin ngaihsun kha kei un. Mi khempeuh in ama vawh nam khaici mah ngahkik ding hi. 
Galatians6:8 Mi khatpeuh in ama leitung pumpi deihna khaici a vawh leh sihna ngah dinga, Kha Siangtho deihna khaici a vawh leh Kha Siangtho tung panin nuntak tawntungna ngah ding hi." 
Galatians6:9 Tua ahih manin na hoih sep ding cimtak kei ni. Lungkia loin i sep nakleh a hun ciangin thaman i ngah ding hi. 
Galatians6:10 Tua ahih ciangin hunhoih i ngah simin midangte tungah a hoihin i gamta dinga, a diakdiakin thu upna sungah i innkuanpihte khempeuh tungah i hoih gamtat ding i phawk ding hi." 
Galatians6:11 Tu-in keima khut mahmah tawh laimal gol pipi-in lai ka hong gelh na mu uh hi. 
Galatians6:12 Note in na vun uh na at nadingun a hong hah bawl mite in mihoih ahihna uh kilangsak nuamin, a kimu thei nate a kisialh pih mite ahi uh hi. Singlamteh tungah Khris a sihna thu hangin amaute in bawlsiatna a ngah loh nadingun a tua ci gamtat ahi uh hi." 
Galatians6:13 Vun-atna a zang mite nangawn in Thukham zui nuam tuan lo uh hi. Hih a pualam gamtatna thu note in na zuihna hangun kisial nuam uh ahih manin note in vun-atna na zat ding uh a hong deih uh ahi hi. 
Galatians6:14 Ahi zongin keimah in ahihleh, singlamteh tungah i Topa Jesu a sihna thu bek ka kisialh pih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh singlamteh tungah ama sihna hangin kei adingin leitung thute misi bang a, kei zong, leitung thu ah misi mah ka bang hi." 
Galatians6:15 Vun ki-atna le ki-at lohna a thupi om tuan lo a, mi thak nam pawl hih ding bek a thupi ahi hi." 
Galatians6:16 Hih ka thugenna a zui mite a kipanin Pasianʼ mite khempeuh tungah Pasian in nopsakna le hehpihna thupha hong pia tahen. 
Galatians6:17 A tawpna ah ka gen nop thu in: Ka pum tunga om meima pawn pen Khris sila ka hihna lim ahih manin kuamah in kei hong nawngkaisak nawn kei tahen. 
Galatians6:18 Sanggamte aw, note khempeuh tungah i Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Pasianʼ sawlna tawh Jesu Khrisʼ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in, Efesa khua ah a om thu um mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi." 
Ephesians1:2 Eiteʼ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Ephesians1:3 Khris tawh eite i kipawlna hangin vantung gam panin kha tawh kisai letsong namkim hong pia ahih manin eiteʼ Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa ahi Pasian tungah i lungdamna ko ciat ni. 
Ephesians1:4 Ama mai ah eite pen paubaanna a nei lo, mi siangthote ahi ding le Khris hangin ama mite ahi dingin leitung a pian mapek nangawnin Pasian in a hong teel sa ihi hi." 
Ephesians1:5 Pasian in Jesu Khris hangin ama mite ahi dingin eite a hong bawl ding a seh kholh sa hi a, tua bangin a hong bawl ding pen ama tupna le a utna ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:6 Ama it Tapa hangin hih bangin letsong hong pia ahih manin a vanglian ama hong hehpihna hangin Pasian phat ni. 
Ephesians1:7 Khris hong sihna hangin eite in suahtakna ngahin, i mawhnate hong kimaisak ahi hi. Tua zah dongin Pasianʼ hong hehpihna thu bangzah takin lian ahi hiam?" 
Ephesians1:8  
Ephesians1:9 Pasian in a pilna le a thumuhnate zangin ama geel sa bangin hong sem a, Khris zangin a sepnop thusim teng eite tungah hong kilangsak hi." 
Ephesians1:10 Tua a geel thu pen, a hunhoih a tun ciangin Khris khutnuai ah, vantung le leitungah a om khempeuh gawm ding ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:11 Na khempeuh, Pasianʼ ngaihsutna le a geel sa bangin a piang hi. A cil pek a kipanin a ngaihsut sa thu tawh kizui-in Khris tawh i kipawlna hangin Pasianʼ tate ihih nadingin Pasian mah in a hong seh sa ihi hi." 
Ephesians1:12 Tua ahih manin Khris a muang masa eite in Pasian phatin a minthanna vang kilangsak ni. 
Ephesians1:13 Note in zong hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak thei Lungdamna Thu a man za-in Khris na up uh ciangin, Pasian in a hong ciam sa bangin ama mi na hihna uh a kilat nadingin note tungah Kha Siangtho hong piakna tawh a hong ciamteh hi." 
Ephesians1:14 Tua Kha Siangtho pen, Pasian in piak dingin a hong ciam sa thu eite khempeuh in i ngah taktak ding a kician ahihna thu a hong lahna hi a, ama mi ahi taktak eite khempeuh pen a suakta takpi mite ihihna a kilat nading ahi hi. Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh in Pasian phat ciat ni." 
Ephesians1:15 Note in Topa Jesu na muanna thu uh le thu umte khempeuh na itna thu uh ka zak hun a kipanin," 
Ephesians1:16 tawlnga loin noteʼ tangin Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna ka na pulak tawntung hi. Ka thungetna ah zong note ka hong phawk tawntung a," 
Ephesians1:17 i Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pasian ahi, a minthang Pa Pasian in note tungah Kha Siangtho hong pia-in, tua Kha Siangtho in note tungah lungpilna hong pia-in, note in Pasian na theih nadingun note tungah Pasian hong kilatsak nadingin thu ka hong ngetsak niloh hi." 
Ephesians1:18 Note bang dingin hong sam a, a mite tungah a hong ciam thupha lamdangte bangzah takin lian a, thu um ahi eite sungah na a hong sem vangliatna bangzah takin lian ahi hiam, cih na muh theih nadingun noteʼ lungsim mit hong vaksak nadingin thu ka na ngen hi. Eite sungah na a hong sem vangliatna pen sihna panin Khris hingsakin, vantung gamah zong, ama tak lamah a tutsak nadingin a zat vangliatna mah ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:19  
Ephesians1:20  
Ephesians1:21 Vantungah ukna, aana, vangliatna a neite khempeuh tungah Khris in ukna aana nei lai a, hih leitung bekah hi loin a hong tung ding leitungah zong amah a lian pen ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:22 Pasian in Khrisʼ khe nuai ah na khempeuh koih a, thu khempeuh ah pawlpiʼ lutang dingin Khris a bawl hi." 
Ephesians1:23 Tua pawlpi pen Khrisʼ pumpi hi a, tua pawlpi adingin a mahmah kipia-in, mun khempeuh a om pawlpite, thu khempeuh ah a cingtaaksak hi." 
Ephesians2:1 A beisa hunah na thuman lohna uh le na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai ah a si na hi uh hi. 
Ephesians2:2 Tua hun lai-in leitung gitloh gamtatnate na zui uh a, Pasian thu a um lo mite sungah tu laitakin na a sem, huihlak a ukteʼ thu na mang uh hi." 
Ephesians2:3 A taktakin eite khempeuh zong amaute mah i bang ngei a, i pianpih lungsim zui-in nungta-in, i pumpi le i lungsim deihna bangin i gamta hi. Tua ahih manin eite khempeuh zong Pasianʼ hehna hangin gim a thuak dingte ihi hi." 
Ephesians2:4 Tua bang hi napi-in Pasianʼ hong hehpihna le eite hong itna lian mahmah ahih manin," 
Ephesians2:5 i mawhna hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi ihih laitakin Khris tawh eite hong nungtasak hi. Pasianʼ hehpihna hangin hotkhiatna a ngah thei ihi hi. 
Ephesians2:6 Khris Jesu tawh eite i kipawlna hangin vantungah amah tawh i uk khawm theih nadingin sihna panin Pasian in a hong thokhawmsak hi. 
Ephesians2:7 Khris Jesu tungtawnin a hong lah ama hehpihna le a hong itna bangzah takin lianin lamdang ahi hiam, ci-in a hong tung ding hunah a hong lah tawntung theih nadingin hih bangin a hong thokhawmsak ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:8 Noteʼ upna hangin Pasianʼ hong hehpihna tawh hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. Noteʼ thalawhna hangin a ngah hi loin Pasianʼ hong piakkhong ahi hi. 
Ephesians2:9 Noteʼ hanciamna tawh a ngah hi lo na hih manun na kisialh nading uh a thu om lo hi. 
Ephesians2:10 Eite a hong bawlpa pen Pasian hi a, Jesu Khris tawh i kipawl ciangin i nuntakna ah gamtat hoih a nei dingin a hong bawl ihi hi. Hih pen eiteʼ om zia dingin a na ngaihsut kholh sa ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:11 Amau mahmah in amau pumpi tungah ahihna uh tawh vun a ki-at mite ka hi uh a ci Jew mite in, vun a ki-at lo mite a hong cih uh, na pian na pat-un Gentail mi ahi note in nidang a na om zia uh phawkkik dih un." 
Ephesians2:12 Tua hun lai-in Khris tawh na kikhen uh a, Pasianʼ teel Israel minamte hi loin a pualam mite na hi uh hi. Pasian in ama mite tungah piak dingin a ciam thute zong a ngah dingte na hi kei uh a, Pasian a nei lo, lamet ding bangmah nei loin leitungah a om na hi uh hi." 
Ephesians2:13 Ahi zongin a gamlapi ah a omngei hi napi-in tu-in Khris Jesu tawh na kipawlna hangun ama sihna in Pasian kiang hong tunpih hi. 
Ephesians2:14 Khris mahmah in Gentail mite le Jew mite pawl khatin hong bawl ahih manin eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia pa ahi hi. Hih minam nihte khenin gal a piangsak dalna pen Khris in ama pumpi tawh a satkham hi. 
Ephesians2:15 Amah tawh kipawlna hangin minam nihte pawl khat a suah theih nadingin minam a dei Jew Thukham le a ngeinate khempeuh phiatin, eite pawl khat hong suahin a hong kilemsak hi." 
Ephesians2:16 Singlamteh tungah a sihna tawh Khris in kilangneihna beisak a, tua singlamteh hangin minam nihte pawl khat suahin Pasian kiang a tunpih hi." 
Ephesians2:17 Tua hi a, Khris in Pasian tawh a kigamla no Gentail mite tung le Pasian tawh a kinai Jew mite tungah kilem nading Lungdamna Thuhoih a hong hilh hi." 
Ephesians2:18 Khris hangin Jew mi le Gentail mi ahi eite khempeuh, Kha Siangtho huhna tawh Pa Pasian kiangah i pai thei hi." 
Ephesians2:19 Tua ahih ciangin no Gentail mite pen a pualam mi, gamdang mite na hi nawn kei uh a, Pasian mite tawh minam khat hi ta-in, Pasian innkuan sung mite na hi ta uh hi." 
Ephesians2:20 Note zong, sawltakte le kamsangte in a phuh sa innkhuam tungah a kilam na hi uh a, tua inn sutpi pen Jesu mahmah ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:21 Tua inn sutpi Khris pen inn-a a kilam khempeuh a puapi pen hi a, Topa adingin biakinn siangtho a suah dongin tua inn a khangsak hi." 
Ephesians2:22 Note zong midangte tawh kigawmin ama tungah na kilam uh a, Kha Siangtho-in Pasian a ten nading inn na suak uh hi." 
Ephesians3:1 No Gentail mite hangin Jesu Khris thu tawh kisai-in thong kia keimah Paul in Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi. 
Ephesians3:2 Noteʼ phattuam nadingin Pasian in hong hehpihna tawh hih nasep a sem dingin a hong sawlna thu na theih sa uh ahi hi. 
Ephesians3:3 Lai ka hong khak sate sungah a tomno-in kong gen sa bangin Pasian in ama thusim kei tungah hong hilh khinzo hi. 
Ephesians3:4 Tua ka laigelh na sim le-uhcin Khris tawh kisai a thusim ka theihna thu na phawk ding uh hi. 
Ephesians3:5 A beisa hunah tua thusim pen kuama tungah kigen lo a, ahi zongin Pasian in tu-in a siangtho a sawltakte le a kamsangte tungah Kha Siangtho a hilhsak hi." 
Ephesians3:6 Tua thusim pen: Lungdamna thu a kihilhna hangin Gentail mite in Jew mite tawh Pasianʼ thupha ngahkhawm thei a, amaute tawh pawl khat suakin, Pasian in piak dingin a ciam thute, Khris hangin a ngah khop theihna uh ahi hi." 
Ephesians3:7 Tua lungdamna thuhilh a sem dingin Pasian in a tuam vilvelin ama vangliatna tawh kei a hong seh hi. 
Ephesians3:8 Pasianʼ mi khempeuh lakah kei a neu pen hi napi-in, Khris hangin a kigen zo lo thu manpha ahi Lungdamna Thu, Gentail mite lakah a gen ding," 
Ephesians3:9 le Pasian in a geel sim thute a kisep khiatna thu mi khempeuh a musak dingin Pasian in kei tungah hih hamphatna hong pia hi. Tu hun laitakin vantung a uk van mite in pawlpiʼ hangin Pasianʼ pilna a nam tuamtuamin a muh theih nadingun na khempeuh a bawl Pasian in a beisa hunah hih thu khempeuh a imcip hi. 
Ephesians3:10  
Ephesians3:11 Pasian in a tawntungin a ngimna a om sa bangin i Topa Khris Jesu nasepna tawh a ngimna a hong tungsak hi. 
Ephesians3:12 Amah tawh i kipawlna le amah i muanna hangin kimuang takin Pasian kiangah pai theih nading hun i nei hi. 
Ephesians3:13 Tua ahih manin note hangin ka thuakna pen noteʼ phattuam nading ahih manin tua ka thuakna thu hangin lungkiatna-in na nei kei un. 
Ephesians3:14 Hih ama geelna teng ka ngaihsut ciangin, vantung a tung khin sa mite le leitungah a om lai mite khempeuhʼ pianna i Pa Pasianʼ mai ah ka khukdin a," 
Ephesians3:15  
Ephesians3:16 noteʼ lungsim a thahat nadingin Pasian in a kicing ama vangliatna sung panin a Kha Siangtho tawh note hong tha khauhsakin," 
Ephesians3:17 na upna hangun note lungsim sungah Khris hong teengin, itna thu ah zung thuk kha-in bulkip na neih nadingun thu ka ngen hi." 
Ephesians3:18 Tua hileh note in Pasian mi ahi midangte khempeuh tawh Khris hong itna bangzah takin sau-in zai a, bangzah takin thukin sang ahi hiam, cih na thei khawm ding uh hi." 
Ephesians3:19 Khris hong itna a kicing takin theih khit zawh loh ding ahi ta zongin note in thei-in, Pasian thu a cingin na theih nadingun thu ka hong ngetsak hi." 
Ephesians3:20 Eite adingin na a hong sepsak, eiteʼ ngetzah val le i ngaihsut zawh loh zah dongin a vangliatna tawh tampi tak a hong hihsak thei" 
Ephesians3:21 eiteʼ Pasian pen, pawlpi mite khempeuh le Khris Jesu tawh a kipawl mi khempeuh in a khangkhangin a tawntungin phat ciat ta uh hen. Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ na ka sepna hangin thong a kia keimah in noteʼ nuntak zia dingin a hong deihna tawh a kilawm a kituakin na nuntak nadingun ka hong hanthawn hi. 
Ephesians4:2 Kiniamkhiatin, thunemin, lungduai-in om tawntung un. Khatlekhat kihuhna tawh na ki-itna uh kilangsak un." 
Ephesians4:3 Kha Siangtho kimakai sakin, khatlekhat kilemin pawl khat na hihna uh na kipsak tawntung un." 
Ephesians4:4 A kibang lametna khat bek a ngahkhawm dingin Pasian in note hong sap mah bangin eite khempeuh pum khat bek hi-in Kha Siangtho zong khat bek mah a neikhawm ihi hi. 
Ephesians4:5 Topa khat bek, upna khat bek, tuiphumna khat bek mah a zangkhawm ihi hi." 
Ephesians4:6 Mi khempeuhʼ Pa ahi Pasian khat bek om a, mi khempeuhʼ Topa hi-in, na khempeuh hih kimin, mun citeng ah a om hi." 
Ephesians4:7 Ahi zongin eite khempeuh in Khris hong piakna tawh kizui-in siamna a tuam khat ciat i ngah hi. 
Ephesians4:8 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “A sangna munah a pai toh ciangin mat sa salte tampi paipih a, mite tungah letsong a pia hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi." 
Ephesians4:9 “Pai to,” a cih ciangin bang a cihnopna ahi hiam cih leh, lei sung a thuk penna munah pai suk masa khinzo, a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Ephesians4:10 Tua ahih manin mun khempeuh ah a omkim khit theih nadingin a pai suk mipa pen mah vantung a sang pen dawn nangawn kheng to-in na pai to hi. 
Ephesians4:11 Amah in mite tungah siamna a tuamtuam hong pia a, pawl khatte sawltak nasep a sem ding, pawl khatte kamsang nasep a sem ding, pawl khatte thuhilh kawikawi nasep a sem ding, pawl khatte pawlpi kem nasep a sem ding le pawl khatte laihilh nasep a sem dingin a hong seh hi." 
Ephesians4:12 Hih nasep a tuamtuamte khempeuh a sem dingin Pasianʼ mi khempeuh kiging kholsakin Khris adingin na semin Khris pumpi a khansak theih nading deihna ahi hi. 
Ephesians4:13 Tua hileh Pasianʼ Tapa i theihna le i thu upna ah kithukhatin, eite a khang cing suakin, Khrisʼ cingtaakna ciang i ban to ding hi." 
Ephesians4:14 Tua hun ciangin thu upna lamah naupang ihi nawn kei dinga, mite khemin a khialsak theiteʼ mutna hangin i suk hoi i to hoi nawn kei dinga," 
Ephesians4:15 itna lungsim tawh thutak genin, lutang ahi Khris tawh i kibat dongin i khangto ding hi." 
Ephesians4:16 Ama ukna mangin pumpi na a tuamtuamte a kituak takin kizom a, amaute limtakin a kizop dimdiamna hangin pumpi pen pum khat a suak thei hi. Pumpi na a tuamtuamte in amauʼ sep ding ciat hoihtakin a sep uh ciangin itna hangin pumpi khangin a cingtaak a suak thei hi." 
Ephesians4:17 Tu-in Topaʼ min tawh limtakin note kiangah ka hong gen nop thu in: Thu um lo dawi biate bangin gamta nawn kei un. Amauteʼ thu ngaihsutte a kimang bangmah om lo a," 
Ephesians4:18 a ngaihsutnate uh khuamial tawh kibang hi. Amauteʼ lungsim khauhin bangmah thei het lo uh ahih manin Pasianʼ hong piak nuntakna nei kha het lo uh hi. 
Ephesians4:19 Amaute in maizumna mel thei nawn lo uh a, siatna sung tungin, a ututun a kilawm lo pipi-in gamta uh hi." 
Ephesians4:20 Tua bang gamtatnate pen Khris thu panin na theihkhak uh hi lo hi. 
Ephesians4:21 Note in Khris thu na zak sa uh hi a, ama nungzui na hih manun Jesuʼ thutakna na theih sa uh ahi hi." 
Ephesians4:22 Zuauna lungsim in a suksiat khit sa, nidangin na nuntakna ngei uh ahi na pian lui uh paikhia unla," 
Ephesians4:23 na lungsim uh le na ngaihsutna uh thaksuaksak un. 
Ephesians4:24 A thutang a siangtho ahihna thu, nuntakna mahmah panin a kilangsak, Pasianʼ pianzia tawh kibangin a kibawl na ngeina thak uh bangin na nungta un." 
Ephesians4:25 Tua ahih manin zuaugen nawn kei unla, Khris pumpi nate ihihna hangin pawl khat ihih manin khatlekhat tungah thuman kigen ni." 
Ephesians4:26 Na heh uh ciangin, tua hehna hangin khial kha kei unla, a tawntungin heh paisuak kei un." 
Ephesians4:27 Dawimangpa in hong suksiat theih nading hun omsak kei un. 
Ephesians4:28 Guta ngeite in gu nawn loin, ama nuntak nading thuman takin thalawhin, mizawngte zong a huh theih lai nadingin thatang tawh nasep ding kipan ta uh hen." 
Ephesians4:29 Na kiho uh ciangin kamguh zang kei unla, na pauna uh a za mite in phattuamna a ngah theih nadingin na-in a kimang kam hoihte bek na pau un." 
Ephesians4:30 Ni khat ni ciangin Pasian in note hong tatkhiat taktak nading thu a ciantakin hong lahna le Pasianʼ neihsa na hihna uh hong ciaptehna-in Kha Siangtho hong pia ahih manin, tua Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho na dahsak kei un." 
Ephesians4:31 Kimuhdahna, hehna, thangpaihna, kitotna, kikona, kilungsim neihna khempeuh beisak unla," 
Ephesians4:32 khatlekhat kihehpihin, lungsim nem tawh na kiho zaw unla, Khrisʼ hangin Pasian in noteʼ mawhna hong maisak mah bangin khatlekhat na mawhna uh na kimaisak ta un." 
Ephesians5:1 Note pen Pasian in a hong it a tate na hih manun amah tawh na kibat nadingun hanciam un. 
Ephesians5:2 Khris in eite a hong it manin Pasian in eiteʼ mawhna hong maisak theih nadingin a namtui biakna-in Pasian kiangah a kipiak mah bangin note zong itna tawh na gamta un. 
Ephesians5:3 Note pen Pasianʼ mi na hih manun note lakah nulepa khialhna, a kilawm lo-a gamtatna, huaihamna cihte genin zong na nei vet kei un." 
Ephesians5:4 A kilawm lo-a kampauna le ciamnuih hoih lo cihte zong na zang kei unla, Pasian tungah lungdamkohna kam na pau zaw un." 
Ephesians5:5 Nulepa khialhna a gamta mi, a kilawm lo-a a gamta mi le a huaiham (huaihamna zong milim biakna zahin sia hi) mite in Khris Ukna le Pasian Ukna sungah bangmah ngah nei het lo ding ahihna uh teltakin thei ta un." 
Ephesians5:6 Hih bang mawhnate i bawl hangin phamawh kei, ci-in a mawk gen miteʼ khem sa-in ta kei un. Pasian thu mang loin hih bangin a gamta mite in Pasianʼ hehna a thuak ding uh ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:7 Tua ahih manin tua bangin a gamta mite tawh kisu kha vet kei un. 
Ephesians5:8 Note pen khuamial sungah a omngei hi napi-in, Topaʼ mi na suah khit uh ciangin khuavak sungah a om hi ta na hih uh manin khuavak sungah a om mite bangin na gamta un." 
Ephesians5:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh khuavak sunga omna in a hoih, a man, a thutakte hong piangsak hi." 
Ephesians5:10 Bang teng in Topa lungkimsak ahi hiam, ci-in kan un." 
Ephesians5:11 Khuamial gamtatna, bangmahin a kimang lo nasepnate su vet kei unla, tua bang gamtatnate a hoih lohna pholak zaw un." 
Ephesians5:12 Kuama theih lohin a simthamin a hihte uh gen ding nangawnin zong zumhuai lua hi. 
Ephesians5:13 Na khat peuhpeuh khuavak ah pusuah lehang a pianzia man taktak hong kilang hi. 
Ephesians5:14 Tua ahih manin la sungah, “A ihmu mi aw, khanglo inla, sihna panin tho in. Tua hileh Khris in nang hong taan ding hi,” kici hi." 
Ephesians5:15 Tua ahih ciangin hoihtakin kingaihsunin gamta unla, mihaite bang hi loin mipilte bangin gamta un." 
Ephesians5:16 Tu hun pen hunhoih lo hun ahih manin na hun neih khempeuh uh a hoih lamin zang un. 
Ephesians5:17 Tua ahih manin hai om mawk kei unla, Topa in bang a sem dingin hong deih ahi hiam, ci-in kan un." 
Ephesians5:18 Zu in mi siasak thei ahih manin zu ne kei unla, Kha Siangtho tawh a kidimin om zaw un." 
Ephesians5:19 La a tuamtuamte genin sakna tawh Topaʼ thu gen belin nei unla, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa phatna la sa un." 
Ephesians5:20 I Topa Jesu Khris hangin thu khempeuh ah Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ko ta un. 
Ephesians5:21 Khris na zahtakna uh hangin na thu uh na kimang tuak un. 
Ephesians5:22 Zite aw, Topaʼ thu na man uh mah bangin na pasalte uh thu na mang un." 
Ephesians5:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris pen ama pumpi ahi pawlpi a hon khia pa hi-in, pawlpi tungah ukna thu a neih mah bangin pasal in a zi tungah ukna thu a nei ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:24 Pawlpi pen Khrisʼ khutnuai ahih mah bangin zite zong thu khempeuh ah a pasalte uh khutnuai hi ding uh hi. 
Ephesians5:25 Pasalte aw, Khris in pawlpi itin a pumpi a piak mah bangin na zite uh na it un." 
Ephesians5:26 Pawlpi pen paubaanna a om het lo, a siangtho mahmah in Khris kiangah a kipiak theih nadingin Pasian thu tawh tui ah a silsiang khit ciangin Pasian kiangah a ap theih nadingin pawlpi adingin Khris a kipia ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:27  
Ephesians5:28 Tua mah bangin pasalte in zong amau pumpi zah mah bangin a zite uh a it ding uh ahi hi. A zi a it mi pen amah a ki-it mi ahi hi. 
Ephesians5:29 Eite pen ama pumpi nate ihihna hangin Khris in hong it mah bangin kuamah in ama pumpi mudah ngei lo a, hoihtakin kemin a vak zaw hi." 
Ephesians5:30  
Ephesians5:31 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “Hih thu hangin pasal in a nu le a pa nusia-in a zi tawh kigawm dinga, amau tegel khat a suak ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Ephesians5:32 Pasalte in amau pumpi zahin a zite uh itin, zite in zong amau pumpi zah mahin a pasalte uh a it ding uh ahih mah bangin, Lai Siangtho in hih bangin a gen ciangin a thuk zaw khat, Khris le pawlpi a ki-itna a gen nopna ahi hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ephesians5:33  
Ephesians6:1 Tate aw, na nu na pate uh thu na man ding uh Khristian ngeina hi a, ahi ding mah ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:2 Thupiakna a lian khat in, “Na nu le na pa zahtak in,” cihna hi a, khapna thu tawh kizom pahin, “Zahtak lecin nang adingin thu hong hoihin, leitungah na khan a sau ding hi,” na ci pah hi." 
Ephesians6:3  
Ephesians6:4 Pate aw, na tate uh a heh theih nadingin bawl kei unla, Khristiante ngeina tawh kituakin taii-in hilhin pantah un." 
Ephesians6:5 Silate aw, launa le linna tawh na leitung tote uh thu mang unla, Khrisʼ na na sep uh mah bangin lungsim takpi tawh na na sepsak un." 
Ephesians6:6 A hong pahtak ding uh deihna tawh amauteʼ muh sung bekin tua ci gamtat kei unla, Khrisʼ sila na hihna hangun Pasianʼ hong deih bangin lungsim takpi tawh na sem un." 
Ephesians6:7 Mihingteʼ na a sem bang lelin kingaihsun loin Topaʼ na a sem bangin kingaihsun unla, thanopna tawh sem un." 
Ephesians6:8 Salte ahi a, sal ahi lote ahi zongin na hoih a sem mi khempeuh, Topa in thaman a piak ding lamtak na thei un." 
Ephesians6:9 Tote aw, silate in note hong bawl mah bangin note in zong amaute limbawl unla, tawn gawpgawpnate zang nawn kei un. Note le na silate uh vantung panin To khat khutnuai ah a om na hihna uh le tua Topa in kuamah maitang zahtak tuam nei loin a kibangin mi khempeuh thu a khen ahihna thu na phawk ta un." 
Ephesians6:10 Tu a kipanin Topa tawh na kipawlna uh le ama vangliatna hangin na tha uh khauhsak ta un. 
Ephesians6:11 Dawimangpaʼ hong hih nading khempeuh na dalzawh nadingun Pasianʼ galvan namkim na zang un. 
Ephesians6:12 Eiteʼ do pen si le sa a nei leitung mite hi lo a, vantung huihlak a thuneite, aana neite, hih leitung khuamial gam a ukte le huih khua a om kha gilote ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:13 Tua ahih manin hun haksat hun hong tun ciangin galteʼ hong sukna teng khempeuh nang zo-in, a tawpna ah a gualzo na hih theih nadingun Pasianʼ galvan namkim na zang un." 
Ephesians6:14 Tua ahih ciangin kawnggak gak bangin thutak zang unla, awmdal bulh bangin thuman zang un." 
Ephesians6:15 Kithawi a khedap bulh bangin Lungdamna Thu a hilh khia dingin kiging un. 
Ephesians6:16 Tua banah, dawimangpaʼ hong kapna thaltang kuangte na suk mit nadingun lum puak bangin upna na nei tawntung un." 
Ephesians6:17 Sik lukhu khuk bangin hotkhiatna nei unla, Kha Siangtho in a hong piak Pasianʼ thu pen namsau zat bangin na zang un." 
Ephesians6:18 Kha Siangtho tawh kopin a tawntungin Pasian kiangah na kisapna khempeuh uh ngenin na thum unla, tatsat loin Pasian mi khempeuh adingin thu na ngetsak un." 
Ephesians6:19 Thu ka hilh theih hun ding ciangin lungdamna thusim hang takin ka hilhkhiat theih nadingin Pasian in ka thugen ding hong hilh nadingin kei adingin zong thu na ngetsak ta un. 
Ephesians6:20 Pasianʼ thu genin taangmi ka sepna hang mahin sikkhau khihna thuakin thong kia ka hih manin ka hilh dingin a kilawm bangin hang takin ka gen ngam nadingin thu hong ngetsak ta un. 
Ephesians6:21 Ka septe le ka om zia khempeuh na theih nadingun Topa thu sungah i sanggam, thuman takin na a sem Tikhikas in note kiangah thu khempeuh a cingin hong gen ding hi." 
Ephesians6:22 Koteʼ om zia na theih nading uh le amah in noteʼ lungsim hong thahatsak theih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi. 
Ephesians6:23 Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in ulenaute khempeuh tungah nopsakna le itna, thu upna tawh hong pia khawm tahen." 
Ephesians6:24 Tatsat loin i Topa Jesu Khris a it tawntung mi khempeuh tungah hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. 
Philippians1:1 Jesu Khrisʼ sila keimah Paul le Timoti in Filippi khua-a om Khris tawh a kipawl Pasianʼ mite, siate le upate khempeuh tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi." 
Philippians1:2 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong pia tahen. 
Philippians1:3 Note ka hong phawk simin ka biak Pasian tungah ka lungdamna ka ko hi. 
Philippians1:4 Note in lungdamna thu na zak ni uh a kipanin tu ni ciang dong, lungdamna thuhilh nasepna ah kei na hong huhna uh hangin ka nuam mahmah a, note adingin thu ka nget simin lungdam mahmahna tawh ka ngen tawntung hi." 
Philippians1:5  
Philippians1:6 Note sungah hih nasep hoih a hong pan khia Pasian in Jesu Khris hong paikik hun ciang dong, mi cingtaak na hih nadingun hong huh ding hi, ci-in teltakin ka thei hi." 
Philippians1:7 Lungdamna thu hangin ka thongkiatna le lungdamna thu man hi, ci-in pangin ka kipsak nading hun ka ngahna ah kei tawh a hong pangkhawm na hih manun ka lungsim sungah note na om tawntung uh a, hih zahta-in note ka hong phawk ding a kilawm thu mah ahi hi." 
Philippians1:8 Jesu Khris lungsim zah mahin note ka hong it taktakna thu Pasian in a hong thei hi. 
Philippians1:9 Note ading deihsakna tawh thu ka hong ngetsak thu in: Noteʼ lungsimah itna khang semsemin, a sia le a pha a mantakin khen thei-in a hoih pen na teel theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Philippians1:10 Tua hileh Khris hong paikik ni ciangin paubaanna om loin a siangtho na hi ding uh hi. 
Philippians1:11 Jesu Khris in note mihoih a hong suahsak theihna le mite in Pasian pahtawi-in a phat theihna thu, noteʼ gamtat hoih in midangte tungah kilangsak ding hi." 
Philippians1:12 Sanggamte aw, kei tungah a piang thu in lungdamna thu mai a nawtsak zaw ahihna thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi." 
Philippians1:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris nasem ka hihna hangin thong kia ka hihna thu, inncing galkapte a kipanin mi khempeuh in a thei uh hi." 
Philippians1:14 Tua banah keima thongkiatna hangin hih lai-a om Khristiante a tam zaw in Topa muanna-in nei uh a, lau het loin Pasianʼ thu gen ngamna-in nei zaw uh hi." 
Philippians1:15 Mi pawl khatte in ahihleh hong hazatna le hong langpan nopna tawh Khris thu hilh uh a, ahi zongin mi pawl khatte in lungsim hoihtak mah tawh a hilh uh hi." 
Philippians1:16 Hih bang mite in, Pasianʼ hong sawlna tawh lungdamna thu ka hutna hangin thong kia ka hihna thu thei-in, itna lungsim tawh Pasianʼ thu a hilh uh hi." 
Philippians1:17 Pawl khatte in ahihleh lungsim hoih tawh hi loin ka thongkiatna ah na ka sak semsem theih nadingin kei hong demna-in Khris thu a hilh uh hi. 
Philippians1:18 Ahi zongin phamawh ka sa kei hi. Lungsim hoih tawh a kihilh a, lungsim khem tawh a kihilh ahi zongin, bangbang hitaseleh Khrisʼ thu gen uh ahih nungsang, kei ka lungdam hi." 
Philippians1:19 Note hong thungetsakna le Jesu Khris Kha Siangtho huhna tawh suakta ding hi ing, ci-in thei ka hih manin ka lungdam hi." 
Philippians1:20 Ka si a, ka hing zongin, a diakdiakin tu a kipanin a tawntungin midangte in Khris phat theih nading lungsim hanna a neih theih nadingun ka lungsim le ka pumpi tawh keima tavuan ka lelh het loh nading pen ka deihdeih, ka lam etet bulpi ahi hi." 
Philippians1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khris ading bekin a nungta ka hi a, si taleng zong kei adingin hoih zaw semsem lai hi." 
Philippians1:22 Leitung pumpi nungta lai hi leng na a manpha tampi sem thei ding ka hih manin, sih ding le hin ding ka teel sawn ding ka thei kei hi." 
Philippians1:23 Hih thu nih khensat hak ka sa mahmah hi. Kei adingin hoih zaw thampek ahih manin leitung pumpi si-in Khris tawh om khawm ding ka ut hi. 
Philippians1:24 Ahi zongin note adingin kei ka hin lai ding kisam pha zaw hi. 
Philippians1:25 Hih thu a hoih pen ding hi, ci-in thei tel ka hih manin noteʼ khantoh nading le upna hangin na lungdamna uh a khangsak dingin note ka hong hin pih lai ding hi." 
Philippians1:26 Tua ahih manin note kiangah ka hong hawhkik ciangin Jesu Khris tawh kipawlin na nuntakna uh ah kei nong kisialh pih nading uh thu tampi hong om lai ding hi. 
Philippians1:27 Note tawh a om khawm dingin ka hong pai thei a, ka hong pai thei kei zongin note in lungdamna thu tawh kipawl upna thu ah ngimna kikhatin kip takin na om nading uh le deihna kikhatin na do khawmna thu uh ka zak theih nadingin Khris hanga lungdamna thu tawh a kilawm a kituakin na nuntak ding uh a thupi pen ahi hi." 
Philippians1:28 Note a hong gualzosak ding pa pen Pasian ahih manin na galte uh na kihta kei un. Hang takin om tawntung le-uhcin, note a gualzo ding hi-in, na galte uh a guallel ding ahihna thu, na galte un hong thei ding hi." 
Philippians1:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrisʼ na sep nading hunpha zong note tungah a hong kipia hi a, Khris upna tawh ama na a sem hi bek loin, thuakna tawh zong a sem ding na hi uh hi." 
Philippians1:30 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in na hong muh uh ka galdona le tu mahmah in ka do lailai na zak uh thute ah kei na hong do pih thei ding uh hi. 
Philippians2:1 Note, Khris tawh kipawlin na nuntakna uh in note hong thahatsak hi. Kha Siangtho tawh kikhawlin, khatlekhat kihehpihin, dikna na kibawl uh hi." 
Philippians2:2 Tua ahih manin kei tawh ngaihsutna kibangin note khatlekhat ki-itin, khatlekhat lungsim kituakin na omna uh tawh keima lungdamna na hong cingtaaksak nadingun ka hong kun hi." 
Philippians2:3 Huaihamna lungsim le kisialh nopna lungsim tawh bangmah gamta kei un. Kiniamkhiat ciat unla, midangte thupi ngaihsut zaw un." 
Philippians2:4 Noteʼ phattuam nading bek ngaihsun kei unla, midangteʼ phattuam nading ngaihsutsak zaw un." 
Philippians2:5 Note in Jesu Khris lungsim puak zia na nei un. Tua lungsim puak zia in: 
Philippians2:6 Jesu Khris in Pasianʼ pianzia nei napi-in, Pasian tawh a kizakim theihna dingin thatang hat thu a suang kei hi." 
Philippians2:7 Amah kiniamkhiat tawm zaw a, nasem lim a hong pua zaw hi. Mihing bangin amah hong kibawl a, mihing teekteek mah a hong sun hi." 
Philippians2:8 Amah hong kiniamkhiat tawm a, singlamteh tung nangawn ah sih ding a ut hi." 
Philippians2:9 Hih thu hangin Pasian in a lian penin amah koih a, min lian dang khempeuh sangin a min lian zaw-in a koih hi." 
Philippians2:10 Tua ahih manin vantung, leitung, leinuai-a om mi khempeuh in Jesu pahtawi-in khukdin ding uh a," 
Philippians2:11 Jesu Khris in Topa ahi hi, ci-in taangko-in Pa Pasian a min thangsak ding uh hi." 
Philippians2:12 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it sanggamte aw, note tawh ka hong om khawm lai-in ka thu na hong man tawntung uh mah bangin, tu-in note tawh ka hong om khawm loh hun ciangin zong ka thu na hong man ding uh thupi zaw lai hi. Pasian kihtakna le zahtakna tawh na maa uh nawt unla, amah in note hong hotkhiatna thu a cingtaak suaksak un."
