Philippians2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in utna lungsim na neih nading uh le ama deihna na zuih zawh nadingun note sungah Pasian in a tawntungin na a hong sem ahi hi. 
Philippians2:14 Na khempeuh phun lo, thu nial loin sem un." 
Philippians2:15 Tua hileh a lungsim kawi, a hoih lo leitung mite lakah paubaanna a nei lo a siangtho, Pasianʼ tate na hi ding uh a, nuntakna thu na genna uh hangin leitung mite lakah khuavak bangin na hoihna uh a kilang mite na hi ding uh hi." 
Philippians2:16 Tua hileh a beisa hunah ka sepna le ka hanciamnate a mawkna suak lo ding ahih manin Khris hong paikik ni ciangin kei ka kisial thei ding hi. 
Philippians2:17 Noteʼ upna hangin biakpiakna-in keimah hong kigo hitaleh zong, note khempeuh mah bangin kei zong ka lungdam veve ding hi." 
Philippians2:18 Tua mah bangin note in zong hong lungdam pih ta un. 
Philippians2:19 Note kiang panin thu ka zakna hangin ka lung a nop theih nadingin note kiangah Timoti ka hong paisak baih nadingin Topa Jesu in hong huh ding hi, ci-in ka lamen hi." 
Philippians2:20 Note ka hong lunghihmawh zahin amah bek mah in note hong lunghihmawh pih hi. 
Philippians2:21 A dangte in ahihleh Jesu Khris thu kin loin, amauʼ aituam vai bek lunghimawh uh hi." 
Philippians2:22 Ahi zongin Timoti ahihleh lungdamna thu nasepna ah pata bang ka hih manun manpha mahmah hi. 
Philippians2:23 Keima pianzia ding ka theih khit phetin note kiangah Timoti ka hong paisak pah ding hi. 
Philippians2:24 A sawt loin kei mahmah zong ka hong pai theih nadingin Topa in hong huh ding hi, ci-in ka muang hi." 
Philippians2:25 Note in kamtai ding le keimah hong huh dingin na hong sawl uh, kei tawh na sem khawmin gal hong sim pih, i sanggampa Epafroditas pen note kiangah ka hong ciahsakkik ding kisam hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Philippians2:26 Amah in note hong mu nuam mahmah a, ama natna na zak manun amah zong lunghimawh mahmah hi." 
Philippians2:27 Amah a ci na takpi a, zong si dektak hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in amah hehpih hi. Amah hehpih kei leh keima dahna kibehlap to sawnsawn ding ahih manin amah bek a hehpih hi loin kei zong a hong hehpih ahi hi." 
Philippians2:28 Tua ahih manin amah na muh uh ciangin na lungdam theih nading uh le keiʼ lunghihmawhna a kiam nadingin amah ka hong ciahsak ding ka kin semsem hi. 
Philippians2:29 Khris nasepna ah note in pumpi tawh na hong huhkim theih loh manun noteʼ tangin amah in kei a hong huh manin a nuntakna hong pia-in sih lawh dektak hi. Tua ahih manin hih bang mite na zahtak bawl mahmah unla, Topaʼ nasem taktak hi, ci-in lungdam takin na limbawl un." 
Philippians2:30  
Philippians3:1 A tawpna ah, sanggamte aw, Topa in note tungah lungdamna hong tungsak tahen. Ka hong gelh sa thute ka hong gelhkik ding cimtak huai ka sa kei a, note adingin lungmuan huai zaw lai hi." 
Philippians3:2 Ui bangin a mi ginalo, a gitloh gamtat, vun at ding a ci teiteite kiang panin na kidawm un." 
Philippians3:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in Kha Siangthoʼ hong huhna tawh Pasian bia-in, Jesu Khris tawh i kipawl manin lungdamin, a tung lam a kilang vun-atna limte muanin nei lo ihih manin, amaute hi loin, eite pen vun-atna man taktak a zang mite ihi zaw hi." 
Philippians3:4 Kei mahmah zong, tua bang nate muan theih ding a nei pa ka hi hi. A puatham a ciaptehna muan theih ding nei ing, a ci a om leh, keʼn ka lim neih zaw lai hi." 
Philippians3:5 Ka suah zawh a ni giat ni-in ka vun a ki-at hi. Kei pen Hebru minam citak ka hi a, Israel mite sung panin Benjaminʼ suante ka hi hi. Jew Thukham zuihna tawh kisai-in Farisi mi pawl ka hi a," 
Philippians3:6 nak hahkat lua kisa-in pawlpite nangawn ka bawlsia hi. Thukham zuihna tawh midik kitang ding hileh paubaanna mahmah ka nei kei hi. 
Philippians3:7 Ahi zongin hamphatna-in ka neih theih ding tua bangte khempeuh, Khris hangin sup ngam dingin ka ngaihsun hi." 
Philippians3:8 Hih bang nate bek hi loin, ka Topa Jesu Khris ka theihna manpha zaw lua sa ka hih manin na dang khempeuh ka sum ngam zaw lai hi. Khris hangin na dang khempeuh ka nusia khin a, Khris tawh ka kipawl theih nadingin na dang khempeuh ninneng bang lelin ka ngaihsun hi." 
Philippians3:9 Khris tawh kip takin kipawl khin ka hih manin Thukham zuihna tawh a kingah thei keima hanciamna tawh dik ngahna cihte ka nei nawn kei hi. Tu-in, Jesu Khris upna hangin Pasian in a hong piak diksakna ka ngah a, tua pen upna siksanin a hong kipia ahi hi." 
Philippians3:10 Jesu Khris thei-in, ama thawhkik bangin thokikin, kei zong sihna panin hong hingsakkik ding hi, ci-in ka lametna hangin ama thuak bangin thuakin, sihna ah zong amah tawh ka kibat ding ka utpi pen ahi hi." 
Philippians3:11  
Philippians3:12 Ahi zongin ka utna tung khin ing, cingtaak khinta ing, a ci ka hi kei hi. Khris Jesu in kei adingin a hong sepsak hamphatnate kimtakin ka ngah theih nadingin a hanciam lai ka hi hi." 
Philippians3:13 Sanggamte aw, tua hamphatna a ngah khinin ka kingaihsun kei hi. Tua ahih manin a beisa thute mangngilh bawlin mainawtin ka hanciam a," 
Philippians3:14 Khris Jesu nasepna tawh vantung nuntakna ah Pasianʼ hong sapna ahi hamphatna ka ngah theih nadingin, a kung lam zuanin tangtakin ka tai hi." 
Philippians3:15 Kha thu ah a khangham eite in hih bang lungsim pua ciat ni. Hih bang lungsim a nei lo i om khak leh zong, Pasian in a kitel takin hong kilangsak ding hi." 
Philippians3:16 Bangbang hitale hang, i tunna ciangciang panin mainawt ciat ni." 
Philippians3:17 Sanggamte aw, keima gamtat bangin hong gamta niloh un. Noteʼ etteh dingin a hoihin kote hong gamta ka hih manun, koteʼ gamtat bangin a gamtate na etteh un." 
Philippians3:18 Singlamteh tungah Khris a sihna thu tawh a kilehngatin a nungta mi tampi tak a omna thu, a beisa hunah tam veipi ka hong gen khin a, tu-in zong khitui tawh ka hong genpha kikkik hi." 
Philippians3:19 Amaute in amau pumpi deihnate Pasian zahin ngaihsun uh a, a maizum nading uh thute ah kisial zawsopin, leitung nate bek ngaihsutin nei uh ahih manin Hell khuk sung a tung ding uh ahi hi." 
Philippians3:20 Ahi zongin eite ihih leh vantung gam mite ihi a, vantung panin a hong pai ding Topa Jesu Khris, eiteʼ Honpa, lawptakin a ngakte ihi hi." 
Philippians3:21 Amah in na khempeuh ama khutnuai ah koihna-in a zat vangliatna mah tawh a gina lo i leitung pumpi pen ama aʼ mah bangin a minthang pumpi tawh hong kheelsak ding hi. 
Philippians4:1 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, note ka hong it mahmah a, nakpi takin ka hong goih hi. Note in nakpi takin kei na hong lungnuamsak uh a, note ka hong angtan pih mahmah hi. Tua hi a, sanggamte aw, Topa sungah kip takin nungta un." 
Philippians4:2 Euodia le Sintikhe, Topaʼ hangin a kilemkik ding uh ka thum nuam hi." 
Philippians4:3 Hih numei nihte in Klement le a nungta mite a kikhumna Pasianʼ laibu sungah a kikhum, ka nasep pih dangte khempeuh tawh, lungdamna thu a kizelh nadingin nakpi takin kei tawh na hong sem khawm uh ahih manin, citakin kei tawh na a sem khawm note in zong amau tegel na huh nadingun kong thum hi." 
Philippians4:4 Topa sungah lungdam tawntung un, ka hong cih sa bangin tu-in zong lungdam un, ka hong cikik hi." 
Philippians4:5 Mi khempeuh tungah na dik un. Topa hong pai baih ta ding hi. 
Philippians4:6 Thu khat peuhpeuh ah lunghimawh lua kei unla, na kisap bangbang uh, lungdamna tawh Pasian kiangah na ngen un." 
Philippians4:7 Mihingte in a theih tel zawh loh Pasianʼ hong piak lungsim nopna in, Khris Jesu tawh na kipawlna uh hangin note hong lungnuamsak ding hi." 
Philippians4:8 Sanggamte aw, a tawpna ah ka hong gen nop thu in, a hoih le a phat taak thute tawh na lungsim uh na kidimsak un. Tuate in: A man, a dik, a tang, a siangtho, a deihhuai le a pahtakhuai thute ahi hi." 
Philippians4:9 Keima genna le ka gamtatna panin thei-in na san uh thute, nomau pumpi mahmah tawh na zui un. Tua hileh nopsakna a hong pia thei Pasian in note hong ompih ding hi." 
Philippians4:10 Topaʼ hangin ka lungdamna lian mahmah hi. Hun sau veipi khit ciangin kei na hong phawkna uh na hong langsakkik thei uh hi. Kei hong kin loin omngei uh teh, a ci ka hi kei a, na hong kinna uh na hong lah nading uh hun om thei lo, ka cihna ahi hi." 
Philippians4:11 Bangbangin om taleng a lungkim thei dingin a kisin sa ka hih manin hih bang kong gen ciangin ka kitangsapna a hong pulak nuam ka hi kei hi. 
Philippians4:12 Cihmawhna le cihtheihna a sin sa ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin ka hau a ka zawng zongin, ka vah a ka kial zongin, koi mun koi mun hitaleh ah a lungkim thei dingin a kisin sa ka hi hi." 
Philippians4:13 Khris in a hong piak vangliatna tawh hihte khempeuh nawk zawh nading thahatna a nei ka hi hi. 
Philippians4:14 Ahi zongin ka lungkham laitakin na hong huh manun hoih mahmah hi. 
Philippians4:15 Na theih sa uh mah bangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh cil lai-in noteʼ gam Masedonia panin ka paikhiat hunin no Filippi pawlpite bek mah in kei na hong huh uh a, ka ngahna le ka piakkhiatnate, note bek mah in a hong theih pih na hi uh hi." 
Philippians4:16 Thesalonika khua ah cimawhin ka om lai-in huhna nong puak uh khatvei bek hi lo hi. 
Philippians4:17 Note tung panin na tampi ka ngah nop man hi lo a, noteʼ hamphatna a kibehlap nading ka deihna hizaw hi." 
Philippians4:18 Noteʼ hong piak nate kicing piikpeek hi. Epafroditas in noteʼ hong na khakte hong tunpih ahih manin ka kitangsapna khempeuh kicing kim hi. Hih nate pen Pasian biakna-in na piak uh, lungdam takin a hong san, a namtui nate ahi hi." 
Philippians4:19 A na ka sep i Topa Pasian in ama hauhna tawh kizui-in Khris Jesu hangin noteʼ kitangsapna khempeuh hong pia ding hi. 
Philippians4:20 I Pa Pasian in a tawntungin minthanna ngah tahen. Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Khris Jesu sungah a om mi siangthote khempeuh na na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a om khawm kamsangte khempeuh in zong note hong hopih uh hi. 
Philippians4:22 Hih lai-a om Khristian khempeuh, a diakdiakin kumpi nasem i lawmte in note hong hopih uh hi." 
Philippians4:23 Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha, note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen." 
Colossians1:1 Pasianʼ deihna tawh Jesu Khrisʼ sawltak dingin a hong kiseh keimah Paul le i sanggam Timoti in," 
Colossians1:2 Kolose khua ah a om Pasianʼ mi ahi, Khris sungah kip takin a om sanggamte tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. I Pa Pasian in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen." 
Colossians1:3 Note in Khris Jesu na muanna uh le Pasianʼ mite khempeuh na itna thu uh za ka hih manun note ading thu ka hong ngetsak uh ciangin i Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi. 
Colossians1:4  
Colossians1:5 Thu dang na zak ma un, lungdamna thuman taktak na zak uh ciangin lametna na nei uh hi. Note adingin vantungah a hong kikoihsak tua lametna hangin note in muanna le itna a nei na hi uh hi." 
Colossians1:6 Note in Pasian hong hehpihna thu za-in, ahi bangbangin na theih hun uh a kipanin thupha na ngah uh bangin leitung midang khempeuh tungah zong lungdamna thu in thupha tunin, leitung khempeuh ah a kizel ahi hi." 
Colossians1:7 Hih thu pen, Khris nasepna sungah koteʼ tangin citakin na a sem, koteʼ nasep pih Epafras tung panin na zak uh ahi hi." 
Colossians1:8 Amah in, Kha Siangthoʼ piak itna na neihna uh zong, kote kiangah a hong gen hi." 
Colossians1:9 Tua bangin noteʼ thu ka zak uh hun a kipanin Pasian kiangah thu ka hong ngetsak uh a, kha thu tawh kisai pilna le theihtelnate nei-in, Pasianʼ deihna na theihtheih nadingun ka hong ngetsak uh hi." 
Colossians1:10 Tua bang hileh Topaʼ deihna bangin nungta-in, amah a lungkimsak ding thute bek na sem tawntung ding uh a, na gamtatnate uh a hoih bekbek hong hi-in, Pasianʼ thu na theihna uh hong khang semsem ding hi." 
Colossians1:11 Note in lungduai maitai takin thuak zo-in, khuavak gam sungah a om Pasianʼ mite tawh nopsakna a ngahkhawm thei dingin a hong bawl i Pa tungah lungdamna na koh theih nadingun a minthang ama vangliatna in note tungah thahatna hong guan tahen." 
Colossians1:12  
Colossians1:13 Amah in khuamial vangliatna panin eite hong hon khia-in, a lungmuanhuaina mun, a it a Tapaʼ ukna sungah hong koih a," 
Colossians1:14 tua a Tapa in eite hong khah khia a, i mawhna hong kimaisak khinta hi." 
Colossians1:15 Khris pen a kimu thei lo Pasianʼ lim hi a, a kipiangsak khempeuh lakah tapa upa pen ahi hi." 
Colossians1:16 Vantung le leitungah a om na khempeuh, kha thu tawh kisai vangliatna, tote, mi ukte, aana neihnate a kipan a kimu thei hitaleh a kimu thei lo hitaleh na khempeuh, Pasian in amah zangin a piangsak hi. Leitung a kipanin huih lakah a om khempeuh dongin, Pasian in Khris adingin a mahmah zangin a piangsak hi." 
Colossians1:17 Na khempeuh khat beek a om ma-in amah om khinta a, amah tawh a kipawl manin na khempeuh ama mun sansan ah hoihtakin a om thei hi." 
Colossians1:18 Na khempeuh ah amah a lian pen ahih theih nadingin, amah pen pawlpi ahi ama pumpi lutang hi a, pawlpiʼ nuntakna a kipatna hi a, sihna panin a kithokiksak Tapa cil ahi hi." 
Colossians1:19 Tua Tapa in Pasianʼ pianzia a kimin a neih nading, Pasian mahmah in a seh sa ahi hi." 
Colossians1:20 Pasian in a Tapa zangin na khempeuh ama kiangah a kaihkik ding a seh sa ahi hi. Tua ahih manin singlamteh tungah a Tapa a sihna hangin amah tawh kilemkik theih nading hong omsak ahih manin, leitung, vantung a om khempeuh ama kiangah a hong tunkik ahi hi." 
Colossians1:21 A beisa hunah noteʼ lungsim gitlohna le gamtat siatna hangin Pasian tawh kigamla-in Pasianʼ gal na hi uh hi. 
Colossians1:22 Ahi zongin, a Tapa a pumpi mahmah in a hong sihna hangin note, a cidam, a siangtho, paubaanna om het loin ama kiangah hong lak theih nadingin Pasian in note ama lawmin a hong bawl khinta ahi hi." 
Colossians1:23 Ahi zongin note in lungdamna thu na zak cil lai-un na neih uh lametna panin liing het loin, bulkip nei-in citakin na om paisuak ding uh ahi hi. Tua lungdamna thu mah keimah Paul in hilhin ka sepbel hi a, leitung mun khempeuh ah a kihilh lungdamna thu mah ahi hi." 
Colossians1:24 Tu-in ka pumpi-in ka thuakna tawh Khris in ama pumpi ahi pawlpi adingin a thuak ding a kisam lai teng a kitaangcingsak suak ka hih manin note adingin ka thuakna thu ah ka lung a dam hi. 
Colossians1:25 Pasianʼ thu a kicing takin noteʼ phattuam nadingin a hilh dingin pawlpi nasem dingin Pasian in kei a hong bawl hi. 
Colossians1:26 Tua thuhilh ding pen a beisa hunah a ki-imcip thu hi a, ahi zongin tu-in Pasianʼ mite tungah a kipholak ta ahi hi." 
Colossians1:27 Pasian in mi khempeuh adingin a koihcing hih a thupi a deihhuai a thusim pen ama mite tungah pholak ding a sawm ahi hi. Tua thusim in: Khris tawh a kipawlte in Pasian tawh minthanna ngahkhawm ding hi, cihna ahi hi." 
Colossians1:28 Tua ahih manin a milip tungah Khrisʼ thu ka hilh uh a, Khris tawh a kipawlna uh hangin a milipin a khang cingin Pasianʼ omna ah ka tunpih theih nadingun a milip tungah hilhin ka gen khol uh hi." 
Colossians1:29 Hih bang a tangtun theih nadingin Khris in kei tungah a hong piak ka thahatna khempeuh zangin, nakpi takin na semin ka hanciam hi." 
Colossians2:1 Note a kipan Laodisia khua mite le kei a hong thei ngei nai lo mi khempeuhte ading nangawnin hahkat takin na ka sem hi. 
Colossians2:2 Note, lungsim hanna tawh kidimin, thu a man taktakin na theihna hangun lungkip takin omin, itna tawh pum khat na suah theih nading uh ka deihna ahi hi. Tua hileh Pasianʼ thusim ahi Khris mahmah na thei ding uh hi." 
Colossians2:3 Khris pen Pasianʼ pilna le a thuthuk khempeuh a kitheih theih nading ahi hi. 
Colossians2:4 Kuamah in note a hong khem zawh loh nadingin hih bang thu a hong gen ka hi hi. 
Colossians2:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh ka hong om khawm loh hangin ka lungsimin note tawh ka hong om khawm a, Khris na upna uh hangin kip takin na om khawmna uh ka theih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
Colossians2:6 Note hong honpa dingin Topa Khris na san sa uh ahih mah bangin amah tawh hoihtakin kipawlin nungta un. 
Colossians2:7 Note tungah a hong kihilh sa bangin ama sungah zung thuk kha unla, ama deihna bangin nungta-in, na upna uh ah khauh semsemin, lungdam takin om un." 
Colossians2:8 Khris thu tawh a kituak lopi-in, tangthu tuanthu ahi a, huihlak a ukteʼ thu siksanin ahi zongin, bangmahin a kimang lo leitung pilna tawh miteʼ khem sa-in sila na suahkhak loh nadingun kingaihsun un." 
Colossians2:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihing hong suahna sungah Khris in Pasianʼ pianzia khempeuh a kimtakin nei a," 
Colossians2:10 Khris tawh na kipawlna hangun nuntakna kicing na nei uh hi. Huih lak a ukte le aana neite khempeuh tungah amah a lutangpi hi lai hi. 
Colossians2:11 Amah tawh na kipawlna uh hangin mihingte in pumpi vun a at uh bang hi loin, Khrisʼ vun-atna ahi mawhnopna lungsim tawh kipelhna a ngah khinta na hi uh hi." 
Colossians2:12 Note tui na kiphum uh ciangin Jesu tawh kiphum khawmin, misiteʼ lak panin Khris a thosak Pasianʼ vangliatna na up manun Khris mah tawh tuiphumna panin a thokhawm leuleu na hi uh hi." 
Colossians2:13 A beisa hunah na mawhna uh hangin kha thu tawh kisai-in misi na hi uh a, Gentail mi na hih manun Thukham nei lote na hi uh hi. Ahi zongin Khris hangin Pasian in note hong hingsak a, i mawhna khempeuh hong maisak khinta hi." 
Colossians2:14 Eite adingin a hoih lo, i mawhna a kiciaptehna khempeuh, hong phiatsak a, tuate khempeuh singlamteh tungah kilhcipin a beisak ta hi." 
Colossians2:15 Amah in huihlak a ukte le vangliatna a nei khempeuh, singlamteh tungah zo gawp khin a, gal zote in a sal matte a kaih uh bangin mi khempeuh muhin a gualzawhna a lak hi." 
Colossians2:16 Tua ahih manin an nek tui dawn, biakna pawite, Khadet pawi le Sabbath ni tawh kisai-in kuamah in ngeina zuih ding bawl kei un." 
Colossians2:17 Hihte pen mai lamah a hong piang ding nateʼ lim hi lel a, ahi zongin tu-in a taktak ahi Khris hong om ta hi." 
Colossians2:18 Maang a muhna hangun a thupi diakin kingaihsunin, a kilawm lo zah dongin kiniamkhiat nading le vantung mite biak ding a hong hanthawn miteʼ khem sa-in ta kei un. Tua bang mite pen amauʼ ngaihsut tawmna tawh a kihisak mawk hi a," 
Colossians2:19 lutang ahi Khris a len nawn lo uh ahi hi. Lutang ahi Khrisʼ ukna tawh pumpi na khempeuh kizom dimdiam uh ahih manin pumpi in thahatna ngah a, Pasianʼ deih bangin a khangto hi." 
Colossians2:20 Khris tawh si khawm khin na hih manun huihlak a ukteʼ khut sung panin a suakta khin na hi uh hi. Tua hi napi-in, bang hangin hih leitung mite bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin ngeina a tuamtuamte," 
Colossians2:21 “Lawng kei un, ciam kei un, su kei un,” cihte zuihin nei na hi uh hiam?" 
Colossians2:22 Hih nate pen i nek, i zat khit ciangin a maimang hi lel a, mihingteʼ bawl tawm thuhilhna le ngeina hi lel hi." 
Colossians2:23 Hih bang gamtatnate pen a tungtham in i et ciangin limtakin biaknopna lungsim a piangsak ding, kiniamkhiatna a piangsak ding, pumpi ki-uk zawhna a piangsak ding tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin a taktakin hihte khat beek in pumpi ki-uk zawhna piangsak zo lo hi." 
Colossians3:1 Note pen Khris tawh a thokik khinte na hih manun, Pasianʼ taklam a kumpi tokhom tungah Khris a tutna mun vantung thute ngaihsutin nei un." 
Colossians3:2 Vantungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei unla, leitungah a om thute ngaihsutin nei kei un." 
Colossians3:3 Note a si khin na hi uh a, noteʼ nuntakna pen Khris tawh Pasianʼ sungah a kiseel khawm ahi hi." 
Colossians3:4 Noteʼ nuntakna taktak Khris ahih manin amah hong kilat ciangin note zong amah tawh hong kilang khawmin amah tawh na minthang khawm ding uh hi. 
Colossians3:5 Tua ahih manin nulepa mawhna, a kilawm lo gamtatna, hukna lanna, a hoih lo lunggulhna le milim biakna nam khat ahih manin huaihamna ahi note sungah a om leitung lungsimte na sisak un." 
Colossians3:6 Ama thu a mang lo mite tungah hih bang gamtatna hangin Pasianʼ hehna hong tung ding hi. 
Colossians3:7 Note pen hih bangin gamta-in a nungta ngeite na hi uh hi. 
Colossians3:8 Ahi zongin tu-in hehna, thangpaihna, muhdahna, gensiatna, kam hoih lo pauna cihte nei nawn kei un." 
Colossians3:9 Ngeina lui le gamtatna lui khempeuh a beisak khin na hihna uh kithei-in khatlekhat tungah zuau thu kigen nawn kei unla," 
Colossians3:10 ngeina thak tawh kituakin gamta un. Eite a hong piangsak Pasian a kicing takin i theih semsem nadingin amah a sun dingin a hong thakbawl tawntung ahi hi. 
Colossians3:11 Tua ahih manin Gentail mi le Jew mi, vun at mi le vun at loh mi, khuapi mi le khua neu mi, sila le sila ahi lo, cih bangin a kilamdanna om lo a, Khris pen mi khempeuh ading hi thei a, thu khempeuh ading hi thei a, thu khempeuh ah amah bek ahi hi." 
Colossians3:12 Pasian in note hong itin, hong teelin, ama mi siangthote hi khin na hih manun note pen hehpihna nei-in, migi-in, kiniamkhiatin, dikin, na lungduai ding uh ahi hi." 
Colossians3:13 Note lakah khatlekhat a kilungkim lo na om uh ciangin khatlekhat na mawhna uh kimaisakin na kihuh ciat un. Topa in noteʼ mawhna hong maisak bangin note zong khatlekhat na mawhna uh na kimaisak ding uh hi. 
Colossians3:14 Hihte khempeuh banah, mi khempeuh kilem takin a hong om khawmsak thei ahi ki-itna na bulphuh un." 
Colossians3:15 Note pum khat suakin a lungdam khawm dingin Pasian in a hong sap ahih mah bangin Khris hong piak nopsakna in noteʼ lungsim hong uk ta henla, lungdamin om ta un." 
Colossians3:16 Khris thu a cing takin note lungsimah hong om henla, pilna tawh khatlekhat thu kihilhin na kitai un. Pasian tungah lungdam kohna-in Thuciam Lui sunga late, la thakte le biakna late na sa un." 
Colossians3:17 Na kampauna, na gamtatnate khempeuh uh ah, Topa Jesu hangin Pa Pasian tungah lungdam kohna-in Jesu min paulamin na hih ding uh hi." 
Colossians3:18 Zite aw, Khristiante gamtat dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin na pasalte uh thu na mang un." 
Colossians3:19 Pasalte aw, na zite uh it unla, amaute tungah ngongtat kei un." 
Colossians3:20 Tate aw, na nu na pate uh thu man tawntung ding pen na Khristian nasep uh ahi hi. Tua bang thumanna in Pasian lungdamsak hi." 
Colossians3:21 Pate aw, na tate un a thuak zawh loh zah dong dingin thuhilhin taii niloh kei un." 
Colossians3:22 Silate aw, thu khempeuh ah na leitung topa uh thu na mang un. Amauʼ hong pahtak ding deihna tawh a hong muh sung bekin a hoih tatte hi kei unla, Topa na zahtakna uh hangin lungsim tak tawh gamta un." 
Colossians3:23 Miteʼ nasem bangin kingaihsun loin, Pasianʼ nasem bangin kingaihsun unla, na sep peuhpeuh uh lungsim takpi tawh lawpin sem un." 
Colossians3:24 Topa in note tungah thaman a hong piak ding lamtak phawk gige un. Tua bangin na sepna uh ah Khris Topaʼ na a semsem na hi uh hi. 
Colossians3:25 A man loin a gamtate in ahihleh a gamtatna bangun thuak ding uh hi. Pasian in kuamah deidan loin amauʼ gamtatna bang ciatin thu a khen ahi hi. 
Colossians4:1 Tote aw, note in zong vantungah To khat na neihna uh phawk unla, na silate uh a kilawm a kituakin bawl un." 
Colossians4:2 Lungsim takpi tawh thu ngen tawntung unla, kidawm kawmin lungdamna tawh thu ngen un." 
Colossians4:3 Mite kiangah Khrisʼ thusim hilh theih nadingin Pasian in kote tungah hunpha hong piak theih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un. Ka thongkiatna pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi. 
Colossians4:4 Miteʼ tel theih dingin a kitel takin ka gen theih nadingin thu hong ngetsak un. 
Colossians4:5 A pualam mite tungah a kilawm a kituakin gamta unla, hunhoih na ngah khempeuh uh na valkhongsak ngei kei un." 
Colossians4:6 Kam na pau uh ciangin miʼ zaknop, miʼ ngaih nop dingin na pau un. Tua hileh na kihopih uh mite khempeuh adingin phattuamna a nei kam a pau na hi ding uh hi." 
Colossians4:7 Topaʼ nasepna ah citakin a manpha mahmah ka nasep pih uh ka sanggam uh Tikhikas in keiʼ thu a kicing takin note kiangah hong gen ding hi. 
Colossians4:8 Hih lai-a koteʼ om zia hong gen ciangin noteʼ lungsim a nop theih nadingin amah a hong paisak ka hi hi. 
Colossians4:9 Noteʼ khuapih mi, a citak i sanggam it pa Onesimas zong ka hong zuisak hi. Amau tegel in hih lai-a thupiang khempeuh note kiangah hong gen ding uh hi." 
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kia khawm Aristarkhas in note hong hopih hi. Barnabasʼ sanggamnuʼ tapa Marka in zong hong hopih hi (amah hong pai ciangin hoihtakin na pawlbawl un, ci-a hong kigen pa ahi hi)." 
Colossians4:10 Kei tawh thong a kia khawm Aristarkhas in note hong hopih hi. Barnabasʼ sanggamnuʼ tapa Marka in zong hong hopih hi (amah hong pai ciangin hoihtakin na pawlbawl un, ci-a hong kigen pa ahi hi)." 
Colossians4:11 Justas zong a kici zel Jesu in zong note hong hopih hi. Vun-atna a zang Jew mi Khristian a hong suakte lak panin hih mi thumte bek, Pasian thu ah ka nasep pih lakah a hong kihel ahi hi. Ka nasepna ah amaute in nakpi takin hong huh uh hi." 
Colossians4:12 Jesu Khris nasem, noteʼ makai Epafras in zong hong hopih hi. Pasianʼ deihna bangin note nungta-in, lungsim khanghamin kip takin na om theih nadingun amah in thu hong ngetsak tawntung hi." 
Colossians4:13 Amah in note-aʼ ding a kipan Laodisia khua le Hierapolis khua mite adingin nakpi takin na a sepna thu ka thei hi. 
Colossians4:14 I it siavuanpa Luka le Demas in zong hong hopih uh hi. 
Colossians4:15 Laodisia khua-a om i sanggamte le Nymfas le ama inn-a a kikhawm pawlpi mite na hopihsak un. 
Colossians4:16 Hih ka hong laikhak na sim khit uh ciangin Laodisia khua-a om pawlpite zong na simsak unla, Laodisia khua pawlpite kiang pan hong pai ding lai zong note in na sim hamtang un." 
Colossians4:17 Tua ciangin Arkhippas kiangah, “Pasian adingin nasepna nang tungah hong kipia pen hoihtakin na zo in,” ci-in na gen un." 
Colossians4:18 Keimah Paulʼ khut mahmah tawh, Note ka hong hopih hi, cihna lai ka gelh ahi hi. Sikkhau khihna ka thuakna thu mangngilh kei un. Note khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Keimah Paul le Silas le Timoti in Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris sungah a om Thesalonika khua-a om pawlpi mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. Pasian in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
1Thessalonians1:2 Note khempeuh hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko tawntungin, ka thungetna uh ah note ka hong phawk tawntung uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh i Pa Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simun noteʼ upna hangin na nuntak ziate uh, itna na neih manun nakpi takin na nasepnate uh le i Topa Jesu Khris hong paikik ding lametna na neih manun kip takin na omnate uh ka phawk tawntung uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note hong itin ama mi dingin a hong teel khitna thu ka thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah Lungdamna Thu kong hilh lai-un kam bek tawh a hong gen hi loin, Kha Siangthoʼ vangliatna le Lungdamna Thu a man taktak hi, ci-in theihna tawh a hong pai ka hi uh hi. Note kiangah ka om laitakun noteʼ phattuam nadingin ka sep ka bawlna khempeuh uh na thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Kote le Topaʼ gamtat bangin note na gamta uh a, note in gimna nakpi takin thuak lawh napi-in Kha Siangthoʼ huhna tawh lungdam takin thu umin na om uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Tua ahih manin Masedonia gam le Akhaia gam sung khempeuh ah thu um mi khempeuhte adingin etteh hoih na suak uh hi. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Noteʼ gamtatna ziateʼ hangin Masedonia le Akhaia gam sungteng bekah Topaʼ thu a kithei hi loin, note in Pasian na upna thu uh mun khempeuh ah kiza ahih manin koteʼ gen ding bangmah kisam nawn lo hi." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Note kiangah ka hong pai lai-un kote na hong limbawlna thu uh le a nungta a man Pasianʼ thu zui-in a bia ding le," 
1Thessalonians1:10 a hong tung ding Pasianʼ hehna panin eite a hong hon khia, sihna panin Pasian in a thawhsakkik a Tapa Jesu, van panin a hong pai ding ngak dingin milim paisanin Pasianʼ lamah na kiheina uh thute mi khempeuh in gen belin a nei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Sanggamte aw, note kiangah ka hong paina sa thu a mawkna a suah lohna thu nomau mahmah in na thei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Note in na theih sa uh mah bangin Thesalonika khua ka hong tun ma-un Filippi khua ah simmawh bawlna le maizumna ka thuak uh hi. Tua bangin nakpi takin hong kilangbawlna hangin Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu note kiangah gen ngam nadingin i Pasian in kote sungah lungsim hanna a hong guan hi. 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kote in thu kong hilh uh ciangin thuman lo, ngimna hoih lo le khemnopna lungsim tawh a hong hilh ka hi kei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Pasian in kote hong thei-in Lungdamna Thu a hilh dingin kilawm hong sa ahih mah bangin miteʼ lungdam theih nadingin thu a hilh hi loin koteʼ lungsim ngimna a hong thei Pasianʼ lungkim nadingin thu a hilh ka hizaw uh hi. 
1Thessalonians2:5 Tua ahih manin note in na theih uh mah bangin miteʼ lungdam theih nading phatna kamte ka zang kei uh a, koteʼ phattuam nading ngaihsutna tawh zong bangmah ka sem het kei uh hi. Hih bang ka hihna uh Pasian in hong thei hi." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Khris sawltakte ka hihna uh hangin phatna ka ngah ding uh a kilawm hi napi-in note le midangte, a kuamah peuhʼ hong phat ding a zong ka hi kei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Note kiangah ka hong om lai-un nupite in a tate uh itna tawh a bawl bangin note kong bawl uh hi. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Note hong it mahmah ka hih manun Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu bek hong gen loin, koteʼ nuntakna mahmah zong note adingin a pia ngamin ka om uh hi. Tua ahih manin koteʼ hong muhna ah note a manpha mahmah na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Sanggamte aw, ka nasep ka silbawlnate khempeuh uh note in na thei uh hi. Pasian kiang panin a hong pai Lungdamna Thu note kiangah ka hong hilhna hangun note in them khat beek na gim lawh khak loh nadingun a sun a zanin nakpi takin na ka sem uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Note in hih thu na theih uh mah bangin Pasian in zong hong thei hi. Thu um note tungah kong gamtatnate uh siangtho-in thuman a, paubaan nading bangmah om het lo hi." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Pa in a tate a bawl bangin note ka hong bawlna uh na thei uh hi. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Note hong hehnemin ka hong hanthawn uh a, amah tawh ukna le minthanna a ngahkhawm dingin a hong sam Pasianʼ lungkimna bangin na gamtat theih nadingun ka hong gengen uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Note kiangah Pasianʼ thu kong gen uh ciangin no thu um mite sungah ama thu tawh kisai-in Pasian in na hong sem ahih manin koteʼ thugente pen Pasianʼ thu taktak ahih mah bangin koteʼ thugenna na zak uh ciangin mihingʼ thu bangin ngaihsun loin Pasianʼ thu taktak mahin hong sang na hih manun, hih thu hangin zong Pasianʼ tungah ka lungdamna uh ka ko uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, Judea gam sunga om, Khris Jesu thu a um, Pasianʼ mi ahi mite in a thuak bangin note in zong a thuak na hi uh hi. Amaute in Jew miteʼ bawlsiatna a thuak uh mah bangin note in zong noteʼ gam mite mahʼ bawlsiatna na thuak uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, Judea gam sunga om, Khris Jesu thu a um, Pasianʼ mi ahi mite in a thuak bangin note in zong a thuak na hi uh hi. Amaute in Jew miteʼ bawlsiatna a thuak uh mah bangin note in zong noteʼ gam mite mahʼ bawlsiatna na thuak uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Tua Jew mite in Topa Jesu le kamsangte that uh a, kote zong hong bawlsia uh hi. Pasianʼ lungkim loh nadingin gamta uh a, mi khempeuh langbawl uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Gentail mite tungah hotkhiatna thu ka gen ding uh hong khaktan uh ahih manin amauʼ mawhna sate a behlap niloh a suak uh hi. Ahi zongin a tawpna ah Pasianʼ hehna amaute tungah a tung ta hi. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Sanggamte aw, kote ahihleh no tawh i lungsim a kikhen loh hangin tawl khat sung i pumpi a kikhen sungin note ka hong phawk mahmah uh a, note kiangah hawhkik ding nakpi takin ka hanciam uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Note kiangah hong hawhkik nuam ka hih manun note kiangah hawhkik ding ka hanciam zelzel hangun kong pai ding uh Satan in hong khaktan hi. 
1Thessalonians2:19 Tua banga kong pai nopna uh pen, note bek mah koteʼ lamet, ka lungdamna uh le koteʼ gualzawhna lukhu na hi uh a, Topa Jesu hong pai ciangin ama mai ah kong kisialh pih ding uh na hi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Koteʼ thupi suahna le lungdamna pen note bek mah na hi takpi uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:1 A tawpna ah ka thuak zawh nawn loh uh ciangin Athen khua ah kei le Silas omin," 
1Thessalonians3:2 Khris Lungdamna Thu hilhna ah Pasian adingin kote tawh na a sem khawm i sanggampa Timoti hong paisak le-ung hoih pen ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun uh hi. Amah in note hong hanthawnin na upna uh ah hong kipsakin," 
1Thessalonians3:3 hih bawlsiatna hangin note khat beek na puk loh nading uh deihna tawh a hong paisak ka hi uh hi. Hih bang bawlsiatna pen i thuak ding mah hi, ci-in note in zong na theih uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh kong om khawm lai-un zong, na theih sa uh bangin tu-a na thuak bangte teekteek mah uh a thuak ding hi hang, ci-in ka hong gen kholh sa uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Tua ahih manin ka thuak zawh nawn loh ciangin noteʼ upna zia a thei dingin Timoti ka hong sawl hi. Dawimangpaʼ ze-etna in note hong puksak kha-in, koteʼ nasepna a mawkna suak kha ding hi, ci-in ka lunghimawh uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ahi zongin tu-in note kiang panin Timoti hong tung khin a, noteʼ upna le nong itna uh thute a hong gen hi. Kote na hong lim ngaihsutnate uh le kote in ka hong muhnop uh mah bangin note in zong kote na hong muhnopna uh thute khempeuh a hong gen hi." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, noteʼ upna thu ka zak uh ciangin lungkham sinkhamna ka thuak laitakun ka tha uh hong hatsak hi." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Topaʼ thu ah kip takin om na hih manun tu-in ka husang thei ta uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Tu-in note hangin Pasian tungah ka lungdamna uh ka ko thei ta uh a, note hangin ka lungdamna khempeuh uh, Pasian tungah ka ko uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Pasian in eite maitang kimu-in hong omsak theih nading le noteʼ upna ka hong kicinsak theih nadingun a sun a zanin lungsim takpi tawh thu ka ngenngen uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Tu-in eiteʼ Pa ahi Pasian le i Topa Jesu in note kiangah ka hong pai theih nading uh lampi hong honsak tahen. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Kote in note ka hong it zahun, note khatlekhat na ki-itna uh le mi khempeuh na itna uh, hong liansak semsem tahen." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Tua hileh i Topa Jesu a mi siangthote khempeuh tawh hong pai ciangin eiteʼ Pa ahi Pasianʼ mai ah kisuanna om het loin lungsim siangtho takin na om thei ding uh hi. 
1Thessalonians4:1 Tu-in sanggamte aw, Pasianʼ deihna le ama lungkim nadingin bangci nuntak ding cih thu kote kiang panin na theih sa uh thute tawh kizui-in na nuntak sa uh ahih mah bangin a kicing zaw semsemin na nuntak nadingun i Topa Jesu min tawh hong thumin ka hong hanthawn uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Jesu min tawh ka hong thuhilhnate uh na theih sa uh ahi hi. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Note a siangtho-in nungta-in numei tunga mawhna tawh na kipelh siangtho nading uh Pasian in hong deih hi. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Pasian a thei lo dawi biate in kilunggulhna hang bek tawh a pumpi uh a zat bang hi loin, note in a kilawm a siangtho-in na pumpi uh bangci zat ding cih thu na theih ding uh hong deih hi." 
1Thessalonians4:5  
1Thessalonians4:6 Hih bang thute ah kuamah in Khris sungah na sanggamte uh tungah na khialh loh nading uh le na khasiatsak loh nading uh hong deih hi. Pasian in hih bangin a gamta mite gim pia ding hi, ci-in khauh takin note kiangah ka hong gen khol khinzo uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Eite a thanghuai gamtat dingin Pasian in a hong sam hi lo a, a siangtho-in a nungta dingin a hong sam ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Tua ahih manin hih thute a thudon lo mi in mite a thudon lo hi loin, note tungah ama Kha Siangtho a hong pia Pasian a thusim lo ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ahi zongin thu up pih mite it ding tawh kisai-in bangmah gelh ding na kisam nawn kei uh hi. Khatlekhat na ki-it nading uh Pasian in note tungah hong hilh khinzo hi. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Masedonia gam sunga om thu um mi khempeuh na it khin takpi uh hi. Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, itna na neih semsem nadingun ka hong thum uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Tu ma-a ka hong gen sa uh mah bangin kam tam nuam se loin hoihtakin om hithiatna, no tawh a kisai thu bek ngaihsutna le noteʼ nuntak nading na na sep nading uh hanciamin nei un." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Tua bangin gamta le-uhcin thu um lo mite in note hong zahtak ding uh a, miteʼ neihsa na duhgawh kei ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Sanggamte aw, lametna a nei lo mite bangin na dah luat loh nadingun a si sa miteʼ om zia ding thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Jesu si-in thokik hi, ci-in i up mah bangin Pasian in Jesu hong paipihkik ciangin amah umin a si mite zong hong tonpih ding hi, ci-in i um hi." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Topaʼ thugen note kiangah kong gen uh thu in: Topa hong paikik ni ciangin a nungta lai eite pen a si sa mite tawh i kimuh ma-in Topa tawh i kimu kei ding hi. 
1Thessalonians4:16 Pasianʼ thupiakna awging lianpi, vantungmi mangpaʼ thugenna le Pasianʼ peengkul hong ging dinga, vantung panin Topa mahmah hong pai suk ding hi." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Tua ciangin tua hun laitakin a nungta lai eite pen vankim lai ah Topa a dawn dingin amah a um a si sa mite tawh hong kilakhawm dinga, Topa tawh i om khawm tawntung ding hi, cihna ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Tua ahih ciangin note khatlekhat hih thu tawh na kihehnem un. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, hih thu hong pian ding hun tawh kisai kong gelh ding uh kisam lo hi." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hong pai ding Ni pen zan a gutate bangin theih kholh lohin hong tung ding hi, ci-in note in teltakin na theih sa uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Mite in, “Thu khempeuh a hoih laitak hi a, bangmah patauh nading om lo hi,” a cih laitakin thakhat thu-in amaute tungah siatna hong tung vat ding hi. Nausuah natna bangin gimna thuak ding uh a, kuamah suakta lo ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, note na hih uh leh khuamial gamtatnate gamta lo na hih manun guta bangin tua Ni hong tun vat ciangin lamdang na sa kei ding uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh note khempeuh, khuavak gamtatna a nei, sun khuavak mite na hi uh a, eite pen khuamial gamtatna a nei, zan khuamial mite ihi kei hi." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Tua ahih ciangin midangte bangin eite mawk om hithiat loin khua phawkin pilvang ni. 
1Thessalonians5:7 Zan khuamial pen miteʼ ihmut hithiat hun le zukham hun ahi hi. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ahi zongin eite pen khuavak gamtatna a nei sun khuavak mi ihih manin pilvang ni. Awmdal bangin upna le itna bulhin, sik lukhu bangin i lamet hotkhiatna khu ni." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pasian in ama hehna a thuak dingin eite a hong teel hi lo a, i Topa Jesu Khris hangin hotkhiatna a ngah dingin a hong teel ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Amah a hong paikik ciangin a hing ihi a, a si ihi zongin amah tawh i om khawm theih nadingin eite adingin amah a hong si ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Tua ahih manin tu laitakin na om zia uh mah bangin khatlekhat kihanthawnin na kihuh ciat ta un. 
1Thessalonians5:12 Sanggamte aw, Topa in note lam a hong lak ding le a hong makai dingin a seh, note lakah na a hong sem mite, a kilawm a kituakin zahtak bawl un." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Amauʼ nasepna hangin amaute nakpi takin it bawlin zahtak un. Note khatlekhat kilem takin na om un. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Sanggamte aw, a thadah mite hilh unla, a meidawite hanthawnin, a zawngkhal mite huh unla, hih bang mite ngongbawl kei un." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Gitlohna lamsang kuamah kithuk loin, note khatlekhat tung le mi khempeuh tungah a pha kibawl ding ngaihsutpi-in na nei un." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Lungdam tawntungin," 
1Thessalonians5:17 thu ngen niloh unla," 
1Thessalonians5:18 bangbang hong piang taleh na lungdamna uh Pasian tungah ko tawntung un. Khris Jesu tawh kipawlin na nuntakna sung uh ah hih bangzia-in na om ding uh Pasian in a hong deih ahi hi. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Kha Siangtho nasepna dongtangsak kei unla," 
1Thessalonians5:20 thuhilhnate simmawh bawl kei un. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Thu khempeuh en tel pha unla, a hoihte kemin," 
1Thessalonians5:22 a sia lamsang peuhmah pelh un. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in na khempeuh ah sianthona le kicinna hong pia henla, na kha uh, na nuntakna uh le na pumpi uh hoihtakin hong kem henla, i Topa Jesu Khris hong pai ciangin mawhna khat zong a nei het lo dingin hong bawl tahen." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Note a hong sam i Pa Pasian a thutak hi a, a thuciamte khempeuh hong tungsak taktak ding hi." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Sanggamte aw, kote ading thu hong ngetsak un." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Thu up pih mi khempeuh khatlekhat a siangtho ki-itna lungsim tawh kinamin na kihopih un. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Thu um mi khempeuhʼ zak dingin hih lai na sim nadingun Topaʼ min tawh kong thum hi. 
1Thessalonians5:28 I Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha note tungah hong tung tahen. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Keimah Paul le Silas le Timoti te in: Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris sungah a om, Thesalonika khua-a om pawlpi mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Sanggamte aw, noteʼ upna nakpi takin khang a, note khatlekhat na ki-itna uh lian semsem ahih manin Pasian tungah lungdamna koh ding a kilawm ahih mah bangin, note hangin ama tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Bawlsiatna le gimna na thuakna khempeuh uh ah na upna uh khahsuah loin thuak zo paisuak na hih manun midangte kiangah Pasianʼ pawlpi ka na kisialh pih uh hi. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Tu-a na thuaknate uh hangin Pasianʼ Ukna sungah a om dingin a kilawm mi suak na hih manun Pasianʼ thukhenna a man ahihna hong kilangsak hi. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Pasian in a manin na sem ding ahih manin note a hong gimsak mite tungah Pasian in gimna pia dinga," 
2Thessalonians1:7 tu-a gimna a thuak note le kote tungah zong nopsakna hong pia ding hi. Vantung panin Topa Jesu le a vanglian a vantung mite, meikuang tawh hong kilat ciangin," 
2Thessalonians1:8 Pasian a thei lo mite le i Topa Jesu tawh kisai Lungdamna Thu a um lo mite tungah gimna a tungsak ding hi. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Ama mite khempeuh le thu um mite khempeuh hangin minthanna le pahtawina a ngah dingin Topa hong pai Ni ciangin a noptuak mahmah Topaʼ minthanna huam sung panin amaute kihawl khia dinga, tawntung suksiatna dan a thuak ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note in kong gen uh thute um na hih manun tua nopna sungah na om ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:10  
2Thessalonians1:11 Tua ahih manin ama hong sapna tawh a kilawm a kituak nuntakna na nuntak theih nading uh le ama vangliatna tawh a hoih na hih nop khempeuh uh hih zo-in, na upna uh hangin na khempeuh na zawh theih nadingun Pasian kiangah thu ka hong ngetsak tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Tua hileh, eiteʼ Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris hong hehpihna hangin note in ama tung panin minthanna ngahin, ama min zong a thangsak na hi ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Sanggamte aw, i Topa Jesu Khris hong pai nading thu le amah a dawn dingin eite i kikhop nading thu tawh kisai-in note kiangah kong thum nopna uh panin:" 
2Thessalonians2:2 Topaʼ hong pai ding ni hong tung khinta hi, ci-a thu kigenna hangin lunghimawhin lungmangin om kei un. Thuhilh khat peuhpeuh in hih bang thu hong gen kha thei dinga, tua thu pen koteʼ gen leh gelh hi, ci-in zong gen kha ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ahi zongin kuama khem sa-in ta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh nakpi takin Pasian langpanna lianpi le hell khuk sung a tung ding ahi A Gilopa hong kilat matengin tua Ni hong tung lo ding hi. 
2Thessalonians2:4 Tua A Gilopa in miteʼ biak pasian a kici khempeuh le na khempeuh nial gawp ding hi. Tuate khempeuh sangin a lian zaw-in a kingaihsut banah, Pasian ka hi hi, ci-in Pasianʼ biakinn sung mahmah ah pai-in va tu ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Note tawh ka hong om khawm lai-in hih thute khempeuh hong gen khin ka hih manin na phawk lai ding uh hi. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ahi zongin tu laitakin tua bang a pian loh nadingin a kham khat om ahihna thu na thei uh hi. A hun a tun ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang ding hi. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Kuamah kim in a phawk loh Gitloh Gamtatna kigamta khinta a, ahi zongin hih thu a pian ding a khamcip pa a kilakkhiat khit matengin a hong piang ding thu hong piang nai lo ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:8 A khamcip pa a kilakkhiat khit ciangin A Gilopa hong kilang dinga, Topa Jesu hong pai ciangin tua A Gilopa mut lum dinga, vanglian minthangin hong kilatna tawh a maimangsak ding hi." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Satanʼ vangliatna tawh A Gilopa hong pai-in, lim le nalamdang a tuamtuamte hong bawl dinga," 
2Thessalonians2:10 gitloh khemna a nam tuamtuam zangin, siatna a thuak ding mite a khem ding hi. Tua bang mite in a suahtak nadingun thuman sang nuam lo, deih lo uh ahih manin siatna a tuak uh ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Tua ahih manin Pasian in amaute lakah nasem dingin zuau thahatna paisak ahih manin amaute in a man lo thu um uh hi. 
2Thessalonians2:12 Tua ahih manin thuman um loin, mawhna sungah nuam a sa khempeuh in mawhsak thukhenna thuak ding uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ahi zongin sanggamte aw, Topa in note hong it a, Kha Siangtho vangliatna hang le note in thuman na upna uh hangin ama mi siangthote na suah nadingun nopsakna a ngah masa dingin Pasian in note hong teel ahih manin note hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Topa Jesu Khris tawh minthanna na ngahkhawm theih nadingun note tungah kong hilh uh Lungdamna Thu tawh hih nopsakna ah Pasian in note a hong sam ahi hi. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, kam tawh ahi a, lai tawh ahi zongin kong hilh uh thumante limtakin zui unla, kip takin om un." 
2Thessalonians2:16 I Topa Jesu Khris mahmah leh, eite hong itin, a hong hehpihna tawh thakhauhna le lametna a hong pia tawntung eiteʼ Pa Pasian in" 
2Thessalonians2:17 note lungsimah thakhauhna hong guan henla, a hoih thu khempeuh genin a sem zo dingin na tha uh hong hatsak tahen." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Sanggamte aw, tu-in note lak mah bangin mun dangah zong Topaʼ thu manlang takin kizel pakin lungdam takin a kisan theih nadingin kote ading thu hong ngetsak un." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Mi khempeuh in thu um nai lo uh ahih manin a gilo a siahuai mite panin Pasian in kote hong hotkhiat nadingin zong hong ngetsak un. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Note ahihleh, Topa citak mahmah ahih manin hong thahatsak dinga, A Gilopa kiang panin hong hon khia ding hi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Note kiangah kong gen uh thute a kipat cil a kipanin na zuih uh mah bangin zui paisuak taktak ding, ci-in note muanna lungsim kote sungah Topa in hong guan hi." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Pasian bangin itna nei-in Khris thuak bangin na thuak zawh nadingun Topa in note lungsim hong bawlsak tahen. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Sanggamte aw, i Topa Jesu Khris min tawh kong sawl nop uh thu panin: Note tungah ka hong hilh sa uh thute a zui lo, a thadah gamtat thu up pih mite tawh na kikhawl kei un." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Koteʼ gamtatzia bangin a gamta ding na hihna uh teltakin na thei uh hi. Note tawh ka hong om khawm lai-un ka thadah om kei uh hi. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Kuama an a khongin ka ne kei uh hi. Note khat peuhpeuh in nong suplawh khak loh nadingun a sun a zanin hahkat takin na ka sem uh hi. 
2Thessalonians3:9 Hih bangin ka gamtatna uh pen noteʼ hong piakte a khongin ne-in a zang dingin a kilawm mah hi napi-in, noteʼ etteh ding gamtatzia a hong lak ka hizaw uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Note tawh ka hong om khawm lai-un, “Na a sem nuam lo mi peuhmah an nesak kei un,” ci-in kong gen uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Hih bangin thu ka hong genna uh pen note lakah mi pawl khatte thadahin na sem nuam lo uh a, midangteʼ nasepna va nawngkaisak zawsop hi, ci-in ka zakna hang uh ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Tu-in tua bang mite in kuamah nawngkaisak nawn loin manmanin na sem hiathiatin amauʼ nuntak nadingun na a sep nadingun Topa Jesu Khris min tawh hanthawnin thu kong pia uh hi. 
2Thessalonians3:13 Sanggamte aw, note in a hoihin gamtat ding na cimtak ngei het kei ta un." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Hih lai sunga ka hong gente uh a zui nuam lo mi khatpeuh a om leh tua mipa limtakin ciamteh unla, amah a maizum theih nadingin kikholh pih nawn kei un." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ahi zongin amah galbawl kei unla, thu up pih mi khat hihna tawh hilh bawl zaw un." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Topa in note tungah a tawntungin nopsakna hong pia henla, amah in note khempeuh hong ompih tahen." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Keimah Paul in kong hopih hi, cihna kammal teng keima khut tawh ka hong gelh ahi hi. Keima laikhak khempeuh hih bangzia-in ciamtehin ka hih ngeina ahi hi." 
2Thessalonians3:18 I Topa Jesu Khris hong hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong tung tahen. 
1Timothy1:1 Eite a hong Hon Pasian le eiteʼ lamet Khris Jesuʼ thupiakna tawh Khris Jesuʼ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in," 
1Timothy1:2 Thu upna sungah ka tapa taktak ahi Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le eiteʼ Topa Khris Jesu in dikna, hehpihna le nopsakna thupha, nangma tungah hong tungsak tahen." 
1Timothy1:3 Masedonia gam lam manawhin ka pai lai-in Efesa khua ah na om ding ka hong sawl mah bangin tu-in zong tua khua mahah na om lai inla, thu upna man lo a hilh mite, a thuhilh a khawl nadingun thu na pia in." 
1Timothy1:4 Phuahtawm tangthute le min tam pipi kizom deudau-a khangsimnate in upna tawh i ngah theih Pasianʼ vaihawmnate tangtungsak loin, khatlekhat kitotna piangsak lel ahih manin, tua bang thute a manlah pih loh nadingun na gen in." 
1Timothy1:5 Hih bangin thupiakna pen, upna taktak le kisuanna om het loin lungsim siangtho taktak tawh ngaihsutna panin a hong piang khia ki-itna a khan theih nading deihna ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:6 Mi pawl khatte, hih bang ngaihsutna panin peu khia-in bangmahin a kimang lo thu kikupna tawh ni tum uh hi." 
1Timothy1:7 Thei kisa ngelin a gen kankan uh thute le amau kampauna mahmah zong bang gen ka hi hiam cih a thei het lo hi napi-in amaute pen Pasianʼ thukhamte a hilh dingin ut zaw lai uh hi. 
1Timothy1:8 Thukham pen a kizat nading a kilawm ciangah zang thei lehang a hoih thu khat hi, ci-in i thei hi." 
1Timothy1:9 Ahi zongin i phawk dingah, mihoihte adingin thukham a kibawl hi lo a, thukham zui lote, thumang lote, Pasianʼ deih bangin a gamta lote le mawhneite, biakna lungsim a nei lote le kam kilawm lo a paute, nute pate a thatte, midang a thatte," 
1Timothy1:10 nulepa mawhna a gamtate, palepa mawhna a bawlte, mi a gute, zuau thu a gente, miteʼ siat nading thu a gente le thuman tawh a kilehbulhin a gamta mite adingin thukham a kibawl ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:11 Thuman ka cih pen thupha tawh kidimin a minthang Pasian in ka hilh dingin kei tungah a hong piak Lungdamna Thu ahi hi. 
1Timothy1:12 Hih bangin na sep zawh nadingin thatang hatna a hong pia i Topa Khris Jesu tungah ka lungdam hi. Ama nasem dingin kei hong muangin hong seh ahih manin ka nuam hi. 
1Timothy1:13 A beisa hunah amah gensia-in, simmawh bawlin, ama mite a bawlsia pa ka hih ngei tei hangin ama thu ka up nai loh manin theih lohna tawh a gamta ka hih manin Pasian in kei hong hehpih hi." 
1Timothy1:14 Pasian in gen zawh lohin kei hong hehpih a, Khris Jesu tawh kipawlna hangin i ngah theih upna le itna a hong guan hi." 
1Timothy1:15 Khris Jesu, mawhneite a hon khia dingin leitungah hong pai hi, cihna thu a man hi a, a uphuai a sanhuai thu ahi hi. Keimah zong tua mawhnei mite lakah a mawhpha bel ka hi hi." 
1Timothy1:16 A mawhnei pha bel ka hihna thu hang mahin, nidang ciangin amah umin nuntak tawntungna a ngah ding miteʼ etteh theih dingin Khris Jesu in a lungduaina cing takin kei tungah hong lah theih nadingin Pasian in kei a hong hehpih ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:17 Amah bek Pasian ahi, a kimu thei lo, a si ngei lo, tawntung Kumpipa in minthanna le pahtawina ngah tawntung tahen. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Ka ta Timoti aw, tanglai pek a kipanin nang bang mite adingin a kigen sa thu tawh kizui-in nang tungah a thu ka hong ap hi. Hoihtakin gal na do zawh nadingin galhiamin tua thute zang inla," 
1Timothy1:19 na upna le lungsim kisuang loin na omna thu kip takin len paisuak in. Mi pawl khatte in a lungsim kitheihna uh ah man a kisakna bangun gamta lo uh ahih manin a thu upna uh a mawkna a suah uh hi. 
1Timothy1:20 Tua bang mite lakah Hymenaias le Alexander kihel uh a, Pasian gensiat nawn loh nading thu a phawk theih nadingun Satanʼ khut sungah amaute ka ap hi." 
1Timothy2:1 A masa penin kong gen nop thu in: Mi khempeuh adingin Pasian tungah ngetna, thungetna, thumna le lungdamkohna na neih ding uh ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:2 Eite nuam takin om thei-in, biakna lungsim nei-in a kilawm takin i nuntak theih nadingin kumpite le uliante adingin thu na ngetsak un." 
1Timothy2:3 Hih bang gamtatnate pen eite hong Hon Pasianʼ muhna ah a hoih a kilawm thu ahi hi. 
1Timothy2:4 Mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngahin, thuman a theihkim ding Pasian in deih hi." 
1Timothy2:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian khat bek om a, Pasian le mite a hong kilemsakkik thei Khris Jesu khat bek om hi." 
1Timothy2:6 Mi khempeuh a tan khia dingin tua Jesu hong kipiatawm a, a hun lian laitakin a hong kipiakna pen Pasian in mi khempeuh a hotkhiat nopna thu a kilatna ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:7 Hih ka gen thu pen zuau ahi lo, thu taktak a gen ka hi a, Gentail mite lakah upna thu le hih thuman a gen dingin sawltak na semin thu a hilh dingin kei a hong kisawl ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:8 Mun khempeuh ah a om pasal khempeuh in kuamah tawh kitotna le lungsim kinopmawhna nei het loin, lungsim siangtho tawh a khut uh lamin thu a nget ding uh ka deih hi." 
1Timothy2:9 Tua mah bangin numeite zong a kilawm a kituak bekin kizemin kipuahin, sam khawng a uang lua-in bawl loin, a khengvalin kizepna a tuamtuamte zang loin," 
1Timothy2:10 biakna lungsim neite adingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin gamtat hoih a neih ding uh ka deih hi. 
1Timothy2:11 Numeite in gamdai takin kiniamkhiatna tawh thu ngai-in a sin ding uh ahi hi. 
1Timothy2:12 Numeite in pasalte tungah aana nei-in thu a hilh ding ka phal kei hi. Gamdai takin a om ding uh ahi hi. 
1Timothy2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh a masa-in Adam kipiangsak a, tua ciangin Eve kipiangsak pan hi." 
1Timothy2:14 Adam in khemna thuak masa lo a, numei in thuakin a khial masa a suak hi." 
1Timothy2:15 Ahi zongin numei in a kilawm a kituakin upna, itna le sianthona thu ah kip takin a om nakleh nausuah gimna sihpih lo ding hi." 
1Timothy3:1 Mi khatpeuh, pawlpi sia nasep a ut leh a hoih mahmah ahi hi, a cihna thu a man ahi hi." 
1Timothy3:2 Tua ahih manin siate pen paubaanna a nei lo mi, zi khat bek a nei mi, lungsim hoih hithiat mi, thu a ngaihsun thei mi, a kilawm a kituakin a gamta mi, zin le leengla do a siam mi, thuhilh a siam mi," 
1Timothy3:3 zu a kham lo mi, a ngongtat lo mi, lungsim nem mi, kitot a uk lo mi, sum a deih lua lo mite hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:4 A innkuan sung hoihtakin a uk zo mi, a tate thumangsak thei-in, na khempeuh ah a kilawm a kituakin a gamtasak thei mi hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh in a innkuan sung uk zia ding a theih kei leh Pasianʼ pawlpi kem thei lo ding hi. 
1Timothy3:6 Khristian a suaktungte zong hi lo ding hi. Tua bang mi thakte kiphasak thei a, Dawimangpa mah bangin thukhenna a thuak mite hi kha thei ding hi." 
1Timothy3:7 Pawlpi mi ahi lo midangte in zong a zahtak mite hi ding hi. Tua hileh mindai kha lo dinga, Dawimangpaʼ thang ah awk kha lo zaw deuh ding hi." 
1Timothy3:8 Pawlpi upa dingte zong a gamtat hoih, a lungsim citak, leenggahzu tam a ne lo, sum thu ah a huaiham mi hi lo ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:9 Lungsim kisuanna a om lo, upna thu ah a kip mite hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:10 A masa-in kize-et phot dinga, paubaanna a om kei leh sem thei pan ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:11 A zite uh zong a gamtat hoih mi hi-in, mi gensiat a hat lote hi ding uh a, lungsim citak, thu khempeuh ah a thuman mi hi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy3:12 Upate pen zi khat bek a nei mi, a tate le a innkuan sung hoihtakin a uk zote hi ding hi." 
1Timothy3:13 Pawlpi upa hoihtakin a sem thei mite pen mite in zahtak uh a, Khris Jesu a upna thu uh kisuanna om het loin hang takin gen ngam uh hi." 
1Timothy3:14 Nang kiangah hong pai-in nang tawh kimu baih ding cih lametna tawh hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi. 
1Timothy3:15 Ahi zongin ka hong zekai khak zenzen leh thuman thutak khuampi le bulpi, a nungta Pasianʼ pawlpi ahi Pasianʼ innkuan sungah bangci gamtat ding cih na theih nadingin hih ka hong laikhak in lam hong lak ding hi." 
1Timothy3:16 I biakna pen a thuthuk a thu lian taktak ahihna thu hih bangin i thei hi: Mihing lim pua-in amah hong kilang a, a man taktak ahihna thu Kha Siangtho in kilangsak a, vantung mite in a mu uh hi. Mi khempeuh tungah ama thu kihilh a, mun khempeuh ah ama thu ki-umin, vantungah amah kila to hi." 
1Timothy4:1 Nidang ciangin a upna panun mi pawl khat pialin, zuau thu gente le dawi thu a kigente a zuih nading uh Kha Siangtho in teltakin a gen hi." 
1Timothy4:2 Tua bang zuau thuhilhnate pen zuau genin mi a khem, sik em sa tawh tat gawp bangin a lungsim un a hoih le a hoih lo a khen thei nawn loteʼ kam panin hong ging khia ding hi." 
1Timothy4:3 Tua bang mite in zi neih le pasal neih ding le an pawl khat nek ding hoih lo hi, ci uh hi. Ahi zongin thu umin, thuman thutak a thei mite in lungdamna ko-in a nek dingin Pasian in tua ante a bawl ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:4 Pasianʼ bawl sa na khempeuh a hoih hi a, nial loin, lungdamna pulakin san ding ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:5 Pasianʼ thu le thungetna hang tawh tuate a hoih a suak ahi hi. 
1Timothy4:6 Nang in na zuih sa upna thu le thuhilhna man na zuih kawmin hih ka hong thugente, i sanggamte kiangah na gen nakleh Khris Jesuʼ nasem a hoih khat na hi ding hi." 
1Timothy4:7 Pasianʼ thu tawh a kituak lo, a haihuai tangthu phuahtawmte ngaihsutin na nei vet kei in. Pasianʼ deihna tawh a kituakin na nuntak zawh nadingin na kisin in." 
1Timothy4:8 Pumpi kisekin kisinna manpha hi. Ahi zongin kha thu ah kisekin kisinna pen tu hun laitak le a hong tung ding hunah nuntakna hong pia thei ahih manin manpha zaw lai hi," 
1Timothy4:9 ci-a kigen pen a man taktak thu hi a, umin sin dingin a kilawm thu ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:10 A diakdiakin ei thu umte in mi khempeuh a Hon khia, a nungta Pasian muangin lamen ihih manin nakpi takin hanciamin na a sem ihi hi." 
1Timothy4:11 Ka hong gen sa thute na hilh sawn in. 
1Timothy4:12 Khangno lai na hihna thu hangin miteʼ simmawh dingin na om kei inla, kampauna, gamtatna, itna, upna le sianthona ah thu um miteʼ etteh dingin na om in." 
1Timothy4:13 Kei ka hong pai matengin mipi mai ah Lai Siangtho simna, a khiatna genna le hanthotnate ah tavuan na la in." 
1Timothy4:14 Kamsangteʼ thugennate le upate in na tungah a khut uh nga-in thu hong ngetsakna ahi nangma hih theih siamnate na valkhongsak kei in. 
1Timothy4:15 Mi khempeuh in na khantohna hong muh theih nadingin hih thute limtakin ngaihsun inla, hahkatin na sem in." 
1Timothy4:16 Na gamtatna le na thuhilhnate ah hoihtakin kidawmin om lecin nangmah a kipan na thugen a za mite adingin phattuamna om ding ahih manin na nasepna ah hoihtakin om in. 
1Timothy5:1 Nang sangin a u zaw mite taii bawl kei inla, na pa bangin ngaihsunin hanthawn in. Nang sangin a nau zawte na nau bangin bawl in." 
1Timothy5:2 Nang sangin a u zaw numeite na nu bangin bawl inla, nang sangin a nau zaw numeite, lungsim siangtho tak tawh na nau numei bangin bawl in." 
1Timothy5:3 Meigong taktak ahi numeite zahtak bawl in. 
1Timothy5:4 Meigong numei khatpeuh in tate ahi a, tute ahi zongin a neih leh innkuan sungah biakna tawh kisai-in tavuan a neihna uh hilh inla, a nu a pa, a pu a pite a huh nadingun gen in. Hih bang gamtatna pen Pasianʼ muhna ah a hoih thu ahi hi." 
1Timothy5:5 A kem a khoi ding a om lo meigong taktak ahi numeite in Pasian bek mah muan le suanin nei-in, a sun a zanin Pasianʼ huh ding deihin thu ngen tawntung uh hi." 
1Timothy5:6 Ahi zongin a pumpi uh deihna zui-in a gamta meigong numeite pen a pumpi uh a nuntak hangin kha thu ah a si khin ahi uh hi. 
1Timothy5:7 Amaute paubaanna a om loh nadingin hih ka hong thupiak sate amaute tungah gen sawn in. 
1Timothy5:8 Mi khatpeuh in a beh a phung, a diakdiakin a innkuan sung mite a vak nop kei leh a upna a nusia hi ta a, thu um lo mite sangin sia zaw lai hi." 
1Timothy5:9 Meigong numei khat peuhpeuh a khan kum sawm guk a cing sate le pasal khatvei bek a nei ngeite bek, meigong sazian sungah koih in." 
1Timothy5:10 Tua banah a gamtat hoihna a kitheite, a tate hoihtakin a khansuah sate, a inn ah zin le leengla do a siam mite, kiniamkhiatin Pasianʼ miteʼ khe a silsakte, a lungkham mite a huhte le thu khempeuh ah a hoih gamtat mite hi lai ding uh hi." 
1Timothy5:11 A khangno lai meigong numeite, sazian sungah hel kei in. A pumpi uh deihna zui-in pasal a neihkik nop uh ciangin Khris taisan uh ahih manin," 
1Timothy5:12 a thuciam masak uh palsat uh ahih manin a mawh a suak uh hi. 
1Timothy5:13 Tua bek zong hi loin, bangmah sem loin inn khat pan inn khat ah vak kawikawi-in a hun uh mawk beisak uh a, a vak mawk uh tawh maisak loin mi gensia kawikawi-in midangte va nawngkaisak uh a, a gen lohpi ding teng uh genin va nei uh hi." 
1Timothy5:14 Tua ahih manin, i langteʼ hong gensiat nading a om loh nadingin, a khangno lai meigong numeite in pasal nei-in, ta nei-in, amau innkuan sung ukin a om ding uh ka deih zaw hi." 
1Timothy5:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh meigong numei pawl khat, Satanʼ nung a zui dingin kipan khinta uh hi." 
1Timothy5:16 Thu um innkuan sungah meigong numei a nei a om leh pawlpite in a kisam meigong taktakte a huh theih nadingin pawlpi tungah tavuan hong guan kei henla, amauʼ meigong numeite na huh ta uh hen." 
1Timothy5:17 Pawlpi sungah ukna le makaihna siamin, thuhilh le thugen hahkat tawh a thuah upate pen thaman a zah nih piak dingin kilawm hi." 
1Timothy5:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Buh a cil bawngtal muk na tuam kei in,” a cih banah, “Nasem pa in a thaman a ngah ding a kilawm ahi hi,” na ci hi." 
1Timothy5:19 Upa khat peuhpeuh a mawhsak mi nih le thum a om kei buang leh thu-in na sim kei in. 
1Timothy5:20 A khial takpi upa a om leh upa dangte a lau theih nadingin a lawmte mai ah tua a khial pa taii-in thuhilh in. 
1Timothy5:21 Hih kong gen thute na zatna ah kuamah guptuam paihtuam nei het loin hoihtakin hong mangin na zat nadingin Pasian, Khris Jesu le a siangtho vantung miteʼ muhna ah limtakin a hong gen ka hi hi." 
1Timothy5:22 Topaʼ na a sem dingin kipsakna-in khut nga-in thungetna pen kuama tungah zang mengmeng kei in. Midang a khialte tawh khial khawm kha kei inla, siangtho takin na om theih nadingin limtakin kikem in." 
1Timothy5:23 Na gil sung natna le na nat mun zelzelna hangin tui bek zang nawn loin leenggahzu tawmtawm na zang in. 
1Timothy5:24 Mi pawl khatteʼ khialhnate kimu pahpah in mawhsakna thuak pah uh a, pawl khatteʼ khialhna pen damdamin hong kinung theih hi." 
1Timothy5:25 Tua mah bangin gamtat hoihnate zong kilangin, kimu-in, a kithei pah kei zongin ki-imcip suak thei lo hi." 
1Timothy6:1 Kuamah in Pasianʼ min le i thuhilhnate hong gensiatsak loh nadingin sila khempeuh in a tote uh zahtak bawl ta uh hen. 
1Timothy6:2 Thu um mi to-in a nei silate in upna sungah sanggam khat hi hang, ci-in ngaihsutna tawh a tote uh zahtak bawl loin om kha kei uh hen. Amauteʼ nasepna hangin hamphatna a ngah mite pen thu um mi le a it uh mite ahih manin a hoih zaw-in a sepsak ding uh a kilawm zaw ahi hi. Tu-a kong gen ding thute mi khempeuh tungah hilhin gen in." 
1Timothy6:3 Topa Jesu Khris thu tawh a kituak lo, i biakna paizia tawh a kilehngatin thu tuamdang a hilh mite pen," 
1Timothy6:4 a kiphasak mawkmawk hi uh a, bangmah a thei het lo ahi uh hi. Tua bang mite in thu kiseel thu kinial cihte ut belin nei uh a, hazatna, lungsim kituah lohna, kizahkona, a sia lamin ki-upmawhnate piangsak uh a," 
1Timothy6:5 thuman thutak zui loin, a lungsim paizia uh a man nawn lo, biakna pen hauh theih nading lampi bekin a ngaihsun mite in a tawntungin kitot kiseelna a piangsak uh ahi hi." 
1Timothy6:6 Pasian biakna hangin a neihsa teng tawh a lungkim mite pen biakna in mihau a suaksak takpi mah ahi hi. 
1Timothy6:7 A taktakin ci lehang, leitungah mihingin i suah laitakin sumlepai tawh i suak kei a, i sih ciangin zong leitung panin bangmah i keng thei tuan kei hi." 
1Timothy6:8 Tua ahih manin an nek tui dawn, nikten puansilh i neih nakleh a pha zo ahi hi." 
1Timothy6:9 Ahi zongin a hau nuam mite in ze-etna a tuamtuam thuak a, duhhopna, huaihamna a haivai thute ah awkcipin, haksatna le siatna a tuah lawh uh hi." 
1Timothy6:10 Sum deih luatna in siatna namkim piangsak hi. Mi pawl khat in sum deih lua liang uh ahih manin a upna panun pial khia-in gimna lungkhamna tampi a thuak lawh uh hi. 
1Timothy6:11 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ mi ahi nangmah in tua thute khempeuh pelh inla, thuman thutak, Pasianʼ deih bangin nuntakna, upna, itna, kipna le lungnemna na neih zawh nadingin hanciam in." 
1Timothy6:12 Upna thu ah hoihtakin nawk suak inla, mi tampiʼ zakin na pulak sa, Pasian in nangmah a hong piak nuntak tawntungna lenkip in." 
1Timothy6:13 Na khempeuh tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian le Pontias Pilat mai ah hang takin thu a gen ngam Khris Jesuʼ mai ah nang ka hong thupiakna in: 
1Timothy6:14 I Topa Jesu hong kilatkik Ni dongin paubaanna le mawhsakna om het loin nang hong kipia thute na zui in. 
1Timothy6:15 Kumpiteʼ Kumpi, topateʼ Topa, thupha ngahin amah bek a lian pen ahi Pasian in hun a sak khatpeuh ciangin Jesu hong kilangsakkik ding hi." 
1Timothy6:16 Tua i Pasian bek mah a si thei lo hi a, khuavak pha mahmah sungah om ahih manin kuamah in a kiang neh thei lo hi. Kuamah in amah mu ngei lo a, zong mu thei lo hi. A tawntungin amah kipahtawi henla, vanglian tawntung tahen. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Tu hun a a hau mite kisathei kha loin, a kip lo hauhnate muan le suanin nei kha loin, eite in nuam takin i zat theih dingin citna tawh a hong pia Pasian a muan a suan nadingun na hilh in." 
1Timothy6:18 A hoih nate semin, gamtat pha-in, citna lungsim nei-in midangte a hopnop nadingun na hilh in." 
1Timothy6:19 Tua hileh mai lamah amauteʼ nuntak nading bulpi taktak ahi neihsate, amau adingin a khol mite ahi ding uh hi." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoti aw, nang tungah a hong kipia thute hoihtakin na zui in. Mi pawl khatte in, “Thu theihna,” ci-in a ngaihsut khak uh, Pasianʼ thu tawh a kituak lo, thu kihai selnate na pelh in." 
1Timothy6:21 Mi pawl khatte in tua bang pilna a nei-in kingaihsun uh a, upna thu bulpi khahsuahna-in a nei uh hi. Note khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ dikna thupha hong tung tahen." 
2Timothy1:1 Khris Jesu tawh i kipawlna hangin hong kipia ding nuntakna thu a gen dingin Pasianʼ deihna tawh Khris Jesuʼ sawltak nasep a sem dingin a hong kisawl keimah Paul in 
2Timothy1:2 Ka it ka ta Timoti tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le i Topa Khris Jesu in dikna, hehpihna le nopsakna thupha nang tungah hong tungsak tahen." 
2Timothy1:3 A sun a zanin ka thungetna ah nang ka hong phawk tawntung a, ka pu ka pateʼ sep mah bangin kisuanna lungsim om het loin a na ka sep Pasian tungah ka lungdamna ka ko hi." 
2Timothy1:4 Na khitui luannate phawk ka hih manin ka lung a dam theih nadingin nang tawh kimu nuamin a sun a zanin ka ngaihsun tawntung hi. 
2Timothy1:5 Na pi Lois le na nu Eunis in a neih upna bangte pawl mah, lungsim takpi tawh na upna thu ka phawk a, tu-in zong nang sungah tua bang upna om hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
2Timothy1:6 Tua ahih manin nang tungah ka khut nga-in thu ka hong ngetsak lai-in nangma tungah Pasian in hong piak siamna na sosuah nadingin ka hong phawksak hi. 
2Timothy1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite tungah meidawina lungsim hong guan lo a, thahatna, ki-itna, pumpi ki-uk zawhna lungsim hong guan hizaw hi." 
2Timothy1:8 Tua ahih manin i Topaʼ thu gen nading thu ah ahi a, ama thu hangin thong a kia keima thu ah ahi zongin maizum het kei in. Pasian in nangma tungah thahatna hong pia ahih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu hangin thuakna ah zong a thuak nuam hizaw in." 
2Timothy1:9 Eiteʼ sep zawhna hang hi loin ama ngimna sa bang leh a dikna hangin Pasian in eite hong hon khia-in ama mi dingin a hong sam hi. Pasian in leitung a pianmapekin Khris Jesu tungtawnin tua dikna a hong piak hi a," 
2Timothy1:10 tu hun ciangin eite hong Honpa Khris Jesu tungtawnin a dikna hong langsak ta hi. Tua Jesu in sihna beisak a, lungdamna thu hangin sih nawn lohna thu a hong kilangsak hi." 
2Timothy1:11 Hih a thak Lungdamna Thu hilhin a taangko ding le sawltak na a sem dingin kei a hong kikoih ahi hi. 
2Timothy1:12 Tua ahih manin hih bang teng a thuak ka hi hi. Ahi zongin ka up pa ka thei a, ama tungah ka apte tua Ni dong hong kepsak zo ding hi, ci-in thei ka hih manin ka maizum het kei hi." 
2Timothy1:13 Keima tung panin na zak sa a man thute zui inla, Khris Jesu tawh i kipawlna hangin i ngah upna le itna thu ah kip takin om in." 
2Timothy1:14 Eite sungah a hong teeng Kha Siangtho in a hong ap thuhoihte limtakin kem in. 
2Timothy1:15 Na theih sa bangin Asia gam sunga om mi khempeuh in kei hong nusia uh a, tuate lakah Figelas le Hermogenes te zong kihel uh hi." 
2Timothy1:16 Onesiforas in tam veipi kei hong lungnuamsak ahih manin Pasian in a innkuan bupun hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Ka thongkiatna hangin amah maizum lo a," 
2Timothy1:17 Rom khua hong tun ciangin kei hong muh matengin hong zong pah hi. 
2Timothy1:18 Topa in tua Ni ciangin ama tungah hehpihna thupha pia tahen. Efesa khua ah ka om lai-in nakpi takin kei a hong huhnate khempeuh na theih sa ahi hi. 
2Timothy2:1 Ka ta aw, nang na hih leh Khris Jesu tawh i kipawl manin i ngah hehpihna hangin thahatin om in." 
2Timothy2:2 Mi tampiteʼ theihin ka thuhilh, na zak sa thu khempeuh, midangte a hilh sawn thei dingin a citak mite tungah hoihtakin a zuih dingun na hilh in." 
2Timothy2:3 Khris Jesuʼ galkap hoih hihna tawh thuak dingin a kisam khempeuh na na thuak in. 
2Timothy2:4 Galkap a sem lai mipa in ama tungah a om bupa a lungkimsak theih nadingin na sem ahih manin tualsung miteʼ nasep tawh thuah khawm lo hi. 
2Timothy2:5 Kimawl kidemna ah a kihel mi khatpeuh in kimawlna ngeina zui lopi-in gualzawh pahtawina ngah thei lo hi. 
2Timothy2:6 Hahkat takin lo a kho pa in anlak hun ciangin a tam pen a ngah dingin a kilawm ahi hi. 
2Timothy2:7 Topa in thu khempeuh na theih nadingin hong huh ding ahih manin hih ka thugente khempeuh limtakin na ngaihsun in. 
2Timothy2:8 Lungdamna Thu ka hilhna sungah ka gen mah bangin Davidʼ suan, sihna panin a kithosak Jesu Khris na na phawk in." 
2Timothy2:9 Ama hangin a kingah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh manin gimna ka thuak a, mi that bangin sikkol hong kibulh hi. Pasianʼ thu ahihleh sikkol kibulh thei lo hi." 
2Timothy2:10 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ teel mite in zong Khris Jesu hangin hotkhiatna le tawntung minthanna a ngahkhawm theih nadingun amauteʼ hangin na khempeuh ka thuak hi. 
2Timothy2:11 Tua ahih manin, “Amah tawh i sih khawm le amah tawh i nungta khawm ding hi." 
2Timothy2:12 Eite in gimna i thuak paisuak zawh leh amah tawh i uk khawm ding hi. Amah i nial leh amah in zong eite hong nial ding hi. 
2Timothy2:13 Amah le amah kikhem thei lo ahih manin eite i citak kei zongin amah citak veve ding hi,” ci-in a kigenna thu man mahmah hi." 
2Timothy2:14 Na mite thu kinialin a kitot loh nadingun Pasianʼ mai ah thupi takin na hilh khol in. Tua bang thu kinialna in a za mite phattuamna ngahsak loin a siasak bek ahi hi. 
2Timothy2:15 Pasianʼ thuman a mantakin hilhin, na nasepna ah maizumna thuak loin, Pasianʼ pahtakna na ngah theih nadingin na siam tawpin hanciam in." 
2Timothy2:16 Pasian tawh mite a kigamlasak semsem thei thu gina lo, a haihuai thu kikup thu kiseelnate na pelh in." 
2Timothy2:17 Tua bangin amauʼ thugennate in mite siasak a, tua banga thugente lakah Hymenaias le Filetas a kihel uh hi." 
2Timothy2:18 Thuman lampi panin amaute pial khin uh a, thawhkikna thu pen a beisa thu hi ta hi, ci-in thu um mi pawl khat lungmangsak uh hi." 
2Timothy2:19 Ahi zongin Pasian in a phuh sa sutpi kilok zo ngei lo ding hi. Tua sutpi tungah, “Topa in ama mi kua teng hiam cih thei hi,” cihna le, “Topa tawh kipawl ing, a ci peuhmah in mawhna su kha lo ding hi,” cihna kigelh hi." 
2Timothy2:20 Inn lian khat peuhpeuh sungah umlebeel a nam tuamtuam a om hi. Pawl khatte ngun tawh kibawl a, pawl khatte kham tawh kibawl a, pawl khatte sing tawh, pawl khatte tungman tawh kibawl hi. Pawl khatte a thupi diakin zat theih ding, pawl khatte nisimin a mawk mawkin zat theih ding ahi hi." 
2Timothy2:21 Mi khatpeuh a hoih lo na khempeuh panin kikemin a siangtho takin a om nakleh na hoih nam khempeuh a sem dingin a Topa tungah ki-apin, a Topa tungah a manpha suak ahih manin a thupi diakte ah amah kizang ding hi." 
2Timothy2:22 Tua ahih manin khangno lunggulhna hoih lote pelh inla, lungsim takpi tawh Topa tungah huhna a ngen mite tawh thuman thutak, upna, itna, kilemna na neih theih nadingun hanciam khawm un." 
2Timothy2:23 Thu kihai seelna, thei lo pi-a thu kinialnate na pelh in. Tua bangte in kitotna a piansak lamtak na theih sa ahi hi." 
2Timothy2:24 Topaʼ na a sem mite, kitot a hatte hi lo dinga, mi khempeuh tungah lungsim nemin, thugen siamin, thuak zawhna nei-in," 
2Timothy2:25 thunem tawh a langteʼ hoih lohna a puah theite hi ding hi. Tua bang hileh Pasian in amaute kisiksak thei dinga, thuman thutak hong thei-in," 
2Timothy2:26 Dawimangpa in ama deihna bangin a gamta dingin a mat khit hangin ama thang panin amaute suakta kha thei ding uh hi. 
2Timothy3:1 Nitawp ni hun pen a lauhuai hun ahih ding lamtak phawk in. 
2Timothy3:2 Tua hun ciangin mite in amau angsung ding bek ngaihsunin, huaihamin, kisialin, kihisakin, mi zahko-in, nu le pateʼ thu mang loin, lungdam theihna mel nei loin, biakna lungsim nei loin," 
2Timothy3:3 mi khual loin, hehpihna nei loin, mi gensia-in, ngongtatin, kihtakhuai-in, thuhoih deih loin," 
2Timothy3:4 ciampelin, thu khual loin, kiphasak gawpin, Pasian don loin pumpi nopsakna bek deihin," 
2Timothy3:5 biakna thu a puatham teng zui napi-in biakna hangin vangliatna thu a omte deih lo ding uh hi. Tua bangin a gamta mite na pelh in. 
2Timothy3:6 Tua bang mite pawl khat, mite inn ah va hawh khiankhianin, deihna nam tuamtuam le mawhna lungsim tawh a kidim numeite na thu zawh uh hi." 
2Timothy3:7 Tua bang numeite in thu a zakzak uh hangin a man le a man lo khen thei lo uh ahih manin thuman thutak thei zo lo uh hi. 
2Timothy3:8 Jannes le Jambres-te in Moses thu a nial mah bangin upna paizia a man lo hih thuhilh mite in zong thuman thutak a nial uh hi. 
2Timothy3:9 Ahi zongin Jannes le Jambres-te tungah a piang sa thu mah bangin mi khempeuh in amauteʼ haina mu ding uh ahih manin a nasepna uh sau tung khol lo ding hi. 
2Timothy3:10 Ahi zongin nangmah in ahihleh ka thuhilhna, ka gamtatna le ka nuntakna ah ka ngim ka tup thute na hong zui hi. Ka upna, ka lungduaina, itna ka neihna, ka lungkipna," 
2Timothy3:11 bawlsiatna ka thuakna, gimna ka thuakna le Antiok, Ikonium le Lystra khuate ah kei tunga thupiang, nasia takin bawlsiatna ka thuaknate na theih na phawk sa ahi hi. Ahi zongin Topa in hih haksatnate khempeuh panin kei hong suaktasak hi." 
2Timothy3:12 Khris Jesu tawh kipawlin Pasianʼ deihna bangin a nungta nuam khempeuh in bawlsiatna a thuak ding mah hi a," 
2Timothy3:13 migilote le thu thei kineihin mi khem theite zong siat tat semsemin, amaute in mi khemkhemin, amaute mah in zong khemna a thuak ding mah uh ahi hi." 
2Timothy3:14 Ahi zongin nang na hih leh na theih sa na up sa thute ah kip paisuak in. Nang tungah thu hong hilhte kua mi ahi hiam cih na theih sa hi a," 
2Timothy3:15 Khris Jesu upna hangin hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak thei ding pilna a hong pia Lai Siangtho pen na neu tung a kipanin a thei sa na hihna thu zong na theih sa thu mah ahi hi. 
2Timothy3:16 Pasianʼ na a sem mite mi cingtaak hi-in, na hoih namkim a sep theih nadingun Lai Siangtho pen Pasianʼ lamlahna tawh a hong kipia hi a, thuman thutak hilh nading, a khialte taii nading, a man lote a manin puah nading, a manin nuntak theih nading thuhilh nadingin a manpha mahmah ahi hi." 
2Timothy3:17  
2Timothy4:1 Pasianʼ mai le a hingte hitaleh a site hitaleh mi khempeuhʼ thu a khen ding Khris Jesuʼ mai ah nakpi takin ka hong hanthawn hi. Amah Kumpi-in hong paikikin ukna hong kipan ding ahih manin," 
2Timothy4:2 hunhoih hunsia cih khen tuan loin Pasianʼ thu hilh ding na kin ngaihsut nading, lungduaina tawh miteʼ lungsim zo-in, mite taii-in, hanthawnin na hilh nadingin thu a hong pia ka hi hi." 
2Timothy4:3 Mite in thuman a ngaih nop loh hun, amauteʼ deihna bek a zuih nop hun, amauteʼ zaknop thute bek a gen ding sia a cial thuahthuah hun hong tung ding hi." 
2Timothy4:4 Amaute in thuman thutak ngai nuam nawn loin tangthu phuahtawm peuh ngaihsutpi-in nei ding uh hi. 
2Timothy4:5 Ahi zongin nang na hih leh thu khempeuh ah na lungsim ki-ukin haksatnate na thuak inla, Pasianʼ thugen nasep semin, na nasepna ah maa na tun in." 
2Timothy4:6 Kei ka hih leh Pasian biakna-in hong kipiak ding hun hong tung ta hi. Hih leitung nuntakna ka nusiat ding hun hi ta hi. 
2Timothy4:7 Kidemna ah ka hat tawpin ka hih khin a, a mong dongin ka tai khin a, upna thu kho takin lenin ka zo khin hi." 
2Timothy4:8 Thu a manin a khen Topa in tua Ni ciangin kei a hong piak ding thuman lukhu ahi gualzawhna thaman in tu-in kei hong ngak gige hi. Kei tung bekah a hong pia ding hi lo a, ama hong paikik ding itna tawh a ngakte khempeuh tungah zong a pia ding ahi hi." 
2Timothy4:9 Kei kiangah na hong pai baih theih nadingin hong hanciam in. 
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hih leitung thu kin zaw ahih manin kei hong nusia-in Thesalonika khua ah a pai hi. Kresen, Galatia gamah pai a, Titus, Dalmatia gamah pai hi." 
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hih leitung thu kin zaw ahih manin kei hong nusia-in Thesalonika khua ah a pai hi. Kresen, Galatia gamah pai a, Titus, Dalmatia gamah pai hi." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek kei kiangah om hi. Marka in nasepna ah nakpi takin hong huh thei ahih manin na hong pai ciangin amah hong tonpih in. 
2Timothy4:11 Luka bek kei kiangah om hi. Marka in nasepna ah nakpi takin hong huh thei ahih manin na hong pai ciangin amah hong tonpih in. 
2Timothy4:12 Tikhikas ahihleh Efesa khua ah ka paisak khin hi. 
2Timothy4:13 Na hong pai ciangin Troas khua ah Karpas kiang a ka nusiat ka puan tualpi hong pua inla, laibute zong, a diakdiakin savun laidalte tawh zong hong pua in." 
2Timothy4:14 Sikseek pa Alexander in kei tungah siatna lianpi hong bawl hi. Ama gamtatna tawh kizui-in Topa in thuk ding hi. 
2Timothy4:15 Amah in i thuhilhna nakpi takin nial ahih manin amah tawh kisai ah nangma pumpi kidawm mahmah in. 
2Timothy4:16 Keimah kihut nading thu ka gen masak ni-in kuamah in hong kop pih loin hong taisan mang uh hi. Tua thu hangin mawhsakna thuak kei beek uh hen! 
2Timothy4:17 Ahi zongin Topa in kei hong ompih a, Gentail mi khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ thu a kicingin ka gen theih nadingin thahatna a hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin sih nading thukhenna pan hong suaktasak hi." 
2Timothy4:18 Topa in siatna khempeuh panin kei hong hon khia dinga, ama vantung gamah muanhuai takin hong tunpih ding hi. Amah in a tawntungin minthanna ngah tahen. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Prisilla, Aquila le Onesiforas-te innkuan na hopihsak in." 
2Timothy4:20 Erastas, Korin khua ah om lai hi. Trofimas, Miletas khua ah a cina-in ka nusia hi." 
2Timothy4:21 Phalbi tun ma-in nong pai theih nadingin hong hanciam in. Eubulas, Pudens, Linas, Klaudias le i sanggam dangte khempeuh in zong hong hopih uh hi." 
2Timothy4:22 Topa in nangmah hong ompih tahen. Note khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. 
Titus1:1 Pasianʼ sila le Jesu Khrisʼ sawltak ahi keimah Paul in, Thuzuau a gen ngei lo Pasian in tangtawng pekin thu hong ciamin, a hunhoih a tun ciangin thuhilhna tawh a hong kilatsak nuntak tawntungna thu lametna tawh, Pasianʼ teel miteʼ upna le thuman thutak a theihna uh ah biakna thu tawh kituakin a khan semsem nading thu a hilh dingin eite hong Hon Pasianʼ thupiakna tawh nasep hong kipia ahih manin," 
Titus1:2  
Titus1:3  
Titus1:4 Thu upna ah ka ta taktak ahi Titus tungah lai ka hong khak hi. Pa Pasian le eite hong Hon Khris Jesu in nangma tungah hehpihna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Titus1:5 Krete Tuikulh gam sung tengah a manin puahphat ding a kisam lai a omte a sem ding le khua simah pawlpi upa a koih dingin tua gamah a hong nusia ka hi hi. Nang tungah ka hong gen sa thute hoihtakin na phawk in: 
Titus1:6 Upate pen paubaanna a om lote hi dinga, zi khat bek nei-in, a tate zong thu um mi hi-in, a thumang lo, a pheng tat gawpte hi lo ding uh hi." 
Titus1:7 Pawlpi siate pen Pasianʼ nasem ahih manin paubaanna a om lo, a kiphasak lo, zukham thei mi ahi lo, a ngongtat lo, a huaiham lo," 
Titus1:8 zinleleeng do a siam mi, thuhoih a deih mi, a pumpi a ki-uk zo mi, a thutang mi, a siangtho mi le a kisek zo mi hi ding uh hi."
