Titus1:9 Upna bulpi tawh a kituak thute limtakin lenkip ding uh hi. Tua hileh thuhilhna man tawh midangte hanthawn thei ding uh a, thuman a nial miteʼ khialhna zong laktel thei ding uh hi." 
Titus1:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu a mang lo, thu a mawk gengen, mi a khem thei, a diakdiakin Jew ngeina bangin vun at nading thu a gen tampi tak a om uh hi." 
Titus1:11 Sum ngah theih nading bekin a kilawm lopi-in thu hilhin biakna innkuan buppi nawngkaisak uh ahih manin thu a gen nawn loh nadingun khaktan ding ahi hi. 
Titus1:12 Amau Krete gam mite sung panin a kamsang uh khat in, “Krete gam mite a zuau thei tawntung, ganhing bangin a gilo, a thadah a uisan mi ahi uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Titus1:13 Hih ama thugen a man mahmah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin thu upna man nei thei-in," 
Titus1:14 Jew miteʼ tangthu phuahtawmte ahi a, thuman a nial miteʼ thupiaknate ahi zongin a don nawn loh nadingun khauh takin taii-in na thuhilh in." 
Titus1:15 Lungsim siangthote adingin na khempeuh a siang hi a, ahi zongin thu um lote a lungsim ngaihsutnate uh sia khin ahih manin amaute adingin a siang bangmah om lo hi." 
Titus1:16 Pasian a thei-in a kigen uh hangin a gamtatnate uh tawh kilehbulh hi. Amaute a muhthadah huai, a thumang lo, na hoih sem dingin a kilawmna a om lo mite ahi uh hi." 
Titus2:1 Ahi zongin nangmah in upna man tawh a kituak thu na hilh in. 
Titus2:2 Pasal khanghamte a kilawm a kituakin a om theih nading, thu ngaihsun thei mi ahih nading, a kikem zo mite ahih theih nading, upna man a neih theih nading, itna man a neih theih nading uh le a manin lungkipin a thuak zawh nadingun na gen in." 
Titus2:3 Tua mah bangin mite in Pasianʼ thu a gensiat khak loh nadingun numei khanghamte zong a gamtat a khuahek uh a zahtakhuai ahih nading, mi gensiate ahih loh nading, zunek kiphamawhte ahih loh nading, thuhoih thupha hilhin," 
Titus2:4 amaute sangin a nau zaw nupite in a pasalte uh le a tate uh a it nadingun a hilh ding," 
Titus2:5 thu ngaihsun thei, a gamtat siangtho, inn nasep a kizen, a migi le a pasalte uh thu a mang thei mi ahih nadingun na gen in." 
Titus2:6 Tua mah bangin khangnote zong amau pumpi a ki-uk zawh nadingun na hanthawn pha in. 
Titus2:7 Nangma pumpi mahmah gamtat hoihna a kipan thu khempeuh ah etteh hoih dingin na om in. Lungsim takpi tawh miteʼ zahtak theih dingin thu na hilh inla," 
Titus2:8 miteʼ mawh mat theih loh ding kam hoihte na zang in. Tua hileh i langte in hong gensiat theih nading mu loin a mai uh zum lel ding hi. 
Titus2:9 Silate in zong a tote uh thu mangin, thu khempeuh ah a tote uh a lungkimsak nading, a tote uh thu seel loin," 
Titus2:10 a guktaak loh nading, a tawntungin hoih gamtatin a cihtakna uh a kilatsak nadingun na hanthawn in. Tua hileh eite hong Hon Pasianʼ thu a hoihna a kilangsakte ahi ding uh ahi hi." 
Titus2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngah theih nadingun Pasian in ama hehpihna hong lak khinzo hi. 
Titus2:12 Eite in i lamet, a lian Pasian le eite hong Hon Jesu Khris a vangliatna hong kilatkik ding hun ngakin i om laitakin i biakna tawh a kituak lo thute le leitung nate deihna phiatin, lungsim hi hithiatin omin, thutangin, hih leitungah Pasianʼ deihna bangin i nuntak nadingin tua hehpihna thu in eite hong hilh hi." 
Titus2:13  
Titus2:14 I mawhna khempeuh panin hong hon khia ding le ama neihtuam i suah theih nadingin Jesu a mahmah hong kipumpiak a, eite pen gamtat hoih gamtat ding a lawp mahmah ihi hi." 
Titus2:15 Hih ka hong thugente hilh inla, mite taii-in na hanthot ciangin na aana neih teng khempeuh zang kawm in. Miteʼ simmawhin om kei in." 
Titus3:1 Na mite in hong uk kumpite le aana neiteʼ thu mangin, thuhoih khempeuh a sem dingin a kiging sa-in a om ding uh phawksak inla," 
Titus3:2 kuamah gensia loin, mite tawh kilemin kikhawl thei-in, lungsim nemin, mi khempeuh tungah a dik nading uh na gen in." 
Titus3:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite zong nidangin hai tatin, thumang loin, vakvai-in, duhna deihna a tuamtuamte thuak lahin, thusia le enna lungsim tawh a gamtate, mite in hong mudahin, eite khatlekhat zong a kimudah ngeite ihi hi." 
Titus3:4 Ahi zongin eite hong Honpa ahi Pasianʼ itna le a migitna thu hong kilat ciangin," 
Titus3:5 amah in eite hong hon khia hi. Eite in na hoih i sep zawhna hangin hong hon khia hi loin eite tungah suahtakna le nuntakna thak a hong pia Kha Siangtho in hong sawp siangna hangin a hong hehpihna tawh a hong hon khia ahi hi. 
Titus3:6 Pasian in eite hong Hon Jesu Khris hangin eite tungah a kicing takin Kha Siangtho hong pia ahih manin," 
Titus3:7 ama hong hehpihna hangin Pasian tawh kilemin i lamet nuntak tawntungna a ngah thei ihi hi. 
Titus3:8 Hih ka thugente a man mahmah ahi hi. Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ thu a um mite in gamtat hoih a neih theih nadingun hih ka hong thugente na lim ngaihsut ding ka deih hi. Ka hong thugente a hoih hi a, mite adingin a manpha vive ahi hi." 
Titus3:9 Ahi zongin a haihuai thu kiseelna, min kigual deudau khangsimna, kitotna, thukham kitotlawhna cihte na pelh in. Tuate a kimanna a om lo, a mawkna thu hi lel hi." 
Titus3:10 Kitot, kikhen nading a piangsak mite pen khatvei nih vei bang na hilh khit ciangin kisu kha nawn vet kei in." 
Titus3:11 Tua bang mite a kisia khin hi a, a mawhna un a khialhna uh a kilangsak ahihna thu na thei in." 
Titus3:12 Artemas ahi a, Tikhikas ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh nang kiangah ka hong paisak ciangin, Nikopolis khua ah phalbi sung om sawm ka hih manin, kei omna tua khua ah nong pai theih nadingin hong hanciam in." 
Titus3:13 Sitni Zenas le Apollos-te a khualzinna uh manlang takin a paisuak theih nadingun na hih theih bangin na huh inla, lamkal ah kisapna bangmah a neih khak loh nading uh zong na thei in." 
Titus3:14 I mite om mawk loin, thu kisam a phamawhte huh thei-in, na hoih na phate a sep theih nadingun na hilh in." 
Titus3:15 Kei tawh a om mi khempeuh in nang hong hopih uh hi. Thu upna sungah ei hong itte khempeuh na na hopihsak in. Note khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. 
Philemon1:1 Khris Jesu hangin thong a kia keimah Paul le i sanggampa Timoti in, Ka hong it uh, ka nasep pih uh ahi Filemon," 
Philemon1:2 le na inn ah a hong kikhawm pawlpite le i sanggamnu Apfia le thu upna ah galkap khawm pih Arkhippas te tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. 
Philemon1:3 I Pa Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris in note tungah dikna le nopsakna thupha hong tungsak tahen. 
Philemon1:4 Pasianʼ mite khempeuh na itna thu le Topa Jesu na upna thu na za khin ka hih manin Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simin nangmah hong phawkin Pasian tungah lungdamna thu ka ko tawntung hi. 
Philemon1:5  
Philemon1:6 Thu umte ihihna hangin Khristian sungah eite i kikholh manin, Khris hangin i nuntakna sungah i ngah thupha a hoih khempeuh na theihna a kicin semsem nadingin thu ka ngen hi." 
Philemon1:7 Sanggam aw, nangma hangin Pasianʼ mite in lungnopna ngah uh ahih manin tua bang itna na neihna hangin ka lungdamin ka tha a nuam mahmah hi." 
Philemon1:8 Tua ahih manin Khris hangin unau khat ihihna tawh hih dingin a kilawm bangin na gamtat nadingin thu kong gen ngam hi. 
Philemon1:9 Hih bangin ka hong genna pen itna i neihna hang ahi hi. Tu laitakin Khris taangmi ahi keimah Paul zong, Khris Jesu hangin thongkia-in a om ka hi hi." 
Philemon1:10 Tua ahih manin Khris hangin ka ta ahi Onesimas adingin ka hong thumsak hi. Thong sungah ka om sungun kha thu tawh kisai ah ama pa ka suak hi. 
Philemon1:11 Nidangin nang adingin amah a kimanna bangmah om lo a, ahi zongin tu-in ei tegel adingin mi manpha mahmah ahi hi." 
Philemon1:12 Keima pumpi zahin ngaihsutna tawh nang kiangah amah ka hong puakkik hi. 
Philemon1:13 Lungdamna Thu hangin thongkia-in ka om sungin nangma tangin kei a hong huh dingin ka kiangah ka omsak nuam hi. 
Philemon1:14 Ahi zongin nangma nasep hoihna pen keima hong kalh hi loin nangma uttawmna tawh na sep a suah theih nadingin nangma lungkimna om masa lopi-in bangmah ka hih nuam kei hi. 
Philemon1:15 A tawntungin nang kiangah amah hong om paisuak theih nadingin tawl khat sung nang kiang panin Onesimas a paikhia zong hi kha thei ding hi. 
Philemon1:16 Tu-in amah sal bek hi nawn loin sal sangin a thupi zaw, Khris hangin i sanggam hong hi ta hi. Kei adingin amah a man phat mah bangin sal hihna le Topa thu sungah sanggam hihna tawh nang adingin zong hong manpha zaw kan ding hi." 
Philemon1:17 Tua ahih manin nasepna ah pawl khat taktakin kei na hong ngaihsut nakleh kei na hong limbawl ding zahin amah na lim bawl in. 
Philemon1:18 Nang tungah hong khialh a, leiba thangba hong neih leh zong keima khialh, keima batin na seh in." 
Philemon1:19 Keimah Paul in ka hong loh ding hi, cihna thu keima khut mahmah tawh a lai ka gelh ahi hi. Nangma nuntakna bulpi mahmah zong keima hang ahihna thu gen kul lo hi." 
Philemon1:20 Tua ahih manin sanggam aw, Topaʼ hangin hih ka hong thumna hong pia in. Khris sungah unau khat ihih manin ka lungsim hong nuamsak in." 
Philemon1:21 Ka hong genna sangin a hoih zaw a pha zaw-in na gamta ding, ci-in muan mahmahna tawh hih lai a hong gelh ka hi hi." 
Philemon1:22 Tua banah, Pasian in note khempeuhʼ thungetna hong pia-in, note kiangah kei hong paikik thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin ka om nading inn dei zong a baih sa-in na bawl un." 
Philemon1:23 Khris Jesu hangin thong ka kiat pih Epafras a kipan," 
Philemon1:24 ka nasep pih Marka, Aristarkhas, Demas le Luka te in hong hopih uh hi." 
Philemon1:24 ka nasep pih Marka, Aristarkhas, Demas le Luka te in hong hopih uh hi." 
Philemon1:25 Topa Jesu Khris hehpihna thupha, note tungah hong tung tahen." 
Hebrews1:1 A beisa hunah Pasian in kamsangte zangin i pupite tungah a lam tuamtuam tawh a khenkhenin thu na gen ngei zo hi. 
Hebrews1:2 Ahi zongin tu hun nunung ciangin leitung vantung na khempeuh a bawlin a zat, a tawpna ah na khempeuh a luah dingin a seh a Tapa zangin eite tungah thu hong gen hi." 
Hebrews1:3 Tua Tapa in Pasianʼ minthanna vang hong taang khiasak a, Pasianʼ lim taktak mah hong pua-in, ama kampauna tawh leitung vantung buppi pai-in a kip hi. Mihingte a mawhna panun a siansak khit ciangin Vanglian pipa Pasianʼ taklam, vantungah a tu hi." 
Hebrews1:4 Vantung miteʼ ngah minthanna sangin Tapa tungah Pasian in a piak min a liat zawk mah bangin vantung mite sangin Tapa lian zaw thampek hi. 
Hebrews1:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in vantungmi khat peuhpeuh tungah, “Ka Tapa na hi hi. Tu ni-in na Pa ka suak hi,” ci ngei lo hi. Tua mah bangin, “Kei, ama Pa ka hi dinga, amah, ka Tapa ahi ding hi,” ci-in zong kampau ngei lo hi." 
Hebrews1:6 Tua banah, Pasian in leitungah a Tapa neihsun hong paisak ding ciangin, “Pasianʼ vantungmi khempeuh in amah bia ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews1:7 Ahi zongin vantung miteʼ thu a gen ciangin, “Pasian in a vantung mite huih bangin bawl a, a nasemte meikuang bangin bawl hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews1:8 Ahi zongin Tapaʼ thu a gen ciangin Pasian in, “Pasian aw, na kumpi tokhom khang tawntungin kip dinga, thuman thutang tawh na gam sung na uk ding hi." 
Hebrews1:9 Thuman na deih a, khialhna na mudah hi. Tua ahih manin nangma Pasian in nangmah hong teelin, na lawmte tungah a piak sangin a lian zaw, a lungdamhuai pahtawina nang hong pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews1:10 Tua banah, “Topa ahi nangmah in a kipat cil-in leitung na piangsak a, na khut tawh vantungte na bawl hi." 
Hebrews1:11 Tua nate khempeuh mangthang dinga, nang na hih leh na om paisuak ding hi. Tua nate puan bangin luisuak thei dinga," 
Hebrews1:12 puan khep bangin na khep dinga, tua nate khempeuh kikhelkhel ding uh hi. Ahi zongin nang na kibang tawntung dinga, teek hun cih na nei ngei kei ding hi,” na ci lai hi." 
Hebrews1:13 Ahi zongin Pasian in ama vantung mite kiangah, “Na galte na khe nuai ah ka hong sikcipsak matengin ka tak lamah hong tu in,” ci ngei lo hi." 
Hebrews1:14 Vantung mite pen Pasianʼ na a sem, a kimu thei lo khate hi uh a, hotkhiatna a ngah ding mite a huh dingin Pasian in a hong sawl ahi hi." 
Hebrews2:1 Tua ahih manin i zak sa thuman thutakte i khahsuah khak loh nadingin kiptak kho takin i letkip ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews2:2 Vantung mite in hong gen thute thuman hi a, tua thu a palsatte in a kilawm bangin gim thuak ding uh hi." 
Hebrews2:3 Tua ahih manin a thupi mahmah hih hotkhiatna thudon loin i om leh suahtakna om thei ngei lo ding hi. A masa-in Topa mahmah in hotkhiatna thu hong pulak a, tua thu a za mite in thuman ahihna thu eite tungah hong gen leuleu uh hi." 
Hebrews2:4 Amauteʼ thugenna banah Pasian in vangliatna lim le nalamdang a tuamtuamte bawlna tawh hong gen beh lai hi. Tua banah ama hoihsak bangin Pasian in Kha Siangtho zong hong hawm lai hi. 
Hebrews2:5 Eite in gen belin i neih a hong tung ding leitung pen Pasian in vantung miteʼ khut sungah koih lo hi. 
Hebrews2:6 Lai Siangtho mun khat ah a kigenna ah, “Pasian aw, nangma ngaihsut tham dingin mi pen bang hi a, na phawk tham dingin mihingʼ ta bang hi lel ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ahi zongin vantung mite sangin a neu zaw deuhin na bawl a, minthanna le pahtawina na guan a," 
Hebrews2:8 na khempeuh na uksak hi,” na ci hi. “Pasian in na khempeuh a uk dingin bawl,” a cih ciangin na khempeuh a huam khin hi ta hi. Mihing in na khempeuh a uk lam i thei nai kei hi." 
Hebrews2:9 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ hehpihna hangin mi khempeuh adingin Jesu a sih theih nadingin tawl khat sung vantung mite sangin a neu zaw-in a kibawlna i mu a, sihna a thuakna hangin minthanna le pahtawina a ngahna thu i thei hi." 
Hebrews2:10 Na khempeuh ama adingin a piangsak Pasian in tate tampi minthanna a ngahsak theih nadingin a thuakna tawh hotkhiatna thu ah a makai dingin Jesu a bawl ding a kilawm mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews2:11 Mawhna panin mite a siangthosak pa le sianthosakna a ngah mite in, Pa, a kibang a neikhawm uh hi. Tua hi a, Jesu in mite, “Sanggam,” a cih ding zum ngaihsut lo ahih manin," 
Hebrews2:12 “Pasian aw, ka sanggamte kiangah nangma thu ka gen dinga, mi khempeuh mai ah nangmah kong phat ding hi,” na ci a," 
Hebrews2:13 tua ciangin, “Pasian muanin ka nei ding hi,” na cikik a, tua ciangin, “Pasian in hong piak ta dangte tawh hih lai ah ka om hi,” na ci leuleu hi." 
Hebrews2:14 Tate a cih mite pen leitung cilesa a nei mite ahih manin, ama sihna hangin sihna a uk Dawimangpa a suk gawp theih nadingin Jesu in mihing pianzia mah hong nei phot hi." 
Hebrews2:15 Tua ahih manin sihna a kihtak manin sal bangin a om mite amah in hong suaktasak hi. 
Hebrews2:16 Ama lunghihmawh pen vantung mite hi lo a, Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte a lunghimawh ahihna thu hong kitel hi." 
Hebrews2:17 Tua ahih manin mihingteʼ mawhna a kimaisak theih nadingin Pasianʼ na a sepna ah mite adingin hehpihna le cihtakna tawh Siampi Lianpen a suah theih nadingin a sanggamte tawh a kibangin mihing lim a hong puak ding a kisam ahi hi. 
Hebrews2:18 Ama pumpi mahmah in ze-etna le gimna thuak ahih manin tu hun ciangin tua bang a thuakte a hong huh thei hi. 
Hebrews3:1 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ sapna a ngah mi siangthote aw, eiteʼ upna thu tawh kisai ah Siampi Lianpen a sem dingin Pasianʼ sawltak Jesuʼ thu ngaihsun dih un." 
Hebrews3:2 Pasianʼ inn sungah na a sepna ah Moses a cihtak mah bangin hih siampi nasep a sem dingin a seh Pasianʼ tungah Jesu a citak hi. 
Hebrews3:3 Ahi zongin inn a lam pa pen a inn sangin a minthan zawk mah bangin Moses sangin Jesu pahtawi zawk ding ahi hi. 
Hebrews3:4 Inn khempeuh a lam na om ciat sam a, ahi zongin na khempeuh a piangsak pa pen Pasian ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:5 Moses pen nasem khat hihna tawh Pasianʼ inn sungah thu khempeuh ah citak a, mailam hunah Pasian in a gen ding thute a gen hi." 
Hebrews3:6 Ahi zongin Khris pen Pasianʼ inn sung a uk Tapa ahihna tawh a citak ahi hi. I lametna thu tawh kisai-in lungsim hanna le muanna tawh i omsuak nakleh eite pen Pasianʼ inn ihi hi. 
Hebrews3:7 Tua ahih ciangin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tu ni-in Pasianʼ aw na zak uh leh" 
Hebrews3:8 gamlak ah na om lai-un amah ze-etin, Pasian na lehdo lai hun uh bangin na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un." 
Hebrews3:9 Na pu na pate un kum sawm li sung ka nasepnate mu napi-in kei hong ze-et veve uh hi. 
Hebrews3:10 Tua ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a, ‘Amaute citak lo niloh uh a, ka thukhamte zui nuam lo uh hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Hebrews3:11 Ka heh manin ka kiciam a, ‘Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in kei tawh hong tawlnga khawm ngei lo ding uh hi,’ ka ci hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews3:12 Sanggamte aw, a nungta Pasian kiang panin a paikhia zah dingin thu um lo, a gilo na om khak loh nadingun na kingaihsun un." 
Hebrews3:13 Lai Siangtho in, “Tu ni,” a cih pen eite tungah zong hong cihna hi lai ahih manin mawhnaʼ khem sa-in ta-in na lungsim uh na khauhsak khak loh nadingun khatlekhat kihanthawnin na kihuh zaw un." 
Hebrews3:14 A kipat tungin i neih lungmuanna kip takin i let ciat nakleh i vekpi-in Khris tawh pawl khat ihi hi. 
Hebrews3:15 Lai Siangtho in, “Tu ni-in Pasianʼ aw na zak uh leh Pasian na lehdo lai uh hun bangin na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews3:16 Pasianʼ aw za napi-in amah a lehdo kuate ahi hiam? Moses in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih mi khempeuh ahi uh hi. 
Hebrews3:17 Kum sawm li sung kuate tungah Pasian heh ahi hiam? Mawhna bawlin, gamlak ah a si mite tung ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:18 Thupi takin Pasian kiciamin, “Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in, kei tawh tawlnga ngei lo ding uh hi,” a cih ciangin kuate a cihnopna ahi hiam? Amah a lehdote a cihna ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:19 Tua ahih manin a up lohna uh hangin tawlngakna munah a lut zawh lohna uh i thei hi. 
Hebrews4:1 Ahi zongin tu-in eite va pai-in amah tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin Pasian in thuciam hong nusiat khin ahih manin tua tawlngakna munah a lut lah na suahkhak loh nadingun lau-in kidawm ni. 
Hebrews4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh mah bangin eite in zong i za hi. Amaute in Lungdamna Thu a zak uh ciangin upna tawh na sang lo uh ahih manin a thu zak uh amaute adingin a phattuamna om lo hi. 
Hebrews4:3 Ahi zongin eite ihih leh amah in, “Ka heh manin ka kiciam a, ‘Hih leitang ah hong lut lo ding uh a, ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in kei tawh hong tawlnga khawm ngei lo ding uh hi,’ a cihte bang hi loin ei thu umte pen Pasian tawh a tawlnga khawm ihi hi. Leitung a piansak cil pek a kipanin a nasep a man khin hi napi-in tu-a bangin thu gen veve lai hi." 
Hebrews4:4 Lai Siangtho mun khat ah, “A ni sagih ni-in a nasepna khempeuh panin Pasian tawlnga hi,” ci-in ni sagihna thu tawh kisai na gen hi." 
Hebrews4:5 Hih thu mah na kigenkik a, “Ka tawlngakna munah hong pai-in kei tawh hong tawlnga ngei lo ding uh hi,” na cikik hi." 
Hebrews4:6 Lungdamna Thu a za masate in um lo uh ahih manin Pasian tawh va tawlnga khawm thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlnga khawm ding mi pawl khat om lai hi. 
Hebrews4:7 “Tu ni,” cihna kammal na om lai ahih manin Pasian in nidang khat seh lai ahihna thu hong kilang hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, “Tu ni-in Pasianʼ aw na zak uh leh na lungsim uh khauhsak nawn kei un,” a cihna mun i mat khit sa mah bangin tua zawh kum tampi khit ciangin David tungtawnin thu hong genkik hi." 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pasianʼ tawlngakna munah mite tunpih khin hileh Pasian in a nidang khat thu nung gen nawn lo ding hi. 
Hebrews4:9 Tua ahih manin tu-a thu om zia ah ci lehang ni sagih ni-in Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin Pasianʼ mite a tawlngak nading om lai hi. 
Hebrews4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nasepna panin Pasian a tawlngak mah bangin va pai-in Pasian tawh a tawlngate khempeuh zong a nasepna panun khawl ding uh hi. 
Hebrews4:11 Tua ahih manin amaute in a up loh manun Pasianʼ tawlngakna munah a lut zawh loh uh bang hi loin va pai-in Pasian tawh i tawlngak khawm theih nadingin hanciam ciat ni. 
Hebrews4:12 Pasianʼ thu nungta-in a gamtang hi a, lang nih a hiam namsau sangin hiam zaw lai hi. Kha le lungsim, guh le taang kituahna, guh le guhngek dongin khen khia thei hi. Mihingteʼ lungsim ngimna le a ngaihsutnate zong theithei hi." 
Hebrews4:13 Pasianʼ mai ah seelcip theih ding bangmah om lo hi. Eite khempeuh i din nading paʼ mai ah a kipiangsak na khempeuh a kiliah a ki-im thei om loin kimu sinsen hi. 
Hebrews4:14 Tua ahih manin eite in Pasianʼ omna vantung a va tung khin sa, Siampi Lianpen ahi Pasianʼ Tapa Jesu nei khin ihih manin i san sa upna thu kip takin len ni." 
Hebrews4:15 Eiteʼ neih Siampi Lianpen pa in i ginat lohna ah eite a hong hehpih thei lo ding hi lo hi; eite mah bangin ze-etna khempeuh a thuak hi a, ahi zongin mawhna a bawl lo ahi hi." 
Hebrews4:16 Tua ahih manin a kisap hunin, eite a hong huh dingin hehpihna le dikna thupha i ngah theih nadingin, kimuanna lungsim tawh hehpihna tokhom va zuan ciat ni." 
Hebrews5:1 Siampi lianpen ahi peuhpeuh mipa pen a miteʼ mawhna hangin Pasianʼ tungah biakna le letsong a piaksak dingin ama mipihte lak panin kiteelin nasep a kiguan ahi hi. 
Hebrews5:2 Amah zong lam tampi ah a gina lo thei mi mah ahih manin thu thei lo mite le a khial mite tungah lungnem takin na sem thei hi. 
Hebrews5:3 Amah zong mi ginalo mi mah ahih manin miteʼ mawhna hangin biakna a pia hi bek loin ama mawhna mahmah hangin zong biakna a pia ahi hi. 
Hebrews5:4 Tua bangin pahtawina a nei siampi lianpen nasep pen a sem dingte amau utthu tawh a kisehtawm mawk hi lo hi; siampi lianpen a sem dingin a mahmah a kisehtawm hi lo a, Aaron a kisap mah bangin Pasian in amah a seh ahi hi." 
Hebrews5:5 Tua mah bangin Khris zong, a mahmah in siampi lianpen nasep a sem tawm mawk hi loin Pasian in ama kiangah, “Nang, ka Tapa na hi hi. Tu ni-in na Pa ka suak hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews5:6 Mun dang khat ah zong, “Melkhizedek siampi gui zui-in a tawntungin siampi na hi ding hi,” na ci lai hi." 
Hebrews5:7 Leitungah mihingin Jesu a om lai-in sihna panin amah a hon khia thei ding Pasian tungah thu ngenin khitui naptui tawh thumin na kiko hi. 
Hebrews5:8 Amah, Pasianʼ Tapa hi napi-in a thuakna tawh thumang ahih theih nading a na kisin hi." 
Hebrews5:9 Tua bangin a cingtaak mi a suah khit ciangin ama thu a mang mite khempeuh adingin tawntung hotkhiatna a kipatna hong suak a," 
Hebrews5:10 Melkhizedek gui zui-in siampi lianpen dingin Pasian in a bawl hi. 
Hebrews5:11 Hih thu tawh kisai-in i gen ding tampi a om hangin note in thu thei hak mahmah na hih manun i gen tel theih nading haksa hi. 
Hebrews5:12 Tu-in note pen midang a hilh dingin sia na suah theih ding uh hun hi khin napi-in note mahmah pen Pasianʼ thu a bulpite hilh ding na kisam lai uh hi. Antak ne thei nai loin nawi bek a ne thei lai na hi uh hi. 
Hebrews5:13 Nawi bek a ne laite pen naungek ahih manin a man le a man lo thu bangmah phawk thei nai lo uh hi. 
Hebrews5:14 Ahi zongin antak i cih pen a sia le a pha a khen thei, a lim le a lim lo a khen thei ta, a khangham khin sa mite ading ahi hi." 
Hebrews6:1 Tua ahih manin Khris thu a kipat cilna lelte nusia-in a thuthuk zawte ngaihsutin nei ni. Bangmahin a kimang lo nasepnate nusiat ding, Pasian upna thu," 
Hebrews6:2 tuiphumna le khut ngakna thu, misite thawhkikna le tawntung gim thuakna, cih thute genpha sansan nawn kei ni." 
Hebrews6:3 Eite in mainawt ni. Pasian in hong thukimpih ahih nakleh i mainawt ding ahi hi. 
Hebrews6:4 A tawpkik khin sate a kisikkik nadingin kibawl zo lo hi. Pasianʼ khuavak sungah amaute om khinin, vantung nopna ciam khinin, Kha Siangtho ngah khinin," 
Hebrews6:5 Pasianʼ thu a hoihna phawk khinin, a hong tung ding vangliatna thu zong thei khin uh ahih manin," 
Hebrews6:6 amaute a tawpkik leh, amau utthu tawh singlamteh tungah Pasianʼ Tapa thatkikin a zumhuai dingin a pholak kikkik suak uh ahih manin a kisik theih nading uh lampi om nawn lo hi." 
Hebrews6:7 A tungah a kia guahtuite hupin, a kikhawhsak mite adingin a kimang theikungte a khangsak leitang pen Pasian in thupha a pia hi." 
Hebrews6:8 Ahi zongin tua leitang in lingkungte le sialtalling kungte hong posak leh Pasian in samsia-in, mei tawh kihal tum ding hi." 
Hebrews6:9 Lawm itte aw, hih bangin thu i gen hangin note kong muang mahmah uh a, hotkhiatna tawh kizomin thupha a hoih zaw ngah taktak uh hi, ci-in ka hong ngaihsun uh hi." 
Hebrews6:10 Pasian, a man loin gamta ngei lo ahih manin na Khristian pihte uh a beisa hunah na huhna uh le tu dongin na huh laina uh tawh ama adingin na nasepna uh le amah na itna uh na lahnate uh hong mangngilh het lo ding hi." 
Hebrews6:11 Note khat ciatʼ lametna thu hong tun taktak theih nadingin a tawp dongin lawpin na thanop paisuak nading uh ka hong deihsak pha uh hi. 
Hebrews6:12 Note thadah loin upna le lungduaina a nei mite bangin, Pasianʼ hong ciam sa thu na ngah nadingun ka hong deihsak uh hi." 
Hebrews6:13 Pasian in Abrahamʼ tungah thu a ciam ciangin a tunsak takpi ding bek thu a ciam hi. Thu a ciam ciangin zong amah sangin a lian zaw kuamah om nawn lo ahih manin ama min tawh thu ciam a," 
Hebrews6:14 “Nang thupha hong pia-in suanlekhak tampi a nei dingin ka hong ciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews6:15 Abraham in lungduai takin na ngak ahih manin Pasianʼ thuciam a ngah hi. 
Hebrews6:16 Mi khat peuhpeuh in thu a ciam ciangin amah sangin a lian zaw khatʼ min tawh kiciam ahih manin, thu kituhnate ah tua thuciamna pen a tawpna hi ta hi." 
Hebrews6:17 Pasian in ama geelnasa a kheel ngei het lo ding ahihna thu a thuciamna a ngah ding mite tungah teltakin theisak nuam ahih manin a thuciam banah kiciamna khat a bawl lai hi. 
Hebrews6:18 Tua hi a, a kikheel thei lo thu nih kithuap ahih manin Pasian in zuaugen thei lo ding hi. Tua hi a, amah a beel eite in eite mai ah hong kikoih lametna thu kip takin i let cip nadingin i tha hong nuamsak hi." 
Hebrews6:19 I lungsim a hong kipsak dingin tu-a bang lametna a nei ihi hi. Tua i lametna kician mahmah a, vantung biakinn siangtho tawngnung sung ciang dong tung khinta hi." 
Hebrews6:20 Tua lai munah eiteʼ tangin Jesu na ma tun khinta a, siampi Melkhizedek gui zui-in a om tawntung ding siampi lianpen a suak hi." 
Hebrews7:1 Abraham in a galsimna ah kumpite thatin gualzo-in a hong ciah ciangin A Lianpen Pasianʼ siampi ahih banah Jerusalem khua kumpi zong ahi Melkhizedek in Abraham na dawnin thupha a pia hi. 
Hebrews7:2 Abraham in a na ngah khempeuh sung panin Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a pia hi. Melkhizedek min a khiatna in, “Thuman Kumpi,” a cihna hi phot a, tua banah Jerusalem khua kumpi zong hi lai ahih manin ama min pen, “Kilemna Kumpi,” cihna zong ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:3 Melkhizedekʼ pa le a nu a kipanin a suahna thu, a sihna thu le a khang tangthu peuhmah a kiciaptehna om lo ahih manin Pasianʼ Tapa tawh a kibang hi a, siampi mah hi tawntung paisuak hi." 
Hebrews7:4 Tua ahih manin bangzah takin mi lian ahihna thu na thei uh hi. I pupi Abraham nangawn in zong gal sungah a ngah nate sung panin ama tungah sawm-ah-khat na pia hi. 
Hebrews7:5 Levi suanlekhak sung panin siampi a sem mite pen Abrahamʼ suanlekhak mah hi napi-in, amau mipih Israel-te tung panin sawm-ah-khat a lak nadingun Thukham a na kibawl hi." 
Hebrews7:6 Ahi zongin Melkhizedek ahihleh Leviʼ suanlekhak hi lo napi-in Abrahamʼ tung panin sawm-ah-khat na la-in thuciamna a ngah mipa zong thupha a na pia lai hi. 
Hebrews7:7 A lian zawte in a neu zawte thupha a na piakna pen a man thu hi a, sel theih ding hi lo hi." 
Hebrews7:8 Siampiteʼ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh a si thei mi mah ahi siampite in mite tung panin sawm-ah-khat a la uh hi. Ahi zongin Melkhizedekʼ lakna tawh kisai-in ahihleh Lai Siangtho in a gen mah bangin a nungta tawntung mipa in sawm-ah-khat a la ahi hi. 
Hebrews7:9 Abraham in Melkhizedek tungah sawm-ah-khat a piak ciangin ama suan Levi in zong ama pupi Abraham tungtawnin a pia mah kici thei hi. 
Hebrews7:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Melkhizedek in Abraham a na dawn laitakin Levi suak nai lo ahih manin a pupi Abrahamʼ sung mahah a om lai ahi hi. 
Hebrews7:11 Israel mite in Leviʼ suanlekhak siampite tungtawnin Thukham ngah uh hi. Leviʼ suanlekhak siampiteʼ nasepna kicingtaak hileh Melkhizedek siampi nam zui-in siampi namdang a pian ding kisam nawn lo dinga, Aaron gui zui-in siampi om sa a kimang pah ding ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:12 Siampi nam kikheel ahih manin a thukham zong a kikheel ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews7:13 Hih bang thute a kigenna i Topa pen a namtuam khat hi a, ama phung sung panin biakna tau ah siampi na a sem khat beek om lo hi." 
Hebrews7:14 I Topa pen Judah suan sung panin a piang ahih manin Moses in siampi thu a na gen ciangin hih Judah minam genin na nei lo hi. 
Hebrews7:15 Melkhizedek tawh a kibang siampi namtuam khat hong pian ciangin hih thu hong kitel pha semsem hi. 
Hebrews7:16 Amah pen mihingteʼ bawl ngeina zui-in siampi a suak hi lo a, a si thei lo nuntak tawntungna vang tawh siampi a suak ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Melkhizedek nam bangin tawntung siampi na hi hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews7:18 Ngeina lui pen gina loin, a kimanna om lo ahih manin kinawl khiin hi." 
Hebrews7:19 Moses Thukham ahi ngeina lui in a cingtaaksak zawh bangmah om lo ahih manin eite in Pasian i naih theih nading lametna ahi ngeina thak hong kithun hi. 
Hebrews7:20 Tua banah Pasianʼ kiciamna zong hong om lai hi. Midangte siampi-in a kibawl laitakin tua bang kiciamna na om lo hi. 
Hebrews7:21 Ahi zongin Pasian in Jesu kiangah, “Topa in a lungsim a kheel loh nading limtakin kiciam khin a, ‘Nang, tawntung siampi na hi hi,’” na ci ahih manin kiciamna tawh Jesu siampi a na suak ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:22 Hih bangin a kilamdang diakin a kibawlna in Jesu pen kiciamna hoih zaw ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi. 
Hebrews7:23 A kilamdanna a dang khat in: Siampi dangte pen si thei-in a nasep zom paisuak thei lo ahih manin a mi malin tampi pha uh hi. 
Hebrews7:24 Ahi zongin Jesu nungta tawntung ahih manin midang tungah a nasep ki-ap nawn loin a mahmah in siampi nasep sem paisuak hi. 
Hebrews7:25 Tua hi a, mite adingin a thumsak thei dingin amah nungta tawntung ahih manin ama tungtawnin Pasian kiang a zuante khempeuh, tu a kipanin a tawntungin a hon khia thei ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:26 Tua bangin a siangtho, paubaanna a nei lo, vantungah a lian penin a kikoih Siampi Lianpen Jesu i neih a hoih mahmah ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:27 Siampi lianpen dangte in nisimin amauʼ mawhna hangin biakna pia masa-in, tua ciangin midangteʼ mawhna hangin a piak niloh bang hi loin, amah khatvei bek a kipiakna tawh a tawntung adingin a kimang paisuak ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:28 Moses Thukham in siampi lianpen a sem dingin cingtaakna a nei thei lo mihing mah na seh a, ahi zongin tua Thukham nungah a hong piang Pasianʼ thuciamna in a tawntungin a cingtaakin a kibawl Tapa, Siampi Lianpen dingin kiciamna tawh a na seh hi." 
Hebrews8:1 Tu-in i gen nop thu pen hih bang ahi hi: Vantungah Pasianʼ tokhom tak lamah a tu tua bang Siampi Lianpen khat a nei ihi hi. 
Hebrews8:2 Amah in, miteʼ bawl ahi lo, Topa mahmah in a bawl a taktak puanbuk ahi a Siangtho Pen mun sungah siampi lianpen nasep a sem ahi hi." 
Hebrews8:3 Pasian tungah letsong a tuamtuamte a pia ding le ganhing tawh biakna a pia dingin siampi lianpen a sem peuhpeuhte a kiseh ahih mah bangin eiteʼ Siampi Lianpen pa in zong bang khat teitei a piak ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews8:4 Jew Thukham tawh kizui-in Pasian tungah letsongte a pia ding siampite om khinta ahih manin leitungah Jesu a om lai hileh siampi hi thei het lo ding hi. 
Hebrews8:5 Leitung a siampiteʼ sepsepte pen vantungah a om thu, a limin a sem uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Puanbuk lam ding a kipat ciangin Pasian in, “Mual tungah i om lai-in a lim ding khempeuh kong lah bang teekteekin a kihih nadingin na thei in,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews8:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian le mite kikalah Jesu in a bawl thuciamna pen na a hoih zaw piak nading thuciamna ahih mah bangin Jesu tungah a kipia siampi nasep pen siampi dang khempeuhteʼ sep sangin a lian zaw ahi hi. 
Hebrews8:7 Thuciamna a masa kimang thei hileh thuciamna a nihna kisam nawn lo ding hi. 
Hebrews8:8 Tua ahih manin Pasian in ama mite mawhsakna thu na gen a, “Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite le Judah mite tawh thuciamna thak ka bawl ding hun hong tung ding hi." 
Hebrews8:9 Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih dingin a pu a pate uh ka khut tawh ka kaih lai a, amaute tawh ka bawl thuciamna bang hi lo ding hi. Amaute tawh ka bawl thuciamna zui lo uh ahih manin kei zong amaute ka don kei hi." 
Hebrews8:10 Ahi zongin tu-in Israel mite tawh ka bawl ding thuciamna hih bang ahi hi. Amaute sungah ka thukham ka guang dinga, amaute lungtang tungah gelhin, amauteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, amaute pen keima mi ahi ding uh hi." 
Hebrews8:11 A neu pen pan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh ahih manin ‘Topa thei in,’ ci-in a ulenau le a mipihte kiangah kuamah in a hilh ding kisam nawn lo ding hi." 
Hebrews8:12 A mawhna a khialhna uh ah amaute ka hehpih dinga, tua bangte phawkin ka nei nawn kei ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews8:13 Pasian in thuciamna thak a gen ciangin thu ciamna lui pen a bei-in a seh ahi hi. Tua a bei thuciamna pen a maimang ta ahi hi. 
Hebrews9:1 A masa thuciamna nangawn in biak zia ding le biak nading mun tawh kisai ngeina na nei tei sam hi. 
Hebrews9:2 Puanbuk khat kibawl a, a pua nung dei pen Siangtho Mun kici a, tua sungah meivak, sabuai le Ompihna Anlum kikoih hi." 
Hebrews9:3 Tua Siangtho Mun a kideina zomah Siangtho Pen Mun a kici a dei dang khat om leuleu hi. 
Hebrews9:4 Tua sungah paknamtui hal nading kham kibawl biakna tau le kham tawh a kizut Thuciamna Singkuang om hi. Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah manna anlum a kikoihna kham beel, tehno nei-in a hing Aaronʼ ciangkhut le thukhamte a kigelhna suangpek nihte kikoih hi." 
Hebrews9:5 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang tung sanah Pasianʼ ompihna lim ahi kherub nihte om a, tua kherub nihte in hehpihna tokhom liimsun uh hi. Hih nateʼ thu tu-in a neng a tawngin i gen khinzo kei hi." 
Hebrews9:6 Hih bang tengin a kibawl khit ciangin a dei pua nung sungah nisim a nasep uh a sem dingin siampite a lut hi. 
Hebrews9:7 Ahi zongin a dei sung nung sungah Siampi Lianpen pa bek kum khatin khatvei pai a, theih loh man a, amah le miteʼ khialhna hangin ganhing sisan tawh biakpiakna a bawl hi." 
Hebrews9:8 A pua nung inn dei a om lai teng a sung nung ahi, a Siangtho Pen Mun a kihong nai lo ahihna thu Kha Siangtho in hong kilangsak hi." 
Hebrews9:9 Hih bang om zia pen tu hun lai thu a lahna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian tungah a kipia letsongte le ganhing tawh biaknate in a bia miteʼ lungsim siangsak zo lo hi. 
Hebrews9:10 Zu le an le pumpi siansuahna ngeina tuamtuamte hi bek a, Pasian in na khempeuh a puahphat hun ma kikal sungteng zat ding ngeina ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:11 Ahi zongin tu-in a hoih zaw thu a sem ding Siampi Lianpen Khris hong tung khinta a, ama lutna biakbuk pen a kipiangsak tawm, khut tawh a kibawl biakbuk hi loin a lian zaw, a cingtaak zaw mun ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:12 Siangtho Pen Mun ah a tawntungin a kimang dingin khatvei bek Khris a va lut ciangin biakpiak nadingin keel sisan le bawng no sisante va keng loin ama sisan va keng a, eite adingin tawntung hotkhiatna a hong ngahsak hi." 
Hebrews9:13 Keel sisan, bawngtal sisan le bawngla kihal tum vute, biakna vai-in a siang lo mite tungah a kitheh ciangin biakna vai-in miteʼ pum tung siangthosak thei ahihleh," 
Hebrews9:14 tawntung Kha Siangtho hangin Pasian tungah a cingtaak biakpiak nadingin Khris in a piak ama sisan in na tam sem khia zo zaw dinga, a nungta Pasianʼ na i sep theih nadingin bangmahin a kimang lo nasepna panin ama sisan in i lungsim hong siangsak ding hi." 
Hebrews9:15 Thuciamna masa in a huam khak mite, a mawhna panun a suahtak theih nading uh ngeina om pen a si suak khinta ahih manin, Pasianʼ sap mite in a ciam sa tawntung thupha a ngah theih nadingun Khris in thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:16 Mi khat in a sih khit ciangin a gamhluah dingin a deih pa lai-in ciamtehin a koih leh a laibawl pa a sih phot ding kisam hi. 
Hebrews9:17 A laibawl pa a hin lai teng tua lai kizang thei lo a, a sih khit ciangin kizang thei bek hi." 
Hebrews9:18 Tua mah bangin thuciamna masa zong sisan a kizat ciangin thu suak thei pan hi. 
Hebrews9:19 Moses in zong mite tungah Thukham sunga om thute a piak lai-in bawng no sisan, keel sisan le tui sungah puknah le tuumul san diahin, tuate tawh Thukham laibu le mite theh a," 
Hebrews9:20 “Pasian in note tungah a hong piak thuciamna sisan ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews9:21 Tua banah Moses in Biakbuk le biakna-in a kizang a sunga na om khempeuh zong sisan a theh hi. 
Hebrews9:22 Thukham kizatna sungah na khempeuh sisan tawh kisiansuah a, sisan a kiluansak khit ciang bekin mawhna kimaisak thei pan hi." 
Hebrews9:23 A taktak ahi lo vantung limte pen hih bangin siansuahna kibawl hi. Ahi zongin vantung nate in hih sangin a hoih zaw biakpiakna kisam hi. 
Hebrews9:24 Tua ahih manin a lim ahi mihingteʼ bawl Siangtho Mun sungah Jesu pai lo a, vantung mahmah ah va pai-in Pasianʼ omna ah eiteʼ tangin tu-in amah a va kilaak ahi hi." 
Hebrews9:25 Kum simin Siangtho Pen Munah Jew Siampi Lian pente amauʼ sisan ahi lo, ganhing sisan tawh a pai zelzel bangun amah va pai themthum lo hi." 
Hebrews9:26 Tua bangin va pai zelzel hileh leitung piancil a kipanin a va thuak zelzel ding ahi hi. Ahi zongin amah biakna-in a va kipiakna hangin a kimang paisuak a suah theih nadingin mawhmaisak nadingin hun bei kuan ciangin amah khatvei a va kipia hi. 
Hebrews9:27 Mi khempeuh khatvei si-in, tua khit ciangin Pasianʼ thukhenna a thuak ding ahih mah bangin," 
Hebrews9:28 mi tampiteʼ mawhna a thuak dingin Khris zong khatvei bek a kipia hi. A nih veina hong kilatkik ciangin mawhna thu tawh kisai nasem ding hi nawn loin, lawptakin amah a ngak mite a hon khia ding ahi hi." 
Hebrews10:1 Jew Thukham pen mailam hunah a taktak a hong tung ding lim lah kholhna hi bek ahih manin tua Thukham tawh kizui-in a kum a kumin a kipia biakpiakna in Pasian kiang a zuan mite mi cingtaak suah zo ngei lo hi. 
Hebrews10:2 Thukham zui-in Pasian a bia mite in mawhna panin siansuahna ngah zo uh hileh a lungsim uh ah kisuanna lungsim om nawn lo ding ahih manin biakpiakna piak kikkik kul nawn lo ding hi. 
Hebrews10:3 Tua ahih manin biakpiakna a kipiak simin a kumkumin mite a mawhna uh a kiphawksak kikkik ahi hi. 
Hebrews10:4 Tua hi a, bawngtal sisan le keel sisan in mawhna siangsak zo ngei lo hi." 
Hebrews10:5 Tua ahih manin leitungah Khris hong pai ciangin Pasian kiangah, “Ganhing le khawh sa tawh biakna na deih kei a, nang kong biak nadingin pumpi khat nong vaihawmsak hi." 
Hebrews10:6 Meihal biakna le mawhmaisak nadingin biaknate tawh nang na lungkim kei hi. 
Hebrews10:7 Tua ahih manin, ‘Thukham laibu sungah keima thu a kigelh bang teekteek mahin keima hih ding nong deih bang teekteek mah ahih dingin ka hong pai hi, Pasian aw,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Hebrews10:8 “Ganhing le khawh sa tawh biakna na deih kei a, meihal tawh biakna le mawhmaisak nadingin biaknate tawh na lungkim kei hi,” a cih ciangin hih biakpiaknate khempeuh Thukham tawh kizui-in hih bangin kam na pau veve lai a," 
Hebrews10:9 tua banah, “Nangma deih bang ahih dingin ka hong pai hi,” na ci thuah lai hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in Khris tawh biakna a kipsak theih nadingin ganhing le khawh sa tawh biakna luite na beisak phot hi." 
Hebrews10:10 Pasianʼ deihna bangin Jesu Khris gamta a, a tawntungin a kimang paisuak dingin ama pumpi biakna-in khatvei a kipiakna hangin eite khempeuh i mawhna panin a siang ihi hi." 
Hebrews10:11 Jew siampite nisimin a nasepna uh munah dingin a kibang biakpiakna mah pia niloh uh a, ahi zongin tua a piak uh biakpiaknate in mawhna maisak thei lo hi." 
Hebrews10:12 Ahi zongin Khris in mawhna hangin khatvei a piak khit ciangin a tawntung adingin kimang ahih manin Pasianʼ taklam ah tu hithiat a," 
Hebrews10:13 Pasian in ama khe nuai ah a galte khempeuh a koihsak nading hun ngakin a om hi. 
Hebrews10:14 Mawhna panin a sianthosak mite, khatvei bek biakpiakna a bawlna tawh siangtho paisuaksak hi." 
Hebrews10:15 Kha Siangtho in zong hih thu hong theih pih ahih manin," 
Hebrews10:16 “Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Mailam hunah amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl dinga, amaute sungah ka thukhamte guanin, amaute lungtang tungah ka gelh ding hi,” a cih khit ciangin," 
Hebrews10:17 “Amauteʼ mawhna le a gitloh gamtatnate uh ka ciamteh nawn kei ding hi,” ci hi, ci-in a na gen hi." 
Hebrews10:18 Tua hi a, mawhna a kimaisak khit ciangin mawhmaisak nadingin biakna piak ding kisam nawn lo hi." 
Hebrews10:19 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Jesu hong sihna hangin Siangtho Pen Munah ututin lut theih nading thu i nei ta hi." 
Hebrews10:20 Ama pumpi mahmah ahi dalna puan tawnin nuntakna lampi ah i pai theih nadingin amah in lampi thak hong honsak hi. 
Hebrews10:21 Pasianʼ inn sung a uk siampi lianpen zong i nei hi. 
Hebrews10:22 Tua ahih manin mawhna thu ah kisuanna lungsim om nawn loin, tui siangtho tawh i pumpi a kisawp sa-in muanna le lungsim takpi tawh Pasian kiang zuan ni." 
Hebrews10:23 Pasian in piak dingin a hong ciam thu muang ngam ihih manin i lametna thu kip takin len ni. 
Hebrews10:24 Khatlekhat ki-itin a hoih nate i sep nadingin kihanthawn ciat ni. 
Hebrews10:25 Mi pawl khatte in kikhop a pelh bang hi loin, eite in kikhop khawmnate pelh loin om ni. Topaʼ hong pai ding Ni hong naina thu thei ihih manin khatlekhat kihanthawn semsem zaw ni." 
Hebrews10:26 Thuman thutak i theih khit ciangin mawhna i bawl hamtang lai leh i mawhna a kimaisak nadingin biakpiakna dang om nawn lo a," 
Hebrews10:27 a kihtakhuai thukhenna le Pasianʼ thu a nial mite a kaang tum ding meikuangpi bek om lai hi. 
Hebrews10:28 Moses Thukham a zui lote pen mi nih le thum in mawh mah hi, ci-in teci a pan khit nakleh kihehpih het loin sihna kithuaksak hi." 
Hebrews10:29 Tua bang ahihleh Pasianʼ Tapa a simmawh, mawhna a hong maisak Pasianʼ thuciamna sisan a thudon lo, Pasianʼ hehpihna a hong puak Kha Siangtho a hehsakteʼ thuak ding bangzah takin lian zaw kan ding ahi hiam?" 
Hebrews10:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Phulakna keima aʼ hi a, ka thukkik ding hi,” a ci pa le, “Topa in ama mite thu a khen ding,” a ci pa i theih ahi hi." 
Hebrews10:31 A nungta Pasianʼ khut sungah thumang loin i tun khak ding a lauhuai mahmah ahi hi. 
Hebrews10:32 A beisa hun a note tungah thupiangte phawkkik un. Pasianʼ khuavak sungah na om khit uh ciangin haksatna tampi thuak napi-in tuate na lel kei uh hi. 
Hebrews10:33 Mipiʼ mai ah hong kisimmawhin hong kibawlsia a, tua bang a thuakte na pawlpih ngam uh hi." 
Hebrews10:34 Note in a hoih zaw, a kip zaw nate a nei na hih lam uh kithei na hih manun thong kia mite thuakpih ngamin, na neihsa uh hong kilaksak hangin zong lungdam takin na om thei veve lai uh hi." 
Hebrews10:35 Tua ahih manin thaman lianpi a hong ngahsak thei na lungsim hanna uh na khahsuah kei un. 
Hebrews10:36 Pasianʼ deihna bangin gamta-in, ama thuciam na ngah theih nadingun lungduai-in thuak zawhna na kisam uh hi." 
Hebrews10:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A sawt loin, a hong pai ding pa hong tung dinga, hong zekai nawn lo ding hi." 
Hebrews10:38 Ahi zongin keima mi a thuman mite in ka thu umin nungta ding uh a, a nungkik a om uh leh tua mite tungah ka lungkim kei ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Hebrews10:39 Eite pen nungkikin a maimang mite ihi kei a, upna nei-in hotkhiatna a ngah mite ihi hi." 
Hebrews11:1 Upna nei i cih ciangin i muh theih nai loh i lamette ngah takpi ding, ci-in muanna lungsim neihna ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:2 Tanglai mite in upna a na neih manun Pasian in a na pakta hi. 
Hebrews11:3 Pasianʼ kampauna tawh leitung le vantung piang a, tu-a i muh theih nate a om nai lopi panin hong piang hi, ci-in i upna bek mah tawh a thei ihi hi." 
Hebrews11:4 A upna hang mah tawh Abel in Kainʼ piakna sangin a san theih huai zaw biakpiakna Pasianʼ tungah a na pia hi. Pasian in ama biakna na sang ahih manin a upna hangin mihoih hi, ci-in Pasianʼ pahtakna a na ngah hi. Abel a sih zawh a sawtpi hi khin napi-in tu dong mahin upna thu a hong gengen lai a suak hi." 
Hebrews11:5 A upna hang mahin Enok zong sihna tawh kipelh hi. Pasian in ama kiangah la to ahih manin kuamah in Enok mu nawn lo hi. Amah a kilaktoh ma-in Enok in Pasianʼ lungkimna ngah hi, ci-in Lai Siangtho in a na gen hi." 
Hebrews11:6 Upna lo tawh kuamah in Pasian lungkimsak zo lo hi. Pasian kiang a zuan mi peuhmah in Pasian a om takpi ahihna thu le amah a zongte Pasian in thaman pia hi, ci-in a up ding kisam hi." 
Hebrews11:7 Noah in zong a upna hang mah tawh mailam a thupiang ding a muh theih lohpi mahin Pasianʼ thugenna na mang a, teembaw khat bawlin a innkuanpihte tawh na suakta hi. Hih bangin a gamtatna tawh leitung midangte a mawh ahihna kilangsak a, a upna hangin mihoih hihna thu Pasian kiang panin a ngah hi." 
Hebrews11:8 Pasian in ama tungah piak dingin a ciam leitang ah Abraham a pai dingin a sap lai-in Abraham in Pasianʼ sapna a manna pen a upna hang mah ahi hi. A pai nading mun nangawn thei lopi-in a gam le a lei nusia-in a ding khia hi. 
Hebrews11:9 Pasian in piak dingin a ciam gamah a upna hang mah tawh gam dangpi hi napi-in peemta-in va om phot a, ama ngah bangin thuciamna a ngah a ta Isaac le a tu Jakob tawh puanbuk peuh ah a om phot uh hi." 
Hebrews11:10 Pasian in geelin a lam, bulkip a nei khuapi, Abraham in a ngakna-in tua bangin a om ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:11 Sarah a ta neih theih ding hun bei khin napi-in ama tungah thuciam pa zuau lo ding, ci-in Abraham in upna a neihna hang mahin Sarah gai-in ta a nei ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:12 A cimang khinin a kingaihsun hih mi khatʼ suanlekhakte pen van a aksi zah leh tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hi. 
Hebrews11:13 Hih mite khempeuh in amaute tungah piak dingin Pasianʼ ciam thute ngah nai lo uh a, gamlapi ah a om lai gal muhin hopih thei bek uh a, hih leitungah khualmi peemta hi lel hang, ci-in kitheihna tawh omin a upna mah uh tawh a si uh hi." 
Hebrews11:14 Tua bang mite in amau adingin a gam a lei ding uh a zong ahihna uh hong kilang hi. 
Hebrews11:15 Amaute in a nusiat uh leitung ngaihsutpi penin a nei uh hileh hong ciahkik theih nading uh hun ngah ding uh hi. 
Hebrews11:16 Ahi zongin amauteʼ lunggulh pen leitung sangin a hoih zaw vantung gam ahi hi. Pasian in amaute adingin khuapi khat na vaihawmsak ahih manin, tua bang mite in amah pen ka Pasian uh hi, ci-in a gen ding uh Pasian in maizumna in na ngaihsun lo hi." 
Hebrews11:17 Pasian in Abraham a ze-et laitakin Abraham in a upna hang mah tawh Pasian biak nadingin a tapa Isaac na pia ngam hi. Pasian mah in Abraham tungah tapa kong pia ding ci-in a ciam hi napi-in, Pasianʼ ciamna bangin a neih tua a tapa neihsun mah, Pasian biak nadingin Abraham in pia dingin na kithawi hi." 
Hebrews11:18 Tua a piak ding tapa pen Pasian in, “Na tapa Isaac tungtawnin suanlekhak na nei ding hi,” a cih pa ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:19 Pasian in a si sa nangawn hingkiksak thei ding hi, ci-in Abraham in a up mah bangin Abraham in a si sa a tapa Isaac a limin a ngahkik ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:20 A tapa Jakob le Esau in mai lamah thupha ngah ding hi, ci-in Isaac in a na gen ngamna pen a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:21 Jakob a sih kuan ciangin a ciangkhut dawnah kingamin Pasian bia a, Josefʼ tapa tegel thupha a piakna pen Pasian in na pia takpi ding hi, ci-in a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:22 Josef a sih ding ciangin Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat nading thu le ama luanghawm a bawl nading zia a vaikhaknate zong a upna hang mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:23 Moses a suah ciangin a nu le a pa in hoih sa mahmah in, kumpipaʼ thupiakna kihta tuan loin kha thum sung a seelcip ngamna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:24 Moses a gol ciangin Faroʼ tanuʼ tapa kicih ding a ut nawn loh ngamna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:25 Tomno sung mawhna sungah nuam takin om ding sangin Pasianʼ mite tawh gimna thuak khawm ding a ut zaw hi. 
Hebrews11:26 Mai lamah a thaman ding mukhol thei ahih manin Egypt gam sunga hauhna le nopsaknate khempeuh sangin Khris hangin simmawhna thuak taak zaw tham hi, ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Hebrews11:27 Moses pen kumpipaʼ heh ding lau het loin Egypt gam panin paikhia a, a kimu thei lo Pasian a mu bang keekin a nungkik het lohna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:28 Mi That Vantungmi in Israel mite ta upa pen khempeuh a thah khak loh nadingin Paisan Pawi kipiangsakin, inntual kongtung zawl khempeuh sisan a kizutna zong upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:29 Lei keu tunga pai bang keekin Israel mite in San Tuipi a kantan theihna uh zong a upna hang mah uh ahi hi. Amauteʼ pai bangin Egypt mite in pai ding a sawm uh ciangin tui in a tuumcip hi. 
Hebrews11:30 Israel mite in Jerikho khuapi ni sagih sung a kimvel khit uh ciangin a kulhpi a cipna zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:31 Numei paktat Rahab in thukante limtakin na zin do a, Pasianʼ thu a mang lo mite tawh a sih khawm lohna zong a upna hang mah ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:32 Tu-a bangin gengen lai ding ihi hiam? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jefthah, David, Samuel le kamsangteʼ thu i gen nading hun om lo hi." 
Hebrews11:33 Hih mite khempeuh in zong a upna uh hang mah tawh kumpi gam tuamtuamte zo-in, thumanin a gamtat manun Pasianʼ thuciam a ngah uh hi. Upna hang mah tawh humpinelkai kamte hucip uh a," 
Hebrews11:34 meikuangpi mitsak thei-in, sih nading panin suakta uh a, gina lo napi-in thahat uh a, gal sungah thahatin gamdang galkapte a zo gawp uh hi." 
Hebrews11:35 Numeite in a sihsuah mite uh, thawhkikna tawh a ngahna uh zong a upna uh hang mah ahi hi. Mi pawl khatte in a hoih zaw nuntakna ah a thawhkik theih nadingun leitungah suahtak ding ut tuan loin bawlsiatna thuakin a si uh hi." 
Hebrews11:36 Mi pawl khat in simmawhna, satna, sikkol bulhna le thongkiatna zong a thuak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:37 Suang tawh a kidenglum, sing-at tawh a kiphelkham, namsau tawh a kisatlum a om hi. Tuu vun peuh, keel vun peuh silh zo bekin, cimawhin zawng uh a, gimna le bawlsiatna a thuak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:38 Amaute adingin leitung mite kilawm zo lo uh ahih manin galtai bangin gamlak le mual tung khawngah vak kawikawi-in, leihawm suanghawm sung peuh ah a om uh hi." 
Hebrews11:39 Hih miteʼ upna lian mahmah hi, ci-in a kitheih hangin piak dingin Pasian in a ciam sa thute a ngah nai kei uh hi." 
Hebrews11:40 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in eite adingin a hoih zaw-in thu hong vaihawmsak a, amaute tawh eite i kikop ciangin amaute a cingtaak ahih theih phing nading uh Pasianʼ geelna ahi hi." 
Hebrews12:1 Tua hi a, eite in i kiim i pam ah hih zahin a tam teci nei ihih ciangin eite a hong dongtangsak thei nate khempeuh le eite a hong gakcip mawhna le khialhnate khempeuh pai khia-in, i mai ah a om tai nading lampi a mong dongin lungsim kip takin tai ni." 
Hebrews12:2 Eite hong makai-in i upna a hong cingtaaksak Jesu mitsuanin nei ni. Mai lamah a ngah ding lungdamna hangin maizumna kihta loin singlamteh tungah sihna hong thuak a, tu-in Pasian tokhom tak lamah a tu hi." 
Hebrews12:3 Tua zahta-in mawhnei miteʼ langbawlna a thuaknate ngaihsun unla, note lungkia loin khauh takin om un." 
Hebrews12:4 Tu ciang dong mawhna tawh na kidona uh ah sihna zah ciang dongin na dona uh om nai lo hi. 
Hebrews12:5 Pasian in note, tate, hong ci-in hong hanthotna thu mangngilh khinta na hi uh hiam? Pasian in note kiangah, “Ka ta aw, Topaʼ hong thuhilhna zangkhai ngaihsut kei inla, gim a hong piak ciangin lungkia kei in." 
Hebrews12:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a it mite thuhilh a, ta taktakin a ngaihsut mite a taii hi,” hong ci hi." 
Hebrews12:7 Pasianʼ hong thuhilhna na thuak ding mah uh ahi hi. Pasian in note ta-in hong ngaihsun ahih manin a thuak na hi uh hi. Pateʼ thuhilhna le taiina a thuak lo ta kuamah om lo hi. 
Hebrews12:8 Tateʼ thuak bangin thuhilhna le taiina thuak loin hong kikoih mawk leh ta taktak hi loin zawlta na hi lel ding uh hi. 
Hebrews12:9 Tua banah, i leitung pate in gim hong pia a, zong i zahtak lai hi. Tua ahihleh kha thu tawh kisai ah i Paʼ thu mang pha zaw-in i nuntak ding kisam hi." 
Hebrews12:10 I leitung pate in amauʼ hoihsak bangin nuntak tomno sung ngaihsutna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia a, ahi zongin Pasian in amah tawh kibangin siangtho-in i om theih nadingin eite hong khualna-in hong thuhilhin gim hong pia hi." 
Hebrews12:11 Thuhilhna tawh gim hong kipiak ciangin nuam kisa het loin na kisa mahmah sam a, ahi zongin tua thuhilhna a mang zote in thuman nuntakna hangin nopsakna thaman a nung ngah uh hi." 
Hebrews12:12 Tua ahih ciangin a zaw nuangnuang na khutte uh le a no dakdak na khukte uh khauhsak un. 
Hebrews12:13 Bai luangluangin a paite, na guh na taang uh a kipelh loh nadingin lampi tang zui-in na pai un." 
Hebrews12:14 Mi khempeuh tawh na kilem theih nading uh hanciam un. Nuntak siangtho lo tawh kuamah in Topa mu zo lo ding ahih manin nuntak siangtho na nungta un. 
Hebrews12:15 Pasianʼ hehpihna a ngah lah na hih khak loh nadingun na kidawm un. Zung kha a nei singkung hong khangin mi tampi gimsakin a siatsak bangin mite a siasak na hih khak loh nadingun na kidawm un. 
Hebrews12:16 Numei tawh a mawh mite suak kha kei unla, Esau bangin annek khat tawh innluah za a zuak mi na suahkhak loh nadingun kidawm un." 
Hebrews12:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Esau in a pa kiang panin thupha ngahkik nuamin khitui naptui tawh a nget hangin a gamtatna sa a bawlkik theih nading lampi om nawn lo ahih manin bangmah ngah thei tuan nawn lo hi. 
Hebrews12:18 Israel mite in a tuah sa bangin note in Sinai Mual tunga meikuang, khuamial le lungzinna, huihpi," 
Hebrews12:19 peengkul tumna awging le a kihtakhuai awgingte na za nai kei uh hi. Israel mite in awging a zak uh ciangin kihta lua uh ahih manin a zakkik nawn loh nadingun a thum uh hi. 
Hebrews12:20 “Ganhing nangawn in tua mual a sukkhak le kidenglum ding hi,” ci ahih manin thuak ngap lo uh hi." 
Hebrews12:21 Tua pen nak lauhuai mahmah ahih manin Moses in zong, “Lau-in ka liing hi,” a na ci hi." 
Hebrews12:22 Ahi zongin note pen Zion Mual, a nungta Pasianʼ khuapi, vantung Jerusalem, sim zawh loh vantung mite a omna," 
Hebrews12:23 vantungah a min a kikhum Pasianʼ ta upate a kikhopna, mi khempeuhteʼ thu a khen Pasianʼ kiang, a cingtaakin a kibawl midikteʼ kha a omna," 
Hebrews12:24 thuciamna thak a hong vaihawm Jesu kiang, Abelʼ sisan sangin thu hoih zaw a gen sisan a kithehna mun na tung zo uh hi." 
Hebrews12:25 Tua ahih manin note tungah thu a hong gen paʼ thugen na ngaih loh khak ding uh kidawm un. Hih leitungah thu a gen paʼ thu a ngai lote suakta lo ahih manin vantung panin thu a hong gen paʼ thugen ngai kei lehang i suakta kei zaw kan lai ding hi. 
Hebrews12:26 Tua hun lai-in thu a gen ciangin leitung kiliing a, ahi zongin tu-in amah in thu hong ciam a, “Leitung bek liingsak loin vantung tawh zong khatvei ka liingsak lai ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Hebrews12:27 “Khat vei liingsakkik lai ding,” a cih ciangin a kipiangsak nate kiliingsakin kipaai khia dinga, a kiliingsak lo nate kip lai ding ahihna thu hong kilangsak hi." 
Hebrews12:28 Tua ahih manin a kiliingsak zo lo Pasianʼ gam i ngah manin lungdamin, zahtakna le lamdangsakna tawh Pasianʼ lungkimna bangin amah bia ni." 
Hebrews12:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh eiteʼ Pasian pen a kaang tum thei meikuang tawh a kibang ahi hi. 
Hebrews13:1 Khris sungah unau bangin na ki-itna uh na zomsuak un. 
Hebrews13:2 Khual mite hoihtakin zin na do ding uh na phawk un. Mi pawl khat in vantung mite zin do ahih lam a phawk lopi-in a do na hi gige uh hi. 
Hebrews13:3 Amaute tawh thong a kia khawm bangin kingaihsunin thong sunga om mite na phawk un. Note zong leitung pumpi mah tawh a nungta lai na hih manun gimna a thuak mite na phawk un. 
Hebrews13:4 Mi khempeuh in nupa thu thupi ngaihsut uh henla, zite pen pasalte tungah citakin, pasalte zong a zite uh tungah citak uh hen. Pasian in a thaangtat mite le nulepa mawhna a gamta mite tungah thu khen ding hi." 
Hebrews13:5 Sum deih luatna tawh na kipelh nadingun na nuntakna uh ah kikem unla, na neihzah uh tawh lungkim un. Pasian in, “Note ka hong nusia ngei kei dinga, ka hong tamasak ngei kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Hebrews13:6 Tua ahih manin kimuanna lungsim tawh hang takin, “Topa, kei hong huhpa hi a, ka lau kei ding hi. Kua in bang hong cih zo ding ahi hiam?” ci ngam ni." 
Hebrews13:7 Note tungah Pasianʼ thu a hong gen, nidang a na makai masate uh phawk un. Amauteʼ nuntakna le a sihna ziate uh ngaihsun unla, amauteʼ upna bang na neih nadingun hanciam un." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesu Khris pen zani, tu ni, a tawntungin kibang ngitnget hi." 
Hebrews13:9 Thuhilhna lamdang a tuamtuamte zui-in lam man panin pial kha kei un. A zui mite tungah bangmah phattuamna a piangsak thei lo an nek tui dawn tawh kisai ngeina zuihna in thahatna hong pia thei lo a, Pasianʼ hehpihna bek in i lungsim hong thahatsak thei hi." 
Hebrews13:10 Jew biakbuk ah na a sem siampite in biakna tau tungah a kipia biakna sate nek nading thu nei lo uh hi. 
Hebrews13:11 Jew Siampi Lianpen pa in mawhna hangin biak nadingin Siangtho Pen Munah a ganhing sisan paipih a, ahi zongin a ganhing pumpi pen giahphual pua lamah kihal tum hi." 
Hebrews13:12 Tua mah bangin Jesu in zong ama sisan tawh miteʼ mawhna a siansak theih nadingin khuapi pua lamah a si hi. 
Hebrews13:13 Tua ahih manin eite zong a pua lamah pai-in Jesu tawh maizumna thuak khawm ni. 
Hebrews13:14 Eite adingin hih leitungah a kip khuapi om lo ahih manin a hong piang lai ding khuapi a zong ihi hi. 
Hebrews13:15 Tua ahih manin Jesu tungtawnin amah i biakna-in i kam tawh ama min pulakin Pasian phat tawntung ni. 
Hebrews13:16 Khatlekhat tungah thuhoih kibawlin na kihuh ding uh mangngilh kei un. Hih bang gamtatnate pen Pasian a lungkimsak thei biakna ahi hi. 
Hebrews13:17 Na makaite uh thu na mang unla, a genna uh bangin na gamta un. Pasian kiangah amaute in a nasepnate uh a pulak ding uh ahih manin tawlnga loin note hong lunghimawh tawntung uh hi. Amauteʼ thu mang le-uhcin a nasepna uh ah lungdam mahmah ding uh a, mang kei le-uhcin dah pipi-in na sem ding uh hi. Dah pipi-in a nasepna uh note adingin zong phattuamna a om tuan hi lo hi." 
Hebrews13:18 Kote adingin thu hong ngetsak niloh un. A tawntungin na a manin sepnopna lungsim nei ka hih manun ka lungsim uh ah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi. 
Hebrews13:19 Note kiangah Pasian in kei hong paisakkik baih theih nadingin nakpi takin thu na na nget nading uh ka hong thum pha nuam hi. 
Hebrews13:20 Ama sihna hangin Tuucing Lianpa suakin, a sisan tawh tawntung thuciamna a kipsak i Topa Jesu pen sihna panin a thokiksak, eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia Pasian in," 
Hebrews13:21 ama deihna bangin na na sep theih nadingun a kisam thuhoihte khempeuh note tungah hong guanin, ama lungkimna bangin i gamtat theih nadingin Jesu Khris hangin eite sungah na hong sem henla, Khris in a tawntungin minthanna ngah paisuak tahen. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Sanggamte aw, hih ka hong laigelh pen sau khol lo ahih manin hih ka hong hanthotna thute limtakin na ngaih nadingun kong thum hi." 
Hebrews13:23 I sanggampa Timoti zong thong panin a suahtak khitna thu ka hong theisak nuam hi. Amah hong pai baih nakleh note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong tonpih ding hi. 
Hebrews13:24 Na makaite uh le Pasianʼ mi khempeuh na hopihsak un. Italy gam panin a hong pai mite in note hong hopih uh hi. 
Hebrews13:25 Note khempeuh tungah Pasianʼ hehpihna thupha hong tung tahen. Amen. 
James1:1 Pasian le Topa Jesu Khris sila keimah James in Leitung mun khempeuh ah kithehthangin a om minam sawm le nihte tungah hopihna lai ka hong gelh hi. 
James1:2 Sanggamte aw, thuhaksa a tuamtuam na thuak uh ciangin lungdam nadingin na ngaihsun zaw un." 
James1:3 Tua bangin na upna uh hong kize-etna na thuak zawh uh ciangin na kipna uh hong kilangsak ahihna thu na thei uh hi. 
James1:4 A kisam bangmah om loin a cingtaak na suah theih nadingun na thuakna uh hangin a tawntungin na kip paisuak nadingun na ngaihsun un. 
James1:5 Pilna kisam na om uh leh Pasian kiangah ngen un. Mi khempeuh tungah Pasian dikin cingh mahmah ahih manin hong pia ding hi. 
James1:6 Ahi zongin na nget uh ciangin hong pia takpi ding hi, ci-in muanna tawh na ngen un. A muang lah mite pen huih nunna lam peuh ah a kinil kawikawi tuihualte tawh kibang lel hi." 
James1:7 Tua bang mite, lungsim kip a nei lo, a kineihkhem hi lel uh a, Topa kiang panin bangmah a ngah het loh ding lamtak uh a theih ding uh ahi hi." 
James1:8  
James1:9 Miniamte in liatna a ngah ciangin lungdam uh hen. 
James1:10 Mihaute zong a niam uh ciangin lungdam veve uh hen. Lopa pak bangin a mangthang veve ding ahi uh hi. 
James1:11 Ni hong suakin a sat ciangin lopate vul a, a paakte pulhin a hoihna teng a bei mah bangin a haute zong manlahin a om laitakun siatna a thuak ding uh ahi hi." 
James1:12 A hoih takpi mah hiam, ci-in sinna a thuak ciangin a nang zote a hampha mahmah ahi hi. Tua bangin a nang zote in, amah a itte tungah Pasian in a piak dingin a ciam nuntakna lukhu a ngah ding uh hi." 
James1:13 Mi khat peuhpeuh in tua bang ze-etna a thuak ciangin, “Pasian in kei hong ze-et hi,” ci-in ngaihsun kei hen. Siatna in Pasian ze-et ngei lo a, mite a siat nadingin Pasian in zong ze-et ngei lo hi." 
James1:14 Mi khatpeuh in ama deihna zui-in a gamtat ciangin mawhna a piangsak ahi hi. 
James1:15 Lungsim utna a gol semsem ciangin mawhna hong piang a, mawhna hong cingtaak ciangin sihna hong piang hi." 
James1:16 Sanggamte aw, miteʼ khem sa-in om kei un." 
James1:17 A hoih thu le na khempeuh, Pasian kiang panin hong pai hi a, vantung khuavak a Piangsak pa ahih manin amah kikheel ngei lo a, amah a kihei manin khua zong mial tuan lo hi." 
James1:18 Ama piansakte khempeuh lakah eite a masa pen i suah theih nadingin thuman thutak zangin ama utthu tawh eite a hong piangsak tawm ahi hi. 
James1:19 Sanggamte aw, note in na theih ding uh ka deih thu in: Thu kigen khempeuh hoihtakin ngai pahpah un. Ahi zongin pau pahpah kei unla, heh pakpak kei un." 
James1:20 Mihingteʼ hehna in Pasianʼ sep ding thuhoihte khaktan hi. 
James1:21 Tua ahih manin ngeina hoih lote le gamtat siate khempeuh nusia unla, Pasianʼ thu mangin noteʼ lungsim sungah a hong koih thu zui un. Tua thu in note hong hon khia thei hi." 
James1:22 Nomau kikhem tawmin thu zak bek tawh maisak kei unla, na zak bangun zui-in sem zaw un." 
James1:23 Mi khat in thu a zak bek tawh maisakin a zakna bangin a zuih kei leh limlang ah a maitang a ki-en mipa tawh kibang bek hi. 
James1:24 Limlang ah a ki-en mipa in amah hoihtakin a kimuh khit ciangin paikhia a, bangci pian ka hi hiam cih a mangngilh pah hi." 
James1:25 Ahi zongin mite a suaktasak thei thukham cingtaak hoihtakin a et khit ciangin a thu ngai-in a mangngilh pah hi loin, hoihtakin ngaihsun tawntungin a zuite pen a sepna khempeuh uh ah Pasian in thupha a pia ding hi." 
James1:26 Mi khatpeuh in Khristian ka hi hi, ci napi-in kampau a kidop zawh kei leh a mahmah a kikhem tawm hi lel a, ama biakna neih a mawkna ahi hi." 
James1:27 Pa Pasian in a siangtho biakna citakin a ngaihsut thu in: Tagahte le meigong numeite a haksatna uh ah hoihtakin kemin, leitung siatnate tawh kisawh kha loin siangtho takin omna ahi hi." 
James2:1 Sanggamte aw, minthanna vang tawh a kidim i Topa Jesu Khris umin na om laitakun a pualam a kilang pian ziate siksanin mi na deidan kei un." 
James2:2 Gentehna-in, kham zungbuh bulhin puan manpha a silh mihau khat le puan sia sa a silh mizawng khat, noteʼ kikhopna ah hong pai khawm leh," 
James2:3 limtakin a kizem mipa zahtak bawl zaw-in, “Hih lai ah tutna nuamah hong tu in,” ci le-uhcin a, ahi zongin mizawng pa kiangah, “Tua lai ah na ding phot in,” cihna ahi a, “Sual tung hih ka khe kiang khawngah hong tu in,” cihna ahi zongin kam na zat uh leh," 
James2:4 mi a deidan na hi uh a, ngaihsutna hoih lo nei-in a gamta na hi uh hi." 
James2:5 Sanggamte aw, hoihtakin na ngai un. Pasian a it mite tungah piak dingin a ciam vantung gam a ngah ding le upna thu ah mihau a suak dingin Pasian in leitung mizawngte a teel hi napi-in," 
James2:6 note in mizawngte na simmawh bawl uh hi. Note hong bawlsia-in thukhen zum hong tun pahpahte, mihaute hizaw uh hi." 
James2:7 Pasian in note a hong phuah min hoih a gensiate, mihaute mah ahi uh hi." 
James2:8 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Nangmah na ki-it bangin na veengte na it in,” ci-in a genna Topaʼ Thukham zui le-uhcin a hoih hi pah hi." 
James2:9 Ahi zongin mi na deidan uh leh note a khial na hi uh a, Thukham a palsat na hi veve uh hi." 
James2:10 Mi khatpeuh in thukham dang khempeuh a zuih hangin khat a khialh nakleh a vekpi-in a khial mah ahi hi. 
James2:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Nulepa mawhna na bawl kei in,” a ci pa mah in, “Mi na that kei in,” ci thuah lai veve hi. Nulepa mawhna na gamtat loh hangin mi na thah nakleh thukham palsat mah na hi veve hi." 
James2:12 Tua ahih manin mi a khah khia thei thukham tawh kizui-in thukhenna a thuak ding mi bangin kampau-in na gamta un. 
James2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh hehpihna lungsim a nei lote tungah Pasian in thu a khen ciangin hehpih lo dinga, hehpihna lungsim a neite tungah Pasian in thu a khen ciangin a hehpihna in zo zaw ding hi." 
James2:14 Sanggamte aw, mi khat in, “Upna ka nei hi,” a cih hangin a sepna in a zuih kei leh bang phattuamna om ding ahi hiam? Tua a upna bek in amah hon khia ding ahi hiam?" 
James2:15 Gentehna-in, na mipih khat peuhpeuh uh an nek tui dawn, nikten puansilh nei loin haksapi-in om henla," 
James2:16 note khat peuhpeuh in, ama pumpi kisapna bangmah pia lopi-in, “Khualum gilvah takin om in,” ci mawk lel le-uhcin bang phattuamna om ding ahi hiam?" 
James2:17 Tua ahih ciangin gamtatna in a zui lo upna guak pen a si ahi hi. 
James2:18 Ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in, “Mi khat in upna nei a, a dang khat in gamtatna nei hi,” ci zenzen leh, gamtatna in a zui lo upna hong lak dih in; keimah in ahihleh ka upna ka gamtatna tawh kong lak ding hi, ka ci ding hi." 
James2:19 Pasian khat bek om hi, ci-in na um hi. Tua pen hoih mahmah hi. Dawite nangawn in zong tua bangin umin lau-in liing deldel uh hi." 
James2:20 Lawmte aw, gamtatna in a zui lo upna pen a hawmpi ahihna thu kong lak ding hi." 
James2:21 Eiteʼ pupi Abraham in biakna tau tungah a tapa Isaac a piakna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl thei hi. 
James2:22 Tua ahih manin upna le sepna kizom khawm a, sepna in upna a kicinsakna thu na thei uh hi." 
James2:23 Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi,” ci-in a genna thumanin tung takpi a, Abraham pen Pasianʼ lawmpa kici hi." 
James2:24 Tua ahih manin, mi khatpeuh in a upna bek tawh hi loin, a sepna tawh a kizuih ciangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah pan ahihna thu na thei uh hi." 
James2:25 Numei paktat Rahab zong tua bangmah ahi hi. Israel mi thukante hoihtakin zin na do-in, lampi dangah ciahsakin na suaktasak a, ama nasepna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngah ahi hi." 
James2:26 Tua ahih manin hu a diik lo, hu a sang lo pumpi pen a si ahih mah bangin sepna tawh a kizom lo upna zong a si ahi hi." 
James3:1 Sanggamte aw, mite tungah thu a hilh eite pen midangte sangin a khauh zaw-in thu hong kikhen ding ahih manin note tampi sia na suak nuam se kei un." 
James3:2 Eite khempeuh a khial thei zelzelte vive ihi hi. Kampauna ah a khial ngei lo mi a om leh a cingtaak mahmah hi a, a pumpi zong a uk zo mi ahi hi." 
James3:3 Sakol in i thu hong man theih nadingin kamkaih i bulh a, a sakol pumpi buppi i uk zo hi." 
James3:4 Teembawte ngaihsun dih un. Teembaw lian mahmah a, huihpi in nakpi takin a mut hangin a hawl paʼ deihna bangin a heina neu khat tawh ki-uk zo hi." 
James3:5 Tua mah bangin leii zong i pumpi na sung panin a neu mahmah khat hi napi-in thusia lian pipi piangsak zo hi. Gam khempeuh zong mei-ek neuno khat pan kipanin a kaang tum thei hi. 
James3:6 Leii pen mei tawh kibang hi. I pumpi na sung panin a neuno khat hi napi-in i pumpi buppi a sia suah thei a, hell khuk sung panin a hong piang mei tawh i nuntakna buppi hong kaang tumsak thei hi." 
James3:7 Mihingte in gamsa, vasa, a bokvak ganhing le tui sunga om ngasate a kipan ganhing khempeuh zualsakin uk zo uh hi." 
James3:8 Ahi zongin siattheih nading gukhal tawh a kidim, a omkhong thei lo leii pen zualsakin a uk zo kuamah om lo hi." 
James3:9 I leii tawh eiteʼ pa ahi Topa i phat thei a, Pasian tawh a kisunin a kibawl i mipihte zong tua i leii mah tawh i samsia thei hi." 
James3:10 Kam khat sung panin thupha le thusia pusuak khawm hi. Sanggamte aw, hih bang ahi ding hi het lo hi." 
James3:11 Tuinak khat panin tui lim le tui lim lo hong luang khia khawm thei ahi hiam? 
James3:12 Sanggamte aw, theikung in oliv hong gah thei a, leenggui in thei pum hong gah thei ahi hiam? Tui-al in tuilim piangsak ngei lo hi." 
James3:13 Note lakah pilin thu thei a kisa a om leh kiniamkhiatin pilin, nuntak hoih le gamtat hoih tawh a lahkhiat ding ahi hi." 
James3:14 Ahi zongin na lungsim uh ah enna, gitlohna le huaihamna a om leh a zuaugen na hi uh a, pil ing, ci-in kisialh nading bangmah om lo hi." 
James3:15 Tua bang pilnate vantung panin a hong pai hi lo a, leitung pilna, kha thu tawh a kisai lo, a dawivai ahi hi." 
James3:16 Enna le huaihamna a om nakleh buaina le siatna nam khempeuh tawh kizom pahpah hi. 
James3:17 Ahi zongin tung lam panin a kingah pilna a siangtho ahi hi. Mi tawh kilem thei-in dik a, mi tawh kikhawl thei a, hehpihna lungsim nei-in gamtat hoih a, mi lang-et lo a, kineihkhem cihte om lo hi." 
James3:18 Kilemna a piangsak mite in lungnuam takin a tuh khaici in hoihna le dikna a piangsak hi. 
James4:1 Note lakah a om kitotna le kilaiina koi panin hong piang ahi hiam? Deih luatna lungsim na neih manun noteʼ pumsung a kitoktok niloh ahi hi. 
James4:2 Na na deih uh a, ahi zongin nei lo na hih manun mi na that nuam uh hi. Nate deihna lungsim na nei uh a, ahi zongin ngah zo lo na hih manun kitawngin na kilaii lawh uh hi. Pasian kiangah na deih uh ngen lo na hih manun a ngah lo na hi uh hi." 
James4:3 Pasian kiangah na nget sun uh ciangin zong noteʼ nopsak nading bek ngenin, na ngaihsutna uh man lo ahih manin a ngah lo na hi uh hi." 
James4:4 A citak lo mite aw, leitung tawh kipawlna pen Pasian tawh kigal neihna ahih lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam? Leitung tawh a kipawl mite pen Pasian tawh a kigal neih dingin a kibawlbawl ahi uh hi." 
James4:5 Lai Siangtho sungah, “Eite sungah a hong guat kha pen Pasian in ngai mahmah hi,” ci-in a kigelhna a mawkna-in a kigelh sa na hi uh hiam?" 
James4:6 Lai Siangtho in, “Pasian in a kihisakte nial a, a kiniamkhiatte a hehpih hi,” a cih mah bangin Pasianʼ hong hehpihna lian zaw hi." 
James4:7 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ thu na mang un. Dawimangpa na nial un. Nial le-uhcin no kiang panin tai khia ding hi. 
James4:8 Pasian kiang nai un. Amah in zong hong nai ding hi. Mawhneite in na khut uh sil siang unla, a kineihkhemte in na lungsim uh siangsak un." 
James4:9 Dahin, thumin, kap un. Na nuihnate uh kahna suaksak zaw unla, na lungdamnate uh maigumna suaksak zaw un." 
James4:10 Topa mai ah kiniamkhiat un. Tua hileh amah in hong lian bawl ding hi. 
James4:11 Sanggamte aw, khatlekhat kigensia kei un. A mipihte gensia-in thu a khente in Thukham gensia-in thu a khen ahi hi. Thukham na gensiat uh leh Thukham a zui hi loin thu a khen na hi uh hi." 
James4:12 Thukham a pia pa le thu a khen pa pen Pasian bek hi a, amah bek in hong hon khia zo a, hong susia zo hi. Tua ahih manin bang hangin na mipihte uh gensia-in thu a khen thei dingin kingaihsun zenzen na hi uh hiam?" 
James4:13 Tu ni ahih kei leh zing ciangin tua khua tua khua ah va pai-in, kum khat bang va omin, sum bawlin a meet tampi va ngah ni, a ci mite aw, ka thugen hong ngai dih un." 
James4:14 Zing ciangin na nuntakna uh bangci ding cih nangawn na thei kei uh hi. Meiilum tawl khat sung kaii-in a mangthang pak tawh a kibang lel na hi uh hi. 
James4:15 Note in, “Topa in hong thukimpih nakleh nungta-in tua bang tua bang i sem ding hi,” na cih ding uh hi bek hi." 
James4:16 Ahi zongin note kihisakin na kisial uh hi. Tua bangte hoih het lo hi. 
James4:17 A hoih a manin gamtat ding thei napi-in a gamta lote a mawh ahi hi. 
James5:1 A haute aw, tu-in ka thugen hong ngai dih un. Note tungah a hong tung ding lungkhamna hangin kapin thum un." 
James5:2 Na neihsate uh muat tum ta a, na puante uh nget in ne tum khinta hi." 
James5:3 Na ngun le na khamte uh kekseu khinta hi. Hih kekseuna pen note langah teci suak a, mei in a kattum bangin na sa uh hong ne tum ding hi. Hih a hun nunung ciangin tu-a bangin a piang dingin neihsa a khol na hi uh hi." 
James5:4 Na lo uh a hong khawhsakte a thaman pia lo na hih manun tu-in amauteʼ phunna za un. An la dingin na sawl uh miteʼ phunna Vanglian Topa in za khinta hi. 
James5:5 Hih leitung na nuntak sungun uang nekin na nop tat mahmah uh hi. Note hong kigawh hun ding kiginna-in a kithausak phitphet na hi uh hi. 
James5:6 A thuman mite mawhsakin na that uh a, amaute in na thu uh hong nial zo lo uh hi." 
James5:7 Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Topa hong pai matengin lungduai takin om un. Lokhote in zong a lo panun an a ngah theih nadingun lungduai takin khuapi guah le tuk guah a ngakna thu thei un." 
James5:8 Note zong na lungduai un. Topa hong pai ding hun nai ta ahih manin na lungsim uh na thahatsak un. 
James5:9 Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note tungah thu hong khen khak loh nadingin khatlekhat na kiphunsan kei un. Thukhen ding pa hong nai mahmah ta a, hong tung dektak ta hi." 
James5:10 Sanggamte aw, Topaʼ min tawh thu a gen kamsangte na phawk un. Gimna a thuak laitakun lungduai-in a thuaknate uh na etteh un." 
James5:11 Tua bangin a thuak mite a hampha mahmah hi, i ci hi. Job in a thuakna ah a lungduaina na thei uh a, Topa in dikna le hehpihna nei ahih manin a tawpna ah Job tungah a piak thuphate na thei uh hi." 
James5:12 Hih thute khempeuh banah, sanggamte aw, thu khat peuhpeuh na gen uh ciangin kiciam se kei un. Vantung ahi a, na khat peuhpeuh tawh ahi zongin kiciam kei un. Pasianʼ thukhenna na thuakkhak loh nadingun ahite, “Hi,” ci lel unla, ahi lote, “Hi lo,” na ci lel un." 
James5:13 Lungkhamna a thuak na om uh leh thu na ngen un. A lungdam na om uh leh phatna la na sa un. 
James5:14 A cina na om uh leh pawlpi upate sam un. Amaute in thu hong ngetsakin Topa min tawh sathau hong zut ding uh hi. 
James5:15 Upna tawh thu a kinget ciangin Topa in cinate noptuamsakin, damsak dinga, mawhna nei ahihleh zong a mawhna maisak ding hi." 
James5:16 Tua ahih manin na ci uh a dam nadingin khatlekhat tungah na mawhna uh kipulakin thu na kingetsak ta un. Mihoihteʼ thungetna in vang nei a, na lianpi sem zo hi." 
James5:17 Elijah zong eite mah bangin mi mawkmawk hi napi-in, guah a zuk loh nadingin lungsim takpi tawh thu a nget ciangin kum thum le kum lang sung tua gam sungah guah zu lo hi." 
James5:18 Tua ciangin guah a zuk nadingin thu ngenkik leuleu a, van panin guah hong zu-in, leitungah nek theih ding gah le teh hong piangkik hi." 
James5:19 Sanggamte aw, note khatpeuh thuman lampi panin pial kha-in, a dang khatpeuh in thuman lampi ah a tunpihkik theih leh," 
James5:20 tua bangin a khial mite lam man ah a tunpihkik mipa in a khial mite a sih nading panin hon khia-in, mawhna tampi a mai nadingin na a sem pa ahihna thu na phawk un." 
1Peter1:1 Jesu Khris sawltak keimah Peter in Pontas gam, Galatia gam, Kappadosia gam, Asia gam le Bithynia gamah kithehthangin peemta-in a om mite kiangah lai ka hong khak hi." 
1Peter1:2 Pa Pasian in ama ngimna sa bangin note hong teel a, note in Jesu Khrisʼ thu mangin, ama sisan tawh sianthona a ngah dingin a Kha Siangtho tawh note mi siangtho-in a hong bawl hi. Note tungah hehpihna le nopsakna thupha hong tam tun semsem tahen." 
1Peter1:3 I Topa Jesu Khrisʼ Pa Pasian tungah lungdam ni. Ama hong hehpih mahmahna hangin sihna panin Jesu Khris a thawhkiksakna tawh eite tungah nuntakna thak a hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin i lametna kiam ngei lo a," 
1Peter1:4 Pasian in ama mite adingin a koih thuphate i ngah nadingin lamenin i om hi. Tua thuphate sia ngei lo, nin ngei lo, mual ngei loin a om tawntungna vantungah note adingin a hong koihsak hi." 
1Peter1:5 Noteʼ upna hangin nitawp ni ciangin na ngah ding uh hotkhiatna nomau-aʼ ahihna a kilatsak nadingin Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh a hong kepsak ahi hi. 
1Peter1:6 Tua ahih manin tu laitakin miteʼ bawlsiatna a tuamtuam na thuak manun tawl khat na lungkham uh ahi zongin hih bang thuakna hangin lungdam zaw un. 
1Peter1:7 Hih bang thuaknate in a um takpi mah na hihna uh hong kilangsak hi. A sia thei khamte nangawn, a hoih taktak mah ahi hiam, ci-in mite in mei tawh sin uh ahih manin, kham sangin a manpha zaw noteʼ upna zong a kiptak mah ahi hiam, ci-in Pasian in hong sin ding mah ahi hi. Tua bangin na thuak zawh uh leh Khris hong kilat Ni ciangin phatna, minthanna le pahtawina na ngah ding uh hi." 
1Peter1:8 Amah mu ngei lo napi-in na it uh a, amah mu ngei lo napi-in a thu umin kam a gen zawh loh zah dongin nakpi takin na lungdam uh hi." 
1Peter1:9 Tua bangin na upna uh hangin kha thu ah hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. 
1Peter1:10 Kamsangte in hih hotkhiatna thu mah kanin ngaihsut belin nei uh a, Pasian in note tungah a hong piak ding thupha mah, kamsangte in gen belin a neih uh ahi hi." 
1Peter1:11 Khris in gimna thuakin, tua khit ciangin minthanna a ngah nading thu Kha Siangtho in a gen ciangin, amaute sungah a om tua Khrisʼ Kha Siangtho in kua a cihna hi a, bang hun ciang hi ding hiam, ci-in a kankan uh pen tu hun thu a gen ahi hi." 
1Peter1:12 Vantung panin a hong kisawl Kha Siangthoʼ vangliatna tawh thu a gen thupuakteʼ tung panin na zak uh Thute mah kamsangte in a gen laitakun, tua a thugente uh amaute ading hi loin note ading ahihna thu, Pasian in tua kamsangte tungah a na gen zo hi. Vantung mite nangawn in hih thute a theih tel nop khat uh ahi hi." 
1Peter1:13 Tua ahih manin na lungsim uh ki-ukin a kiging sa-in om unla, Jesu Khris hong kilat ni ciangin na ngah ding uh hehpihna thupha ngaihsutin nei un." 
1Peter1:14 Pasianʼ thu na mang unla, na theih nai loh uh hun lai-in na gamtat ngei uh bangin na gamta nawn kei un." 
1Peter1:15 Note a hong sam pa a siangtho ahih mah bangin note zong na gamtatna khempeuh uh ah na siangtho un. 
1Peter1:16 Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Keimah siangtho ka hih manin note zong na siangtho un,” na kici hi." 
1Peter1:17 Mi khempeuh amau gamtatna tawh kizui-in a kibang kimin thu a khen Pasian kiangah thu na nget uh ciangin, “Pa aw,” ci na hih manun hih leitungah na om lai teng uh amah zahtakin om un." 
1Peter1:18 Na pu na pate uh nuntak zia, bangmahin a kimang lo nuntakna panin a hong suahtaksak nadingin Pasian in noteʼ man dingin a piak pen a man a kiam thei ngun le khamte bang hi lo a," 
1Peter1:19 tuuno bangin paubaanna a om lo, a manpha mahmah Khris, biakna-in a hong kipiakna tawh Pasian in note a hong suaktasak ahi hi." 
1Peter1:20 Pasian in hih bang dingin leitung pianmapekin Khris a teel sa hi a, note a hong khualna-in tu hun nunung ciangin Pasian in note kiangah amah a hong lak khia pan ahi hi." 
1Peter1:21 Sihna panin amah hingkiksakin minthanna a pia Pasian, ama hangin muang thei na hih uh manin, na up na muan na lamet uh Pasian ahi hi." 
1Peter1:22 Tu-in lungdamna thuman na zuihna hangun note kisiansuah khinin, na thu up pih mite uh lungsim tak tawh it thei khinta na hih manun na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh limtakin na ki-it un." 
1Peter1:23 A si thei nu le pate sung pan hi loin a si thei lo nu le pate sung panin a nungta tawntung Pasianʼ thu tawh naungek bangin a suakkik na hi uh hi. 
1Peter1:24 Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Mihingte, lopa tawh kibang a, a minthannate uh lopa pak tawh kibang hi. Lopate vulin paakte pulh a," 
1Peter1:25 ahi zongin Topaʼ thu kip tawntung hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi. Note kiangah a hong kihilh Lungdamna Thu pen tua Topaʼ thu ahi hi." 
1Peter2:1 Tua ahih manin gitlohna, zuauna, kineihkhemna, huaihamna le kigensiatnate na omsak nawn kei un." 
1Peter2:2 Naungek suakcilte na bang unla, note khang to-in hotkhiatna na ngah theih nadingun kha thu tawh kisai nawizu siangtho duh belin na nei tawntung un." 
1Peter2:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in Topaʼ hoihna thu na thei khinzo uh hi. 
1Peter2:4 Mite in bangmahin kimang lo hi, ci-in a nilkhiat hangin Pasian in a manpha hi, ci-in a teel, nuntakna a pia thei suangpi ahi Topa kiangah na pai un." 
1Peter2:5 Note zong nuntakna a pia thei suangpi mah bangin kha thu tawh kisai biakinn lam nadingin na kizang unla, Jesu Khris hangin Pasianʼ san theih biaknate a pia dingin a siangtho siampi na suak un." 
1Peter2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho sungah, “A manpha suang khat ka teel khia a, innkiu suang dingin Zion ah ka koih hi. Amah a umte, zahhuai ngei lo ding hi,” ci-in na kigen hi." 
1Peter2:7 Tua ahih manin no a um mite adingin amah pen a manpha suang hi a, ahi zongin amah a um lote adingin, “Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang, innkiu suang bulpi a suak khinta hi,”" 
1Peter2:8 a cihna leh, “Hih suang pen miteʼ hoina suak dinga, hih suangpi pen a pukna uh suak ding hi,” a cihna bang hi ding hi. Amaute in lungdamna thu um lo uh ahih manin a puk uh ahi hi. Pasian in a tua ci ding mahin a deih ahi hi."
