1Peter2:9 Ahi zongin note pen Pasian in a hong teelkhiat minam, Kumpi siampi pawl, a siangtho minam, Pasianʼ mite na hi uh a, khuamial sung panin a lamdang mahmah ama khuavak sungah a hong sam khia paʼ nasepna a lamdangte a gen khia dingin Pasian in a hong teel mite na hi uh hi." 
1Peter2:10 Nidangin Pasianʼ mi na hih loh uh hangin tu-in ama mi na hi uh a, nidangin Pasianʼ hehpihna na theih loh uh hangin tu-in ama hehpihna na ngah uh hi." 
1Peter2:11 Ka itte aw, hih leitungah gamdang mi, a peem pak bangin kingaihsun unla, na kha nuntakna uh tawh a kilehngat pumpiʼ deihnate na kikham un." 
1Peter2:12 Gentail mite in note mihoih lo hi, ci-in hong gensia nuamin mawhna hong zon ciangin, noteʼ hoihna bekbek mu-in, Pasian a hong pai Ni ciangin a phat theih nadingun amaute lakah na gamtatna uh hoihsak tawntung un." 
1Peter2:13 Topaʼ hangin leitung ukna aana neiteʼ thu na mang un. Kumpipaʼ thu ahi a," 
1Peter2:14 a gamtat siate gim pia-in, a gamtat hoihte a pahtawi dingin kumpipa in a sawl thuneite khempeuhʼ thu ahi zongin na mang un." 
1Peter2:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu thei loin a mot paupau mihaite, na gamtat hoihna un a daihsak ding, Pasianʼ deihna ahi hi." 
1Peter2:16 Sila ahi lo mi bangin gamta unla, ahi zongin gitloh gamtat nadingin na suahtakna uh zang loin Pasianʼ sila bangin na gamta zaw un." 
1Peter2:17 Mi khempeuh zahtak bawlin thu up pih mite na it unla, Pasian zahtak bawlin kumpipa zong na zahtak un." 
1Peter2:18 Nasemte aw, na tote uh thu na mang un. A thudik a migi na tote bek uh a zahtak hi loin a gilo na tote uh thu zong na mang un." 
1Peter2:19 Pasianʼ thu na ngaihsutna uh tawh a kilawm lopi mahin gimna na thuak uh leh na thuakna uh hangin Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. 
1Peter2:20 Note na gamtat khialhna uh hangin hong kisat ciangin lungduai takin na thuak manun bangmah phattuamna om lo hi. Ahi zongin a manin gamta napi-in gimna na thuak uh ciangin lungduai takin na thuak uh leh Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. 
1Peter2:21 Khris mahmah in zong note adingin thuakin, ama khekhap na zuih theih nadingun etteh ding lim hong nusiat ahih manin hih bangin a thuak ding mahin Pasian in note a hong sam ahi hi." 
1Peter2:22 Khialhna bangmah gamta lo a, zuau a gen lam zong kiza ngei lo hi." 
1Peter2:23 Amah a kizahko ciangin na ko thuk lo hi. Gimna a thuak ciangin na tawng gawp lo a, a manin thu a khen Pasian muanin a na nei hi." 
1Peter2:24 Eite, mawhna lamah misi bangin, thuman lamah nungta-in i gamtat theih nadingin Khris mahmah in eiteʼ mawhna ama pumpi mahmah tawh singlamteh tungah a pua hi. B" 
1Peter2:25 Note, tuu bangin a gammang na hi uh a, ahi zongin noteʼ kha nuntakna hong Cingin hong Kem pa a zui dingin a hong kiciahpihkik khin na hi uh hi." 
1Peter3:1 Tua mah bangin zite aw, na pasalte uh Pasian thu um lo ahih khak leh na gamtatna hangun Pasian thu a up theih nadingun na pasalte uh thu na mang un. Kampau kul sese loin," 
1Peter3:2 na gamtat hoihna uh a muh uh ciangin Pasian thu hong um ding uh hi. 
1Peter3:3 Na hoih nadingun puatham kizepna ahi sambawlna, kham le suangmanpha tawh kizepna, puan hoih nono silhnate na bulphuh kei unla," 
1Peter3:4 Pasianʼ muhna ah a manpha mahmah ahi lungsim puak zia, a tul thei lo sung lam hoihna na bulphuh zaw un." 
1Peter3:5 A beisa hunah Pasian muangin thu um numeite in a pasalte uh thu mangin, tu-a bang danin a hoih nadingun a kibawl uh hi." 
1Peter3:6 Sarah zong tu-a bangmahin gamta a, a pasal Abrahamʼ thu mangin, “Topa aw,” a ci hi. Note zong a hoihin gamta-in, bangmah launa nei loin na om nak uh leh tu-in Sarahʼ tanute na hi ta uh hi." 
1Peter3:7 Tua mah bangin pasalte aw, note sangin na zite uh a thahat lo zaw deuh ahihna thu na phawk un. Note mah bangin Pasianʼ piak nuntakna a ngahte ahih uh manin na zite uh zahtak bawl un. Tua hileh na thungetna uh bangmah in hong nawngkaisak lo ding hi." 
1Peter3:8 A tawpna ah kong gen nop thu in: Lungsim le ngaihsutna kikhat nei-in unau ki-itna lungsim nei unla, migi-in kiniamkhiat un." 
1Peter3:9 Hong bawlsiate siatna tawh thukkik loin hong samsia mite samsiakik kei unla, Pasian in note a hong sap lai-in thupha a hong piak dingin hong ciam sa ahih manin, hong siat bawlte thupha tawh na thuk zaw un." 
1Peter3:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Nuntak nuam deihin, hunhoih a zang nuamte in kamsia pau kei uh henla, zuau thu gen kei ta uh hen." 
1Peter3:11 Gitlohna pelhin hoih gamtat uh henla, mi tawh kilem ding hanciamin kilem theih nadingin hahkat ta uh hen." 
1Peter3:12 Topa in a thuman mite mu a, amauteʼ thungetna pia tawntung hi. Ahi zongin a gamtat sia mite Topa in a langbawl hi,” na ci hi." 
1Peter3:13 Note in a hoih gamtat ding utin hanciam le-uhcin kua in hong bawlsia ding ahi hiam? 
1Peter3:14 A hoihin na gamtat manun gimna na thuak uh leh zong Pasian in thupha hong pia ding hi. Mite kihta kei unla, lunghihmawh ngaihsut kei un." 
1Peter3:15 Na lungsim sung uh ah Khris zahtak bawl unla, amah Topa-in nei un. Noteʼ lametna thu a hong dong a om khak leh hoihtakin a gen thei dingin kiging tawntung unla, ahi zongin lungnemna le zahtakna lim tawh gen un." 
1Peter3:16 Khris nungzui na hihna hangun na gamtat hoihna uh hong gensia-in hong simmawh bawl a om ciangin a maizum theih nadingun na lungsim uh ah kisuanna a om het lo dingin na siangtho om un. 
1Peter3:17 Gamtat sia-in i om sangin Pasianʼ deihna ahih nakleh i gamtat hoihna hangin gimna i thuak hoih zaw hi. 
1Peter3:18 Khris mahmah zong note adingin si a, Pasianʼ kiangah hong tunpih theih nadingin mihoih khat pen mihoih loteʼ mawhna hangin khatvei a si hi. Mite in ama leitung pumpi that a, ahi zongin Pasian in kha nuntakna a pia hi." 
1Peter3:19 Tua kha nuntakna tawh va pai-in thongkia-in a om khate kiangah thu a va hilh hi. 
1Peter3:20 Noah in teembaw a bawl hun laitakin Pasian in lungduai takin ngak hi napi-in hih kha a nei mite pawl khat in Pasianʼ thu mang lo uh hi. Teembaw sungah a om mi giat bek, tui in a suaktasak hi." 
1Peter3:21 Tui pen note a hong hon khia tuiphumna lim hi a, pumpi panin nin sawp khiatna lim hi loin, Jesu Khris thawhkikna hangin lungsim siantho nadingin Pasianʼ tungah kamciamna lim ahi hi. Tua Jesu thawhkikna in note hong hon khia ahi hi." 
1Peter3:22 Tu-in vantungah tua Khris pai khin a, Pasianʼ tak lamah omin, vantung mite le ukna aana a neite khempeuh tungah a ukin a om hi." 
1Peter4:1 Khris in ama pumpi-in thuak ahih manin note in zong tua bang lungsim mah nei-in na kithakhauhsak ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi-in a thuak mite peuhmah, mawhna tawh kisawh kha nawn lo uh hi." 
1Peter4:2 Tua ahih manin tu a kipanin na leitung nuntak sung uh mihingteʼ deihna bangin gamta loin Pasianʼ deihna bangin na gamtat ding uh ahi hi. 
1Peter4:3 A beisa hunah dawi biateʼ gamtat bangin a hoih khop khat na gamta khinta uh a, a kilawm loin gamtatna, hukna lanna, zunekna, uangtatna, zukham luatna le a muhdahhuai milim biakna-in na hun uh na beisak uh hi." 
1Peter4:4 Tu-in note in dawi biate pawlpih nawn loin ututin na pheng tat loh uh ciangin lamdang sa-in note hong ko sia uh hi. 
1Peter4:5 Ahi zongin amaute in a site le a hingteʼ thu a khen dingin a om Pasianʼ mai ah thudotna thuak ding uh hi. 
1Peter4:6 Tua thu hang mahin, midang khempeuh thu a khen mah bangin a leitung nuntakna uh ah Pasian in thu a khen khit tei hangin kha nuntakna ah Pasian mah bangin a nuntak theih nadingun mi si sate kiangah Khris in Lungdamna Thu a hilh ahi hi." 
1Peter4:7 Na khempeuh a bei nading hun hong nai ta hi. Nomau pumpi ki-uk tawm thei-in pilvang unla, hoihtakin thu a ngen thei-in om ta un." 
1Peter4:8 Itna in mawhna tampi khuhcip thei ahih manin lungsim takpi tawh khatlekhat ki-it ding thupi ngaihsut pha pen un. 
1Peter4:9 Khatlekhat maitai takin zinleleeng na kido un. 
1Peter4:10 Pasianʼ piak na a zatsiamte bangin Pasianʼ kiang panin na ngah uh nate, midangteʼ phattuam nadingin na zang un." 
1Peter4:11 Minthanna le vangliatna a nei tawntung Pasian in Jesu Khris hangin thu khempeuh ah phatna a ngah theih nadingin thuhilhte in Pasianʼ thu na hilh unla, na a semte in Pasianʼ piak thahatna tawh na sem un. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Ka itte aw, noteʼ upna hong kize-etna-in gimna haksate na thuak manun a thu lamdangpi-in ngaihsun kei unla, na lungkham ngaihsut kei un." 
1Peter4:13 Tua bangin Khris tawh thuak khawm le-uhcin ama minthanna hong kilat ciangin note lungdam mahmah ding na hih manun, tua banga na thuakna uh ah na lungdam zaw un." 
1Peter4:14 Khris nungzui hihna hangin miteʼ kosiatna na thuak uh leh note sungah a minthang Kha Siangtho ahi Pasianʼ Kha Siangtho hong om ahihna lim ahih manin a hampha mahmah na hi uh hi. 
1Peter4:15 Ahi zongin mi thahna, guktaakna, gamtat khialhna le thusia bawlna hangin gimna a thuakte na hi kha kei un." 
1Peter4:16 Ahi zongin Khristian hihna hangin gimna na thuak uh leh kuamah in maizum ngaihsut kei unla, Khris min hangin na thuak manun Pasian tungah na lungdam un." 
1Peter4:17 Tu-in thukhen kipat hun ding hong tung ta-in Pasianʼ mi eite tungah hong kipan ahihleh Pasian kiang panin hong pai Lungdamna Thu a um lo mite adingin bangzahin lungkham huai ding ahi hiam? 
1Peter4:18 Lai Siangtho in, “Mihoihte kihon khia zo liailiai bek ahihleh Pasian a um lo mawhnei mite bang suak ding ahi hiam?” na ci hi." 
1Peter4:19 Tua ahih ciangin Pasianʼ deihna bangin gimna a thuak mite gamtat hoihin, a kamciam a tangtungsak tawntung hong Piangsak pa muangin ama khut sungah a ki-ap ding uh ahi hi." 
1Peter5:1 Keima pumpi mahmah zong pawlpi upa hi-in, Khris thuakna zong ka mit tawh mu-in, mailam hunah a hong kilang ding minthanna zong a ngah ding pa ka hihna tawh note lakah a om pawlpi upate kiangah ka hong thum nop thu in:" 
1Peter5:2 Pasian in noteʼ khut sungah a hong piak tuuhonte hoihtakin na cing unla, ut lo pipi hi loin, Pasianʼ hong deih bangin utna lungsim takpi tawh na cing un. Sum ngah nopna bek tawh a sem hi loin utna lungsim tawh a semte na hi un." 
1Peter5:3 Noteʼ kep dingin a hong kipia tuute, aana neihna tawh a cing hi loin tuuteʼ etteh dingin a gamtate na hi un." 
1Peter5:4 Tuucing pipa hong pai ciangin a mual ngei lo minthanna lukhu a hong pia ding hi. 
1Peter5:5 Tua mah bangin no khangno zaw deuhte in zong a khanghamteʼ thu na mang un. Lai Siangtho in, “Pasian in a kiphasak mite nial a, a kiniamkhiat mite a hehpih hi,” a cih mah bangin na vekpi-un kiniamkhiatna puan bangin silhin, khatlekhat na na kisepsak un." 
1Peter5:6 Pasian in ama hoihsak hun ciangin note hong lap toh theih nadingin a thahat Pasianʼ khutnuai ah kiniamkhiatin na om un. 
1Peter5:7 Pasian in note hong kem ahih manin na lungkhamnate khempeuh uh ama kiang tunpih un. 
1Peter5:8 Note pilvangin khua phawk un. Na gal uh ahi Dawimangpa, humpinelkai bangin a nek theih ding zongin vak kawikawi hi." 
1Peter5:9 Leitungah thu um dang khempeuh in zong noteʼ thuak mah bangin a thuak ahihna thu thei unla, na upna uh ah kipin Dawimangpa na nial un." 
1Peter5:10 Tawl khat na thuak khit uh ciangin, Khris tawh na kipawlna hangun tawntung minthanna a ngah dingin note a hong sam, hehpihna kicingin a nei Pasian in note a cingtaakin hong bawl dinga, kipna, thahatna, bulkip kician hong pia ding hi." 
1Peter5:11 Tua Pasian in a tawntungin ukna vangliatna nei paisuak tahen. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Thu upna sungah mi citakin ka ngaihsut Silasʼ huhna tawh hih lai tomno gelhin amah ka hong puasak hi. Hih thute pen Pasianʼ hong hehpihna taktak hi, ci-in teci pangin note ka hong hanthawn hi. Tua ahih manin hih thute ah kipin om un." 
1Peter5:13 Note mah bangin Pasian in a teel, Babylon khua-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh a, ka tapa Marka in zong note hopihna kam mah hong khak hi." 
1Peter5:13 Note mah bangin Pasian in a teel, Babylon khua-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh a, ka tapa Marka in zong note hopihna kam mah hong khak hi." 
1Peter5:14 Khristian ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khris thu um note khempeuh tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. 
2Peter1:1 Jesu Khris nasem le sawltak ahi keimah Simon Peter in: Eiteʼ Pasian le Honpa ahi Jesu Khris a thumanna hangin koteʼ upna zah mahin upna manpha a nei mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
2Peter1:2 Pasian le i Topa Jesu na theihna uh hangin hehpihna le nopsakna thupha note tungah tampi tak hong tung tahen. 
2Peter1:3 Ama minthanna le a hoihnate a neikhawm dingin a hong sam pa i theihna hangin Pasianʼ deih bangin biakna mantak i nuntak theih nadingin ama vangliatna in eiteʼ kisap na khempeuh a hong pia hi. 
2Peter1:4 Amah in piak dingin a hong ciam a manpha mahmah nate hih bangzia-in hong pia a, hih ama hong piak nate hangin leitungah a om siatna a piangsak thei duh luatna le deih luatnate panin na suakta uh a, Pasianʼ pian ziate na nei uh hi." 
2Peter1:5 Hih thu hangin na upna ban uh ah gamtat hoihna na behlap unla, na gamtat hoihna uh thutheihna tawh na behlap un;" 
2Peter1:6 na thutheihna uh pumpi ki-uk zawhna tawh na behlap unla, na pumpi ki-uk zawhna uh thuak zawhna tawh na behlap un; na thuak zawhna uh Pasianʼ deih bangin gamtatna tawh na behlap unla," 
2Peter1:7 Pasianʼ deih bangin na gamtatna uh sanggam ki-itna tawh na behlap un; na sanggam ki-itna uh itna thukpi tawh na behlap zawh nadingun na hanciam un. 
2Peter1:8 Hih bang hoihnate a kicingin na neih uh leh i Topa Jesu Khris na theihna uh ah thahatin kimanna na nei ding uh hi. 
2Peter1:9 Ahi zongin hih bang hoihna a nei lo mite pen mittaw-in a gamla a mu thei lo mite hi a, a mawhna lui uh panin a siang khin ahih lam uh zong a mangngilh ta ahi uh hi." 
2Peter1:10 Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, Pasian in note hong sapna le hong teelna ah a kip taktak na hih nadingun hahkat mahmah un. Tua bangin hahkat le-uhcin na puk ngei kei ding uh hi." 
2Peter1:11 Tua hileh eiteʼ Topa le Honpa Jesu Khris Uk tawntungna sungah nuam takin na lut thei ding uh hi. 
2Peter1:12 Tua ahih manin note in hih thute thei khinin, na theih sa uh thuman ah kip takin na om khin uh ahi zongin a hong phawksak kikkik ka hi hi." 
2Peter1:13 Ka nuntak lai teng hih thute ka hong phawksak kikkik ding thuhoih khat hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
2Peter1:14 I Topa Jesu Khris in teltakin hong gen khin ahih manin hih leitung pumpi ka nusiat baih nading thu ka thei hi. 
2Peter1:15 Tua ahih manin ka sih khit ciangin hih thute na phawk kikkik theih nadingun ka hih theih zahin ka hanciam ding hi. 
2Peter1:16 I Topa Jesu Khris a vangliatna le a hong paikik nading thute note kiangah kong gen uh ciangin mihingteʼ phuahtawm tuanthute siksanin a hong gen hi loin, ka mit mahmah uh tawh ka muh uh a vangliatnate a hong gen ka hi uh hi." 
2Peter1:17 Vanglian Minthang pa in, “Hih pen ka it ka Tapa hi a, ama tungah ka lung a kim mahmah hi,” ci-in genin, Pa Pasian in ama tungah minthanna vang le pahtawina a piak laitakin komau pumpi mahmah tawh a om ka hi uh hi." 
2Peter1:18 Mual siangtho tungah amah tawh ka om khawm laitakun vantung panin hong ging awte komau mahmah in ka za uh hi. 
2Peter1:19 Tua ahih manin kamsangteʼ gen thute a man taktak ahihna thu ka tel theih uh hi. Noteʼ lungsimah Zingsol hong suakin khua a hong vak matengin khuamial lak a mei taang bangin hih thute ngaihsun le-uhcin hoih mahmah ding hi. 
2Peter1:20 Na phawk ding uh a thupi mahmah khat in: Lai Siangtho sunga om thugen kholhnate, kuamah in ama pilna tawh a khiatna gen thei lo hi." 
2Peter1:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte in a deih manin mailam thugen kholh theihna a kingah hi lo a, Kha Siangthoʼ sawlna tawh Pasianʼ kiang panin a hong pai thute a kigen ahi zaw hi." 
2Peter2:1 Mite lakah kamsang man lo a omngei mah bangin note lakah sia man lo hong om ding hi. Siatna a piangsak thei thuhilhna a man lo hong lutpih simin, amaute mahmah a tan khia Topa nangawn nial ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin thakhat thu-in siatna thuak lawh ding uh hi." 
2Peter2:2 Tua bang hi napi-in mi tampi tak in amauʼ gamtat hoih lohna zui ding uh a, tua bangin amau gamtatna hangin mite in thuman lampi gensia ding uh hi." 
2Peter2:3 Hih sia man lote in a huaiham manun note kiang panin sum a ngah theih nadingun phuahtawm thu hong gen ding uh hi. Ahi zongin sawt pek a kipanin amauteʼ thu a Khen ding pa a kiging sa-in om niloh a, amaute a Susia ding pa in en gige hi." 
2Peter2:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung mite nangawn in khialhna a neih ciangin Pasian in khah khong loin hell khuk sungah khia a, Thukhen Ni hun dong ngakin khuamial sungah kol bulh sa-in a omsak hi." 
2Peter2:5 Pasian in tanglai mite khah khong loin amah a um lo mite, tuiciin tumsak a, thuman thutak a hilh Noah le a dang mi sagih bek suaktasak hi." 
2Peter2:6 Pasian in Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite tungah thu khenin mei tawh hal tum a, Pasian a um lo miteʼ thuak nading limin a bawl hi." 
2Peter2:7 Ngeina bangin a gamta lo mite in Lot a lungkhamsakna panun Pasian in mihoih Lot a hon khia hi. 
2Peter2:8 Tua mihoih pa, amaute lakah teeng a, nisimin amauteʼ gamtat hoih lohnate za-in mu tawntung ahih manin lunggim mahmah hi." 
2Peter2:9 Tua ahih manin Topa in tua bang mihoihte a gimna uh panin suaktasakin, tua bang migilote Thukhen Ni hun dongin gimna pia-in a koihcip theih nading siamna a nei hi." 
2Peter2:10 Pasianʼ thu nialin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mite gim pia phadiak hi. Hih sia man lote kiphasakin hangsan mahmah uh a, minthanna a nei vantung a omte zahtak het loin gensia ngam uh hi." 
2Peter2:11 Hih sia man lote sangin hat zaw-in a vanglian zaw vantung mite nangawn in Topaʼ mai ah minthanna a nei vantung mite gensia ngam lo, mawhsak ngam lo uh hi." 
2Peter2:12 Ahi zongin mat ding le thah dingin a piang gamlak ganhing gilote bangin a pianpih lungsim uh zui-in gamta uh a, a theih loh uh thute a gen sia uh hi. Tua ganhingte mah bangin amaute kisusia dinga," 
2Peter2:13 mite a gimsak mah bangun amaute tungah gimna kipia ding hi. A ut bangbangun suntangpi-in gamtat ding nuam a sa uh hi. Tua bang mite in note tawh ankuang hong um khawmin, a zuau gamtatnate uh ah nuamsa-in a om uh pen amaute adingin a zumhuai mahmah ahi hi." 
2Peter2:14 Numei bekbek etnopin nei uh a, a mawhnopna lungsim uh kam thei lo hi. Upna cingtaak lo mite zol belin nei uh a, huaihamna lungsim bekbek a nei uh hi. Tua bang mite, Pasianʼ samsiat mite ahi uh hi." 
2Peter2:15 Thuman lampi nusia-in gammang uh a, a man loin gamtatna tawh sum a ngah nuam Beorʼ tapa Balaamʼ gamtat bangin gamta uh hi." 
2Peter2:16 Balaam in ama mawhna hangin taiina a thuak hi. A pau thei lo la, mihing bangin hong pau a, kamsang Balaamʼ hai tatna a khawlsak hi." 
2Peter2:17 Hih bang mite pen a kangcip khin sa ciktui, huih in a mutkhiat meiipi tawh kibang uh a, Pasian in amauteʼ om nadingin khuamial sahpi omna mun a koih kholhsak hi." 
2Peter2:18 Amaute kiphasakin hai pau uh a, a khial gamtat mite sung panin a suakta khin liailiai zo mite, leitung pumpi deih bangin a gamtat nadingun a zol uh hi." 
2Peter2:19 Amaute pen siatna a piangsak thei zongsatna lelin sila hinapi-un mite tungah suahtak nading thu a gen uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen, a hong zo peuhpeuhteʼ sila ihi hi." 
2Peter2:20 I Topa le Honpa Jesu Khris theihna hangin leitung siatna sung panin suakta khin napi-un, leitung siatna ah awkkikin a lelte pen, a masa a pianzia uh sangin a nunung a pianzia uh siahuai zaw hi." 
2Peter2:21 Tua bang mite in amaute tungah a kipia thu siangthote thei-in a nusiatkik sangun thuman lampi a thei ngei het lo uh hileh amau adingin hoih zaw thampek ding hi. 
2Peter2:22 Paunak ah, “Ui in a luak nekik hi,” a cihna le, “Vok a kisilsiang khit ciangin buannawng lak mahah bualkik veve hi,” a kicihna thu, amaute tungah a piang ahi hi." 
2Peter3:1 Ka itte aw, hih ka hong laigelh a nih veina hi a, lungsim siangtak tawh thu na ngaihsut phatkik theih nadingun a nih vei mahin ka hong phawksakkik hi." 
2Peter3:2 Tanglai pek a kamsang siangthoteʼ thugen kholhte le note lakah sawltak na a semte in Topa le Honpaʼ thupiakte a hong gen sawn uh thute na phawkkik ding uh ka deih hi. 
2Peter3:3 A masa penin na theih ding uh panin: Hun nunung lam ciangin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mi pawl khat hong om dinga, amaute in note hong zahpih bawlin," 
2Peter3:4 “Amah a hong paikik nading a thuciamna a bangci ahi hiam? I pu i pate zong si khinta uh a, leitung piancil a kipanin tu dong na khempeuh a kibang mahin omom lai hi,” hong ci ding uh hi." 
2Peter3:5 Amaute in a kitheih mawh bawl uh thu pen: Tanglai pekin Pasian in ama kampauna tawh vantung le leitung na piangsak hi. Tui sung panin tui mah tawh leitung na piangsak a," 
2Peter3:6 tui tawh a piansak leitung pen tui mah tawh na susia leuleu hi. 
2Peter3:7 Tu-in tua Pasianʼ kampauna mah tawh, mei tawh hal tum dingin tu-in a om vantung le leitung a kikoihcing hi a, Pasian a um lo mite thu kikhenin a kisuksiat hun ding bek ngakin a om ahi uh hi." 
2Peter3:8 Ahi zongin ka itte aw, na mangngilh loh ding uh ka deih thu in: Topa adingin ni khat le kum khat, kum tul khat le ni khat a kilamdan luatna om lo hi." 
2Peter3:9 Mi pawl khatteʼ ngaihsut bangin Topa in a kamciamna a hong tungsak hak hi zenzen lo hi. Note khat beek in siatna na thuakkhak ding uh deih loin na vekpi-un na kisik ding uh deih ahih manin hong pai nai lohna pen note hong khualna hizaw hi. 
2Peter3:10 Ahi zongin theih kholh lohpi-in guta bangin Topa hong pai ding Ni hong tung ding hi. Tua Ni ciangin nakpi takin a ging in vantungte maimang sakin, vantung nate mei in kangtumin maimang dinga, leitung le a tunga om na khempeuh a mangthang ding hi." 
2Peter3:11 Hih nate khempeuh hih bangin kisusia mang khin ding ahih manin note a bangci mi dingin kilawm cih limtakin na ngaihsun un. A siangtho nuntakna nei-in Pasianʼ deihna bangin na gamta unla," 
2Peter3:12 vantungte mei in kangtumin, vantung nate sa lua-in a tui mang ding hun Pasianʼ Ni hong tun baih theih nadingin na hih theih zahun hanciam unla, na ngak un." 
2Peter3:13 Eite in Pasianʼ hong ciam sa, thuman bekbek a kizat nading mun van thak le lei thak a ngak ihi hi." 
2Peter3:14 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw, hih Ni ding ngakin na om laitakun Pasianʼ muhna ah paubaanna om het loin amah tawh nuam takin na om khawm theih nadingun hanciam un." 
2Peter3:15 I sanggam Paul in Pasianʼ piak pilna zangin note kiangah lai a hong gelhnate sungah a gen mah bangin note khempeuh in hotkhiatna na ngah theih nading uh hun hong piakna-in Topa hong zekai ahihna thu na phawk un. 
2Peter3:16 Lai a hong gelhna sungah a thugente tu-ate mah a gen nuam ahi hi. A laigelhna sungah a telhak thu tampi om a, theihna kicing loin lungsim kip lo mi pawl khatte in Lai Siangtho sung thu a ututun a kawihei uh bangin Paulʼ thugente zong a man lopi-in khia uh ahih manin siatna a tuak lawh uh hi." 
2Peter3:17 Tua ahih ciangin ka itte aw, hih thute thei khol unla, ngeina man zui lo miteʼ khemna zui kha-in na bulkip panun na puk khak loh nadingun na kidawm un." 
2Peter3:18 Hehpihna thu le i Topa le Honpa Jesu Khris theihna thu ah na khangto semsem zaw un. Tu hun a kipanin a tawntungin amah in minthanna ngah paisuak tahen. Amen. 
1John1:1 Leitung piancil lai pek a kipanin a om sa ahi nuntakna a pia thei Thu tawh kisai, note kiangah ka hong gelh uh hi. Kote mahmah in ama thugen ka za uh a, ka mit mahmah uh tawh amah mu-in, limtakin ka et tel uh hi a, ka khut mahmah uh tawh ka lawn uh ahi hi."

1John4:2 Pasianʼ Kha sawlna tawh thugente le a dangte bangci khen theih ding na hi uh hiam cih leh: Jesu Khris pen mihing bangin hong pai hi, ci-in a gente khempeuh Pasian Khaʼ lamlahna tawh thugen ahi hi."

2John1:2 Thuman thei ihih manin a tawntungin tua thu ah i kip ding hi.

2John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesu Khris in dikna, hehpihna le nopsakna, eite tungah hong pia henla, thuman le itna tawh tua thuphate khempeuh eite aʼ hong hi tahen." 
2John1:3 Pa Pasian le a Tapa Jesu Khris in dikna, hehpihna le nopsakna, eite tungah hong pia henla, thuman le itna tawh tua thuphate khempeuh eite aʼ hong hi tahen." 
2John1:4 Pa Pasian in eite hong thupiakna bangmahin na pawlpi mite pawl khat in thu a mantakin a zuihna uh mu ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. 
2John1:4 Pa Pasian in eite hong thupiakna bangmahin na pawlpi mite pawl khat in thu a mantakin a zuihna uh mu ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi. 
2John1:5 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it tonu aw, ka hong thum nopna panin: Eite khempeuh khatlekhat ki-it ni, cihna ahi hi. Hih kong gen thu pen thu thak hi lo a, a kipat cil pek a kipanin i neihsa thupiakna ahi hi." 
2John1:5 Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it tonu aw, ka hong thum nopna panin: Eite khempeuh khatlekhat ki-it ni, cihna ahi hi. Hih kong gen thu pen thu thak hi lo a, a kipat cil pek a kipanin i neihsa thupiakna ahi hi." 
2John1:6 Itna thu kong gen ciangin Pasianʼ thupiakte zui ding cihna ahi hi. A kipat cil a kipan na zak sa uh ahi hih thupiakna pen na khan tawntungun zui-in itna na nei ta un. 
2John1:6 Itna thu kong gen ciangin Pasianʼ thupiakte zui ding cihna ahi hi. A kipat cil a kipan na zak sa uh ahi hih thupiakna pen na khan tawntungun zui-in itna na nei ta un. 
2John1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah midangte a khem tampi hong om ta a, tua mite in Jesu Khris, mihing banga hong paina thu a nial uh hi. Tua bang mite pen mi khemte hi a, Khrisʼ Gal ahi uh hi." 
2John1:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah midangte a khem tampi hong om ta a, tua mite in Jesu Khris, mihing banga hong paina thu a nial uh hi. Tua bang mite pen mi khemte hi a, Khrisʼ Gal ahi uh hi." 
2John1:8 Tua ahih ciangin na sep sa uh thuman taan kha loin, a kimtakin na ngah theih nadingun limtakin kidawm un." 
2John1:8 Tua ahih ciangin na sep sa uh thuman taan kha loin, a kimtakin na ngah theih nadingun limtakin kidawm un." 
2John1:9 Khrisʼ thuhilhna zui loin a khengvalin a pai mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl lo ahi hi. Ahi zongin a thuhilhna a zuite pen Pa Pasian le a Tapa tawh a kipawl ahi uh hi. 
2John1:9 Khrisʼ thuhilhna zui loin a khengvalin a pai mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl lo ahi hi. Ahi zongin a thuhilhna a zuite pen Pa Pasian le a Tapa tawh a kipawl ahi uh hi. 
2John1:10 Tua ahih manin Khrisʼ hilh ahi hih thute a hilh lo midang khatpeuh note kiangah a hong pai leh na inn uh ah zong na tungsak kei unla, zong na hopih kei un." 
2John1:10 Tua ahih manin Khrisʼ hilh ahi hih thute a hilh lo midang khatpeuh note kiangah a hong pai leh na inn uh ah zong na tungsak kei unla, zong na hopih kei un." 
2John1:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite ading thupha a deihsak mite pen amauʼ nasep hoih lohna ah zong a kipawl ahi uh hi. 
2John1:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite ading thupha a deihsak mite pen amauʼ nasep hoih lohna ah zong a kipawl ahi uh hi. 
2John1:12 Gen ding tampi ka neih lai hangin lai-in hong gelh lo zaw-in, eiteʼ lungdamna a kicin zawk theih nadingin kei hong pai-in khatlekhat maitang kimu-in thu gen khawm dingin ka kingaihsun hi." 
2John1:12 Gen ding tampi ka neih lai hangin lai-in hong gelh lo zaw-in, eiteʼ lungdamna a kicin zawk theih nadingin kei hong pai-in khatlekhat maitang kimu-in thu gen khawm dingin ka kingaihsun hi." 
2John1:13 Teeltuam ahi hih lai-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh hi.

3John1:1 A khangham bel keimah Johan in Lungsim takpi tawh ka hong it ka lawm Gaias tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
3John1:1 A khangham bel keimah Johan in Lungsim takpi tawh ka hong it ka lawm Gaias tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
3John1:2 Ka lawm it Gaias aw, nang na ci damin na vai khempeuh zong na maa pai ding hi, ci-in ka lamen hi. Kha thu tawh kisai lamsang ah zong bangmah lungkhamna om lo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
3John1:2 Ka lawm it Gaias aw, nang na ci damin na vai khempeuh zong na maa pai ding hi, ci-in ka lamen hi. Kha thu tawh kisai lamsang ah zong bangmah lungkhamna om lo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
3John1:3 Nang a mantakin a gamta na hih takpi mah bangin, i Khristian mipih hih lai-a hong pai peuhpeuh in a mantakin na nuntakna thu hong gen uh ahih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
3John1:3 Nang a mantakin a gamta na hih takpi mah bangin, i Khristian mipih hih lai-a hong pai peuhpeuh in a mantakin na nuntakna thu hong gen uh ahih manin ka nuam mahmah hi." 
3John1:4 Tate bangin ka hong neih mite a mantakin a gamtatna uh ka zakna hangin ka lungdamna sangin a dang lungdamna lian zaw bangmah om lo hi. 
3John1:4 Tate bangin ka hong neih mite a mantakin a gamtatna uh ka zakna hangin ka lungdamna sangin a dang lungdamna lian zaw bangmah om lo hi. 
3John1:5 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, na theih ngei loh hi napi-in i Khristian mipihte lungsim takpi tawh na na huh hi." 
3John1:5 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, na theih ngei loh hi napi-in i Khristian mipihte lungsim takpi tawh na na huh hi." 
3John1:6 Amaute na limbawlna thu, hih lai-a pawlpite kiangah hong gen uh hi. I biak Pasianʼ deihna tawh kituakin a khualzinna uh nuam takin a zoptheih nadingun na huh in." 
3John1:6 Amaute na limbawlna thu, hih lai-a pawlpite kiangah hong gen uh hi. I biak Pasianʼ deihna tawh kituakin a khualzinna uh nuam takin a zoptheih nadingun na huh in." 
3John1:7 Amaute pen Pasianʼ nasem dingin a khualzin khia uh hi a, thu um lo mite tung panin bangmah huhna ngah lo uh hi." 
3John1:7 Amaute pen Pasianʼ nasem dingin a khualzin khia uh hi a, thu um lo mite tung panin bangmah huhna ngah lo uh hi."

3John1:9 Na pawlpite kiangah lai ka gelh ngei hi. Ahi zongin na pawlpi sungah mi lian pen a ut Diotrefes in ka thugen hong mang nuam lo hi. 
3John1:9 Na pawlpite kiangah lai ka gelh ngei hi. Ahi zongin na pawlpi sungah mi lian pen a ut Diotrefes in ka thugen hong mang nuam lo hi. 
3John1:10 Tua ahih manin kong pai ciangin kote hong gensiatna, zuau thu a genna le a gamtatna khempeuh ka pholak ding hi. Tua bang mi gensiatna ciang bek hi loin, i Khristian mipihte zin nangawn tungsak nuam lo a, zin a tungsak nuamte nangawn khamin, pawlpi panin hawlkhiat ding hanciam lai hi." 
3John1:10 Tua ahih manin kong pai ciangin kote hong gensiatna, zuau thu a genna le a gamtatna khempeuh ka pholak ding hi. Tua bang mi gensiatna ciang bek hi loin, i Khristian mipihte zin nangawn tungsak nuam lo a, zin a tungsak nuamte nangawn khamin, pawlpi panin hawlkhiat ding hanciam lai hi." 
3John1:11 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, mihoih loteʼ gamtatna zui kei inla, mihoihteʼ gamtatna zui in. A gamtat hoih mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl mi hi a, a gamtat hoih lo mite pen Pasian a thei nai lo ahi uh hi." 
3John1:11 Ka hong it lawm Gaias aw, mihoih loteʼ gamtatna zui kei inla, mihoihteʼ gamtatna zui in. A gamtat hoih mite pen Pasian tawh a kipawl mi hi a, a gamtat hoih lo mite pen Pasian a thei nai lo ahi uh hi." 
3John1:12 Mi khempeuh in Demetrias phatkim uh a, a manin ama gamtatna mahmah in hih thu a manna hong kilangsak hi. Kote in zong ama hoihna ka thei uh a, tua ama hoihna ka gennate uh a thuman ahi hi." 
3John1:12 Mi khempeuh in Demetrias phatkim uh a, a manin ama gamtatna mahmah in hih thu a manna hong kilangsak hi. Kote in zong ama hoihna ka thei uh a, tua ama hoihna ka gennate uh a thuman ahi hi." 
3John1:13 Gen ding tampi ka neih hangin lai-in gelhkhiat ding kong sawm kei zaw hi. 
3John1:13 Gen ding tampi ka neih hangin lai-in gelhkhiat ding kong sawm kei zaw hi. 
3John1:14 Nang tawh kimu baih thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin, tua hun ciangin maitang kimu-in i kiho ding hi." 
3John1:14 Nang tawh kimu baih thei dingin kilamen ka hih manin, tua hun ciangin maitang kimu-in i kiho ding hi." 
3John1:15 Nangma tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Hih lai-a om i lawmte in hong hopih uh hi. Tua lai-a om i lawmte khempeuh a milipin na hopihsak in. 
3John1:15 Nangma tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Hih lai-a om i lawmte in hong hopih uh hi. Tua lai-a om i lawmte khempeuh a milipin na hopihsak in. 
Jude1:1 Jesu Khrisʼ sila ka hih banah Jamesʼ nau keimah Jude in: Pasianʼ sapna hangin Jesu Khris kepna sungah Pasian itna tawh a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
Jude1:1 Jesu Khrisʼ sila ka hih banah Jamesʼ nau keimah Jude in: Pasianʼ sapna hangin Jesu Khris kepna sungah Pasian itna tawh a om mite tungah lai ka hong khak hi. 
Jude1:2 Note khempeuh tungah hehpihna le itna thupha tampi tak hong tung tahen. 
Jude1:3 Ka itte aw, eite in i ngahkhawm hotkhiatna thu, note kiangah gelh nuam mahmah in ka om laitakin Pasian in ama mite tungah a tawntungin a kimang dingin khatvei bek a hong piak upna thu ah note in na nawk suak nadingun hanthotna gelh ding a kisapna thu ka phawk hi." 
Jude1:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ thu a ngaihsun lo mi pawl khat, eite lakah kuama phawk lohin hong lut sim uh a, amauteʼ mawh gamtat ngamnate a seelna-un Pasianʼ hehpihna thupha a lehlamin hei-in, eite in khat bek i neih i Mangpa le i Topa ahi Jesu Khris a nial uh hi. Hih bang miteʼ gimthuak ding thu tanglai pekin Lai Siangtho in a gen sa thu ahi hi." 
Jude1:5 Note in na theih sa uh ahi ta zongin ka hong phawksak nop thu in: Topa in Egypt gam panin Israel mite hon khia khin napi-in amah a um lo mite a nung ciangin susia gawp hi. 
Jude1:6 Amauʼ aana neih huam sung bekah om loin a omna panun a paikhia vantung mite zong leinuai khuamial sungah sikkol kibulhin amauʼ thu a kikhen ding Ni lianpi ngakin Pasian in a koihcip hi. 
Jude1:7 Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua le a kiim a om khuapi mite zong tua vantung mite mah bangin gamta uh a, numei tawh mawhnopna bek tham loin pasal le pasal kilunggulhna ciang dong nei uh ahih manin midangteʼ etteh dingin tawntung meikuang a thuak uh hi." 
Jude1:8 Tua mite mah bangin hih mite zong thumu-in kinei-in amau pumpi thanghuaisak uh a, Pasianʼ thu nialin tung lam a om minthanna a neite a simmawh bawl uh hi." 
Jude1:9 Vantung mi lian pa Mikhael nangawn tua bangin gamta ngam lo hi. Mosesʼ luanghawm kituhin Dawimangpa tawh a kitot laitakin Mikhael in Dawimangpa zahkona kammal zang ngam loin, “Topa in nang hong taii tahen,” ci bek hi." 
Jude1:10 Ahi zongin hih mite in a theih tel loh uh thute simmawh bawl uh a, ganhing bangin a pianpih lungsim uh tawh gamta uh ahih manin siatna thuak lawh uh hi." 
Jude1:11 Hih mite adingin dahhuai mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kainʼ gamtat bangin gamta-in, sum ngaihsutna-in Balaamʼ khialh bangin khial uh a, Korahʼ lehdo bangin lehdo-in siatna thuak uh hi." 
Jude1:12 Noteʼ annek khopna ah zumna mel nei loin hong om gawp uh ahih manin hong siat suah uh a, amauʼ pumpi bek ngaihsun uh hi. Amaute pen cikmahin guah a zusak ngei lo, huih in a letkhiat mang meiipi, tuk hun laitak nangawnin a gah a gah lo, kizunglotin a keutum singkungte," 
Jude1:13 a sepna uh tawh amau mahʼ maizum nading a piangsak tuipi hualte le Pasian in amauteʼ om nadingin lei sung khuamial thukpi a koihsak tawntung, a lampial aksite tawh kibang bek uh hi." 
Jude1:14 Tanglai pekin Adam pan khang sagihna Enok in zong hih thu mah na gen khol a, a genna ah, “En un, Topa, a mi siangtho honpite tawh hong pai dinga," 
Jude1:15 Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamtat lohna hang uh le kam hoih lo pipi zangin Pasian a gensiatnate uh hangin Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamta lo mite tungah thu khenin mawhsakna pia ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Jude1:16 Hih mite a tawntungin phunin khatlekhat mawhna kizong uh a, amau pumpi deihna bangun gamta-in kiphasak uh a, phattuamna a ngah theih nadingun midangte a phat uh hi." 
Jude1:17 Ahi zongin ka itte aw, i Topa Jesu Khrisʼ sawltakte in note tungah hong gen sa thute na phawk un." 
Jude1:18 Amaute in note kiangah, “Hun nunung lam ciangin Pasianʼ deihna tawh a kituak lo amau pumpi deihna zui-in note a hong simmawh bawl mi pawl khat hong piang ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jude1:19 Hih mite in pawl kikhenna piangsakin, amau pumpi deihna bangin gamta uh a, Kha Siangtho zong nei lo uh hi." 
Jude1:20 Ahi zongin ka it note na hih uh leh a siangtho na upna uh ah na kip semsem unla, Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh thu na ngen un." 
Jude1:21 I Topa Jesu Khris in a hong hehpihna tawh nuntak tawntungna hong piak ding na ngakkawmun Pasianʼ itna sungah na kip un. 
Jude1:22 A um taktak zo lote hehpih unla," 
Jude1:23 meiphual sung panin dawhkhiat bangin midangte na hon khia un. Mi pawl khatteʼ mawhna ah note zong na siat khak loh nadingun kidop kawmna tawh na huh unla, amauʼ gamtat hoih lo mawhnate na mudah un." 
Jude1:24 Ama minthanna mai ah paubaanna om het loin lungdam takin a hong paipih theih nadingin note na puk khak nading panun a hong kem," 
Jude1:25 khat bek ahi eite a hong Hon Pasian in, tu ma, tu laitak le a tawntungin, minthanna, vangliatna, uk zawhna le aana nei tawntung tahen. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Hih laibu pen a piang baih ding thute, Pasianʼ nasemte tungah a lah dingin Pasian in Jesu tungah a thu pia a, Jesu in mang sungah a lah thute ahi hi. Khris in ama vantungmi sawl a, a nasem pa Johan kiangah hih thute a kilangsak hi." 
Revelation1:2 Johan in zong a muhsa thu khempeuh na gen leuleu hi. Hih thute pen Johan in Pasian kiang panin hong pai thute le Jesu Khris in ama tungah a lahkhiat thuman thutakte a genna thu ahi hi. 
Revelation1:3 Hih laibu a sim mite mi hampha hi a, hih thu kigente ngai-in, hih laibu sungah a kigelh thu a zuite zong mi hampha mah ahi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu kigente a tun ding hun hong naita hi." 
Revelation1:4 Johan in Asia gam sungah a om pawlpi sagihte tungah a khak lai ahi hi. A beisa hun, tuhun le mailam hunah a om tawntung Pasian kiang pan le ama tokhom mai-ah a om Kha Siangtho sagihte tung pan le," 
Revelation1:5 thuman takin teci a pang, sihna panin a kithokiksak Tapa upa, leitung kumpite tungah ukna aana a nei Jesu Khris kiang panin note tungah hehpihna le nopsakna thupha hong tung tahen. Tua Jesu Khris in eite hong it a, ama sihna tawh i mawhna panin eite hong suaktasak a," 
Revelation1:6 ama Pa Pasianʼ na a sem dingin siampi le kumpi za-ah a hong koih hi. Tua Jesu in minthanna le vangliatna nei tawntung tahen. Amen. 
Revelation1:7 En un, amah hong paita dinga, meiipi tawh hong tonkhawm ding hi. Teipi tawh amah a sunte a kipan mi khempeuh in a mu ding uh hi. Amah a hong pai ciangin leitung mi khempeuh lau-in a kap ding uh hi. Hih ka gen bangin hong piang takpi ding hi. Amen." 
Revelation1:8 A beisa hun, tuhun le mailam hunah zong a om tawntung ding a Vanglian Topa Pasian in, “Kei pen na khempeuh a Kipatna le a Tawpna ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation1:9 Noteʼ sanggam keimah Johan in Jesu tawh kipawlna hangin note mah bangin bawlsiatna thuakin, Pasianʼ Ukna sungah omin, lungduai takin a thuak mipa ka hi hi. Pasianʼ thu le Jesuʼ hong gen thumante ka genna hangin Patmos a kici tuikulh-ah kei hong kikoih hi." 
Revelation1:10 Topaʼ ni-in Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin ka om laitakin peengkul bangin a gingpha mahmah khat ka nung lamah ka za a," 
Revelation1:11 “Na muhte khempeuh laibu sungah gelh inla, Efesa pawlpi, Smyrna pawlpi, Pergamum pawlpi, Thiatira pawlpi, Sardis pawlpi, Filadelfia pawlpi, Laodisia pawlpi, hih pawlpi sagihte kiangah khak in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation1:12 Kua in kei hong hopih ahi hiam, ci-in a en dingin ka kihei leh kham kibawl meivakna sagih ka mu hi." 
Revelation1:13 Tua meivakte lakah, puantualpi khat silhin a awm-ah kham kibawl awmgak a gak, mi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi." 
Revelation1:14 A samte tuumul bangin kangin, khuavak bangin pak a, a mittangte meikuang a bang hi." 
Revelation1:15 A khete, pumbukah a kihalsan sumngo bang a, a awging ahihleh tuipi ging a bang hi." 
Revelation1:16 A taklam khutah aksi sagih tawi-in, a kam sung panin langnih a hiam namsau khat hong pusuak a, a maitang sun nitaang a bang hi." 
Revelation1:17 Amah ka muh ciangin misi bangin ama khe phungah ka puk hi. Ahi zongin amah in ka tungah a taklam khut hong nga a, “Lau kei in; kei pen a kipatna le a tawpna ka hi a," 
Revelation1:18 a nungta mipa zong ka hi hi. Kei ka si ngei hi. Ahi zongin tu-in hong en in, a nungta tawntung ka hi hi. Sihna le misite omna gam keima khutnuai ahi uh hi." 
Revelation1:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-a na muh, tu laitakin a om thute le tu nung ciangin a hong piang ding thute, lai sungah gelh in." 
Revelation1:20 Tu-in ka taklam khut sungah na muh aksi sagihte le kham kibawl meivakna sagihte a khiatna in: Aksi sagihte pen pawlpi sagihteʼ vantung mite a cihna hi a, meivakna sagihte pen pawlpi sagihte a cihna ahi hi." 
Revelation2:1 “Efesa khua-a pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, a taklam khut ah aksi sagih tawi-in, kham kibawl meivakna lakah a pai kawikawi Jesuʼ thugenna hih bang ahi hi:" 
Revelation2:2 “Noteʼ nasepna, na gimna uh le lungduai takin na thuakna uh le migilote koih mawk loin, sawltak hi lo napi-in sawltak hi ung, a ci mite dong telin sawltak ahih lohna uh na muh khiatnate uh ka thei hi." 
Revelation2:3 Note in lungduai takin thuakin, keima min hangin thuak zo-in, lungkia het loin na omna uh ka thei hi." 
Revelation2:4 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsakna khat om a, tua in: A masa lai-a kei na hong it bangun tu-in na hong it nawn kei uh hi." 
Revelation2:5 Tua ahih manin na lampialna uh phawkin, na mawhna uh panin kihei unla, na gamtat ngeisa bangun gamtakik un. Na mawhna panun kihei-in na kisikkik kei uh leh note kiangah hong pai-in na meivakna uh ka hong lakkhiatsak ding hi." 
Revelation2:6 Ahi zongin note ka hong pahtakna khat om a, tua in: Keima muhdah mah bangin Nikolas pawlte na mudah uh hi." 
Revelation2:7 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mite tungah, Pasianʼ Huan sunga om nuntakna singgahte a nek theih nadingun thu ka pia ding hi." 
Revelation2:8 “Smyrna khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, a kipatna le a tawpna, si ngei napi-in a hingkik paʼ thugen in:" 
Revelation2:9 Na lungkhamnate uh le na zawnnate uh ka thei hi. A taktakin note a hau na hi uh hi. Jew mi hi lo napi-in Jew mi ka hi uh hi, ci-in note a hong gensiatnate uh ka thei hi. Tua bang mite pen Satanʼ pawlte ahi uh hi." 
Revelation2:10 Na thuak ding uh haksatnate kihta kei un. Dawimangpa in note pawl khat thong sungah hong khia-in hong ze-et ding hi. Gimna na thuak hun ding uh ni sawm sung bek hi ding hi. Na sih dongun kei tungah hong citak un. Tua hileh nuntakna lukhu kong pia ding hi. 
Revelation2:11 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mite, nih vei sihna in gimsak kha nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation2:12 “Pergamum khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, a langnihin a hiam mahmah namsau a nei paʼ thugen in:" 
Revelation2:13 Satan in a kumpi tokhom a phuhna munah a om na hih lamtak uh ka thei hi. Keima thu citakin teci a pang cinten Antipas, Satanʼ omna munah a kithah hun laitak nangawnin kei na hong upna uh na khahsuah kei uh hi." 
Revelation2:14 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsak nading thu tawm khat a om hi. Milim biakna ante nesakin, nulepa paktatna piangsak a, Israel mite mawhna a gamtasak Balak tungah thu a hilh Balaamʼ thuhilhnate a um mi pawl khat note lakah a om hi." 
Revelation2:15 Tua mah bangin Nikolas pawlteʼ thuhilhna a um mi pawl khat zong note lak mahah a om hi. 
Revelation2:16 Tua ahih manin na mawhna panun kisikkik un. Na kisik kei uh leh note kiangah kei hong pai baihin, ka kam panin a pusuak namsau tawh amaute ka do ding hi." 
Revelation2:17 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. A gualzo mi tungah a kiselcip manna an pawl khat le min thak a kigelhna suangkang khat ka pia ding hi. Tua suangkang pen a ngahte sim loh kuamah dang in thei lo ding hi. 
Revelation2:18 “Thiatira khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, meikuang tawh a kibang mittang nei-in sumngo kihalsan tawh a kibang khe a nei Pasianʼ Tapaʼ thugen in:" 
Revelation2:19 Noteʼ gamtatna, itna na neihna, upna na neihna, na nasepna, lungduai takin na thuakna uh le a kipat cil lai sangin a nunung lamah na hoih zawknate uh ka thei hi." 
Revelation2:20 Ahi zongin note ka hong mawhsak nading thu khat om hi. Kamsang numei ka hi, ci-in thu a gen Jezebel na nial kei uh hi. Ama thuhilhna hangin ka nasemte in numei pasal paktatna gamta-in milim biakna ante a ne uh hi." 
Revelation2:21 Tua numei a kisikkik nading hun ka piak hangin a paktatna panin kihei nuam lo hi. 
Revelation2:22 Tua ahih manin tu-in tua numei tawh a paktatna uh panin a kisikkik kei uh leh tua numei le amah tawh a paktat mi khempeuh, lupna ngaksakin nakpi takin gimna ka thuaksak ding hi." 
Revelation2:23 Tua numeiʼ thu a zui mi khempeuh ka that ding hi. Tua hileh, mihingteʼ ngaihsutna le lungsim a kantel pa ka hihna thu pawlpi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. Noteʼ gamtatna ciat tawh kizui-in ka hong thukkik ding hi." 
Revelation2:24 Ahi zongin Thiatira khua-a om note pawl khat in tua numeiʼ thuhilhna hoih lote na zui kei uh a, mite in, ‘Satanʼ thu thukpite hi,’ a cih thute na su kha kei uh hi. Note tungah van gik bangmah ka hong suan kei ding hi." 
Revelation2:25 Ka hong pai matengin na neihsa teng uh na lenkip ta un. 
Revelation2:26 A gualzo, a tawp dongin keima deihna bangin a gamta zo mite tungah, keimah in ka Pa tung panin ka ngah vangliatnate mah ka pia ding hi. Minam dangte tungah ukna a neih nading uh aana ka pia dinga, leibeel sat khap bangin sik ciangkhut tawh minam dangte sat gawp ding uh hi." 
Revelation2:27  
Revelation2:28 Amaute tungah zingsol zong ka pia ding hi. 
Revelation2:29 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. 
Revelation3:1 21 “Sardis khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, Pasian Kha Siangtho sagih le aksi sagih a nei paʼ thugen in: Noteʼ gamtatnate ka thei a, note a si hi napi-in a hing min na pua uh hi." 
Revelation3:2 Tua ahih manin khua phawk unla, na neih lai sunte uh a bei mang ma-in thasaan phakik un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasepnate uh Pasianʼ muhna ah a cingtaak nai het lo ahihna thu ka thei hi." 
Revelation3:3 Tua ahih manin note a hong kihilh na zak sa uh thute phawkkik unla, tua thute zui-in na mawhna panun kisikkik un. Khua na phawk kei uh leh note kiangah guta bangin ka hong pai dinga, ka hong tun lam nangawn na thei kei ding uh hi." 
Revelation3:4 Ahi zongin Sardis khua sunga om note lakah a puan a ninsak nai lo tawm khat na om uh hi. Tua bang mite kilawm uh ahih manin kei tawh puan pak silhin ka tonkhawm ding uh hi. 
Revelation3:5 A gualzo mite in tua bangin puan pak silh ding uh a, a nungta mite a kikhumna laibu sung panin amauteʼ min ka phiat kei ding hi. Ka Pa le ama vantung mite kiangah zong keima mite ahihna uh ka pulak ding hi." 
Revelation3:6 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. 
Revelation3:7 “Filadelfia khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, Davidʼ tawhtang kemin, ama hon sa kong kuamah in a khak zawh loh, ama khak sa kong kuamah in a hon zawh loh, a thuman a siangtho paʼ thugen in:" 
Revelation3:8 Noteʼ nasepnate ka thei hi. Na tha uh a hat loh hangin ka thu zui-in kei tungah na hong cihtakna uh ka thei hi. Tua ahih manin kuamah in a khak zawh loh ding kong, noteʼ mai ah hon sa-in ka koih hi." 
Revelation3:9 Jew mi hi lo napi-in Jew mi hi ung, ci-in zuau a gen Satanʼ pawlte, noteʼ mai ah hong paisakin na khephung uh ah ka boksak dinga, note ka hong itna thu amaute ka theisak ding hi." 
Revelation3:10 Note in lungduai takin na thuak nading uh ka hong thupiakna zui na hih manun leitung a a om mi khempeuh ze-et nadingin leitung bupah a hong tung ding lungkhamna panin kei zong note ka hong suaktasak ding hi. 
Revelation3:11 Keimah ka hong pai baih ding hi. Kuamah in, na ngah ding uh gualzawhna lukhu hong tuh khak loh nadingun na neihsate uh hoihtakin na lenkip un." 
Revelation3:12 A gualzote pen ka Pasianʼ sutpi-in ka bawl dinga, amaute paikhia ngei nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute tungah ka Pasianʼ min le ka Pasian kiang vantung panin a hong pai suk ding Jerusalem khua thak min ka gelh dinga, amaute tungah keima min thak zong ka gelh ding hi." 
Revelation3:13 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un. 
Revelation3:14 “Laodisia khua pawlpi vantungmi kiangah lai gelh inla, thuman le citakin teci a pang, Pasianʼ piansakte khempeuh a kipatna ahi Amenʼ thugen in:" 
Revelation3:15 Noteʼ gamtatnate ka thei a, vot lah vot vet lo, sa lah sa vet loin na omna uh zong ka thei hi. A vot na hih kei uh leh a sa hi vet le-uhcin ka ut hi." 
Revelation3:16 Ahi zongin note pen vot lah vot vet lo, sa lah sa vet loin a laklawhin om na hih manun ka kam sung panin ka hong sia khia ding hi." 
Revelation3:17 Note a zawng, a mittaw, puansilh ding a nei lo, a hehpihhuai, a lungkham huai na hih lamtak uh thei loin, kote hau-in ka cithei uh a, bangmah kisapna ka nei kei uh hi, na ci uh hi." 
Revelation3:18 Tua ahih manin na hauh theih nadingun kei kiang panin kham citak hong lei-in a zumhuaipi-in guaktang a na omna uh na kisel nadingun puan pak hong lei unla, khua na muh theih nadingun mit zatui hong lei un." 
Revelation3:19 Ka it mite thuhilhin ka taii hi. Tua ahih manin lungsim tak tawh na mawhna panun kisikkik un. 
Revelation3:20 Kongkhak ah dingin kong ka hong kiu hi. Ka aw za-in kong hong honte kiangah lutin an ka nekhawm ding uh hi. 
Revelation3:21 Keimah zong gualzo-in ka Paʼ tokhom ah ka tut khawm uh mah bangin a gualzote khempeuh zong kei tawh ka tokhom tungah hong tut khawm theih nadingun thu ka pia ding hi. 
Revelation3:22 Tua ahih manin zak nading bil a neite in Kha Siangtho in pawlpite kiangah a gen thute na za un, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation4:1 Hih thu teng khit ciangin ka khuadak leh vantungah kong a kihong sa-in a om ka mu hi. Peengkul awging tawh a kibang, kei kiangah thu a hong gen sa awging mah in, “Hih lai ah hong pai to in. Tunung ciangin thupiang dingte kong lak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation4:2 Thakhat thu-in Kha Siangtho tawh ka kidim a, tua vantung a tokhom tungah mi khat a tu ka mu hi." 
Revelation4:3 Tua tokhom tungah a tupa pen Jasper le Karnelian suangmanpha bangin taang ziazua a, a tokhom kimkot pen Emerald suangmanpha bangin suum pempam hi." 
Revelation4:4 Tua tokhom kimkot ah tokhom sawm nih le li om a, tuate tungah puan pak silhin kham lukhu a khu upa sawm nih le lite tu uh hi." 
Revelation4:5 Tua tokhom panin khuaphialep hong taang khia-in, awging le vanging hong kipan khia a, a tokhom mai ah Pasianʼ kha ahi meivak sagih a kivak hi." 
Revelation4:6 A tokhom mailam tengah Kristal suangmanpha bangin a siang kilkel, limlang peekpi kiphah tuipi bangin a dum dide hi. Tua tokhom kiim a pang ciatah a nung le a mai ah mit a dimin a nei ganhing li a om hi." 
Revelation4:7 A ganhing a khatna pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, a nihna bawngtal tawh kibang a, a thumna in mihing maitang nei a, a lina pen muvanlai a leeng lai tawh kibang hi." 
Revelation4:8 Tua ganhing lite in kha guk ciat nei-in, tua a khateʼ sung lam le a pua lamah mittang a dimtakin om a, a sun a zan tawlnga loin la sa uh a, “A beisa, tu hun, le a tawntungin a om Vanglian Topa Pasian, siangtho hi, siangtho hi, siangtho hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation4:9 Tua ganhingte in a nungta tawntung, tokhom tungah a tupa tungah a lungdamna uh ko-in pahtawi-in a phat simun" 
Revelation4:10 nungta tawntungin tokhom tungah a tupa mai ah tua upa sawm nih le lite zong bokin amah bia uh a, tua tokhom mai ah a lukhute uh lawnin, la sa uh a," 
Revelation4:11 “Koteʼ Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in na khempeuh piangsakin, nangma deihna bangin na khempeuh omin, na khempeuh kipiangsak ahih manin, minthanna, pahtawina, le vangliatna na ngah tawntung dingin a kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:1 Tua ciangin, tokhom tungah a tupa in a taklam khut ah a tawi laizial tawn khat ka mu hi. Tua a laidal tung a lang nih tuakah lai kigelhin a kizial cip khit ciangin a kiphel theih loh nadingin mun sagih ah kiciamteh hi." 
Revelation5:2 Tua ciangin a thahat vantungmi khat ka mu a, amah in nakpi takin, “Hih laizial a ciaptehnate la khia-in a laizial a phel dingin a kilawm kua om ahi hiam?” hong ci hi." 
Revelation5:3 Ahi zongin tua laizial a phel ding mi, vantung, leitung, leinuai ah kuamah kimu lo hi." 
Revelation5:4 Tua laizial phelin a sung a en dingin a kilawm kuamah kimu lo ahih manin nakpi takin ka kap hi. 
Revelation5:5 Tua laitakin upate khat in kei kiangah, “Kap kei in. Judah minam sung panin Humpinelkai, David suan sung panin a lianpa gualzo khinta a, tua laizial ciaptehna sagihte la khia-in a laizial phel thei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation5:6 Tua upateʼ huam sung, ganhing lite le kumpi tokhom kikalah Tuuno a ding ka mu hi. Tua Tuuno pen a kigo lum sa tawh kibang a, leitung khempeuh ah a kisawl khia, Pasianʼ khateʼ lim ahi ki sagih le mittang sagih a nei hi." 
Revelation5:7 Tua Tuuno va pai a, tokhom tungah a tupa in a tak lamah a tawi laizial a va la hi." 
Revelation5:8 Tua laizial a lak khit ciangin ganhing lite le upa sawm nih le lite, Topaʼ mai ah a kun uh hi. Amaute in harp lasakna khat ciat le Pasianʼ mi siangthote in thungetna-in a zat uh paknamtui a dimin a om paknamtui beel khat ciat a tawi uh hi." 
Revelation5:9 Amaute in la thak khat sa uh a, “Nang Tuuno, tua laizial a la khia ding le a ciaptehnate a la khia dingin na kilawm hi. Nang hong kigo khin ahih manin mi namkim le pau namkim a pau mite sung panin na sisan tawh Pasian adingin mite na lei khin a," 
Revelation5:10 Pasianʼ na a sem dingin siampi za le kumpi za na pia a, amaute in leitung ukin a om ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:11 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh tokhom le ganhing lite le upateʼ kimkot ah atul-amakin a ding miaimuai vantung miteʼ awging ka za hi. 
Revelation5:12 Amaute in nakpi takin la sa uh a, “A kigo Tuuno in vangliatna le hauhna, pilna le thahatna, pahtawina, minthanna le phatna, a ngah dingin kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:13 Tua ciangin vantung, leitung, leinuai, tuipi sung le mun khempeuh ah a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh in la a sakna uh ka za a, amaute in, “Tokhom tungah a tupa le Tuuno in phatna, pahtawina, minthanna le vangliatna, ngah tawntung tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:14 Tua ciangin ganhing lite in zong, “Amen,” na ci uh a, upate in zong khukdinin Pasian a bia uh hi." 
Revelation6:1 Tua ciangin Tuuno in tua ciaptehna sagih sung panin khat a honkhiat ka mu hi. Tua laitakin ganhing lite sung panin khat in vanging bangin nakpi takin, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation6:2 Ka khuadak leh sakol kang khat hong pai a, a tungah a tuang pa in thal khat a tawi hi. Ama tungah lukhu khat kipia a, a gualzo pa hihna tawh a gualzo dingin a kuan khia hi." 
Revelation6:3 Ciaptehna a nihna a hon ciangin ganhing a nihna in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation6:4 Sakol a ausan khat hong pai a, mite khatlekhat a kithah theih nadingun a sakol tung tuang pa in leitungah gal kidona a piansak theih nading vangliatna kipia a, ama tungah namsau lian mahmah khat zong kipia lai hi." 
Revelation6:5 Ciaptehna a thumna a hon ciangin ganhing a thumna in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi. Sakol vom khat hong pai ka mu a, a tungah a tuang pa in a khut ah tawitehna a tawi hi." 
Revelation6:6 Tua ganhing lite lak panin awging bang khat ka za a, “Mangbuh lawhta khat in ni khat tha man a, mangbuhham lawhta thum in ni khat tha mah man hi. Ahi zongin oliv huan le leenggui huan susia kei in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation6:7 Ciaptehna a lina a hon ciangin ganhing a lina in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation6:8 Ka khuadak leh sakol puang khat ka mu a, a tungah a tuang paʼ min pen Sihna hi a, a nungah Hell in a zui hi. Amaute in namsau, kialpi, pulnatna le gamsate tawh leitung mi seh li suah seh khat a thah theih nadingun thu a kipia hi." 
Revelation6:9 Ciaptehna ngana a hon ciangin Pasianʼ thu a genna hang le Pasianʼ thu citakin teci a panna uh hangin a kithat miteʼ kha, biakna tau nuai ah a om ka mu hi." 
Revelation6:10 Amaute nakpi takin kiko uh a, “A thuman, a siangtho, a Vanglian Topa aw, leitungah a om lai, kote a hong that mite tungah cik ciangin thu khenin, kote hong thahna hangin cik ciangin phu la ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation6:11 Tua ciangin amaute tungah puan tualpi a kang khat ciat kipia a, amaute a kithah mah bangin a kithat lai ding a naseppihte uh le a sanggamte uh a kim matengin tawl khat sung a tawlngak lai nading uh kigen hi." 
Revelation6:12 Ciaptehna gukna a hon ciangin ka khuadak le nakpi takin zin hong liing a, ni pen puan vom bangin hong vomin, kha pen sisan bangin a hong san hi." 
Revelation6:13 Aksite ahihleh huihpi in theipuam a mutkhiat bangin van panin kia zaizai uh hi. 
Revelation6:14 Laidal a kizial bangin vanpi kizialin maimang a, mual le tuikulhte khempeuh a omna uh panin maimang ta hi." 
Revelation6:15 Tua ciangin leitung kumpite le mi liante, galkap maangte, mihaute le mi vangliante, silate le sila ahi lote a kipanin a kuamah peuh, mual tunga leihawmte sungah bu uh a," 
Revelation6:16 mualte le suangtum lianpite kiangah, “Kote tungah hong kia suk unla, tokhom tungah a tupaʼ maitang le Tuunoʼ hehna panin kote hong liah un." 
Revelation6:17 Amauteʼ hehna hangin gimna hun hong tung ta ahih manin kua in thuak zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. 
Revelation7:1 Tua khit ciangin leitung kiu li ah vantungmi li, kiu khat ah khat ciat dingin leitung, tuipi tung le singkung khat peuhpeuh a mut khak loh nadingin leitung huih lite lencipin a om uh ka mu hi." 
Revelation7:2 Tua ciangin a nungta Pasianʼ ciaptehna a tawi vantungmi khat, nisuahna lam panin hong pai to ka mu hi. Leitung le tuipi suksiat theih nading vangliatna a kipia vantungmi lite kiangah amah in nakpi takin gen a," 
Revelation7:3 “I Pasianʼ nasemte, a taltang uh ah ciaptehna i bawl khit matengin leitung, tuipi le singkungte susia nai kei in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation7:4 Israel mite sung panin a namnamin Pasianʼ ciaptehna tawh a taltang uh ah a kiciamteh mi a vekpi-in 144,000 pha hi, ci-in hong kigen hi." 
Revelation7:5 Tuate pen Israel minam sawm le nih sungah nam khat ah then khat tul nih ciat hi a, tua minamte pen Judah minam, Reuben minam, Gad minam, Asher minam, Naftali minam, Manasseh minam, Simeon minam, Levi minam, Issakhar minam, Zebulun minam, Josef minam le Benjamin minam ahi uh hi."
