Revelation7:8  
Revelation7:9 Tua khit ciangin ka khuadak leh mi namkim, pau namkim panin kuama sim zawh loh dingin a tam mahmah mihonpite, tokhom mai le Tuuno mai ah ding uh a, puan pak silhin a khut uh ah nisuh hiang a tawi uh ka mu hi." 
Revelation7:10 Amaute nakpi takin awngin, “Tokhom tungah a tu i Pasian le Tuuno pen eite a hong hon khia ahi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation7:11 Tokhom, upate le ganhing lite kimkot ah vantungmi khempeuh dingin tokhom mai ngatin kunin Pasian bia uh a," 
Revelation7:12 “Amen! Eiteʼ Pasian in phatna, minthanna, pilna, lungdamkohna, pahtawina, vangliatna le hatna a tawntungin nei tahen! Amen,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation7:13 Tua laitakin upate khat in keima kiangah, “Hih puan pak a silh mite kuate hi a, koi lai panin hong pai ahi uh hiam?” ci-in hong dot ciangin," 
Revelation7:14 “Ka thei kei hi, topa aw. Nangmah in na thei zaw ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in keima kiangah, “Hih mite pen bawlsiatna lianpi thuakin a hong suakta mite ahi uh hi. Amaute in a puan uh sawp siangin Tuuno sisan tawh a paaksak uh ahi hi." 
Revelation7:15 Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ tokhom mai ah amaute ding uh a, sun le zanin a biakinn sungah ama na sem uh hi. Tokhom tungah a tupa in amaute ompihin a hu ding hi." 
Revelation7:16 Amaute gilkial cih om nawn lo dinga, a dang uh zong taak nawn lo ding hi. Nisa zong thuak kha nawn lo ding uh a, a sa in zong kaang kha nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation7:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Tokhom laizang ah a om Tuuno, amaute a kem pa hi dinga, nuntakna tui omna ah amaute paipih dinga, Pasian in a khitui khempeuh uh nulsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation8:1 Tuuno in ciaptehna sagihna a hon ciangin vantungah nai lang sung bang kidai dide hi. 
Revelation8:2 Tua ciangin Pasian mai ah a ding vantungmi sagihte ka mu a, amaute tungah peengkul sagih a kipia hi." 
Revelation8:3 Tua ciangin kham kibawl paknamtui kuang a tawi vantungmi a dang khat hong pai-in biakna tau mai ah a ding hi. Pasianʼ mite in thungetna-in a zat paknamtuite tawh hal beh ding le tokhom mai ah a om kham kibawl biakna tau tungah piak dingin amaute tungah paknamtui tampi tak a kipia hi. 
Revelation8:4 Pasianʼ mai ah a ding vantung mipaʼ khut sung panin paknamtui khu le Pasianʼ miteʼ thungetna van lam manawhin kizial to hi. 
Revelation8:5 Tua ciangin tua vantungmi in paknamtui kuang la a, biakna tau panin mei-am la-in a sungah a koih khit ciangin leitungah lawn suk a, nakpi takin van gingin zin liing a, khua phia-in keek a kia hi." 
Revelation8:6 Tu-in peengkul sagih a tawi vantungmi sagihte a peengkul uh a tum dingin hong kithawi uh hi. 
Revelation8:7 A masa vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, gialpi le mei, sisan tawh kihelin leitungah a kia suk hi. Leitung seh thum suah seh khat le lopa hing seh thum suah seh khat a kaang tum hi." 
Revelation8:8 A nihna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, mual lianpi tawh a kibang, mei in kaangin a kuang zuazua khat, tuipi sungah kilawnsuk hi." 
Revelation8:9 Tuipi seh thum suah seh khat sisan suakin, tuipi sunga om ganhingte seh thum suah seh khat si a, teembaw seh thum suah seh khat a kisia hi." 
Revelation8:10 A thumna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantung panin aksi lian khat meikuang bangin hong kia sukin gunte le tuinakte seh thum suah seh khat tungah a tu hi." 
Revelation8:11 Tua aksi a min Gamsaai hi a, tui seh thum suah seh khat gamsaai tui suak a, tua tui khasak ahih manin a dawn mi tampi tak a si uh hi." 
Revelation8:12 A lina vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, ni seh thum suah seh khat kisat khia-in, kha zong seh thum suah seh khat mah kisat khia a, aksi zong seh thum suah seh khat mah kisat khia ahih manin a taanna uh seh thum suah seh khat ciat a bei hi. Sunin hun seh thum suah seh khat tang khua vak lo a, zanin zong hun seh thum suah seh khat tang mah kha le aksi taang lo hi." 
Revelation8:13 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh vankim lai ah muvanlai khat a leen kawmin nakpi-in ham a, “Vantungmi a dang thumte in a hong tum lai ding peengkulte hangin leitungah a teeng mi tungah gimna, gimna, gimna lianpi hong tung ding hi,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation9:1 Tua ciangin a ngana vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantung panin leitungah aksi khat a leeng suk ka mu hi. Tua aksi tungah kuahawm thukpi honna tawhtang a kipia hi." 
Revelation9:2 Amah in tua kuahawm thukpi a hon ciangin meiphual pi panin meikhu bangin meikhu tampi hong pusuak a, tua meikhu hangin ni mialin khim a zing hi." 
Revelation9:3 Tua meikhu sung panin kauphete hong pusuakin leitungah pai uh a, momaiteʼ neih bangin a gupha mahmah amaute tungah a kipia hi." 
Revelation9:4 Amaute in lopate, singkungte a kipan a hing khat peuhpeuh bangmah cih loin, a taltang uh ah Pasianʼ ciaptehna a om lo mite bek a gimsak nadingun thu a kipia hi." 
Revelation9:5 Amaute in tua bang mite that loin kha nga sung a bawlsiat nading uh thu kipia a, amauteʼ bawlsiatna pen momai in mi a deh ciangin a na tawh kibangin a na velval ahi hi." 
Revelation9:6 Tua hun ciangin mite in a sih theih nading uh a zonzon uh hangin sih theih nading lampi mu lo ding uh a, si nuam mahmah napi-un si thei het lo ding uh hi." 
Revelation9:7 Tua kaupheteʼ pianzia pen galsim dingin a kithawi sakolte tawh kibang uh hi. A lu tung uh ah kham lukhu tawh a kibang khu uh a, a maitang uh mihing maitang tawh a kibang hi." 
Revelation9:8 A sam uh numei sam tawh kibang a, a ha uh humpinelkai ha tawh a kibang hi." 
Revelation9:9 A awm uh, sik-awmdal tawh a kibang pian in tuam a, a khazap uh a gingte pen gal kido laitakin sakol in a kaih leeng tampiteʼ gin tawh a kibang hi." 
Revelation9:10 Momai bangin mei nei-in mi deh thei uh a, tua a mei uh tawh mihingte kha nga sung gimsak theih nading gu a nei uh hi." 
Revelation9:11 Amaute in tua kuahawm thukpi a uk vantungmi pen kumpi-in nei uh a, tua vantungmi a min pen Hebru pau-in Abaddon hi a, Grik pau-in Apollion hi a, “A Susia pa,” a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Revelation9:12 Tu-in gimna khatna a beina hi ta a, ahi zongin gimna nam nih hong tung lai ding a om hi." 
Revelation9:13 Tua ciangin a gukna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, Pasianʼ mai ah a om kham kibawl biakna tau kiu lite panin awging khat ka za hi." 
Revelation9:14 Tua awging in peengkul a tawi vantungmi a gukna kiangah, “Eufratis Gun lianpi ah a kihencip vantungmi lite khah khia in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation9:15 Tua ahih manin leitung mi khempeuh seh thum suah seh khat a thah ding uh a kum, a kha, a ni, a nai hun ngakin a kiging sa-in a om tua vantungmi lite a kikhah khia hi." 
Revelation9:16 Mi a that ding sakol tung tuang galkap mak sawm nih pha hi, ci-in hong kigen hi." 
Revelation9:17 Ka mang sungah ka muh sakolte le a tungah a tuangte pen hih bang ahi hi: Sakol tung tuangte in mei bangin a san, sapfaia suangmanpha bangin a dum, kat bangin a eng, awmdal a bulh uh hi. A sakol lutangte pen humpinelkai lutang tawh kibang a, a kam uh panin meikuang, meikhu le kat a pusuak hi." 
Revelation9:18 Hih sakolteʼ kam panin a hong pusuak meikuang, meikhu le kat, hih gimna nam thumte in leitung mi seh thum suah seh khat a sisak hi." 
Revelation9:19 Hih sakolte in a kam le a mei uh ah gu nei uh a, a meite un gul tawh kibangin lutang nei ahih manin a meite uh tawh mi a liamsak uh hi." 
Revelation9:20 Hih gimna tawh a si lo midangte pen amauʼ gamtatna sa panin kikhelkik nuam lo uh hi. Dawi a biaknate uh, khua a mu thei lo, khua a za thei lo, lam a pai thei lo ngun, kham, sumngo, suang le sing a kibawl milim a biakte uh khawl tuan lo uh hi." 
Revelation9:21 A mi thahna, a aisanna, a paktatna le a guktaaknate uh zong khawl tuan lo uh hi." 
Revelation10:1 Tua ciangin a thahat vantungmi khat, meiipi in tuamin, a lu tungah sakhituihup khimin, a maitang nitaang tawh kibangin, a khete meikuang khuampi tawh a kibang khat, vantung panin a hong kum suk ka mu hi." 
Revelation10:2 A khut sungah laizial neu khat phel sa-in a tawi hi. A taklam khe in tuipi sung sikin, a veilam khe in leitung sik a," 
Revelation10:3 nakpi takin kiko ahih manin humpinelkai hawk tawh a kibang hi. Tua bangin a kiko ciangin van sagih a gingte in a dawng hi. 
Revelation10:4 Tua van sagih a gingteʼ thugen a man khit phetin tua a thugente lai ah a gelh dingin ka kithawi hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin awging khat ka za a, “Tua thute lai ah gelh kei inla, tua van sagih a gingteʼ thugen imcip in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:5 Tua ciangin tuipi le leitung kalkakin a ding ka muh vantungmi in vantung lamah a taklam khut laam to-in," 
Revelation10:6 a nungta tawntung, vantung le a sunga om khempeuh, leitung le a sunga om khempeuh le tuipi le a sunga om khempeuh a bawl Pasianʼ min tawh kiciam a, “Tu-in zekai nawn het lo ding hi." 
Revelation10:7 A sagihna vantungmi in a peengkul a tum ciangin ama nasem kamsangte tungah a gen sa bangin Pasian in ama ip thusim a geelte hong sem khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation10:8 Tua ciangin vantung panin awging ka zak in kei kiangah thu hong genkik a, “Tuipi le leitung kalkakin a ding vantungmiʼ khut sungah a om laizial kiphel sa pen va la in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:9 Tua ahih manin vantungmi kiangah va pai-in tua laizial neu a hong piak nadingin ka va gen leh amah in, “La inla, ne in. Na gil sung a tun ciangin thuk mahmah dinga, ahi zongin na kam sungah khuaizu bangin khum mahmah ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:10 Kei zong tua vantungmiʼ khut sung panin a laizial neu la-in ka ne hi. Ka kam ah khuaizu bangin khum dekdak a, ahi zongin ka nek khit ciangin ka gil sung thuk velvalsak hi." 
Revelation10:11 Tua ciangin keima kiangah, “Minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zangte le kumpite tungah a piang ding thu na gen ding kisam lai hi,” hong kici hi." 
Revelation11:1 Tua ciangin ciangkhut tawh a kibang teh nading ciang khat kei kiangah hong kipia a, “Pai inla, Pasianʼ biakinn le biakna tau le tua lai ah Pasian a bia mite va teh in." 
Revelation11:2 Ahi zongin biakinn pualam tualte teh kei in. Minam dangteʼ khut sungah kipia khin a, amaute in kha sawm li le nih sung Khuapi Siangtho tuancil gawp ding uh ahih manin tua a tualte teh loin nusia lel in." 
Revelation11:3 Ka teci nihte puanhampi silhin ka paisak dinga, amaute in ni tul khat za nih sawm guk sung Pasianʼ thu a gen ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation11:4 Tua teci nihte pen leitung Topa mai ah a om oliv kung nihte le meivakna nihte ahi uh hi. 
Revelation11:5 Mi khatpeuh in amaute suksiat ding hanciam leh amauteʼ kam panin meikuang pusuakin a galte a kaang tum hi. Amaute suksiat ding a hanciam peuhpeuh tua bangin kisusia hi. 
Revelation11:6 Amauteʼ ut hunhunin a thugen laitakun guah zu losak thei uh a, tuite sisan a suahsak theih nadingun vangliatna nei uh a, leitungah gimna a tuamtuam tungsak thei uh hi." 
Revelation11:7 Amaute in Pasianʼ thu genin a teci panna a zawh khit uh ciangin kuahawm thukpi sung panin a hong paikhia ganhing in tua teci pangte simin zo gawpin that dinga," 
Revelation11:8 singlamteh tungah amauteʼ Topa a kithahna mun Sodom ahih kei leh Egypt minkhem a pua khuapi kongzing ah a luanghawm uh kipaidak ding hi. 
Revelation11:9 Mi namkim, pau namkim a zang mi tuamtuamte in ni thum le ni lang sung amauteʼ luanghawm en ding uh a, a luanghawmte a kivui ding phal lo ding uh hi." 
Revelation11:10 Teci a pang tua kamsang nihte in leitung mite tungah gimna nakpi takin tungsak uh ahih manin hih mi nihte a sihna hangin lungdamin pawi bawl ding uh a, a nuamna uh hangin khatlekhat letsong kipia ding uh hi." 
Revelation11:11 Ahi zongin ni thum le ni lang a cin khit ciangin amaute sungah Pasian kiang panin nuntakna hu lutin, amaute a khe-un hong ding uh ahih manin a mute khempeuh nakpi takin lau mahmah uh hi." 
Revelation11:12 Tua ciangin tua teci pang nihte in, “Hih lai ah hong pai un,” ci-in vantung panin a kisapna awging a za uh hi. Tua ahih manin a galte uhʼ muhin vantung meiipi sungah pai to uh hi." 
Revelation11:13 Tua hun laitakin nakpi takin zin liing a, a khuapi seh sawm suah seh khat tang ding kisiacip a, tua zin liing in mi tul sagih a sisak hi. A si lo a hing laite lau mahmah uh a, vantung Pasian a liatna thu a phat uh hi." 
Revelation11:14 Gimna nihna a bei hi ta a, ahi zongin gimna a thumna hong tung baih ta ding hi." 
Revelation11:15 Tua ciangin a sagihna vantungmi in a peengkul hong tum a, vantungah nakpi takin aw hong ging a, “Leitung uk nading aana neihna pen i Topa Khris aʼ hong suak khin a, amah in a tawntungin uk paisuak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation11:16 Pasian mai-a a tokhom ciat uh ah a tu upa sawm nih le lite zong maipukin Pasian bia uh a," 
Revelation11:17 “A beisa hun le tu hunah a om tawntung a Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, tu-in na vangliatna zangin uk ding hong kipan khin na hih manin nangma tungah ka nuamna uh kong ko uh hi." 
Revelation11:18 Na hehna hong kilat hun hong tung ta a, misite thukhen nading hun hong tung ta ahih manin minam dangte heh mahmah uh hi. Nangma nasem kamsangte, a lian a neu, nang hong kihta mi khempeuhte thaman na piak ding hun hi ta a, leitung a susia mite na suksiat ding hun hi ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation11:19 Tua ciangin vantungah a om Pasian biakna innpi kihong a, a Thuciamna Singkuang zong biakinn sungah a om a kimu hi. Tua ciangin nakpi takin khua phia-in a ging lianpi om a, van gingin zin liing a, gialpi a kia hi." 
Revelation12:1 Tua ciangin vanah lim lamdang lian khat hong kilang hi. Puan silh bangin ni silhin, a khe nuai ah kha omin, aksi sawm le nih a kisuanna lukhu, a lu tungah a khu numei khat om hi." 
Revelation12:2 Tua numei naupaii hi a, nausuah natna tung ta ahih manin na sa-in a kiko hi." 
Revelation12:3 Tua ciangin lim lamdang a dang khat mah vanah hong kilang leuleu hi. Gulpi san a lian mahmah khat om a, lutang sagih le ki sawm nei a, a lutang sagihte ah lukhu mah nei ciat hi." 
Revelation12:4 A mei tawh vanah a om aksi seh thum suah seh khat vat khia-in leilak a denna hi. A nau a suah phetin a ne pah dingin nausuak dingin a kithawi tua numeiʼ mai ah a ding hi. 
Revelation12:5 Tua ciangin tua numei in leitung minam khempeuh sik ciangkhut tawh a uk ding ta pasal khat hong nei hi. Ahi zongin tua naungek pen thakhatin kilakhia-in Pasian a tutna a tokhom ah a kipaipih hi. 
Revelation12:6 A numei pen Pasian in ama adingin a bawl kholhsakna mun gamlak ah tai a, tua munah ni tul khat za nih sawm guk sung kikhoi ding hi." 
Revelation12:7 Tu-in vantungah gal kidona hong om a, Mikhael le a vantung mite in gulpi le a vantung mite a do uh hi." 
Revelation12:8 Ahi zongin tua gulpi guallel ahih manin tua gulpi le a vantung mite, vantungah ki-omsak nawn lo hi." 
Revelation12:9 Tua ciangin tua tanglai gulpi, Dawimangpa ahih kei leh Satan a kici, leitung mi khempeuh a khem pa pen a vantung mite tawh leitungah kilawnsuk hi." 
Revelation12:10 Tua ciangin vantungah nakpi takin awging khat ka za a, “Tu-in Pasian in hong hon khia khinta a, kumpi vangliatna a neihna hong lak khia khinta a, ama Khris in aana a neihna thu lak khia khinta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sun a zanin eiteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah dingin i sanggamte mawhsakna a gen tawntung pa, tu-in vantung panin kilawn khia khinta hi." 
Revelation12:11 I sanggamte in Tuuno sisan le thuman a genna uh tawh amah na zo uh a, a nuntakna nangawn uh na pia ngam uh hi." 
Revelation12:12 Tua ahih manin vantungte le tuate sungah a teeng mi khempeuh aw, lungdam un! Ahi zongin vantung panin Dawimangpa hong kilawn khia suk a, hun tomno bek a nei lai ahih lam thei ahih manin leitung le tui tungah a omte adingin lauhuai mahmah ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation12:13 Gulpi in leitungah a kilawn khia khin ahih lam a kitheih ciangin ta pasal a nei nupi a delh dingin hong kithawi hi. 
Revelation12:14 Ahi zongin tua gulpi in a sukkhak theih loh nadingin kum thum le alang sung gamlak ah a kikep nading munah a leentheih nadingin muvanlai gol mahmahteʼ kha tawh a kibang kha nih tua numei a kiguan hi. 
Revelation12:15 Gulpi in zong tuikhang tawh tua numei a taihsak theih nadingin a kam panin gunpi luang bangin tua numeiʼ nungah tui a luangsak hi. 
Revelation12:16 Ahi zongin leitung in tua numei na huh a, gulpi kam panin a luang tuite a kam tawh na hup kang hi." 
Revelation12:17 Tua ciangin tua numei tungah gulpi heh mahmah a, tua numeiʼ suanlekhak dangte ahi, Pasianʼ thupiakna zui-in, Jesu thu ah kip takin a om mite a sim dingin kuan khia a," 
Revelation12:18 tuipi gei ah dingin a om hi. 
Revelation13:1 Tua laitakin tuipi sung panin ganhing khat a hong pusuak ka mu hi. Tua ganhing in ki sawm le lutang sagih nei a, a ki sawmte tungah lukhu khat ciat om a, a lutang sagihte tungah min hoih lo khat ciat a kigelh hi." 
Revelation13:2 Tua ka muh ganhing pen kamkei tawh kibang a, a khete vom khe tawh kibang a, a kam pen humpinelkai kam tawh a kibang hi. Gulpi in tua ganhing tungah ama vangliatna, ama tokhom le aana lianpi a pia hi." 
Revelation13:3 A lutang khat in sih nading zahin liamma lianpi nei ngei napi-in damkik a, leitung mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in tua ganhing a zui ngeingai uh hi." 
Revelation13:4 Gulpi in tua ganhing tungah ama aana pia ahih manin mite in tua gulpi a bia uh hi. A ganhing zong bia uh a, “Hih ganhing tawh a kibang kua om a, kua in amah su zo ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Revelation13:5 Tua ganhing, kiphatsakna le kam khel nono a pau theih nading le kha sawm le nih sung aana a zat theih nadingin thu kipia hi." 
Revelation13:6 Tua ahih manin Pasian, ama min, a omna mun le vantungah a omte khempeuh samsia-in a ko gawpgawp hi." 
Revelation13:7 Pasianʼ mite simin a zawh gawp theih nading zong kiphal hi. Minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zang mite khempeuh tungah uk theih nading aana a kipia hi." 
Revelation13:8 Tua ahih manin a kigo Tuuno laibu sungah a nungta ding miteʼ min, leitung pianmapekin a kikhumna ah a kihel lo leitung mi khempeuh in tua ganhing bia ding uh hi." 
Revelation13:9 “Salin a pai dingin a kiseh sa mite sal mahin pai dinga, namsau-in thah dingin a kiseh sate namsau mah tawh kithat ding hi. Tua ahih manin Pasianʼ mite in upna le thuak zawhna kisam hi,” a kicihna thu, zak nading bil a neite in za ta uh hen." 
Revelation13:10  
Revelation13:11 Tua ciangin lei sung panin a hong pusuak ganhing a dang khat ka mu hi. Tua ganhing in tuu bangin ki nih nei a, a kampau zia pen gulpi kampau tawh kibang hi." 
Revelation13:12 Tua ganhing masa a omna mahah ganhing masaʼ aana khempeuh zang a, a liamma a dam sa tua ganhing masa pen leitung le a tunga om mi khempeuh, aana tawh a biasak hi." 
Revelation13:13 Tua ganhing nihna in nalamdang lian pipi bawl a, mi khempeuhteʼ muhin van panin leitungah meikuang nangawn a kiasak thei hi." 
Revelation13:14 Ganhing masa omna ah nalamdang bawl theih nading thu ngah ahih manin a nalamdang bawlna tawh leitungah a om mi khempeuh khem a, namsau tawh a si ding zahin a kisat liam sa hi napi a nungta lai ganhing pahtawi nading milim khat a bawl nadingun a gen hi." 
Revelation13:15 Tua ganhing nihna in ganhing masa lim dingin a kibawl milim sungah a hu a muap ciangin hong pau thei a, tua milim a bia lo khempeuh a thah theih nadingin thu a ngah hi." 
Revelation13:16 Tua ganhing in a lian a neu, a hau a zawng, sila le sila ahi lo, mi khempeuh in a taklam khut tung uh ahih kei leh a taltang uh ah ciaptehna a neih nadingun thu a pia hi." 
Revelation13:17 Tua ahih manin tua ganhing min ahih kei leh a min tangin a nambat ciaptehna a tungah a nei lo mi peuhmah, vanlei vanzuakin paikhia thei lo uh hi." 
Revelation13:18 Hih thu ah pilna kisam hi. Hih nambat pen 666 hi a, mihing khat min tangin a ding hi a, mi pil mi tei peuhpeuhte in hih ganhing nambat a cihnopna thei ding uh hi." 
Revelation14:1 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh Zion Mual tungah Tuuno adingin a om ka mu hi. Amah tawh mi tul za le tul sawm li le tul li ding khawm uh a, tua miteʼ taltang ah Tuuno le a paʼ min kigelh hi." 
Revelation14:2 Tua laitakin tuizeu lianpi le vanging tawh a kibang a gingpha mahmah aw khat vantung panin a hong ging ka za hi. Tua awging pen harp lasakna a kitum a ging tawh kibang hi. 
Revelation14:3 Tokhom, ganhing lite le upateʼ lam nga-in tua mihonpite in la thak khat a sa uh hi. Tua la pen leitungah a kitan khia sa mi tul za le tul sawm li le tul lite sim loh kuamah dang in sa thei lo uh hi." 
Revelation14:4 Hih mite in numei tawh paktatna gamta ngei nai lo uh a, paubaanna a nei lote ahi uh hi. Amaute in Tuuno a paina peuhpeuh ah zui uh a, midang khempeuh sung panin a kitan khia sa, Pasian le Tuuno tungah a kipia masa mite ahi uh hi." 
Revelation14:5 Amaute, paubaanna om kiuhkeuh lo uh ahih manin zuau thu gen ngei het lo uh hi." 
Revelation14:6 Tua ciangin leitungah a teeng mi namkim, pau namkim a zang mite tungah a tawntungin Lungdam nading Thu gen ding a nei vantungmi khat vankim lai ah a leeng ka mu hi." 
Revelation14:7 Amah nakpi takin kiko a, “Amah in mihingte thu a khen ding hun hong tung ta ahih manin Pasian kihta unla amah phat un. Vanlelei, tuinak le tuipite a bawlpa hong bia ta un,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi a nihna in hong zui a, “A Lian Babylon khuapi kicim, kicim! Amah a huk a lanna leenggahzu, mi khempeuh tungah pia-in khamsak a, gimna thuaksak hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:9 Tua ciangin vantungmi a thumna in a masa tegel hong zui leuleu-in nakpi takin, “Tua ganhing le a lim bia-in a taltang ahih kei leh a khut tungah ciaptehna a ngah mi peuhmah in," 
Revelation14:10 Pasianʼ leenggahzu zong dawn ding uh hi. Pasian in ama hehna ahi leenggahzu khauh pen ama hehna hai sungah a dimtakin sung khinzo ta hi. Tua bang mite pen a siangtho vantung mite le Tuuno mai ah meikuang le kat khu tawh gimna kipia ding hi. 
Revelation14:11 Amaute a kibawlsiatna mei, khu tawntung a, ganhing le a lim bia-in, a min kigelhna a nei mi peuhmah in a sun a zanin tatsat loin gimna thuak paisuak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:12 Pasianʼ thupiakna zui-in Jesu tungah a citak Pasianʼ mite adingin thuak zawhna kisam hi. 
Revelation14:13 Tua ciangin vantung panin awging khat ka za a, “Tu a kipanin Topa thu ah a si mite mi hampha mahmah ahi hi, cihna gelh in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kha Siangtho in, “Hi takpi hi. Amauteʼ nasepna thaman in amaute zui ding ahih manin a nasep gimna panun tawlnga-in nuamsa-in om ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Revelation14:14 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh meiipi a bang a kang biakbuak om a, tua meiipi tungah mihing tawh a kibang khat tu-in, kham lukhu khu-in, a khut ah phiaukawi hiam khat a tawi ka mu hi." 
Revelation14:15 Biakinn sung panin vantungmi khat hong paikhia a, meiipi tungah a tu mipa nakpi takin samin, “Leitung mite lak dingin min mahmah a, a lak hun hong tung ta ahih manin na phiaukawi tawh at in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:16 Tua ahih manin meii tungah a tupa in leitungah a phiaukawi hong van a, leitung mite a at hi." 
Revelation14:17 Tua ciangin vantung biakinn panin vantungmi a dang khat hong paikhia leuleu a, amah in zong phiaukawi hiam khat mah a tawi hi." 
Revelation14:18 Tua ciangin biakna tau panin vantungmi a dang khat hong paikhia leuleu hi. Tua vantungmi pen mei a ukpa hi a, phiaukawi hiam a tawipa kiangah nakpi takin, “Leitung mite leenggah bangin min ta ahih manin leitung mite na phiaukawi tawh atin a lomlomin kaikhawm in,” a ci hi." 
Revelation14:19 Tua ahih manin vantungmi in zong leitungah a phiaukawi hong van a, leitung mite kaikhawmin Pasianʼ hehna lian leenggah cilna phualah a kaikhawm hi." 
Revelation14:20 Khuapi pua lamah kicil a, a cilna panin sisan vive luang khia-in, pi nga bang thukin, tai za nih ciang bangah tuikhang bangin a luang hi." 
Revelation15:1 Tua ciangin vanah nalamdang lian mahmah khat ka mu hi. Gimna nam sagih a hong keng vantungmi sagih om uh a, Pasianʼ hehna a lah tawpna uh ahih manin a nunung pente ahi uh hi." 
Revelation15:2 Tua ciangin mei tawh a kihel limlang peekpi kiphah tuipi tawh a kibang ka mu hi. Ganhing, a lim le a min nambat tawh a kipia sa a zote, Pasianʼ lasakna harpte tawi-in tuipi tawh a kibang gei ah a ding uh hi." 
Revelation15:3 Amaute in Pasianʼ nasem Moses la le Tuuno la sa uh a, “A Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na nasepnate lamdangin lian mahmah hi. Khang tawntung a Kumpipa aw, na nasepnate ah thumanin na thutang hi." 
Revelation15:4 Topa aw, nang, kua in hong kihta lo dinga, na liatna hong phat lo ding ahi hiam? Nang bek na siangtho hi. Thumanin na sepnate mi khempeuh in mu uh ahih manin minam khempeuh nang kiangah hong pai-in, na mai ah hong bia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation15:5 Tua khit ciangin ka khuadak leh a sungah Pasianʼ Ompihna Mun a om vantung biakinn a kihong ka mu hi. 
Revelation15:6 Tua biakinn sung panin vantungmi sagih, gimna sagih tawh hong pusuak uh a, puan pak silhin, kham awmgak tawh a awm uh a gak uh hi." 
Revelation15:7 Ganhing lite sung panin khat in a nungta tawntung Pasianʼ hehna a dim hai sagih, vantungmi sagihte kiangah a pia hi." 
Revelation15:8 Tua biakinn sungah Pasianʼ minthanna le a vangliatna khu kidim ahih manin, vantungmi sagihte in hong paipih gimna sagih a ven matengin biakinn sungah kuamah lut thei lo uh hi." 
Revelation16:1 Tua ciangin biakinn panin awging khat in vantungmi sagihte kiangah, “Leitungah va pai unla, hai sungah a om Pasianʼ hehnate va sung khia un,” ci-in awging lianpi tawh a genna ka za hi." 
Revelation16:2 Tua ahih manin a khatna vantungmi va pai-in leitungah hai va bung a, a tungah ganhing ciaptehna a neite le a lim a bia mite tungah a kihhuai meima a na mahmah hong piang hi." 
Revelation16:3 A nihna vantungmi in tuipi tungah a hai hong bung a, tuipi tuite misiteʼ sisan tawh kibang hong suak ahih manin tuipi sungah a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh a si hi." 
Revelation16:4 A thumna vantungmi in gunte le tuinakte tungah a hai hong bung a, a tui khempeuh sisan a hong suak hi." 
Revelation16:5 Tua ciangin tuite a uk vantungmi in, “A beisa hun a kipanin tu hun dongin a om a Siangtho Pa aw, hih bangin na thukhenna ah nang na thuman hi." 
Revelation16:6 Amaute in mi siangthote le kamsangteʼ sisan luangsak uh ahih manin tu-in amauteʼ dawn dingin sisan a pia na hi hi. Hih pen amauteʼ ngah dingin a kilawm ahi hi,” a cihna thu ka za hi." 
Revelation16:7 Tua ciangin biakna tau panin aw khat hong ging a, “A Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na thukhennate thumanin thutang hi,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Revelation16:8 A lina vantungmi in ni tungah a hai hong bung a, ni in a satna tawh mite a kaang gawp hi." 
Revelation16:9 Nisa in mite kaang gawp ahih manin mite in hih gimna tawh kisai ah thu a nei Pasian a samsia uh hi. Ahi zongin a mawhna uh panin kisikin Pasian a phat ding uh ut lo uh hi. 
Revelation16:10 A ngana vantungmi in ganhing tokhom tungah a hai hong bung a, tua ganhingʼ ukna gam sung tengah khua hong mial hi. Mite in na a sak manun a leii pet uh a," 
Revelation16:11 a meimate uh na a sak manun vantung Pasian a samsia uh hi. Ahi zongin a gamtat siatna uh panin kisik nuam lo uh hi. 
Revelation16:12 A gukna vantungmi in Eufratis Gun lianpi tungah a hai hong bung a, nisuahna lam kumpite hong pai nading lam a bawl kholhna-in a tuite hong kangcip hi." 
Revelation16:13 Tua ciangin gulpi kam sung, ganhing kam sung le a man lo kamsang paʼ kam sung panin uiphuk tawh a kibang kha gilo thum a hong pusuak ka mu hi." 
Revelation16:14 Tuate pen dawiteʼ kha hi a, nalamdang a bawl uh hi. A Vanglian Pasianʼ Ni hong tun ciangin gal a do dingin leitung gam khempeuh ah a om kumpite a kaikhawm dingin a kuan khia uh hi." 
Revelation16:15 (“Na ngai un! Guta bangin kei ka hong pai hi. Mihon lakah guaktangin pai-in maizumna a ngah khak loh nadingun a puante uh kemin, pilvang khua phawkin a om mite a hampha ahi uh hi.”)" 
Revelation16:16 Tua khate in Hebru pau-in Armageddon a kici munah kumpite a kaikhawm uh hi. 
Revelation16:17 A sagihna vantungmi in huih lakah a hai hong bung a, biakinn sung tokhom panin nakpi takin aw khat hong gingin, “Man khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation16:18 Tua ciangin khua hong phia-in, a ging lianpi hong om a, van hong gingin nakpi takin zin hong liing hi. Zin liing khempeuh lakah a husia pen ahih manin mihing a pian zawh hih bang zin liing omngei nai lo hi." 
Revelation16:19 Khuapi phel thum kisuah a, gam sunga om khuapi dang khempeuh kisia hi. Pasian in Babylon khuapi mangngilh lo a, ama hehna ahi leenggahzu a hai sung panin Babylon khuapi a dawnsak hi." 
Revelation16:20 Tuikulh khempeuh mangthang a, mual khempeuh maimang hi." 
Revelation16:21 Gial gol pipi, khat ciangin tawi sawm thum val a gik, van panin mite tungah hong kia hi. Tua gimna nasia lua ahih manin tua gialte hangin mite in Pasian a samsia uh hi." 
Revelation17:1 Tua ciangin hai sagih a tawi vantungmi sagihte sung panin kei kiangah khat hong pai a, “Hong pai in; gun tampi gei ah a kilam a paktat mahmah khuapi gimna a kipiak zia ding kong lak ding hi." 
Revelation17:2 Leitung kumpite in tua a paktat mahmah nu tawh gamtat hoih lo gamta uh a, leitung mite in ama paktatna leenggahzu dawnin a kham uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation17:3 Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin ka om a, vantungmi in gamlak mun khat ah hong tunpih hi. Tua lai ah, a tungah min hoih lo nam tuamtuam a dimin a kigelh ganhing a san khat tungah numei khat a tu ka mu hi. Tua ganhing in lutang sagih le ki sawm a nei hi." 
Revelation17:4 Tua numei in puan a dupsan le a ausan silh a, kham, suangmanpha le kep kibawl kizepna a tuamtuamte tawh a pumpi dimin kizem a, a paktatna hangin a kihhuai a nin mahmah nate a dimin a omna kham hai khat a tawi hi." 
Revelation17:5 A taltang tungah, “A paktat numeite le leitung kihhuainate khempeuh a pianna, A Lian Babylon Khuapi,” ci-in khiatna tuam khat a nei min a kigelh hi." 
Revelation17:6 Tua ciangin mi siangthote le Jesu tungah a cihtak uh manin a kithat miteʼ sisan dawnin zukham a batna ka mu hi. Tua numei ka muh ciangin lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. 
Revelation17:7 Ahi zongin vantungmi in keima kiangah, “Bang hangin lamdang sa na hi hiam? Tua numei le amah a pua, lutang sagih le ki sawm a nei ganhing a cihnopna thu kong gen ding hi." 
Revelation17:8 Tua na muh ganhing nidangin a om hangin tu-in om nawn lo hi. Ahi zongin tu-in kuahawm thukpi panin hong pusuakin sihna a thuak dingin paikhia ding hi. Tua ganhing nidangin omngei a, tu-in om nawn lo napi-in khatvei hong kilangkik ding ahih manin, a nungta miteʼ min a kikhumna laibu sungah leitung pian ma-in a kigelh nai lo, tu laitakin leitungah a om mite in tua ganhing a et uh ciangin lamdang sa ding uh hi." 
Revelation17:9 Hih thu ah pilna le thutheihna kisam hi. Lutang sagihte pen tua numei a tutna mual sagih ahi hi. 
Revelation17:10 Tua lutang sagihte pen kumpi sagihte zong a cihna ahi hi. Tua kumpi sagihte lakah nga bei zo a, khat in ukna aana nei lai a, khat pen a hong piang lai ding ahi hi. Amah a hong kilat ciangin tomno sung bek om ding hi." 
Revelation17:11 Nidangin omngei a, ahi zongin tu-in a om nawn lo ganhing pen kumpi sagihte tawh a kipawl a kumpi giatna hi a, sihna thuak dingin a pai ding ahi hi." 
Revelation17:12 Ki sawmte pen gam uk dingin a hong kipan nai lo kumpi sawm hi a, ahi zongin a ganhing tawh kumpi aana a neikhawm dingin nai khat sung bek a hun kipia ding hi." 
Revelation17:13 Hih mi sawmte in ngimna khat nei uh a, vangliatna le aana a neih teng uh a ganhing tungah a pia uh hi." 
Revelation17:14 Amaute in Tuuno a sim ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Tuuno pen kumpiteʼ Kumpi, topateʼ Topa ahih manin, amah le ama sap, a teel, citakin amah a zuite in tua kumpi sawmte a zo gawp ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation17:15 Tua ciangin vantungmi in hong gen thuah lai a, “A paktat numei a tutna gun tuite pen minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zang mihonpite ahi hi." 
Revelation17:16 Tua na muh ganhing le a ki sawmte in a paktat numei mudah ding uh hi. Ama neih khempeuh laksakin a pum guakin koih ding uh a, a sa ne-in mei tawh hal tum ding uh hi." 
Revelation17:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama thugente a tun theih nadingin ama deihna bangin amaute in a sepnop nading uh lungsim guan a, lungsim kikhatin ganhing tungah amauʼ ukna aana a piasak hi." 
Revelation17:18 Na muh numei pen leitung kumpi khempeuh tungah ukna a nei khuapi ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation18:1 Tua khit ciangin vantung panin vantung midang khat a hong pai suk ka mu hi. Amah in aana a lian mahmah nei a, ama vang in leitung buppi a taan hi." 
Revelation18:2 Amah nakpi takin kiko a, “A Lian Babylon khuapi kicim, kicim! Tu-in dawiteʼ kua suak khinta-in, kha giloteʼ omna suak khinta a, a kihhuai, a muhdahhuai vasa namkim in omna-in nei ta uh hi." 
Revelation18:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama hukna leenggahzu mi khempeuh dawnsak a, leitung kumpite tawh paktat a, ama hukna hangin leitung sum bawlte in a hauhlawh uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation18:4 Tua ciangin vantung panin aw dang khat ka za a, “Keima mite aw, a mawh gamtatna ah kihel kha-in a gim thuakna thuakpih kha ding na hih manun hong paikhia un." 
Revelation18:5 Ama mawhna in van ban a, a gamtat hoih lohnate Pasian in phawk gige hi." 
Revelation18:6 Amah in note hong bawl bangin ama tungah gamta unla, ama tungah a zah nihin thukkik un. Amah in note a hong dawnsak a zah nihin a khauh leenggahzu ama dawn dingin a hai sungah sung un." 
Revelation18:7 Amah kisialin a kiphatsakna zah tawh a kizui-in dahna le lungkhamna thuaksak un. Amah in, ‘Kei kumpinu ka hi a, meigong numei lah ka hi kei a, dahna ka thuak ngei kei ding hi,’ ci ahih manin," 
Revelation18:8 gimna in ni khat thu-in ban dinga, pulnatna, kahna le kialpi in vat gawp ding hi. Ama tungah thu a khen Topa Pasian vanglian ahih manin mei tawh kihal tum ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation18:9 Amah tawh paktatin a kiphasak khawm leitung kumpite in tua khuapi a katna meikhu a muh uh ciangin dahin a kap ding uh hi. 
Revelation18:10 Ama thuakna kihta-in a gamlapi ah om ding uh a, “Hih a vanglian Babylon khuapi in a thuakna, bangzah takin lauhuai-in, bangzah takin nasia! Nai khat sung bekin hih zah gimna thuak!” ci ding uh hi." 
Revelation18:11 Amauteʼ na zuakte kuamah in lei nawn lo ahih manin leitung sum bawlte zong tua khuapiʼ thuakna hangin dahin a kap uh hi. 
Revelation18:12 A khamte, a ngunte, a suang manphate, a kepte, a puan pakte, a puan sante, a nai puante, a khau sante, a sing namtuite, a sing manphate, a saihate, a sumngote, a sikte, a suangkangte," 
Revelation18:13 a sinnamon sing namtuite, a singteh namtuite, a myrrh paknamtuite, a saledi-te, a leenggahzute, a sathaute, a annelte le mangbuhte, a bawngte le a tuute, a sakolte le a leengte le mihing ahi a silate uh kuamah in lei nawn lo hi." 
Revelation18:14 Tua ahih manin sum bawlte in tua khuapi kiangah, “Deihin na lung gulhgulh na khempeuh maimang ta a, na hauhna le na nopcitna teng bei ta a, cikmah ciangin na ngahkik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation18:15 Tua khuapi sungah sum bawlin a hauhlawh mite in ama thuakna a muh uh ciangin lau-in a gamlapi ah dingin kapin thum ding uh a," 
Revelation18:16 “Hih a lian khuapi in a thuakna, bangzah takin lauhuai, bangzah takin nasia! Puan hoih nono, a dupsan le a sante silhin, kham, suangmanpha le kepte tawh a kizem ngei khuapi!" 
Revelation18:17 Nai khat sungin a hauhna khempeuh maimang ta!” a ci uh hi. Teembaw ukte le a tungah a tuangte, teembaw hawlte le tuipi tungah nuntakna a zongte a gamlapi ah ding uh a," 
Revelation18:18 a khuapi katna khu a muh uh ciangin, “Hih zahin a lian khuapi koi lai ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a kiko uh hi." 
Revelation18:19 A kah a thum kawmun a lu tung uh ah leivui thehin kap uh a, “Tuipi teembaw a nei khempeuh in a hauhlawh uh hih khuapi bangzah takin lauhuai-in nasia ahi hiam? Nai khat sungin maimang ta hi." 
Revelation18:20 Vantung aw, ama siatna hangin lungdam in. Mi siangthote, sawltakte le kamsangte aw, note tungah hong gamtatna hangin Pasian in ama tungah thukhenna pia khinta ahih manin lungdam ta un,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation18:21 Tua ciangin a thahat vantungmi khat in an gawina suang tawh a kibang suang lianpi khat la-in tuipi sung denna a, “A lian Babylon khuapi hih bangin kilawn dinga, kimukik ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation18:22 Harp lasakna a ging le la sateʼ awging, tamngai le peengkul awgingte, nang sungah kiza nawn lo ding hi. Nasem a tuamtuamte nang sungah kimu nawn lo dinga, an gawina a ging zong kiza nawn lo ding hi." 
Revelation18:23 Na sungah meivak taang zong kimu nawn lo dinga, a kiteeng nungak le tangval a lungdamteʼ awging kiza nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na sum bawlte, leitungah a thahat pen hi a, na ai tawh leitung mi khempeuh na khem hi." 
Revelation18:24 Nang Babylon khuapi, hih bangin gim hong kipiakna pen kamsangte le mi siangtho a kithatteʼ sisan le leitungah a kithat mi khempeuhʼ sisan nangma sungah a kimuhna hang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation19:1 Tua khit ciangin vantungah mihonpi a kikona awging tawh a kibang khat ka za a, “Pasian phat un! Hotkhiatna, minthanna le vangliatna pen eiteʼ Pasian-aʼ ahi hi." 
Revelation19:2 A thukhennate thumanin thutang a, a paktatna tawh leitung mi khempeuh a siasak, a paktat nu tungah thu khen khinta a, ama nasemte a thahsakna hangin ama tungah a phu la khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:3 Tua ciangin khatvei kikokik leuleu uh a, “Pasian phat un! Tua khuapi a katna khu tatsat loin van lamah khu to tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:4 Tua ciangin upa sawm nih le lite le ganhing lite in tokhom tungah a tu Pasian mai ah kunin bia uh a, “Amen! Pasian phat un!” a ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:5 Tua ciangin tokhom panin aw khat hong ging a, “Amah a kihta a lian a neu mite, le ama nasem khempeuhte aw, eiteʼ Pasian phat un,” a ci hi." 
Revelation19:6 Tua ciangin tuizeu ging le vanging tawh a kibang mihonpi kikona awging bang khat ka za a, “A Vanglian eiteʼ Topa Pasian kumpi suak khin ahih manin Pasian phat un." 
Revelation19:7 Tuunoʼ zi neih ding hun hong tung ta a, a Lawmnu a kithawi sa-in om khin ahih manin lungdam kipakin amah phat ni." 
Revelation19:8 Puan hoih mahmah, siangin a pak mahmahte, ama silh dingin kipia hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua puan hoih pen Pasianʼ mi siangthoteʼ gamtatna mante ahi hi." 
Revelation19:9 Tua ciangin vantungmi in keima kiangah, “Hih thu gelh in: Tuunoʼ zi neihna pawi ah a kisam mite a hampha mahmah ahi hi,” hong cih khit ciangin, “Hihte pen Pasianʼ gen taktak kammal ahi hi,” hong ci thuah lai hi." 
Revelation19:10 Tua ciangin amah a bia dingin a khe phung ah ka kun suk a, ahi zongin amah in, “Kei hong bia kei in. Kei pen Jesuʼ hong thugente a lenkip nang le na sanggamte khempeuh tawh nasem khawm khat ka hi hi. Pasian bia in!” hong ci hi. Jesuʼ thugen in kamsang nasep sepnop nading lungsim a guan ahi hi." 
Revelation19:11 Tua ciangin vantung a kihong ka mu a, sakol kang khat a om hi. A tungah a tuang pa pen a Citak a Thuman pa kici hi. Amah in thumanin thu khenin gal a do hi." 
Revelation19:12 A mittangte meikuang tawh kibang a, lukhu tampi a khu hi. Amah sim loh kuamah dang in a theih loh min khat ama tungah a kigelh hi." 
Revelation19:13 Sisan sungah a kidiah puan tualpi khat silh a, amah pen, “Pasianʼ Thu,” cihna min tawh a kisam hi." 
Revelation19:14 Vantung galkapte a siangtho puan pak hoih tawh kizem uh a, sakol kangte tungah tuangin amah a zui uh hi." 
Revelation19:15 Minam dangte a zawh gawp nading namsau hiam khat a kam sung panin a pusuak hi. Amah in sik ciangkhut tawh minam dangte ukin, a Vanglian Pasianʼ heh mahmahna tawh leenggah cilna ah leengtui a suk khia ding hi." 
Revelation19:16 A puan tung le a phei tungah, “Kumpiteʼ Kumpi, topateʼ Topa,” ci-in a min kigelh hi." 
Revelation19:17 Tua ciangin ni sungah vantungmi khat a ding ka mu a, amah in vankim lai ah a leeng vasa khempeuh nakpi takin samin, “Pasianʼ pawi lianpi ah a kikhawm dingin hong pai un." 
Revelation19:18 Hong pai unla, kumpiteʼ sa, galkap maangte le galkapteʼ sa, sakolte le a tungah a tuangteʼ sa, a lian a neu, silate le sila ahi lo mi khempeuhteʼ sa hong ne un,” a ci hi." 
Revelation19:19 Tua ciangin sakol tungah a tuang pa le a galkapte a sim dingin ganhing le leitung kumpite a galkapte uh tawh a kikaikhawm ka mu hi. 
Revelation19:20 Tua ciangin a ganhing le tua ganhing omna ah nalamdang a bawl kamsang zuau pa kiman khawm hi. Ganhing ciaptehna a neite le ganhing lim a biate pen tua nalamdangte tawh a kikhem ahi hi. Ganhing le kamsang zuau pa, a nihun kat kikhulna meiphual pi sungah a hingtangun kilawn hi." 
Revelation19:21 Sakol tungah a tuang paʼ kam panin a hong pusuak namsau in amauteʼ galkap khempeuh that lum khin a, vasate khempeuh in a nek zawh zahzahun amauteʼ sa a ne uh hi." 
Revelation20:1 Tua ciangin vantung panin vantungmi khat hong pai sukin, kuahawm thukpi honna tawhtang le sikkhau khainiang golpi khat a tawi ka mu hi." 
Revelation20:2 Amah in tanglai gulpi, Dawimangpa ahih kei leh Satan zong a kici pa manin kum tul khat sung a hencip hi." 
Revelation20:3 Tua ciangin kuahawm thukpi sungah khia suk a, kum tul khat a cin mateng minam tuamtuamte a khem theih nawn loh nadingin a tawh kalhin a ciamteh hi. Kum tul khat a cin khit ciangin tawl khat sung a kikhah ding ahi hi." 
Revelation20:4 Tua ciangin tokhom tungah a tu mi pawl khat ka mu a, tua mite tungah thukhen nading aana a kipia ahi hi. Jesu thu a genna le Pasian thu hangin a kithat miteʼ kha zong ka mu hi. Tua mite in ganhing ahi a, a lim ahi zongin bia lo uh hi; a taltang uh ah ahi a, a khut tung uh ah ahi zongin ganhing ciaptehna nei lo uh hi. Amaute hong hingkik uh a, Khris tawh kum tul khat sung ukna aana a neikhawm uh hi." 
Revelation20:5 Kum tul khat a cin mateng a si dangte hingkik lo uh hi. Hih pen sihna panin thawhkikna a masa ahi hi. 
Revelation20:6 Hih thawhkikna masa sungah a kihel mite pen Pasianʼ mi siangtho hi a, a hampha mahmah ahi uh hi. Nih vei sihna in tua bang mite bangmah cih zo nawn lo dinga, amaute pen Pasian le Khrisʼ siampite hi ding uh a, amah tawh kum tul khat sung ukna aana nei ding uh hi." 
Revelation20:7 Kum tul khat a cin ciangin a thongkiatna panin Satan kikhah dinga," 
Revelation20:8 Gog le Magog a kici leitung gam khempeuh ah a om minam khempeuh a khem dingin kuan khia ding hi. Satan in a galsim pih dingin tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam mihonpi kaikhawm ding hi. 
Revelation20:9 Leitung khempeuh ah amaute pai uh a, Pasianʼ mi siangtho omna mun le Pasian in a it khuapi umcih uh hi. Ahi zongin vantung panin meikuang hong pai sukin amaute a kaang tum hi." 
Revelation20:10 Amaute a khem Satan pen ganhing le kamsang zuau pa a omna mun, kat a kikhulna meiphual pi sungah kilawn a, a sun a zanin tua lai munah amaute in gimna a thuak tawntung ding uh ahi hi." 
Revelation20:11 Tua ciangin tokhom kang a lian khat le a tungah a tupa ka mu hi. Ama omna panin lei le van leng khia mang a, a tunna mel uh kithei lo hi." 
Revelation20:12 A lian a neu misite tua tokhom mai ah dingin laibute a kilem ka mu hi. Tua ciangin a nungta mite a kigelhna laibu a dang khat zong a kilem ka mu hi. Amauteʼ gamtatna tua laibute sungah a kigelhna tawh kizui-in misite tungah thu a kikhen hi. 
Revelation20:13 Tuipi sungah a om misite, tuipi in hong pusuah a, Sihna le Misiteʼ Gam in zong amau sungah a om misite hong pusuah uh hi. Tua ciangin a vekpi-in amauteʼ gamtatna sa tawh kizui-in thu a kikhen hi." 
Revelation20:14 Tua ciangin Sihna le Misiteʼ Gam, meiphual pi sungah a kilawn hi. Hih meiphual pi pen sihna nihna ahi hi." 
Revelation20:15 A nungta mite a kigelhna laibu sungah a min a om lo peuhmah meiphual pi sungah kilawn hi. 
Revelation21:1 Tua ciangin van thak khat le lei thak khat ka mu hi. Van masa le lei masa maimang khin a, tuipi zong om nawn lo hi." 
Revelation21:2 Mothak khat a pasal tawh a kituah dingin a kizem bangin vantung Pasian kiang panin Khuapi Siangtho ahi Jerusalem khua thak a hong pai suk ka mu hi. 
Revelation21:3 Tokhom panin nakpi takin awging khat ka za a, “Tu-in Pasian omna inn pen mite tawh om khawm ta hi. Pasian in amaute ompih dinga, amaute pen ama mite hi ding uh hi. Pasian mahmah amaute tawh om khawm dinga, amah pen amauteʼ Pasian hi ding hi." 
Revelation21:4 Amauteʼ mit panin khitui khempeuh nulsak ding hi. Thu lui sate maimang khinta ahih manin sihna, dahna le na sa a kahna cihte om nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation21:5 Tua ciangin tokhom tungah a tupa in, “Tu-in na khempeuh a thakin ka bawl hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin, “Hih thute thumanin muantaak ahih manin lai ah gelh in,” hong ci lai hi." 
Revelation21:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-in man khinta! Kei pen a kipatna le a tawpna a cihna Alfa le Omega ka hi hi. A dangtak mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna tuinak panin a khongin tui ka pia ding hi." 
Revelation21:7 A gualzo mi khempeuh in kei tung panin a ngah ding thu in: Kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, amaute keima ta ahi ding uh hi." 
Revelation21:8 Ahi zongin a meidawite, a leh tatte, a lampialte, mi thatte, a paktatte, aisante, milim biate le zuau gente om nading mun pen sihna nihna ahi kat a kikhulna meiphual pi kuang sung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation21:9 Tua ciangin gimna nunung sagihte a dimin a om hai sagih a tawi vantungmi sagihte sung panin khat kei kiangah hong pai-in thu hong gen a, “Hong pai in; Tuuno zi, a Mothak kong lak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation21:10 Tua laitakin Kha Siangtho tawh ka kidim a, tua vantungmi in mual sang mahmah khat dawnah hong paipih hi. Vantung Pasian kiang panin a hong pai suk Khuapi Siangtho ahi Jerusalem khua a hong lak hi." 
Revelation21:11 Tua khuapi pen Pasianʼ vang tawh tee ziazua a, Jasper suangmanpha bangin taang a, Kristal suangmanpha bangin siang kilkel hi." 
Revelation21:12 A kulh sahin sang mahmah a, kulh kongpi sawm le nih nei-in, a kongpite ah vantungmi sawm le nih om a, a kulh kongpite tungah Israel minam sawm le nihteʼ min kigelh hi." 
Revelation21:13 Nisuahna lamah kongpi thum, leilu lamah thum, leitaw lamah thum, nitumna lamah thum mah om hi." 
Revelation21:14 Tua khuapi kulh pen kulh tawphah suang sawm le nih tungah a kiciang hi a, tua suangtawphahte tungah Tuuno sawltak sawm le nihteʼ min kigelh hi." 
Revelation21:15 Keima kiangah thu a hong gen vantungmi in tua khuapi, a kulh kongpite le a kulh a teh nadingin kham kibawl tehna ciang khat a nei hi." 
Revelation21:16 Tua khuapi a pang kikim linlian a, a dung a vai a kikim ahi hi. A ciang tawh khuapi a teh ciangin tai tul le za nga bang pha a, a dung, a vai le a sanna kikim hi." 
Revelation21:17 A kulhpi zong ama zat tehna tawh a teh ciangin pi za nih sawm khat guk a sang hi. 
Revelation21:18 A kulhpi dingin jasper suangmanpha kiciang a, a khua sung pen kham citak tawh a kibawl hi a, limlang bangin siang kilkel hi." 
Revelation21:19 Tua khuapi kulh suangtawphahte pen suangmanpha namkim tawh kizem hi. A masa-in jasper suangmanpha, a nihna ah sapfira suangmanpha, a thumna ah agate suangmanpha, a lina ah emerald suangmanpha," 
Revelation21:20 a ngana ah onik suangmanpha, a gukna ah karnelian suangmanpha, a sagihna ah khrisolait suangmanpha, a giatna ah beryl suangmanpha, a kuana ah topaz suangmanpha, a sawmna ah khrisoprase suangmanpha, a sawm le khatna ah jakinth suangmanpha, a sawm le nihna ah amethyst suangmanpha tawh a kizem hi." 
Revelation21:21 A kongpi sawm le nihte kep sawm le nih tawh a kibawl hi a, kongpi khat ciangin kep sabit khat ahi hi. A khuapi sung lampite kham citak vive hi a, limlang bangin a sung kimu paisuak thei hi." 
Revelation21:22 A Vanglian Topa Pasian le Tuuno pen khuapi biakinn hi ta ahih manin tua khua sungah biakinn dang ka mu kei hi. 
Revelation21:23 Pasianʼ minthanna vang pen khuavak hi a, Tuuno zong meivak hi khin ahih manin tua khuapi in nitaang le khataang cihte kisam lo hi." 
Revelation21:24 Tua a taang sungah leitung mite lam pai ding uh a, leitung kumpite in a neihsa khempeuh uh hong paipih ding uh hi." 
Revelation21:25 Zan khuamial hun cih om lo ding ahih manin kulh kongpite khak hun cih om loin a tawntungin kihong paisuak ding hi. 
Revelation21:26 Leitung miteʼ hauhna le liatna teng tua khuapi sung hong kitun pih ding hi. 
Revelation21:27 Ahi zongin a siang lo, a hoih loin a gamta mi, zuau a gen mite kuamah lut thei lo ding uh a, a nungta mite a kigelhna Tuuno laibu sungah a min a omte bek tua khuapi sungah lut thei ding uh hi." 
Revelation22:1 Tua ciangin vantungmi in Pasian le Tuuno tokhom panin a hong luang khia, kristal suangmanpha bangin a tee selsel gun tui hong lak a," 
Revelation22:2 khuapi sung lampi laizang ah a luang hi. Tua gun pang tuakah nuntakna singkung po a, kha simin gah ahih manin kum khat sungin sawm le nih vei a gah hi. A tehte zong natna dam nading zatui-in kizang hi." 
Revelation22:3 Pasianʼ samsiatna a ngah peuhpeuh tua khua sungah om lo hi. Tua khuapi sungah Pasian le Tuunoʼ tokhom om dinga, ama nasemte in amah a bia ding uh hi." 
Revelation22:4 Amaute in ama maitang mu ding uh a, a taltang tung uh ah ama min kigelh ding hi." 
Revelation22:5 Topa Pasian pen amauteʼ khuavak hi-in, a tawntungin amaute in uk paisuak ding uh ahih manin khuamial hun cih om nawn lo dinga, khua a vaksak ding meivak le nitaang cihte kisam lo ding uh hi." 
Revelation22:6 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah, “Hih thute muantaak a, thuman ahi hi. Kamsangte tungah a Kha Siangtho a pia Topa Pasian in a hong piang baih ding thute, a nasemte tungah a lak dingin a vantung mite a hong sawl hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:7 Jesu in, “Kei a hong pai baih ta ding ka hi hi. Hih laibu sunga kigelh thu a zui mite mi hampha ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:8 Keimah Johan in hih thute za-in ka muh ahi hi. Hih thute za-in ka muh ciangin hih thute kei tungah a hong lak vantungmi a bia dingin a khe phung ah ka bok suk hi. 
Revelation22:9 Ahi zongin amah in, “Kei hong bia kei in. Kei pen nang le na sanggamte le hih laibu sungah a om thu a zui mite tawh nasem khawm khat ka hi hi. Pasian bia in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:10 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah, “Hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute a tun ding hong nai ta ahih manin imcip kei in." 
Revelation22:11 A gilo mite gilo lailai henla, a kihhuai gamtatte kihhuai gamtat lailai henla, a hoih gamtatte hoih gamtat lailai henla, a siangtho mite a siangtho mah hi lailai tahen!” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:12 Tua ciangin Jesu in, “Kei ka hong pai baih ta dinga, mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in a thaman ding uh ka hong puak ding hi." 
Revelation22:13 Kei pen a masa le a nunung, a kipatna le a tawpna a cihnopna ahi Alfa le Omega ka hi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:14 Khuapi kulh kongpi sungah a lut theih nading le nuntakna singgah a nek theih nadingun a puan uh a siangin a sawp mite, mi hampha ahi uh hi." 
Revelation22:15 Ahi zongin a lampial mite, aisan mite, a paktat mite, mi thatte, milim biate le zuaugen nuamsa-in zuau a gengen mite, khuapi pua lamah a om uh hi." 
Revelation22:16 “Keimah Jesu in pawlpite adingin hih thute nang kiangah a hong gen dingin ka vantungmi ka hong sawl hi. Kei pen Davidʼ zung le a suan ahi, zingsol ka hi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:17 Kha Siangtho le Mothak in Jesu kiangah, “Hong pai in,” a ci uh hi. Hih thu a za mi khempeuh in zong Jesu aw, “Hong pai in,” ci ta uh hen. A dangtak mi khempeuh hong pai uh henla, a deih khempeuh in nuntakna tui a khongin hong la ta uh hen." 
Revelation22:18 Keimah Johan in hih laibu sungah a kigelh thu a za mi khempeuh ka hong hilhkholh nopna panin: A thu a behlap na om uh leh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh gimnate note tungah hong behlap dinga," 
Revelation22:19 hih laibu sungah a kigelh thute a hem khia na om uh leh Pasian in zong hih laibu sungah a kigelh nuntakna singgah le Khuapi Siangtho sungah na ngah ding uh hamphatnate note kiang panin hong hepkhiatsak ding hi. 
Revelation22:20 Hih thu khempeuh hong genin teci a pang mipa in, “Ka hong pai baih taktak ding hi,” hong ci hi. Na cih bangin hi tapeuh hen. Topa Jesu aw, hong pai ta in!"
